authors_text: Mu Yang,Kevin Hirschi,Stephen D. Looney,Okim Kang,John H. L. Hansen
title: Improving Mispronunciation Detection with Wav2vec2-based Momentum Pseudo-Labeling for Accentedness and Intelligibility Assessment
title_zh: 使用基于 Wav2vec2 的动量伪标签改进发音错误检测，以进行口音和清晰度评估
abstract: Current leading mispronunciation detection and diagnosis (MDD) systems achieve promising performance via end-to-end phoneme recognition. One challenge of such end-to-end solutions is the scarcity of human-annotated phonemes on natural L2 speech. In this work, we leverage unlabeled L2 speech via a pseudo-labeling (PL) procedure and extend the fine-tuning approach based on pre-trained self-supervised learning (SSL) models. Specifically, we use Wav2vec 2.0 as our SSL model, and fine-tune it using original labeled L2 speech samples plus the created pseudo-labeled L2 speech samples. Our pseudo labels are dynamic and are produced by an ensemble of the online model on-the-fly, which ensures that our model is robust to pseudo label noise. We show that fine-tuning with pseudo labels achieves a 5.35% phoneme error rate reduction and 2.48% MDD F1 score improvement over a labeled-samples-only fine-tuning baseline. The proposed PL method is also shown to outperform conventional offline PL methods. Compared to the state-of-the-art MDD systems, our MDD solution produces a more accurate and consistent phonetic error diagnosis. In addition, we conduct an open test on a separate UTD-4Accents dataset, where our system recognition outputs show a strong correlation with human perception, based on accentedness and intelligibility.

One challenge of such end-to-end solutions is the scarcity of human-annotated phonemes on natural L2 speech. In this work, we leverage unlabeled L2 speech via a pseudo-labeling (PL) procedure and extend the fine-tuning approach based on pre-trained self-supervised learning (SSL) models. Specifically, we use Wav2vec 2.0 as our SSL model, and fine-tune it using original labeled L2 speech samples plus the created pseudo-labeled L2 speech samples. Our pseudo labels are dynamic and are produced by an ensemble of the online model on-the-fly, which ensures that our model is robust to pseudo label noise. We show that fine-tuning with pseudo labels achieves a 5.35% phoneme error rate reduction and 2.48% MDD F1 score improvement over a labeled-samples-only fine-tuning baseline. The proposed PL method is also shown to outperform conventional offline PL methods. Compared to the state-of-the-art MDD systems, our MDD solution produces a more accurate and consistent phonetic error diagnosis. In addition, we conduct an open test on a separate UTD-4Accents dataset, where our system recognition outputs show a strong correlation with human perception, based on accentedness and intelligibility.
abstract_zh: 当前领先的发音错误检测和诊断（MDD）系统通过端到端音素识别实现了令人鼓舞的性能。这种端到端解决方案面临的挑战之一是自然 L2 语音中缺乏人工注释的音素。在这项工作中，我们通过伪标记 (PL) 过程利用未标记的 L2 语音，并扩展基于预训练的自监督学习 (SSL) 模型的微调方法。具体来说，我们使用 Wav2vec 2.0 作为我们的 SSL 模型，并使用原始标记的 L2 语音样本加上创建的伪标记 L2 语音样本对其进行微调。我们的伪标签是动态的，由在线模型的集合即时生成，这确保了我们的模型对伪标签噪声具有鲁棒性。我们表明，与仅标记样本的微调基线相比，使用伪标签进行微调可降低 5.35% 的音素错误率，并将 MDD F1 分数提高 2.48%。所提出的 PL 方法也被证明优于传统的离线 PL 方法。与最先进的 MDD 系统相比，我们的 MDD 解决方案可产生更准确、一致的语音错误诊断。此外，我们对单独的 UTD-4Accents 数据集进行了开放测试，其中我们的系统识别输出基于口音和清晰度，显示出与人类感知的强相关性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于Wav2vec2的动量伪标签方法，用于改进发音错误检测系统，提升对口音和可理解性的评估能力。
AI.motivation: 现有端到端发音检测系统因依赖人工标注的音素数据而受限，而自然L2语音中此类标注稀缺，需利用未标注数据提升模型性能。
AI.method: 采用Wav2vec2自监督模型，结合动态生成的伪标签进行微调。伪标签由在线模型集成生成，通过动量更新机制增强鲁棒性，并与传统离线伪标签方法对比验证效果。
AI.result: 伪标签微调使音素错误率降低5.35%，MDD F1分数提升2.48%，在UTD-4Accents数据集上系统输出与人类感知高度相关。
AI.conclusion: 提出的伪标签方法优于现有技术，在发音诊断准确性与一致性上表现突出，且能有效利用未标注数据提升模型性能。

authors_text: Ayush Tewari,Mallikarjun B R,Xingang Pan,Ohad Fried,Maneesh Agrawala,Christian Theobalt
title: Disentangled3D: Learning a 3D Generative Model with Disentangled Geometry and Appearance from Monocular Images
title_zh: Disentangled3D：从单目图像中学习具有解缠几何和外观的 3D 生成模型
abstract: Learning 3D generative models from a dataset of monocular images enables self-supervised 3D reasoning and controllable synthesis. State-of-the-art 3D generative models are GANs which use neural 3D volumetric representations for synthesis. Images are synthesized by rendering the volumes from a given camera. These models can disentangle the 3D scene from the camera viewpoint in any generated image. However, most models do not disentangle other factors of image formation, such as geometry and appearance. In this paper, we design a 3D GAN which can learn a disentangled model of objects, just from monocular observations. Our model can disentangle the geometry and appearance variations in the scene, i.e., we can independently sample from the geometry and appearance spaces of the generative model. This is achieved using a novel non-rigid deformable scene formulation. A 3D volume which represents an object instance is computed as a non-rigidly deformed canonical 3D volume. Our method learns the canonical volume, as well as its deformations, jointly during training. This formulation also helps us improve the disentanglement between the 3D scene and the camera viewpoints using a novel pose regularization loss defined on the 3D deformation field. In addition, we further model the inverse deformations, enabling the computation of dense correspondences between images generated by our model. Finally, we design an approach to embed real images into the latent space of our disentangled generative model, enabling editing of real images.
summary: Learning 3D generative models from a dataset of monocular images enables self-supervised 3D reasoning and controllable synthesis. State-of-the-art 3D generative models are GANs which use neural 3D volumetric representations for synthesis. Images are synthesized by rendering the volumes from a given camera. These models can disentangle the 3D scene from the camera viewpoint in any generated image. However, most models do not disentangle other factors of image formation, such as geometry and appearance. In this paper, we design a 3D GAN which can learn a disentangled model of objects, just from monocular observations. Our model can disentangle the geometry and appearance variations in the scene, i.e., we can independently sample from the geometry and appearance spaces of the generative model. This is achieved using a novel non-rigid deformable scene formulation. A 3D volume which represents an object instance is computed as a non-rigidly deformed canonical 3D volume. Our method learns the canonical volume, as well as its deformations, jointly during training. This formulation also helps us improve the disentanglement between the 3D scene and the camera viewpoints using a novel pose regularization loss defined on the 3D deformation field. In addition, we further model the inverse deformations, enabling the computation of dense correspondences between images generated by our model. Finally, we design an approach to embed real images into the latent space of our disentangled generative model, enabling editing of real images.
abstract_zh: 从单目图像数据集中学习 3D 生成模型可以实现自监督 3D 推理和可控合成。最先进的 3D 生成模型是使用神经 3D 体积表示进行合成的 GAN。图像是通过渲染给定相机的体积来合成的。这些模型可以在任何生成的图像中从相机视点解开 3D 场景。然而，大多数模型并没有解开图像形成的其他因素，例如几何和外观。在本文中，我们设计了一个 3D GAN，它可以仅通过单目观察来学习对象的解缠结模型。我们的模型可以解开场景中的几何和外观变化，即我们可以从生成模型的几何和外观空间独立采样。这是通过使用新颖的非刚性可变形场景公式来实现的。表示对象实例的 3D 体积被计算为非刚性变形的规范 3D 体积。我们的方法在训练过程中联合学习规范体积及其变形。该公式还帮助我们使用在 3D 变形场上定义的新颖姿势正则化损失来改善 3D 场景和相机视点之间的分离。此外，我们进一步对逆变形进行建模，从而能够计算模型生成的图像之间的密集对应关系。最后，我们设计了一种将真实图像嵌入到我们解开的生成模型的潜在空间中的方法，从而能够编辑真实图像。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种从单目图像学习分离几何和外观的3D生成模型的方法。
AI.motivation: 现有3D生成模型无法有效分离图像中的几何结构与外观属性，限制了生成结果的可控性与编辑能力。
AI.method: 通过非刚性变形场景建模，联合学习 canonical 3D 体积及其变形，并引入姿态正则化损失提升场景与视角的解耦，同时建立逆向变形以实现图像密集对应。
AI.result: 模型成功实现几何与外观的分离，支持独立采样生成，并可嵌入真实图像进行编辑，实验验证了优于现有方法的解耦效果。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为单目图像驱动的3D生成提供了更精细的控制能力，推动了可编辑的生成模型发展。

authors_text: Xubo Lyu,Amin Banitalebi-Dehkordi,Mo Chen,Yong Zhang
title: Asynchronous, Option-Based Multi-Agent Policy Gradient: A Conditional Reasoning Approach
title_zh: 异步、基于选项的多代理策略梯度：一种条件推理方法
comment: Accepted by IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS), 2023
comments: Accepted by IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS), 2023
abstract: Cooperative multi-agent problems often require coordination between agents, which can be achieved through a centralized policy that considers the global state. Multi-agent policy gradient (MAPG) methods are commonly used to learn such policies, but they are often limited to problems with low-level action spaces. In complex problems with large state and action spaces, it is advantageous to extend MAPG methods to use higher-level actions, also known as options, to improve the policy search efficiency. However, multi-robot option executions are often asynchronous, that is, agents may select and complete their options at different time steps. This makes it difficult for MAPG methods to derive a centralized policy and evaluate its gradient, as centralized policy always select new options at the same time. In this work, we propose a novel, conditional reasoning approach to address this problem and demonstrate its effectiveness on representative option-based multi-agent cooperative tasks through empirical validation. Find code and videos at: \href{https://sites.google.com/view/mahrlsupp/}{https://sites.google.com/view/mahrlsupp/}

However, multi-robot option executions are often asynchronous, that is, agents may select and complete their options at different time steps. This makes it difficult for MAPG methods to derive a centralized policy and evaluate its gradient, as centralized policy always select new options at the same time. In this work, we propose a novel, conditional reasoning approach to address this problem and demonstrate its effectiveness on representative option-based multi-agent cooperative tasks through empirical validation. Find code and videos at: \href{https://sites.google.com/view/mahrlsupp/}{https://sites.google.com/view/mahrlsupp/}
abstract_zh: 协作多智能体问题通常需要智能体之间的协调，这可以通过考虑全局状态的集中策略来实现。多智能体策略梯度（MAPG）方法通常用于学习此类策略，但它们通常仅限于低级动作空间的问题。在具有大状态和动作空间的复杂问题中，扩展 MAPG 方法以使用更高级别的动作（也称为选项）来提高策略搜索效率是有利的。然而，多机器人选项执行通常是异步的，也就是说，代理可以在不同的时间步骤选择并完成他们的选项。这使得 MAPG 方法很难导出集中策略并评估其梯度，因为集中策略总是同时选择新选项。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的条件推理方法来解决这个问题，并通过实证验证证明了其在基于代表性选项的多智能体合作任务上的有效性。代码和视频位于：\href{https://sites.google.com/view/mahrlsupp/}{https://sites.google.com/view/mahrlsupp/}

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于条件推理的异步、选项驱动的多智能体策略梯度方法，以解决多智能体协作问题中异步选项执行的挑战。
AI.motivation: 现有MAPG方法在处理大规模状态和动作空间时效率低下，且难以应对多机器人异步执行选项的问题，导致集中式策略难以有效建模和梯度评估。
AI.method: 通过引入条件推理机制，设计异步选项执行框架，允许智能体在不同时间步独立选择和完成选项，同时保持集中式策略的全局状态感知能力。
AI.result: 在代表性选项驱动的多智能体协作任务中验证了方法的有效性，实验表明其在异步场景下优于传统同步方法，提升了策略搜索效率和协作性能。
AI.conclusion: 条件推理方法有效解决了异步选项执行问题，为复杂多智能体系统的策略优化提供了新思路，未来可扩展至更广泛的多智能体应用场景。

search_text: Asynchronous, Option-Based Multi-Agent Policy Gradient: A Conditional Reasoning Approach 异步、基于选项的多代理策略梯度：一种条件推理方法 Cooperative multi-agent problems often require coordination between agents, which can be achieved through a centralized policy that considers the global state. Multi-agent policy gradient (MAPG) methods are commonly used to learn such policies, but they are often limited to problems with low-level action spaces. In complex problems with large state and action spaces, it is advantageous to extend MAPG methods to use higher-level actions, also known as options, to improve the policy search efficiency. However, multi-robot option executions are often asynchronous, that is, agents may select and complete their options at different time steps. This makes it difficult for MAPG methods to derive a centralized policy and evaluate its gradient, as centralized policy always select new options at the same time. In this work, we propose a novel, conditional reasoning approach to address this problem and demonstrate its effectiveness on representative option-based multi-agent cooperative tasks through empirical validation. authors_text: Kourosh Hakhamaneshi,Marcel Nassar,Mariano Phielipp,Pieter Abbeel,Vladimir Stojanović
title: Pretraining Graph Neural Networks for few-shot Analog Circuit Modeling and Design
title_zh: 用于少量模拟电路建模和设计的预训练图神经网络
abstract: Being able to predict the performance of circuits without running expensive simulations is a desired capability that can catalyze automated design. In this paper, we present a supervised pretraining approach to learn circuit representations that can be adapted to new circuit topologies or unseen prediction tasks. We hypothesize that if we train a neural network (NN) that can predict the output DC voltages of a wide range of circuit instances it will be forced to learn generalizable knowledge about the role of each circuit element and how they interact with each other. The dataset for this supervised learning objective can be easily collected at scale since the required DC simulation to get ground truth labels is relatively cheap. This representation would then be helpful for few-shot generalization to unseen circuit metrics that require more time consuming simulations for obtaining the ground-truth labels. To cope with the variable topological structure of different circuits we describe each circuit as a graph and use graph neural networks (GNNs) to learn node embeddings. We show that pretraining GNNs on prediction of output node voltages can encourage learning representations that can be adapted to new unseen topologies or prediction of new circuit level properties with up to 10x more sample efficiency compared to a randomly initialized model. We further show that we can improve sample efficiency of prior SoTA model-based optimization methods by 2x (almost as good as using an oracle model) via fintuning pretrained GNNs as the feature extractor of the learned models.
summary: Being able to predict the performance of circuits without running expensive simulations is a desired capability that can catalyze automated design. In this paper, we present a supervised pretraining approach to learn circuit representations that can be adapted to new circuit topologies or unseen prediction tasks. We hypothesize that if we train a neural network (NN) that can predict the output DC voltages of a wide range of circuit instances it will be forced to learn generalizable knowledge about the role of each circuit element and how they interact with each other. The dataset for this supervised learning objective can be easily collected at scale since the required DC simulation to get ground truth labels is relatively cheap. This representation would then be helpful for few-shot generalization to unseen circuit metrics that require more time consuming simulations for obtaining the ground-truth labels. To cope with the variable topological structure of different circuits we describe each circuit as a graph and use graph neural networks (GNNs) to learn node embeddings. We show that pretraining GNNs on prediction of output node voltages can encourage learning representations that can be adapted to new unseen topologies or prediction of new circuit level properties with up to 10x more sample efficiency compared to a randomly initialized model. We further show that we can improve sample efficiency of prior SoTA model-based optimization methods by 2x (almost as good as using an oracle model) via fintuning pretrained GNNs as the feature extractor of the learned models.
abstract_zh: 能够在不运行昂贵的仿真的情况下预测电路的性能是一种可以促进自动化设计的所需功能。在本文中，我们提出了一种有监督的预训练方法来学习电路表示，该方法可以适应新的电路拓扑或看不见的预测任务。我们假设，如果我们训练一个可以预测各种电路实例的输出直流电压的神经网络（NN），它将被迫学习有关每个电路元件的作用以及它们如何相互作用的通用知识。这个监督学习目标的数据集可以很容易地大规模收集，因为获得地面真实标签所需的 DC 模拟相对便宜。这种表示将有助于对看不见的电路指标进行几次泛化，这些指标需要更耗时的模拟才能获得真实标签。为了应对不同电路的可变拓扑结构，我们将每个电路描述为图，并使用图神经网络（GNN）来学习节点嵌入。我们表明，对 GNN 进行输出节点电压预测的预训练可以鼓励学习表示，这些表示可以适应新的未见过的拓扑或预测新的电路级属性，与随机初始化的模型相比，样本效率提高了 10 倍。我们进一步表明，通过将预训练的 GNN 作为学习模型的特征提取器，我们可以将先前基于 SoTA 模型的优化方法的样本效率提高 2 倍（几乎与使用预言机模型一样好）。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种预训练图神经网络的方法，用于小样本模拟电路建模与设计，以提高样本效率。
AI.motivation: 传统电路模拟成本高，需通过预训练模型利用廉价数据学习通用表示，以提升新任务的样本效率。
AI.method: 采用监督预训练图神经网络（GNN）预测电路DC电压，生成节点嵌入表示，并通过微调适应新拓扑或预测任务。
AI.result: 预训练GNN在新任务上的样本效率比随机初始化模型高10倍，且优化方法效率提升2倍，接近理想模型效果。
AI.conclusion: 预训练GNN能有效学习电路通用表示，显著提升小样本场景下的建模与设计效率。

authors_text: Alexandros Gkillas,Dimitris Ampeliotis,Kostas Berberidis
title: Connections between Deep Equilibrium and Sparse Representation Models with Application to Hyperspectral Image Denoising
title_zh: 深度平衡和稀疏表示模型之间的联系及其在高光谱图像去噪中的应用
comment: ef:IEEE Transactions on Image Processing ( Volume: 32) 22 February 2023 1513 - 1528
comments: ef:IEEE Transactions on Image Processing ( Volume: 32) 22 February 2023 1513 - 1528
abstract: In this study, the problem of computing a sparse representation of multi-dimensional visual data is considered. In general, such data e.g., hyperspectral images, color images or video data consists of signals that exhibit strong local dependencies. A new computationally efficient sparse coding optimization problem is derived by employing regularization terms that are adapted to the properties of the signals of interest. Exploiting the merits of the learnable regularization techniques, a neural network is employed to act as structure prior and reveal the underlying signal dependencies. To solve the optimization problem Deep unrolling and Deep equilibrium based algorithms are developed, forming highly interpretable and concise deep-learning-based architectures, that process the input dataset in a block-by-block fashion. Extensive simulation results, in the context of hyperspectral image denoising, are provided, which demonstrate that the proposed algorithms outperform significantly other sparse coding approaches and exhibit superior performance against recent state-of-the-art deep-learning-based denoising models. In a wider perspective, our work provides a unique bridge between a classic approach, that is the sparse representation theory, and modern representation tools that are based on deep learning modeling.
summary: In this study, the problem of computing a sparse representation of multi-dimensional visual data is considered. In general, such data e.g., hyperspectral images, color images or video data consists of signals that exhibit strong local dependencies. A new computationally efficient sparse coding optimization problem is derived by employing regularization terms that are adapted to the properties of the signals of interest. Exploiting the merits of the learnable regularization techniques, a neural network is employed to act as structure prior and reveal the underlying signal dependencies. To solve the optimization problem Deep unrolling and Deep equilibrium based algorithms are developed, forming highly interpretable and concise deep-learning-based architectures, that process the input dataset in a block-by-block fashion. Extensive simulation results, in the context of hyperspectral image denoising, are provided, which demonstrate that the proposed algorithms outperform significantly other sparse coding approaches and exhibit superior performance against recent state-of-the-art deep-learning-based denoising models. In a wider perspective, our work provides a unique bridge between a classic approach, that is the sparse representation theory, and modern representation tools that are based on deep learning modeling.
abstract_zh: 在本研究中，考虑了计算多维视觉数据的稀疏表示的问题。一般来说，此类数据（例如高光谱图像、彩色图像或视频数据）由表现出强烈局部依赖性的信号组成。通过采用适应感兴趣信号属性的正则化项，导出了一种新的计算高效的稀疏编码优化问题。利用可学习正则化技术的优点，采用神经网络作为结构先验并揭示潜在的信号依赖性。为了解决优化问题，开发了基于深度展开和深度平衡的算法，形成高度可解释且简洁的基于深度学习的架构，以逐块的方式处理输入数据集。在高光谱图像去噪的背景下提供了广泛的仿真结果，这表明所提出的算法明显优于其他稀疏编码方法，并且相对于最近最先进的基于深度学习的去噪模型表现出优越的性能。从更广泛的角度来看，我们的工作在经典方法（即稀疏表示理论）和基于深度学习建模的现代表示工具之间提供了一座独特的桥梁。

AI.tldr: 本文提出将深度平衡模型与稀疏表示理论结合，开发高效算法用于高光谱图像去噪任务。
AI.motivation: 传统稀疏编码难以有效捕捉多维视觉数据的局部依赖性，而深度学习方法缺乏可解释性，需建立经典模型与现代深度学习的桥梁。
AI.method: 设计基于深度展开和深度平衡的优化算法，利用神经网络作为结构先验，分块处理输入数据并引入自适应正则化项。
AI.result: 在高光谱图像去噪实验中，所提方法显著优于传统稀疏编码及最新深度学习去噪模型，具有更优性能。
AI.conclusion: 成功连接稀疏表示理论与深度学习框架，为多维信号处理提供新型可解释的深度学习架构。

search_text: Connections between Deep Equilibrium and Sparse Representation Models with Application to Hyperspectral Image Denoising 深度平衡和稀疏表示模型之间的联系及其在高光谱图像去噪中的应用 In this study, the problem of computing a sparse representation of multi-dimensional visual data is considered. In general, such data e.g., hyperspectral images, color images or video data consists of signals that exhibit strong local dependencies. A new computationally efficient sparse coding optimization problem is derived by employing regularization terms that are adapted to the properties of the signals of interest. Exploiting the merits of the learnable regularization techniques, a neural network is employed to act as structure prior and reveal the underlying signal dependencies. To solve the optimization problem Deep unrolling and Deep equilibrium based algorithms are developed, forming highly interpretable and concise deep-learning-based architectures, that process the input dataset in a block-by-block fashion. Extensive simulation results, in the context of hyperspectral image denoising, are provided, which demonstrate that the proposed algorithms outperform significantly other sparse coding approaches and exhibit superior performance against recent state-of-the-art deep-learning-based denoising models. In a wider perspective, our work provides a unique bridge between a classic approach, that is the sparse representation theory, and modern representation tools that are based on deep learning modeling. 在本研究中，考虑了计算多维视觉数据的稀疏表示的问题。一般来说，此类数据（例如高光谱图像、彩色图像或视频数据）由表现出强烈局部依赖性的信号组成。通过采用适应感兴趣信号属性的正则化项，导出了一种新的计算高效的稀疏编码优化问题。利用可学习正则化技术的优点，采用神经网络作为结构先验并揭示潜在的信号依赖性。为了解决优化问题，开发了基于深度展开和深度平衡的算法，形成高度可解释且简洁的基于深度学习的架构，以逐块的方式处理输入数据集。在高光谱图像去噪的背景下提供了广泛的仿真结果，这表明所提出的算法明显优于其他稀疏编码方法，并且相对于最近最先进的基于深度学习的去噪模型表现出优越的性能。从更广泛的角度来看，我们的工作在经典方法（即稀疏表示理论）和基于深度学习建模的现代表示工具之间提供了一座独特的桥梁。 本文提出将深度平衡模型与稀疏表示理论结合，开发高效算法用于高光谱图像去噪任务。 Alexandros Gkillas,Dimitris Ampeliotis,Kostas Berberidis cs.CV,cs.NE,eess.IV

authors_text: Mihai-Cezar Augustin,Vivien Bonvin,Regis Houssou,Efstratios Rappos,Stephan Robert-Nicoud
title: Radial Autoencoders for Enhanced Anomaly Detection
title_zh: 用于增强异常检测的径向自动编码器
abstract: In classification problems, supervised machine-learning methods outperform traditional algorithms, thanks to the ability of neural networks to learn complex patterns. However, in two-class classification tasks like anomaly or fraud detection, unsupervised methods could do even better, because their prediction is not limited to previously learned types of anomalies. An intuitive approach of anomaly detection can be based on the distances from the centers of mass of the two respective classes. Autoencoders, although trained without supervision, can also detect anomalies: considering the center of mass of the normal points, reconstructions have now radii, with largest radii most likely indicating anomalous points. Of course, radii-based classification were already possible without interposing an autoencoder. In any space, radial classification can be operated, to some extent. In order to outperform it, we proceed to radial deformations of data (i.e. centric compression or expansions of axes) and autoencoder training. Any autoencoder that makes use of a data center is here baptized a centric autoencoder (cAE). A special type is the cAE trained with a uniformly compressed dataset, named the centripetal autoencoder (cpAE). The new concept is studied here in relation with a schematic artificial dataset, and the derived methods show consistent score improvements. But tested on real banking data, our radial deformation supervised algorithms alone still perform better that cAEs, as expected from most supervised methods; nonetheless, in hybrid approaches, cAEs can be combined with a radial deformation of space, improving its classification score. We expect that centric autoencoders will become irreplaceable objects in anomaly live detection based on geometry, thanks to their ability to stem naturally on geometrical algorithms and to their native capability of detecting unknown anomaly types.
summary: In classification problems, supervised machine-learning methods outperform traditional algorithms, thanks to the ability of neural networks to learn complex patterns. However, in two-class classification tasks like anomaly or fraud detection, unsupervised methods could do even better, because their prediction is not limited to previously learned types of anomalies. An intuitive approach of anomaly detection can be based on the distances from the centers of mass of the two respective classes. Autoencoders, although trained without supervision, can also detect anomalies: considering the center of mass of the normal points, reconstructions have now radii, with largest radii most likely indicating anomalous points. Of course, radii-based classification were already possible without interposing an autoencoder. In any space, radial classification can be operated, to some extent. In order to outperform it, we proceed to radial deformations of data (i.e. centric compression or expansions of axes) and autoencoder training. Any autoencoder that makes use of a data center is here baptized a centric autoencoder (cAE). A special type is the cAE trained with a uniformly compressed dataset, named the centripetal autoencoder (cpAE). The new concept is studied here in relation with a schematic artificial dataset, and the derived methods show consistent score improvements. But tested on real banking data, our radial deformation supervised algorithms alone still perform better that cAEs, as expected from most supervised methods; nonetheless, in hybrid approaches, cAEs can be combined with a radial deformation of space, improving its classification score. We expect that centric autoencoders will become irreplaceable objects in anomaly live detection based on geometry, thanks to their ability to stem naturally on geometrical algorithms and to their native capability of detecting unknown anomaly types.
abstract_zh: 在分类问题中，由于神经网络学习复杂模式的能力，监督机器学习方法优于传统算法。然而，在异常或欺诈检测等二类分类任务中，无监督方法可以做得更好，因为它们的预测不限于先前学习的异常类型。异常检测的直观方法可以基于距两个相应类别的质心的距离。自动编码器虽然在没有监督的情况下进行训练，但也可以检测异常：考虑到正常点的质心，重建现在具有半径，最大的半径最有可能指示异常点。当然，基于半径的分类已经可以在不插入自动编码器的情况下实现。在任何空间中，径向分类在一定程度上都是可以操作的。为了超越它，我们继续进行数据的径向变形（即轴的中心压缩或扩展）和自动编码器训练。任何使用数据中心的自动编码器在这里都被称为中心自动编码器（cAE）。一种特殊类型是使用统一压缩数据集训练的 cAE，称为向心自动编码器 (cpAE)。这里结合示意性人工数据集研究了新概念，并且导出的方法显示了一致的分数改进。但在真实银行数据上进行测试时，我们的径向变形监督算法本身仍然比 cAE 表现更好，正如大多数监督方法所预期的那样；尽管如此，在混合方法中，cAE 可以与空间的径向变形相结合，从而提高其分类分数。我们预计中心自动编码器将成为基于几何的异常实时检测中不可替代的对象，这要归功于它们自然地基于几何算法的能力以及检测未知异常类型的本机能力。

AI.tldr: 提出径向自编码器（cAE和cpAE）以提升异常检测性能
AI.motivation: 传统监督方法受限于已知异常类型，而无监督方法如自编码器能检测未知类型，但需改进以提高检测效果
AI.method: 通过径向变形数据（中心压缩或扩展轴）训练径向自编码器（cAE），其中cpAE使用均匀压缩数据，结合几何算法进行异常检测
AI.result: 在人工数据集上表现提升，但实际数据中监督方法更优；混合方法结合cAE与径向变形可进一步提升分类效果
AI.conclusion: 径向自编码器因几何算法基础及未知异常检测能力，有望成为几何异常检测的关键工具

authors_text: Yurong You,Katie Z Luo,Cheng Perng Phoo,Wei-Lun Chao,Wen Sun,Bharath Hariharan,Mark Campbell,Kilian Q. Weinberger
title: Learning to Detect Mobile Objects from LiDAR Scans Without Labels
title_zh: 学习在没有标签的情况下通过 LiDAR 扫描检测移动物体
comment: Accepted by CVPR 2022. Code is available at https://github.com/YurongYou/MODEST
comments: Accepted by CVPR 2022. Code is available at https://github.com/YurongYou/MODEST
abstract: Current 3D object detectors for autonomous driving are almost entirely trained on human-annotated data. Although of high quality, the generation of such data is laborious and costly, restricting them to a few specific locations and object types. This paper proposes an alternative approach entirely based on unlabeled data, which can be collected cheaply and in abundance almost everywhere on earth. Our approach leverages several simple common sense heuristics to create an initial set of approximate seed labels. For example, relevant traffic participants are generally not persistent across multiple traversals of the same route, do not fly, and are never under ground. We demonstrate that these seed labels are highly effective to bootstrap a surprisingly accurate detector through repeated self-training without a single human annotated label.
summary: Current 3D object detectors for autonomous driving are almost entirely trained on human-annotated data. Although of high quality, the generation of such data is laborious and costly, restricting them to a few specific locations and object types. This paper proposes an alternative approach entirely based on unlabeled data, which can be collected cheaply and in abundance almost everywhere on earth. Our approach leverages several simple common sense heuristics to create an initial set of approximate seed labels. For example, relevant traffic participants are generally not persistent across multiple traversals of the same route, do not fly, and are never under ground. We demonstrate that these seed labels are highly effective to bootstrap a surprisingly accurate detector through repeated self-training without a single human annotated label.
abstract_zh: 目前用于自动驾驶的 3D 物体检测器几乎完全是根据人类注释的数据进行训练的。尽管质量很高，但此类数据的生成既费力又昂贵，将它们限制在少数特定位置和对象类型。本文提出了一种完全基于未标记数据的替代方法，这种数据可以在地球上几乎任何地方廉价且大量地收集。我们的方法利用几个简单的常识启发法来创建一组初始的近似种子标签。例如，相关交通参与者通常不会持续多次穿越同一路线，不会飞行，也不会在地下。我们证明，这些种子标签可以非常有效地通过重复的自我训练来引导令人惊讶的准确检测器，而无需单个人工注释标签。

AI.tldr: 提出一种无需人工标注数据，利用常识启发式方法从LiDAR扫描中学习检测移动物体的方法。
AI.motivation: 人工标注的3D目标检测数据成本高且受限于特定场景，亟需一种自动化、低成本的替代方案。
AI.method: 基于未标注数据，通过常识规则（如物体非持续性、非飞行性等）生成初始种子标签，再通过自训练迭代优化检测器。
AI.result: 在无人工标注情况下，通过自训练获得的检测器达到令人惊讶的高精度，验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 无需人工标注数据即可训练高精度3D目标检测器，为自动驾驶数据获取提供新路径。

search_text: Learning to Detect Mobile Objects from LiDAR Scans Without Labels 学习在没有标签的情况下通过 LiDAR 扫描检测移动物体 Current 3D object detectors for autonomous driving are almost entirely trained on human-annotated data. Although of high quality, the generation of such data is laborious and costly, restricting them to a few specific locations and object types. This paper proposes an alternative approach entirely based on unlabeled data, which can be collected cheaply and in abundance almost everywhere on earth. Our approach leverages several simple common sense heuristics to create an initial set of approximate seed labels. For example, relevant traffic participants are generally not persistent across multiple traversals of the same route, do not fly, and are never under ground. We demonstrate that these seed labels are highly effective to bootstrap a surprisingly accurate detector through repeated self-training without a single human annotated label. 目前用于自动驾驶的 3D 物体检测器几乎完全是根据人类注释的数据进行训练的。尽管质量很高，但此类数据的生成既费力又昂贵，将它们限制在少数特定位置和对象类型。本文提出了一种完全基于未标记数据的替代方法，这种数据可以在地球上几乎任何地方廉价且大量地收集。我们的方法利用几个简单的常识启发法来创建一组初始的近似种子标签。例如，相关交通参与者通常不会持续多次穿越同一路线，不会飞行，也不会在地下。我们证明，这些种子标签可以非常有效地通过重复的自我训练来引导令人惊讶的准确检测器，而无需单个人工注释标签。 提出一种无需人工标注数据，利用常识启发式方法从LiDAR扫描中学习检测移动物体的方法。 Yurong You,Katie Z Luo,Cheng Perng Phoo,Wei-Lun Chao,Wen Sun,Bharath Hariharan,Mark Campbell,Kilian Q. Weinberger cs.CV

authors_text: Vishal Asnani,Xi Yin,Tal Hassner,Sijia Liu,Xiaoming Liu
title: Proactive Image Manipulation Detection
title_zh: 主动图像篡改检测
abstract: Image manipulation detection algorithms are often trained to discriminate between images manipulated with particular Generative Models (GMs) and genuine/real images, yet generalize poorly to images manipulated with GMs unseen in the training. Conventional detection algorithms receive an input image passively. By contrast, we propose a proactive scheme to image manipulation detection. Our key enabling technique is to estimate a set of templates which when added onto the real image would lead to more accurate manipulation detection. That is, a template protected real image, and its manipulated version, is better discriminated compared to the original real image vs. its manipulated one. These templates are estimated using certain constraints based on the desired properties of templates. For image manipulation detection, our proposed approach outperforms the prior work by an average precision of 16% for CycleGAN and 32% for GauGAN. Our approach is generalizable to a variety of GMs showing an improvement over prior work by an average precision of 10% averaged across 12 GMs. Our code is available at https://www.github.com/vishal3477/proactive_IMD.
summary: Image manipulation detection algorithms are often trained to discriminate between images manipulated with particular Generative Models (GMs) and genuine/real images, yet generalize poorly to images manipulated with GMs unseen in the training. Conventional detection algorithms receive an input image passively. By contrast, we propose a proactive scheme to image manipulation detection. Our key enabling technique is to estimate a set of templates which when added onto the real image would lead to more accurate manipulation detection. That is, a template protected real image, and its manipulated version, is better discriminated compared to the original real image vs. its manipulated one. These templates are estimated using certain constraints based on the desired properties of templates. For image manipulation detection, our proposed approach outperforms the prior work by an average precision of 16% for CycleGAN and 32% for GauGAN. Our approach is generalizable to a variety of GMs showing an improvement over prior work by an average precision of 10% averaged across 12 GMs. Our code is available at https://www.github.com/vishal3477/proactive_IMD.
abstract_zh: 图像操纵检测算法通常经过训练，可以区分使用特定生成模型 (GM) 操纵的图像和真实/真实图像，但对于训练中未见的 GM 操纵的图像的泛化能力较差。传统的检测算法被动地接收输入图像。相比之下，我们提出了一种主动的图像操纵检测方案。我们的关键启用技术是估计一组模板，将其添加到真实图像上时将导致更准确的操纵检测。也就是说，与原始真实图像与其经处理的图像相比，受模板保护的真实图像及其经处理的版本可以更好地区分。这些模板是根据模板的所需属性使用某些约束来估计的。对于图像操纵检测，我们提出的方法优于之前的工作，CycleGAN 的平均精度为 16%，GauGAN 的平均精度为 32%。我们的方法可推广到各种 GM，与之前的工作相比，12 个 GM 的平均精度提高了 10%。我们的代码可在 https://www.github.com/vishal3477/proactive_IMD 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种主动图像篡改检测方法，通过添加模板提升对未见过的生成模型篡改图像的检测性能。
AI.motivation: 传统图像篡改检测算法对训练中未见过的生成模型（GM）泛化能力差，且被动接收输入图像的方式限制了检测效果。
AI.method: 通过估计一组模板并将其添加到真实图像上，使真实图像与篡改版本的区分度更高。模板的估计基于特定约束条件以确保有效性。
AI.result: 在CycleGAN和GauGAN数据集上分别提升平均精度16%和32%，在12种GM上的平均精度提升10%。
AI.conclusion: 主动检测框架通过模板增强显著优于现有方法，且具有跨多种生成模型的通用性。

ai_content.conclusion: 主动检测框架通过模板增强显著优于现有方法，且具有跨多种生成模型的通用性。

authors_text: Sangrock Lee,Rahul,James Lukan,Tatiana Boyko,Kateryna Zelenova,Basiel Makled,Conner Parsey,Jack Norfleet,Suvranu De
title: A deep learning model for burn depth classification using ultrasound imaging
title_zh: 使用超声成像进行烧伤深度分类的深度学习模型
abstract: Identification of burn depth with sufficient accuracy is a challenging problem. This paper presents a deep convolutional neural network to classify burn depth based on altered tissue morphology of burned skin manifested as texture patterns in the ultrasound images. The network first learns a low-dimensional manifold of the unburned skin images using an encoder-decoder architecture that reconstructs it from ultrasound images of burned skin. The encoder is then re-trained to classify burn depths. The encoder-decoder network is trained using a dataset comprised of B-mode ultrasound images of unburned and burned ex vivo porcine skin samples. The classifier is developed using B-mode images of burned in situ skin samples obtained from freshly euthanized postmortem pigs. The performance metrics obtained from 20-fold cross-validation show that the model can identify deep-partial thickness burns, which is the most difficult to diagnose clinically, with 99% accuracy, 98% sensitivity, and 100% specificity. The diagnostic accuracy of the classifier is further illustrated by the high area under the curve values of 0.99 and 0.95, respectively, for the receiver operating characteristic and precision-recall curves. A post hoc explanation indicates that the classifier activates the discriminative textural features in the B-mode images for burn classification. The proposed model has the potential for clinical utility in assisting the clinical assessment of burn depths using a widely available clinical imaging device.
summary: Identification of burn depth with sufficient accuracy is a challenging problem. This paper presents a deep convolutional neural network to classify burn depth based on altered tissue morphology of burned skin manifested as texture patterns in the ultrasound images. The network first learns a low-dimensional manifold of the unburned skin images using an encoder-decoder architecture that reconstructs it from ultrasound images of burned skin. The encoder is then re-trained to classify burn depths. The encoder-decoder network is trained using a dataset comprised of B-mode ultrasound images of unburned and burned ex vivo porcine skin samples. The classifier is developed using B-mode images of burned in situ skin samples obtained from freshly euthanized postmortem pigs. The performance metrics obtained from 20-fold cross-validation show that the model can identify deep-partial thickness burns, which is the most difficult to diagnose clinically, with 99% accuracy, 98% sensitivity, and 100% specificity. The diagnostic accuracy of the classifier is further illustrated by the high area under the curve values of 0.99 and 0.95, respectively, for the receiver operating characteristic and precision-recall curves. A post hoc explanation indicates that the classifier activates the discriminative textural features in the B-mode images for burn classification. The proposed model has the potential for clinical utility in assisting the clinical assessment of burn depths using a widely available clinical imaging device.
abstract_zh: 足够准确地识别烧伤深度是一个具有挑战性的问题。本文提出了一种深度卷积神经网络，根据烧伤皮肤组织形态的改变（表现为超声图像中的纹理图案）对烧伤深度进行分类。该网络首先使用编码器-解码器架构学习未烧伤皮肤图像的低维流形，该架构根据烧伤皮肤的超声图像重建它。然后重新训练编码器以对烧伤深度进行分类。编码器-解码器网络使用由未烧伤和烧伤的离体猪皮肤样本的 B 模式超声图像组成的数据集进行训练。该分类器是使用从刚安乐死的死后猪身上获得的原位烧伤皮肤样本的 B 模式图像开发的。 20倍交叉验证获得的性能指标表明，该模型可以识别临床上最难诊断的深部烧伤，准确度为99%，敏感性为98%，特异性为100%。接收器操作特性和精确回忆曲线的曲线下面积分别为 0.99 和 0.95，进一步说明了分类器的诊断准确性。事后解释表明分类器激活 B 模式图像中的辨别纹理特征以进行烧伤分类。所提出的模型具有临床实用性的潜力，可以使用广泛使用的临床成像设备协助临床评估烧伤深度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于超声影像的深度学习模型，用于分类烧伤深度。
AI.motivation: 烧伤深度的准确识别具有临床挑战性，传统方法依赖经验且易出错，需开发自动化的高精度分类方法。
AI.method: 采用编码器-解码器架构，首先学习未烧伤皮肤的低维流形，再通过重新训练编码器对烧伤深度进行分类，使用离体和在体猪皮肤的B型超声图像数据集训练模型。
AI.result: 20折交叉验证显示模型对深部部分厚度烧伤的识别准确率达99%，灵敏度98%，特异性100%，ROC曲线下面积0.99，PR曲线下面积0.95。
AI.conclusion: 该模型具有临床应用潜力，可通过广泛可用的超声设备辅助烧伤深度评估。

authors_text: Prachi Shukla,Vasilis F. Pavlidis,Emre Salman,Ayse K. Coskun
title: Temperature-Aware Monolithic 3D DNN Accelerators for Biomedical Applications
title_zh: 适用于生物医学应用的温度感知单片 3D DNN 加速器
comment: This paper was accepted to be presented at the Design, Automation and Test in Europe Conference (DATE) 2022 workshop on "3D Integration: Heterogeneous 3D Architectures and Sensors"
comments: This paper was accepted to be presented at the Design, Automation and Test in Europe Conference (DATE) 2022 workshop on "3D Integration: Heterogeneous 3D Architectures and Sensors"
abstract: In this paper, we focus on temperature-aware Monolithic 3D (Mono3D) deep neural network (DNN) inference accelerators for biomedical applications. We develop an optimizer that tunes aspect ratios and footprint of the accelerator under user-defined performance and thermal constraints, and generates near-optimal configurations. Using the proposed Mono3D optimizer, we demonstrate up to 61% improvement in energy efficiency for biomedical applications over a performance-optimized accelerator.
summary: In this paper, we focus on temperature-aware Monolithic 3D (Mono3D) deep neural network (DNN) inference accelerators for biomedical applications. We develop an optimizer that tunes aspect ratios and footprint of the accelerator under user-defined performance and thermal constraints, and generates near-optimal configurations. Using the proposed Mono3D optimizer, we demonstrate up to 61% improvement in energy efficiency for biomedical applications over a performance-optimized accelerator.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们重点关注用于生物医学应用的温度感知单片 3D (Mono3D) 深度神经网络 (DNN) 推理加速器。我们开发了一个优化器，可以在用户定义的性能和热约束下调整加速器的纵横比和占地面积，并生成接近最佳的配置。使用所提出的 Mono3D 优化器，我们证明生物医学应用的能源效率比性能优化的加速器提高了 61%。

AI.tldr: 本文设计了一种温度感知的单片3D深度神经网络加速器，用于生物医学应用。
AI.motivation: 现有加速器在性能优化与散热管理之间难以平衡，导致生物医学应用的能效不足。
AI.method: 开发了可调整加速器纵横比和占地面积的优化器，在用户定义的性能与热约束下生成近最优配置。
AI.result: 在生物医学应用中，能效相比性能优化加速器提升最高达61%。
AI.conclusion: 该优化器有效平衡了性能与散热需求，显著提升了生物医学DNN加速器的能效。

search_text: Temperature-Aware Monolithic 3D DNN Accelerators for Biomedical Applications 适用于生物医学应用的温度感知单片 3D DNN 加速器 In this paper, we focus on temperature-aware Monolithic 3D (Mono3D) deep neural network (DNN) inference accelerators for biomedical applications. We develop an optimizer that tunes aspect ratios and footprint of the accelerator under user-defined performance and thermal constraints, and generates near-optimal configurations. Using the proposed Mono3D optimizer, we demonstrate up to 61% improvement in energy efficiency for biomedical applications over a performance-optimized accelerator. 在本文中，我们重点关注用于生物医学应用的温度感知单片 3D (Mono3D) 深度神经网络 (DNN) 推理加速器。我们开发了一个优化器，可以在用户定义的性能和热约束下调整加速器的纵横比和占地面积，并生成接近最佳的配置。使用所提出的 Mono3D 优化器，我们证明生物医学应用的能源效率比性能优化的加速器提高了 61%。 本文设计了一种温度感知的单片3D深度神经网络加速器，用于生物医学应用。 Prachi Shukla,Vasilis F. Pavlidis,Emre Salman,Ayse K. Coskun cs.ET,cs.AR

authors_text: Zijiang Yang,Xin Jing,Andreas Triantafyllopoulos,Meishu Song,Ilhan Aslan,Björn W. Schuller
title: An Overview & Analysis of Sequence-to-Sequence Emotional Voice Conversion
title_zh: 序列到序列情感语音转换的概述与分析
abstract: Emotional voice conversion (EVC) focuses on converting a speech utterance from a source to a target emotion; it can thus be a key enabling technology for human-computer interaction applications and beyond. However, EVC remains an unsolved research problem with several challenges. In particular, as speech rate and rhythm are two key factors of emotional conversion, models have to generate output sequences of differing length. Sequence-to-sequence modelling is recently emerging as a competitive paradigm for models that can overcome those challenges. In an attempt to stimulate further research in this promising new direction, recent sequence-to-sequence EVC papers were systematically investigated and reviewed from six perspectives: their motivation, training strategies, model architectures, datasets, model inputs, and evaluation methods. This information is organised to provide the research community with an easily digestible overview of the current state-of-the-art. Finally, we discuss existing challenges of sequence-to-sequence EVC.
summary: Emotional voice conversion (EVC) focuses on converting a speech utterance from a source to a target emotion; it can thus be a key enabling technology for human-computer interaction applications and beyond. However, EVC remains an unsolved research problem with several challenges. In particular, as speech rate and rhythm are two key factors of emotional conversion, models have to generate output sequences of differing length. Sequence-to-sequence modelling is recently emerging as a competitive paradigm for models that can overcome those challenges. In an attempt to stimulate further research in this promising new direction, recent sequence-to-sequence EVC papers were systematically investigated and reviewed from six perspectives: their motivation, training strategies, model architectures, datasets, model inputs, and evaluation methods. This information is organised to provide the research community with an easily digestible overview of the current state-of-the-art. Finally, we discuss existing challenges of sequence-to-sequence EVC.
abstract_zh: 情感语音转换（EVC）专注于将语音话语从源情感转换为目标情感；因此，它可以成为人机交互应用及其他应用的关键支持技术。然而，EVC 仍然是一个尚未解决的研究问题，面临着一些挑战。特别是，由于语速和节奏是情感转换的两个关键因素，模型必须生成不同长度的输出序列。序列到序列建模最近正在成为可以克服这些挑战的模型的竞争范式。为了刺激这个有前途的新方向的进一步研究，从动机、训练策略、模型架构、数据集、模型输入和评估方法这六个角度对最近的序列到序列 EVC 论文进行了系统的研究和回顾。这些信息的组织目的是为研究界提供当前最新技术的易于理解的概述。最后，我们讨论了序列到序列 EVC 现有的挑战。

AI.tldr: 本文综述并分析了基于序列到序列模型的情感语音转换（EVC）方法，探讨其挑战与现状。
AI.motivation: 情感语音转换面临语音节奏和时长变化等挑战，序列到序列模型能有效处理变长序列，但相关研究尚不完善，需系统性总结以推动进展。
AI.method: 系统梳理近期序列到序列EVC论文，从六个维度（动机、训练策略、模型结构、数据集、输入方式、评估方法）进行分类分析，并总结当前技术状态。
AI.result: 整理了序列到序列EVC的最新方法，明确了不同模型的优缺点，指出现有技术在情感表达自然度、时长控制等方面仍存在不足。
AI.conclusion: 序列到序列模型为EVC提供了新方向，但需解决情感特征建模、多说话人适配及生成质量评估等核心挑战。

However, EVC remains an unsolved research problem with several challenges. authors_text: Benno Krojer,Vaibhav Adlakha,Vibhav Vineet,Yash Goyal,Edoardo Ponti,Siva Reddy
title: Image Retrieval from Contextual Descriptions
title_zh: 从上下文描述中检索图像
abstract: The ability to integrate context, including perceptual and temporal cues, plays a pivotal role in grounding the meaning of a linguistic utterance. In order to measure to what extent current vision-and-language models master this ability, we devise a new multimodal challenge, Image Retrieval from Contextual Descriptions (ImageCoDe). In particular, models are tasked with retrieving the correct image from a set of 10 minimally contrastive candidates based on a contextual description. As such, each description contains only the details that help distinguish between images. Because of this, descriptions tend to be complex in terms of syntax and discourse and require drawing pragmatic inferences. Images are sourced from both static pictures and video frames. We benchmark several state-of-the-art models, including both cross-encoders such as ViLBERT and bi-encoders such as CLIP, on ImageCoDe. Our results reveal that these models dramatically lag behind human performance: the best variant achieves an accuracy of 20.9 on video frames and 59.4 on static pictures, compared with 90.8 in humans. Furthermore, we experiment with new model variants that are better equipped to incorporate visual and temporal context into their representations, which achieve modest gains. Our hope is that ImageCoDE will foster progress in grounded language understanding by encouraging models to focus on fine-grained visual differences.
summary: The ability to integrate context, including perceptual and temporal cues, plays a pivotal role in grounding the meaning of a linguistic utterance. In order to measure to what extent current vision-and-language models master this ability, we devise a new multimodal challenge, Image Retrieval from Contextual Descriptions (ImageCoDe). In particular, models are tasked with retrieving the correct image from a set of 10 minimally contrastive candidates based on a contextual description. As such, each description contains only the details that help distinguish between images. Because of this, descriptions tend to be complex in terms of syntax and discourse and require drawing pragmatic inferences. Images are sourced from both static pictures and video frames. We benchmark several state-of-the-art models, including both cross-encoders such as ViLBERT and bi-encoders such as CLIP, on ImageCoDe. Our results reveal that these models dramatically lag behind human performance: the best variant achieves an accuracy of 20.9 on video frames and 59.4 on static pictures, compared with 90.8 in humans. Furthermore, we experiment with new model variants that are better equipped to incorporate visual and temporal context into their representations, which achieve modest gains. Our hope is that ImageCoDE will foster progress in grounded language understanding by encouraging models to focus on fine-grained visual differences.
abstract_zh: 整合上下文（包括感知和时间线索）的能力在奠定语言话语的意义方面发挥着关键作用。为了衡量当前视觉和语言模型在多大程度上掌握了这种能力，我们设计了一个新的多模态挑战，即从上下文描述中检索图像（ImageCoDe）。特别是，模型的任务是根据上下文描述从一组 10 个对比度最低的候选图像中检索正确的图像。因此，每个描述仅包含有助于区分图像的细节。因此，描述在语法和话语方面往往很复杂，需要进行务实的推论。图像来源于静态图片和视频帧。我们在 ImageCoDe 上对几种最先进的模型进行了基准测试，包括 ViLBERT 等交叉编码器和 CLIP 等双编码器。我们的结果表明，这些模型大大落后于人类的表现：最佳变体在视频帧上的准确度为 20.9，在静态图片上的准确度为 59.4，而人类的准确度为 90.8。此外，我们尝试了新的模型变体，这些模型变体能够更好地将视觉和时间上下文纳入其表示中，从而取得了一定的收益。我们希望 ImageCoDE 能够鼓励模型关注细粒度的视觉差异，从而促进基础语言理解的进步。

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种新的多模态任务ImageCoDe，要求模型根据复杂的上下文描述从10个候选图像中检索正确图像，以评估视觉-语言模型整合上下文的能力。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉-语言模型在整合感知和时序线索以理解语言上下文方面存在显著不足，需要设计更具挑战性的任务来推动相关研究。
AI.method: 构建包含静态图片和视频帧的ImageCoDe数据集，要求模型基于仅含区分信息的复杂描述进行检索，并测试ViLBERT、CLIP等模型及改进变体。
AI.result: 最佳模型在视频帧上准确率仅20.9%，静态图片为59.4%，远低于人类90.8%的水平；改进模型仅取得小幅提升。
AI.conclusion: ImageCoDe任务揭示了模型在细粒度视觉差异理解上的不足，期望通过该挑战促进 grounded language understanding 的发展。

Our hope is that ImageCoDE will foster progress in grounded language understanding by encouraging models to focus on fine-grained visual differences. 整合上下文（包括感知和时间线索）的能力在奠定语言话语的意义方面发挥着关键作用。为了衡量当前视觉和语言模型在多大程度上掌握了这种能力，我们设计了一个新的多模态挑战，即从上下文描述中检索图像（ImageCoDe）。特别是，模型的任务是根据上下文描述从一组 10 个对比度最低的候选图像中检索正确的图像。因此，每个描述仅包含有助于区分图像的细节。因此，描述在语法和话语方面往往很复杂，需要进行务实的推论。图像来源于静态图片和视频帧。我们在 ImageCoDe 上对几种最先进的模型进行了基准测试，包括 ViLBERT 等交叉编码器和 CLIP 等双编码器。我们的结果表明，这些模型大大落后于人类的表现：最佳变体在视频帧上的准确度为 20.9，在静态图片上的准确度为 59.4，而人类的准确度为 90.8。此外，我们尝试了新的模型变体，这些模型变体能够更好地将视觉和时间上下文纳入其表示中，从而取得了一定的收益。我们希望 ImageCoDE 能够鼓励模型关注细粒度的视觉差异，从而促进基础语言理解的进步。 该论文提出了一种新的多模态任务ImageCoDe，要求模型根据复杂的上下文描述从10个候选图像中检索正确图像，以评估视觉-语言模型整合上下文的能力。 Benno Krojer,Vaibhav Adlakha,Vibhav Vineet,Yash Goyal,Edoardo Ponti,Siva Reddy cs.CV,cs.CL

authors_text: Mostafa Osman,Frida Viset,Manon Kok
title: Indoor SLAM Using a Foot-mounted IMU and the local Magnetic Field
title_zh: 使用脚装 IMU 和局部磁场的室内 SLAM
comment: 11 pages, 4 figures, 4 tables, submitted to the 25th International Conference on Information Fusion (FUSION 2022)
comments: 11 pages, 4 figures, 4 tables, submitted to the 25th International Conference on Information Fusion (FUSION 2022)
abstract: In this paper, a simultaneous localization and mapping (SLAM) algorithm for tracking the motion of a pedestrian with a foot-mounted inertial measurement unit (IMU) is proposed. The algorithm uses two maps, namely, a motion map and a magnetic field map. The motion map captures typical motion patterns of pedestrians in buildings that are constrained by e.g. corridors and doors. The magnetic map models local magnetic field anomalies in the environment using a Gaussian process (GP) model and uses them as position information. These maps are used in a Rao-Blackwellized particle filter (RBPF) to correct the pedestrian position and orientation estimates from the pedestrian dead-reckoning (PDR). The PDR is computed using an extended Kalman filter with zero-velocity updates (ZUPT-EKF). The algorithm is validated using real experimental sequences and the results show the efficacy of the algorithm in localizing pedestrians in indoor environments.
summary: In this paper, a simultaneous localization and mapping (SLAM) algorithm for tracking the motion of a pedestrian with a foot-mounted inertial measurement unit (IMU) is proposed. The algorithm uses two maps, namely, a motion map and a magnetic field map. The motion map captures typical motion patterns of pedestrians in buildings that are constrained by e.g. corridors and doors. The magnetic map models local magnetic field anomalies in the environment using a Gaussian process (GP) model and uses them as position information. These maps are used in a Rao-Blackwellized particle filter (RBPF) to correct the pedestrian position and orientation estimates from the pedestrian dead-reckoning (PDR). The PDR is computed using an extended Kalman filter with zero-velocity updates (ZUPT-EKF). The algorithm is validated using real experimental sequences and the results show the efficacy of the algorithm in localizing pedestrians in indoor environments.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种同步定位与建图（SLAM）算法，用于通过安装在脚上的惯性测量单元（IMU）来跟踪行人的运动。该算法使用两个图，即运动图和磁场图。运动地图捕捉建筑物中行人的典型运动模式，这些模式受到例如建筑物的限制。走廊和门。磁图使用高斯过程 (GP) 模型对环境中的局部磁场异常进行建模，并将其用作位置信息。这些地图用于 Rao-Blackwellized 粒子滤波器 (RBPF)，以纠正行人航位推算 (PDR) 中的行人位置和方向估计。 PDR 使用具有零速度更新的扩展卡尔曼滤波器 (ZUPT-EKF) 进行计算。使用真实的实验序列对该算法进行了验证，结果表明了该算法在室内环境中定位行人的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合足部IMU和局部磁场信息的室内SLAM算法，用于跟踪行人运动并构建地图。
AI.motivation: 传统基于IMU的行人死 reckoning（PDR）方法存在累积误差问题，而室内磁场异常可作为稳定的位置参考，需融合多源信息提升定位精度。
AI.method: 构建运动地图（捕捉走廊/门等典型运动模式）和磁场地图（基于高斯过程建模局部磁场异常），通过Rao-Blackwellized粒子滤波器（RBPF）融合PDR（采用ZUPT-EKF修正）与磁场信息进行定位修正。
AI.result: 实验验证表明，该算法在真实室内环境下能有效提升行人定位精度，优于仅依赖IMU或磁场的单一方法。
AI.conclusion: 融合运动模式与磁场特征的双地图SLAM框架，可显著增强复杂室内场景下的行人定位鲁棒性。

authors_text: Soumava Kumar Roy,Leonardo Citraro,Sina Honari,Pascal Fua
title: On Triangulation as a Form of Self-Supervision for 3D Human Pose Estimation
title_zh: 三角测量作为 3D 人体姿势估计的自我监督形式
abstract: Supervised approaches to 3D pose estimation from single images are remarkably effective when labeled data is abundant. However, as the acquisition of ground-truth 3D labels is labor intensive and time consuming, recent attention has shifted towards semi- and weakly-supervised learning. Generating an effective form of supervision with little annotations still poses major challenge in crowded scenes. In this paper we propose to impose multi-view geometrical constraints by means of a weighted differentiable triangulation and use it as a form of self-supervision when no labels are available. We therefore train a 2D pose estimator in such a way that its predictions correspond to the re-projection of the triangulated 3D pose and train an auxiliary network on them to produce the final 3D poses. We complement the triangulation with a weighting mechanism that alleviates the impact of noisy predictions caused by self-occlusion or occlusion from other subjects. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our semi-supervised approach on Human3.6M and MPI-INF-3DHP datasets, as well as on a new multi-view multi-person dataset that features occlusion.
summary: Supervised approaches to 3D pose estimation from single images are remarkably effective when labeled data is abundant. However, as the acquisition of ground-truth 3D labels is labor intensive and time consuming, recent attention has shifted towards semi- and weakly-supervised learning. Generating an effective form of supervision with little annotations still poses major challenge in crowded scenes. In this paper we propose to impose multi-view geometrical constraints by means of a weighted differentiable triangulation and use it as a form of self-supervision when no labels are available. We therefore train a 2D pose estimator in such a way that its predictions correspond to the re-projection of the triangulated 3D pose and train an auxiliary network on them to produce the final 3D poses. We complement the triangulation with a weighting mechanism that alleviates the impact of noisy predictions caused by self-occlusion or occlusion from other subjects. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our semi-supervised approach on Human3.6M and MPI-INF-3DHP datasets, as well as on a new multi-view multi-person dataset that features occlusion.
abstract_zh: 当标记数据丰富时，从单张图像进行 3D 姿态估计的有监督方法非常有效。然而，由于获取真实 3D 标签是劳动密集型且耗时的，最近的注意力已转向半监督学习和弱监督学习。在拥挤的场景中，生成一种有效的、几乎没有注释的监督形式仍然是一个重大挑战。在本文中，我们建议通过加权可微三角测量来施加多视图几何约束，并在没有可用标签时将其用作自我监督的形式。因此，我们训练 2D 位姿估计器，使其预测对应于三角化 3D 位姿的重新投影，并在其上训练辅助网络以生成最终的 3D 位姿。我们用加权机制补充三角测量，减轻由自遮挡或其他主体遮挡引起的噪声预测的影响。我们在 Human3.6M 和 MPI-INF-3DHP 数据集以及具有遮挡特征的新多视图多人数据集上展示了半监督方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于多视角几何约束的自监督方法，用于在无标注数据情况下进行3D人体姿态估计。
AI.motivation: 传统监督方法依赖大量标注数据，而获取真实3D标签成本高昂。在拥挤场景中，弱监督方法面临生成有效监督的挑战。
AI.method: 通过加权微分三角化构建多视角几何约束作为自监督信号，训练2D姿态估计器使其预测与三角化3D姿态的重投影一致，并利用辅助网络输出最终3D姿态。
AI.result: 在Human3.6M、MPI-INF-3DHP及包含遮挡的新多视角数据集上验证了方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该半监督方法能有效处理遮挡场景，为减少标注依赖的3D姿态估计提供了新思路。

authors_text: Heting Gao,Junrui Ni,Kaizhi Qian,Yang Zhang,Shiyu Chang,Mark Hasegawa-Johnson
title: WAVPROMPT: Towards Few-Shot Spoken Language Understanding with Frozen Language Models
title_zh: WAVPROMPT：通过冻结语言模型实现少样本口语理解
abstract: Large-scale auto-regressive language models pretrained on massive text have demonstrated their impressive ability to perform new natural language tasks with only a few text examples, without the need for fine-tuning. Recent studies further show that such a few-shot learning ability can be extended to the text-image setting by training an encoder to encode the images into embeddings functioning like the text embeddings of the language model. Interested in exploring the possibility of transferring the few-shot learning ability to the audio-text setting, we propose a novel speech understanding framework, WavPrompt, where we finetune a wav2vec model to generate a sequence of audio embeddings understood by the language model. We show that WavPrompt is a few-shot learner that can perform speech understanding tasks better than a naive text baseline. We conduct detailed ablation studies on different components and hyperparameters to empirically identify the best model configuration. In addition, we conduct a non-speech understanding experiment to show WavPrompt can extract more information than just the transcriptions. Code is available at https://github.com/Hertin/WavPrompt
summary: Large-scale auto-regressive language models pretrained on massive text have demonstrated their impressive ability to perform new natural language tasks with only a few text examples, without the need for fine-tuning. Recent studies further show that such a few-shot learning ability can be extended to the text-image setting by training an encoder to encode the images into embeddings functioning like the text embeddings of the language model. Interested in exploring the possibility of transferring the few-shot learning ability to the audio-text setting, we propose a novel speech understanding framework, WavPrompt, where we finetune a wav2vec model to generate a sequence of audio embeddings understood by the language model. We show that WavPrompt is a few-shot learner that can perform speech understanding tasks better than a naive text baseline. We conduct detailed ablation studies on different components and hyperparameters to empirically identify the best model configuration. In addition, we conduct a non-speech understanding experiment to show WavPrompt can extract more information than just the transcriptions. Code is available at https://github.com/Hertin/WavPrompt
abstract_zh: 在大量文本上进行预训练的大规模自回归语言模型已经证明了其令人印象深刻的能力，只需几个文本示例即可执行新的自然语言任务，而无需进行微调。最近的研究进一步表明，通过训练编码器将图像编码到与语言模型的文本嵌入类似的嵌入中，这种少量学习能力可以扩展到文本图像设置。有兴趣探索将小样本学习能力转移到音频文本设置的可能性，我们提出了一种新颖的语音理解框架 WavPrompt，其中我们微调 wav2vec 模型以生成语言模型可以理解的音频嵌入序列。我们证明 WavPrompt 是一个小样本学习器，可以比简单的文本基线更好地执行语音理解任务。我们对不同组件和超参数进行详细的消融研究，以凭经验确定最佳模型配置。此外，我们还进行了非语音理解实验，以表明 WavPrompt 可以提取比转录更多的信息。代码可在 https://github.com/Hertin/WavPrompt 获取

AI.conclusion: WavPrompt证明了少样本学习能力可扩展至语音领域，为跨模态语音理解提供新思路。

search_text: WAVPROMPT: Towards Few-Shot Spoken Language Understanding with Frozen Language Models WAVPROMPT：通过冻结语言模型实现少样本口语理解 Large-scale auto-regressive language models pretrained on massive text have demonstrated their impressive ability to perform new natural language tasks with only a few text examples, without the need for fine-tuning. Recent studies further show that such a few-shot learning ability can be extended to the text-image setting by training an encoder to encode the images into embeddings functioning like the text embeddings of the language model. Interested in exploring the possibility of transferring the few-shot learning ability to the audio-text setting, we propose a novel speech understanding framework, WavPrompt, where we finetune a wav2vec model to generate a sequence of audio embeddings understood by the language model. We show that WavPrompt is a few-shot learner that can perform speech understanding tasks better than a naive text baseline. We conduct detailed ablation studies on different components and hyperparameters to empirically identify the best model configuration. In addition, we conduct a non-speech understanding experiment to show WavPrompt can extract more information than just the transcriptions. Code is available at https://github.com/Hertin/WavPrompt 在大量文本上进行预训练的大规模自回归语言模型已经证明了其令人印象深刻的能力，只需几个文本示例即可执行新的自然语言任务，而无需进行微调。最近的研究进一步表明，通过训练编码器将图像编码到与语言模型的文本嵌入类似的嵌入中，这种少量学习能力可以扩展到文本图像设置。有兴趣探索将小样本学习能力转移到音频文本设置的可能性，我们提出了一种新颖的语音理解框架 WavPrompt，其中我们微调 wav2vec 模型以生成语言模型可以理解的音频嵌入序列。我们证明 WavPrompt 是一个小样本学习器，可以比简单的文本基线更好地执行语音理解任务。我们对不同组件和超参数进行详细的消融研究，以凭经验确定最佳模型配置。此外，我们还进行了非语音理解实验，以表明 WavPrompt 可以提取比转录更多的信息。代码可在 https://github.com/Hertin/WavPrompt 获取 本文提出WavPrompt框架，通过冻结语言模型实现少样本语音理解任务。 Heting Gao,Junrui Ni,Kaizhi Qian,Yang Zhang,Shiyu Chang,Mark Hasegawa-Johnson eess.AS,cs.AI,cs.CL

authors_text: Philipp Zschoche
title: Restless Temporal Path Parameterized Above Lower Bounds
title_zh: 参数化高于下界的不稳定时间路径
abstract: Reachability questions are one of the most fundamental algorithmic primitives in temporal graphs -- graphs whose edge set changes over discrete time steps. A core problem here is the NP-hard Short Restless Temporal Path: given a temporal graph $\mathcal G$, two distinct vertices $s$ and $z$, and two numbers $δ$ and $k$, is there a $δ$-restless temporal $s$-$z$ path of length at most $k$? A temporal path is a path whose edges appear in chronological order and a temporal path is $δ$-restless if two consecutive path edges appear at most $δ$ time steps apart from each other. Among others, this problem has applications in neuroscience and epidemiology. While Short Restless Temporal Path is known to be computationally hard, e.g., it is NP-hard for only three time steps and W[1]-hard when parameterized by the feedback vertex number of the underlying graph, it is fixed-parameter tractable when parameterized by the path length $k$. We improve on this by showing that Short Restless Temporal Path can be solved in (randomized) $4^{k-d}|\mathcal G|^{O(1)}$ time, where $d$ is the minimum length of a temporal $s$-$z$ path.
summary: Reachability questions are one of the most fundamental algorithmic primitives in temporal graphs -- graphs whose edge set changes over discrete time steps. A core problem here is the NP-hard Short Restless Temporal Path: given a temporal graph $\mathcal G$, two distinct vertices $s$ and $z$, and two numbers $δ$ and $k$, is there a $δ$-restless temporal $s$-$z$ path of length at most $k$? A temporal path is a path whose edges appear in chronological order and a temporal path is $δ$-restless if two consecutive path edges appear at most $δ$ time steps apart from each other. Among others, this problem has applications in neuroscience and epidemiology. While Short Restless Temporal Path is known to be computationally hard, e.g., it is NP-hard for only three time steps and W[1]-hard when parameterized by the feedback vertex number of the underlying graph, it is fixed-parameter tractable when parameterized by the path length $k$. We improve on this by showing that Short Restless Temporal Path can be solved in (randomized) $4^{k-d}|\mathcal G|^{O(1)}$ time, where $d$ is the minimum length of a temporal $s$-$z$ path.
abstract_zh: 可达性问题是时间图中最基本的算法原语之一——边缘集随离散时间步长变化的图。这里的一个核心问题是 NP 困难的短不安时态路径：给定一个时态图 $\mathcal G$，两个不同的顶点 $s$ 和 $z$，以及两个数字 $δ$ 和 $k$，是否存在长度至多 $k$ 的 $δ$-不安时时态 $s$-$z$ 路径？时间路径是其边缘按时间顺序出现的路径，如果两个连续的路径边缘彼此相距至多$δ$时间步，则时间路径是$δ$-不安定的。除其他外，这个问题在神经科学和流行病学中也有应用。虽然众所周知，短不息时间路径在计算上是困难的，例如，当由底层图的反馈顶点数参数化时，它仅在三个时间步上是 NP 困难的，并且是 W[1]-困难的，但当由路径长度 $k$ 参数化时，它是固定参数易处理的。我们对此进行了改进，表明可以在（随机）$4^{k-d}|\mathcal G|^{O(1)}$时间内解决短不息时间路径，其中$d$是时间$s$-$z$路径的最小长度。

AI.tldr: 研究时序图中的短时 restless 时序路径问题，即在给定时序图、两个顶点 s 和 z、以及参数 δ 和 k 时，判断是否存在一条长度不超过 k 的 δ-restless 时序 s-z 路径。
AI.motivation: 该问题在神经科学和流行病学等领域有重要应用，且已知为 NP 难问题，现有参数化算法在参数为路径长度 k 时是固定参数可解的，但需要进一步优化下界。
AI.method: 提出一种随机化算法，利用参数 k 与最小时序路径长度 d 的差值，将运行时间改进为 4^{k-d} |G|^{O(1)}。
AI.result: Short Restless Temporal Path 可在 4^{k-d} |G|^{O(1)} 时间内随机化求解，其中 d 是时序 s-z 路径的最小长度。
AI.conclusion: 通过参数化超越下界（参数 k 减去下界 d），显著改进了问题的固定参数可解性结果，提供了更高效的算法。

authors_text: Simin Chen,Zihe Song,Mirazul Haque,Cong Liu,Wei Yang
title: NICGSlowDown: Evaluating the Efficiency Robustness of Neural Image Caption Generation Models
title_zh: NICGSlowDown：评估神经图像描述生成模型的效率鲁棒性
comment: This paper is accepted at CVPR2022
comments: This paper is accepted at CVPR2022
abstract: Neural image caption generation (NICG) models have received massive attention from the research community due to their excellent performance in visual understanding. Existing work focuses on improving NICG model accuracy while efficiency is less explored. However, many real-world applications require real-time feedback, which highly relies on the efficiency of NICG models. Recent research observed that the efficiency of NICG models could vary for different inputs. This observation brings in a new attack surface of NICG models, i.e., An adversary might be able to slightly change inputs to cause the NICG models to consume more computational resources. To further understand such efficiency-oriented threats, we propose a new attack approach, NICGSlowDown, to evaluate the efficiency robustness of NICG models. Our experimental results show that NICGSlowDown can generate images with human-unnoticeable perturbations that will increase the NICG model latency up to 483.86%. We hope this research could raise the community's concern about the efficiency robustness of NICG models.
summary: Neural image caption generation (NICG) models have received massive attention from the research community due to their excellent performance in visual understanding. Existing work focuses on improving NICG model accuracy while efficiency is less explored. However, many real-world applications require real-time feedback, which highly relies on the efficiency of NICG models. Recent research observed that the efficiency of NICG models could vary for different inputs. This observation brings in a new attack surface of NICG models, i.e., An adversary might be able to slightly change inputs to cause the NICG models to consume more computational resources. To further understand such efficiency-oriented threats, we propose a new attack approach, NICGSlowDown, to evaluate the efficiency robustness of NICG models. Our experimental results show that NICGSlowDown can generate images with human-unnoticeable perturbations that will increase the NICG model latency up to 483.86%. We hope this research could raise the community's concern about the efficiency robustness of NICG models.
abstract_zh: 神经图像描述生成（NICG）模型因其在视觉理解方面的出色表现而受到了研究界的广泛关注。现有的工作重点是提高 NICG 模型的准确性，而对效率的探索较少。然而，许多实际应用需要实时反馈，这高度依赖 NICG 模型的效率。最近的研究发现，NICG 模型的效率可能会因输入的不同而有所不同。这一观察结果为 NICG 模型带来了新的攻击面，即，对手可能能够稍微改变输入，导致 NICG 模型消耗更多的计算资源。为了进一步了解这种以效率为导向的威胁，我们提出了一种新的攻击方法 NICGSlowDown 来评估 NICG 模型的效率鲁棒性。我们的实验结果表明，NICGSlowDown 可以生成具有人类无法察觉的扰动的图像，这将使 NICG 模型延迟增加高达 483.86%。我们希望这项研究能够引起社区对 NICG 模型效率鲁棒性的关注。

AI.tldr: 提出一种名为NICGSlowDown的新方法，评估神经图像字幕生成模型的效率鲁棒性，通过微小输入扰动显著增加模型延迟。
AI.motivation: 尽管NICG模型在准确率上表现优异，但现有研究忽视了其效率问题。实际应用需要实时反馈，而模型效率可能因输入变化而波动，存在新的攻击面，需评估其效率鲁棒性。
AI.method: 设计NICGSlowDown攻击方法，通过引入人类难以察觉的输入扰动，迫使NICG模型消耗更多计算资源，从而评估其效率鲁棒性。
AI.result: 实验表明，NICGSlowDown可生成人眼难以察觉的扰动，使目标NICG模型的延迟最高增加483.86%。
AI.conclusion: 研究揭示了NICG模型在效率方面的潜在脆弱性，强调在提升准确率的同时需关注效率鲁棒性，为未来研究提供新方向。

ai_content_json.result: 实验表明，NICGSlowDown可生成人眼难以察觉的扰动，使目标NICG模型的延迟最高增加483.86%。
ai_content_json.conclusion: 研究揭示了NICG模型在效率方面的潜在脆弱性，强调在提升准确率的同时需关注效率鲁棒性，为未来研究提供新方向。

search_text: NICGSlowDown: Evaluating the Efficiency Robustness of Neural Image Caption Generation Models NICGSlowDown：评估神经图像描述生成模型的效率鲁棒性 Neural image caption generation (NICG) models have received massive attention from the research community due to their excellent performance in visual understanding. Existing work focuses on improving NICG model accuracy while efficiency is less explored. However, many real-world applications require real-time feedback, which highly relies on the efficiency of NICG models. Recent research observed that the efficiency of NICG models could vary for different inputs. This observation brings in a new attack surface of NICG models, i.e., An adversary might be able to slightly change inputs to cause the NICG models to consume more computational resources. To further understand such efficiency-oriented threats, we propose a new attack approach, NICGSlowDown, to evaluate the efficiency robustness of NICG models. Our experimental results show that NICGSlowDown can generate images with human-unnoticeable perturbations that will increase the NICG model latency up to 483.86%. We hope this research could raise the community's concern about the efficiency robustness of NICG models. 神经图像描述生成（NICG）模型因其在视觉理解方面的出色表现而受到了研究界的广泛关注。现有的工作重点是提高 NICG 模型的准确性，而对效率的探索较少。然而，许多实际应用需要实时反馈，这高度依赖 NICG 模型的效率。最近的研究发现，NICG 模型的效率可能会因输入的不同而有所不同。这一观察结果为 NICG 模型带来了新的攻击面，即，对手可能能够稍微改变输入，导致 NICG 模型消耗更多的计算资源。为了进一步了解这种以效率为导向的威胁，我们提出了一种新的攻击方法 NICGSlowDown 来评估 NICG 模型的效率鲁棒性。我们的实验结果表明，NICGSlowDown 可以生成具有人类无法察觉的扰动的图像，这将使 NICG 模型延迟增加高达 483.86%。我们希望这项研究能够引起社区对 NICG 模型效率鲁棒性的关注。 提出一种名为NICGSlowDown的新方法，评估神经图像字幕生成模型的效率鲁棒性，通过微小输入扰动显著增加模型延迟。 Simin Chen,Zihe Song,Mirazul Haque,Cong Liu,Wei Yang cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Bernardo Silva,Laís Pinheiro,Brenda Sobrinho,Fernanda Lima,Bruna Sobrinho,Kalyf Abdalla,Matheus Pithon,Patrícia Cury,Luciano Oliveira
title: OdontoAI: A human-in-the-loop labeled data set and an online platform to boost research on dental panoramic radiographs
title_zh: OdontoAI：人机交互标记数据集和在线平台，以促进牙科全景 X 线照片的研究
abstract: Deep learning has remarkably advanced in the last few years, supported by large labeled data sets. These data sets are precious yet scarce because of the time-consuming labeling procedures, discouraging researchers from producing them. This scarcity is especially true in dentistry, where deep learning applications are still in an embryonic stage. Motivated by this background, we address in this study the construction of a public data set of dental panoramic radiographs. Our objects of interest are the teeth, which are segmented and numbered, as they are the primary targets for dentists when screening a panoramic radiograph. We benefited from the human-in-the-loop (HITL) concept to expedite the labeling procedure, using predictions from deep neural networks as provisional labels, later verified by human annotators. All the gathering and labeling procedures of this novel data set is thoroughly analyzed. The results were consistent and behaved as expected: At each HITL iteration, the model predictions improved. Our results demonstrated a 51% labeling time reduction using HITL, saving us more than 390 continuous working hours. In a novel online platform, called OdontoAI, created to work as task central for this novel data set, we released 4,000 images, from which 2,000 have their labels publicly available for model fitting. The labels of the other 2,000 images are private and used for model evaluation considering instance and semantic segmentation and numbering. To the best of our knowledge, this is the largest-scale publicly available data set for panoramic radiographs, and the OdontoAI is the first platform of its kind in dentistry.

abstract_zh: 在大型标记数据集的支持下，深度学习在过去几年中取得了显着进步。由于标记程序耗时，这些数据集既珍贵又稀缺，阻碍了研究人员制作它们。这种稀缺性在牙科领域尤其明显，因为深度学习应用仍处于萌芽阶段。受此背景的启发，我们在本研究中解决了牙科全景X光片公共数据集的构建问题。我们感兴趣的对象是牙齿，它们被分段和编号，因为它们是牙医在筛查全景射线照片时的主要目标。我们受益于人机交互 (HITL) 概念来加快标记过程，使用深度神经网络的预测作为临时标签，随后由人类注释者进行验证。该新颖数据集的所有收集和标记过程都经过彻底分析。结果一致且表现符合预期：在每次 HITL 迭代中，模型预测都会得到改善。我们的结果表明，使用 HITL 标记时间缩短了 51%，为我们节省了 390 多个连续工作时间。在一个名为 OdontoAI 的新颖在线平台中，我们创建了这个新颖数据集的任务中心，发布了 4,000 张图像，其中 2,000 张的标签公开可用于模型拟合。其他 2,000 个图像的标签是私有的，用于考虑实例、语义分割和编号的模型评估。据我们所知，这是最大规模的公开可用的全景射线照片数据集，而 OdontoAI 是牙科领域的第一个此类平台。

AI.tldr: 本文构建了一个公开的牙科全景放射影像数据集及在线平台OdontoAI，以促进牙科深度学习研究。
AI.motivation: 牙科领域深度学习应用因缺乏大规模标注数据集而发展缓慢，传统标注流程耗时且成本高。
AI.method: 采用人机协作（HITL）模式，利用深度神经网络预测结果作为初步标注，再由人工验证；开发OdontoAI平台发布数据集。
AI.result: 标注效率提升51%（节省390+工时），公开2000张带标注图像，平台提供4000张图像用于模型训练与评估。
AI.conclusion: OdontoAI是首个牙科专用数据平台，其公开数据集为全景影像研究提供了重要基础。

authors_text: Jonas Frey,David Hoeller,Shehryar Khattak,Marco Hutter
title: Locomotion Policy Guided Traversability Learning using Volumetric Representations of Complex Environments
title_zh: 使用复杂环境的体积表示的运动策略引导可遍历性学习
comment: accepted for 2022 IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS 2022)
comments: accepted for 2022 IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS 2022)
abstract: Despite the progress in legged robotic locomotion, autonomous navigation in unknown environments remains an open problem. Ideally, the navigation system utilizes the full potential of the robots' locomotion capabilities while operating within safety limits under uncertainty. The robot must sense and analyze the traversability of the surrounding terrain, which depends on the hardware, locomotion control, and terrain properties. It may contain information about the risk, energy, or time consumption needed to traverse the terrain. To avoid hand-crafted traversability cost functions we propose to collect traversability information about the robot and locomotion policy by simulating the traversal over randomly generated terrains using a physics simulator. Thousand of robots are simulated in parallel controlled by the same locomotion policy used in reality to acquire 57 years of real-world locomotion experience equivalent. For deployment on the real robot, a sparse convolutional network is trained to predict the simulated traversability cost, which is tailored to the deployed locomotion policy, from an entirely geometric representation of the environment in the form of a 3D voxel-occupancy map. This representation avoids the need for commonly used elevation maps, which are error-prone in the presence of overhanging obstacles and multi-floor or low-ceiling scenarios. The effectiveness of the proposed traversability prediction network is demonstrated for path planning for the legged robot ANYmal in various indoor and natural environments.
summary: Despite the progress in legged robotic locomotion, autonomous navigation in unknown environments remains an open problem. Ideally, the navigation system utilizes the full potential of the robots' locomotion capabilities while operating within safety limits under uncertainty. The robot must sense and analyze the traversability of the surrounding terrain, which depends on the hardware, locomotion control, and terrain properties. It may contain information about the risk, energy, or time consumption needed to traverse the terrain. To avoid hand-crafted traversability cost functions we propose to collect traversability information about the robot and locomotion policy by simulating the traversal over randomly generated terrains using a physics simulator. Thousand of robots are simulated in parallel controlled by the same locomotion policy used in reality to acquire 57 years of real-world locomotion experience equivalent. For deployment on the real robot, a sparse convolutional network is trained to predict the simulated traversability cost, which is tailored to the deployed locomotion policy, from an entirely geometric representation of the environment in the form of a 3D voxel-occupancy map. This representation avoids the need for commonly used elevation maps, which are error-prone in the presence of overhanging obstacles and multi-floor or low-ceiling scenarios. The effectiveness of the proposed traversability prediction network is demonstrated for path planning for the legged robot ANYmal in various indoor and natural environments.
abstract_zh: 尽管腿式机器人运动取得了进展，但未知环境中的自主导航仍然是一个悬而未决的问题。理想情况下，导航系统能够充分发挥机器人运动能力的潜力，同时在不确定的情况下在安全限制内运行。机器人必须感知和分析周围地形的可穿越性，这取决于硬件、运动控制和地形属性。它可能包含有关穿越地形所需的风险、能量或时间消耗的信息。为了避免手工制作的可遍历性成本函数，我们建议通过使用物理模拟器模拟随机生成的地形上的遍历来收集有关机器人和运动策略的可遍历性信息。模拟并联控制数千个机器人，并采用与现实中相同的运动策略，以获得相当于现实世界 57 年的运动经验。为了部署在真实的机器人上，稀疏卷积网络经过训练，可以根据 3D 体素占用图形式的环境的完全几何表示来预测模拟的可遍历性成本，该成本是根据部署的运动策略量身定制的。这种表示方式避免了对常用高程图的需求，这些高程图在存在悬垂障碍物和多层或低天花板场景时容易出错。所提出的可遍历性预测网络在各种室内和自然环境中的腿式机器人 ANYmal 路径规划中的有效性得到了证明。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于体积表示的复杂环境穿越能力学习方法，通过模拟腿部机器人运动策略生成穿越代价，用于自主导航。
AI.motivation: 传统手工设计的穿越代价函数难以充分利用机器人运动能力且存在环境感知局限，特别是在复杂地形和多层结构场景中。
AI.method: 使用物理模拟器并行生成海量地形数据，训练稀疏卷积网络从3D体素地图预测定制化穿越代价，替代传统高程图表示。
AI.result: 在ANYmal机器人上验证了方法有效性，成功实现多种室内和自然环境的路径规划。
AI.conclusion: 基于体积表示的穿越预测网络能更准确反映机器人实际运动特性，优于传统方法且适用于复杂环境导航。
