result: 在ANYmal机器人上验证了方法有效性，成功实现多种室内和自然环境的路径规划。
conclusion: 基于体积表示的穿越预测网络能更准确反映机器人实际运动特性，优于传统方法且适用于复杂环境导航。
search_text: Locomotion Policy Guided Traversability Learning using Volumetric Representations of Complex Environments 使用复杂环境的体积表示的运动策略引导可遍历性学习 Despite the progress in legged robotic locomotion, autonomous navigation in unknown environments remains an open problem. Ideally, the navigation system utilizes the full potential of the robots' locomotion capabilities while operating within safety limits under uncertainty. The robot must sense and analyze the traversability of the surrounding terrain, which depends on the hardware, locomotion control, and terrain properties. It may contain information about the risk, energy, or time consumption needed to traverse the terrain. To avoid hand-crafted traversability cost functions we propose to collect traversability information about the robot and locomotion policy by simulating the traversal over randomly generated terrains using a physics simulator. Thousand of robots are simulated in parallel controlled by the same locomotion policy used in reality to acquire 57 years of real-world locomotion experience equivalent. For deployment on the real robot, a sparse convolutional network is trained to predict the simulated traversability cost, which is tailored to the deployed locomotion policy, from an entirely geometric representation of the environment in the form of a 3D voxel-occupancy map. This representation avoids the need for commonly used elevation maps, which are error-prone in the presence of overhanging obstacles and multi-floor or low-ceiling scenarios. The effectiveness of the proposed traversability prediction network is demonstrated for path planning for the legged robot ANYmal in various indoor and natural environments. 尽管腿式机器人运动取得了进展，但未知环境中的自主导航仍然是一个悬而未决的问题。理想情况下，导航系统能够充分发挥机器人运动能力的潜力，同时在不确定的情况下在安全限制内运行。机器人必须感知和分析周围地形的可穿越性，这取决于硬件、运动控制和地形属性。它可能包含有关穿越地形所需的风险、能量或时间消耗的信息。为了避免手工制作的可遍历性成本函数，我们建议通过使用物理模拟器模拟随机生成的地形上的遍历来收集有关机器人和运动策略的可遍历性信息。模拟并联控制数千个机器人，并采用与现实中相同的运动策略，以获得相当于现实世界 57 年的运动经验。为了部署在真实的机器人上，稀疏卷积网络经过训练，可以根据 3D 体素占用图形式的环境的完全几何表示来预测模拟的可遍历性成本，该成本是根据部署的运动策略量身定制的。这种表示方式避免了对常用高程图的需求，这些高程图在存在悬垂障碍物和多层或低天花板场景时容易出错。所提出的可遍历性预测网络在各种室内和自然环境中的腿式机器人 ANYmal 路径规划中的有效性得到了证明。 本文提出一种基于体积表示的复杂环境穿越能力学习方法，通过模拟腿部机器人运动策略生成穿越代价，用于自主导航。 Jonas Frey,David Hoeller,Shehryar Khattak,Marco Hutter cs.RO

authors_text: Sachini Herath,David Caruso,Chen Liu,Yufan Chen,Yasutaka Furukawa
title: Neural Inertial Localization
title_zh: 神经惯性定位
abstract: This paper proposes the inertial localization problem, the task of estimating the absolute location from a sequence of inertial sensor measurements. This is an exciting and unexplored area of indoor localization research, where we present a rich dataset with 53 hours of inertial sensor data and the associated ground truth locations. We developed a solution, dubbed neural inertial localization (NILoc) which 1) uses a neural inertial navigation technique to turn inertial sensor history to a sequence of velocity vectors; then 2) employs a transformer-based neural architecture to find the device location from the sequence of velocities. We only use an IMU sensor, which is energy efficient and privacy preserving compared to WiFi, cameras, and other data sources. Our approach is significantly faster and achieves competitive results even compared with state-of-the-art methods that require a floorplan and run 20 to 30 times slower. We share our code, model and data at https://sachini.github.io/niloc.
summary: This paper proposes the inertial localization problem, the task of estimating the absolute location from a sequence of inertial sensor measurements. This is an exciting and unexplored area of indoor localization research, where we present a rich dataset with 53 hours of inertial sensor data and the associated ground truth locations. We developed a solution, dubbed neural inertial localization (NILoc) which 1) uses a neural inertial navigation technique to turn inertial sensor history to a sequence of velocity vectors; then 2) employs a transformer-based neural architecture to find the device location from the sequence of velocities. We only use an IMU sensor, which is energy efficient and privacy preserving compared to WiFi, cameras, and other data sources. Our approach is significantly faster and achieves competitive results even compared with state-of-the-art methods that require a floorplan and run 20 to 30 times slower. We share our code, model and data at https://sachini.github.io/niloc.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了惯性定位问题，即根据一系列惯性传感器测量值估计绝对位置的任务。这是室内定位研究一个令人兴奋且尚未探索的领域，我们提供了丰富的数据集，其中包含 53 小时的惯性传感器数据和相关的地面真实位置。我们开发了一种称为神经惯性定位 (NILoc) 的解决方案，该解决方案 1) 使用神经惯性导航技术将惯性传感器历史记录转换为速度矢量序列；然后 2) 采用基于变压器的神经架构从速度序列中找到设备位置。我们只使用 IMU 传感器，与 WiFi、摄像头和其他数据源相比，它既节能又保护隐私。即使与需要布局且运行速度慢 20 到 30 倍的最先进方法相比，我们的方法速度明显更快，并且取得了具有竞争力的结果。我们在 https://sachini.github.io/niloc 分享我们的代码、模型和数据。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于惯性传感器数据的绝对定位方法，称为神经惯性定位（NILoc）。
AI.motivation: 室内定位研究中，使用惯性传感器进行绝对定位是一个未被充分探索的领域。相比WiFi、摄像头等其他数据源，惯性测量单元（IMU）具有更高的能效和隐私保护性。
AI.method: 该方法分为两步：1）使用神经惯性导航技术将惯性传感器的历史数据转化为速度向量序列；2）使用基于Transformer的神经网络架构从速度序列中确定设备位置。
AI.result: 该方法仅使用IMU传感器，比需要平面图且运行速度慢20到30倍的最先进方法更快，并且取得了具有竞争力的结果。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出了一个高效且隐私保护的室内定位方法，并共享了数据集、代码和模型，为未来研究提供了基础。

authors_text: Zhang-Wei Hong,Tao Chen,Yen-Chen Lin,Joni Pajarinen,Pulkit Agrawal
title: Topological Experience Replay
title_zh: 拓扑经验回放
abstract: State-of-the-art deep Q-learning methods update Q-values using state transition tuples sampled from the experience replay buffer. This strategy often uniformly and randomly samples or prioritizes data sampling based on measures such as the temporal difference (TD) error. Such sampling strategies can be inefficient at learning Q-function because a state's Q-value depends on the Q-value of successor states. If the data sampling strategy ignores the precision of the Q-value estimate of the next state, it can lead to useless and often incorrect updates to the Q-values. To mitigate this issue, we organize the agent's experience into a graph that explicitly tracks the dependency between Q-values of states. Each edge in the graph represents a transition between two states by executing a single action. We perform value backups via a breadth-first search starting from that expands vertices in the graph starting from the set of terminal states and successively moving backward. We empirically show that our method is substantially more data-efficient than several baselines on a diverse range of goal-reaching tasks. Notably, the proposed method also outperforms baselines that consume more batches of training experience and operates from high-dimensional observational data such as images.
summary: State-of-the-art deep Q-learning methods update Q-values using state transition tuples sampled from the experience replay buffer. This strategy often uniformly and randomly samples or prioritizes data sampling based on measures such as the temporal difference (TD) error. Such sampling strategies can be inefficient at learning Q-function because a state's Q-value depends on the Q-value of successor states. If the data sampling strategy ignores the precision of the Q-value estimate of the next state, it can lead to useless and often incorrect updates to the Q-values. To mitigate this issue, we organize the agent's experience into a graph that explicitly tracks the dependency between Q-values of states. Each edge in the graph represents a transition between two states by executing a single action. We perform value backups via a breadth-first search starting from that expands vertices in the graph starting from the set of terminal states and successively moving backward. We empirically show that our method is substantially more data-efficient than several baselines on a diverse range of goal-reaching tasks. Notably, the proposed method also outperforms baselines that consume more batches of training experience and operates from high-dimensional observational data such as images.
abstract_zh: 最先进的深度 Q 学习方法使用从经验重放缓冲区采样的状态转换元组来更新 Q 值。此策略通常基于时间差 (TD) 误差等度量来均匀随机采样或优先排序数据采样。这种采样策略在学习 Q 函数时效率较低，因为状态的 Q 值取决于后续状态的 Q 值。如果数据采样策略忽略下一状态的 Q 值估计的精度，则可能导致 Q 值无用且经常不正确的更新。为了缓解这个问题，我们将代理的经验组织成一个图表，明确跟踪状态 Q 值之间的依赖关系。图中的每条边代表通过执行单个操作在两个状态之间的转换。我们通过广度优先搜索来执行值备份，该搜索从扩展图中的顶点开始，从终止状态集开始并连续向后移动。我们的经验表明，在各种目标达成任务中，我们的方法比几种基线的数据效率要高得多。值得注意的是，所提出的方法还优于消耗更多批次训练经验并根据图像等高维观测数据进行操作的基线。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于拓扑结构的经验回放方法，通过构建状态转移图并利用广度优先搜索进行值备份，以提高深度Q学习的效率。
AI.motivation: 现有经验回放策略在更新Q值时未考虑后续状态Q值估计的准确性，导致更新效率低下且可能产生错误。
AI.method: 将智能体经验组织为状态转移图，通过广度优先搜索从终端状态逆向扩展，进行值备份以确保Q值更新的准确性。
AI.result: 在多种目标达成任务中，该方法相比基线显著提升了数据效率，并在高维观测数据（如图像）上表现更优。
AI.conclusion: 拓扑经验回放通过显式建模状态依赖关系，有效改进了Q学习的效率和稳定性，适用于复杂环境。

This strategy often uniformly and randomly samples or prioritizes data sampling based on measures such as the temporal difference (TD) error. Such sampling strategies can be inefficient at learning Q-function because a state's Q-value depends on the Q-value of successor states. If the data sampling strategy ignores the precision of the Q-value estimate of the next state, it can lead to useless and often incorrect updates to the Q-values. To mitigate this issue, we organize the agent's experience into a graph that explicitly tracks the dependency between Q-values of states. Each edge in the graph represents a transition between two states by executing a single action. We empirically show that our method is substantially more data-efficient than several baselines on a diverse range of goal-reaching tasks. authors_text: Ulices Santa Cruz,Yasser Shoukry
title: NNLander-VeriF: A Neural Network Formal Verification Framework for Vision-Based Autonomous Aircraft Landing
title_zh: NNLander-VeriF：基于视觉的自主飞机着陆的神经网络形式验证框架
abstract: In this paper, we consider the problem of formally verifying a Neural Network (NN) based autonomous landing system. In such a system, a NN controller processes images from a camera to guide the aircraft while approaching the runway. A central challenge for the safety and liveness verification of vision-based closed-loop systems is the lack of mathematical models that captures the relation between the system states (e.g., position of the aircraft) and the images processed by the vision-based NN controller. Another challenge is the limited abilities of state-of-the-art NN model checkers. Such model checkers can reason only about simple input-output robustness properties of neural networks. This limitation creates a gap between the NN model checker abilities and the need to verify a closed-loop system while considering the aircraft dynamics, the perception components, and the NN controller. To this end, this paper presents NNLander-VeriF, a framework to verify vision-based NN controllers used for autonomous landing. NNLander-VeriF addresses the challenges above by exploiting geometric models of perspective cameras to obtain a mathematical model that captures the relation between the aircraft states and the inputs to the NN controller. By converting this model into a NN (with manually assigned weights) and composing it with the NN controller, one can capture the relation between aircraft states and control actions using one augmented NN. Such an augmented NN model leads to a natural encoding of the closed-loop verification into several NN robustness queries, which state-of-the-art NN model checkers can handle. Finally, we evaluate our framework to formally verify the properties of a trained NN and we show its efficiency.
summary: In this paper, we consider the problem of formally verifying a Neural Network (NN) based autonomous landing system. In such a system, a NN controller processes images from a camera to guide the aircraft while approaching the runway. A central challenge for the safety and liveness verification of vision-based closed-loop systems is the lack of mathematical models that captures the relation between the system states (e.g., position of the aircraft) and the images processed by the vision-based NN controller. Another challenge is the limited abilities of state-of-the-art NN model checkers. Such model checkers can reason only about simple input-output robustness properties of neural networks. This limitation creates a gap between the NN model checker abilities and the need to verify a closed-loop system while considering the aircraft dynamics, the perception components, and the NN controller. To this end, this paper presents NNLander-VeriF, a framework to verify vision-based NN controllers used for autonomous landing. NNLander-VeriF addresses the challenges above by exploiting geometric models of perspective cameras to obtain a mathematical model that captures the relation between the aircraft states and the inputs to the NN controller. By converting this model into a NN (with manually assigned weights) and composing it with the NN controller, one can capture the relation between aircraft states and control actions using one augmented NN. Such an augmented NN model leads to a natural encoding of the closed-loop verification into several NN robustness queries, which state-of-the-art NN model checkers can handle. Finally, we evaluate our framework to formally verify the properties of a trained NN and we show its efficiency.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们考虑形式验证基于神经网络（NN）的自主着陆系统的问题。在这样的系统中，神经网络控制器处理来自摄像机的图像，以在飞机接近跑道时引导飞机。基于视觉的闭环系统的安全性和活性验证的一个主要挑战是缺乏捕获系统状态（例如飞机的位置）与基于视觉的神经网络控制器处理的图像之间关系的数学模型。另一个挑战是最先进的神经网络模型检查器的能力有限。这种模型检查器只能推理神经网络的简单输入输出鲁棒性属性。这种限制在神经网络模型检查器的能力与在考虑飞机动力学、感知组件和神经网络控制器的同时验证闭环系统的需求之间造成了差距。为此，本文提出了 NNLander-VeriF，一个用于验证用于自主着陆的基于视觉的神经网络控制器的框架。 NNLander-VeriF 通过利用透视相机的几何模型来获得捕获飞机状态与神经网络控制器输入之间关系的数学模型，从而解决上述挑战。通过将该模型转换为神经网络（具有手动分配的权重）并将其与神经网络控制器组合，人们可以使用一个增强的神经网络捕获飞机状态和控制动作之间的关系。这种增强的神经网络模型可以将闭环验证自然编码为几个神经网络鲁棒性查询，最先进的神经网络模型检查器可以处理这些查询。最后，我们评估我们的框架以正式验证经过训练的神经网络的属性，并展示其效率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出NNLander-VeriF框架，用于形式化验证基于视觉的自主飞行器着陆系统的神经网络控制器。
AI.motivation: 视觉闭环系统的安全性和活性验证面临两大挑战：缺乏描述飞机状态与视觉神经网络输入关系的数学模型，以及现有神经网络验证工具无法处理复杂系统属性。
AI.method: 利用透视相机的几何模型建立飞机状态与神经网络输入的数学关系，将其转化为人工赋权的神经网络并与控制器组合，形成增强型神经网络模型，通过现有验证工具处理闭环验证问题。
AI.result: 框架成功验证了训练后的神经网络属性，并展示了其效率。
AI.conclusion: NNLander-VeriF通过几何建模和增强神经网络方法，有效弥补了现有验证工具与闭环系统验证需求之间的差距。

authors_text: Benjamin Ghaemmaghami,Mustafa Ozdal,Rakesh Komuravelli,Dmitriy Korchev,Dheevatsa Mudigere,Krishnakumar Nair,Maxim Naumov
title: Learning to Collide: Recommendation System Model Compression with Learned Hash Functions
title_zh: 学习碰撞：使用学习哈希函数进行推荐系统模型压缩
abstract: A key characteristic of deep recommendation models is the immense memory requirements of their embedding tables. These embedding tables can often reach hundreds of gigabytes which increases hardware requirements and training cost. A common technique to reduce model size is to hash all of the categorical variable identifiers (ids) into a smaller space. This hashing reduces the number of unique representations that must be stored in the embedding table; thus decreasing its size. However, this approach introduces collisions between semantically dissimilar ids that degrade model quality. We introduce an alternative approach, Learned Hash Functions, which instead learns a new mapping function that encourages collisions between semantically similar ids. We derive this learned mapping from historical data and embedding access patterns. We experiment with this technique on a production model and find that a mapping informed by the combination of access frequency and a learned low dimension embedding is the most effective. We demonstrate a small improvement relative to the hashing trick and other collision related compression techniques. This is ongoing work that explores the impact of categorical id collisions on recommendation model quality and how those collisions may be controlled to improve model performance.
summary: A key characteristic of deep recommendation models is the immense memory requirements of their embedding tables. These embedding tables can often reach hundreds of gigabytes which increases hardware requirements and training cost. A common technique to reduce model size is to hash all of the categorical variable identifiers (ids) into a smaller space. This hashing reduces the number of unique representations that must be stored in the embedding table; thus decreasing its size. However, this approach introduces collisions between semantically dissimilar ids that degrade model quality. We introduce an alternative approach, Learned Hash Functions, which instead learns a new mapping function that encourages collisions between semantically similar ids. We derive this learned mapping from historical data and embedding access patterns. We experiment with this technique on a production model and find that a mapping informed by the combination of access frequency and a learned low dimension embedding is the most effective. We demonstrate a small improvement relative to the hashing trick and other collision related compression techniques. This is ongoing work that explores the impact of categorical id collisions on recommendation model quality and how those collisions may be controlled to improve model performance.
abstract_zh: 深度推荐模型的一个关键特征是其嵌入表的巨大内存需求。这些嵌入表通常可以达到数百GB，这增加了硬件要求和培训成本。减小模型大小的常用技术是将所有分类变量标识符 (ids) 散列到更小的空间中。这种散列减少了必须存储在嵌入表中的唯一表示的数量；从而减小其尺寸。然而，这种方法会引入语义不同的 id 之间的冲突，从而降低模型质量。我们引入了一种替代方法，学习哈希函数，它学习一种新的映射函数，鼓励语义相似的 id 之间发生冲突。我们从历史数据和嵌入访问模式中得出这种学习映射。我们在生产模型上试验了这种技术，发现通过访问频率和学习的低维嵌入相结合的映射是最有效的。我们展示了相对于散列技巧和其他与冲突相关的压缩技术的小改进。这是一项正在进行的工作，探讨分类 ID 冲突对推荐模型质量的影响，以及如何控制这些冲突以提高模型性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过学习哈希函数来压缩推荐系统模型的方法，旨在减少嵌入表内存占用同时控制类别ID碰撞对模型质量的影响。
AI.motivation: 深度推荐模型的嵌入表内存需求巨大，传统哈希方法虽能压缩模型但会导致语义不相似ID碰撞，损害模型效果。
AI.method: 基于历史数据和嵌入访问模式学习哈希函数，通过结合访问频率与低维嵌入信息构建语义相似ID的碰撞映射。
AI.result: 在生产模型实验中，该方法相较传统哈希和其他碰撞压缩技术实现了小幅性能提升。
AI.conclusion: 该工作验证了通过控制类别ID碰撞可优化模型性能，为推荐系统模型压缩提供了新方向。

authors_text: Xi Ye,Guillaume-Alexandre Bilodeau
title: VPTR: Efficient Transformers for Video Prediction
title_zh: VPTR：用于视频预测的高效变压器
abstract: In this paper, we propose a new Transformer block for video future frames prediction based on an efficient local spatial-temporal separation attention mechanism. Based on this new Transformer block, a fully autoregressive video future frames prediction Transformer is proposed. In addition, a non-autoregressive video prediction Transformer is also proposed to increase the inference speed and reduce the accumulated inference errors of its autoregressive counterpart. In order to avoid the prediction of very similar future frames, a contrastive feature loss is applied to maximize the mutual information between predicted and ground-truth future frame features. This work is the first that makes a formal comparison of the two types of attention-based video future frames prediction models over different scenarios. The proposed models reach a performance competitive with more complex state-of-the-art models. The source code is available at \emph{https://github.com/XiYe20/VPTR}.
summary: In this paper, we propose a new Transformer block for video future frames prediction based on an efficient local spatial-temporal separation attention mechanism. Based on this new Transformer block, a fully autoregressive video future frames prediction Transformer is proposed. In addition, a non-autoregressive video prediction Transformer is also proposed to increase the inference speed and reduce the accumulated inference errors of its autoregressive counterpart. In order to avoid the prediction of very similar future frames, a contrastive feature loss is applied to maximize the mutual information between predicted and ground-truth future frame features. This work is the first that makes a formal comparison of the two types of attention-based video future frames prediction models over different scenarios. The proposed models reach a performance competitive with more complex state-of-the-art models. The source code is available at \emph{https://github.com/XiYe20/VPTR}.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种新的 Transformer 块，用于基于有效的局部时空分离注意机制的视频未来帧预测。基于这个新的 Transformer 模块，提出了一种完全自回归视频未来帧预测 Transformer。此外，还提出了一种非自回归视频预测 Transformer，以提高其自回归对应物的推理速度并减少累积的推理误差。为了避免预测非常相似的未来帧，应用对比特征损失来最大化预测和真实未来帧特征之间的互信息。这项工作是第一个对不同场景下两种基于注意力的视频未来帧预测模型进行正式比较的工作。所提出的模型达到了与更复杂的最先进模型相媲美的性能。源代码可在 \emph{https://github.com/XiYe20/VPTR} 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出VPTR模型，通过高效的局部时空分离注意力机制实现视频未来帧预测，包含自回归和非自回归两种架构。
AI.motivation: 现有视频预测模型存在计算复杂度高、推理速度慢及误差累积等问题，需探索更高效的Transformer架构并比较不同模型表现。
AI.method: 设计基于局部时空分离注意力的新型Transformer块，构建自回归预测模型与非自回归模型，并引入对比特征损失以增强预测多样性。
AI.result: 模型性能达到与复杂SOTA模型相当的水平，非自回归模型显著提升推理速度并减少误差累积，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 首次系统比较了基于注意力机制的两种视频预测模型，验证了所提方法在效率与准确性上的优势。

search_text: VPTR: Efficient Transformers for Video Prediction VPTR：用于视频预测的高效变压器 In this paper, we propose a new Transformer block for video future frames prediction based on an efficient local spatial-temporal separation attention mechanism. Based on this new Transformer block, a fully autoregressive video future frames prediction Transformer is proposed. In addition, a non-autoregressive video prediction Transformer is also proposed to increase the inference speed and reduce the accumulated inference errors of its autoregressive counterpart. In order to avoid the prediction of very similar future frames, a contrastive feature loss is applied to maximize the mutual information between predicted and ground-truth future frame features. This work is the first that makes a formal comparison of the two types of attention-based video future frames prediction models over different scenarios. The proposed models reach a performance competitive with more complex state-of-the-art models. The source code is available at \emph{https://github.com/XiYe20/VPTR}. 在本文中，我们提出了一种新的 Transformer 块，用于基于有效的局部时空分离注意机制的视频未来帧预测。基于这个新的 Transformer 模块，提出了一种完全自回归视频未来帧预测 Transformer。此外，还提出了一种非自回归视频预测 Transformer，以提高其自回归对应物的推理速度并减少累积的推理误差。为了避免预测非常相似的未来帧，应用对比特征损失来最大化预测和真实未来帧特征之间的互信息。这项工作是第一个对不同场景下两种基于注意力的视频未来帧预测模型进行正式比较的工作。所提出的模型达到了与更复杂的最先进模型相媲美的性能。源代码可在 \emph{https://github.com/XiYe20/VPTR} 获取。 本文提出VPTR模型，通过高效的局部时空分离注意力机制实现视频未来帧预测，包含自回归和非自回归两种架构。 Xi Ye,Guillaume-Alexandre Bilodeau cs.CV

authors_text: Ali Pourramezan Fard,Mohammad H. Mahoor
title: ACR Loss: Adaptive Coordinate-based Regression Loss for Face Alignment
title_zh: ACR 损失：用于人脸对齐的自适应坐标回归损失
comment: Accepted in International Conference on Pattern Recognition (ICPR) 2022
comments: Accepted in International Conference on Pattern Recognition (ICPR) 2022
abstract: Although deep neural networks have achieved reasonable accuracy in solving face alignment, it is still a challenging task, specifically when we deal with facial images, under occlusion, or extreme head poses. Heatmap-based Regression (HBR) and Coordinate-based Regression (CBR) are among the two mainly used methods for face alignment. CBR methods require less computer memory, though their performance is less than HBR methods. In this paper, we propose an Adaptive Coordinate-based Regression (ACR) loss to improve the accuracy of CBR for face alignment. Inspired by the Active Shape Model (ASM), we generate Smooth-Face objects, a set of facial landmark points with less variations compared to the ground truth landmark points. We then introduce a method to estimate the level of difficulty in predicting each landmark point for the network by comparing the distribution of the ground truth landmark points and the corresponding Smooth-Face objects. Our proposed ACR Loss can adaptively modify its curvature and the influence of the loss based on the difficulty level of predicting each landmark point in a face. Accordingly, the ACR Loss guides the network toward challenging points than easier points, which improves the accuracy of the face alignment task. Our extensive evaluation shows the capabilities of the proposed ACR Loss in predicting facial landmark points in various facial images.
summary: Although deep neural networks have achieved reasonable accuracy in solving face alignment, it is still a challenging task, specifically when we deal with facial images, under occlusion, or extreme head poses. Heatmap-based Regression (HBR) and Coordinate-based Regression (CBR) are among the two mainly used methods for face alignment. CBR methods require less computer memory, though their performance is less than HBR methods. In this paper, we propose an Adaptive Coordinate-based Regression (ACR) loss to improve the accuracy of CBR for face alignment. Inspired by the Active Shape Model (ASM), we generate Smooth-Face objects, a set of facial landmark points with less variations compared to the ground truth landmark points. We then introduce a method to estimate the level of difficulty in predicting each landmark point for the network by comparing the distribution of the ground truth landmark points and the corresponding Smooth-Face objects. Our proposed ACR Loss can adaptively modify its curvature and the influence of the loss based on the difficulty level of predicting each landmark point in a face. Accordingly, the ACR Loss guides the network toward challenging points than easier points, which improves the accuracy of the face alignment task. Our extensive evaluation shows the capabilities of the proposed ACR Loss in predicting facial landmark points in various facial images.
abstract_zh: 尽管深度神经网络在解决面部对齐问题上已经达到了相当的精度，但这仍然是一项具有挑战性的任务，特别是当我们处理遮挡或极端头部姿势的面部图像时。基于热图的回归（HBR）和基于坐标的回归（CBR）是两种主要用于人脸对齐的方法之一。 CBR 方法需要较少的计算机内存，但其性能低于 HBR 方法。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于自适应坐标的回归（ACR）损失来提高 CBR 人脸对齐的准确性。受主动形状模型（ASM）的启发，我们生成了 Smooth-Face 对象，这是一组与地面真实标志点相比变化较小的面部标志点。然后，我们引入一种方法，通过比较地面真实标志点和相应的 Smooth-Face 对象的分布来估计预测网络的每个标志点的难度级别。我们提出的 ACR 损失可以根据预测面部中每个标志点的难度级别自适应地修改其曲率和损失的影响。因此，ACR 损失将网络引导到具有挑战性的点而不是较容易的点，从而提高了人脸对齐任务的准确性。我们的广泛评估显示了所提出的 ACR 损失在预测各种面部图像中的面部标志点方面的能力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种自适应坐标回归损失（ACR Loss），以提升坐标回归方法在面部对齐任务中的准确性，特别是在遮挡或极端姿态等挑战性场景下。
AI.motivation: 坐标回归（CBR）方法虽内存效率高，但其在复杂场景下的预测精度低于热图回归（HBR）。现有方法难以有效处理面部遮挡或极端姿态下的地标点预测问题。
AI.method: 受主动形状模型（ASM）启发，生成与真实地标点差异较小的Smooth-Face对象，通过比较真实地标与Smooth-Face的分布差异，动态评估每个地标点的预测难度，并据此自适应调整损失函数的曲率和权重。
AI.result: 实验表明，ACR Loss在多种面部图像数据集上显著提升了坐标回归的预测精度，尤其在遮挡和极端姿态场景下表现优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: ACR Loss通过动态调整损失函数权重，有效提升了CBR方法的鲁棒性，为复杂场景下的面部对齐任务提供了新的解决方案。

authors_text: Irene-Angelia Chounta
title: Collaborative Learning and Patterns of Practice
title_zh: 协作学习和实践模式
comment: 34 pages, entry for the Encyclopedia of Education and Information Technologies, Springer
comments: 34 pages, entry for the Encyclopedia of Education and Information Technologies, Springer
abstract: In this article, an overview of the background, the research approaches and the patterns of practice in the field of collaborative learning are provided. A definition of collaborative learning and an overview of fundamental aspects that shape research and practice in this field are included. Pedagogies and learning theories that are used as foundations of the field alongside goals and objectives of collaborative learning approaches are discussed. Popular patterns of practice, exploring their application in classrooms and elaborating on the state of the art around those practices in research are outlined. A discussion about important topics, open questions and future directions are provided in conclusion.
summary: In this article, an overview of the background, the research approaches and the patterns of practice in the field of collaborative learning are provided. A definition of collaborative learning and an overview of fundamental aspects that shape research and practice in this field are included. Pedagogies and learning theories that are used as foundations of the field alongside goals and objectives of collaborative learning approaches are discussed. Popular patterns of practice, exploring their application in classrooms and elaborating on the state of the art around those practices in research are outlined. A discussion about important topics, open questions and future directions are provided in conclusion.
abstract_zh: 本文概述了协作学习领域的背景、研究方法和实践模式。其中包括协作学习的定义以及影响该领域研究和实践的基本方面的概述。讨论了用作该领域基础的教学法和学习理论以及协作学习方法的目标和目标。概述了流行的实践模式，探索其在课堂上的应用，并详细阐述了研究中这些实践的最新技术。最后提供了关于重要主题、悬而未决的问题和未来方向的讨论。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了协作学习领域的背景、研究方法及实践模式，探讨其理论基础、教学法应用及未来发展方向。
AI.motivation: 协作学习在教育中具有重要地位，但其研究和实践存在分散性，需系统梳理以明确理论框架与实践路径。
AI.method: 通过文献综述方法，整合协作学习的定义、理论基础、教学法及实践模式，分析其应用现状与研究进展。
AI.result: 总结了协作学习的核心实践模式，分析了其在课堂中的应用及研究现状，明确了当前研究的不足与挑战。
AI.conclusion: 协作学习需进一步探索理论与实践的结合，解决开放性问题，并推动教育技术与方法的创新应用。

search_text: Collaborative Learning and Patterns of Practice 协作学习和实践模式 In this article, an overview of the background, the research approaches and the patterns of practice in the field of collaborative learning are provided. A definition of collaborative learning and an overview of fundamental aspects that shape research and practice in this field are included. Pedagogies and learning theories that are used as foundations of the field alongside goals and objectives of collaborative learning approaches are discussed. Popular patterns of practice, exploring their application in classrooms and elaborating on the state of the art around those practices in research are outlined. A discussion about important topics, open questions and future directions are provided in conclusion. 本文概述了协作学习领域的背景、研究方法和实践模式。其中包括协作学习的定义以及影响该领域研究和实践的基本方面的概述。讨论了用作该领域基础的教学法和学习理论以及协作学习方法的目标和目标。概述了流行的实践模式，探索其在课堂上的应用，并详细阐述了研究中这些实践的最新技术。最后提供了关于重要主题、悬而未决的问题和未来方向的讨论。 本文综述了协作学习领域的背景、研究方法及实践模式，探讨其理论基础、教学法应用及未来发展方向。 Irene-Angelia Chounta cs.HC

authors_text: Karan Singla,Shahab Jalalvand,Yeon-Jun Kim,Ryan Price,Daniel Pressel,Srinivas Bangalore
title: Seq-2-Seq based Refinement of ASR Output for Spoken Name Capture
title_zh: 基于 Seq-2-Seq 的 ASR 输出细化以捕获口语名称
abstract: Person name capture from human speech is a difficult task in human-machine conversations. In this paper, we propose a novel approach to capture the person names from the caller utterances in response to the prompt "say and spell your first/last name". Inspired from work on spell correction, disfluency removal and text normalization, we propose a lightweight Seq-2-Seq system which generates a name spell from a varying user input. Our proposed method outperforms the strong baseline which is based on LM-driven rule-based approach.
summary: Person name capture from human speech is a difficult task in human-machine conversations. In this paper, we propose a novel approach to capture the person names from the caller utterances in response to the prompt "say and spell your first/last name". Inspired from work on spell correction, disfluency removal and text normalization, we propose a lightweight Seq-2-Seq system which generates a name spell from a varying user input. Our proposed method outperforms the strong baseline which is based on LM-driven rule-based approach.
abstract_zh: 在人机对话中，从人类语音中捕获人名是一项艰巨的任务。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的方法来从呼叫者的话语中捕获人名，以响应提示“说出并拼写您的名字/姓氏”。受到拼写纠正、不流畅消除和文本标准化工作的启发，我们提出了一个轻量级的 Seq-2-Seq 系统，它可以根据不同的用户输入生成名称拼写。我们提出的方法优于基于 LM 驱动的基于规则的方法的强大基线。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于序列到序列（Seq-2-Seq）的轻量级模型，用于优化语音识别（ASR）输出以提高口语化姓名捕捉的准确性。
AI.motivation: 在人机对话中，从语音中准确捕捉姓名（尤其是用户对‘说出并拼写姓名’等提示的响应）存在挑战，传统基于语言模型的规则方法效果有限。
AI.method: 受拼写修正、不流畅文本去除和文本归一化技术启发，设计轻量级Seq-2-Seq系统，从用户输入生成标准化姓名拼写。
AI.result: 该方法在测试中优于基于语言模型的规则基线方法，有效提升了姓名捕捉的准确率。
AI.conclusion: Seq-2-Seq框架在优化ASR输出的姓名捕捉任务中表现优异，为口语化信息处理提供了有效解决方案。

authors_text: Xiaotian Li,Xiang Zhang,Huiyuan Yang,Wenna Duan,Weiying Dai,Lijun Yin
title: An EEG-Based Multi-Modal Emotion Database with Both Posed and Authentic Facial Actions for Emotion Analysis
title_zh: 基于脑电图的多模态情感数据库，具有用于情感分析的姿势和真实面部动作
abstract: Emotion is an experience associated with a particular pattern of physiological activity along with different physiological, behavioral and cognitive changes. One behavioral change is facial expression, which has been studied extensively over the past few decades. Facial behavior varies with a person's emotion according to differences in terms of culture, personality, age, context, and environment. In recent years, physiological activities have been used to study emotional responses. A typical signal is the electroencephalogram (EEG), which measures brain activity. Most of existing EEG-based emotion analysis has overlooked the role of facial expression changes. There exits little research on the relationship between facial behavior and brain signals due to the lack of dataset measuring both EEG and facial action signals simultaneously. To address this problem, we propose to develop a new database by collecting facial expressions, action units, and EEGs simultaneously. We recorded the EEGs and face videos of both posed facial actions and spontaneous expressions from 29 participants with different ages, genders, ethnic backgrounds. Differing from existing approaches, we designed a protocol to capture the EEG signals by evoking participants' individual action units explicitly. We also investigated the relation between the EEG signals and facial action units. As a baseline, the database has been evaluated through the experiments on both posed and spontaneous emotion recognition with images alone, EEG alone, and EEG fused with images, respectively. The database will be released to the research community to advance the state of the art for automatic emotion recognition.

In recent years, physiological activities have been used to study emotional responses. A typical signal is the electroencephalogram (EEG), which measures brain activity. To address this problem, we propose to develop a new database by collecting facial expressions, action units, and EEGs simultaneously. abstract_zh: 情绪是一种与特定的生理活动模式以及不同的生理、行为和认知变化相关的体验。一种行为变化是面部表情，在过去的几十年里已经得到了广泛的研究。根据文化、个性、年龄、背景和环境的差异，面部行为随着人的情绪而变化。近年来，生理活动已被用来研究情绪反应。典型的信号是脑电图 (EEG)，用于测量大脑活动。大多数现有的基于脑电图的情绪分析都忽略了面部表情变化的作用。由于缺乏同时测量脑电图和面部动作信号的数据集，关于面部行为和大脑信号之间关系的研究很少。为了解决这个问题，我们建议通过同时收集面部表情、动作单元和脑电图来开发一个新的数据库。我们记录了 29 名不同年龄、性别、种族背景的参与者的脑电图和脸部视频，包括摆出的面部动作和自发表情。与现有方法不同，我们设计了一个协议，通过明确唤起参与者的个人动作单元来捕获脑电图信号。我们还研究了脑电图信号和面部动作单元之间的关系。作为基线，分别通过单独图像、单独脑电图和脑电图与图像融合的姿势和自发情绪识别实验对数据库进行了评估。该数据库将向研究界发布，以推进自动情绪识别的最新技术。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个结合脑电图（EEG）和面部动作的多模态情绪数据库，用于情绪分析研究。
AI.motivation: 现有基于EEG的情绪分析大多忽视了面部表情变化的作用，缺乏同时测量EEG和面部动作信号的数据集，限制了情绪与生理信号关系的研究。
AI.method: 通过采集29名不同年龄、性别和民族的参与者在诱发面部动作单元（AU）时的EEG和面部视频数据，设计协议同步记录诱发的面部表情和自发情绪，并分析EEG与面部动作单元的关系。
AI.result: 数据库通过图像单独识别、EEG单独识别以及EEG与图像融合识别三种方式验证，为情绪识别提供了基准数据。
AI.conclusion: 该数据库的发布将推动自动情绪识别领域的发展，促进情绪相关生理信号与面部行为关系的深入研究。

authors_text: K. Sozos,A. Bogris,P. Bienstman,G. Sarantoglou,S. Deligiannidis,C. Mesaritakis
title: High Speed Photonic Neuromorphic Computing Using Recurrent Optical Spectrum Slicing Neural Networks
title_zh: 使用循环光谱切片神经网络的高速光子神经形态计算
abstract: Neuromorphic Computing implemented in photonic hardware is one of the most promising routes towards achieving machine learning processing at the picosecond scale, with minimum power consumption. In this work, we present a new concept for realizing photonic recurrent neural networks and reservoir computing architectures with the use of recurrent optical spectrum slicing. This is accomplished through simple optical filters placed in an loop, where each filter processes a specific spectral slice of the incoming optical signal. The synaptic weights in our scheme are equivalent to filters central frequencies and bandwidths. This new method for implementing recurrent neural processing in the photonic domain, which we call Recurrent Optical Spectrum Slicing Neural Networks, is numerically evaluated on a demanding, industry-relevant task such as high baud rate optical signal equalization 100 Gbaud, exhibiting ground-breaking performance. The performance enhancement surpasses state-of-the-art digital processing techniques by doubling the reach while minimizing complexity and power consumption by a factor of 10 compared to state-of-the-art solutions. In this respect, ROSS-NNs can pave the way for the implementation of ultra-efficient photonic hardware accelerators tailored for processing high-bandwidth optical signals in optical communication and high-speed imaging applications
summary: Neuromorphic Computing implemented in photonic hardware is one of the most promising routes towards achieving machine learning processing at the picosecond scale, with minimum power consumption. This new method for implementing recurrent neural processing in the photonic domain, which we call Recurrent Optical Spectrum Slicing Neural Networks, is numerically evaluated on a demanding, industry-relevant task such as high baud rate optical signal equalization 100 Gbaud, exhibiting ground-breaking performance. The performance enhancement surpasses state-of-the-art digital processing techniques by doubling the reach while minimizing complexity and power consumption by a factor of 10 compared to state-of-the-art solutions. In this respect, ROSS-NNs can pave the way for the implementation of ultra-efficient photonic hardware accelerators tailored for processing high-bandwidth optical signals in optical communication and high-speed imaging applications
abstract_zh: 在光子硬件中实现的神经形态计算是实现皮秒级机器学习处理且功耗最低的最有前途的途径之一。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种使用循环光谱切片来实现光子循环神经网络和储层计算架构的新概念。这是通过放置在环路中的简单光学滤波器来实现的，其中每个滤波器处理输入光信号的特定光谱切片。我们方案中的突触权重相当于滤波器的中心频率和带宽。这种在光子域中实现循环神经处理的新方法，我们称之为循环光谱切片神经网络，在高波特率光信号均衡 100 Gbaud 等要求严格的行业相关任务上进行了数值评估，表现出突破性的性能。与最先进的解决方案相比，性能增强超越了最先进的数字处理技术，范围扩大了一倍，同时将复杂性和功耗降至十分之一。在这方面，ROSS-NN 可以为实现超高效光子硬件加速器铺平道路，该加速器专为处理光通信和高速成像应用中的高带宽光信号而定制

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于光谱切片的光子循环神经网络（ROSS-NNs），用于实现高速光子神经形态计算，解决高带宽光学信号处理问题。
AI.motivation: 传统数字处理技术难以满足高速光学通信和成像应用对低功耗、高效率计算的需求，需探索新型光子硬件加速方案。
AI.method: 通过在环形结构中部署光学滤波器，利用光谱切片技术处理输入信号的不同频段，将滤波器的中心频率和带宽映射为突触权重，构建循环光学神经网络。
AI.result: 在100 Gbaud光信号均衡任务中，ROSS-NNs性能超越现有数字技术，传输距离翻倍，复杂度和功耗降低10倍。
AI.conclusion: ROSS-NNs为光子硬件加速器的开发提供了新路径，可高效处理高带宽光学信号，推动光学通信和成像技术发展。

search_text: High Speed Photonic Neuromorphic Computing Using Recurrent Optical Spectrum Slicing Neural Networks 使用循环光谱切片神经网络的高速光子神经形态计算 Neuromorphic Computing implemented in photonic hardware is one of the most promising routes towards achieving machine learning processing at the picosecond scale, with minimum power consumption. In this work, we present a new concept for realizing photonic recurrent neural networks and reservoir computing architectures with the use of recurrent optical spectrum slicing. This is accomplished through simple optical filters placed in an loop, where each filter processes a specific spectral slice of the incoming optical signal. The synaptic weights in our scheme are equivalent to filters central frequencies and bandwidths. This new method for implementing recurrent neural processing in the photonic domain, which we call Recurrent Optical Spectrum Slicing Neural Networks, is numerically evaluated on a demanding, industry-relevant task such as high baud rate optical signal equalization 100 Gbaud, exhibiting ground-breaking performance. The performance enhancement surpasses state-of-the-art digital processing techniques by doubling the reach while minimizing complexity and power consumption by a factor of 10 compared to state-of-the-art solutions. In this respect, ROSS-NNs can pave the way for the implementation of ultra-efficient photonic hardware accelerators tailored for processing high-bandwidth optical signals in optical communication and high-speed imaging applications 在光子硬件中实现的神经形态计算是实现皮秒级机器学习处理且功耗最低的最有前途的途径之一。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种使用循环光谱切片来实现光子循环神经网络和储层计算架构的新概念。这是通过放置在环路中的简单光学滤波器来实现的，其中每个滤波器处理输入光信号的特定光谱切片。我们方案中的突触权重相当于滤波器的中心频率和带宽。这种在光子域中实现循环神经处理的新方法，我们称之为循环光谱切片神经网络，在高波特率光信号均衡 100 Gbaud 等要求严格的行业相关任务上进行了数值评估，表现出突破性的性能。与最先进的解决方案相比，性能增强超越了最先进的数字处理技术，范围扩大了一倍，同时将复杂性和功耗降至十分之一。在这方面，ROSS-NN 可以为实现超高效光子硬件加速器铺平道路，该加速器专为处理光通信和高速成像应用中的高带宽光信号而定制 本文提出了一种基于光谱切片的光子循环神经网络（ROSS-NNs），用于实现高速光子神经形态计算，解决高带宽光学信号处理问题。 K. authors_text: George Sarantoglou,Adonis Bogris,Charis Mesaritakis,Sergios Theodoridis
title: Bayesian Photonic Accelerators for Energy Efficient and Noise Robust Neural Processing
title_zh: 用于节能和噪声鲁棒神经处理的贝叶斯光子加速器
abstract: Artificial neural networks are efficient computing platforms inspired by the brain. Such platforms can tackle a vast area of real-life tasks ranging from image processing to language translation. Silicon photonic integrated chips (PICs), by employing coherent interactions in Mach-Zehnder interferometers, are promising accelerators offering record low power consumption and ultra-fast matrix multiplication. Such photonic accelerators, however, suffer from phase uncertainty due to fabrication errors and crosstalk effects that inhibit the development of high-density implementations. In this work, we present a Bayesian learning framework for such photonic accelerators. In addition to the conventional log-likelihood optimization path, two novel training schemes are derived, namely a regularized version and a fully Bayesian learning scheme. They are applied on a photonic neural network with 512 phase shifters targeting the MNIST dataset. The new schemes, when combined with a pre-characterization stage that provides the passive offsets, are able to dramatically decrease the operational power of the PIC beyond 70%, with just a slight loss in classification accuracy. The full Bayesian scheme, apart from this energy reduction, returns information with respect to the sensitivity of the phase shifters. This information is used to de-activate 31% of the phase actuators and, thus, significantly simplify the driving system.
summary: Artificial neural networks are efficient computing platforms inspired by the brain. Such platforms can tackle a vast area of real-life tasks ranging from image processing to language translation. Silicon photonic integrated chips (PICs), by employing coherent interactions in Mach-Zehnder interferometers, are promising accelerators offering record low power consumption and ultra-fast matrix multiplication. Such photonic accelerators, however, suffer from phase uncertainty due to fabrication errors and crosstalk effects that inhibit the development of high-density implementations. In this work, we present a Bayesian learning framework for such photonic accelerators. In addition to the conventional log-likelihood optimization path, two novel training schemes are derived, namely a regularized version and a fully Bayesian learning scheme. They are applied on a photonic neural network with 512 phase shifters targeting the MNIST dataset. The new schemes, when combined with a pre-characterization stage that provides the passive offsets, are able to dramatically decrease the operational power of the PIC beyond 70%, with just a slight loss in classification accuracy. The full Bayesian scheme, apart from this energy reduction, returns information with respect to the sensitivity of the phase shifters. This information is used to de-activate 31% of the phase actuators and, thus, significantly simplify the driving system.
abstract_zh: 人工神经网络是受大脑启发的高效计算平台。此类平台可以解决从图像处理到语言翻译等广泛的现实生活任务。硅光子集成芯片（PIC）通过在马赫-曾德干涉仪中采用相干相互作用，是一种很有前途的加速器，可提供创纪录的低功耗和超快矩阵乘法。然而，这种光子加速器由于制造误差和串扰效应而受到相位不确定性的影响，阻碍了高密度实现的发展。在这项工作中，我们提出了此类光子加速器的贝叶斯学习框架。除了传统的对数似然优化路径之外，还导出了两种新颖的训练方案，即正则化版本和完全贝叶斯学习方案。它们应用于具有 512 个移相器、针对 MNIST 数据集的光子神经网络。新方案与提供无源偏移的预表征阶段相结合，能够将 PIC 的运行功率大幅降低 70% 以上，而分类精度仅略有损失。完整的贝叶斯方案除了这种能量减少之外，还返回有关移相器灵敏度的信息。该信息用于停用 31% 的相位执行器，从而显着简化驱动系统。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种贝叶斯学习框架，解决光子加速器因相位不确定性导致的能效与鲁棒性问题，通过优化训练方案降低功耗并简化系统。
AI.motivation: 硅光子加速器虽具低功耗优势，但相位不确定性阻碍其高密度应用，需新方法提升能效并增强抗干扰能力。
AI.method: 设计贝叶斯学习框架，包含常规对数似然优化及两种新方案（正则化与全贝叶斯），结合预表征阶段的被动偏移校准。
AI.result: 功耗降低超70%且分类准确率仅轻微下降，全贝叶斯方案进一步关闭31%相位致动器，显著简化驱动系统。
AI.conclusion: 贝叶斯方法有效平衡能效与性能，为高密度光子神经网络的实用化提供可行路径。

authors_text: Yuanyuan Dong,Andrew V. Goldberg,Alexander Noe,Nikos Parotsidis,Mauricio G. C. Resende,Quico Spaen
title: A Metaheuristic Algorithm for Large Maximum Weight Independent Set Problems
title_zh: 大型最大权独立集问题的元启发式算法
abstract: Motivated by a real-world vehicle routing application, we consider the maximum-weight independent set problem: Given a node-weighted graph, find a set of independent (mutually nonadjacent) nodes whose node-weight sum is maximum. Some of the graphs airsing in this application are large, having hundreds of thousands of nodes and hundreds of millions of edges. To solve instances of this size, we develop a new local search algorithm, which is a metaheuristic in the greedy randomized adaptive search (GRASP) framework. This algorithm, which we call METAMIS, uses a wider range of simple local search operations than previously described in the literature. We introduce data structures that make these operations efficient. A new variant of path-relinking is introduced to escape local optima and so is a new alternating augmenting-path local search move that improves algorithm performance. We compare an implementation of our algorithm with a state-of-the-art openly available code on public benchmark sets, including some large instances with hundreds of millions of vertices. Our algorithm is, in general, competitive and outperforms this openly available code on large vehicle routing instances. We hope that our results will lead to even better MWIS algorithms.
summary: Motivated by a real-world vehicle routing application, we consider the maximum-weight independent set problem: Given a node-weighted graph, find a set of independent (mutually nonadjacent) nodes whose node-weight sum is maximum. Some of the graphs airsing in this application are large, having hundreds of thousands of nodes and hundreds of millions of edges. To solve instances of this size, we develop a new local search algorithm, which is a metaheuristic in the greedy randomized adaptive search (GRASP) framework. This algorithm, which we call METAMIS, uses a wider range of simple local search operations than previously described in the literature. We introduce data structures that make these operations efficient. A new variant of path-relinking is introduced to escape local optima and so is a new alternating augmenting-path local search move that improves algorithm performance. We compare an implementation of our algorithm with a state-of-the-art openly available code on public benchmark sets, including some large instances with hundreds of millions of vertices. Our algorithm is, in general, competitive and outperforms this openly available code on large vehicle routing instances. We hope that our results will lead to even better MWIS algorithms.
abstract_zh: 受现实世界车辆路由应用程序的启发，我们考虑最大权重独立集问题：给定一个节点加权图，找到一组节点权重总和最大的独立（互不相邻）节点。此应用程序中传播的一些图很大，具有数十万个节点和数亿条边。为了解决这种大小的实例，我们开发了一种新的局部搜索算法，它是贪婪随机自适应搜索（GRASP）框架中的元启发式算法。该算法（我们称之为 METAMIS）使用了比之前文献中描述的更广泛的简单本地搜索操作。我们引入了使这些操作高效的数据结构。引入了路径重新链接的新变体来逃避局部最优，并且引入了新的交替增强路径局部搜索移动，以提高算法性能。我们将我们的算法的实现与公共基准集上最先进的公开可用代码进行比较，包括一些具有数亿个顶点的大型实例。总的来说，我们的算法具有竞争力，并且在大型车辆路由实例上优于这种公开可用的代码。我们希望我们的结果能够带来更好的 MWIS 算法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于GRASP框架的元启发式算法METAMIS，用于解决大规模最大权独立集问题。
AI.motivation: 受现实车辆路径规划问题启发，需处理包含数百万节点和边的大规模图，传统方法难以高效求解。
AI.method: 设计包含多种局部搜索操作的GRASP算法，结合高效数据结构、路径重链接技术及交替增广路径移动策略。
AI.result: 在公共基准测试集上，算法在大型车辆路径实例中优于现有开源代码，整体表现具有竞争力。
AI.conclusion: 新算法为解决大规模MWIS问题提供有效方案，有望推动更优算法的进一步研究。

search_text: A Metaheuristic Algorithm for Large Maximum Weight Independent Set Problems 大型最大权独立集问题的元启发式算法 Motivated by a real-world vehicle routing application, we consider the maximum-weight independent set problem: Given a node-weighted graph, find a set of independent (mutually nonadjacent) nodes whose node-weight sum is maximum. Some of the graphs airsing in this application are large, having hundreds of thousands of nodes and hundreds of millions of edges. To solve instances of this size, we develop a new local search algorithm, which is a metaheuristic in the greedy randomized adaptive search (GRASP) framework. This algorithm, which we call METAMIS, uses a wider range of simple local search operations than previously described in the literature. We introduce data structures that make these operations efficient. A new variant of path-relinking is introduced to escape local optima and so is a new alternating augmenting-path local search move that improves algorithm performance. We compare an implementation of our algorithm with a state-of-the-art openly available code on public benchmark sets, including some large instances with hundreds of millions of vertices. Our algorithm is, in general, competitive and outperforms this openly available code on large vehicle routing instances. We hope that our results will lead to even better MWIS algorithms. 受现实世界车辆路由应用程序的启发，我们考虑最大权重独立集问题：给定一个节点加权图，找到一组节点权重总和最大的独立（互不相邻）节点。此应用程序中传播的一些图很大，具有数十万个节点和数亿条边。为了解决这种大小的实例，我们开发了一种新的局部搜索算法，它是贪婪随机自适应搜索（GRASP）框架中的元启发式算法。该算法（我们称之为 METAMIS）使用了比之前文献中描述的更广泛的简单本地搜索操作。我们引入了使这些操作高效的数据结构。引入了路径重新链接的新变体来逃避局部最优，并且引入了新的交替增强路径局部搜索移动，以提高算法性能。我们将我们的算法的实现与公共基准集上最先进的公开可用代码进行比较，包括一些具有数亿个顶点的大型实例。总的来说，我们的算法具有竞争力，并且在大型车辆路由实例上优于这种公开可用的代码。我们希望我们的结果能够带来更好的 MWIS 算法。 本文提出一种基于GRASP框架的元启发式算法METAMIS，用于解决大规模最大权独立集问题。 Yuanyuan Dong,Andrew V. Goldberg,Alexander Noe,Nikos Parotsidis,Mauricio G. C. Resende,Quico Spaen cs.AI,math.OC

authors_text: Zhiheng Li,Martin Renqiang Min,Kai Li,Chenliang Xu
title: StyleT2I: Toward Compositional and High-Fidelity Text-to-Image Synthesis
title_zh: StyleT2I：走向组合和高保真文本到图像的合成
abstract: Although progress has been made for text-to-image synthesis, previous methods fall short of generalizing to unseen or underrepresented attribute compositions in the input text. Lacking compositionality could have severe implications for robustness and fairness, e.g., inability to synthesize the face images of underrepresented demographic groups. In this paper, we introduce a new framework, StyleT2I, to improve the compositionality of text-to-image synthesis. Specifically, we propose a CLIP-guided Contrastive Loss to better distinguish different compositions among different sentences. To further improve the compositionality, we design a novel Semantic Matching Loss and a Spatial Constraint to identify attributes' latent directions for intended spatial region manipulations, leading to better disentangled latent representations of attributes. Based on the identified latent directions of attributes, we propose Compositional Attribute Adjustment to adjust the latent code, resulting in better compositionality of image synthesis. In addition, we leverage the $\ell_2$-norm regularization of identified latent directions (norm penalty) to strike a nice balance between image-text alignment and image fidelity. In the experiments, we devise a new dataset split and an evaluation metric to evaluate the compositionality of text-to-image synthesis models. The results show that StyleT2I outperforms previous approaches in terms of the consistency between the input text and synthesized images and achieves higher fidelity.
summary: Although progress has been made for text-to-image synthesis, previous methods fall short of generalizing to unseen or underrepresented attribute compositions in the input text. Lacking compositionality could have severe implications for robustness and fairness, e.g., inability to synthesize the face images of underrepresented demographic groups. In this paper, we introduce a new framework, StyleT2I, to improve the compositionality of text-to-image synthesis. Specifically, we propose a CLIP-guided Contrastive Loss to better distinguish different compositions among different sentences. To further improve the compositionality, we design a novel Semantic Matching Loss and a Spatial Constraint to identify attributes' latent directions for intended spatial region manipulations, leading to better disentangled latent representations of attributes. Based on the identified latent directions of attributes, we propose Compositional Attribute Adjustment to adjust the latent code, resulting in better compositionality of image synthesis. In addition, we leverage the $\ell_2$-norm regularization of identified latent directions (norm penalty) to strike a nice balance between image-text alignment and image fidelity. In the experiments, we devise a new dataset split and an evaluation metric to evaluate the compositionality of text-to-image synthesis models. The results show that StyleT2I outperforms previous approaches in terms of the consistency between the input text and synthesized images and achieves higher fidelity.
abstract_zh: 尽管文本到图像的合成已经取得了进展，但以前的方法不足以推广到输入文本中不可见或代表性不足的属性组合。缺乏组合性可能会对鲁棒性和公平性产生严重影响，例如，无法合成代表性不足的人口群体的面部图像。在本文中，我们引入了一个新的框架 StyleT2I，以提高文本到图像合成的组合性。具体来说，我们提出了一种 CLIP 引导的对比损失，以更好地区分不同句子中的不同成分。为了进一步提高组合性，我们设计了一种新颖的语义匹配损失和空间约束来识别属性的潜在方向以进行预期的空间区域操作，从而更好地解开属性的潜在表示。基于识别的属性的潜在方向，我们提出组合属性调整来调整潜在代码，从而获得更好的图像合成的组合性。此外，我们利用已识别潜在方向的 $\ell_2$-norm 正则化（范数惩罚）在图像文本对齐和图像保真度之间取得良好的平衡。在实验中，我们设计了一种新的数据集分割和评估指标来评估文本到图像合成模型的组合性。结果表明，StyleT2I 在输入文本和合成图像之间的一致性方面优于以前的方法，并实现了更高的保真度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出StyleT2I框架，旨在提升文本到图像合成的组合性与保真度。
AI.motivation: 现有文本到图像合成方法在处理未见或代表性不足的属性组合时表现不佳，影响模型鲁棒性与公平性，例如无法生成少数群体的面部图像。
AI.method: 设计CLIP引导的对比损失、语义匹配损失及空间约束，识别属性潜在方向并实现解耦表示；通过组合属性调整与ℓ2范数正则化平衡图像-文本对齐与保真度。
AI.result: 在新构建的数据集与评估指标下，StyleT2I在文本与合成图像的一致性及图像保真度上均优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: StyleT2I通过组合性增强与潜在空间调控，有效提升了文本到图像合成的鲁棒性与生成质量。

authors_text: Amit Raj,Umar Iqbal,Koki Nagano,Sameh Khamis,Pavlo Molchanov,James Hays,Jan Kautz
title: DRaCoN -- Differentiable Rasterization Conditioned Neural Radiance Fields for Articulated Avatars
title_zh: DRaCoN——用于铰接化身的可微分光栅化条件神经辐射场
abstract: Acquisition and creation of digital human avatars is an important problem with applications to virtual telepresence, gaming, and human modeling. Most contemporary approaches for avatar generation can be viewed either as 3D-based methods, which use multi-view data to learn a 3D representation with appearance (such as a mesh, implicit surface, or volume), or 2D-based methods which learn photo-realistic renderings of avatars but lack accurate 3D representations. In this work, we present, DRaCoN, a framework for learning full-body volumetric avatars which exploits the advantages of both the 2D and 3D neural rendering techniques. It consists of a Differentiable Rasterization module, DiffRas, that synthesizes a low-resolution version of the target image along with additional latent features guided by a parametric body model. The output of DiffRas is then used as conditioning to our conditional neural 3D representation module (c-NeRF) which generates the final high-res image along with body geometry using volumetric rendering. While DiffRas helps in obtaining photo-realistic image quality, c-NeRF, which employs signed distance fields (SDF) for 3D representations, helps to obtain fine 3D geometric details. Experiments on the challenging ZJU-MoCap and Human3.6M datasets indicate that DRaCoN outperforms state-of-the-art methods both in terms of error metrics and visual quality.
summary: Acquisition and creation of digital human avatars is an important problem with applications to virtual telepresence, gaming, and human modeling. Most contemporary approaches for avatar generation can be viewed either as 3D-based methods, which use multi-view data to learn a 3D representation with appearance (such as a mesh, implicit surface, or volume), or 2D-based methods which learn photo-realistic renderings of avatars but lack accurate 3D representations. In this work, we present, DRaCoN, a framework for learning full-body volumetric avatars which exploits the advantages of both the 2D and 3D neural rendering techniques. It consists of a Differentiable Rasterization module, DiffRas, that synthesizes a low-resolution version of the target image along with additional latent features guided by a parametric body model. The output of DiffRas is then used as conditioning to our conditional neural 3D representation module (c-NeRF) which generates the final high-res image along with body geometry using volumetric rendering. While DiffRas helps in obtaining photo-realistic image quality, c-NeRF, which employs signed distance fields (SDF) for 3D representations, helps to obtain fine 3D geometric details. Experiments on the challenging ZJU-MoCap and Human3.6M datasets indicate that DRaCoN outperforms state-of-the-art methods both in terms of error metrics and visual quality.
abstract_zh: 数字化身的获取和创建是虚拟远程呈现、游戏和人体建模应用中的一个重要问题。大多数现代头像生成方法可以被视为基于 3D 的方法，即使用多视图数据来学习具有外观（例如网格、隐式表面或体积）的 3D 表示，也可以被视为基于 2D 的方法，即学习头像的照片级真实感渲染，但缺乏准确的 3D 表示。在这项工作中，我们提出了 DRaCoN，一个用于学习全身体积化身的框架，它利用了 2D 和 3D 神经渲染技术的优势。它由可微分光栅化模块 DiffRas 组成，该模块合成目标图像的低分辨率版本以及参数化人体模型引导的其他潜在特征。然后，DiffRas 的输出用作条件神经 3D 表示模块 (c-NeRF) 的条件，该模块使用体积渲染生成最终的高分辨率图像以及身体几何形状。 DiffRas 有助于获得逼真的图像质量，而 c-NeRF 采用符号距离场 (SDF) 进行 3D 表示，有助于获得精细的 3D 几何细节。在具有挑战性的 ZJU-MoCap 和 Human3.6M 数据集上进行的实验表明，DRaCoN 在误差指标和视觉质量方面均优于最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DRaCoN框架，结合2D和3D神经渲染技术，学习全身体积化数字人化身。
AI.motivation: 现有方法要么基于3D获取精确几何但缺乏真实感，要么基于2D生成高质量图像但无3D表示，需融合两者优势。
AI.method: 包含可微光栅化模块DiffRas生成低分辨率图像和潜在特征，再通过条件神经3D表示模块c-NeRF（基于符号距离场）生成高分辨率图像和几何细节。
AI.result: 在ZJU-MoCap和Human3.6M数据集上，DRaCoN在误差指标和视觉质量上优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: DRaCoN通过结合2D光栅化与3D体积渲染，实现了高质量数字人化身的生成与精细几何重建。

search_text: DRaCoN -- Differentiable Rasterization Conditioned Neural Radiance Fields for Articulated Avatars DRaCoN——用于铰接化身的可微分光栅化条件神经辐射场 Acquisition and creation of digital human avatars is an important problem with applications to virtual telepresence, gaming, and human modeling. Most contemporary approaches for avatar generation can be viewed either as 3D-based methods, which use multi-view data to learn a 3D representation with appearance (such as a mesh, implicit surface, or volume), or 2D-based methods which learn photo-realistic renderings of avatars but lack accurate 3D representations. In this work, we present, DRaCoN, a framework for learning full-body volumetric avatars which exploits the advantages of both the 2D and 3D neural rendering techniques. It consists of a Differentiable Rasterization module, DiffRas, that synthesizes a low-resolution version of the target image along with additional latent features guided by a parametric body model. The output of DiffRas is then used as conditioning to our conditional neural 3D representation module (c-NeRF) which generates the final high-res image along with body geometry using volumetric rendering. While DiffRas helps in obtaining photo-realistic image quality, c-NeRF, which employs signed distance fields (SDF) for 3D representations, helps to obtain fine 3D geometric details. Experiments on the challenging ZJU-MoCap and Human3.6M datasets indicate that DRaCoN outperforms state-of-the-art methods both in terms of error metrics and visual quality. 数字化身的获取和创建是虚拟远程呈现、游戏和人体建模应用中的一个重要问题。大多数现代头像生成方法可以被视为基于 3D 的方法，即使用多视图数据来学习具有外观（例如网格、隐式表面或体积）的 3D 表示，也可以被视为基于 2D 的方法，即学习头像的照片级真实感渲染，但缺乏准确的 3D 表示。在这项工作中，我们提出了 DRaCoN，一个用于学习全身体积化身的框架，它利用了 2D 和 3D 神经渲染技术的优势。它由可微分光栅化模块 DiffRas 组成，该模块合成目标图像的低分辨率版本以及参数化人体模型引导的其他潜在特征。然后，DiffRas 的输出用作条件神经 3D 表示模块 (c-NeRF) 的条件，该模块使用体积渲染生成最终的高分辨率图像以及身体几何形状。 DiffRas 有助于获得逼真的图像质量，而 c-NeRF 采用符号距离场 (SDF) 进行 3D 表示，有助于获得精细的 3D 几何细节。在具有挑战性的 ZJU-MoCap 和 Human3.6M 数据集上进行的实验表明，DRaCoN 在误差指标和视觉质量方面均优于最先进的方法。 本文提出DRaCoN框架，结合2D和3D神经渲染技术，学习全身体积化数字人化身。 Amit Raj,Umar Iqbal,Koki Nagano,Sameh Khamis,Pavlo Molchanov,James Hays,Jan Kautz cs.CV

authors_text: Junrui Ni,Liming Wang,Heting Gao,Kaizhi Qian,Yang Zhang,Shiyu Chang,Mark Hasegawa-Johnson
title: Unsupervised Text-to-Speech Synthesis by Unsupervised Automatic Speech Recognition
title_zh: 通过无监督自动语音识别进行无监督文本到语音合成
abstract: An unsupervised text-to-speech synthesis (TTS) system learns to generate speech waveforms corresponding to any written sentence in a language by observing: 1) a collection of untranscribed speech waveforms in that language; 2) a collection of texts written in that language without access to any transcribed speech. Developing such a system can significantly improve the availability of speech technology to languages without a large amount of parallel speech and text data. This paper proposes an unsupervised TTS system based on an alignment module that outputs pseudo-text and another synthesis module that uses pseudo-text for training and real text for inference. Our unsupervised system can achieve comparable performance to the supervised system in seven languages with about 10-20 hours of speech each. A careful study on the effect of text units and vocoders has also been conducted to better understand what factors may affect unsupervised TTS performance. The samples generated by our models can be found at https://cactuswiththoughts.github.io/UnsupTTS-Demo, and our code can be found at https://github.com/lwang114/UnsupTTS.
summary: An unsupervised text-to-speech synthesis (TTS) system learns to generate speech waveforms corresponding to any written sentence in a language by observing: 1) a collection of untranscribed speech waveforms in that language; 2) a collection of texts written in that language without access to any transcribed speech. Developing such a system can significantly improve the availability of speech technology to languages without a large amount of parallel speech and text data. This paper proposes an unsupervised TTS system based on an alignment module that outputs pseudo-text and another synthesis module that uses pseudo-text for training and real text for inference. Our unsupervised system can achieve comparable performance to the supervised system in seven languages with about 10-20 hours of speech each. A careful study on the effect of text units and vocoders has also been conducted to better understand what factors may affect unsupervised TTS performance. The samples generated by our models can be found at https://cactuswiththoughts.github.io/UnsupTTS-Demo, and our code can be found at https://github.com/lwang114/UnsupTTS.
abstract_zh: 无监督文本到语音合成 (TTS) 系统通过观察以下内容来学习生成与某种语言中的任何书面句子相对应的语音波形：1）该语言中未转录的语音波形的集合； 2）用该语言编写的文本集合，无法访问任何转录的语音。开发这样的系统可以显着提高语音技术对语言的可用性，而无需大量并行语音和文本数据。本文提出了一种无监督 TTS 系统，该系统基于输出伪文本的对齐模块和另一个使用伪文本进行训练和真实文本进行推理的合成模块。我们的无监督系统可以在七种语言中达到与监督系统相当的性能，每种语言的语音时间约为 10-20 小时。我们还对文本单元和声码器的影响进行了仔细研究，以更好地了解哪些因素可能影响无监督 TTS 性能。我们的模型生成的样本可以在 https://cactuswiththoughts.github.io/UnsupTTS-Demo 找到，我们的代码可以在 https://github.com/lwang114/UnsupTTS 找到。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需转录数据的无监督文本到语音合成系统，通过观察未转录语音和文本数据实现语音生成。
AI.motivation: 为了解决低资源语言缺乏大量平行语音和文本数据的问题，提升语音技术的可用性。
AI.method: 基于对齐模块生成伪文本和合成模块（训练用伪文本、推理用真实文本）的框架，结合语音单元与声码器的研究分析。
AI.result: 在七种语言上（每种约10-20小时语音数据）达到与监督系统相当的性能，并通过实验分析了文本单元和声码器对无监督TTS的影响。
AI.conclusion: 无监督TTS方法在低资源场景下具有可行性，实验结果和生成样本验证了该框架的有效性。

authors_text: Samantha Robertson,Tonya Nguyen,Niloufar Salehi
title: Not Another School Resource Map: Meeting Underserved Families' Information Needs Requires Trusting Relationships and Personalized Care
title_zh: 不是另一张学校资源地图：满足服务不足的家庭的信息需求需要信任关系和个性化护理
abstract: Public school districts across the United States have implemented school choice systems that have the potential to improve underserved students' access to educational opportunities. However, research has shown that learning about and applying for schools can be extremely time-consuming and expensive, making it difficult for these systems to create more equitable access to resources in practice. A common factor surfaced in prior work is unequal access to information about the schools and enrollment process. In response, governments and non-profits have invested in providing more information about schools to parents, for instance, through detailed online dashboards. However, we know little about what information is actually useful for historically marginalized and underserved families. We conducted interviews with 10 low-income families and families of color to learn about the challenges they faced navigating an online school choice and enrollment system. We complement this data with four interviews with people who have supported families through the enrollment process in a wide range of roles, from school principal to non-profit staff ("parent advocates"). Our findings highlight the value of personalized support and trusting relationships to delivering relevant and helpful information. We contrast this against online information resources and dashboards, which tend to be impersonal, target a broad audience, and make strong assumptions about what parents should look for in a school without sensitivity to families' varying circumstances. We advocate for an assets-based design approach to information support in public school enrollment, which would ask how we can support the local, one-on-one support that community members already provide.
summary: Public school districts across the United States have implemented school choice systems that have the potential to improve underserved students' access to educational opportunities. However, research has shown that learning about and applying for schools can be extremely time-consuming and expensive, making it difficult for these systems to create more equitable access to resources in practice. A common factor surfaced in prior work is unequal access to information about the schools and enrollment process. In response, governments and non-profits have invested in providing more information about schools to parents, for instance, through detailed online dashboards. However, we know little about what information is actually useful for historically marginalized and underserved families. We conducted interviews with 10 low-income families and families of color to learn about the challenges they faced navigating an online school choice and enrollment system. We complement this data with four interviews with people who have supported families through the enrollment process in a wide range of roles, from school principal to non-profit staff ("parent advocates"). Our findings highlight the value of personalized support and trusting relationships to delivering relevant and helpful information. We contrast this against online information resources and dashboards, which tend to be impersonal, target a broad audience, and make strong assumptions about what parents should look for in a school without sensitivity to families' varying circumstances. We advocate for an assets-based design approach to information support in public school enrollment, which would ask how we can support the local, one-on-one support that community members already provide.
abstract_zh: 美国各地的公立学区都实施了择校制度，有可能改善服务不足的学生获得教育机会的机会。然而，研究表明，了解和申请学校可能非常耗时且昂贵，使得这些系统很难在实践中创造更公平的资源获取机会。之前的工作中出现的一个共同因素是获取有关学校和招生过程的信息的机会不平等。作为回应，政府和非营利组织已投资向家长提供更多有关学校的信息，例如通过详细的在线仪表板。然而，我们对哪些信息对历史上被边缘化和服务不足的家庭真正有用知之甚少。我们采访了 10 个低收入家庭和有色人种家庭，了解他们在使用在线择校和招生系统时面临的挑战。我们对这些数据进行了四次采访，对这些人进行了补充，这些人在入学过程中担任过各种角色，从校长到非营利组织工作人员（“家长倡导者”）。我们的研究结果强调了个性化支持和信任关系对于提供相关和有用信息的价值。我们将其与在线信息资源和仪表板进行对比，后者往往是客观的，针对广泛的受众，并且对家长应该在学校寻找什么做出强有力的假设，而不对家庭的不同情况敏感。我们提倡采用基于资产的设计方法来为公立学校招生提供信息支持，这将询问我们如何支持社区成员已经提供的本地一对一支持。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了如何通过建立信任关系和个性化支持满足弱势家庭在教育资源获取中的信息需求，而非依赖现有在线工具。
AI.motivation: 现有学校选择系统虽旨在促进教育公平，但信息获取不平等导致弱势家庭难以有效利用资源，标准化在线工具无法满足多样化需求。
AI.method: 对10个低收入及少数族裔家庭进行深度访谈，并结合4位教育支持工作者（如校长、非营利员工）的访谈数据，采用定性分析法。
AI.result: 发现个性化支持与信任关系是传递有效信息的核心，而现有在线工具因缺乏针对性和人性化设计难以解决家庭实际需求。
AI.conclusion: 应采用基于社区优势的设计理念，强化本地化一对一支持体系，而非继续依赖泛化的数字化信息平台。

We contrast this against online information resources and dashboards, which tend to be impersonal, target a broad audience, and make strong assumptions about what parents should look for in a school without sensitivity to families' varying circumstances. We advocate for an assets-based design approach to information support in public school enrollment, which would ask how we can support the local, one-on-one support that community members already provide. 美国各地的公立学区都实施了择校制度，有可能改善服务不足的学生获得教育机会的机会。然而，研究表明，了解和申请学校可能非常耗时且昂贵，使得这些系统很难在实践中创造更公平的资源获取机会。之前的工作中出现的一个共同因素是获取有关学校和招生过程的信息的机会不平等。作为回应，政府和非营利组织已投资向家长提供更多有关学校的信息，例如通过详细的在线仪表板。然而，我们对哪些信息对历史上被边缘化和服务不足的家庭真正有用知之甚少。我们采访了 10 个低收入家庭和有色人种家庭，了解他们在使用在线择校和招生系统时面临的挑战。我们对这些数据进行了四次采访，对这些人进行了补充，这些人在入学过程中担任过各种角色，从校长到非营利组织工作人员（“家长倡导者”）。我们的研究结果强调了个性化支持和信任关系对于提供相关和有用信息的价值。我们将其与在线信息资源和仪表板进行对比，后者往往是客观的，针对广泛的受众，并且对家长应该在学校寻找什么做出强有力的假设，而不对家庭的不同情况敏感。我们提倡采用基于资产的设计方法来为公立学校招生提供信息支持，这将询问我们如何支持社区成员已经提供的本地一对一支持。 本文探讨了如何通过建立信任关系和个性化支持满足弱势家庭在教育资源获取中的信息需求，而非依赖现有在线工具。 Samantha Robertson,Tonya Nguyen,Niloufar Salehi cs.HC

authors_text: Zejiang Hou,Minghai Qin,Fei Sun,Xiaolong Ma,Kun Yuan,Yi Xu,Yen-Kuang Chen,Rong Jin,Yuan Xie,Sun-Yuan Kung
title: CHEX: CHannel EXploration for CNN Model Compression
title_zh: CHEX：CNN 模型压缩的通道探索
abstract: Channel pruning has been broadly recognized as an effective technique to reduce the computation and memory cost of deep convolutional neural networks. However, conventional pruning methods have limitations in that: they are restricted to pruning process only, and they require a fully pre-trained large model. Such limitations may lead to sub-optimal model quality as well as excessive memory and training cost. In this paper, we propose a novel Channel Exploration methodology, dubbed as CHEX, to rectify these problems. As opposed to pruning-only strategy, we propose to repeatedly prune and regrow the channels throughout the training process, which reduces the risk of pruning important channels prematurely. More exactly: From intra-layer's aspect, we tackle the channel pruning problem via a well known column subset selection (CSS) formulation. From inter-layer's aspect, our regrowing stages open a path for dynamically re-allocating the number of channels across all the layers under a global channel sparsity constraint. In addition, all the exploration process is done in a single training from scratch without the need of a pre-trained large model. Experimental results demonstrate that CHEX can effectively reduce the FLOPs of diverse CNN architectures on a variety of computer vision tasks, including image classification, object detection, instance segmentation, and 3D vision. For example, our compressed ResNet-50 model on ImageNet dataset achieves 76% top1 accuracy with only 25% FLOPs of the original ResNet-50 model, outperforming previous state-of-the-art channel pruning methods. The checkpoints and code are available at here .
summary: Channel pruning has been broadly recognized as an effective technique to reduce the computation and memory cost of deep convolutional neural networks. However, conventional pruning methods have limitations in that: they are restricted to pruning process only, and they require a fully pre-trained large model. Such limitations may lead to sub-optimal model quality as well as excessive memory and training cost. In this paper, we propose a novel Channel Exploration methodology, dubbed as CHEX, to rectify these problems. As opposed to pruning-only strategy, we propose to repeatedly prune and regrow the channels throughout the training process, which reduces the risk of pruning important channels prematurely. More exactly: From intra-layer's aspect, we tackle the channel pruning problem via a well known column subset selection (CSS) formulation. From inter-layer's aspect, our regrowing stages open a path for dynamically re-allocating the number of channels across all the layers under a global channel sparsity constraint. In addition, all the exploration process is done in a single training from scratch without the need of a pre-trained large model. Experimental results demonstrate that CHEX can effectively reduce the FLOPs of diverse CNN architectures on a variety of computer vision tasks, including image classification, object detection, instance segmentation, and 3D vision. For example, our compressed ResNet-50 model on ImageNet dataset achieves 76% top1 accuracy with only 25% FLOPs of the original ResNet-50 model, outperforming previous state-of-the-art channel pruning methods. The checkpoints and code are available at here .
abstract_zh: 通道剪枝已被广泛认为是减少深度卷积神经网络的计算和内存成本的有效技术。然而，传统的剪枝方法具有局限性：它们仅限于剪枝过程，并且需要完全预训练的大型模型。这种限制可能会导致模型质量次优以及内存和训练成本过高。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的通道探索方法，称为 CHEX，来纠正这些问题。与仅修剪策略相反，我们建议在整个训练过程中反复修剪和重新生长通道，这降低了过早修剪重要通道的风险。更准确地说：从层内的角度来看，我们通过众所周知的列子集选择（CSS）公式来解决通道修剪问题。从层间的角度来看，我们的重新增长阶段开辟了一条在全局通道稀疏性约束下动态重新分配所有层的通道数量的路径。此外，所有探索过程都是在从头开始的单次训练中完成的，不需要预先训练的大型模型。实验结果表明，CHEX 可以有效减少各种 CNN 架构在各种计算机视觉任务上的 FLOP，包括图像分类、对象检测、实例分割和 3D 视觉。例如，我们在 ImageNet 数据集上压缩的 ResNet-50 模型实现了 76% 的 top1 准确率，而原始 ResNet-50 模型的 FLOP 仅为 25%，优于之前最先进的通道修剪方法。检查点和代码可在此处获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为CHEX的通道探索方法，通过在训练过程中动态调整卷积神经网络的通道数量，实现模型压缩。
AI.motivation: 传统通道剪枝方法仅依赖单次剪枝过程且需预训练大模型，导致模型质量下降和训练成本过高。
AI.method: CHEX在训练过程中反复进行通道剪枝与再生，结合列子集选择（CSS）解决层内剪枝问题，并通过全局通道稀疏性约束实现跨层动态通道分配，无需预训练模型。
AI.result: 在ImageNet数据集上，压缩后的ResNet-50模型仅需原模型25%的计算量即可达到76%的Top1准确率，优于现有最佳通道剪枝方法。
AI.conclusion: CHEX通过动态通道探索有效平衡了模型压缩与性能，为CNN模型压缩提供了新思路。

authors_text: Vibashan VS,Poojan Oza,Vishal M. Patel
title: Instance Relation Graph Guided Source-Free Domain Adaptive Object Detection
title_zh: 实例关系图引导的无源域自适应目标检测
abstract: Unsupervised Domain Adaptation (UDA) is an effective approach to tackle the issue of domain shift. Specifically, UDA methods try to align the source and target representations to improve the generalization on the target domain. Further, UDA methods work under the assumption that the source data is accessible during the adaptation process. However, in real-world scenarios, the labelled source data is often restricted due to privacy regulations, data transmission constraints, or proprietary data concerns. The Source-Free Domain Adaptation (SFDA) setting aims to alleviate these concerns by adapting a source-trained model for the target domain without requiring access to the source data. In this paper, we explore the SFDA setting for the task of adaptive object detection. To this end, we propose a novel training strategy for adapting a source-trained object detector to the target domain without source data. More precisely, we design a novel contrastive loss to enhance the target representations by exploiting the objects relations for a given target domain input. These object instance relations are modelled using an Instance Relation Graph (IRG) network, which are then used to guide the contrastive representation learning. In addition, we utilize a student-teacher based knowledge distillation strategy to avoid overfitting to the noisy pseudo-labels generated by the source-trained model. Extensive experiments on multiple object detection benchmark datasets show that the proposed approach is able to efficiently adapt source-trained object detectors to the target domain, outperforming previous state-of-the-art domain adaptive detection methods. Code and models are provided in \href{https://viudomain.github.io/irg-sfda-web/}{https://viudomain.github.io/irg-sfda-web/}.
summary: Unsupervised Domain Adaptation (UDA) is an effective approach to tackle the issue of domain shift. Specifically, UDA methods try to align the source and target representations to improve the generalization on the target domain. Further, UDA methods work under the assumption that the source data is accessible during the adaptation process. However, in real-world scenarios, the labelled source data is often restricted due to privacy regulations, data transmission constraints, or proprietary data concerns. The Source-Free Domain Adaptation (SFDA) setting aims to alleviate these concerns by adapting a source-trained model for the target domain without requiring access to the source data. In this paper, we explore the SFDA setting for the task of adaptive object detection. To this end, we propose a novel training strategy for adapting a source-trained object detector to the target domain without source data. More precisely, we design a novel contrastive loss to enhance the target representations by exploiting the objects relations for a given target domain input. These object instance relations are modelled using an Instance Relation Graph (IRG) network, which are then used to guide the contrastive representation learning. In addition, we utilize a student-teacher based knowledge distillation strategy to avoid overfitting to the noisy pseudo-labels generated by the source-trained model. Extensive experiments on multiple object detection benchmark datasets show that the proposed approach is able to efficiently adapt source-trained object detectors to the target domain, outperforming previous state-of-the-art domain adaptive detection methods. Code and models are provided in \href{https://viudomain.github.io/irg-sfda-web/}{https://viudomain.github.io/irg-sfda-web/}.
abstract_zh: 无监督域适应（UDA）是解决域转移问题的有效方法。具体来说，UDA 方法尝试对齐源表示和目标表示，以提高目标域的泛化能力。此外，UDA 方法的工作原理是假设源数据在适应过程中是可访问的。然而，在现实场景中，由于隐私法规、数据传输限制或专有数据问题，标记的源数据通常受到限制。无源域适应 (SFDA) 设置旨在通过在不需要访问源数据的情况下针对目标域调整源训练模型来缓解这些问题。在本文中，我们探讨了 SFDA 针对自适应目标检测任务的设置。为此，我们提出了一种新颖的训练策略，用于在没有源数据的情况下使源训练的目标检测器适应目标域。更准确地说，我们设计了一种新颖的对比损失，通过利用给定目标域输入的对象关系来增强目标表示。这些对象实例关系使用实例关系图（IRG）网络进行建模，然后用于指导对比表示学习。此外，我们利用基于学生-教师的知识蒸馏策略来避免过度拟合源训练模型生成的噪声伪标签。对多个对象检测基准数据集的大量实验表明，所提出的方法能够有效地将源训练的对象检测器适应目标域，优于以前最先进的域自适应检测方法。代码和模型在 \href{https://viudomain.github.io/irg-sfda-web/}{https://viudomain.github.io/irg-sfda-web/} 中提供。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需源域数据的源自由域自适应目标检测方法，通过实例关系图引导对比学习和知识蒸馏策略提升模型在目标域的性能。
AI.motivation: 传统无监督域自适应方法依赖源域数据，但实际场景中源数据常因隐私或传输限制无法获取，需探索无需源数据的域自适应方案。
AI.method: 设计实例关系图网络建模目标域物体间关系，并结合对比损失增强表征；采用学生-教师知识蒸馏策略缓解伪标签噪声影响。
AI.result: 在多个目标检测基准数据集上实验表明，该方法优于现有域自适应检测技术，有效实现了源模型到目标域的迁移。
AI.conclusion: 通过关系图引导的对比学习与知识蒸馏结合，成功解决了源自由域自适应检测问题，为实际应用提供了可行方案。
