Extensive experiments on multiple object detection benchmark datasets show that the proposed approach is able to efficiently adapt source-trained object detectors to the target domain, outperforming previous state-of-the-art domain adaptive detection methods. Code and models are provided in \href{https://viudomain.github.io/irg-sfda-web/}{https://viudomain.github.io/irg-sfda-web/}. 无监督域适应（UDA）是解决域转移问题的有效方法。具体来说，UDA 方法尝试对齐源表示和目标表示，以提高目标域的泛化能力。此外，UDA 方法的工作原理是假设源数据在适应过程中是可访问的。然而，在现实场景中，由于隐私法规、数据传输限制或专有数据问题，标记的源数据通常受到限制。无源域适应 (SFDA) 设置旨在通过在不需要访问源数据的情况下针对目标域调整源训练模型来缓解这些问题。在本文中，我们探讨了 SFDA 针对自适应目标检测任务的设置。为此，我们提出了一种新颖的训练策略，用于在没有源数据的情况下使源训练的目标检测器适应目标域。更准确地说，我们设计了一种新颖的对比损失，通过利用给定目标域输入的对象关系来增强目标表示。这些对象实例关系使用实例关系图（IRG）网络进行建模，然后用于指导对比表示学习。此外，我们利用基于学生-教师的知识蒸馏策略来避免过度拟合源训练模型生成的噪声伪标签。对多个对象检测基准数据集的大量实验表明，所提出的方法能够有效地将源训练的对象检测器适应目标域，优于以前最先进的域自适应检测方法。代码和模型在 \href{https://viudomain.github.io/irg-sfda-web/}{https://viudomain.github.io/irg-sfda-web/} 中提供。 本文提出一种无需源域数据的源自由域自适应目标检测方法，通过实例关系图引导对比学习和知识蒸馏策略提升模型在目标域的性能。 Vibashan VS,Poojan Oza,Vishal M. Patel cs.CV

authors_text: Vibashan VS,Jeya Maria Jose Valanarasu,Vishal M. Patel
title: Target and Task specific Source-Free Domain Adaptive Image Segmentation
title_zh: 目标和任务特定的无源域自适应图像分割
abstract: Solving the domain shift problem during inference is essential in medical imaging, as most deep-learning based solutions suffer from it. In practice, domain shifts are tackled by performing Unsupervised Domain Adaptation (UDA), where a model is adapted to an unlabelled target domain by leveraging the labelled source data. In medical scenarios, the data comes with huge privacy concerns making it difficult to apply standard UDA techniques. Hence, a closer clinical setting is Source-Free UDA (SFUDA), where we have access to source-trained model but not the source data during adaptation. Existing SFUDA methods rely on pseudo-label based self-training techniques to address the domain shift. However, these pseudo-labels often have high entropy due to domain shift and adapting the source model with noisy pseudo-labels leads to sub-optimal performance. To overcome this limitation, we propose a systematic two-stage approach for SFUDA comprising of target-specific adaptation followed by task-specific adaptation. In target-specific adaptation, we enhance the pseudo-label generation by minimizing high entropy regions using the proposed ensemble entropy minimization loss and a selective voting strategy. In task-specific adaptation, we exploit the enhanced pseudo-labels using a student-teacher framework to effectively learn segmentation on the target domain. We evaluate our proposed method on 2D fundus datasets and 3D MRI volumes across 7 different domain shifts where we perform better than existing UDA and SFUDA methods for medical image segmentation. Code is available at https://github.com/Vibashan/tt-sfuda.
summary: Solving the domain shift problem during inference is essential in medical imaging, as most deep-learning based solutions suffer from it. In practice, domain shifts are tackled by performing Unsupervised Domain Adaptation (UDA), where a model is adapted to an unlabelled target domain by leveraging the labelled source data. In medical scenarios, the data comes with huge privacy concerns making it difficult to apply standard UDA techniques. Hence, a closer clinical setting is Source-Free UDA (SFUDA), where we have access to source-trained model but not the source data during adaptation. Existing SFUDA methods rely on pseudo-label based self-training techniques to address the domain shift. However, these pseudo-labels often have high entropy due to domain shift and adapting the source model with noisy pseudo-labels leads to sub-optimal performance. To overcome this limitation, we propose a systematic two-stage approach for SFUDA comprising of target-specific adaptation followed by task-specific adaptation. In target-specific adaptation, we enhance the pseudo-label generation by minimizing high entropy regions using the proposed ensemble entropy minimization loss and a selective voting strategy. In task-specific adaptation, we exploit the enhanced pseudo-labels using a student-teacher framework to effectively learn segmentation on the target domain. We evaluate our proposed method on 2D fundus datasets and 3D MRI volumes across 7 different domain shifts where we perform better than existing UDA and SFUDA methods for medical image segmentation. Code is available at https://github.com/Vibashan/tt-sfuda.
abstract_zh: 解决推理过程中的域转移问题对于医学成像至关重要，因为大多数基于深度学习的解决方案都会遇到这个问题。在实践中，域转移是通过执行无监督域适应（UDA）来解决的，其中模型通过利用标记的源数据来适应未标记的目标域。在医疗场景中，数据存在巨大的隐私问题，因此很难应用标准的 UDA 技术。因此，更接近的临床环境是无源 UDA (SFUDA)，我们可以在适应过程中访问源训练模型，但不能访问源数据。现有的 SFUDA 方法依赖于基于伪标签的自训练技术来解决域转移问题。然而，由于域转移，这些伪标签通常具有高熵，并且使用噪声伪标签调整源模型会导致性能次优。为了克服这一限制，我们为 SFUDA 提出了一种系统的两阶段方法，包括针对特定目标的适应和针对特定任务的适应。在特定于目标的适应中，我们通过使用所提出的集合熵最小化损失和选择性投票策略来最小化高熵区域来增强伪标签生成。在特定于任务的适应中，我们使用学生-教师框架来利用增强的伪标签来有效地学习目标域上的分割。我们在 7 个不同域位移的 2D 眼底数据集和 3D MRI 体积上评估了我们提出的方法，其中我们在医学图像分割方面比现有的 UDA 和 SFUDA 方法表现更好。代码可在 https://github.com/Vibashan/tt-sfuda 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种针对医疗图像分割的源无关领域自适应方法，解决因隐私问题无法获取源数据时的领域偏移问题。
AI.motivation: 医疗影像中传统无监督领域自适应（UDA）因隐私限制难以应用，现有源无关UDA（SFUDA）方法因伪标签噪声大导致性能不足。
AI.method: 设计两阶段系统：目标领域自适应阶段通过集成熵最小化损失和选择性投票策略优化伪标签；任务领域自适应阶段采用学生-教师框架利用增强伪标签进行分割学习。
AI.result: 在2D视网膜和3D MRI数据集上，7种领域偏移场景下优于现有UDA和SFUDA方法，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过分阶段优化伪标签质量，有效提升了源无关医疗图像分割的领域自适应性能。

authors_text: Shuang Ma,Sai Vemprala,Wenshan Wang,Jayesh K. Gupta,Yale Song,Daniel McDuff,Ashish Kapoor
title: COMPASS: Contrastive Multimodal Pretraining for Autonomous Systems
title_zh: COMPASS：自主系统的对比多模态预训练
abstract: Learning representations that generalize across tasks and domains is challenging yet necessary for autonomous systems. Although task-driven approaches are appealing, designing models specific to each application can be difficult in the face of limited data, especially when dealing with highly variable multimodal input spaces arising from different tasks in different environments.We introduce the first general-purpose pretraining pipeline, COntrastive Multimodal Pretraining for AutonomouS Systems (COMPASS), to overcome the limitations of task-specific models and existing pretraining approaches. COMPASS constructs a multimodal graph by considering the essential information for autonomous systems and the properties of different modalities. Through this graph, multimodal signals are connected and mapped into two factorized spatio-temporal latent spaces: a "motion pattern space" and a "current state space." By learning from multimodal correspondences in each latent space, COMPASS creates state representations that models necessary information such as temporal dynamics, geometry, and semantics. We pretrain COMPASS on a large-scale multimodal simulation dataset TartanAir \cite{tartanair2020iros} and evaluate it on drone navigation, vehicle racing, and visual odometry tasks. The experiments indicate that COMPASS can tackle all three scenarios and can also generalize to unseen environments and real-world data.
summary: Learning representations that generalize across tasks and domains is challenging yet necessary for autonomous systems. Although task-driven approaches are appealing, designing models specific to each application can be difficult in the face of limited data, especially when dealing with highly variable multimodal input spaces arising from different tasks in different environments.We introduce the first general-purpose pretraining pipeline, COntrastive Multimodal Pretraining for AutonomouS Systems (COMPASS), to overcome the limitations of task-specific models and existing pretraining approaches. COMPASS constructs a multimodal graph by considering the essential information for autonomous systems and the properties of different modalities. Through this graph, multimodal signals are connected and mapped into two factorized spatio-temporal latent spaces: a "motion pattern space" and a "current state space." By learning from multimodal correspondences in each latent space, COMPASS creates state representations that models necessary information such as temporal dynamics, geometry, and semantics. We pretrain COMPASS on a large-scale multimodal simulation dataset TartanAir \cite{tartanair2020iros} and evaluate it on drone navigation, vehicle racing, and visual odometry tasks. The experiments indicate that COMPASS can tackle all three scenarios and can also generalize to unseen environments and real-world data.
abstract_zh: 学习跨任务和领域泛化的表示对于自治系统来说具有挑战性但又是必要的。尽管任务驱动的方法很有吸引力，但面对有限的数据，设计针对每个应用程序的模型可能很困难，特别是在处理不同环境中的不同任务所产生的高度可变的多模态输入空间时。我们引入了第一个通用预训练管道，即自主系统对比多模态预训练（COMPASS），以克服特定于任务的模型和现有预训练方法的局限性。 COMPASS 通过考虑自治系统的基本信息和不同模态的属性来构建多模态图。通过该图，多模态信号被连接并映射到两个因式分解的时空潜在空间：“运动模式空间”和“当前状态空间”。通过学习每个潜在空间中的多模态对应关系，COMPASS 创建状态表示，对时间动态、几何和语义等必要信息进行建模。我们在大规模多模态模拟数据集 TartanAir \cite{tartanair2020iros} 上对 COMPASS 进行预训练，并在无人机导航、赛车和视觉里程计任务上对其进行评估。实验表明 COMPASS 可以处理所有三种场景，并且还可以推广到未见过的环境和现实世界的数据。

AI.tldr: 本文提出COMPASS，一种用于自主系统的对比多模态预训练方法，旨在解决跨任务和领域表示学习的挑战。
AI.motivation: 任务驱动的方法在数据有限且多模态输入高度变化时难以设计特定应用模型，现有预训练方法无法有效处理自主系统中的多模态信息。
AI.method: 通过构建多模态图结构，将多模态信号映射到两个解耦的时空潜在空间（运动模式空间和当前状态空间），利用对比学习从多模态对应关系中学习状态表示，并在TartanAir数据集上预训练。
AI.result: COMPASS在无人机导航、车辆竞速和视觉里程计任务中表现优异，能泛化到未见过的环境和真实世界数据。
AI.conclusion: COMPASS通过多模态对比预训练有效解决了自主系统跨任务和领域的表示学习问题，优于现有方法。

By learning from multimodal correspondences in each latent space, COMPASS creates state representations that models necessary information such as temporal dynamics, geometry, and semantics. We pretrain COMPASS on a large-scale multimodal simulation dataset TartanAir \cite{tartanair2020iros} and evaluate it on drone navigation, vehicle racing, and visual odometry tasks. The experiments indicate that COMPASS can tackle all three scenarios and can also generalize to unseen environments and real-world data. 学习跨任务和领域泛化的表示对于自治系统来说具有挑战性但又是必要的。尽管任务驱动的方法很有吸引力，但面对有限的数据，设计针对每个应用程序的模型可能很困难，特别是在处理不同环境中的不同任务所产生的高度可变的多模态输入空间时。我们引入了第一个通用预训练管道，即自主系统对比多模态预训练（COMPASS），以克服特定于任务的模型和现有预训练方法的局限性。 COMPASS 通过考虑自治系统的基本信息和不同模态的属性来构建多模态图。通过该图，多模态信号被连接并映射到两个因式分解的时空潜在空间：“运动模式空间”和“当前状态空间”。通过学习每个潜在空间中的多模态对应关系，COMPASS 创建状态表示，对时间动态、几何和语义等必要信息进行建模。我们在大规模多模态模拟数据集 TartanAir \cite{tartanair2020iros} 上对 COMPASS 进行预训练，并在无人机导航、赛车和视觉里程计任务上对其进行评估。实验表明 COMPASS 可以处理所有三种场景，并且还可以推广到未见过的环境和现实世界的数据。 本文提出COMPASS，一种用于自主系统的对比多模态预训练方法，旨在解决跨任务和领域表示学习的挑战。 Shuang Ma,Sai Vemprala,Wenshan Wang,Jayesh K. Gupta,Yale Song,Daniel McDuff,Ashish Kapoor cs.RO

authors_text: Ran Tu,Junshi Xu
title: Effective and Acceptable Eco-Driving Guidance for Human-Driving Vehicles: A Review
title_zh: 有效且可接受的人类驾驶车辆生态驾驶指南：回顾
abstract: Ecodriving guidance includes courses or suggestions for human drivers to improve driving behaviour, reducing energy use and emissions. This paper presents a systematic review of existing eco-driving guidance studies and identifies challenges to tackle in the future. A standard agreement on the guidance design has not been reached, leading to difficulties in designing and implementing eco-driving guidance for human drivers. Both static and dynamic guidance systems have a great variety of guidance results. In addition, the influencing factors, such as the suggestion content, the displaying methods, and drivers socio-demographic characteristics, have opposite effects on the guidance result across studies, while the reason has not been revealed. Drivers motivation to practice eco behaviour, especially long-term, is overlooked. Besides, the relationship between users acceptance and system effectiveness is still unclear. Adaptive driving suggestions based on drivers habits can improve the effectiveness, while this field is under investigation.
summary: Ecodriving guidance includes courses or suggestions for human drivers to improve driving behaviour, reducing energy use and emissions. This paper presents a systematic review of existing eco-driving guidance studies and identifies challenges to tackle in the future. A standard agreement on the guidance design has not been reached, leading to difficulties in designing and implementing eco-driving guidance for human drivers. Both static and dynamic guidance systems have a great variety of guidance results. In addition, the influencing factors, such as the suggestion content, the displaying methods, and drivers socio-demographic characteristics, have opposite effects on the guidance result across studies, while the reason has not been revealed. Drivers motivation to practice eco behaviour, especially long-term, is overlooked. Besides, the relationship between users acceptance and system effectiveness is still unclear. Adaptive driving suggestions based on drivers habits can improve the effectiveness, while this field is under investigation.
abstract_zh: 生态驾驶指南包括为人类驾驶员提供改善驾驶行为、减少能源使用和排放的课程或建议。本文对现有的生态驾驶指导研究进行了系统回顾，并确定了未来需要应对的挑战。指导设计的标准协议尚未达成，导致人类驾驶员的生态驾驶指导的设计和实施遇到困难。静态和动态制导系统都有各种各样的制导结果。此外，各项研究中建议内容、展示方式、驾驶员社会人口特征等影响因素对指导结果产生相反的影响，但其原因尚未揭示。驾驶员实践生态行为的动机，尤其是长期的动机，被忽视了。此外，用户接受度与系统有效性之间的关系仍不清楚。基于驾驶员习惯的自适应驾驶建议可以提高有效性，而这一领域正在研究中。

AI.tldr: 系统回顾现有生态驾驶指导研究，识别未来挑战
AI.motivation: 当前生态驾驶指导缺乏统一设计标准，影响因素效果不一致，用户接受度与系统有效性关系不明确，需进一步研究
AI.method: 系统综述方法，分析现有研究并总结挑战
AI.result: 发现不同系统结果差异大，影响因素效果不一致，长期动机和用户接受度与有效性关系不明确，适应性建议有潜力但需进一步研究
AI.conclusion: 需统一设计标准，深入研究影响因素，关注长期动机，明确用户接受度与有效性关系，推动适应性指导发展

authors_text: Serge Kernbach
title: Electric-field-coupled oscillators for collective electrochemical perception in underwater robotics
title_zh: 用于水下机器人集体电化学感知的电场耦合振荡器
abstract: This work explores the application of nonlinear oscillators coupled by electric field in water for collective tasks in underwater robotics. Such coupled oscillators operate in clear and colloidal (mud, bottom silt) water and represent a collective electrochemical sensor that is sensitive to global environmental parameters, geometry of common electric field and spatial dynamics of autonomous underwater vehicles (AUVs). Implemented in hardware and software, this approach can be used to create global awareness in the group of robots, which possess limited sensing and communication capabilities. Using oscillators from different AUVs enables extending the range limitations related to electric dipole of a single AUV. Applications of this technique are demonstrated for detecting the number of AUVs, distances between them, perception of dielectric objects, synchronization of behavior and discrimination between 'collective self' and 'collective non-self' through an 'electrical mirror'. These approaches have been implemented in several research projects with AUVs in fresh and salt water.
summary: This work explores the application of nonlinear oscillators coupled by electric field in water for collective tasks in underwater robotics. Such coupled oscillators operate in clear and colloidal (mud, bottom silt) water and represent a collective electrochemical sensor that is sensitive to global environmental parameters, geometry of common electric field and spatial dynamics of autonomous underwater vehicles (AUVs). Implemented in hardware and software, this approach can be used to create global awareness in the group of robots, which possess limited sensing and communication capabilities. Using oscillators from different AUVs enables extending the range limitations related to electric dipole of a single AUV. Applications of this technique are demonstrated for detecting the number of AUVs, distances between them, perception of dielectric objects, synchronization of behavior and discrimination between 'collective self' and 'collective non-self' through an 'electrical mirror'. These approaches have been implemented in several research projects with AUVs in fresh and salt water.
abstract_zh: 这项工作探索了水中电场耦合的非线性振荡器在水下机器人集体任务中的应用。这种耦合振荡器在清澈的胶体（泥浆、底部淤泥）水中运行，代表了一种集体电化学传感器，对全球环境参数、公共电场的几何形状和自主水下航行器（AUV）的空间动力学敏感。这种方法通过硬件和软件实现，可用于在感知和通信能力有限的机器人群体中建立全球意识。使用来自不同 AUV 的振荡器可以扩展与单个 AUV 电偶极子相关的范围限制。该技术的应用被证明可用于检测 AUV 的数量、它们之间的距离、电介质物体的感知、行为同步以及通过“电镜”区分“集体自我”和“集体非自我”。这些方法已在淡水和咸水中使用 AUV 的多个研究项目中得到实施。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于电场耦合振荡器的集体电化学感知系统，用于提升水下机器人的环境感知与协作能力。
AI.motivation: 传统水下机器人受限于局部感知与通信能力，难以实现复杂环境下的群体协作与全局环境感知。
AI.method: 通过非线性振荡器在水下机器人间建立电场耦合，利用电化学信号感知环境参数、机器人相对位置及介电物体，并通过硬件软件协同实现群体行为同步与自/他识别。
AI.result: 成功验证了该方法在淡水与盐水中对机器人数量、间距、目标物体的检测能力，以及群体行为同步与自他识别功能。
AI.conclusion: 电场耦合振荡器为水下机器人提供了新型集体感知范式，可扩展至复杂水下任务的群体智能应用。

authors_text: Phoenix X. Huang,Zhiwei Zhao,Chao Liu,Jingyi Liu,Wenze Hu,Xiaoyu Wang
title: Implementation of an Automated Learning System for Non-experts
title_zh: 为非专家实施自动学习系统
abstract: Automated machine learning systems for non-experts could be critical for industries to adopt artificial intelligence to their own applications. This paper detailed the engineering system implementation of an automated machine learning system called YMIR, which completely relies on graphical interface to interact with users. After importing training/validation data into the system, a user without AI knowledge can label the data, train models, perform data mining and evaluation by simply clicking buttons. The paper described: 1) Open implementation of model training and inference through docker containers. 2) Implementation of task and resource management. 3) Integration of Labeling software. 4) Implementation of HCI (Human Computer Interaction) with a rebuilt collaborative development paradigm. We also provide subsequent case study on training models with the system. We hope this paper can facilitate the prosperity of our automated machine learning community from industry application perspective. The code of the system has already been released to GitHub (https://github.com/industryessentials/ymir).
summary: Automated machine learning systems for non-experts could be critical for industries to adopt artificial intelligence to their own applications. This paper detailed the engineering system implementation of an automated machine learning system called YMIR, which completely relies on graphical interface to interact with users. After importing training/validation data into the system, a user without AI knowledge can label the data, train models, perform data mining and evaluation by simply clicking buttons. The paper described: 1) Open implementation of model training and inference through docker containers. 2) Implementation of task and resource management. 3) Integration of Labeling software. 4) Implementation of HCI (Human Computer Interaction) with a rebuilt collaborative development paradigm. We also provide subsequent case study on training models with the system. We hope this paper can facilitate the prosperity of our automated machine learning community from industry application perspective. The code of the system has already been released to GitHub (https://github.com/industryessentials/ymir).
abstract_zh: 面向非专家的自动化机器学习系统对于各行业将人工智能应用到自己的应用程序中至关重要。本文详细介绍了一个名为YMIR的自动化机器学习系统的工程系统实现，该系统完全依赖图形界面与用户交互。将训练/验证数据导入系统后，没有人工智能知识的用户只需单击按钮即可对数据进行标记、训练模型、进行数据挖掘和评估。论文描述：1）通过docker容器开放实现模型训练和推理。 2）任务和资源管理的实施。 3）标签软件的集成。 4）通过重建的协作开发范式实现HCI（人机交互）。我们还提供了该系统训练模型的后续案例研究。我们希望这篇论文能够从行业应用的角度促进我们自动化机器学习社区的繁荣。该系统的代码已经发布到GitHub（https://github.com/industryessentials/ymir）。

AI.tldr: 本文提出并实现了一个名为YMIR的自动化机器学习系统，旨在帮助非专家用户通过图形界面轻松完成数据标注、模型训练和评估。
AI.motivation: 工业界需要更易用的AI工具以降低技术门槛，使非专家用户也能高效应用人工智能技术。
AI.method: 通过Docker容器实现模型训练与推理的开放架构，集成任务资源管理、数据标注软件及协作式人机交互设计。
AI.result: 成功开发出YMIR系统并开源，通过案例验证了系统在非专家用户场景下的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该系统从工业应用角度推动了自动化机器学习社区的发展，为AI普及提供了可行方案。

search_text: Implementation of an Automated Learning System for Non-experts 为非专家实施自动学习系统 Automated machine learning systems for non-experts could be critical for industries to adopt artificial intelligence to their own applications. This paper detailed the engineering system implementation of an automated machine learning system called YMIR, which completely relies on graphical interface to interact with users. After importing training/validation data into the system, a user without AI knowledge can label the data, train models, perform data mining and evaluation by simply clicking buttons. The paper described: 1) Open implementation of model training and inference through docker containers. 2) Implementation of task and resource management. 3) Integration of Labeling software. 4) Implementation of HCI (Human Computer Interaction) with a rebuilt collaborative development paradigm. We also provide subsequent case study on training models with the system. We hope this paper can facilitate the prosperity of our automated machine learning community from industry application perspective. The code of the system has already been released to GitHub (https://github.com/industryessentials/ymir). 面向非专家的自动化机器学习系统对于各行业将人工智能应用到自己的应用程序中至关重要。本文详细介绍了一个名为YMIR的自动化机器学习系统的工程系统实现，该系统完全依赖图形界面与用户交互。将训练/验证数据导入系统后，没有人工智能知识的用户只需单击按钮即可对数据进行标记、训练模型、进行数据挖掘和评估。论文描述：1）通过docker容器开放实现模型训练和推理。 2）任务和资源管理的实施。 3）标签软件的集成。 4）通过重建的协作开发范式实现HCI（人机交互）。我们还提供了该系统训练模型的后续案例研究。我们希望这篇论文能够从行业应用的角度促进我们自动化机器学习社区的繁荣。该系统的代码已经发布到GitHub（https://github.com/industryessentials/ymir）。 本文提出并实现了一个名为YMIR的自动化机器学习系统，旨在帮助非专家用户通过图形界面轻松完成数据标注、模型训练和评估。 Phoenix X. Huang,Zhiwei Zhao,Chao Liu,Jingyi Liu,Wenze Hu,Xiaoyu Wang cs.HC,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Fozlur Rahman,Marium Sana Mim,Feekra Baset Baishakhi,Mahmudul Hasan,Md. Kishor Morol
title: A Systematic Review on Interactive Virtual Reality Laboratory
title_zh: 交互式虚拟现实实验室系统综述
abstract: Virtual Reality has become a significant element of education throughout the years. To understand the quality and advantages of these techniques, it is important to understand how they were developed and evaluated. Since COVID-19, the education system has drastically changed a lot. It has shifted from being in a classroom with a whiteboard and projectors to having your own room in front of your laptop in a virtual meeting. In this respect, virtual reality in the laboratory or Virtual Laboratory is the main focus of this research, which is intended to comprehend the work done in quality education from a distance using VR. As per the findings of the study, adopting virtual reality in education can help students learn more effectively and also help them increase perspective, enthusiasm, and knowledge of complex notions by offering them an interactive experience in which they can engage and learn more effectively. This highlights the importance of a significant expansion of VR use in learning, the majority of which employ scientific comparison approaches to compare students who use VR to those who use the traditional method for learning.

abstract_zh: 多年来，虚拟现实已成为教育的重要组成部分。要了解这些技术的质量和优势，了解它们的开发和评估方式非常重要。自 COVID-19 以来，教育系统发生了巨大变化。它已经从在有白板和投影仪的教室里转变为在虚拟会议中在笔记本电脑前拥有自己的房间。在这方面，实验室中的虚拟现实或虚拟实验室是本研究的主要焦点，旨在远程理解利用VR在素质教育中所做的工作。根据研究结果，在教育中采用虚拟现实可以帮助学生更有效地学习，还可以通过为他们提供更有效地参与和学习的互动体验来帮助他们提高视角、热情和对复杂概念的了解。这凸显了在学习中大幅扩展 VR 使用的重要性，其中大多数采用科学比较方法来将使用 VR 的学生与使用传统方法学习的学生进行比较。

AI.tldr: 本文系统综述了交互式虚拟现实实验室在远程教育中的应用及其效果评估。
AI.motivation: 疫情后教育模式转变促使研究者探索VR在远程教育中的应用，以提升学习效率和体验。
AI.method: 通过科学比较方法，对比分析使用虚拟现实技术与传统教学方法的学生在学习效果、兴趣及知识掌握方面的差异。
AI.result: 研究表明，VR技术能增强学生的学习效果，提升其对复杂概念的理解能力，并激发学习兴趣。
AI.conclusion: 结论强调了VR在教育领域的重要作用，建议进一步推广其应用以提升远程教育质量。

authors_text: Lei Lei,Tong Liu,Kan Zheng,Lajos Hanzo
title: Deep Reinforcement Learning Aided Platoon Control Relying on V2X Information
title_zh: 依靠V2X信息的深度强化学习辅助编队控制
abstract: The impact of Vehicle-to-Everything (V2X) communications on platoon control performance is investigated. Platoon control is essentially a sequential stochastic decision problem (SSDP), which can be solved by Deep Reinforcement Learning (DRL) to deal with both the control constraints and uncertainty in the platoon leading vehicle's behavior. In this context, the value of V2X communications for DRL-based platoon controllers is studied with an emphasis on the tradeoff between the gain of including exogenous information in the system state for reducing uncertainty and the performance erosion due to the curse-of-dimensionality. Our objective is to find the specific set of information that should be shared among the vehicles for the construction of the most appropriate state space. SSDP models are conceived for platoon control under different information topologies (IFT) by taking into account `just sufficient' information. Furthermore, theorems are established for comparing the performance of their optimal policies. In order to determine whether a piece of information should or should not be transmitted for improving the DRL-based control policy, we quantify its value by deriving the conditional KL divergence of the transition models. More meritorious information is given higher priority in transmission, since including it in the state space has a higher probability in offsetting the negative effect of having higher state dimensions. Finally, simulation results are provided to illustrate the theoretical analysis.
summary: The impact of Vehicle-to-Everything (V2X) communications on platoon control performance is investigated. Platoon control is essentially a sequential stochastic decision problem (SSDP), which can be solved by Deep Reinforcement Learning (DRL) to deal with both the control constraints and uncertainty in the platoon leading vehicle's behavior. In this context, the value of V2X communications for DRL-based platoon controllers is studied with an emphasis on the tradeoff between the gain of including exogenous information in the system state for reducing uncertainty and the performance erosion due to the curse-of-dimensionality. Our objective is to find the specific set of information that should be shared among the vehicles for the construction of the most appropriate state space. SSDP models are conceived for platoon control under different information topologies (IFT) by taking into account `just sufficient' information. Furthermore, theorems are established for comparing the performance of their optimal policies. In order to determine whether a piece of information should or should not be transmitted for improving the DRL-based control policy, we quantify its value by deriving the conditional KL divergence of the transition models. More meritorious information is given higher priority in transmission, since including it in the state space has a higher probability in offsetting the negative effect of having higher state dimensions. Finally, simulation results are provided to illustrate the theoretical analysis.
abstract_zh: 研究了车对万物 (V2X) 通信对队列控制性能的影响。队列控制本质上是一个顺序随机决策问题（SSDP），可以通过深度强化学习（DRL）来解决，以处理控制约束和队列领先车辆行为的不确定性。在此背景下，研究了基于 DRL 的排控制器的 V2X 通信的价值，重点是在系统状态中包含外源信息以减少不确定性的增益与由于维数灾难导致的性能下降之间的权衡。我们的目标是找到应在车辆之间共享的特定信息集，以构建最合适的状态空间。 SSDP模型是通过考虑“恰到好处”的信息来设计的，用于不同信息拓扑（IFT）下的排控制。此外，还建立了定理来比较其最优策略的性能。为了确定是否应该传输一条信息以改进基于 DRL 的控制策略，我们通过推导转换模型的条件 KL 散度来量化其价值。更有价值的信息在传输中被赋予更高的优先级，因为将其包含在状态空间中在抵消具有更高状态维度的负面影响方面具有更高的概率。最后提供仿真结果来说明理论分析。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了基于V2X通信的深度强化学习（DRL）辅助车列控制方法，旨在确定车辆间应共享的信息集合以构建最优状态空间。
AI.motivation: 车列控制存在不确定性及约束条件，传统方法难以平衡V2X信息带来的不确定性降低与状态空间维度爆炸的性能损耗。
AI.method: 构建不同信息拓扑下的SSDP模型，通过条件KL散度量化信息价值，结合定理分析比较最优策略性能，并优先传输高价值信息。
AI.result: 仿真结果验证了理论分析，表明所提方法能有效优化状态空间设计并提升DRL控制策略性能。
AI.conclusion: 通过量化信息价值并优先传输关键信息，可在降低不确定性与控制维度复杂度间取得平衡，从而优化V2X支持的车列控制。

authors_text: Ismail Hassan,B. John Oommen,Anis Yazidi
title: Adaptive Learning with Artificial Barriers Yielding Nash Equilibria in General Games
title_zh: 具有人工障碍的自适应学习在一般博弈中产生纳什均衡
abstract: Artificial barriers in Learning Automata (LA) is a powerful and yet under-explored concept although it was first proposed in the 1980s. Introducing artificial non-absorbing barriers makes the LA schemes resilient to being trapped in absorbing barriers, a phenomenon which is often referred to as lock in probability leading to an exclusive choice of one action after convergence. Within the field of LA and reinforcement learning in general, there is a sacristy of theoretical works and applications of schemes with artificial barriers. In this paper, we devise a LA with artificial barriers for solving a general form of stochastic bimatrix game. Classical LA systems possess properties of absorbing barriers and they are a powerful tool in game theory and were shown to converge to game's of Nash equilibrium under limited information. However, the stream of works in LA for solving game theoretical problems can merely solve the case where the Saddle Point of the game exists in a pure strategy and fail to reach mixed Nash equilibrium when no Saddle Point exists for a pure strategy. In this paper, by resorting to the powerful concept of artificial barriers, we suggest a LA that converges to an optimal mixed Nash equilibrium even though there may be no Saddle Point when a pure strategy is invoked. Our deployed scheme is of Linear Reward-Inaction ($L_{R-I}$) flavor which is originally an absorbing LA scheme, however, we render it non-absorbing by introducing artificial barriers in an elegant and natural manner, in the sense that that the well-known legacy $L_{R-I}$ scheme can be seen as an instance of our proposed algorithm for a particular choice of the barrier. Furthermore, we present an $S$ Learning version of our LA with absorbing barriers that is able to handle $S$-Learning environment in which the feedback is continuous and not binary as in the case of the $L_{R-I}$.

In this paper, by resorting to the powerful concept of artificial barriers, we suggest a LA that converges to an optimal mixed Nash equilibrium even though there may be no Saddle Point when a pure strategy is invoked. Our deployed scheme is of Linear Reward-Inaction ($L_{R-I}$) flavor which is originally an absorbing LA scheme, however, we render it non-absorbing by introducing artificial barriers in an elegant and natural manner, in the sense that that the well-known legacy $L_{R-I}$ scheme can be seen as an instance of our proposed algorithm for a particular choice of the barrier. abstract_zh: 学习自动机 (LA) 中的人工障碍是一个强大但尚未得到充分探索的概念，尽管它是在 20 世纪 80 年代首次提出的。引入人工非吸收障碍使得 LA 方案能够抵御吸收障碍的困扰，这种现象通常被称为概率锁定，导致收敛后只选择一个动作。一般来说，在 LA 和强化学习领域，存在大量具有人为障碍的理论著作和方案应用。在本文中，我们设计了一个具有人工障碍的 LA 来解决一般形式的随机双矩阵博弈。经典的 LA 系统具有吸收障碍的特性，它们是博弈论中的强大工具，并且被证明在有限信息下收敛于纳什均衡博弈。然而，LA中解决博弈论问题的工作流只能解决纯策略中存在博弈鞍点的情况，而在纯策略中不存在鞍点时无法达到混合纳什均衡。在本文中，通过诉诸人工障碍的强大概念，我们提出了一种收敛于最优混合纳什均衡的 LA，即使在调用纯策略时可能不存在鞍点。我们部署的方案是线性奖励不作为（$L_{R-I}$）风格，它最初是一个吸收性的 LA 方案，然而，我们通过以优雅和自然的方式引入人工障碍来使其不具有吸收性，从某种意义上说，众所周知的遗留 $L_{R-I}$ 方案可以被视为我们提出的针对特定障碍选择的算法的一个实例。此外，我们提出了 LA 的 $S$ 学习版本，具有吸收障碍，能够处理 $S$ 学习环境，其中反馈是连续的，而不是像 $L_{R-I}$ 那样的二元反馈。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种带有人工屏障的学习自动机（LA）方法，用于在一般博弈中收敛到纳什均衡，即使不存在纯策略鞍点。
AI.motivation: 传统LA系统易陷入吸收屏障导致策略锁定，且无法在无纯策略鞍点时求解混合纳什均衡，需改进以提升博弈求解能力。
AI.method: 通过引入人工屏障改造线性奖励无动作（L_R-I）算法，使其非吸收性，并扩展至S-Learning框架以处理连续反馈环境。
AI.result: 所提方法能在无纯策略鞍点时收敛到最优混合纳什均衡，且传统L_R-I算法可视为其特例，S-Learning版本适应连续反馈场景。
AI.conclusion: 人工屏障机制有效解决了LA在一般博弈中的收敛性问题，为处理复杂博弈场景提供了通用且灵活的解决方案。

authors_text: Washington Ramos,Michel Silva,Edson Araujo,Victor Moura,Keller Oliveira,Leandro Soriano Marcolino,Erickson R. Nascimento
title: Text-Driven Video Acceleration: A Weakly-Supervised Reinforcement Learning Method
title_zh: 文本驱动的视频加速：一种弱监督的强化学习方法
comment: Accepted to the IEEE Transactions on Pattern Analysis and Machine Intelligence (TPAMI) 2022. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2003.14229
comments: Accepted to the IEEE Transactions on Pattern Analysis and Machine Intelligence (TPAMI) 2022. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2003.14229
abstract: The growth of videos in our digital age and the users' limited time raise the demand for processing untrimmed videos to produce shorter versions conveying the same information. Despite the remarkable progress that summarization methods have made, most of them can only select a few frames or skims, creating visual gaps and breaking the video context. This paper presents a novel weakly-supervised methodology based on a reinforcement learning formulation to accelerate instructional videos using text. A novel joint reward function guides our agent to select which frames to remove and reduce the input video to a target length without creating gaps in the final video. We also propose the Extended Visually-guided Document Attention Network (VDAN+), which can generate a highly discriminative embedding space to represent both textual and visual data. Our experiments show that our method achieves the best performance in Precision, Recall, and F1 Score against the baselines while effectively controlling the video's output length. Visit https://www.verlab.dcc.ufmg.br/semantic-hyperlapse/tpami2022/ for code and extra results.
summary: The growth of videos in our digital age and the users' limited time raise the demand for processing untrimmed videos to produce shorter versions conveying the same information. Despite the remarkable progress that summarization methods have made, most of them can only select a few frames or skims, creating visual gaps and breaking the video context. This paper presents a novel weakly-supervised methodology based on a reinforcement learning formulation to accelerate instructional videos using text. A novel joint reward function guides our agent to select which frames to remove and reduce the input video to a target length without creating gaps in the final video. We also propose the Extended Visually-guided Document Attention Network (VDAN+), which can generate a highly discriminative embedding space to represent both textual and visual data. Our experiments show that our method achieves the best performance in Precision, Recall, and F1 Score against the baselines while effectively controlling the video's output length. Visit https://www.verlab.dcc.ufmg.br/semantic-hyperlapse/tpami2022/ for code and extra results.
abstract_zh: 数字时代视频的增长和用户时间的有限提高了对处理未经修剪的视频以生成传达相同信息的较短版本的需求。尽管摘要方法取得了显着的进步，但大多数方法只能选择几个帧或略读，从而造成视觉间隙并破坏视频上下文。本文提出了一种基于强化学习公式的新颖的弱监督方法，用于使用文本加速教学视频。一种新颖的联合奖励功能指导我们的代理选择要删除的帧并将输入视频减少到目标长度，而不会在最终视频中产生间隙。我们还提出了扩展视觉引导文档注意力网络（VDAN+），它可以生成具有高度辨别力的嵌入空间来表示文本和视觉数据。我们的实验表明，我们的方法在准确率、召回率和 F1 分数方面相对于基线实现了最佳性能，同时有效控制了视频的输出长度。访问 https://www.verlab.dcc.ufmg.br/semantic-hyperlapse/tpami2022/ 获取代码和额外结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于弱监督强化学习的文本驱动视频加速方法，通过联合奖励函数和扩展视觉引导文档注意力网络（VDAN+），实现对教学视频的高效压缩。
AI.motivation: 现有视频摘要方法存在视觉间隙和上下文断裂问题，需在保留关键信息的同时精准控制视频长度。
AI.method: 设计联合奖励函数指导帧删除策略，结合VDAN+网络构建跨模态嵌入空间，实现文本与视觉信息的联合优化。
AI.result: 在Precision、Recall和F1 Score指标上优于基线方法，且能有效控制输出视频长度。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过弱监督强化学习框架实现了高质量视频加速，在保持语义完整性的同时优化了视频时长控制。

authors_text: Aadesh Neupane,Michael A. Goodrich
title: Efficiently Evolving Swarm Behaviors Using Grammatical Evolution With PPA-style Behavior Trees
title_zh: 使用语法进化和 PPA 式行为树有效进化群体行为
comment: To be published in ICLR Cells2Societies Workshop 2022
comments: To be published in ICLR Cells2Societies Workshop 2022
abstract: Evolving swarm behaviors with artificial agents is computationally expensive and challenging. Because reward structures are often sparse in swarm problems, only a few simulations among hundreds evolve successful swarm behaviors. Additionally, swarm evolutionary algorithms typically rely on ad hoc fitness structures, and novel fitness functions need to be designed for each swarm task. This paper evolves swarm behaviors by systematically combining Postcondition-Precondition-Action (PPA) canonical Behavior Trees (BT) with a Grammatical Evolution. The PPA structure replaces ad hoc reward structures with systematic postcondition checks, which allows a common grammar to learn solutions to different tasks using only environmental cues and BT feedback. The static performance of learned behaviors is poor because no agent learns all necessary subtasks, but performance while evolving is excellent because agents can quickly change behaviors in new contexts. The evolving algorithm succeeded in 75\% of learning trials for both foraging and nest maintenance tasks, an eight-fold improvement over prior work.
summary: Evolving swarm behaviors with artificial agents is computationally expensive and challenging. Because reward structures are often sparse in swarm problems, only a few simulations among hundreds evolve successful swarm behaviors. Additionally, swarm evolutionary algorithms typically rely on ad hoc fitness structures, and novel fitness functions need to be designed for each swarm task. This paper evolves swarm behaviors by systematically combining Postcondition-Precondition-Action (PPA) canonical Behavior Trees (BT) with a Grammatical Evolution. The PPA structure replaces ad hoc reward structures with systematic postcondition checks, which allows a common grammar to learn solutions to different tasks using only environmental cues and BT feedback. The static performance of learned behaviors is poor because no agent learns all necessary subtasks, but performance while evolving is excellent because agents can quickly change behaviors in new contexts. The evolving algorithm succeeded in 75\% of learning trials for both foraging and nest maintenance tasks, an eight-fold improvement over prior work.
abstract_zh: 使用人工代理进化群体行为的计算成本很高且具有挑战性。由于群体问题中的奖励结构通常很稀疏，因此数百次模拟中只有少数模拟能够演化出成功的群体行为。此外，群体进化算法通常依赖于特定的适应度结构，并且需要为每个群体任务设计新颖的适应度函数。本文通过系统地将后置条件-前置条件-动作（PPA）规范行为树（BT）与语法演化相结合来演化群体行为。 PPA 结构用系统的后置条件检查取代了临时奖励结构，允许通用语法仅使用环境线索和 BT 反馈来学习不同任务的解决方案。学习到的行为的静态性能很差，因为没有智能体能够学习所有必要的子任务，但进化过程中的性能却非常好，因为智能体可以在新的环境中快速改变行为。不断发展的算法在觅食和巢维护任务的学习试验中取得了 75% 的成功，比之前的工作提高了八倍。

AI.tldr: 本文提出结合语法进化与PPA风格行为树的方法，以高效演化群体智能行为。
AI.motivation: 传统群体行为演化面临计算成本高、奖励结构稀疏及适应度函数设计依赖具体任务的挑战。
AI.method: 通过将PPA规范行为树与语法进化结合，利用系统化后置条件检查替代临时奖励机制，使通用文法能基于环境反馈学习多任务解决方案。
AI.result: 在觅食与巢穴维护任务中达到75%的学习成功率，较先前方法提升8倍。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在演化过程中表现优异，虽静态性能不足但具备快速行为适应能力，验证了系统化行为树与语法进化结合的有效性。

Goodrich cs.NE,cs.MA

authors_text: Jay Mahadeokar,Yangyang Shi,Ke Li,Duc Le,Jiedan Zhu,Vikas Chandra,Ozlem Kalinli,Michael L Seltzer
title: Streaming parallel transducer beam search with fast-slow cascaded encoders
title_zh: 使用快慢级联编码器进行流式并行传感器波束搜索
abstract: Streaming ASR with strict latency constraints is required in many speech recognition applications. In order to achieve the required latency, streaming ASR models sacrifice accuracy compared to non-streaming ASR models due to lack of future input context. Previous research has shown that streaming and non-streaming ASR for RNN Transducers can be unified by cascading causal and non-causal encoders. This work improves upon this cascaded encoders framework by leveraging two streaming non-causal encoders with variable input context sizes that can produce outputs at different audio intervals (e.g. fast and slow). We propose a novel parallel time-synchronous beam search algorithm for transducers that decodes from fast-slow encoders, where the slow encoder corrects the mistakes generated from the fast encoder. The proposed algorithm, achieves up to 20% WER reduction with a slight increase in token emission delays on the public Librispeech dataset and in-house datasets. We also explore techniques to reduce the computation by distributing processing between the fast and slow encoders. Lastly, we explore sharing the parameters in the fast encoder to reduce the memory footprint. This enables low latency processing on edge devices with low computation cost and a low memory footprint.

In order to achieve the required latency, streaming ASR models sacrifice accuracy compared to non-streaming ASR models due to lack of future input context. This work improves upon this cascaded encoders framework by leveraging two streaming non-causal encoders with variable input context sizes that can produce outputs at different audio intervals (e.g. fast and slow). We propose a novel parallel time-synchronous beam search algorithm for transducers that decodes from fast-slow encoders, where the slow encoder corrects the mistakes generated from the fast encoder. The proposed algorithm, achieves up to 20% WER reduction with a slight increase in token emission delays on the public Librispeech dataset and in-house datasets. We also explore techniques to reduce the computation by distributing processing between the fast and slow encoders. Lastly, we explore sharing the parameters in the fast encoder to reduce the memory footprint. This enables low latency processing on edge devices with low computation cost and a low memory footprint.
abstract_zh: 许多语音识别应用需要具有严格延迟限制的流式 ASR。为了达到所需的延迟，由于缺乏未来的输入上下文，流式 ASR 模型与非流式 ASR 模型相比会牺牲准确性。先前的研究表明，RNN Transducer 的流式和非流式 ASR 可以通过级联因果和非因果编码器来统一。这项工作通过利用两个具有可变输入上下文大小的流式非因果编码器来改进级联编码器框架，这些编码器可以以不同的音频间隔（例如快和慢）产生输出。我们提出了一种新颖的并行时间同步波束搜索算法，用于从快慢编码器进行解码的传感器，其中慢编码器纠正快速编码器产生的错误。所提出的算法在公共 Librispeech 数据集和内部数据集上的令牌发射延迟略有增加，可实现高达 20% 的 WER 减少。我们还探索了通过在快速和慢速编码器之间分配处理来减少计算量的技术。最后，我们探索共享快速编码器中的参数以减少内存占用。这可以在边缘设备上实现低延迟处理，并具有较低的计算成本和较低的内存占用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合快慢级联编码器的并行解码方法，提升流式语音识别的准确性。
AI.motivation: 流式ASR因严格延迟限制需牺牲准确性，现有级联编码器框架未能有效利用未来信息。
AI.method: 设计两个流式非因果编码器（快慢编码器），慢编码器纠正快编码器错误，并通过参数共享和计算分布优化资源消耗。
AI.result: 在Librispeech和内部数据集上实现20% WER下降，延迟略有增加，内存占用显著降低。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在保持低延迟的同时提升识别准确率，适用于边缘设备的低计算成本场景。

authors_text: Mahdi Razzaghpour,Sahand Mosharafian,Arash Raftari,Javad Mohammadpour Velni,Yaser P. Fallah
title: Impact of Information Flow Topology on Safety of Tightly-coupled Connected and Automated Vehicle Platoons Utilizing Stochastic Control
title_zh: 信息流拓扑对利用随机控制的紧耦合连接和自动化车队安全的影响
abstract: Cooperative driving, enabled by Vehicle-to-Everything (V2X) communication, is expected to significantly contribute to the transportation system's safety and efficiency. Cooperative Adaptive Cruise Control (CACC), a major cooperative driving application, has been the subject of many studies in recent years. The primary motivation behind using CACC is to reduce traffic congestion and improve traffic flow, traffic throughput, and highway capacity. Since the information flow between cooperative vehicles can significantly affect the dynamics of a platoon, the design and performance of control components are tightly dependent on the communication component performance. In addition, the choice of Information Flow Topology (IFT) can affect certain platoons properties such as stability and scalability. Although cooperative vehicles perception can be expanded to multiple predecessors information by using V2X communication, the communication technologies still suffer from scalability issues. Therefore, cooperative vehicles are required to predict each other's behavior to compensate for the effects of non-ideal communication. The notion of Model-Based Communication (MBC) was proposed to enhance cooperative vehicles perception under non-ideal communication by introducing a new flexible content structure for broadcasting joint vehicles dynamic/drivers behavior models. By utilizing a non-parametric (Bayesian) modeling scheme, i.e., Gaussian Process Regression (GPR), and the MBC concept, this paper develops a discrete hybrid stochastic model predictive control approach and examines the impact of communication losses and different information flow topologies on the performance and safety of the platoon. The results demonstrate an improvement in response time and safety using more vehicles information, validating the potential of cooperation to attenuate disturbances and improve traffic flow and safety.
summary: Cooperative driving, enabled by Vehicle-to-Everything (V2X) communication, is expected to significantly contribute to the transportation system's safety and efficiency. Cooperative Adaptive Cruise Control (CACC), a major cooperative driving application, has been the subject of many studies in recent years. The primary motivation behind using CACC is to reduce traffic congestion and improve traffic flow, traffic throughput, and highway capacity. Since the information flow between cooperative vehicles can significantly affect the dynamics of a platoon, the design and performance of control components are tightly dependent on the communication component performance. In addition, the choice of Information Flow Topology (IFT) can affect certain platoons properties such as stability and scalability. Although cooperative vehicles perception can be expanded to multiple predecessors information by using V2X communication, the communication technologies still suffer from scalability issues. Therefore, cooperative vehicles are required to predict each other's behavior to compensate for the effects of non-ideal communication. The notion of Model-Based Communication (MBC) was proposed to enhance cooperative vehicles perception under non-ideal communication by introducing a new flexible content structure for broadcasting joint vehicles dynamic/drivers behavior models. By utilizing a non-parametric (Bayesian) modeling scheme, i.e., Gaussian Process Regression (GPR), and the MBC concept, this paper develops a discrete hybrid stochastic model predictive control approach and examines the impact of communication losses and different information flow topologies on the performance and safety of the platoon. The results demonstrate an improvement in response time and safety using more vehicles information, validating the potential of cooperation to attenuate disturbances and improve traffic flow and safety.
abstract_zh: 通过车联网 (V2X) 通信实现的协同驾驶预计将极大地提高交通系统的安全性和效率。协作自适应巡航控制（CACC）是一种主要的协作驾驶应用，近年来一直是许多研究的主题。使用 CACC 的主要动机是减少交通拥堵并改善交通流量、交通吞吐量和高速公路容量。由于协作车辆之间的信息流可以显着影响排的动态，因此控制组件的设计和性能紧密依赖于通信组件的性能。此外，信息流拓扑 (IFT) 的选择可能会影响某些排的属性，例如稳定性和可扩展性。尽管协作车辆感知可以通过使用V2X通信扩展到多个前驱信息，但通信技术仍然面临可扩展性问题。因此，协作车辆需要预测彼此的行为，以补偿非理想通信的影响。基于模型的通信（MBC）的概念被提出，通过引入一种新的灵活的内容结构来广播联合车辆动态/驾驶员行为模型，以增强非理想通信下的协作车辆感知。通过利用非参数（贝叶斯）建模方案，即高斯过程回归（GPR）和 MBC 概念，本文开发了一种离散混合随机模型预测控制方法，并研究了通信丢失和不同信息流拓扑对排的性能和安全性的影响。结果表明，使用更多车辆信息可以提高响应时间和安全性，验证了合作在减少干扰和改善交通流量和安全方面的潜力。

AI.tldr: 本文研究信息流拓扑对紧密耦合的联网自动驾驶车队安全性的影晌，提出基于随机控制的离散混合模型预测控制方法。
AI.motivation: 协同驾驶通过V2X通信可提升交通系统安全与效率，但信息流拓扑选择影响车队稳定性与可扩展性，需解决非理想通信下的行为预测问题。
AI.method: 结合基于模型的通信（MBC）与高斯过程回归（GPR），构建离散混合随机模型预测控制框架，分析通信丢失与不同信息流拓扑对车队性能的影响。
AI.result: 实验表明，利用更多车辆信息可提升响应速度与安全性，验证协同机制在抑制干扰、改善交通流中的潜力。
AI.conclusion: 信息流拓扑优化与协同控制结合能有效增强车队安全性和交通效率，为未来智能交通系统提供理论支持。

search_text: Impact of Information Flow Topology on Safety of Tightly-coupled Connected and Automated Vehicle Platoons Utilizing Stochastic Control 信息流拓扑对利用随机控制的紧耦合连接和自动化车队安全的影响 Cooperative driving, enabled by Vehicle-to-Everything (V2X) communication, is expected to significantly contribute to the transportation system's safety and efficiency. Cooperative Adaptive Cruise Control (CACC), a major cooperative driving application, has been the subject of many studies in recent years. The primary motivation behind using CACC is to reduce traffic congestion and improve traffic flow, traffic throughput, and highway capacity. Since the information flow between cooperative vehicles can significantly affect the dynamics of a platoon, the design and performance of control components are tightly dependent on the communication component performance. In addition, the choice of Information Flow Topology (IFT) can affect certain platoons properties such as stability and scalability. Although cooperative vehicles perception can be expanded to multiple predecessors information by using V2X communication, the communication technologies still suffer from scalability issues. Therefore, cooperative vehicles are required to predict each other's behavior to compensate for the effects of non-ideal communication. The notion of Model-Based Communication (MBC) was proposed to enhance cooperative vehicles perception under non-ideal communication by introducing a new flexible content structure for broadcasting joint vehicles dynamic/drivers behavior models. By utilizing a non-parametric (Bayesian) modeling scheme, i.e., Gaussian Process Regression (GPR), and the MBC concept, this paper develops a discrete hybrid stochastic model predictive control approach and examines the impact of communication losses and different information flow topologies on the performance and safety of the platoon. The results demonstrate an improvement in response time and safety using more vehicles information, validating the potential of cooperation to attenuate disturbances and improve traffic flow and safety. 通过车联网 (V2X) 通信实现的协同驾驶预计将极大地提高交通系统的安全性和效率。协作自适应巡航控制（CACC）是一种主要的协作驾驶应用，近年来一直是许多研究的主题。使用 CACC 的主要动机是减少交通拥堵并改善交通流量、交通吞吐量和高速公路容量。由于协作车辆之间的信息流可以显着影响排的动态，因此控制组件的设计和性能紧密依赖于通信组件的性能。此外，信息流拓扑 (IFT) 的选择可能会影响某些排的属性，例如稳定性和可扩展性。尽管协作车辆感知可以通过使用V2X通信扩展到多个前驱信息，但通信技术仍然面临可扩展性问题。因此，协作车辆需要预测彼此的行为，以补偿非理想通信的影响。基于模型的通信（MBC）的概念被提出，通过引入一种新的灵活的内容结构来广播联合车辆动态/驾驶员行为模型，以增强非理想通信下的协作车辆感知。通过利用非参数（贝叶斯）建模方案，即高斯过程回归（GPR）和 MBC 概念，本文开发了一种离散混合随机模型预测控制方法，并研究了通信丢失和不同信息流拓扑对排的性能和安全性的影响。结果表明，使用更多车辆信息可以提高响应时间和安全性，验证了合作在减少干扰和改善交通流量和安全方面的潜力。 本文研究信息流拓扑对紧密耦合的联网自动驾驶车队安全性的影晌，提出基于随机控制的离散混合模型预测控制方法。 Mahdi Razzaghpour,Sahand Mosharafian,Arash Raftari,Javad Mohammadpour Velni,Yaser P. Fallah eess.SY,cs.RO

authors_text: Chen Ming,James A. Simmons
title: Target Geometry Estimation Using Deep Neural Networks in Sonar Sensing
title_zh: 在声纳传感中使用深度神经网络进行目标几何估计
abstract: Accurate imaging of target shape is a crucial aspect of wideband FM biosonar in echolocating bats, for which we have developed new algorithms that provide a solution for the shape of complicated targets in the computational domain. We use recurrent neural networks and convolutional neural networks to determine the number of glints (i.e., major reflecting surfaces) making up the target's structure and the distances between the glints (target shape in sonar). Echoes are dechirped relative to broadcasts, and the dechirped spectrograms are scanned in short time segments to find local spectral ripple patterns arising from different interglint delay separations. By proceeding in successive time-window slices, we mimic time-frequency neural processing in the bat's auditory system as a novel means of real-time target discrimination for sonar sensing in robotics.
summary: Accurate imaging of target shape is a crucial aspect of wideband FM biosonar in echolocating bats, for which we have developed new algorithms that provide a solution for the shape of complicated targets in the computational domain. We use recurrent neural networks and convolutional neural networks to determine the number of glints (i.e., major reflecting surfaces) making up the target's structure and the distances between the glints (target shape in sonar). Echoes are dechirped relative to broadcasts, and the dechirped spectrograms are scanned in short time segments to find local spectral ripple patterns arising from different interglint delay separations. By proceeding in successive time-window slices, we mimic time-frequency neural processing in the bat's auditory system as a novel means of real-time target discrimination for sonar sensing in robotics.
abstract_zh: 目标形状的精确成像是宽带调频生物声纳在蝙蝠回声定位中的一个重要方面，为此我们开发了新的算法，为计算领域中复杂目标的形状提供了解决方案。我们使用循环神经网络和卷积神经网络来确定构成目标结构的闪烁数量（即主要反射表面）以及闪烁之间的距离（声纳中的目标形状）。相对于广播对回声进行去线性调频，并且在短时间段内扫描去线性调频的频谱图以找到由不同闪烁延迟间隔引起的局部频谱纹波图案。通过连续的时间窗口切片，我们模拟蝙蝠听觉系统中的时频神经处理，作为机器人声纳传感实时目标辨别的新方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用深度神经网络解决复杂目标在声纳传感中的几何形状估计问题。
AI.motivation: 精确的目标形状成像是宽频FM生物声纳的关键，传统方法难以处理复杂目标结构，需开发新算法。
AI.method: 结合递归神经网络与卷积神经网络，通过解调回波信号并分析短时频谱图中的局部频谱波动模式，模仿蝙蝠听觉系统的时间-频率处理机制。
AI.result: 成功实现对复杂目标亮点数量及间距的估计，有效还原目标形状并支持实时声纳目标识别。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过深度学习模仿生物听觉机制，为机器人声纳传感中的实时目标几何估计提供了新思路。

authors_text: Yaxin Hu,Yuxiao Qu,Adam Maus,Bilge Mutlu
title: Polite or Direct? Conversation Design of a Smart Display for Older Adults Based on Politeness Theory
title_zh: 礼貌还是直接？基于礼貌理论的老年人智能显示屏会话设计
comment: To be published in 2022 CHI Conference on Human Factors in Computing Systems (CHI '22)
comments: To be published in 2022 CHI Conference on Human Factors in Computing Systems (CHI '22)
abstract: Conversational interfaces increasingly rely on human-like dialogue to offer a natural experience. However, relying on dialogue involving multiple exchanges for even simple tasks can overburden users, particularly older adults. In this paper, we explored the use of politeness theory in conversation design to alleviate this burden and improve user experience. To achieve this goal, we categorized the voice interaction offered by a smart display application designed for older adults into seven major speech acts: request, suggest, instruct, comment, welcome, farewell, and repair. We identified face needs for each speech act, applied politeness strategies that best address these needs, and tested the ability of these strategies to shape the perceived politeness of a voice assistant in an online study ($n=64$). Based on the findings of this study, we designed direct and polite versions of the system and conducted a field study ($n=15$) in which participants used each of the versions for five days at their homes. Based on five factors merged from our qualitative findings, we identified four distinctive user personas$\unicode{x2013}$socially oriented follower, socially oriented leader, utility oriented follower, and utility oriented leader$\unicode{x2013}$that can inform personalized design of smart displays.
summary: Conversational interfaces increasingly rely on human-like dialogue to offer a natural experience. However, relying on dialogue involving multiple exchanges for even simple tasks can overburden users, particularly older adults. In this paper, we explored the use of politeness theory in conversation design to alleviate this burden and improve user experience. To achieve this goal, we categorized the voice interaction offered by a smart display application designed for older adults into seven major speech acts: request, suggest, instruct, comment, welcome, farewell, and repair. We identified face needs for each speech act, applied politeness strategies that best address these needs, and tested the ability of these strategies to shape the perceived politeness of a voice assistant in an online study ($n=64$). Based on the findings of this study, we designed direct and polite versions of the system and conducted a field study ($n=15$) in which participants used each of the versions for five days at their homes. Based on five factors merged from our qualitative findings, we identified four distinctive user personas$\unicode{x2013}$socially oriented follower, socially oriented leader, utility oriented follower, and utility oriented leader$\unicode{x2013}$that can inform personalized design of smart displays.
abstract_zh: 对话界面越来越依赖类人对话来提供自然的体验。然而，即使是简单的任务，依赖涉及多次交流的对话也会给用户带来负担，尤其是老年人。在本文中，我们探索了在对话设计中使用礼貌理论来减轻这种负担并改善用户体验。为了实现这一目标，我们将专为老年人设计的智能显示应用程序提供的语音交互分为七种主要语音行为：请求、建议、指示、评论、欢迎、告别和修复。我们确定了每个言语行为的面部需求，应用了最能满足这些需求的礼貌策略，并在在线研究中测试了这些策略塑造语音助手感知礼貌的能力（$n=64$）。根据这项研究的结果，我们设计了该系统的直接且礼貌的版本，并进行了一项现场研究（$n=15$），参与者在家里使用每个版本五天。根据我们的定性研究结果合并的五个因素，我们确定了四种独特的用户角色$\unicode{x2013}$面向社会的追随者、面向社会的领导者、面向实用的追随者和面向实用的领导者$\unicode{x2013}$，它们可以为智能显示器的个性化设计提供信息。

AI.tldr: 本文基于礼貌理论，探讨智能显示设备的对话设计对老年用户的影响，通过比较礼貌与直接的对话方式优化用户体验。
AI.motivation: 传统对话界面在执行简单任务时需多次交互，易使老年用户感到负担，需通过设计优化提升其使用体验。
AI.method: 将语音交互分为七类言语行为，结合礼貌理论设计策略，通过在线研究（n=64）和实地测试（n=15）验证效果，并提炼用户画像。
AI.result: 发现礼貌策略能提升感知礼貌度，识别出四种用户画像（社交导向型、实用导向型等），为个性化设计提供依据。
AI.conclusion: 基于用户需求和礼貌理论的对话设计可有效减轻老年用户负担，未来需结合用户画像实现更精准的个性化交互。

However, relying on dialogue involving multiple exchanges for even simple tasks can overburden users, particularly older adults. In this paper, we explored the use of politeness theory in conversation design to alleviate this burden and improve user experience. To achieve this goal, we categorized the voice interaction offered by a smart display application designed for older adults into seven major speech acts: request, suggest, instruct, comment, welcome, farewell, and repair. We identified face needs for each speech act, applied politeness strategies that best address these needs, and tested the ability of these strategies to shape the perceived politeness of a voice assistant in an online study ($n=64$). Based on the findings of this study, we designed direct and polite versions of the system and conducted a field study ($n=15$) in which participants used each of the versions for five days at their homes. Based on five factors merged from our qualitative findings, we identified four distinctive user personas$\unicode{x2013}$socially oriented follower, socially oriented leader, utility oriented follower, and utility oriented leader$\unicode{x2013}$that can inform personalized design of smart displays. 对话界面越来越依赖类人对话来提供自然的体验。然而，即使是简单的任务，依赖涉及多次交流的对话也会给用户带来负担，尤其是老年人。在本文中，我们探索了在对话设计中使用礼貌理论来减轻这种负担并改善用户体验。为了实现这一目标，我们将专为老年人设计的智能显示应用程序提供的语音交互分为七种主要语音行为：请求、建议、指示、评论、欢迎、告别和修复。我们确定了每个言语行为的面部需求，应用了最能满足这些需求的礼貌策略，并在在线研究中测试了这些策略塑造语音助手感知礼貌的能力（$n=64$）。根据这项研究的结果，我们设计了该系统的直接且礼貌的版本，并进行了一项现场研究（$n=15$），参与者在家里使用每个版本五天。根据我们的定性研究结果合并的五个因素，我们确定了四种独特的用户角色$\unicode{x2013}$面向社会的追随者、面向社会的领导者、面向实用的追随者和面向实用的领导者$\unicode{x2013}$，它们可以为智能显示器的个性化设计提供信息。 本文基于礼貌理论，探讨智能显示设备的对话设计对老年用户的影响，通过比较礼貌与直接的对话方式优化用户体验。 Yaxin Hu,Yuxiao Qu,Adam Maus,Bilge Mutlu cs.HC

authors_text: Yingda Yin,Yingcheng Cai,He Wang,Baoquan Chen
title: FisherMatch: Semi-Supervised Rotation Regression via Entropy-based Filtering
title_zh: FisherMatch：通过基于熵的过滤进行半监督旋转回归
abstract: Estimating the 3DoF rotation from a single RGB image is an important yet challenging problem. Recent works achieve good performance relying on a large amount of expensive-to-obtain labeled data. To reduce the amount of supervision, we for the first time propose a general framework, FisherMatch, for semi-supervised rotation regression, without assuming any domain-specific knowledge or paired data. Inspired by the popular semi-supervised approach, FixMatch, we propose to leverage pseudo label filtering to facilitate the information flow from labeled data to unlabeled data in a teacher-student mutual learning framework. However, incorporating the pseudo label filtering mechanism into semi-supervised rotation regression is highly non-trivial, mainly due to the lack of a reliable confidence measure for rotation prediction. In this work, we propose to leverage matrix Fisher distribution to build a probabilistic model of rotation and devise a matrix Fisher-based regressor for jointly predicting rotation along with its prediction uncertainty. We then propose to use the entropy of the predicted distribution as a confidence measure, which enables us to perform pseudo label filtering for rotation regression. For supervising such distribution-like pseudo labels, we further investigate the problem of how to enforce loss between two matrix Fisher distributions. Our extensive experiments show that our method can work well even under very low labeled data ratios on different benchmarks, achieving significant and consistent performance improvement over supervised learning and other semi-supervised learning baselines. Our project page is at https://yd-yin.github.io/FisherMatch.
summary: Estimating the 3DoF rotation from a single RGB image is an important yet challenging problem. Recent works achieve good performance relying on a large amount of expensive-to-obtain labeled data. To reduce the amount of supervision, we for the first time propose a general framework, FisherMatch, for semi-supervised rotation regression, without assuming any domain-specific knowledge or paired data. Inspired by the popular semi-supervised approach, FixMatch, we propose to leverage pseudo label filtering to facilitate the information flow from labeled data to unlabeled data in a teacher-student mutual learning framework. However, incorporating the pseudo label filtering mechanism into semi-supervised rotation regression is highly non-trivial, mainly due to the lack of a reliable confidence measure for rotation prediction. In this work, we propose to leverage matrix Fisher distribution to build a probabilistic model of rotation and devise a matrix Fisher-based regressor for jointly predicting rotation along with its prediction uncertainty. We then propose to use the entropy of the predicted distribution as a confidence measure, which enables us to perform pseudo label filtering for rotation regression. For supervising such distribution-like pseudo labels, we further investigate the problem of how to enforce loss between two matrix Fisher distributions. Our extensive experiments show that our method can work well even under very low labeled data ratios on different benchmarks, achieving significant and consistent performance improvement over supervised learning and other semi-supervised learning baselines. Our project page is at https://yd-yin.github.io/FisherMatch.
abstract_zh: 从单个 RGB 图像估计 3DoF 旋转是一个重要但具有挑战性的问题。最近的工作依靠大量昂贵的标记数据获得了良好的性能。为了减少监督量，我们首次提出了一个用于半监督旋转回归的通用框架 FisherMatch，而不假设任何特定领域的知识或配对数据。受流行的半监督方法 FixMatch 的启发，我们建议利用伪标签过滤来促进师生互学框架中从标记数据到未标记数据的信息流。然而，将伪标签过滤机制纳入半监督旋转回归是非常重要的，主要是由于缺乏可靠的旋转预测置信度度量。在这项工作中，我们建议利用矩阵费舍尔分布来构建旋转的概率模型，并设计一个基于费舍尔矩阵的回归器，用于联合预测旋转及其预测不确定性。然后，我们建议使用预测分布的熵作为置信度度量，这使我们能够对旋转回归执行伪标签过滤。为了监督这种类似分布的伪标签，我们进一步研究了如何在两个矩阵费舍尔分布之间强制损失的问题。我们广泛的实验表明，即使在不同基准上的标记数据比率非常低的情况下，我们的方法也可以很好地工作，与监督学习和其他半监督学习基线相比，实现了显着且一致的性能改进。我们的项目页面位于 https://yd-yin.github.io/FisherMatch。

AI.tldr: 本文提出FisherMatch框架，通过熵过滤实现半监督旋转回归，减少对标注数据的依赖。
AI.motivation: 现有旋转估计方法依赖大量昂贵的标注数据，而半监督方法在旋转回归中因缺乏可靠的伪标签置信度度量而难以应用。
AI.method: 基于矩阵Fisher分布构建旋转概率模型，利用熵作为置信度度量进行伪标签过滤，并设计分布间损失函数优化模型。
AI.result: 在多个基准数据集上，即使标注数据比例极低，FisherMatch仍显著优于监督学习和其他半监督基线方法。
AI.conclusion: FisherMatch通过概率建模和熵过滤有效解决了半监督旋转回归的挑战，为减少标注依赖提供了新思路。

authors_text: Mostafa Sadeghi,Paul Magron
title: A Sparsity-promoting Dictionary Model for Variational Autoencoders
title_zh: 变分自编码器的稀疏性促进字典模型
abstract: Structuring the latent space in probabilistic deep generative models, e.g., variational autoencoders (VAEs), is important to yield more expressive models and interpretable representations, and to avoid overfitting. One way to achieve this objective is to impose a sparsity constraint on the latent variables, e.g., via a Laplace prior. However, such approaches usually complicate the training phase, and they sacrifice the reconstruction quality to promote sparsity. In this paper, we propose a simple yet effective methodology to structure the latent space via a sparsity-promoting dictionary model, which assumes that each latent code can be written as a sparse linear combination of a dictionary's columns. In particular, we leverage a computationally efficient and tuning-free method, which relies on a zero-mean Gaussian latent prior with learnable variances. We derive a variational inference scheme to train the model. Experiments on speech generative modeling demonstrate the advantage of the proposed approach over competing techniques, since it promotes sparsity while not deteriorating the output speech quality.
summary: Structuring the latent space in probabilistic deep generative models, e.g., variational autoencoders (VAEs), is important to yield more expressive models and interpretable representations, and to avoid overfitting. One way to achieve this objective is to impose a sparsity constraint on the latent variables, e.g., via a Laplace prior. However, such approaches usually complicate the training phase, and they sacrifice the reconstruction quality to promote sparsity. In this paper, we propose a simple yet effective methodology to structure the latent space via a sparsity-promoting dictionary model, which assumes that each latent code can be written as a sparse linear combination of a dictionary's columns. In particular, we leverage a computationally efficient and tuning-free method, which relies on a zero-mean Gaussian latent prior with learnable variances. We derive a variational inference scheme to train the model. Experiments on speech generative modeling demonstrate the advantage of the proposed approach over competing techniques, since it promotes sparsity while not deteriorating the output speech quality.
abstract_zh: 在概率深度生成模型（例如变分自动编码器（VAE））中构建潜在空间对于产生更具表现力的模型和可解释的表示并避免过度拟合非常重要。实现这一目标的一种方法是对潜在变量施加稀疏约束，例如通过拉普拉斯先验。然而，此类方法通常会使训练阶段变得复杂，并且它们会牺牲重建质量以促进稀疏性。在本文中，我们提出了一种简单而有效的方法，通过稀疏性促进字典模型来构造潜在空间，该模型假设每个潜在代码可以写成字典列的稀疏线性组合。特别是，我们利用一种计算效率高且无需调整的方法，该方法依赖于具有可学习方差的零均值高斯潜在先验。我们推导出一个变分推理方案来训练模型。语音生成建模的实验证明了所提出的方法相对于竞争技术的优势，因为它促进了稀疏性，同时又不降低输出语音质量。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种稀疏性促进的字典模型用于变分自编码器，通过结构化潜在空间提升模型表达能力与可解释性。
AI.motivation: 传统稀疏约束方法（如拉普拉斯先验）在提升潜在空间结构化的同时，会增加训练复杂度并损害重构质量。
AI.method: 假设潜在代码为字典列的稀疏线性组合，结合零均值高斯先验与可学习方差，采用变分推断方案训练模型。
AI.result: 在语音生成任务中，该方法在保持输出语音质量的前提下有效促进稀疏性，优于现有技术。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法通过字典模型平衡稀疏性与重构质量，为生成模型提供了一种高效且无需调参的潜在空间结构化方案。

authors_text: Abhishek Gupta,Corey Lynch,Brandon Kinman,Garrett Peake,Sergey Levine,Karol Hausman
title: Demonstration-Bootstrapped Autonomous Practicing via Multi-Task Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 通过多任务强化学习演示引导自主练习
abstract: Reinforcement learning systems have the potential to enable continuous improvement in unstructured environments, leveraging data collected autonomously. However, in practice these systems require significant amounts of instrumentation or human intervention to learn in the real world. In this work, we propose a system for reinforcement learning that leverages multi-task reinforcement learning bootstrapped with prior data to enable continuous autonomous practicing, minimizing the number of resets needed while being able to learn temporally extended behaviors. We show how appropriately provided prior data can help bootstrap both low-level multi-task policies and strategies for sequencing these tasks one after another to enable learning with minimal resets. This mechanism enables our robotic system to practice with minimal human intervention at training time while being able to solve long horizon tasks at test time. We show the efficacy of the proposed system on a challenging kitchen manipulation task both in simulation and in the real world, demonstrating the ability to practice autonomously in order to solve temporally extended problems.
summary: Reinforcement learning systems have the potential to enable continuous improvement in unstructured environments, leveraging data collected autonomously. However, in practice these systems require significant amounts of instrumentation or human intervention to learn in the real world. In this work, we propose a system for reinforcement learning that leverages multi-task reinforcement learning bootstrapped with prior data to enable continuous autonomous practicing, minimizing the number of resets needed while being able to learn temporally extended behaviors. We show how appropriately provided prior data can help bootstrap both low-level multi-task policies and strategies for sequencing these tasks one after another to enable learning with minimal resets. This mechanism enables our robotic system to practice with minimal human intervention at training time while being able to solve long horizon tasks at test time. We show the efficacy of the proposed system on a challenging kitchen manipulation task both in simulation and in the real world, demonstrating the ability to practice autonomously in order to solve temporally extended problems.
abstract_zh: 强化学习系统有潜力利用自主收集的数据在非结构化环境中实现持续改进。然而，实际上这些系统需要大量的仪器或人工干预才能在现实世界中学习。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种强化学习系统，该系统利用先前数据引导的多任务强化学习来实现连续自主练习，最大限度地减少所需的重置次数，同时能够学习暂时扩展的行为。我们展示了适当提供的先验数据如何帮助引导低级多任务策略和将这些任务依次排序的策略，从而以最少的重置实现学习。这种机制使我们的机器人系统能够在训练时以最少的人为干预进行练习，同时能够在测试时解决长期任务。我们在模拟和现实世界中展示了所提出的系统在具有挑战性的厨房操作任务上的功效，展示了自主练习以解决临时扩展问题的能力。

AI.motivation: 现有强化学习系统在现实世界中需大量人工干预或仪器，难以实现持续自主学习。
AI.method: 结合多任务强化学习与先验数据，引导低级策略及任务序列策略，实现自主练习与长期行为学习。
AI.result: 在模拟和真实厨房操作任务中验证了系统有效性，展示自主练习解决长期问题的能力。
AI.conclusion: 该系统通过减少人工干预实现了复杂任务的自主学习，凸显多任务强化学习的潜力。

search_text: Demonstration-Bootstrapped Autonomous Practicing via Multi-Task Reinforcement Learning 通过多任务强化学习演示引导自主练习 Reinforcement learning systems have the potential to enable continuous improvement in unstructured environments, leveraging data collected autonomously. However, in practice these systems require significant amounts of instrumentation or human intervention to learn in the real world. In this work, we propose a system for reinforcement learning that leverages multi-task reinforcement learning bootstrapped with prior data to enable continuous autonomous practicing, minimizing the number of resets needed while being able to learn temporally extended behaviors. We show how appropriately provided prior data can help bootstrap both low-level multi-task policies and strategies for sequencing these tasks one after another to enable learning with minimal resets. This mechanism enables our robotic system to practice with minimal human intervention at training time while being able to solve long horizon tasks at test time. We show the efficacy of the proposed system on a challenging kitchen manipulation task both in simulation and in the real world, demonstrating the ability to practice autonomously in order to solve temporally extended problems. 强化学习系统有潜力利用自主收集的数据在非结构化环境中实现持续改进。然而，实际上这些系统需要大量的仪器或人工干预才能在现实世界中学习。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种强化学习系统，该系统利用先前数据引导的多任务强化学习来实现连续自主练习，最大限度地减少所需的重置次数，同时能够学习暂时扩展的行为。我们展示了适当提供的先验数据如何帮助引导低级多任务策略和将这些任务依次排序的策略，从而以最少的重置实现学习。这种机制使我们的机器人系统能够在训练时以最少的人为干预进行练习，同时能够在测试时解决长期任务。我们在模拟和现实世界中展示了所提出的系统在具有挑战性的厨房操作任务上的功效，展示了自主练习以解决临时扩展问题的能力。 本文提出一种基于多任务强化学习的系统，利用先验数据引导自主练习，减少重置次数以解决长期任务。 Abhishek Gupta,Corey Lynch,Brandon Kinman,Garrett Peake,Sergey Levine,Karol Hausman cs.RO

authors_text: Gabriel Orlanski
title: Evaluating Prompts Across Multiple Choice Tasks In a Zero-Shot Setting
title_zh: 在零样本设置中评估多项选择任务的提示
abstract: Large language models have shown that impressive zero-shot performance can be achieved through natural language prompts (Radford et al., 2019; Brown et al., 2020; Sanh et al., 2021). Creating an effective prompt, however, requires significant trial and error. That \textit{prompts} the question: how do the qualities of a prompt effects its performance? To this end, we collect and standardize prompts from a diverse range of tasks for use with tasks they were not designed for. We then evaluate these prompts across fixed multiple choice datasets for a quantitative analysis of how certain attributes of a prompt affect performance. We find that including the choices and using prompts not used during pre-training provide significant improvements. All experiments and code can be found https://github.com/gabeorlanski/zero-shot-cross-task.
summary: Large language models have shown that impressive zero-shot performance can be achieved through natural language prompts (Radford et al., 2019; Brown et al., 2020; Sanh et al., 2021). Creating an effective prompt, however, requires significant trial and error. That \textit{prompts} the question: how do the qualities of a prompt effects its performance? To this end, we collect and standardize prompts from a diverse range of tasks for use with tasks they were not designed for. We then evaluate these prompts across fixed multiple choice datasets for a quantitative analysis of how certain attributes of a prompt affect performance. We find that including the choices and using prompts not used during pre-training provide significant improvements. All experiments and code can be found https://github.com/gabeorlanski/zero-shot-cross-task.
abstract_zh: 大型语言模型表明，通过自然语言提示可以实现令人印象深刻的零样本性能（Radford 等人，2019；Brown 等人，2020；Sanh 等人，2021）。然而，创建有效的提示需要大量的尝试和错误。 \textit{提示}了一个问题：提示的质量如何影响其性能？为此，我们从各种任务中收集提示并将其标准化，以便将其用于非设计目的的任务。然后，我们在固定的多项选择数据集中评估这些提示，以定量分析提示的某些属性如何影响性能。我们发现，包括预训练期间未使用的选择和使用提示可以带来显着的改进。所有实验和代码都可以在 https://github.com/gabeorlanski/zero-shot-cross-task 找到。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在零样本设置下，不同提示策略对多项选择任务性能的影响。
AI.motivation: 尽管大语言模型在零样本任务中表现优异，但有效提示的创建依赖大量试错，缺乏对提示属性与性能关系的系统分析。
AI.method: 收集并标准化多任务提示，跨任务评估其在固定多项选择数据集上的表现，量化分析提示属性对性能的影响。
AI.result: 包含选项信息的提示及未在预训练中使用的提示策略显著提升模型性能。
AI.conclusion: 提示设计是影响零样本性能的关键因素，未来需进一步探索提示属性与任务适配性的关系。

authors_text: Angelos Chatzimparmpas,Fernando V. Paulovich,Andreas Kerren
title: HardVis: Visual Analytics to Handle Instance Hardness Using Undersampling and Oversampling Techniques
title_zh: HardVis：使用欠采样和过采样技术处理实例硬度的可视化分析
comment: This manuscript is accepted for publication in Computer Graphics Forum (CGF)
comments: This manuscript is accepted for publication in Computer Graphics Forum (CGF)
abstract: Despite the tremendous advances in machine learning (ML), training with imbalanced data still poses challenges in many real-world applications. Among a series of diverse techniques to solve this problem, sampling algorithms are regarded as an efficient solution. However, the problem is more fundamental, with many works emphasizing the importance of instance hardness. This issue refers to the significance of managing unsafe or potentially noisy instances that are more likely to be misclassified and serve as the root cause of poor classification performance. This paper introduces HardVis, a visual analytics system designed to handle instance hardness mainly in imbalanced classification scenarios. Our proposed system assists users in visually comparing different distributions of data types, selecting types of instances based on local characteristics that will later be affected by the active sampling method, and validating which suggestions from undersampling or oversampling techniques are beneficial for the ML model. Additionally, rather than uniformly undersampling/oversampling a specific class, we allow users to find and sample easy and difficult to classify training instances from all classes. Users can explore subsets of data from different perspectives to decide all those parameters, while HardVis keeps track of their steps and evaluates the model's predictive performance in a test set separately. The end result is a well-balanced data set that boosts the predictive power of the ML model. The efficacy and effectiveness of HardVis are demonstrated with a hypothetical usage scenario and a use case. Finally, we also look at how useful our system is based on feedback we received from ML experts.
summary: Despite the tremendous advances in machine learning (ML), training with imbalanced data still poses challenges in many real-world applications. Among a series of diverse techniques to solve this problem, sampling algorithms are regarded as an efficient solution. However, the problem is more fundamental, with many works emphasizing the importance of instance hardness. This issue refers to the significance of managing unsafe or potentially noisy instances that are more likely to be misclassified and serve as the root cause of poor classification performance. This paper introduces HardVis, a visual analytics system designed to handle instance hardness mainly in imbalanced classification scenarios. Our proposed system assists users in visually comparing different distributions of data types, selecting types of instances based on local characteristics that will later be affected by the active sampling method, and validating which suggestions from undersampling or oversampling techniques are beneficial for the ML model. Additionally, rather than uniformly undersampling/oversampling a specific class, we allow users to find and sample easy and difficult to classify training instances from all classes. Users can explore subsets of data from different perspectives to decide all those parameters, while HardVis keeps track of their steps and evaluates the model's predictive performance in a test set separately. The end result is a well-balanced data set that boosts the predictive power of the ML model. The efficacy and effectiveness of HardVis are demonstrated with a hypothetical usage scenario and a use case. Finally, we also look at how useful our system is based on feedback we received from ML experts.
abstract_zh: 尽管机器学习 (ML) 取得了巨大进步，但使用不平衡数据进行训练在许多实际应用中仍然面临挑战。在解决这个问题的一系列不同技术中，采样算法被认为是一种有效的解决方案。然而，问题是更根本的，许多工作都强调实例硬度的重要性。此问题涉及管理不安全或潜在噪声实例的重要性，这些实例更有可能被错误分类，并成为分类性能不佳的根本原因。本文介绍了 HardVis，这是一种可视化分析系统，旨在主要处理不平衡分类场景中的实例硬度。我们提出的系统可帮助用户直观地比较数据类型的不同分布，根据稍后将受到主动采样方法影响的局部特征选择实例类型，并验证欠采样或过采样技术的哪些建议对 ML 模型有益。此外，我们允许用户从所有类中查找和采样容易和难以分类的训练实例，而不是统一对特定类进行欠采样/过采样。用户可以从不同的角度探索数据子集来决定所有这些参数，而 HardVis 则跟踪他们的步骤并单独评估模型在测试集中的预测性能。最终结果是一个平衡良好的数据集，可增强机器学习模型的预测能力。 HardVis 的功效和有效性通过假设的使用场景和用例来证明。最后，我们还根据机器学习专家的反馈来研究我们的系统的有用性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出HardVis系统，通过可视化分析处理不平衡分类中的实例硬度问题，结合欠采样和过采样技术优化数据集。
AI.motivation: 不平衡数据训练在实际应用中存在挑战，传统采样方法未能有效解决实例硬度问题，即难以分类的噪声实例导致模型性能下降。
AI.method: HardVis允许用户可视化比较数据分布，基于局部特征选择实例，并验证欠采样/过采样策略的效果，支持跨类别筛选易/难分类样本，动态跟踪参数调整并评估模型性能。
AI.result: 通过假设场景和实际案例验证了HardVis的有效性，专家反馈表明系统能有效提升数据集平衡性及模型预测能力。
AI.conclusion: HardVis为处理实例硬度提供了交互式可视化工具，通过灵活采样策略优化不平衡分类任务，具有实际应用价值。
