However, the problem is more fundamental, with many works emphasizing the importance of instance hardness. This issue refers to the significance of managing unsafe or potentially noisy instances that are more likely to be misclassified and serve as the root cause of poor classification performance. This paper introduces HardVis, a visual analytics system designed to handle instance hardness mainly in imbalanced classification scenarios. Our proposed system assists users in visually comparing different distributions of data types, selecting types of instances based on local characteristics that will later be affected by the active sampling method, and validating which suggestions from undersampling or oversampling techniques are beneficial for the ML model. Additionally, rather than uniformly undersampling/oversampling a specific class, we allow users to find and sample easy and difficult to classify training instances from all classes. Users can explore subsets of data from different perspectives to decide all those parameters, while HardVis keeps track of their steps and evaluates the model's predictive performance in a test set separately. The end result is a well-balanced data set that boosts the predictive power of the ML model. The efficacy and effectiveness of HardVis are demonstrated with a hypothetical usage scenario and a use case. Finally, we also look at how useful our system is based on feedback we received from ML experts. 尽管机器学习 (ML) 取得了巨大进步，但使用不平衡数据进行训练在许多实际应用中仍然面临挑战。在解决这个问题的一系列不同技术中，采样算法被认为是一种有效的解决方案。然而，问题是更根本的，许多工作都强调实例硬度的重要性。此问题涉及管理不安全或潜在噪声实例的重要性，这些实例更有可能被错误分类，并成为分类性能不佳的根本原因。本文介绍了 HardVis，这是一种可视化分析系统，旨在主要处理不平衡分类场景中的实例硬度。我们提出的系统可帮助用户直观地比较数据类型的不同分布，根据稍后将受到主动采样方法影响的局部特征选择实例类型，并验证欠采样或过采样技术的哪些建议对 ML 模型有益。此外，我们允许用户从所有类中查找和采样容易和难以分类的训练实例，而不是统一对特定类进行欠采样/过采样。用户可以从不同的角度探索数据子集来决定所有这些参数，而 HardVis 则跟踪他们的步骤并单独评估模型在测试集中的预测性能。最终结果是一个平衡良好的数据集，可增强机器学习模型的预测能力。 HardVis 的功效和有效性通过假设的使用场景和用例来证明。最后，我们还根据机器学习专家的反馈来研究我们的系统的有用性。 本文提出HardVis系统，通过可视化分析处理不平衡分类中的实例硬度问题，结合欠采样和过采样技术优化数据集。 Angelos Chatzimparmpas,Fernando V. Paulovich,Andreas Kerren cs.LG,cs.HC,stat.ML

authors_text: Arshdeep Singh,Mark D. Plumbley
title: A Passive Similarity based CNN Filter Pruning for Efficient Acoustic Scene Classification
title_zh: 基于被动相似性的 CNN 滤波器修剪，用于高效声学场景分类
abstract: We present a method to develop low-complexity convolutional neural networks (CNNs) for acoustic scene classification (ASC). The large size and high computational complexity of typical CNNs is a bottleneck for their deployment on resource-constrained devices. We propose a passive filter pruning framework, where a few convolutional filters from the CNNs are eliminated to yield compressed CNNs. Our hypothesis is that similar filters produce similar responses and give redundant information allowing such filters to be eliminated from the network. To identify similar filters, a cosine distance based greedy algorithm is proposed. A fine-tuning process is then performed to regain much of the performance lost due to filter elimination. To perform efficient fine-tuning, we analyze how the performance varies as the number of fine-tuning training examples changes. An experimental evaluation of the proposed framework is performed on the publicly available DCASE 2021 Task 1A baseline network trained for ASC. The proposed method is simple, reduces computations per inference by 27%, with 25% fewer parameters, with less than 1% drop in accuracy.
summary: We present a method to develop low-complexity convolutional neural networks (CNNs) for acoustic scene classification (ASC). The large size and high computational complexity of typical CNNs is a bottleneck for their deployment on resource-constrained devices. We propose a passive filter pruning framework, where a few convolutional filters from the CNNs are eliminated to yield compressed CNNs. Our hypothesis is that similar filters produce similar responses and give redundant information allowing such filters to be eliminated from the network. To identify similar filters, a cosine distance based greedy algorithm is proposed. A fine-tuning process is then performed to regain much of the performance lost due to filter elimination. To perform efficient fine-tuning, we analyze how the performance varies as the number of fine-tuning training examples changes. An experimental evaluation of the proposed framework is performed on the publicly available DCASE 2021 Task 1A baseline network trained for ASC. The proposed method is simple, reduces computations per inference by 27%, with 25% fewer parameters, with less than 1% drop in accuracy.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种开发用于声学场景分类（ASC）的低复杂度卷积神经网络（CNN）的方法。典型 CNN 的大尺寸和高计算复杂性是其在资源受限设备上部署的瓶颈。我们提出了一种被动滤波器修剪框架，其中消除了 CNN 中的一些卷积滤波器以产生压缩的 CNN。我们的假设是，相似的过滤器会产生相似的响应并提供冗余信息，从而允许从网络中消除此类过滤器。为了识别相似的滤波器，提出了一种基于余弦距离的贪心算法。然后执行微调过程以恢复由于消除滤波器而损失的大部分性能。为了进行有效的微调，我们分析了性能如何随着微调训练示例数量的变化而变化。对所提出的框架的实验评估是在为 ASC 训练的公开 DCASE 2021 任务 1A 基线网络上进行的。所提出的方法很简单，每次推理的计算量减少了 27%，参数减少了 25%，精度下降不到 1%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于被动相似性的CNN滤波器剪枝方法，用于高效声学场景分类。
AI.motivation: 典型CNN模型计算复杂度高，难以部署在资源受限设备上，需通过剪枝冗余滤波器降低复杂度。
AI.method: 采用余弦距离贪心算法识别相似滤波器并进行剪枝，随后通过微调恢复性能。
AI.result: 在DCASE 2021数据集上实现计算量减少27%、参数减少25%，准确率下降不足1%。
AI.conclusion: 该方法简单有效，在保持高准确率的同时显著降低模型复杂度，适合资源受限场景应用。

authors_text: Joanna Purich,Anthony Wise,Leilani Battle
title: An Adaptive Benchmark for Modeling User Exploration of Large Datasets
title_zh: 用于对大型数据集的用户探索进行建模的自适应基准
abstract: In this paper, we present a new DBMS performance benchmark that can simulate user exploration with any specified dashboard design made of standard visualization and interaction components. The distinguishing feature of our SImulation-BAsed (or SIMBA) benchmark is its ability to model user analysis goals as a set of SQL queries to be generated through a valid sequence of user interactions, as well as measure the completion of analysis goals by testing for equivalence between the user's previous queries and their goal queries. In this way, the SIMBA benchmark can simulate how an analyst opportunistically searches for interesting insights at the beginning of an exploration session and eventually hones in on specific goals towards the end. To demonstrate the versatility of the SIMBA benchmark, we use it to test the performance of four DBMSs with six different dashboard specifications and compare our results with IDEBench. Our results show how goal-driven simulation can reveal gaps in DBMS performance missed by existing benchmarking methods and across a range of data exploration scenarios.
summary: In this paper, we present a new DBMS performance benchmark that can simulate user exploration with any specified dashboard design made of standard visualization and interaction components. The distinguishing feature of our SImulation-BAsed (or SIMBA) benchmark is its ability to model user analysis goals as a set of SQL queries to be generated through a valid sequence of user interactions, as well as measure the completion of analysis goals by testing for equivalence between the user's previous queries and their goal queries. In this way, the SIMBA benchmark can simulate how an analyst opportunistically searches for interesting insights at the beginning of an exploration session and eventually hones in on specific goals towards the end. To demonstrate the versatility of the SIMBA benchmark, we use it to test the performance of four DBMSs with six different dashboard specifications and compare our results with IDEBench. Our results show how goal-driven simulation can reveal gaps in DBMS performance missed by existing benchmarking methods and across a range of data exploration scenarios.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一个新的 DBMS 性能基准，它可以使用由标准可视化和交互组件组成的任何指定仪表板设计来模拟用户探索。我们的 SImulation-BAsed（或 SIMBA）基准测试的显着特点是能够将用户分析目标建模为一组通过有效的用户交互序列生成的 SQL 查询，并通过测试用户之前的查询与其目标查询之间的等效性来衡量分析目标的完成情况。通过这种方式，SIMBA 基准测试可以模拟分析师如何在探索会话开始时机会主义地搜索有趣的见解，并最终在结束时磨练具体目标。为了展示 SIMBA 基准测试的多功能性，我们使用它来测试具有六种不同仪表板规范的四个 DBMS 的性能，并将我们的结果与 IDEBench 进行比较。我们的结果表明，目标驱动的模拟如何揭示现有基准测试方法和一系列数据探索场景中遗漏的 DBMS 性能差距。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为SIMBA的新型数据库性能基准，通过模拟用户探索大型数据集的行为来评估DBMS性能。
AI.motivation: 现有基准测试无法准确反映用户在实际探索数据时的动态行为，导致性能评估存在盲区。
AI.method: 通过将用户交互序列转化为SQL查询并验证目标查询等价性，构建基于模拟的基准测试框架，结合六种仪表板设计测试四种DBMS性能。
AI.result: 实验表明，目标驱动的模拟方法能揭示传统基准测试遗漏的DBMS性能缺陷，且在不同数据探索场景中表现稳定。
AI.conclusion: SIMBA基准为评估数据库系统在真实用户探索场景下的表现提供了更精确的工具，凸显了传统方法的局限性。

authors_text: Ziaul Haque Choudhury
title: Encryption and encoding of facial images into quick response and high capacity color 2d code for biometric passport security system
title_zh: 将面部图像加密并编码为快速响应、高容量的彩色二维码，用于生物识别护照安全系统
abstract: In this thesis, a multimodal biometric, secure encrypted data and encrypted biometric encoded into the QR code-based biometric-passport authentication method is proposed for national security applications. Firstly, using the Extended Profile - Local Binary Patterns (EP-LBP), a Canny edge detector, and the Scale Invariant Feature Transform (SIFT) algorithm with Image File Information (IMFINFO) process, the facial mark size recognition is initially achieved. Secondly, by using the Active Shape Model (ASM) into Active Appearance Model (AAM) to follow the hand and infusion the hand geometry characteristics for verification and identification, hand geometry recognition is achieved. Thirdly, the encrypted biometric passport information that is publicly accessible is encoded into the QR code and inserted into the electronic passport to improve protection. Further, Personal information and biometric data are encrypted by applying the Advanced Encryption Standard (AES) and the Secure Hash Algorithm (SHA) 256 algorithm. It will enhance the biometric passport security system.
summary: In this thesis, a multimodal biometric, secure encrypted data and encrypted biometric encoded into the QR code-based biometric-passport authentication method is proposed for national security applications. Firstly, using the Extended Profile - Local Binary Patterns (EP-LBP), a Canny edge detector, and the Scale Invariant Feature Transform (SIFT) algorithm with Image File Information (IMFINFO) process, the facial mark size recognition is initially achieved. Secondly, by using the Active Shape Model (ASM) into Active Appearance Model (AAM) to follow the hand and infusion the hand geometry characteristics for verification and identification, hand geometry recognition is achieved. Thirdly, the encrypted biometric passport information that is publicly accessible is encoded into the QR code and inserted into the electronic passport to improve protection. Further, Personal information and biometric data are encrypted by applying the Advanced Encryption Standard (AES) and the Secure Hash Algorithm (SHA) 256 algorithm. It will enhance the biometric passport security system.
abstract_zh: 本文针对国家安全应用，提出了一种多模态生物识别、安全加密数据和加密生物识别编码到基于二维码的生物识别护照认证方法。首先，使用扩展轮廓-局部二进制模式（EP-LBP）、Canny边缘检测器以及带有图像文件信息（IMFINFO）过程的尺度不变特征变换（SIFT）算法，初步实现了面部标记尺寸识别。其次，将主动形状模型（ASM）引入主动外观模型（AAM）中进行手部跟踪，并注入手部几何特征进行验证和识别，实现手部几何形状识别。第三，将可公开访问的加密生物识别护照信息编码为二维码并插入电子护照中以提高保护性。此外，通过应用高级加密标准（AES）和安全哈希算法（SHA）256算法对个人信息和生物特征数据进行加密。它将增强生物识别护照安全系统。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合多模态生物识别与加密技术的电子护照安全系统，通过将加密的面部及手部生物特征编码至QR码中以提升安全性。
AI.motivation: 现有护照系统存在生物特征数据易被篡改或窃取的风险，需通过加密与多模态生物识别技术增强身份验证的安全性。
AI.method: 采用EP-LBP、Canny边缘检测、SIFT算法及IMFINFO实现面部识别；结合ASM与AAM模型进行手部几何特征提取；利用AES与SHA-256加密算法对生物信息加密后嵌入QR码。
AI.result: 成功构建了集成加密生物特征与QR码存储的护照验证系统，有效防止数据伪造与篡改，提升身份认证可靠性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过多模态生物识别与高强度加密技术的结合，显著增强了电子护照系统的安全性与防伪能力。

search_text: Encryption and encoding of facial images into quick response and high capacity color 2d code for biometric passport security system 将面部图像加密并编码为快速响应、高容量的彩色二维码，用于生物识别护照安全系统 In this thesis, a multimodal biometric, secure encrypted data and encrypted biometric encoded into the QR code-based biometric-passport authentication method is proposed for national security applications. Firstly, using the Extended Profile - Local Binary Patterns (EP-LBP), a Canny edge detector, and the Scale Invariant Feature Transform (SIFT) algorithm with Image File Information (IMFINFO) process, the facial mark size recognition is initially achieved. Secondly, by using the Active Shape Model (ASM) into Active Appearance Model (AAM) to follow the hand and infusion the hand geometry characteristics for verification and identification, hand geometry recognition is achieved. Thirdly, the encrypted biometric passport information that is publicly accessible is encoded into the QR code and inserted into the electronic passport to improve protection. Further, Personal information and biometric data are encrypted by applying the Advanced Encryption Standard (AES) and the Secure Hash Algorithm (SHA) 256 algorithm. It will enhance the biometric passport security system. 本文针对国家安全应用，提出了一种多模态生物识别、安全加密数据和加密生物识别编码到基于二维码的生物识别护照认证方法。首先，使用扩展轮廓-局部二进制模式（EP-LBP）、Canny边缘检测器以及带有图像文件信息（IMFINFO）过程的尺度不变特征变换（SIFT）算法，初步实现了面部标记尺寸识别。其次，将主动形状模型（ASM）引入主动外观模型（AAM）中进行手部跟踪，并注入手部几何特征进行验证和识别，实现手部几何形状识别。第三，将可公开访问的加密生物识别护照信息编码为二维码并插入电子护照中以提高保护性。此外，通过应用高级加密标准（AES）和安全哈希算法（SHA）256算法对个人信息和生物特征数据进行加密。它将增强生物识别护照安全系统。 本文提出一种结合多模态生物识别与加密技术的电子护照安全系统，通过将加密的面部及手部生物特征编码至QR码中以提升安全性。 Ziaul Haque Choudhury cs.CV

authors_text: Ruzayn Quaddoura,Gassan Samara
title: Scheduling UET-UCT DAGs of Depth Two on Two Processors
title_zh: 在两个处理器上调度深度为 2 的 UET-UCT DAG
abstract: Given unit execution time (UET) tasks whose precedence constraints form a directed acyclic graph (DAG), the arcs are associated with unit communication time (UCT) delays. The problem is to schedule the tasks on two processors in order to minimize the makespan. Several polynomial algorithms in the literature are proposed for special classes of digraphs, but the complexity of solving this problem in general case stills a challenging open question. We propose in this paper a linear time algorithm to compute an optimal schedule for the class of DAGs of depth two.
summary: Given unit execution time (UET) tasks whose precedence constraints form a directed acyclic graph (DAG), the arcs are associated with unit communication time (UCT) delays. The problem is to schedule the tasks on two processors in order to minimize the makespan. Several polynomial algorithms in the literature are proposed for special classes of digraphs, but the complexity of solving this problem in general case stills a challenging open question. We propose in this paper a linear time algorithm to compute an optimal schedule for the class of DAGs of depth two.
abstract_zh: 给定单位执行时间 (UET) 任务，其优先级约束形成有向无环图 (DAG)，弧与单位通信时间 (UCT) 延迟相关联。问题是在两个处理器上调度任务以最小化完工时间。文献中针对特殊类别的有向图提出了几种多项式算法，但在一般情况下解决此问题的复杂性仍然是一个具有挑战性的悬而未决的问题。我们在本文中提出了一种线性时间算法来计算深度为 2 的 DAG 类的最佳调度。

AI.tldr: 本文研究在两个处理器上对深度为二的单位执行时间（UET）且单位通信时间（UCT）的有向无环图（DAG）进行最优调度以最小化完成时间（makespan）。
AI.motivation: 现有算法仅适用于特定类别的DAG，而一般情况下的调度复杂性仍是未解难题，需更通用的解决方案。
AI.method: 提出一种线性时间算法，针对深度为二的DAG结构设计最优调度策略。
AI.result: 成功开发出线性时间复杂度的算法，可有效计算该类DAG的最优调度方案。
AI.conclusion: 该成果为解决特定结构DAG的调度问题提供了高效方法，推动了该领域在一般情况下的研究进展。

authors_text: Wenjun Xia,Hongming Shan,Ge Wang,Yi Zhang
title: Physics-/Model-Based and Data-Driven Methods for Low-Dose Computed Tomography: A survey
title_zh: 基于物理/模型和数据驱动的低剂量计算机断层扫描方法：一项调查
abstract: Since 2016, deep learning (DL) has advanced tomographic imaging with remarkable successes, especially in low-dose computed tomography (LDCT) imaging. Despite being driven by big data, the LDCT denoising and pure end-to-end reconstruction networks often suffer from the black box nature and major issues such as instabilities, which is a major barrier to apply deep learning methods in low-dose CT applications. An emerging trend is to integrate imaging physics and model into deep networks, enabling a hybridization of physics/model-based and data-driven elements. %This type of hybrid methods has become increasingly influential. In this paper, we systematically review the physics/model-based data-driven methods for LDCT, summarize the loss functions and training strategies, evaluate the performance of different methods, and discuss relevant issues and future directions.
summary: Since 2016, deep learning (DL) has advanced tomographic imaging with remarkable successes, especially in low-dose computed tomography (LDCT) imaging. Despite being driven by big data, the LDCT denoising and pure end-to-end reconstruction networks often suffer from the black box nature and major issues such as instabilities, which is a major barrier to apply deep learning methods in low-dose CT applications. An emerging trend is to integrate imaging physics and model into deep networks, enabling a hybridization of physics/model-based and data-driven elements. %This type of hybrid methods has become increasingly influential. In this paper, we systematically review the physics/model-based data-driven methods for LDCT, summarize the loss functions and training strategies, evaluate the performance of different methods, and discuss relevant issues and future directions.
abstract_zh: 自2016年以来，深度学习（DL）在先进的断层扫描成像方面取得了显着的成功，特别是在低剂量计算机断层扫描（LDCT）成像方面。尽管受到大数据的驱动，LDCT去噪和纯端到端重建网络往往存在黑盒性质和不稳定等重大问题，这是深度学习方法在低剂量CT应用中应用的主要障碍。一个新兴趋势是将成像物理和模型集成到深层网络中，从而实现基于物理/模型和数据驱动元素的混合。 %这种混合方法的影响力越来越大。在本文中，我们系统地回顾了基于物理/模型的LDCT数据驱动方法，总结了损失函数和训练策略，评估了不同方法的性能，并讨论了相关问题和未来方向。

AI.tldr: 系统回顾低剂量CT中结合物理模型与数据驱动的方法，总结损失函数与训练策略，并评估不同方法的性能。
AI.motivation: 深度学习方法在LDCT中存在黑箱性和不稳定性问题，阻碍其应用，需融合物理模型以提升可靠性。
AI.method: 系统综述相关方法，总结损失函数与训练策略，评估不同方法的性能，并讨论存在问题及未来方向。
AI.result: 总结了多种混合方法的损失函数与训练策略，评估了其在LDCT中的性能差异。
AI.conclusion: 融合物理模型与数据驱动是提升LDCT方法可靠性的趋势，未来需进一步研究其优化与应用。

authors_text: Carolina Lucía Gonzalez,Felix Mann
title: On $d$-stable locally checkable problems parameterized by mim-width
title_zh: 关于由 mim-width 参数化的 $d$-stable 本地可检查问题
abstract: In this paper we continue the study of locally checkable problems under the framework introduced by Bonomo-Braberman and Gonzalez in 2020, by focusing on graphs of bounded mim-width. We study which restrictions on a locally checkable problem are necessary in order to be able to solve it efficiently on graphs of bounded mim-width. To this end, we introduce the concept of $d$-stability of a check function. The related locally checkable problems contain large classes of problems, among which we can mention, for example, LCVP problems. We give an algorithm showing that these problems are XP when parameterized by the mim-width of a given binary decomposition tree of the input graph, that is, that they can be solved in polynomial time given a binary decomposition tree of bounded mim-width. We explore the relation between $d$-stable locally checkable problems and the recently introduced DN logic (Bergougnoux, Dreier and Jaffke, 2022), and show that both frameworks model the same family of problems. We include a list of concrete examples of $d$-stable locally checkable problems whose complexity on graphs of bounded mim-width was open so far.
summary: In this paper we continue the study of locally checkable problems under the framework introduced by Bonomo-Braberman and Gonzalez in 2020, by focusing on graphs of bounded mim-width. We study which restrictions on a locally checkable problem are necessary in order to be able to solve it efficiently on graphs of bounded mim-width. To this end, we introduce the concept of $d$-stability of a check function. The related locally checkable problems contain large classes of problems, among which we can mention, for example, LCVP problems. We give an algorithm showing that these problems are XP when parameterized by the mim-width of a given binary decomposition tree of the input graph, that is, that they can be solved in polynomial time given a binary decomposition tree of bounded mim-width. We explore the relation between $d$-stable locally checkable problems and the recently introduced DN logic (Bergougnoux, Dreier and Jaffke, 2022), and show that both frameworks model the same family of problems. We include a list of concrete examples of $d$-stable locally checkable problems whose complexity on graphs of bounded mim-width was open so far.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们继续在 Bonomo-Braberman 和 Gonzalez 于 2020 年提出的框架下研究局部可检查问题，重点关注有界 mim-width 的图。我们研究了对局部可检查问题的哪些限制是必要的，以便能够在有界 mim 宽度的图上有效地解决该问题。为此，我们引入了$d$-检查函数稳定性的概念。相关的本地可检查问题包含一大类问题，例如 LCVP 问题。我们给出的算法表明，当通过输入图的给定二元分解树的 mim-width 进行参数化时，这些问题是 XP，也就是说，在给定有界 mim-width 的二元分解树的情况下，它们可以在多项式时间内求解。我们探讨了 $d$ 稳定的本地可检查问题与最近引入的 DN 逻辑（Bergougnoux、Dreier 和 Jaffke，2022）之间的关系，并表明这两个框架都模拟了同一组问题。我们列出了 $d$ 稳定的本地可检查问题的具体示例，这些问题在有界 mim 宽度图上的复杂性到目前为止是开放的。

AI.motivation: 局部可检查问题在图论中具有重要意义，但其在具有有界mim宽度的图上的解决条件尚不明确，因此需要进一步研究。
AI.method: 通过引入d-稳定检查函数的概念，研究了局部可检查问题与DN逻辑之间的关系，并提出了一种基于mim宽度的算法。
AI.result: 证明了d-稳定局部可检查问题在具有有界mim宽度的图上可以在多项式时间内解决，并列举了一些复杂性尚未明确的问题。

search_text: On $d$-stable locally checkable problems parameterized by mim-width 关于由 mim-width 参数化的 $d$-stable 本地可检查问题 In this paper we continue the study of locally checkable problems under the framework introduced by Bonomo-Braberman and Gonzalez in 2020, by focusing on graphs of bounded mim-width. We study which restrictions on a locally checkable problem are necessary in order to be able to solve it efficiently on graphs of bounded mim-width. To this end, we introduce the concept of $d$-stability of a check function. The related locally checkable problems contain large classes of problems, among which we can mention, for example, LCVP problems. We give an algorithm showing that these problems are XP when parameterized by the mim-width of a given binary decomposition tree of the input graph, that is, that they can be solved in polynomial time given a binary decomposition tree of bounded mim-width. We explore the relation between $d$-stable locally checkable problems and the recently introduced DN logic (Bergougnoux, Dreier and Jaffke, 2022), and show that both frameworks model the same family of problems. We include a list of concrete examples of $d$-stable locally checkable problems whose complexity on graphs of bounded mim-width was open so far. 在本文中，我们继续在 Bonomo-Braberman 和 Gonzalez 于 2020 年提出的框架下研究局部可检查问题，重点关注有界 mim-width 的图。我们研究了对局部可检查问题的哪些限制是必要的，以便能够在有界 mim 宽度的图上有效地解决该问题。为此，我们引入了$d$-检查函数稳定性的概念。相关的本地可检查问题包含一大类问题，例如 LCVP 问题。我们给出的算法表明，当通过输入图的给定二元分解树的 mim-width 进行参数化时，这些问题是 XP，也就是说，在给定有界 mim-width 的二元分解树的情况下，它们可以在多项式时间内求解。我们探讨了 $d$ 稳定的本地可检查问题与最近引入的 DN 逻辑（Bergougnoux、Dreier 和 Jaffke，2022）之间的关系，并表明这两个框架都模拟了同一组问题。我们列出了 $d$ 稳定的本地可检查问题的具体示例，这些问题在有界 mim 宽度图上的复杂性到目前为止是开放的。 本文研究了在具有有界mim宽度的图上解决局部可检查问题所需的限制条件，并引入了d-稳定检查函数的概念。 Carolina Lucía Gonzalez,Felix Mann cs.DM,cs.CC,cs.DS,math.CO

authors_text: Matthias Keicher,Kamilia Zaripova,Tobias Czempiel,Kristina Mach,Ashkan Khakzar,Nassir Navab
title: FlexR: Few-shot Classification with Language Embeddings for Structured Reporting of Chest X-rays
title_zh: FlexR：利用语言嵌入进行少量样本分类，用于胸部 X 光的结构化报告
abstract: The automation of chest X-ray reporting has garnered significant interest due to the time-consuming nature of the task. However, the clinical accuracy of free-text reports has proven challenging to quantify using natural language processing metrics, given the complexity of medical information, the variety of writing styles, and the potential for typos and inconsistencies. Structured reporting and standardized reports, on the other hand, can provide consistency and formalize the evaluation of clinical correctness. However, high-quality annotations for structured reporting are scarce. Therefore, we propose a method to predict clinical findings defined by sentences in structured reporting templates, which can be used to fill such templates. The approach involves training a contrastive language-image model using chest X-rays and related free-text radiological reports, then creating textual prompts for each structured finding and optimizing a classifier to predict clinical findings in the medical image. Results show that even with limited image-level annotations for training, the method can accomplish the structured reporting tasks of severity assessment of cardiomegaly and localizing pathologies in chest X-rays.
summary: The automation of chest X-ray reporting has garnered significant interest due to the time-consuming nature of the task. However, the clinical accuracy of free-text reports has proven challenging to quantify using natural language processing metrics, given the complexity of medical information, the variety of writing styles, and the potential for typos and inconsistencies. Structured reporting and standardized reports, on the other hand, can provide consistency and formalize the evaluation of clinical correctness. However, high-quality annotations for structured reporting are scarce. Therefore, we propose a method to predict clinical findings defined by sentences in structured reporting templates, which can be used to fill such templates. The approach involves training a contrastive language-image model using chest X-rays and related free-text radiological reports, then creating textual prompts for each structured finding and optimizing a classifier to predict clinical findings in the medical image. Results show that even with limited image-level annotations for training, the method can accomplish the structured reporting tasks of severity assessment of cardiomegaly and localizing pathologies in chest X-rays.
abstract_zh: 由于任务耗时，胸部 X 射线报告的自动化引起了人们的极大兴趣。然而，考虑到医疗信息的复杂性、写作风格的多样性以及可能出现的拼写错误和不一致，事实证明，使用自然语言处理指标来量化自由文本报告的临床准确性具有挑战性。另一方面，结构化报告和标准化报告可以提供一致性并使临床正确性的评估正式化。然而，结构化报告的高质量注释很少。因此，我们提出了一种预测由结构化报告模板中的句子定义的临床结果的方法，该方法可用于填充此类模板。该方法包括使用胸部 X 光和相关的自由文本放射学报告训练对比语言图像模型，然后为每个结构化发现创建文本提示，并优化分类器以预测医学图像中的临床发现。结果表明，即使用于训练的图像级注释有限，该方法也可以完成心脏肥大严重程度评估和胸部 X 射线病理定位的结构化报告任务。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于语言嵌入的少样本分类方法，用于生成胸部X光的结构化报告。
AI.motivation: 传统自由文本报告难以量化评估，结构化报告需大量标注数据，但稀缺，因此需少样本方法解决。
AI.method: 训练对比语言-图像模型，生成结构化发现的文本提示，并优化分类器预测临床发现。
AI.result: 在少量标注下，有效完成心脏肥大评估和病理定位。
AI.conclusion: 证明方法在少样本下有效，为医疗报告生成提供新思路。

authors_text: Gian Wiher,Clara Meister,Ryan Cotterell
title: On Decoding Strategies for Neural Text Generators
title_zh: 神经文本生成器的解码策略
abstract: When generating text from probabilistic models, the chosen decoding strategy has a profound effect on the resulting text. Yet the properties elicited by various decoding strategies do not always transfer across natural language generation tasks. For example, while mode-seeking methods like beam search perform remarkably well for machine translation, they have been observed to lead to incoherent and repetitive text in story generation. Despite such observations, the effectiveness of decoding strategies is often assessed with respect to only a single task. This work -- in contrast -- provides a comprehensive analysis of the interaction between language generation tasks and decoding strategies. Specifically, we measure changes in attributes of generated text as a function of both decoding strategy and task using human and automatic evaluation. Our results reveal both previously-observed and surprising findings. For example, the nature of the diversity-quality trade-off in language generation is very task-specific; the length bias often attributed to beam search is not constant across tasks.
summary: When generating text from probabilistic models, the chosen decoding strategy has a profound effect on the resulting text. Yet the properties elicited by various decoding strategies do not always transfer across natural language generation tasks. For example, while mode-seeking methods like beam search perform remarkably well for machine translation, they have been observed to lead to incoherent and repetitive text in story generation. Despite such observations, the effectiveness of decoding strategies is often assessed with respect to only a single task. This work -- in contrast -- provides a comprehensive analysis of the interaction between language generation tasks and decoding strategies. Specifically, we measure changes in attributes of generated text as a function of both decoding strategy and task using human and automatic evaluation. Our results reveal both previously-observed and surprising findings. For example, the nature of the diversity-quality trade-off in language generation is very task-specific; the length bias often attributed to beam search is not constant across tasks.
abstract_zh: 当从概率模型生成文本时，所选择的解码策略会对生成的文本产生深远的影响。然而，各种解码策略引发的属性并不总是在自然语言生成任务中转移。例如，虽然波束搜索等模式搜索方法在机器翻译方面表现非常出色，但人们发现它们会导致故事生成中文本不连贯和重复。尽管有这样的观察，解码策略的有效性通常仅针对单个任务进行评估。相比之下，这项工作提供了对语言生成任务和解码策略之间相互作用的全面分析。具体来说，我们使用人工和自动评估来测量生成文本的属性变化，作为解码策略和任务的函数。我们的结果揭示了先前观察到的和令人惊讶的发现。例如，语言生成中多样性与质量权衡的本质是非常特定于任务的；通常归因于集束搜索的长度偏差在不同任务中并不是恒定的。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了神经文本生成器中解码策略与不同语言生成任务之间的相互作用，分析了不同策略对生成文本属性的影响。
AI.motivation: 现有研究通常仅针对单一任务评估解码策略的效果，而不同任务下策略表现可能存在显著差异，需系统分析其跨任务特性。
AI.method: 通过人类评估和自动评估指标，量化解码策略与任务类型对生成文本属性（如多样性、连贯性、长度偏差）的影响。
AI.result: 发现多样性-质量权衡具有任务特异性，如束搜索的长度偏差在不同任务中表现不一致，且某些策略在特定任务中产生重复或不连贯文本。
AI.conclusion: 解码策略的效果高度依赖任务类型，需根据具体生成目标选择适配的策略，而非通用最优解。

Specifically, we measure changes in attributes of generated text as a function of both decoding strategy and task using human and automatic evaluation. Our results reveal both previously-observed and surprising findings. For example, the nature of the diversity-quality trade-off in language generation is very task-specific; the length bias often attributed to beam search is not constant across tasks. 当从概率模型生成文本时，所选择的解码策略会对生成的文本产生深远的影响。然而，各种解码策略引发的属性并不总是在自然语言生成任务中转移。例如，虽然波束搜索等模式搜索方法在机器翻译方面表现非常出色，但人们发现它们会导致故事生成中文本不连贯和重复。尽管有这样的观察，解码策略的有效性通常仅针对单个任务进行评估。相比之下，这项工作提供了对语言生成任务和解码策略之间相互作用的全面分析。具体来说，我们使用人工和自动评估来测量生成文本的属性变化，作为解码策略和任务的函数。我们的结果揭示了先前观察到的和令人惊讶的发现。例如，语言生成中多样性与质量权衡的本质是非常特定于任务的；通常归因于集束搜索的长度偏差在不同任务中并不是恒定的。 本文研究了神经文本生成器中解码策略与不同语言生成任务之间的相互作用，分析了不同策略对生成文本属性的影响。 Gian Wiher,Clara Meister,Ryan Cotterell cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: Yifeng Jiang,Yuting Ye,Deepak Gopinath,Jungdam Won,Alexander W. Winkler,C. Karen Liu
title: Transformer Inertial Poser: Real-time Human Motion Reconstruction from Sparse IMUs with Simultaneous Terrain Generation
title_zh: Transformer Inertial Poser：通过稀疏 IMU 实时重建人体运动并同时生成地形
abstract: Real-time human motion reconstruction from a sparse set of (e.g. six) wearable IMUs provides a non-intrusive and economic approach to motion capture. Without the ability to acquire position information directly from IMUs, recent works took data-driven approaches that utilize large human motion datasets to tackle this under-determined problem. Still, challenges remain such as temporal consistency, drifting of global and joint motions, and diverse coverage of motion types on various terrains. We propose a novel method to simultaneously estimate full-body motion and generate plausible visited terrain from only six IMU sensors in real-time. Our method incorporates 1. a conditional Transformer decoder model giving consistent predictions by explicitly reasoning prediction history, 2. a simple yet general learning target named "stationary body points" (SBPs) which can be stably predicted by the Transformer model and utilized by analytical routines to correct joint and global drifting, and 3. an algorithm to generate regularized terrain height maps from noisy SBP predictions which can in turn correct noisy global motion estimation. We evaluate our framework extensively on synthesized and real IMU data, and with real-time live demos, and show superior performance over strong baseline methods.
summary: Real-time human motion reconstruction from a sparse set of (e.g. six) wearable IMUs provides a non-intrusive and economic approach to motion capture. Without the ability to acquire position information directly from IMUs, recent works took data-driven approaches that utilize large human motion datasets to tackle this under-determined problem. Still, challenges remain such as temporal consistency, drifting of global and joint motions, and diverse coverage of motion types on various terrains. We propose a novel method to simultaneously estimate full-body motion and generate plausible visited terrain from only six IMU sensors in real-time. Our method incorporates 1. a conditional Transformer decoder model giving consistent predictions by explicitly reasoning prediction history, 2. a simple yet general learning target named "stationary body points" (SBPs) which can be stably predicted by the Transformer model and utilized by analytical routines to correct joint and global drifting, and 3. an algorithm to generate regularized terrain height maps from noisy SBP predictions which can in turn correct noisy global motion estimation. We evaluate our framework extensively on synthesized and real IMU data, and with real-time live demos, and show superior performance over strong baseline methods.
abstract_zh: 从一组稀疏（例如六个）可穿戴 IMU 进行实时人体运动重建提供了一种非侵入式且经济的运动捕捉方法。由于无法直接从 IMU 获取位置信息，最近的工作采用了数据驱动的方法，利用大型人体运动数据集来解决这个不确定的问题。尽管如此，挑战仍然存在，例如时间一致性、全局和关节运动的漂移以及不同地形上运动类型的多样化覆盖。我们提出了一种新颖的方法，可以同时估计全身运动并仅通过六个 IMU 传感器实时生成合理的访问地形。我们的方法包含 1. 一个条件 Transformer 解码器模型，通过显式推理预测历史来提供一致的预测，2. 一个简单而通用的学习目标，名为“静止身体点”（SBP），它可以由 Transformer 模型稳定预测，并由分析例程利用来纠正关节和全局漂移，以及 3. 一种从噪声 SBP 预测生成正则化地形高度图的算法，从而可以纠正噪声全局运动估计。我们根据合成的和真实的 IMU 数据以及实时现场演示对我们的框架进行了广泛的评估，并显示出优于强大基线方法的性能。

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种实时人体运动重建方法，仅使用六个IMU传感器同时估计全身运动并生成可行走的地形。
AI.motivation: 现有基于稀疏IMU的运动重建方法存在时间一致性差、全局和关节运动漂移等问题，且难以覆盖多样化的地形场景。
AI.method: 1. 采用条件Transformer解码器通过显式推理预测历史实现一致输出；2. 提出稳定可预测的'静止身体点'(SBPs)作为学习目标，用于校正运动漂移；3. 设计算法从噪声SBP预测中生成正则化地形高度图以修正全局运动估计。
AI.result: 在合成数据和真实IMU数据上进行大量评估，并通过实时演示验证，性能优于现有先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过Transformer架构与SBP目标的结合，有效解决了稀疏IMU运动重建中的时空一致性难题，为实时运动捕捉提供了实用方案。

authors_text: Dahyun Kang,Minsu Cho
title: Integrative Few-Shot Learning for Classification and Segmentation
title_zh: 用于分类和分割的集成小样本学习
comment: Accepted at CVPR 2022; Code available at https://github.com/dahyun-kang/ifsl ; Project page: https://cvlab.postech.ac.kr/research/iFSL/
comments: Accepted at CVPR 2022; Code available at https://github.com/dahyun-kang/ifsl ; Project page: https://cvlab.postech.ac.kr/research/iFSL/
abstract: We introduce the integrative task of few-shot classification and segmentation (FS-CS) that aims to both classify and segment target objects in a query image when the target classes are given with a few examples. This task combines two conventional few-shot learning problems, few-shot classification and segmentation. FS-CS generalizes them to more realistic episodes with arbitrary image pairs, where each target class may or may not be present in the query. To address the task, we propose the integrative few-shot learning (iFSL) framework for FS-CS, which trains a learner to construct class-wise foreground maps for multi-label classification and pixel-wise segmentation. We also develop an effective iFSL model, attentive squeeze network (ASNet), that leverages deep semantic correlation and global self-attention to produce reliable foreground maps. In experiments, the proposed method shows promising performance on the FS-CS task and also achieves the state of the art on standard few-shot segmentation benchmarks.
summary: We introduce the integrative task of few-shot classification and segmentation (FS-CS) that aims to both classify and segment target objects in a query image when the target classes are given with a few examples. This task combines two conventional few-shot learning problems, few-shot classification and segmentation. FS-CS generalizes them to more realistic episodes with arbitrary image pairs, where each target class may or may not be present in the query. To address the task, we propose the integrative few-shot learning (iFSL) framework for FS-CS, which trains a learner to construct class-wise foreground maps for multi-label classification and pixel-wise segmentation. We also develop an effective iFSL model, attentive squeeze network (ASNet), that leverages deep semantic correlation and global self-attention to produce reliable foreground maps. In experiments, the proposed method shows promising performance on the FS-CS task and also achieves the state of the art on standard few-shot segmentation benchmarks.
abstract_zh: 我们引入了少样本分类和分割（FS-CS）的集成任务，其目的是在给出一些示例的目标类别时对查询图像中的目标对象进行分类和分割。该任务结合了两个传统的少样本学习问题：少样本分类和分割。 FS-CS 将它们概括为具有任意图像对的更真实的片段，其中每个目标类可能出现也可能不出现在查询中。为了解决这个任务，我们提出了 FS-CS 的集成少样本学习（iFSL）框架，它训练学习者构建用于多标签分类和像素分割的类前景图。我们还开发了一种有效的 iFSL 模型，即注意力挤压网络 (ASNet)，它利用深度语义相关性和全局自注意力来生成可靠的前景图。在实验中，所提出的方法在 FS-CS 任务上显示出良好的性能，并且在标准少镜头分割基准上也达到了最先进的水平。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种整合少样本分类与分割任务的框架iFSL，旨在通过少量示例同时完成图像分类与分割。
AI.motivation: 传统少样本学习分别处理分类与分割任务，难以适应真实场景中多任务联合需求，需统一框架提升效率与性能。
AI.method: 设计iFSL框架与ASNet模型，利用深度语义关联和全局自注意力机制生成类感知的前景图，实现分类与分割的联合优化。
AI.result: 在FS-CS任务及标准少样本分割基准上均取得最优性能，验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 整合少样本分类与分割任务的统一框架能显著提升模型泛化能力，为复杂场景提供更高效的解决方案。

authors_text: Lixin Yang,Kailin Li,Xinyu Zhan,Fei Wu,Anran Xu,Liu Liu,Cewu Lu
title: OakInk: A Large-scale Knowledge Repository for Understanding Hand-Object Interaction
title_zh: OakInk：用于理解手-物体交互的大型知识库
abstract: Learning how humans manipulate objects requires machines to acquire knowledge from two perspectives: one for understanding object affordances and the other for learning human's interactions based on the affordances. Even though these two knowledge bases are crucial, we find that current databases lack a comprehensive awareness of them. In this work, we propose a multi-modal and rich-annotated knowledge repository, OakInk, for visual and cognitive understanding of hand-object interactions. We start to collect 1,800 common household objects and annotate their affordances to construct the first knowledge base: Oak. Given the affordance, we record rich human interactions with 100 selected objects in Oak. Finally, we transfer the interactions on the 100 recorded objects to their virtual counterparts through a novel method: Tink. The recorded and transferred hand-object interactions constitute the second knowledge base: Ink. As a result, OakInk contains 50,000 distinct affordance-aware and intent-oriented hand-object interactions. We benchmark OakInk on pose estimation and grasp generation tasks. Moreover, we propose two practical applications of OakInk: intent-based interaction generation and handover generation. Our datasets and source code are publicly available at https://github.com/lixiny/OakInk.
summary: Learning how humans manipulate objects requires machines to acquire knowledge from two perspectives: one for understanding object affordances and the other for learning human's interactions based on the affordances. Even though these two knowledge bases are crucial, we find that current databases lack a comprehensive awareness of them. In this work, we propose a multi-modal and rich-annotated knowledge repository, OakInk, for visual and cognitive understanding of hand-object interactions. We start to collect 1,800 common household objects and annotate their affordances to construct the first knowledge base: Oak. Given the affordance, we record rich human interactions with 100 selected objects in Oak. Finally, we transfer the interactions on the 100 recorded objects to their virtual counterparts through a novel method: Tink. The recorded and transferred hand-object interactions constitute the second knowledge base: Ink. As a result, OakInk contains 50,000 distinct affordance-aware and intent-oriented hand-object interactions. We benchmark OakInk on pose estimation and grasp generation tasks. Moreover, we propose two practical applications of OakInk: intent-based interaction generation and handover generation. Our datasets and source code are publicly available at https://github.com/lixiny/OakInk.
abstract_zh: 学习人类如何操纵物体需要机器从两个角度获取知识：一个是理解物体的可供性，另一个是根据可供性学习人类的交互。尽管这两个知识库至关重要，但我们发现当前的数据库缺乏对它们的全面认识。在这项工作中，我们提出了一个多模式和丰富注释的知识库 OakInk，用于手部物体交互的视觉和认知理解。我们开始收集 1,800 种常见的家居用品并注释它们的可供性，以构建第一个知识库：橡树。考虑到可供性，我们在 Oak 中记录了与 100 个选定物体的丰富的人类交互。最后，我们通过一种新颖的方法：Tink，将 100 个记录对象的交互转移到它们的虚拟对象上。记录和传输的手与物体的交互构成了第二个知识库：墨水。因此，OakInk 包含 50,000 个不同的可供感知和面向意图的手部对象交互。我们在姿态估计和抓取生成任务上对 OakInk 进行了基准测试。此外，我们提出了 OakInk 的两个实际应用：基于意图的交互生成和切换生成。我们的数据集和源代码可在 https://github.com/lixiny/OakInk 上公开获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个名为OakInk的大规模多模态知识库，用于理解和研究手-物体交互。
AI.motivation: 现有数据库缺乏对物体可操作性（affordance）和人类交互行为的全面认知，阻碍了机器理解人类操作物体的能力。
AI.method: 收集1800个日常物品构建可操作性知识库Oak，基于其标注的可操作性记录100个物体的交互行为，并通过Tink方法将物理交互迁移至虚拟物体，形成包含5万条交互数据的Ink知识库。
AI.result: 在姿态估计和抓取生成任务中验证了OakInk的有效性，并展示了其在意图驱动交互生成和物体传递生成中的应用潜力。
AI.conclusion: OakInk为手-物体交互的视觉认知研究提供了丰富的基准数据和实用工具，推动了相关领域的发展。

search_text: OakInk: A Large-scale Knowledge Repository for Understanding Hand-Object Interaction OakInk：用于理解手-物体交互的大型知识库 Learning how humans manipulate objects requires machines to acquire knowledge from two perspectives: one for understanding object affordances and the other for learning human's interactions based on the affordances. Even though these two knowledge bases are crucial, we find that current databases lack a comprehensive awareness of them. In this work, we propose a multi-modal and rich-annotated knowledge repository, OakInk, for visual and cognitive understanding of hand-object interactions. We start to collect 1,800 common household objects and annotate their affordances to construct the first knowledge base: Oak. Given the affordance, we record rich human interactions with 100 selected objects in Oak. Finally, we transfer the interactions on the 100 recorded objects to their virtual counterparts through a novel method: Tink. The recorded and transferred hand-object interactions constitute the second knowledge base: Ink. As a result, OakInk contains 50,000 distinct affordance-aware and intent-oriented hand-object interactions. We benchmark OakInk on pose estimation and grasp generation tasks. Moreover, we propose two practical applications of OakInk: intent-based interaction generation and handover generation. Our datasets and source code are publicly available at https://github.com/lixiny/OakInk. 学习人类如何操纵物体需要机器从两个角度获取知识：一个是理解物体的可供性，另一个是根据可供性学习人类的交互。尽管这两个知识库至关重要，但我们发现当前的数据库缺乏对它们的全面认识。在这项工作中，我们提出了一个多模式和丰富注释的知识库 OakInk，用于手部物体交互的视觉和认知理解。我们开始收集 1,800 种常见的家居用品并注释它们的可供性，以构建第一个知识库：橡树。考虑到可供性，我们在 Oak 中记录了与 100 个选定物体的丰富的人类交互。最后，我们通过一种新颖的方法：Tink，将 100 个记录对象的交互转移到它们的虚拟对象上。记录和传输的手与物体的交互构成了第二个知识库：墨水。因此，OakInk 包含 50,000 个不同的可供感知和面向意图的手部对象交互。我们在姿态估计和抓取生成任务上对 OakInk 进行了基准测试。此外，我们提出了 OakInk 的两个实际应用：基于意图的交互生成和切换生成。我们的数据集和源代码可在 https://github.com/lixiny/OakInk 上公开获取。 本文提出一个名为OakInk的大规模多模态知识库，用于理解和研究手-物体交互。 Lixin Yang,Kailin Li,Xinyu Zhan,Fei Wu,Anran Xu,Liu Liu,Cewu Lu cs.CV

authors_text: Christopher Thomas,Yipeng Zhang,Shih-Fu Chang
title: Fine-Grained Visual Entailment
title_zh: 细粒度的视觉蕴涵
abstract: Visual entailment is a recently proposed multimodal reasoning task where the goal is to predict the logical relationship of a piece of text to an image. In this paper, we propose an extension of this task, where the goal is to predict the logical relationship of fine-grained knowledge elements within a piece of text to an image. Unlike prior work, our method is inherently explainable and makes logical predictions at different levels of granularity. Because we lack fine-grained labels to train our method, we propose a novel multi-instance learning approach which learns a fine-grained labeling using only sample-level supervision. We also impose novel semantic structural constraints which ensure that fine-grained predictions are internally semantically consistent. We evaluate our method on a new dataset of manually annotated knowledge elements and show that our method achieves 68.18\% accuracy at this challenging task while significantly outperforming several strong baselines. Finally, we present extensive qualitative results illustrating our method's predictions and the visual evidence our method relied on. Our code and annotated dataset can be found here: https://github.com/SkrighYZ/FGVE.
summary: Visual entailment is a recently proposed multimodal reasoning task where the goal is to predict the logical relationship of a piece of text to an image. In this paper, we propose an extension of this task, where the goal is to predict the logical relationship of fine-grained knowledge elements within a piece of text to an image. Unlike prior work, our method is inherently explainable and makes logical predictions at different levels of granularity. Because we lack fine-grained labels to train our method, we propose a novel multi-instance learning approach which learns a fine-grained labeling using only sample-level supervision. We also impose novel semantic structural constraints which ensure that fine-grained predictions are internally semantically consistent. We evaluate our method on a new dataset of manually annotated knowledge elements and show that our method achieves 68.18\% accuracy at this challenging task while significantly outperforming several strong baselines. Finally, we present extensive qualitative results illustrating our method's predictions and the visual evidence our method relied on. Our code and annotated dataset can be found here: https://github.com/SkrighYZ/FGVE.
abstract_zh: 视觉蕴涵是最近提出的多模态推理任务，其目标是预测一段文本与图像的逻辑关系。在本文中，我们提出了该任务的扩展，其目标是预测一段文本中细粒度知识元素与图像的逻辑关系。与之前的工作不同，我们的方法本质上是可解释的，并在不同的粒度级别上做出逻辑预测。由于我们缺乏细粒度标签来训练我们的方法，因此我们提出了一种新颖的多实例学习方法，该方法仅使用样本级监督来学习细粒度标签。我们还施加了新颖的语义结构约束，以确保细粒度预测在内部语义上保持一致。我们在手动注释知识元素的新数据集上评估我们的方法，并表明我们的方法在这项具有挑战性的任务中实现了 68.18% 的准确率，同时显着优于几个强大的基线。最后，我们提供了广泛的定性结果，说明了我们的方法的预测以及我们的方法所依赖的视觉证据。我们的代码和带注释的数据集可以在这里找到：https://github.com/SkrighYZ/FGVE。

AI.tldr: 本文提出细粒度视觉蕴含任务，旨在预测文本中细粒度知识元素与图像间的逻辑关系，并设计可解释的多层级推理方法。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉蕴含方法缺乏对文本细粒度知识的解析能力，且难以在无细粒度标注的情况下实现可解释的多层级逻辑推理。
AI.method: 提出多实例学习框架实现细粒度标注，结合语义结构约束确保预测一致性，通过层级化推理模型实现文本元素与图像的多粒度匹配。
AI.result: 在人工标注数据集上达到68.18%的准确率，显著优于多个强基线模型，并通过可视化案例验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为细粒度视觉推理提供了新范式，通过可解释的层级化预测和结构约束，在无细粒度标注条件下实现了有效推理，相关资源已开源。

authors_text: Efe Bozkir
title: Towards Everyday Virtual Reality through Eye Tracking
title_zh: 通过眼动追踪迈向日常虚拟现实
abstract: With developments in computer graphics, hardware technology, perception engineering, and human-computer interaction, virtual reality and virtual environments are becoming more integrated into our daily lives. Head-mounted displays, however, are still not used as frequently as other mobile devices such as smart phones and watches. With increased usage of this technology and the acclimation of humans to virtual application scenarios, it is possible that in the near future an everyday virtual reality paradigm will be realized. When considering the marriage of everyday virtual reality and head-mounted displays, eye tracking is an emerging technology that helps to assess human behaviors in a real time and non-intrusive way. Still, multiple aspects need to be researched before these technologies become widely available in daily life. Firstly, attention and cognition models in everyday scenarios should be thoroughly understood. Secondly, as eyes are related to visual biometrics, privacy preserving methodologies are necessary. Lastly, instead of studies or applications utilizing limited human participants with relatively homogeneous characteristics, protocols and use-cases for making such technology more accessible should be essential. In this work, taking the aforementioned points into account, a significant scientific push towards everyday virtual reality has been completed with three main research contributions.
summary: With developments in computer graphics, hardware technology, perception engineering, and human-computer interaction, virtual reality and virtual environments are becoming more integrated into our daily lives. Head-mounted displays, however, are still not used as frequently as other mobile devices such as smart phones and watches. With increased usage of this technology and the acclimation of humans to virtual application scenarios, it is possible that in the near future an everyday virtual reality paradigm will be realized. When considering the marriage of everyday virtual reality and head-mounted displays, eye tracking is an emerging technology that helps to assess human behaviors in a real time and non-intrusive way. Still, multiple aspects need to be researched before these technologies become widely available in daily life. Firstly, attention and cognition models in everyday scenarios should be thoroughly understood. Secondly, as eyes are related to visual biometrics, privacy preserving methodologies are necessary. Lastly, instead of studies or applications utilizing limited human participants with relatively homogeneous characteristics, protocols and use-cases for making such technology more accessible should be essential. In this work, taking the aforementioned points into account, a significant scientific push towards everyday virtual reality has been completed with three main research contributions.
abstract_zh: 随着计算机图形学、硬件技术、感知工程和人机交互的发展，虚拟现实和虚拟环境越来越融入我们的日常生活。然而，头戴式显示器的使用频率仍然不如智能手机和手表等其他移动设备。随着这项技术的使用增加以及人类对虚拟应用场景的适应，在不久的将来，日常虚拟现实范式可能会实现。在考虑日常虚拟现实和头戴式显示器的结合时，眼动追踪是一项新兴技术，有助于实时、非侵入性地评估人类行为。尽管如此，在这些技术广泛应用于日常生活之前，还需要对多个方面进行研究。首先，应透彻理解日常场景中的注意力和认知模型。其次，由于眼睛与视觉生物识别相关，因此隐私保护方法是必要的。最后，不是利用具有相对同质特征的有限人类参与者进行研究或应用，而是使此类技术更容易获得的协议和用例应该是至关重要的。在这项工作中，考虑到上述几点，通过三项主要研究贡献，完成了对日常虚拟现实的重大科学推动。

AI.tldr: 本文通过眼动追踪技术推动日常虚拟现实的实现，提出三个核心研究贡献。
AI.motivation: 尽管虚拟现实技术发展迅速，但头戴式显示器尚未像智能手机等设备那样普及，需通过眼动追踪等技术提升日常使用场景的可行性。
AI.method: 围绕日常虚拟现实的三大挑战，研究注意力与认知模型、隐私保护方法，并设计更普适的协议与用例。
AI.result: 完成三项关键研究：构建日常场景下的注意力模型、提出隐私保护方案、制定普适性技术协议。
AI.conclusion: 眼动追踪是实现日常虚拟现实的关键技术，未来需进一步解决认知模型、隐私安全与技术普及性问题。

ai_content.tldr: 本文通过眼动追踪技术推动日常虚拟现实的实现，提出三个核心研究贡献。

ai_content.method: 围绕日常虚拟现实的三大挑战，研究注意力与认知模型、隐私保护方法，并设计更普适的协议与用例。
ai_content.result: 完成三项关键研究：构建日常场景下的注意力模型、提出隐私保护方案、制定普适性技术协议。
ai_content.conclusion: 眼动追踪是实现日常虚拟现实的关键技术，未来需进一步解决认知模型、隐私安全与技术普及性问题。

search_text: Towards Everyday Virtual Reality through Eye Tracking 通过眼动追踪迈向日常虚拟现实 With developments in computer graphics, hardware technology, perception engineering, and human-computer interaction, virtual reality and virtual environments are becoming more integrated into our daily lives. Head-mounted displays, however, are still not used as frequently as other mobile devices such as smart phones and watches. With increased usage of this technology and the acclimation of humans to virtual application scenarios, it is possible that in the near future an everyday virtual reality paradigm will be realized. When considering the marriage of everyday virtual reality and head-mounted displays, eye tracking is an emerging technology that helps to assess human behaviors in a real time and non-intrusive way. Still, multiple aspects need to be researched before these technologies become widely available in daily life. Firstly, attention and cognition models in everyday scenarios should be thoroughly understood. Secondly, as eyes are related to visual biometrics, privacy preserving methodologies are necessary. Lastly, instead of studies or applications utilizing limited human participants with relatively homogeneous characteristics, protocols and use-cases for making such technology more accessible should be essential. In this work, taking the aforementioned points into account, a significant scientific push towards everyday virtual reality has been completed with three main research contributions. 随着计算机图形学、硬件技术、感知工程和人机交互的发展，虚拟现实和虚拟环境越来越融入我们的日常生活。然而，头戴式显示器的使用频率仍然不如智能手机和手表等其他移动设备。随着这项技术的使用增加以及人类对虚拟应用场景的适应，在不久的将来，日常虚拟现实范式可能会实现。在考虑日常虚拟现实和头戴式显示器的结合时，眼动追踪是一项新兴技术，有助于实时、非侵入性地评估人类行为。尽管如此，在这些技术广泛应用于日常生活之前，还需要对多个方面进行研究。首先，应透彻理解日常场景中的注意力和认知模型。其次，由于眼睛与视觉生物识别相关，因此隐私保护方法是必要的。最后，不是利用具有相对同质特征的有限人类参与者进行研究或应用，而是使此类技术更容易获得的协议和用例应该是至关重要的。在这项工作中，考虑到上述几点，通过三项主要研究贡献，完成了对日常虚拟现实的重大科学推动。 本文通过眼动追踪技术推动日常虚拟现实的实现，提出三个核心研究贡献。 Efe Bozkir cs.HC,cs.AI

authors_text: Ashwini Pokle,Jinjin Tian,Yuchen Li,Andrej Risteski
title: Contrasting the landscape of contrastive and non-contrastive learning
title_zh: 对比对比学习和非对比学习的情况
comment: Accepted for publication in the AISTATS 2022 conference (http://aistats.org/aistats2022/accepted.html)
comments: Accepted for publication in the AISTATS 2022 conference (http://aistats.org/aistats2022/accepted.html)
abstract: A lot of recent advances in unsupervised feature learning are based on designing features which are invariant under semantic data augmentations. A common way to do this is contrastive learning, which uses positive and negative samples. Some recent works however have shown promising results for non-contrastive learning, which does not require negative samples. However, the non-contrastive losses have obvious "collapsed" minima, in which the encoders output a constant feature embedding, independent of the input. A folk conjecture is that so long as these collapsed solutions are avoided, the produced feature representations should be good. In our paper, we cast doubt on this story: we show through theoretical results and controlled experiments that even on simple data models, non-contrastive losses have a preponderance of non-collapsed bad minima. Moreover, we show that the training process does not avoid these minima.
summary: A lot of recent advances in unsupervised feature learning are based on designing features which are invariant under semantic data augmentations. A common way to do this is contrastive learning, which uses positive and negative samples. Some recent works however have shown promising results for non-contrastive learning, which does not require negative samples. However, the non-contrastive losses have obvious "collapsed" minima, in which the encoders output a constant feature embedding, independent of the input. A folk conjecture is that so long as these collapsed solutions are avoided, the produced feature representations should be good. In our paper, we cast doubt on this story: we show through theoretical results and controlled experiments that even on simple data models, non-contrastive losses have a preponderance of non-collapsed bad minima. Moreover, we show that the training process does not avoid these minima.
abstract_zh: 无监督特征学习的许多最新进展都是基于设计在语义数据增强下不变的特征。一种常见的方法是对比学习，它使用正样本和负样本。然而，最近的一些工作已经显示出非对比学习的有希望的结果，不需要负样本。然而，非对比损失具有明显的“崩溃”最小值，其中编码器输出独立于输入的恒定特征嵌入。一个民间猜想是，只要避免这些崩溃的解决方案，生成的特征表示应该是好的。在我们的论文中，我们对这个故事提出了质疑：我们通过理论结果和对照实验表明，即使在简单的数据模型上，非对比损失也比非崩溃的坏最小值占优势。此外，我们表明训练过程并没有避免这些最小值。

AI.tldr: 本文对比分析了对比学习与非对比学习在无监督特征学习中的表现，重点探讨非对比学习的潜在缺陷。
AI.motivation: 尽管非对比学习无需负样本且表现良好，但其损失函数存在'崩溃'极小值问题，而学界普遍认为避免崩溃解即可获得有效特征，本文旨在验证这一假设。
AI.method: 通过理论分析与受控实验，研究非对比损失函数在简单数据模型下的优化景观，并观察训练过程是否能避开不良极小值。
AI.result: 实验表明非对比损失存在大量非崩溃的坏极小值，且训练过程无法有效避免这些次优解，导致特征表示质量下降。
AI.conclusion: 非对比学习的优化景观存在本质缺陷，仅避免崩溃解不足以保证特征质量，对比学习在稳定性上更具优势。

authors_text: Chang Liu,Xiaoyan Qian,Xiaojuan Qi,Edmund Y. Lam,Siew-Chong Tan,Ngai Wong
title: MAP-Gen: An Automated 3D-Box Annotation Flow with Multimodal Attention Point Generator
title_zh: MAP-Gen：具有多模态注意点生成器的自动化 3D-Box 注释流程
abstract: Manually annotating 3D point clouds is laborious and costly, limiting the training data preparation for deep learning in real-world object detection. While a few previous studies tried to automatically generate 3D bounding boxes from weak labels such as 2D boxes, the quality is sub-optimal compared to human annotators. This work proposes a novel autolabeler, called multimodal attention point generator (MAP-Gen), that generates high-quality 3D labels from weak 2D boxes. It leverages dense image information to tackle the sparsity issue of 3D point clouds, thus improving label quality. For each 2D pixel, MAP-Gen predicts its corresponding 3D coordinates by referencing context points based on their 2D semantic or geometric relationships. The generated 3D points densify the original sparse point clouds, followed by an encoder to regress 3D bounding boxes. Using MAP-Gen, object detection networks that are weakly supervised by 2D boxes can achieve 94~99% performance of those fully supervised by 3D annotations. It is hopeful this newly proposed MAP-Gen autolabeling flow can shed new light on utilizing multimodal information for enriching sparse point clouds.
summary: Manually annotating 3D point clouds is laborious and costly, limiting the training data preparation for deep learning in real-world object detection. While a few previous studies tried to automatically generate 3D bounding boxes from weak labels such as 2D boxes, the quality is sub-optimal compared to human annotators. This work proposes a novel autolabeler, called multimodal attention point generator (MAP-Gen), that generates high-quality 3D labels from weak 2D boxes. It leverages dense image information to tackle the sparsity issue of 3D point clouds, thus improving label quality. For each 2D pixel, MAP-Gen predicts its corresponding 3D coordinates by referencing context points based on their 2D semantic or geometric relationships. The generated 3D points densify the original sparse point clouds, followed by an encoder to regress 3D bounding boxes. Using MAP-Gen, object detection networks that are weakly supervised by 2D boxes can achieve 94~99% performance of those fully supervised by 3D annotations. It is hopeful this newly proposed MAP-Gen autolabeling flow can shed new light on utilizing multimodal information for enriching sparse point clouds.
abstract_zh: 手动注释 3D 点云既费力又昂贵，限制了现实世界对象检测中深度学习的训练数据准备。虽然之前的一些研究尝试从 2D 框等弱标签自动生成 3D 边界框，但与人类注释者相比，其质量并不理想。这项工作提出了一种新颖的自动标记器，称为多模态注意点生成器 (MAP-Gen)，它可以从弱 2D 框生成高质量的 3D 标签。它利用密集的图像信息来解决 3D 点云的稀疏问题，从而提高标签质量。对于每个 2D 像素，MAP-Gen 通过基于其 2D 语义或几何关系引用上下文点来预测其相应的 3D 坐标。生成的 3D 点会致密原始稀疏点云，然后使用编码器来回归 3D 边界框。使用 MAP-Gen，由 2D 框弱监督的对象检测网络可以实现由 3D 注释完全监督的对象检测网络的 94~99% 的性能。希望这个新提出的 MAP-Gen 自动标记流程能够为利用多模态信息丰富稀疏点云提供新的思路。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为MAP-Gen的自动化3D框标注方法，通过多模态注意力点生成器从2D框生成高质量3D标注。
AI.motivation: 手动标注3D点云耗时耗力且成本高，现有基于弱标签（如2D框）生成3D框的方法质量不足，难以满足深度学习训练需求。
AI.method: 利用密集图像信息缓解3D点云稀疏性问题，通过2D像素的上下文点（基于语义或几何关系）预测对应3D坐标，生成密集点云后通过编码器回归3D框。
AI.result: 使用MAP-Gen生成的弱监督检测网络性能达到全监督方法的94~99%，显著提升标注效率与质量。
AI.conclusion: MAP-Gen通过多模态信息融合有效增强稀疏点云，为自动驾驶、机器人等领域的3D标注提供新思路。

authors_text: Sam Harper,Shivoh Nandakumar,Daniel Mitchell,Jamie Blanche,Theodore Lim,David Flynn
title: Addressing Non-Intervention Challenges via Resilient Robotics utilizing a Digital Twin
title_zh: 利用数字孪生通过弹性机器人解决非干预挑战
comment: 6 pages, 7 figures, preprint conference submission for ICRA 2023
comments: 6 pages, 7 figures, preprint conference submission for ICRA 2023
abstract: Multi-robot systems face challenges in reducing human interventions as they are often deployed in dangerous environments. It is therefore necessary to include a methodology to assess robot failure rates to reduce the requirement for costly human intervention. A solution to this problem includes robots with the ability to work together to ensure mission resilience. To prevent this intervention, robots should be able to work together to ensure mission resilience. However, robotic platforms generally lack built-in interconnectivity with other platforms from different vendors. This work aims to tackle this issue by enabling the functionality through a bidirectional digital twin. The twin enables the human operator to transmit and receive information to and from the multi-robot fleet. This digital twin considers mission resilience and autonomous and human-led decision making to enable the resilience of a multi-robot fleet. This creates the cooperation, corroboration, and collaboration of diverse robots to leverage the capability of robots and support recovery of a failed robot.

This digital twin considers mission resilience and autonomous and human-led decision making to enable the resilience of a multi-robot fleet. This creates the cooperation, corroboration, and collaboration of diverse robots to leverage the capability of robots and support recovery of a failed robot.
abstract_zh: 多机器人系统在减少人为干预方面面临挑战，因为它们经常部署在危险的环境中。因此，有必要采用一种方法来评估机器人故障率，以减少昂贵的人工干预的需求。该问题的解决方案包括具有协同工作能力的机器人，以确保任务弹性。为了防止这种干预，机器人应该能够协同工作以确保任务弹性。然而，机器人平台通常缺乏与不同供应商的其他平台的内置互连性。这项工作旨在通过双向数字孪生启用该功能来解决这个问题。双胞胎使人类操作员能够向多机器人车队传输信息并从多机器人车队接收信息。该数字孪生考虑了任务弹性以及自主和人类主导的决策，以实现多机器人车队的弹性。这创造了不同机器人的合作、证实和协作，以利用机器人的能力并支持故障机器人的恢复。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过数字孪生技术解决多机器人系统在危险环境中减少人工干预的挑战，确保任务弹性。
AI.motivation: 多机器人系统常部署于危险环境，人工干预成本高昂且效率低下，而现有机器人平台缺乏跨厂商互连协作能力，导致任务弹性不足。
AI.method: 构建双向数字孪生系统，实现人机双向信息交互，并融合任务弹性评估、自主决策与人工干预机制，促进异构机器人协作。
AI.result: 成功实现多机器人机队的协同合作与故障恢复，提升系统整体弹性和自主运行能力，降低对人工干预的依赖。
AI.conclusion: 数字孪生技术有效解决了跨平台机器人协作与任务弹性问题，为复杂环境下的自主机器人系统提供了可行方案。

authors_text: Zhuohang Li,Jiaxin Zhang,Luyang Liu,Jian Liu
title: Auditing Privacy Defenses in Federated Learning via Generative Gradient Leakage
title_zh: 通过生成梯度泄漏审计联邦学习中的隐私防御
abstract: Federated Learning (FL) framework brings privacy benefits to distributed learning systems by allowing multiple clients to participate in a learning task under the coordination of a central server without exchanging their private data. However, recent studies have revealed that private information can still be leaked through shared gradient information. To further protect user's privacy, several defense mechanisms have been proposed to prevent privacy leakage via gradient information degradation methods, such as using additive noise or gradient compression before sharing it with the server. In this work, we validate that the private training data can still be leaked under certain defense settings with a new type of leakage, i.e., Generative Gradient Leakage (GGL). Unlike existing methods that only rely on gradient information to reconstruct data, our method leverages the latent space of generative adversarial networks (GAN) learned from public image datasets as a prior to compensate for the informational loss during gradient degradation. To address the nonlinearity caused by the gradient operator and the GAN model, we explore various gradient-free optimization methods (e.g., evolution strategies and Bayesian optimization) and empirically show their superiority in reconstructing high-quality images from gradients compared to gradient-based optimizers. We hope the proposed method can serve as a tool for empirically measuring the amount of privacy leakage to facilitate the design of more robust defense mechanisms.
summary: Federated Learning (FL) framework brings privacy benefits to distributed learning systems by allowing multiple clients to participate in a learning task under the coordination of a central server without exchanging their private data. However, recent studies have revealed that private information can still be leaked through shared gradient information. To further protect user's privacy, several defense mechanisms have been proposed to prevent privacy leakage via gradient information degradation methods, such as using additive noise or gradient compression before sharing it with the server. In this work, we validate that the private training data can still be leaked under certain defense settings with a new type of leakage, i.e., Generative Gradient Leakage (GGL). Unlike existing methods that only rely on gradient information to reconstruct data, our method leverages the latent space of generative adversarial networks (GAN) learned from public image datasets as a prior to compensate for the informational loss during gradient degradation. To address the nonlinearity caused by the gradient operator and the GAN model, we explore various gradient-free optimization methods (e.g., evolution strategies and Bayesian optimization) and empirically show their superiority in reconstructing high-quality images from gradients compared to gradient-based optimizers. We hope the proposed method can serve as a tool for empirically measuring the amount of privacy leakage to facilitate the design of more robust defense mechanisms.
abstract_zh: 联邦学习（FL）框架允许多个客户端在中央服务器的协调下参与学习任务，而无需交换其私有数据，从而为分布式学习系统带来了隐私优势。然而，最近的研究表明，私人信息仍然可以通过共享梯度信息泄露。为了进一步保护用户的隐私，已经提出了几种防御机制，通过梯度信息降级方法来防止隐私泄漏，例如在与服务器共享之前使用加性噪声或梯度压缩。在这项工作中，我们验证了在某些防御设置下仍然可以通过一种新型泄漏（即生成梯度泄漏（GGL））来泄漏私人训练数据。与仅依赖梯度信息来重建数据的现有方法不同，我们的方法利用从公共图像数据集中学习的生成对抗网络（GAN）的潜在空间作为先验来补偿梯度退化期间的信息损失。为了解决梯度算子和 GAN 模型引起的非线性，我们探索了各种无梯度优化方法（例如进化策略和贝叶斯优化），并凭经验证明了与基于梯度的优化器相比，它们在从梯度重建高质量图像方面的优越性。我们希望所提出的方法可以作为经验测量隐私泄露量的工具，以促进更强大的防御机制的设计。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新型隐私泄露攻击方法——生成梯度泄露（GGL），用于验证联邦学习中现有梯度隐私防御机制的有效性。
AI.motivation: 尽管联邦学习通过梯度共享保护隐私，但现有防御机制（如梯度压缩/加噪）仍可能存在信息泄露风险，需新型攻击手段验证其安全性。
AI.method: 利用GAN的潜在空间作为先验知识补偿梯度降解信息损失，结合进化策略与贝叶斯优化等无梯度优化方法重建高保真图像。
AI.result: 实验验证了GGL攻击在多种防御设置下可成功泄露私有训练数据，且无梯度优化方法在图像重建质量上优于传统梯度优化器。
AI.conclusion: GGL方法可作为评估联邦学习隐私防御强度的工具，为设计更鲁棒的防御机制提供实证依据。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种新型隐私泄露攻击方法——生成梯度泄露（GGL），用于验证联邦学习中现有梯度隐私防御机制的有效性。

authors_text: Shijie Li,Thomas Ach,Guido Gerig
title: Improved Counting and Localization from Density Maps for Object Detection in 2D and 3D Microscopy Imaging
title_zh: 改进密度图的计数和定位，用于 2D 和 3D 显微成像中的物体检测
abstract: Object counting and localization are key steps for quantitative analysis in large-scale microscopy applications. This procedure becomes challenging when target objects are overlapping, are densely clustered, and/or present fuzzy boundaries. Previous methods producing density maps based on deep learning have reached a high level of accuracy for object counting by assuming that object counting is equivalent to the integration of the density map. However, this model fails when objects show significant overlap regarding accurate localization. We propose an alternative method to count and localize objects from the density map to overcome this limitation. Our procedure includes the following three key aspects: 1) Proposing a new counting method based on the statistical properties of the density map, 2) optimizing the counting results for those objects which are well-detected based on the proposed counting method, and 3) improving localization of poorly detected objects using the proposed counting method as prior information. Validation includes processing of microscopy data with known ground truth and comparison with other models that use conventional processing of the density map. Our results show improved performance in counting and localization of objects in 2D and 3D microscopy data. Furthermore, the proposed method is generic, considering various applications that rely on the density map approach. Our code will be released post-review.

Validation includes processing of microscopy data with known ground truth and comparison with other models that use conventional processing of the density map. Our results show improved performance in counting and localization of objects in 2D and 3D microscopy data. Furthermore, the proposed method is generic, considering various applications that rely on the density map approach. Our code will be released post-review.
abstract_zh: 物体计数和定位是大规模显微镜应用中定量分析的关键步骤。当目标对象重叠、密集聚集和/或呈现模糊边界时，此过程变得具有挑战性。以前基于深度学习生成密度图的方法通过假设对象计数相当于密度图的积分，已经达到了很高的对象计数精度。然而，当物体在准确定位方面表现出明显的重叠时，该模型就会失败。我们提出了一种替代方法来对密度图中的对象进行计数和定位，以克服这一限制。我们的过程包括以下三个关键方面：1）基于密度图的统计特性提出一种新的计数方法，2）根据所提出的计数方法优化那些检测良好的对象的计数结果，3）使用所提出的计数方法作为先验信息来改进检测不良的对象的定位。验证包括处理具有已知地面事实的显微镜数据以及与使用传统密度图处理的其他模型进行比较。我们的结果表明，2D 和 3D 显微镜数据中对象的计数和定位性能得到了提高。此外，考虑到依赖密度图方法的各种应用，所提出的方法是通用的。我们的代码将在审核后发布。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种改进的密度图方法，用于提升2D和3D显微成像中目标物体的计数和定位精度。
AI.motivation: 现有基于密度图的深度学习方法在物体高度重叠或密集时无法准确定位，需改进计数与定位策略。
AI.method: 提出三步方法：1）基于密度图统计特性设计新计数模型；2）优化已检测物体的计数结果；3）利用计数结果作为先验信息提升弱检测物体的定位。
AI.result: 在具有真实标签的显微数据集上验证，相较传统密度图方法，计数和定位性能显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通用性强，适用于依赖密度图的多种场景，代码将在审稿后公开。

search_text: Improved Counting and Localization from Density Maps for Object Detection in 2D and 3D Microscopy Imaging 改进密度图的计数和定位，用于 2D 和 3D 显微成像中的物体检测 Object counting and localization are key steps for quantitative analysis in large-scale microscopy applications. This procedure becomes challenging when target objects are overlapping, are densely clustered, and/or present fuzzy boundaries. Previous methods producing density maps based on deep learning have reached a high level of accuracy for object counting by assuming that object counting is equivalent to the integration of the density map. However, this model fails when objects show significant overlap regarding accurate localization. We propose an alternative method to count and localize objects from the density map to overcome this limitation. Our procedure includes the following three key aspects: 1) Proposing a new counting method based on the statistical properties of the density map, 2) optimizing the counting results for those objects which are well-detected based on the proposed counting method, and 3) improving localization of poorly detected objects using the proposed counting method as prior information. Validation includes processing of microscopy data with known ground truth and comparison with other models that use conventional processing of the density map. Our results show improved performance in counting and localization of objects in 2D and 3D microscopy data. Furthermore, the proposed method is generic, considering various applications that rely on the density map approach. Our code will be released post-review. 物体计数和定位是大规模显微镜应用中定量分析的关键步骤。当目标对象重叠、密集聚集和/或呈现模糊边界时，此过程变得具有挑战性。以前基于深度学习生成密度图的方法通过假设对象计数相当于密度图的积分，已经达到了很高的对象计数精度。然而，当物体在准确定位方面表现出明显的重叠时，该模型就会失败。我们提出了一种替代方法来对密度图中的对象进行计数和定位，以克服这一限制。我们的过程包括以下三个关键方面：1）基于密度图的统计特性提出一种新的计数方法，2）根据所提出的计数方法优化那些检测良好的对象的计数结果，3）使用所提出的计数方法作为先验信息来改进检测不良的对象的定位。验证包括处理具有已知地面事实的显微镜数据以及与使用传统密度图处理的其他模型进行比较。我们的结果表明，2D 和 3D 显微镜数据中对象的计数和定位性能得到了提高。此外，考虑到依赖密度图方法的各种应用，所提出的方法是通用的。我们的代码将在审核后发布。 本文提出了一种改进的密度图方法，用于提升2D和3D显微成像中目标物体的计数和定位精度。 Shijie Li,Thomas Ach,Guido Gerig cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Gokul P,Ujjwal Verma
title: Texture based Prototypical Network for Few-Shot Semantic Segmentation of Forest Cover: Generalizing for Different Geographical Regions
title_zh: 基于纹理的森林覆盖少镜头语义分割原型网络：针对不同地理区域的推广
abstract: Forest plays a vital role in reducing greenhouse gas emissions and mitigating climate change besides maintaining the world's biodiversity. The existing satellite-based forest monitoring system utilizes supervised learning approaches that are limited to a particular region and depend on manually annotated data to identify forest. This work envisages forest identification as a few-shot semantic segmentation task to achieve generalization across different geographical regions. The proposed few-shot segmentation approach incorporates a texture attention module in the prototypical network to highlight the texture features of the forest. Indeed, the forest exhibits a characteristic texture different from other classes, such as road, water, etc. In this work, the proposed approach is trained for identifying tropical forests of South Asia and adapted to determine the temperate forest of Central Europe with the help of a few (one image for 1-shot) manually annotated support images of the temperate forest. An IoU of 0.62 for forest class (1-way 1-shot) was obtained using the proposed method, which is significantly higher (0.46 for PANet) than the existing few-shot semantic segmentation approach. This result demonstrates that the proposed approach can generalize across geographical regions for forest identification, creating an opportunity to develop a global forest cover identification tool.

The proposed few-shot segmentation approach incorporates a texture attention module in the prototypical network to highlight the texture features of the forest. Indeed, the forest exhibits a characteristic texture different from other classes, such as road, water, etc. In this work, the proposed approach is trained for identifying tropical forests of South Asia and adapted to determine the temperate forest of Central Europe with the help of a few (one image for 1-shot) manually annotated support images of the temperate forest. An IoU of 0.62 for forest class (1-way 1-shot) was obtained using the proposed method, which is significantly higher (0.46 for PANet) than the existing few-shot semantic segmentation approach. This result demonstrates that the proposed approach can generalize across geographical regions for forest identification, creating an opportunity to develop a global forest cover identification tool.
abstract_zh: 除了维持世界生物多样性之外，森林在减少温室气体排放和减缓气候变化方面也发挥着至关重要的作用。现有的基于卫星的森林监测系统采用仅限于特定区域的监督学习方法，并依赖于手动注释的数据来识别森林。这项工作将森林识别设想为几次语义分割任务，以实现跨不同地理区域的泛化。所提出的少镜头分割方法在原型网络中结合了纹理注意模块，以突出森林的纹理特征。事实上，森林表现出与其他类别（例如道路、水等）不同的特征纹理。在这项工作中，所提出的方法经过训练，用于识别南亚的热带森林，并在一些（一张图像用于 1 个镜头）手动注释的温带森林支持图像的帮助下，适应确定中欧的温带森林。使用所提出的方法获得森林类（1-way 1-shot）的 IoU 为 0.62，明显高于现有的少样本语义分割方法（PANet 为 0.46）。这一结果表明，所提出的方法可以推广到跨地理区域的森林识别，为开发全球森林覆盖识别工具创造了机会。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于纹理的原型网络，用于解决森林覆盖的少样本语义分割问题，以实现不同地理区域的泛化。
AI.motivation: 现有卫星森林监测系统依赖特定区域的监督学习方法和人工标注数据，难以跨区域泛化。森林具有独特的纹理特征，可作为跨区域识别的关键依据。
AI.method: 在原型网络中引入纹理注意力模块，强化森林纹理特征；在热带森林数据上预训练模型，并通过少量（1张标注图）温带森林支持图像进行微调。
AI.result: 在温带森林的1-way 1-shot任务中，森林类别IoU达到0.62，显著优于现有方法PANet的0.46。
AI.conclusion: 该方法验证了纹理特征驱动的少样本分割模型在跨地理区域森林识别中的有效性，为构建全球森林覆盖识别工具提供了可能。

authors_text: Luca Barbaglia,Sergio Consoli,Sebastiano Manzan
title: Forecasting with Economic News
title_zh: 经济新闻预测
comment: 46 pages, 11 figures, to be published in Journal of Business & Economic Statistics
comments: 46 pages, 11 figures, to be published in Journal of Business & Economic Statistics
abstract: The goal of this paper is to evaluate the informational content of sentiment extracted from news articles about the state of the economy. We propose a fine-grained aspect-based sentiment analysis that has two main characteristics: 1) we consider only the text in the article that is semantically dependent on a term of interest (aspect-based) and, 2) assign a sentiment score to each word based on a dictionary that we develop for applications in economics and finance (fine-grained). Our data set includes six large US newspapers, for a total of over 6.6 million articles and 4.2 billion words. Our findings suggest that several measures of economic sentiment track closely business cycle fluctuations and that they are relevant predictors for four major macroeconomic variables. We find that there are significant improvements in forecasting when sentiment is considered along with macroeconomic factors. In addition, we also find that sentiment matters to explains the tails of the probability distribution across several macroeconomic variables.
summary: The goal of this paper is to evaluate the informational content of sentiment extracted from news articles about the state of the economy. We propose a fine-grained aspect-based sentiment analysis that has two main characteristics: 1) we consider only the text in the article that is semantically dependent on a term of interest (aspect-based) and, 2) assign a sentiment score to each word based on a dictionary that we develop for applications in economics and finance (fine-grained). Our data set includes six large US newspapers, for a total of over 6.6 million articles and 4.2 billion words. Our findings suggest that several measures of economic sentiment track closely business cycle fluctuations and that they are relevant predictors for four major macroeconomic variables. We find that there are significant improvements in forecasting when sentiment is considered along with macroeconomic factors. In addition, we also find that sentiment matters to explains the tails of the probability distribution across several macroeconomic variables.
abstract_zh: 本文的目标是评估从有关经济状况的新闻文章中提取的情绪的信息内容。我们提出了一种基于细粒度方面的情感分析，它具有两个主要特征：1）我们仅考虑文章中在语义上依赖于感兴趣术语的文本（基于方面），2）根据我们为经济和金融应用开发的字典为每个单词分配情感分数（细粒度）。我们的数据集包括美国六家大型报纸，总共超过 660 万篇文章和 42 亿字。我们的研究结果表明，几种经济情绪指标密切跟踪商业周期波动，并且它们是四个主要宏观经济变量的相关预测因子。我们发现，当将情绪与宏观经济因素一起考虑时，预测会有显着改善。此外，我们还发现情绪对于解释几个宏观经济变量的概率分布的尾部很重要。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在评估从经济新闻中提取的情感信息内容，提出基于细粒度方面的情感分析方法以改进宏观经济预测。
AI.motivation: 传统宏观经济预测依赖统计指标，但忽视了新闻文本中隐含的情感信息。本文希望通过细粒度情感分析挖掘新闻中的经济信号，提升预测准确性。
AI.method: 构建面向经济学的细粒度情感词典，基于语义依赖关系提取新闻中与经济术语相关的文本片段，对单字进行情感打分，并结合6.6百万篇美国新闻数据验证方法有效性。
AI.result: 发现经济情感指标能有效跟踪经济周期波动，与四个宏观经济变量显著相关；结合情感指标可提升预测精度，且能解释多个宏观经济变量的概率分布尾部特征。
AI.conclusion: 细粒度经济新闻情感分析能有效补充传统宏观指标，为预测模型提供新维度，尤其在极端经济事件预测中具有潜在价值。
