search_text: Forecasting with Economic News 经济新闻预测 The goal of this paper is to evaluate the informational content of sentiment extracted from news articles about the state of the economy. We propose a fine-grained aspect-based sentiment analysis that has two main characteristics: 1) we consider only the text in the article that is semantically dependent on a term of interest (aspect-based) and, 2) assign a sentiment score to each word based on a dictionary that we develop for applications in economics and finance (fine-grained). Our data set includes six large US newspapers, for a total of over 6.6 million articles and 4.2 billion words. Our findings suggest that several measures of economic sentiment track closely business cycle fluctuations and that they are relevant predictors for four major macroeconomic variables. We find that there are significant improvements in forecasting when sentiment is considered along with macroeconomic factors. In addition, we also find that sentiment matters to explains the tails of the probability distribution across several macroeconomic variables. 本文的目标是评估从有关经济状况的新闻文章中提取的情绪的信息内容。我们提出了一种基于细粒度方面的情感分析，它具有两个主要特征：1）我们仅考虑文章中在语义上依赖于感兴趣术语的文本（基于方面），2）根据我们为经济和金融应用开发的字典为每个单词分配情感分数（细粒度）。我们的数据集包括美国六家大型报纸，总共超过 660 万篇文章和 42 亿字。我们的研究结果表明，几种经济情绪指标密切跟踪商业周期波动，并且它们是四个主要宏观经济变量的相关预测因子。我们发现，当将情绪与宏观经济因素一起考虑时，预测会有显着改善。此外，我们还发现情绪对于解释几个宏观经济变量的概率分布的尾部很重要。 本文旨在评估从经济新闻中提取的情感信息内容，提出基于细粒度方面的情感分析方法以改进宏观经济预测。 Luca Barbaglia,Sergio Consoli,Sebastiano Manzan cs.CE,cs.AI,cs.CL,stat.AP

authors_text: Jialu Li,Hao Tan,Mohit Bansal
title: EnvEdit: Environment Editing for Vision-and-Language Navigation
title_zh: EnvEdit：视觉和语言导航的环境编辑
abstract: In Vision-and-Language Navigation (VLN), an agent needs to navigate through the environment based on natural language instructions. Due to limited available data for agent training and finite diversity in navigation environments, it is challenging for the agent to generalize to new, unseen environments. To address this problem, we propose EnvEdit, a data augmentation method that creates new environments by editing existing environments, which are used to train a more generalizable agent. Our augmented environments can differ from the seen environments in three diverse aspects: style, object appearance, and object classes. Training on these edit-augmented environments prevents the agent from overfitting to existing environments and helps generalize better to new, unseen environments. Empirically, on both the Room-to-Room and the multi-lingual Room-Across-Room datasets, we show that our proposed EnvEdit method gets significant improvements in all metrics on both pre-trained and non-pre-trained VLN agents, and achieves the new state-of-the-art on the test leaderboard. We further ensemble the VLN agents augmented on different edited environments and show that these edit methods are complementary. Code and data are available at https://github.com/jialuli-luka/EnvEdit
summary: In Vision-and-Language Navigation (VLN), an agent needs to navigate through the environment based on natural language instructions. Due to limited available data for agent training and finite diversity in navigation environments, it is challenging for the agent to generalize to new, unseen environments. To address this problem, we propose EnvEdit, a data augmentation method that creates new environments by editing existing environments, which are used to train a more generalizable agent. Our augmented environments can differ from the seen environments in three diverse aspects: style, object appearance, and object classes. Training on these edit-augmented environments prevents the agent from overfitting to existing environments and helps generalize better to new, unseen environments. Empirically, on both the Room-to-Room and the multi-lingual Room-Across-Room datasets, we show that our proposed EnvEdit method gets significant improvements in all metrics on both pre-trained and non-pre-trained VLN agents, and achieves the new state-of-the-art on the test leaderboard. We further ensemble the VLN agents augmented on different edited environments and show that these edit methods are complementary. Code and data are available at https://github.com/jialuli-luka/EnvEdit
abstract_zh: 在视觉和语言导航（VLN）中，代理需要根据自然语言指令在环境中进行导航。由于智能体训练的可用数据有限以及导航环境的多样性有限，智能体很难推广到新的、看不见的环境。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了 EnvEdit，一种数据增强方法，通过编辑现有环境来创建新环境，用于训练更通用的代理。我们的增强环境在三个方面与所见环境不同：风格、对象外观和对象类别。在这些编辑增强环境上进行训练可以防止代理过度适应现有环境，并有助于更好地推广到新的、未见过的环境。根据经验，在 Room-to-Room 和多语言 Room-Across-Room 数据集上，我们表明，我们提出的 EnvEdit 方法在预训练和非预训练 VLN 代理的所有指标上都取得了显着改进，并在测试排行榜上达到了新的最先进水平。我们进一步集成了在不同编辑环境中增强的 VLN 代理，并表明这些编辑方法是互补的。代码和数据可在 https://github.com/jialuli-luka/EnvEdit 获取

AI.tldr: 本文提出EnvEdit方法，通过编辑现有环境生成多样化数据，提升视觉与语言导航（VLN）代理在新环境中的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有VLN代理因训练数据有限且环境多样性不足，难以泛化到新环境。需通过数据增强方法扩展环境多样性以提升性能。
AI.method: EnvEdit通过修改环境风格、物体外观和物体类别三方面编辑现有环境，生成增强数据用于训练，防止过拟合并提升泛化能力。
AI.result: 在Room-to-Room和多语言Room-Across-Room数据集上，EnvEdit显著提升预训练和非预训练代理的各项指标，并刷新测试榜单纪录。
AI.conclusion: EnvEdit通过环境编辑有效增强数据多样性，不同编辑方法互补，组合使用可进一步提升VLN代理的泛化性能。

authors_text: Takaaki Saeki,Kentaro Tachibana,Ryuichi Yamamoto
title: DRSpeech: Degradation-Robust Text-to-Speech Synthesis with Frame-Level and Utterance-Level Acoustic Representation Learning
title_zh: DRSpeech：具有帧级和话语级声学表示学习的降级鲁棒文本到语音合成
abstract: Most text-to-speech (TTS) methods use high-quality speech corpora recorded in a well-designed environment, incurring a high cost for data collection. To solve this problem, existing noise-robust TTS methods are intended to use noisy speech corpora as training data. However, they only address either time-invariant or time-variant noises. We propose a degradation-robust TTS method, which can be trained on speech corpora that contain both additive noises and environmental distortions. It jointly represents the time-variant additive noises with a frame-level encoder and the time-invariant environmental distortions with an utterance-level encoder. We also propose a regularization method to attain clean environmental embedding that is disentangled from the utterance-dependent information such as linguistic contents and speaker characteristics. Evaluation results show that our method achieved significantly higher-quality synthetic speech than previous methods in the condition including both additive noise and reverberation.
summary: Most text-to-speech (TTS) methods use high-quality speech corpora recorded in a well-designed environment, incurring a high cost for data collection. To solve this problem, existing noise-robust TTS methods are intended to use noisy speech corpora as training data. However, they only address either time-invariant or time-variant noises. We propose a degradation-robust TTS method, which can be trained on speech corpora that contain both additive noises and environmental distortions. It jointly represents the time-variant additive noises with a frame-level encoder and the time-invariant environmental distortions with an utterance-level encoder. We also propose a regularization method to attain clean environmental embedding that is disentangled from the utterance-dependent information such as linguistic contents and speaker characteristics. Evaluation results show that our method achieved significantly higher-quality synthetic speech than previous methods in the condition including both additive noise and reverberation.
abstract_zh: 大多数文本转语音（TTS）方法使用在精心设计的环境中记录的高质量语音语料库，从而导致数据收集成本很高。为了解决这个问题，现有的抗噪声 TTS 方法旨在使用噪声语音语料库作为训练数据。然而，它们只能解决时不变或时变噪声。我们提出了一种鲁棒退化 TTS 方法，该方法可以在包含加性噪声和环境失真的语音语料库上进行训练。它用帧级编码器联合表示时变加性噪声，用话语级编码器联合表示时不变环境失真。我们还提出了一种正则化方法来实现干净的环境嵌入，该方法与依赖于话语的信息（例如语言内容和说话者特征）分离。评估结果表明，在包含加性噪声和混响的情况下，我们的方法比以前的方法获得了明显更高质量的合成语音。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种鲁棒的文本到语音合成方法DRSpeech，能够处理包含加性噪声和环境失真的语音数据。
AI.motivation: 现有TTS方法依赖高质量语料库，且抗噪方法仅能处理单一类型噪声，无法应对实际场景中同时存在的多种退化问题。
AI.method: 联合使用帧级编码器建模时变加性噪声与话语级编码器建模时不变环境失真，并通过正则化方法分离环境嵌入与语音内容信息。
AI.result: 在混合噪声（加性噪声+混响）条件下，合成语音质量显著优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过多层级表征学习有效提升了TTS系统在复杂退化环境下的语音合成质量。

Evaluation results show that our method achieved significantly higher-quality synthetic speech than previous methods in the condition including both additive noise and reverberation. 大多数文本转语音（TTS）方法使用在精心设计的环境中记录的高质量语音语料库，从而导致数据收集成本很高。为了解决这个问题，现有的抗噪声 TTS 方法旨在使用噪声语音语料库作为训练数据。然而，它们只能解决时不变或时变噪声。我们提出了一种鲁棒退化 TTS 方法，该方法可以在包含加性噪声和环境失真的语音语料库上进行训练。它用帧级编码器联合表示时变加性噪声，用话语级编码器联合表示时不变环境失真。我们还提出了一种正则化方法来实现干净的环境嵌入，该方法与依赖于话语的信息（例如语言内容和说话者特征）分离。评估结果表明，在包含加性噪声和混响的情况下，我们的方法比以前的方法获得了明显更高质量的合成语音。 本文提出一种鲁棒的文本到语音合成方法DRSpeech，能够处理包含加性噪声和环境失真的语音数据。 Takaaki Saeki,Kentaro Tachibana,Ryuichi Yamamoto cs.SD,eess.AS

authors_text: Shuai Jia,Chao Ma,Taiping Yao,Bangjie Yin,Shouhong Ding,Xiaokang Yang
title: Exploring Frequency Adversarial Attacks for Face Forgery Detection
title_zh: 探索用于人脸伪造检测的频率对抗性攻击
abstract: Various facial manipulation techniques have drawn serious public concerns in morality, security, and privacy. Although existing face forgery classifiers achieve promising performance on detecting fake images, these methods are vulnerable to adversarial examples with injected imperceptible perturbations on the pixels. Meanwhile, many face forgery detectors always utilize the frequency diversity between real and fake faces as a crucial clue. In this paper, instead of injecting adversarial perturbations into the spatial domain, we propose a frequency adversarial attack method against face forgery detectors. Concretely, we apply discrete cosine transform (DCT) on the input images and introduce a fusion module to capture the salient region of adversary in the frequency domain. Compared with existing adversarial attacks (e.g. FGSM, PGD) in the spatial domain, our method is more imperceptible to human observers and does not degrade the visual quality of the original images. Moreover, inspired by the idea of meta-learning, we also propose a hybrid adversarial attack that performs attacks in both the spatial and frequency domains. Extensive experiments indicate that the proposed method fools not only the spatial-based detectors but also the state-of-the-art frequency-based detectors effectively. In addition, the proposed frequency attack enhances the transferability across face forgery detectors as black-box attacks.
summary: Various facial manipulation techniques have drawn serious public concerns in morality, security, and privacy. Although existing face forgery classifiers achieve promising performance on detecting fake images, these methods are vulnerable to adversarial examples with injected imperceptible perturbations on the pixels. Meanwhile, many face forgery detectors always utilize the frequency diversity between real and fake faces as a crucial clue. In this paper, instead of injecting adversarial perturbations into the spatial domain, we propose a frequency adversarial attack method against face forgery detectors. Concretely, we apply discrete cosine transform (DCT) on the input images and introduce a fusion module to capture the salient region of adversary in the frequency domain. Compared with existing adversarial attacks (e.g. FGSM, PGD) in the spatial domain, our method is more imperceptible to human observers and does not degrade the visual quality of the original images. Moreover, inspired by the idea of meta-learning, we also propose a hybrid adversarial attack that performs attacks in both the spatial and frequency domains. Extensive experiments indicate that the proposed method fools not only the spatial-based detectors but also the state-of-the-art frequency-based detectors effectively. In addition, the proposed frequency attack enhances the transferability across face forgery detectors as black-box attacks.
abstract_zh: 各种面部操纵技术引起了公众在道德、安全和隐私方面的严重担忧。尽管现有的人脸伪造分类器在检测假图像方面取得了良好的性能，但这些方法很容易受到在像素上注入难以察觉的扰动的对抗性示例的影响。与此同时，许多人脸伪造检测器总是利用真人脸和假人脸之间的频率多样性作为关键线索。在本文中，我们提出了一种针对人脸伪造检测器的频率对抗性攻击方法，而不是向空间域注入对抗性扰动。具体来说，我们对输入图像应用离散余弦变换（DCT），并引入融合模块来捕获对手在频域中的显着区域。与空间域中现有的对抗性攻击（例如 FGSM、PGD）相比，我们的方法对人类观察者来说更难以察觉，并且不会降低原始图像的视觉质量。此外，受元学习思想的启发，我们还提出了一种混合对抗攻击，可以在空间域和频率域上执行攻击。大量的实验表明，所提出的方法不仅可以有效地欺骗基于空间的检测器，还可以有效地欺骗最先进的基于频率的检测器。此外，所提出的频率攻击增强了人脸伪造检测器作为黑盒攻击的可转移性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种针对人脸伪造检测器的频率对抗攻击方法，通过离散余弦变换（DCT）在频域中生成不可感知的对抗样本。
AI.motivation: 现有对抗攻击多针对空间域，但人脸伪造检测器依赖频域特征差异。传统方法在空间域注入扰动会降低图像质量，而频域攻击可保持视觉质量并提升跨检测器的迁移性。
AI.method: 应用DCT提取频域特征，设计融合模块定位关键对抗区域；结合元学习思想，提出空间-频域混合攻击方法。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在保持图像质量的同时，可有效欺骗空间域和最新频域检测器，且作为黑盒攻击时具有更强的跨模型迁移能力。
AI.conclusion: 频率对抗攻击揭示了频域特征在伪造检测中的脆弱性，为构建鲁棒检测模型提供了新方向，同时凸显了对抗样本防御的重要性。

authors_text: David Gamarnik,Eren C. Kızıldağ,Will Perkins,Changji Xu
title: Algorithms and Barriers in the Symmetric Binary Perceptron Model
title_zh: 对称二元感知器模型中的算法和障碍
abstract: The symmetric binary perceptron ($\texttt{SBP}$) exhibits a dramatic statistical-to-computational gap: the densities at which known efficient algorithms find solutions are far below the threshold for the existence of solutions. Furthermore, the $\texttt{SBP}$ exhibits a striking structural property: at all positive constraint densities almost all of its solutions are 'totally frozen' singletons separated by large Hamming distance \cite{perkins2021frozen,abbe2021proof}. This suggests that finding a solution to the $\texttt{SBP}$ may be computationally intractable. At the same time, the $\texttt{SBP}$ does admit polynomial-time search algorithms at low enough densities. A conjectural explanation for this conundrum was put forth in \cite{baldassi2020clustering}: efficient algorithms succeed in the face of freezing by finding exponentially rare clusters of large size. However, it was discovered recently that such rare large clusters exist at all subcritical densities, even at those well above the limits of known efficient algorithms \cite{abbe2021binary}. Thus the driver of the statistical-to-computational gap exhibited by this model remains a mystery. In this paper, we conduct a different landscape analysis to explain the algorithmic tractability of this problem. We show that at high enough densities the $\texttt{SBP}$ exhibits the multi Overlap Gap Property ($m-$OGP), an intricate geometrical property known to be a rigorous barrier for large classes of algorithms. Our analysis shows that the $m-$OGP threshold (a) is well below the satisfiability threshold; and (b) matches the best known algorithmic threshold up to logarithmic factors as $m\to\infty$. We then prove that the $m-$OGP rules out the class of stable algorithms for the $\texttt{SBP}$ above this threshold. We conjecture that the $m \to \infty$ limit of the $m$-OGP threshold marks the algorithmic threshold for the problem.

Furthermore, the $\texttt{SBP}$ exhibits a striking structural property: at all positive constraint densities almost all of its solutions are 'totally frozen' singletons separated by large Hamming distance \cite{perkins2021frozen,abbe2021proof}. This suggests that finding a solution to the $\texttt{SBP}$ may be computationally intractable. At the same time, the $\texttt{SBP}$ does admit polynomial-time search algorithms at low enough densities. A conjectural explanation for this conundrum was put forth in \cite{baldassi2020clustering}: efficient algorithms succeed in the face of freezing by finding exponentially rare clusters of large size. However, it was discovered recently that such rare large clusters exist at all subcritical densities, even at those well above the limits of known efficient algorithms \cite{abbe2021binary}. Thus the driver of the statistical-to-computational gap exhibited by this model remains a mystery. In this paper, we conduct a different landscape analysis to explain the algorithmic tractability of this problem. We show that at high enough densities the $\texttt{SBP}$ exhibits the multi Overlap Gap Property ($m-$OGP), an intricate geometrical property known to be a rigorous barrier for large classes of algorithms. Our analysis shows that the $m-$OGP threshold (a) is well below the satisfiability threshold; and (b) matches the best known algorithmic threshold up to logarithmic factors as $m\to\infty$. We then prove that the $m-$OGP rules out the class of stable algorithms for the $\texttt{SBP}$ above this threshold. We conjecture that the $m \to \infty$ limit of the $m$-OGP threshold marks the algorithmic threshold for the problem.
abstract_zh: 对称二元感知器 ($\texttt{SBP}$) 表现出巨大的统计与计算差距：已知有效算法找到解的密度远远低于解存在的阈值。此外，$\texttt{SBP}$ 表现出惊人的结构特性：在所有正约束密度下，几乎所有解都是“完全冻结”的单例，并由大汉明距离 \cite{perkins2021frozen,abbe2021proof} 分隔开。这表明寻找 $\texttt{SBP}$ 的解决方案可能在计算上很困难。同时，$\texttt{SBP}$ 确实允许在足够低的密度下使用多项式时间搜索算法。 \cite{baldassi2020clustering} 中提出了对这个难题的推测性解释：高效的算法通过找到指数稀有的大尺寸簇来成功应对冻结。然而，最近发现这种罕见的大型簇存在于所有亚临界密度下，甚至远高于已知高效算法的极限\cite{abbe2021binary}。因此，该模型所表现出的统计与计算差距的驱动因素仍然是一个谜。在本文中，我们进行了不同的景观分析来解释该问题的算法可处理性。我们证明，在足够高的密度下，$\texttt{SBP}$ 表现出多重重叠间隙特性（$m-$OGP），这是一种复杂的几何特性，已知是大类算法的严格障碍。我们的分析表明，$m-$OGP 阈值 (a) 远低于可满足性阈值； (b) 将最著名的算法阈值与对数因子匹配，如 $m\to\infty$。然后我们证明 $m-$OGP 排除了高于此阈值的 $\texttt{SBP}$ 的稳定算法类别。我们推测 $m$-OGP 阈值的 $m \to \infty$ 限制标志着该问题的算法阈值。

AI.tldr: 本文通过分析对称二元感知机模型的景观结构，解释其算法可解性与统计阈值之间的差距。
AI.motivation: 对称二元感知机模型存在显著的统计-计算差距，现有算法在低密度下有效但远低于可解阈值，且高密度下解呈现完全冻结特性，需解释此现象。
AI.method: 引入多重重叠间隙性质（m-OGP）进行景观分析，证明其作为算法障碍的严格性，并比较m-OGP阈值与已知算法阈值的关系。
AI.result: m-OGP阈值低于可满足性阈值，且与最佳已知算法阈值在对数因子内一致；m-OGP排除了稳定算法在该阈值以上的有效性。
AI.conclusion: m-OGP的极限标志着该问题的算法阈值，为理解统计-计算差距提供了几何解释。

We conjecture that the $m \to \infty$ limit of the $m$-OGP threshold marks the algorithmic threshold for the problem. 对称二元感知器 ($\texttt{SBP}$) 表现出巨大的统计与计算差距：已知有效算法找到解的密度远远低于解存在的阈值。此外，$\texttt{SBP}$ 表现出惊人的结构特性：在所有正约束密度下，几乎所有解都是“完全冻结”的单例，并由大汉明距离 \cite{perkins2021frozen,abbe2021proof} 分隔开。这表明寻找 $\texttt{SBP}$ 的解决方案可能在计算上很困难。同时，$\texttt{SBP}$ 确实允许在足够低的密度下使用多项式时间搜索算法。 \cite{baldassi2020clustering} 中提出了对这个难题的推测性解释：高效的算法通过找到指数稀有的大尺寸簇来成功应对冻结。然而，最近发现这种罕见的大型簇存在于所有亚临界密度下，甚至远高于已知高效算法的极限\cite{abbe2021binary}。因此，该模型所表现出的统计与计算差距的驱动因素仍然是一个谜。在本文中，我们进行了不同的景观分析来解释该问题的算法可处理性。我们证明，在足够高的密度下，$\texttt{SBP}$ 表现出多重重叠间隙特性（$m-$OGP），这是一种复杂的几何特性，已知是大类算法的严格障碍。我们的分析表明，$m-$OGP 阈值 (a) 远低于可满足性阈值； (b) 将最著名的算法阈值与对数因子匹配，如 $m\to\infty$。然后我们证明 $m-$OGP 排除了高于此阈值的 $\texttt{SBP}$ 的稳定算法类别。我们推测 $m$-OGP 阈值的 $m \to \infty$ 限制标志着该问题的算法阈值。 本文通过分析对称二元感知机模型的景观结构，解释其算法可解性与统计阈值之间的差距。 David Gamarnik,Eren C. Kızıldağ,Will Perkins,Changji Xu cs.CC,cs.DS,math-ph,math.PR

authors_text: GyuTae Park,SungJoon Son,JaeYoung Yoo,SeHo Kim,Nojun Kwak
title: MatteFormer: Transformer-Based Image Matting via Prior-Tokens
title_zh: MatteFormer：通过 Prior-Tokens 进行基于 Transformer 的图像抠图
abstract: In this paper, we propose a transformer-based image matting model called MatteFormer, which takes full advantage of trimap information in the transformer block. Our method first introduces a prior-token which is a global representation of each trimap region (e.g. foreground, background and unknown). These prior-tokens are used as global priors and participate in the self-attention mechanism of each block. Each stage of the encoder is composed of PAST (Prior-Attentive Swin Transformer) block, which is based on the Swin Transformer block, but differs in a couple of aspects: 1) It has PA-WSA (Prior-Attentive Window Self-Attention) layer, performing self-attention not only with spatial-tokens but also with prior-tokens. 2) It has prior-memory which saves prior-tokens accumulatively from the previous blocks and transfers them to the next block. We evaluate our MatteFormer on the commonly used image matting datasets: Composition-1k and Distinctions-646. Experiment results show that our proposed method achieves state-of-the-art performance with a large margin. Our codes are available at https://github.com/webtoon/matteformer.
summary: In this paper, we propose a transformer-based image matting model called MatteFormer, which takes full advantage of trimap information in the transformer block. Our method first introduces a prior-token which is a global representation of each trimap region (e.g. foreground, background and unknown). These prior-tokens are used as global priors and participate in the self-attention mechanism of each block. Each stage of the encoder is composed of PAST (Prior-Attentive Swin Transformer) block, which is based on the Swin Transformer block, but differs in a couple of aspects: 1) It has PA-WSA (Prior-Attentive Window Self-Attention) layer, performing self-attention not only with spatial-tokens but also with prior-tokens. 2) It has prior-memory which saves prior-tokens accumulatively from the previous blocks and transfers them to the next block. We evaluate our MatteFormer on the commonly used image matting datasets: Composition-1k and Distinctions-646. Experiment results show that our proposed method achieves state-of-the-art performance with a large margin. Our codes are available at https://github.com/webtoon/matteformer.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种名为 MatteFormer 的基于 Transformer 的图像抠图模型，它充分利用了 Transformer 块中的 trimap 信息。我们的方法首先引入一个先验标记，它是每个三元图区域（例如前景、背景和未知）的全局表示。这些先验令牌被用作全局先验并参与每个块的自注意力机制。编码器的每个阶段都由 PAST（Prior-Attentive Swin Transformer）块组成，它基于 Swin Transformer 块，但在几个方面有所不同：1）它具有 PA-WSA（Prior-Attentive Window Self-Attention）层，不仅对空间令牌进行自注意力，还对先验令牌进行自注意力。 2）它具有先验内存，可累积保存前一个块的先验令牌并将其传输到下一个块。我们在常用的图像抠图数据集：Composition-1k 和 Distinctions-646 上评估我们的 MatteFormer。实验结果表明，我们提出的方法以很大的裕度实现了最先进的性能。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/webtoon/matteformer 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于Transformer的图像抠图模型MatteFormer，通过引入先验标记（prior-tokens）来利用三图（trimap）信息。
AI.motivation: 现有图像抠图方法未能充分利用三图信息，而三图中的前景、背景和未知区域的全局信息对抠图任务至关重要。
AI.method: 设计了PAST块（Prior-Attentive Swin Transformer），包含PA-WSA层（结合空间标记和先验标记的自注意力机制）及累积先验标记的先验内存模块。
AI.result: 在Composition-1k和Distinctions-646数据集上达到最先进的性能，显著优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过融合三图先验信息，MatteFormer有效提升了图像抠图的精度，验证了先验标记机制的有效性。

authors_text: Hannah Muckenhirn,Aleksandr Safin,Hakan Erdogan,Felix de Chaumont Quitry,Marco Tagliasacchi,Scott Wisdom,John R. Hershey
title: CycleGAN-Based Unpaired Speech Dereverberation
title_zh: 基于 CycleGAN 的不成对语音去混响
abstract: Typically, neural network-based speech dereverberation models are trained on paired data, composed of a dry utterance and its corresponding reverberant utterance. The main limitation of this approach is that such models can only be trained on large amounts of data and a variety of room impulse responses when the data is synthetically reverberated, since acquiring real paired data is costly. In this paper we propose a CycleGAN-based approach that enables dereverberation models to be trained on unpaired data. We quantify the impact of using unpaired data by comparing the proposed unpaired model to a paired model with the same architecture and trained on the paired version of the same dataset. We show that the performance of the unpaired model is comparable to the performance of the paired model on two different datasets, according to objective evaluation metrics. Furthermore, we run two subjective evaluations and show that both models achieve comparable subjective quality on the AMI dataset, which was not seen during training.
summary: Typically, neural network-based speech dereverberation models are trained on paired data, composed of a dry utterance and its corresponding reverberant utterance. The main limitation of this approach is that such models can only be trained on large amounts of data and a variety of room impulse responses when the data is synthetically reverberated, since acquiring real paired data is costly. In this paper we propose a CycleGAN-based approach that enables dereverberation models to be trained on unpaired data. We quantify the impact of using unpaired data by comparing the proposed unpaired model to a paired model with the same architecture and trained on the paired version of the same dataset. We show that the performance of the unpaired model is comparable to the performance of the paired model on two different datasets, according to objective evaluation metrics. Furthermore, we run two subjective evaluations and show that both models achieve comparable subjective quality on the AMI dataset, which was not seen during training.
abstract_zh: 通常，基于神经网络的语音去混响模型是在配对数据上进行训练的，这些数据由干话语及其相应的混响话语组成。这种方法的主要限制是，这种模型只能在大量数据和数据合成混响时的各种房间脉冲响应上进行训练，因为获取真实的配对数据成本很高。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于 CycleGAN 的方法，可以在不配对的数据上训练去混响模型。我们通过将所提出的未配对模型与具有相同架构并在同一数据集的配对版本上进行训练的配对模型进行比较来量化使用未配对数据的影响。根据客观评估指标，我们表明，在两个不同数据集上，未配对模型的性能与配对模型的性能相当。此外，我们进行了两次主观评估，结果表明，两种模型在 AMI 数据集上都达到了相当的主观质量，而这在训练期间是没有看到的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于CycleGAN的无配对数据训练方法，用于解决语音去混响问题。
AI.motivation: 传统语音去混响模型依赖成本高昂的配对数据，而实际获取真实配对数据困难，需探索无配对数据训练方法。
AI.method: 采用CycleGAN框架构建无配对训练模型，并与相同架构的配对模型进行性能对比实验。
AI.result: 在两个数据集上，无配对模型的客观指标与配对模型相当，且在AMI数据集的主观评价中质量相近。
AI.conclusion: 无配对训练方法可有效替代传统配对数据训练，降低数据获取成本且保持模型性能。

authors_text: Daniel Weber,Wolfgang Fuhl,Andreas Zell,Enkelejda Kasneci
title: Gaze-based Object Detection in the Wild
title_zh: 野外基于凝视的物体检测
abstract: In human-robot collaboration, one challenging task is to teach a robot new yet unknown objects enabling it to interact with them. Thereby, gaze can contain valuable information. We investigate if it is possible to detect objects (object or no object) merely from gaze data and determine their bounding box parameters. For this purpose, we explore different sizes of temporal windows, which serve as a basis for the computation of heatmaps, i.e., the spatial distribution of the gaze data. Additionally, we analyze different grid sizes of these heatmaps, and demonstrate the functionality in a proof of concept using different machine learning techniques. Our method is characterized by its speed and resource efficiency compared to conventional object detectors. In order to generate the required data, we conducted a study with five subjects who could move freely and thus, turn towards arbitrary objects. This way, we chose a scenario for our data collection that is as realistic as possible. Since the subjects move while facing objects, the heatmaps also contain gaze data trajectories, complicating the detection and parameter regression. We make our data set publicly available to the research community for download.
summary: In human-robot collaboration, one challenging task is to teach a robot new yet unknown objects enabling it to interact with them. Thereby, gaze can contain valuable information. We investigate if it is possible to detect objects (object or no object) merely from gaze data and determine their bounding box parameters. For this purpose, we explore different sizes of temporal windows, which serve as a basis for the computation of heatmaps, i.e., the spatial distribution of the gaze data. Additionally, we analyze different grid sizes of these heatmaps, and demonstrate the functionality in a proof of concept using different machine learning techniques. Our method is characterized by its speed and resource efficiency compared to conventional object detectors. In order to generate the required data, we conducted a study with five subjects who could move freely and thus, turn towards arbitrary objects. This way, we chose a scenario for our data collection that is as realistic as possible. Since the subjects move while facing objects, the heatmaps also contain gaze data trajectories, complicating the detection and parameter regression. We make our data set publicly available to the research community for download.
abstract_zh: 在人机协作中，一项具有挑战性的任务是教机器人新的未知物体，使其能够与这些物体进行交互。因此，凝视可以包含有价值的信息。我们研究是否可以仅从注视数据中检测对象（对象或无对象）并确定它们的边界框参数。为此，我们探索不同大小的时间窗口，作为计算热图（即注视数据的空间分布）的基础。此外，我们分析了这些热图的不同网格大小，并使用不同的机器学习技术在概念验证中演示了功能。与传统的物体检测器相比，我们的方法的特点是速度和资源效率。为了生成所需的数据，我们对五名受试者进行了一项研究，他们可以自由移动，从而转向任意物体。通过这种方式，我们为数据收集选择了一个尽可能现实的场景。由于受试者在面对物体时移动，因此热图还包含注视数据轨迹，使检测和参数回归变得复杂。我们向研究社区公开提供我们的数据集供下载。

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何通过人类注视数据检测未知物体并确定其边界框参数，以提升机器人协作中的物体交互能力。
AI.motivation: 传统物体检测方法在动态场景中效率不足，而人类注视数据能提供交互意图信息，需探索更高效的检测方案。
AI.method: 采用时间窗口生成注视热图，分析不同网格尺寸，结合机器学习技术实现物体检测与参数回归，并公开真实场景数据集。
AI.result: 方法在速度和资源消耗上优于传统检测器，成功验证了注视数据驱动的检测可行性，数据集促进后续研究。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为机器人实时交互提供新思路，公开数据集推动注视驱动物体检测领域的发展。

ai_content.tldr: 本文研究如何通过人类注视数据检测未知物体并确定其边界框参数，以提升机器人协作中的物体交互能力。
ai_content.motivation: 传统物体检测方法在动态场景中效率不足，而人类注视数据能提供交互意图信息，需探索更高效的检测方案。
ai_content.method: 采用时间窗口生成注视热图，分析不同网格尺寸，结合机器学习技术实现物体检测与参数回归，并公开真实场景数据集。
ai_content.result: 方法在速度和资源消耗上优于传统检测器，成功验证了注视数据驱动的检测可行性，数据集促进后续研究。
ai_content.conclusion: 该方法为机器人实时交互提供新思路，公开数据集推动注视驱动物体检测领域的发展。

search_text: Gaze-based Object Detection in the Wild 野外基于凝视的物体检测 In human-robot collaboration, one challenging task is to teach a robot new yet unknown objects enabling it to interact with them. Thereby, gaze can contain valuable information. We investigate if it is possible to detect objects (object or no object) merely from gaze data and determine their bounding box parameters. For this purpose, we explore different sizes of temporal windows, which serve as a basis for the computation of heatmaps, i.e., the spatial distribution of the gaze data. Additionally, we analyze different grid sizes of these heatmaps, and demonstrate the functionality in a proof of concept using different machine learning techniques. Our method is characterized by its speed and resource efficiency compared to conventional object detectors. In order to generate the required data, we conducted a study with five subjects who could move freely and thus, turn towards arbitrary objects. This way, we chose a scenario for our data collection that is as realistic as possible. Since the subjects move while facing objects, the heatmaps also contain gaze data trajectories, complicating the detection and parameter regression. We make our data set publicly available to the research community for download. 在人机协作中，一项具有挑战性的任务是教机器人新的未知物体，使其能够与这些物体进行交互。因此，凝视可以包含有价值的信息。我们研究是否可以仅从注视数据中检测对象（对象或无对象）并确定它们的边界框参数。为此，我们探索不同大小的时间窗口，作为计算热图（即注视数据的空间分布）的基础。此外，我们分析了这些热图的不同网格大小，并使用不同的机器学习技术在概念验证中演示了功能。与传统的物体检测器相比，我们的方法的特点是速度和资源效率。为了生成所需的数据，我们对五名受试者进行了一项研究，他们可以自由移动，从而转向任意物体。通过这种方式，我们为数据收集选择了一个尽可能现实的场景。由于受试者在面对物体时移动，因此热图还包含注视数据轨迹，使检测和参数回归变得复杂。我们向研究社区公开提供我们的数据集供下载。 本文研究如何通过人类注视数据检测未知物体并确定其边界框参数，以提升机器人协作中的物体交互能力。 Daniel Weber,Wolfgang Fuhl,Andreas Zell,Enkelejda Kasneci cs.RO,cs.HC,cs.LG

authors_text: Rendi Chevi,Radityo Eko Prasojo,Alham Fikri Aji,Andros Tjandra,Sakriani Sakti
title: Nix-TTS: Lightweight and End-to-End Text-to-Speech via Module-wise Distillation
title_zh: Nix-TTS：通过模块级蒸馏实现轻量级端到端文本转语音
comment: Accepted at SLT 2022 (https://slt2022.org/). Associated materials can be seen in https://github.com/rendchevi/nix-tts
comments: Accepted at SLT 2022 (https://slt2022.org/). Associated materials can be seen in https://github.com/rendchevi/nix-tts
abstract: Several solutions for lightweight TTS have shown promising results. Still, they either rely on a hand-crafted design that reaches non-optimum size or use a neural architecture search but often suffer training costs. We present Nix-TTS, a lightweight TTS achieved via knowledge distillation to a high-quality yet large-sized, non-autoregressive, and end-to-end (vocoder-free) TTS teacher model. Specifically, we offer module-wise distillation, enabling flexible and independent distillation to the encoder and decoder module. The resulting Nix-TTS inherited the advantageous properties of being non-autoregressive and end-to-end from the teacher, yet significantly smaller in size, with only 5.23M parameters or up to 89.34% reduction of the teacher model; it also achieves over 3.04x and 8.36x inference speedup on Intel-i7 CPU and Raspberry Pi 3B respectively and still retains a fair voice naturalness and intelligibility compared to the teacher model. We provide pretrained models and audio samples of Nix-TTS.
summary: Several solutions for lightweight TTS have shown promising results. Still, they either rely on a hand-crafted design that reaches non-optimum size or use a neural architecture search but often suffer training costs. We present Nix-TTS, a lightweight TTS achieved via knowledge distillation to a high-quality yet large-sized, non-autoregressive, and end-to-end (vocoder-free) TTS teacher model. Specifically, we offer module-wise distillation, enabling flexible and independent distillation to the encoder and decoder module. The resulting Nix-TTS inherited the advantageous properties of being non-autoregressive and end-to-end from the teacher, yet significantly smaller in size, with only 5.23M parameters or up to 89.34% reduction of the teacher model; it also achieves over 3.04x and 8.36x inference speedup on Intel-i7 CPU and Raspberry Pi 3B respectively and still retains a fair voice naturalness and intelligibility compared to the teacher model. We provide pretrained models and audio samples of Nix-TTS.
abstract_zh: 多种轻量级 TTS 解决方案已显示出可喜的结果。尽管如此，他们要么依赖达到非最佳尺寸的手工设计，要么使用神经架构搜索，但往往会承受训练成本。我们提出 Nix-TTS，这是一种通过知识蒸馏实现的轻量级 TTS，它是一种高质量但大型、非自回归、端到端（无声码器）TTS 教师模型。具体来说，我们提供模块级蒸馏，使编码器和解码器模块能够灵活且独立地蒸馏。由此产生的 Nix-TTS 继承了教师的非自回归和端到端的优势特性，但尺寸明显更小，只有 5.23M 参数或教师模型最多减少了 89.34%；与教师模型相比，它在 Intel-i7 CPU 和 Raspberry Pi 3B 上分别实现了超过 3.04 倍和 8.36 倍的推理加速，并且仍然保留了公平的语音自然度和清晰度。我们提供 Nix-TTS 的预训练模型和音频样本。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Nix-TTS，一种通过模块级知识蒸馏实现的轻量级端到端文本到语音合成模型。
AI.motivation: 现有轻量级TTS方案或依赖手工设计难以达到最优规模，或使用神经架构搜索但训练成本高，亟需更高效的方法。
AI.method: 采用模块级知识蒸馏技术，从非自回归端到端教师模型中独立蒸馏编码器和解码器模块，继承教师模型优势并显著压缩模型规模。
AI.result: Nix-TTS参数量仅5.23M（较教师模型减少89.34%），在Intel-i7 CPU和Raspberry Pi 3B上分别实现3.04x和8.36x推理加速，同时保持语音自然度和可懂度。
AI.conclusion: 模块级蒸馏有效平衡了模型轻量化与性能，为部署高效TTS系统提供了可行方案。

authors_text: Luca Garello,Linda Lastrico,Alessandra Sciutti,Nicoletta Noceti,Fulvio Mastrogiovanni,Francesco Rea
title: Synthesis and Execution of Communicative Robotic Movements with Generative Adversarial Networks
title_zh: 使用生成对抗网络合成和执行通信机器人运动
comment: Submitted to the Special Issue on Emerging Topics on Development and Learning, IEEE TCDS. Unpublished, review process ongoing. Luca Garello and Linda Lastrico contributed equally to this work, hence they share the first name
comments: Submitted to the Special Issue on Emerging Topics on Development and Learning, IEEE TCDS. Unpublished, review process ongoing. Luca Garello and Linda Lastrico contributed equally to this work, hence they share the first name
abstract: Object manipulation is a natural activity we perform every day. How humans handle objects can communicate not only the willfulness of the acting, or key aspects of the context where we operate, but also the properties of the objects involved, without any need for explicit verbal description. Since human intelligence comprises the ability to read the context, allowing robots to perform actions that intuitively convey this kind of information would greatly facilitate collaboration. In this work, we focus on how to transfer on two different robotic platforms the same kinematics modulation that humans adopt when manipulating delicate objects, aiming to endow robots with the capability to show carefulness in their movements. We choose to modulate the velocity profile adopted by the robots' end-effector, inspired by what humans do when transporting objects with different characteristics. We exploit a novel Generative Adversarial Network architecture, trained with human kinematics examples, to generalize over them and generate new and meaningful velocity profiles, either associated with careful or not careful attitudes. This approach would allow next generation robots to select the most appropriate style of movement, depending on the perceived context, and autonomously generate their motor action execution.
summary: Object manipulation is a natural activity we perform every day. How humans handle objects can communicate not only the willfulness of the acting, or key aspects of the context where we operate, but also the properties of the objects involved, without any need for explicit verbal description. Since human intelligence comprises the ability to read the context, allowing robots to perform actions that intuitively convey this kind of information would greatly facilitate collaboration. In this work, we focus on how to transfer on two different robotic platforms the same kinematics modulation that humans adopt when manipulating delicate objects, aiming to endow robots with the capability to show carefulness in their movements. We choose to modulate the velocity profile adopted by the robots' end-effector, inspired by what humans do when transporting objects with different characteristics. We exploit a novel Generative Adversarial Network architecture, trained with human kinematics examples, to generalize over them and generate new and meaningful velocity profiles, either associated with careful or not careful attitudes. This approach would allow next generation robots to select the most appropriate style of movement, depending on the perceived context, and autonomously generate their motor action execution.
abstract_zh: 对象操作是我们每天进行的一项自然活动。人类如何处理物体不仅可以传达行为的意愿或我们操作环境的关键方面，还可以传达所涉及物体的属性，而无需任何明确的口头描述。由于人类智能包括读取上下文的能力，因此允许机器人执行直观传达此类信息的动作将极大地促进协作。在这项工作中，我们重点研究如何在两个不同的机器人平台上转移人类在操纵精致物体时采用的相同运动学调制，旨在赋予机器人在动作中表现出谨慎的能力。受到人类在运输具有不同特性的物体时的启发，我们选择调制机器人末端执行器采用的速度分布。我们利用一种新颖的生成对抗网络架构，通过人类运动学示例进行训练，对它们进行概括并生成新的、有意义的速度曲线，无论是与谨慎还是不小心的态度相关。这种方法将使下一代机器人能够根据感知到的环境选择最合适的运动方式，并自动生成其运动动作执行。

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用生成对抗网络（GAN）合成并执行具有沟通性的机械臂运动，使机器人能模仿人类操作易碎物体时的谨慎动作。
AI.motivation: 人类通过物体操作动作自然传递意图和环境信息，赋予机器人类似能力可提升人机协作效率，但现有机器人运动模式缺乏对操作对象特性的感知与适应。
AI.method: 设计新型GAN架构，以人类操作不同物体时的末端执行器速度曲线为训练数据，学习生成体现谨慎或非谨慎态度的运动模式，并在双平台机器人上验证迁移效果。
AI.result: 成功生成具有语义区分度的机械臂速度曲线，机器人可根据物体特性自动选择运动模式，在操作易碎物体时展现出更平滑可控的运动特征。
AI.conclusion: 该方法使机器人具备根据操作场景自适应生成沟通性运动的能力，为下一代智能机器人的人机协作提供了新的运动规划范式。

result: 成功生成具有语义区分度的机械臂速度曲线，机器人可根据物体特性自动选择运动模式，在操作易碎物体时展现出更平滑可控的运动特征。
conclusion: 该方法使机器人具备根据操作场景自适应生成沟通性运动的能力，为下一代智能机器人的人机协作提供了新的运动规划范式。
search_text: Synthesis and Execution of Communicative Robotic Movements with Generative Adversarial Networks 使用生成对抗网络合成和执行通信机器人运动 Object manipulation is a natural activity we perform every day. How humans handle objects can communicate not only the willfulness of the acting, or key aspects of the context where we operate, but also the properties of the objects involved, without any need for explicit verbal description. Since human intelligence comprises the ability to read the context, allowing robots to perform actions that intuitively convey this kind of information would greatly facilitate collaboration. In this work, we focus on how to transfer on two different robotic platforms the same kinematics modulation that humans adopt when manipulating delicate objects, aiming to endow robots with the capability to show carefulness in their movements. We choose to modulate the velocity profile adopted by the robots' end-effector, inspired by what humans do when transporting objects with different characteristics. We exploit a novel Generative Adversarial Network architecture, trained with human kinematics examples, to generalize over them and generate new and meaningful velocity profiles, either associated with careful or not careful attitudes. This approach would allow next generation robots to select the most appropriate style of movement, depending on the perceived context, and autonomously generate their motor action execution. 对象操作是我们每天进行的一项自然活动。人类如何处理物体不仅可以传达行为的意愿或我们操作环境的关键方面，还可以传达所涉及物体的属性，而无需任何明确的口头描述。由于人类智能包括读取上下文的能力，因此允许机器人执行直观传达此类信息的动作将极大地促进协作。在这项工作中，我们重点研究如何在两个不同的机器人平台上转移人类在操纵精致物体时采用的相同运动学调制，旨在赋予机器人在动作中表现出谨慎的能力。受到人类在运输具有不同特性的物体时的启发，我们选择调制机器人末端执行器采用的速度分布。我们利用一种新颖的生成对抗网络架构，通过人类运动学示例进行训练，对它们进行概括并生成新的、有意义的速度曲线，无论是与谨慎还是不小心的态度相关。这种方法将使下一代机器人能够根据感知到的环境选择最合适的运动方式，并自动生成其运动动作执行。 本文提出利用生成对抗网络（GAN）合成并执行具有沟通性的机械臂运动，使机器人能模仿人类操作易碎物体时的谨慎动作。 Luca Garello,Linda Lastrico,Alessandra Sciutti,Nicoletta Noceti,Fulvio Mastrogiovanni,Francesco Rea cs.RO,cs.AI

authors_text: Lukas Pavez,Jose M. Saavedra Rondo
title: NL-FCOS: Improving FCOS through Non-Local Modules for Object Detection
title_zh: NL-FCOS：通过用于对象检测的非本地模块改进 FCOS
abstract: During the last years, we have seen significant advances in the object detection task, mainly due to the outperforming results of convolutional neural networks. In this vein, anchor-based models have achieved the best results. However, these models require prior information about the aspect and scales of target objects, needing more hyperparameters to fit. In addition, using anchors to fit bounding boxes seems far from how our visual system does the same visual task. Instead, our visual system uses the interactions of different scene parts to semantically identify objects, called perceptual grouping. An object detection methodology closer to the natural model is anchor-free detection, where models like FCOS or Centernet have shown competitive results, but these have not yet exploited the concept of perceptual grouping. Therefore, to increase the effectiveness of anchor-free models keeping the inference time low, we propose to add non-local attention (NL modules) modules to boost the feature map of the underlying backbone. NL modules implement the perceptual grouping mechanism, allowing receptive fields to cooperate in visual representation learning. We show that non-local modules combined with an FCOS head (NL-FCOS) are practical and efficient. Thus, we establish state-of-the-art performance in clothing detection and handwritten amount recognition problems.
summary: During the last years, we have seen significant advances in the object detection task, mainly due to the outperforming results of convolutional neural networks. In this vein, anchor-based models have achieved the best results. However, these models require prior information about the aspect and scales of target objects, needing more hyperparameters to fit. In addition, using anchors to fit bounding boxes seems far from how our visual system does the same visual task. Instead, our visual system uses the interactions of different scene parts to semantically identify objects, called perceptual grouping. An object detection methodology closer to the natural model is anchor-free detection, where models like FCOS or Centernet have shown competitive results, but these have not yet exploited the concept of perceptual grouping. Therefore, to increase the effectiveness of anchor-free models keeping the inference time low, we propose to add non-local attention (NL modules) modules to boost the feature map of the underlying backbone. NL modules implement the perceptual grouping mechanism, allowing receptive fields to cooperate in visual representation learning. We show that non-local modules combined with an FCOS head (NL-FCOS) are practical and efficient. Thus, we establish state-of-the-art performance in clothing detection and handwritten amount recognition problems.
abstract_zh: 在过去的几年里，我们在目标检测任务中看到了显着的进步，这主要归功于卷积神经网络的优异结果。在这方面，基于锚的模型取得了最好的结果。然而，这些模型需要有关目标对象的方面和尺度的先验信息，需要更多的超参数来拟合。此外，使用锚点来拟合边界框似乎与我们的视觉系统执行相同视觉任务的方式相去甚远。相反，我们的视觉系统使用不同场景部分的交互来从语义上识别对象，称为感知分组。更接近自然模型的对象检测方法是无锚检测，其中 FCOS 或 Centernet 等模型已经显示出有竞争力的结果，但这些模型尚未利用感知分组的概念。因此，为了提高无锚模型的有效性并保持较低的推理时间，我们建议添加非局部注意（NL模块）模块来增强底层主干的特征图。 NL 模块实现了感知分组机制，允许感受野在视觉表征学习中进行协作。我们证明了与 FCOS 头（NL-FCOS）相结合的非本地模块是实用且高效的。因此，我们在服装检测和手写金额识别问题上建立了最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出NL-FCOS方法，通过引入非局部模块增强FCOS特征图，提升无锚点目标检测性能。
AI.motivation: 传统锚点检测模型依赖先验信息且不符合人类视觉机制，无锚点模型虽更接近自然视觉但未有效利用感知分组机制。
AI.method: 在FCOS框架中嵌入非局部注意力模块，通过跨区域特征交互实现感知分组，增强特征表示能力。
AI.result: 在服装检测和手写金额识别任务中达到当时最先进的检测性能，保持较低推理时间。
AI.conclusion: 非局部模块有效提升无锚点检测性能，为视觉感知分组机制在目标检测中的应用提供新思路。

authors_text: Guillaume Jeanneret,Loïc Simon,Frédéric Jurie
title: Diffusion Models for Counterfactual Explanations
title_zh: 反事实解释的扩散模型
abstract: Counterfactual explanations have shown promising results as a post-hoc framework to make image classifiers more explainable. In this paper, we propose DiME, a method allowing the generation of counterfactual images using the recent diffusion models. By leveraging the guided generative diffusion process, our proposed methodology shows how to use the gradients of the target classifier to generate counterfactual explanations of input instances. Further, we analyze current approaches to evaluate spurious correlations and extend the evaluation measurements by proposing a new metric: Correlation Difference. Our experimental validations show that the proposed algorithm surpasses previous State-of-the-Art results on 5 out of 6 metrics on CelebA.
summary: Counterfactual explanations have shown promising results as a post-hoc framework to make image classifiers more explainable. In this paper, we propose DiME, a method allowing the generation of counterfactual images using the recent diffusion models. By leveraging the guided generative diffusion process, our proposed methodology shows how to use the gradients of the target classifier to generate counterfactual explanations of input instances. Further, we analyze current approaches to evaluate spurious correlations and extend the evaluation measurements by proposing a new metric: Correlation Difference. Our experimental validations show that the proposed algorithm surpasses previous State-of-the-Art results on 5 out of 6 metrics on CelebA.
abstract_zh: 反事实解释作为事后框架已显示出有希望的结果，使图像分类器更易于解释。在本文中，我们提出了 DiME，一种允许使用最新扩散模型生成反事实图像的方法。通过利用引导生成扩散过程，我们提出的方法展示了如何使用目标分类器的梯度来生成输入实例的反事实解释。此外，我们分析了当前评估虚假相关性的方法，并通过提出一个新的指标：相关性差异来扩展评估测量。我们的实验验证表明，所提出的算法在 CelebA 的 6 个指标中的 5 个指标上超越了之前的 State-of-the-Art 结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DiME方法，利用扩散模型生成图像分类器的反事实解释。
AI.motivation: 现有反事实解释方法在生成图像时存在可解释性不足的问题，需探索更有效的生成框架。
AI.method: 通过引导生成扩散过程，结合目标分类器的梯度生成反事实图像，并提出新的评估指标Correlation Difference。
AI.result: 在CelebA数据集上，DiME在5个指标中超越现有最优方法，验证了算法有效性。
AI.conclusion: 扩散模型能有效生成高质量反事实解释，新评估指标可更好检测虚假相关性。

authors_text: Arnold Filtser,Hung Le
title: Low Treewidth Embeddings of Planar and Minor-Free Metrics
title_zh: 平面和次要自由度量的低树宽嵌入
abstract: Cohen-Addad, Filtser, Klein and Le [FOCS'20] constructed a stochastic embedding of minor-free graphs of diameter $D$ into graphs of treewidth $O_ε(\log n)$ with expected additive distortion $+εD$. Cohen-Addad et al. then used the embedding to design the first quasi-polynomial time approximation scheme (QPTAS) for the capacitated vehicle routing problem. Filtser and Le [STOC'21] used the embedding (in a different way) to design a QPTAS for the metric Baker's problems in minor-free graphs. In this work, we devise a new embedding technique to improve the treewidth bound of Cohen-Addad et al. exponentially to $O_ε(\log\log n)^2$. As a corollary, we obtain the first efficient PTAS for the capacitated vehicle routing problem in minor-free graphs. We also significantly improve the running time of the QPTAS for the metric Baker's problems in minor-free graphs from $n^{O_ε(\log(n))}$ to $n^{O_ε(\log\log(n))^3}$. Applying our embedding technique to planar graphs, we obtain a deterministic embedding of planar graphs of diameter $D$ into graphs of treewidth $O((\log\log n)^2)/ε)$ and additive distortion $+εD$ that can be constructed in nearly linear time. Important corollaries of our result include a bicriteria PTAS for metric Baker's problems and a PTAS for the vehicle routing problem with bounded capacity in planar graphs, both run in almost-linear time. The running time of our algorithms is significantly better than previous algorithms that require quadratic time. A key idea in our embedding is the construction of an (exact) emulator for tree metrics with treewidth $O(\log\log n)$ and hop-diameter $O(\log \log n)$. This result may be of independent interest.

abstract_zh: Cohen-Addad、Filtser、Klein 和 Le [FOCS'20] 构建了直径 $D$ 的无次要图的随机嵌入到树宽 $O_ε(\log n)$ 的图中，并具有预期的加性失真 $+εD$。科恩-阿达德等人。然后使用嵌入为容量车辆路径问题设计第一个拟多项式时间近似方案（QPTAS）。 Filtser 和 Le [STOC'21] 使用嵌入（以不同的方式）为无次要图中的度量贝克问题设计了 QPTAS。在这项工作中，我们设计了一种新的嵌入技术来改善 Cohen-Addad 等人的树宽界限。指数到$O_ε(\log\log n)^2$。作为推论，我们获得了第一个有效的 PTAS，用于解决无次要图中的容量车辆路径问题。我们还将无次要图中度量贝克问题的 QPTAS 运行时间从 $n^{O_ε(\log(n))}$ 显着提高到 $n^{O_ε(\log\log(n))^3}$。将我们的嵌入技术应用于平面图，我们获得了直径 $D$ 的平面图到树宽 $O((\log\log n)^2)/ε)$ 和加性失真 $+εD$ 图中的确定性嵌入，可以在几乎线性的时间内构建。我们结果的重要推论包括用于度量贝克问题的双标准 PTAS 和用于平面图中具有有限容量的车辆路径问题的 PTAS，两者都以几乎线性的时间运行。我们算法的运行时间明显优于以前需要二次时间的算法。我们嵌入的一个关键思想是为树宽度 $O(\log\log n)$ 和跳直径 $O(\log \log n)$ 构建一个（精确）树指标模拟器。该结果可能具有独立利益。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的嵌入技术，将小树宽嵌入应用于平面图和小迷宫图，显著改进了先前的树宽界限并优化了相关问题的近似算法。
AI.motivation: 现有嵌入方法在树宽和失真度之间存在权衡，限制了近似算法的效率。需要更高效的嵌入技术以提升车辆路径问题和Baker问题的求解性能。
AI.method: 设计了一种精确的树度量模拟器，结合分层分解与局部优化策略，实现平面图和小迷宫图的低树宽确定性嵌入。
AI.result: 将小迷宫图的树宽界限从$O_ε(\\log n)$提升至$O_ε((\\log\\log n)^2)$，并为平面图提供了近线性时间构造的确定性嵌入，相关算法时间复杂度显著优于先前结果。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在理论界和实际应用中均取得突破，为平面图和小迷宫图的优化问题提供了更高效的近似方案，且模拟器构造具有独立研究价值。

search_text: Low Treewidth Embeddings of Planar and Minor-Free Metrics 平面和次要自由度量的低树宽嵌入 Cohen-Addad, Filtser, Klein and Le [FOCS'20] constructed a stochastic embedding of minor-free graphs of diameter $D$ into graphs of treewidth $O_ε(\log n)$ with expected additive distortion $+εD$. Cohen-Addad et al. then used the embedding to design the first quasi-polynomial time approximation scheme (QPTAS) for the capacitated vehicle routing problem. Filtser and Le [STOC'21] used the embedding (in a different way) to design a QPTAS for the metric Baker's problems in minor-free graphs. In this work, we devise a new embedding technique to improve the treewidth bound of Cohen-Addad et al. exponentially to $O_ε(\log\log n)^2$. As a corollary, we obtain the first efficient PTAS for the capacitated vehicle routing problem in minor-free graphs. We also significantly improve the running time of the QPTAS for the metric Baker's problems in minor-free graphs from $n^{O_ε(\log(n))}$ to $n^{O_ε(\log\log(n))^3}$. Applying our embedding technique to planar graphs, we obtain a deterministic embedding of planar graphs of diameter $D$ into graphs of treewidth $O((\log\log n)^2)/ε)$ and additive distortion $+εD$ that can be constructed in nearly linear time. Important corollaries of our result include a bicriteria PTAS for metric Baker's problems and a PTAS for the vehicle routing problem with bounded capacity in planar graphs, both run in almost-linear time. The running time of our algorithms is significantly better than previous algorithms that require quadratic time. A key idea in our embedding is the construction of an (exact) emulator for tree metrics with treewidth $O(\log\log n)$ and hop-diameter $O(\log \log n)$. This result may be of independent interest. authors_text: Kehong Gong,Bingbing Li,Jianfeng Zhang,Tao Wang,Jing Huang,Michael Bi Mi,Jiashi Feng,Xinchao Wang
title: PoseTriplet: Co-evolving 3D Human Pose Estimation, Imitation, and Hallucination under Self-supervision
title_zh: PoseTriplet：自我监督下共同进化的 3D 人体姿势估计、模仿和幻觉
abstract: Existing self-supervised 3D human pose estimation schemes have largely relied on weak supervisions like consistency loss to guide the learning, which, inevitably, leads to inferior results in real-world scenarios with unseen poses. In this paper, we propose a novel self-supervised approach that allows us to explicitly generate 2D-3D pose pairs for augmenting supervision, through a self-enhancing dual-loop learning framework. This is made possible via introducing a reinforcement-learning-based imitator, which is learned jointly with a pose estimator alongside a pose hallucinator; the three components form two loops during the training process, complementing and strengthening one another. Specifically, the pose estimator transforms an input 2D pose sequence to a low-fidelity 3D output, which is then enhanced by the imitator that enforces physical constraints. The refined 3D poses are subsequently fed to the hallucinator for producing even more diverse data, which are, in turn, strengthened by the imitator and further utilized to train the pose estimator. Such a co-evolution scheme, in practice, enables training a pose estimator on self-generated motion data without relying on any given 3D data. Extensive experiments across various benchmarks demonstrate that our approach yields encouraging results significantly outperforming the state of the art and, in some cases, even on par with results of fully-supervised methods. Notably, it achieves 89.1% 3D PCK on MPI-INF-3DHP under self-supervised cross-dataset evaluation setup, improving upon the previous best self-supervised methods by 8.6%. Code can be found at: https://github.com/Garfield-kh/PoseTriplet
summary: Existing self-supervised 3D human pose estimation schemes have largely relied on weak supervisions like consistency loss to guide the learning, which, inevitably, leads to inferior results in real-world scenarios with unseen poses. In this paper, we propose a novel self-supervised approach that allows us to explicitly generate 2D-3D pose pairs for augmenting supervision, through a self-enhancing dual-loop learning framework. This is made possible via introducing a reinforcement-learning-based imitator, which is learned jointly with a pose estimator alongside a pose hallucinator; the three components form two loops during the training process, complementing and strengthening one another. Specifically, the pose estimator transforms an input 2D pose sequence to a low-fidelity 3D output, which is then enhanced by the imitator that enforces physical constraints. The refined 3D poses are subsequently fed to the hallucinator for producing even more diverse data, which are, in turn, strengthened by the imitator and further utilized to train the pose estimator. Such a co-evolution scheme, in practice, enables training a pose estimator on self-generated motion data without relying on any given 3D data. Extensive experiments across various benchmarks demonstrate that our approach yields encouraging results significantly outperforming the state of the art and, in some cases, even on par with results of fully-supervised methods. Notably, it achieves 89.1% 3D PCK on MPI-INF-3DHP under self-supervised cross-dataset evaluation setup, improving upon the previous best self-supervised methods by 8.6%. Code can be found at: https://github.com/Garfield-kh/PoseTriplet
abstract_zh: 现有的自监督 3D 人体姿势估计方案在很大程度上依赖于一致性损失等弱监督来指导学习，这不可避免地会导致在现实世界场景中未见过姿势的情况下产生较差的结果。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的自我监督方法，该方法允许我们通过自我增强的双环学习框架显式生成 2D-3D 姿势对以增强监督。这是通过引入基于强化学习的模仿器来实现的，该模仿器是与姿势估计器和姿势幻觉器一起共同学习的；这三个部分在培训过程中形成两个循环，相互补充、相互加强。具体来说，姿势估计器将输入 2D 姿势序列转换为低保真度 3D 输出，然后由强制执行物理约束的模仿器进行增强。精致的 3D 姿势随后被输入到幻觉器，以产生更加多样化的数据，这些数据反过来又被模仿器强化，并进一步用于训练姿势估计器。实际上，这种协同进化方案可以在自生成运动数据上训练姿势估计器，而无需依赖任何给定的 3D 数据。跨各种基准的广泛实验表明，我们的方法产生了令人鼓舞的结果，显着优于现有技术，在某些情况下，甚至与完全监督方法的结果相当。值得注意的是，它在自监督跨数据集评估设置下在 MPI-INF-3DHP 上实现了 89.1% 的 3D PCK，比之前最好的自监督方法提高了 8.6%。代码可以在以下位置找到：https://github.com/Garfield-kh/PoseTriplet

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种自监督的3D人体姿态估计方法，通过协同进化模仿和幻觉机制生成2D-3D姿态对以增强监督。
AI.motivation: 现有自监督方法依赖弱监督（如一致性损失），导致在真实场景中表现不佳，需生成高质量3D姿态数据以提升效果。
AI.method: 构建双循环框架，包含姿态估计器、物理约束模仿器和数据幻觉生成器，三者协同训练：估计器生成低保真3D姿态，模仿器优化物理合理性，幻觉器生成更多数据反哺训练。
AI.result: 在MPI-INF-3DHP数据集上达到89.1%的3D PCK，较最佳自监督方法提升8.6%，部分场景媲美全监督方法。
AI.conclusion: 无需3D标注数据即可实现高精度姿态估计，证明协同进化框架的有效性，代码已开源。

authors_text: Ruoning Li,Kangning Cui,Raymond H. Chan,Robert J. Plemmons
title: Classification of Hyperspectral Images Using SVM with Shape-adaptive Reconstruction and Smoothed Total Variation
title_zh: 使用具有形状自适应重建和平滑总变差的 SVM 对高光谱图像进行分类
comment: 6 pages, 3 figures. Accepted to Proceedings of IEEE IGARSS 2022
comments: 6 pages, 3 figures. Accepted to Proceedings of IEEE IGARSS 2022
abstract: In this work, a novel algorithm called SVM with Shape-adaptive Reconstruction and Smoothed Total Variation (SaR-SVM-STV) is introduced to classify hyperspectral images, which makes full use of spatial and spectral information. The Shape-adaptive Reconstruction (SaR) is introduced to preprocess each pixel based on the Pearson Correlation between pixels in its shape-adaptive (SA) region. Support Vector Machines (SVMs) are trained to estimate the pixel-wise probability maps of each class. Then the Smoothed Total Variation (STV) model is applied to denoise and generate the final classification map. Experiments show that SaR-SVM-STV outperforms the SVM-STV method with a few training labels, demonstrating the significance of reconstructing hyperspectral images before classification.
summary: In this work, a novel algorithm called SVM with Shape-adaptive Reconstruction and Smoothed Total Variation (SaR-SVM-STV) is introduced to classify hyperspectral images, which makes full use of spatial and spectral information. The Shape-adaptive Reconstruction (SaR) is introduced to preprocess each pixel based on the Pearson Correlation between pixels in its shape-adaptive (SA) region. Support Vector Machines (SVMs) are trained to estimate the pixel-wise probability maps of each class. Then the Smoothed Total Variation (STV) model is applied to denoise and generate the final classification map. Experiments show that SaR-SVM-STV outperforms the SVM-STV method with a few training labels, demonstrating the significance of reconstructing hyperspectral images before classification.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，引入了一种名为SVM with Shape-adaptive Reconstruction and Smoothed Total Variation (SaR-SVM-STV)的新颖算法来对高光谱图像进行分类，该算法充分利用了空间和光谱信息。引入形状自适应重建（SaR），根据形状自适应（SA）区域中像素之间的皮尔逊相关性对每个像素进行预处理。支持向量机 (SVM) 经过训练来估计每个类别的像素级概率图。然后应用平滑总变异（STV）模型去噪并生成最终的分类图。实验表明，SaR-SVM-STV 在训练标签较少的情况下优于 SVM-STV 方法，证明了分类前重建高光谱图像的重要性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合形状自适应重建和光滑总变分的SVM方法，用于高光谱图像分类，充分利用空间和光谱信息提升分类效果。
AI.motivation: 传统高光谱分类方法在少量训练样本下表现不足，需通过预处理增强空间信息利用以提高分类精度。
AI.method: 采用形状自适应重建（SaR）基于皮尔逊相关系数预处理像素，利用SVM生成类别概率图，最后通过光滑总变分（STV）去噪优化分类结果。
AI.result: 实验表明，与SVM-STV方法相比，SaR-SVM-STV在少量训练标签下分类精度显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 预分类重建步骤能有效增强高光谱图像分类性能，尤其在训练数据有限的场景下具有重要意义。

authors_text: E. Gonzalez-Sosa,J. Fierrez,R. Vera-Rodriguez,F. Alonso-Fernandez,V. M. Patel
title: Exploring Body Texture from mmW Images for Person Recognition
title_zh: 从毫米波图像中探索身体纹理以进行人物识别
comment: Published at IEEE Transactions on Biometrics, Behavior, and Identity Science
comments: Published at IEEE Transactions on Biometrics, Behavior, and Identity Science
abstract: Imaging using millimeter waves (mmWs) has many advantages including the ability to penetrate obscurants such as clothes and polymers. After having explored shape information retrieved from mmW images for person recognition, in this work we aim to gain some insight about the potential of using mmW texture information for the same task, considering not only the mmW face, but also mmW torso and mmW wholebody. We report experimental results using the mmW TNO database consisting of 50 individuals based on both hand-crafted and learned features from Alexnet and VGG-face pretrained Convolutional Neural Networks (CNN) models. First, we analyze the individual performance of three mmW body parts, concluding that: i) mmW torso region is more discriminative than mmW face and the whole body, ii) CNN features produce better results compared to hand-crafted features on mmW faces and the entire body, and iii) hand-crafted features slightly outperform CNN features on mmW torso. In the second part of this work, we analyze different multi-algorithmic and multi-modal techniques, including a novel CNN-based fusion technique, improving verification results to 2% EER and identification rank-1 results up to 99%. Comparative analyses with mmW body shape information and face recognition in the visible and NIR spectral bands are also reported.
summary: Imaging using millimeter waves (mmWs) has many advantages including the ability to penetrate obscurants such as clothes and polymers. After having explored shape information retrieved from mmW images for person recognition, in this work we aim to gain some insight about the potential of using mmW texture information for the same task, considering not only the mmW face, but also mmW torso and mmW wholebody. We report experimental results using the mmW TNO database consisting of 50 individuals based on both hand-crafted and learned features from Alexnet and VGG-face pretrained Convolutional Neural Networks (CNN) models. First, we analyze the individual performance of three mmW body parts, concluding that: i) mmW torso region is more discriminative than mmW face and the whole body, ii) CNN features produce better results compared to hand-crafted features on mmW faces and the entire body, and iii) hand-crafted features slightly outperform CNN features on mmW torso. In the second part of this work, we analyze different multi-algorithmic and multi-modal techniques, including a novel CNN-based fusion technique, improving verification results to 2% EER and identification rank-1 results up to 99%. Comparative analyses with mmW body shape information and face recognition in the visible and NIR spectral bands are also reported.
abstract_zh: 使用毫米波 (mmW) 成像具有许多优点，包括能够穿透衣服和聚合物等遮蔽物。在探索了从毫米波图像中检索的用于人物识别的形状信息之后，在这项工作中，我们的目标是深入了解使用毫米波纹理信息执行同一任务的潜力，不仅考虑毫米波面部，还考虑毫米波躯干和毫米波全身。我们使用由 50 个人组成的 mmW TNO 数据库报告实验结果，该数据库基于 Alexnet 和 VGG 人脸预训练卷积神经网络 (CNN) 模型的手工制作和学习特征。首先，我们分析了三个毫米波身体部位的个体表现，得出的结论是：i）毫米波躯干区域比毫米波面部和全身更具辨别力，ii）与毫米波面部和整个身体上的手工制作的特征相比，CNN 特征产生更好的结果，以及 iii）手工制作的特征在毫米波躯干上略优于 CNN 特征。在这项工作的第二部分中，我们分析了不同的多算法和多模式技术，包括一种新颖的基于 CNN 的融合技术，将验证结果提高到 2% EER，将识别 1 级结果提高到 99%。还报告了可见光和近红外光谱带中毫米波体形信息和人脸识别的比较分析。

AI.tldr: 本论文研究如何利用毫米波（mmW）图像中的体表纹理信息进行人体识别，分析不同身体部位（面部、躯干、全身）及特征提取方法的性能差异。
AI.motivation: 毫米波成像具有穿透衣物的能力，但此前研究主要关注形状信息。为提升识别准确率，需探索纹理信息的潜力，并比较不同特征提取方法在不同身体部位的表现。
AI.method: 基于TNO数据库，采用手工特征与预训练CNN模型（AlexNet、VGG-face）提取特征，分析面部、躯干、全身的个体性能，并设计多算法融合技术提升识别效果。
AI.result: 躯干区域辨识度最高；CNN特征在面部和全身优于手工特征，但手工特征在躯干稍优；融合方法使验证错误率降至2%，识别率高达99%。
AI.conclusion: 毫米波躯干纹理信息具有显著识别价值，多模态融合技术可有效提升性能，为安全监控等场景提供新思路。

authors_text: Jinchuan Tian,Jianwei Yu,Chao Weng,Yuexian Zou,Dong Yu
title: Integrating Lattice-Free MMI into End-to-End Speech Recognition
title_zh: 将无格 MMI 集成到端到端语音识别中
comment: in IEEE/ACM Transactions on Audio, Speech, and Language Processing, 2022
comments: in IEEE/ACM Transactions on Audio, Speech, and Language Processing, 2022
abstract: In automatic speech recognition (ASR) research, discriminative criteria have achieved superior performance in DNN-HMM systems. Given this success, the adoption of discriminative criteria is promising to boost the performance of end-to-end (E2E) ASR systems. With this motivation, previous works have introduced the minimum Bayesian risk (MBR, one of the discriminative criteria) into E2E ASR systems. However, the effectiveness and efficiency of the MBR-based methods are compromised: the MBR criterion is only used in system training, which creates a mismatch between training and decoding; the on-the-fly decoding process in MBR-based methods results in the need for pre-trained models and slow training speeds. To this end, novel algorithms are proposed in this work to integrate another widely used discriminative criterion, lattice-free maximum mutual information (LF-MMI), into E2E ASR systems not only in the training stage but also in the decoding process. The proposed LF-MMI training and decoding methods show their effectiveness on two widely used E2E frameworks: Attention-Based Encoder-Decoders (AEDs) and Neural Transducers (NTs). Compared with MBR-based methods, the proposed LF-MMI method: maintains the consistency between training and decoding; eschews the on-the-fly decoding process; trains from randomly initialized models with superior training efficiency. Experiments suggest that the LF-MMI method outperforms its MBR counterparts and consistently leads to statistically significant performance improvements on various frameworks and datasets from 30 hours to 14.3k hours. The proposed method achieves state-of-the-art (SOTA) results on Aishell-1 (CER 4.10%) and Aishell-2 (CER 5.02%) datasets. Code is released.
summary: In automatic speech recognition (ASR) research, discriminative criteria have achieved superior performance in DNN-HMM systems. Given this success, the adoption of discriminative criteria is promising to boost the performance of end-to-end (E2E) ASR systems. With this motivation, previous works have introduced the minimum Bayesian risk (MBR, one of the discriminative criteria) into E2E ASR systems. However, the effectiveness and efficiency of the MBR-based methods are compromised: the MBR criterion is only used in system training, which creates a mismatch between training and decoding; the on-the-fly decoding process in MBR-based methods results in the need for pre-trained models and slow training speeds. To this end, novel algorithms are proposed in this work to integrate another widely used discriminative criterion, lattice-free maximum mutual information (LF-MMI), into E2E ASR systems not only in the training stage but also in the decoding process. The proposed LF-MMI training and decoding methods show their effectiveness on two widely used E2E frameworks: Attention-Based Encoder-Decoders (AEDs) and Neural Transducers (NTs). Compared with MBR-based methods, the proposed LF-MMI method: maintains the consistency between training and decoding; eschews the on-the-fly decoding process; trains from randomly initialized models with superior training efficiency. Experiments suggest that the LF-MMI method outperforms its MBR counterparts and consistently leads to statistically significant performance improvements on various frameworks and datasets from 30 hours to 14.3k hours. The proposed method achieves state-of-the-art (SOTA) results on Aishell-1 (CER 4.10%) and Aishell-2 (CER 5.02%) datasets. Code is released.
abstract_zh: 在自动语音识别（ASR）研究中，判别标准在 DNN-HMM 系统中取得了优异的性能。鉴于这一成功，采用歧视性标准有望提高端到端 (E2E) ASR 系统的性能。出于这种动机，之前的工作将最小贝叶斯风险（MBR，判别标准之一）引入到端到端 ASR 系统中。然而，基于MBR的方法的有效性和效率受到了影响：MBR准则仅用于系统训练，这会造成训练和解码之间的不匹配；基于 MBR 的方法中的即时解码过程导致需要预训练模型并且训练速度较慢。为此，本文提出了新的算法，将另一种广泛使用的判别标准——无格最大互信息（LF-MMI）——不仅在训练阶段而且在解码过程中集成到E2E ASR系统中。所提出的 LF-MMI 训练和解码方法在两种广泛使用的 E2E 框架上显示了其有效性：基于注意力的编码器-解码器（AED）和神经转换器（NT）。与基于MBR的方法相比，所提出的LF-MMI方法：保持了训练和解码之间的一致性；避开即时解码过程；从具有卓越训练效率的随机初始化模型进行训练。实验表明，LF-MMI 方法优于 MBR 方法，并且在各种框架和数据集上从 30 小时到 14,300 小时持续带来统计上显着的性能改进。所提出的方法在 Aishell-1 (CER 4.10%) 和 Aishell-2 (CER 5.02%) 数据集上取得了最先进 (SOTA) 的结果。代码已发布。

AI.tldr: 本文将无格子最大互信息（LF-MMI）准则整合到端到端（E2E）语音识别系统中，以提升其性能。
AI.motivation: 传统基于最小贝叶斯风险（MBR）的端到端语音识别方法存在训练与解码不一致、依赖预训练模型及训练效率低的问题，需寻找更优的判别准则。
AI.method: 提出将LF-MMI准则应用于E2E系统的训练与解码阶段，避免实时解码过程，并在随机初始化模型上实现高效训练。
AI.result: 实验表明，LF-MMI方法在AED和NT框架下均优于MBR方法，在Aishell-1和Aishell-2数据集上达到字符错误率4.10%和5.02%的最先进（SOTA）结果。
AI.conclusion: LF-MMI准则有效解决了MBR方法的局限性，在端到端语音识别中展现出更高的性能与效率优势。

search_text: Integrating Lattice-Free MMI into End-to-End Speech Recognition 将无格 MMI 集成到端到端语音识别中 In automatic speech recognition (ASR) research, discriminative criteria have achieved superior performance in DNN-HMM systems. Given this success, the adoption of discriminative criteria is promising to boost the performance of end-to-end (E2E) ASR systems. With this motivation, previous works have introduced the minimum Bayesian risk (MBR, one of the discriminative criteria) into E2E ASR systems. However, the effectiveness and efficiency of the MBR-based methods are compromised: the MBR criterion is only used in system training, which creates a mismatch between training and decoding; the on-the-fly decoding process in MBR-based methods results in the need for pre-trained models and slow training speeds. To this end, novel algorithms are proposed in this work to integrate another widely used discriminative criterion, lattice-free maximum mutual information (LF-MMI), into E2E ASR systems not only in the training stage but also in the decoding process. The proposed LF-MMI training and decoding methods show their effectiveness on two widely used E2E frameworks: Attention-Based Encoder-Decoders (AEDs) and Neural Transducers (NTs). Compared with MBR-based methods, the proposed LF-MMI method: maintains the consistency between training and decoding; eschews the on-the-fly decoding process; trains from randomly initialized models with superior training efficiency. Experiments suggest that the LF-MMI method outperforms its MBR counterparts and consistently leads to statistically significant performance improvements on various frameworks and datasets from 30 hours to 14.3k hours. The proposed method achieves state-of-the-art (SOTA) results on Aishell-1 (CER 4.10%) and Aishell-2 (CER 5.02%) datasets. Code is released. 在自动语音识别（ASR）研究中，判别标准在 DNN-HMM 系统中取得了优异的性能。鉴于这一成功，采用歧视性标准有望提高端到端 (E2E) ASR 系统的性能。出于这种动机，之前的工作将最小贝叶斯风险（MBR，判别标准之一）引入到端到端 ASR 系统中。然而，基于MBR的方法的有效性和效率受到了影响：MBR准则仅用于系统训练，这会造成训练和解码之间的不匹配；基于 MBR 的方法中的即时解码过程导致需要预训练模型并且训练速度较慢。为此，本文提出了新的算法，将另一种广泛使用的判别标准——无格最大互信息（LF-MMI）——不仅在训练阶段而且在解码过程中集成到E2E ASR系统中。所提出的 LF-MMI 训练和解码方法在两种广泛使用的 E2E 框架上显示了其有效性：基于注意力的编码器-解码器（AED）和神经转换器（NT）。与基于MBR的方法相比，所提出的LF-MMI方法：保持了训练和解码之间的一致性；避开即时解码过程；从具有卓越训练效率的随机初始化模型进行训练。实验表明，LF-MMI 方法优于 MBR 方法，并且在各种框架和数据集上从 30 小时到 14,300 小时持续带来统计上显着的性能改进。所提出的方法在 Aishell-1 (CER 4.10%) 和 Aishell-2 (CER 5.02%) 数据集上取得了最先进 (SOTA) 的结果。代码已发布。 本文将无格子最大互信息（LF-MMI）准则整合到端到端（E2E）语音识别系统中，以提升其性能。 Jinchuan Tian,Jianwei Yu,Chao Weng,Yuexian Zou,Dong Yu cs.CL,cs.SD,eess.AS

authors_text: Jingyu Sun,Guiping Zhong,Dinghao Zhou,Baoxiang Li
title: Dynamic Latency for CTC-Based Streaming Automatic Speech Recognition With Emformer
title_zh: 使用 Emformer 实现基于 CTC 的流式自动语音识别的动态延迟
abstract: An inferior performance of the streaming automatic speech recognition models versus non-streaming model is frequently seen due to the absence of future context. In order to improve the performance of the streaming model and reduce the computational complexity, a frame-level model using efficient augment memory transformer block and dynamic latency training method is employed for streaming automatic speech recognition in this paper. The long-range history context is stored into the augment memory bank as a complement to the limited history context used in the encoder. Key and value are cached by a cache mechanism and reused for next chunk to reduce computation. Afterwards, a dynamic latency training method is proposed to obtain better performance and support low and high latency inference simultaneously. Our experiments are conducted on benchmark 960h LibriSpeech data set. With an average latency of 640ms, our model achieves a relative WER reduction of 6.0% on test-clean and 3.0% on test-other versus the truncate chunk-wise Transformer.
summary: An inferior performance of the streaming automatic speech recognition models versus non-streaming model is frequently seen due to the absence of future context. In order to improve the performance of the streaming model and reduce the computational complexity, a frame-level model using efficient augment memory transformer block and dynamic latency training method is employed for streaming automatic speech recognition in this paper. The long-range history context is stored into the augment memory bank as a complement to the limited history context used in the encoder. Key and value are cached by a cache mechanism and reused for next chunk to reduce computation. Afterwards, a dynamic latency training method is proposed to obtain better performance and support low and high latency inference simultaneously. Our experiments are conducted on benchmark 960h LibriSpeech data set. With an average latency of 640ms, our model achieves a relative WER reduction of 6.0% on test-clean and 3.0% on test-other versus the truncate chunk-wise Transformer.
abstract_zh: 由于缺乏未来上下文，流式自动语音识别模型与非流式模型的性能较差的情况经常出现。为了提高流式模型的性能并降低计算复杂度，本文采用一种使用高效增强记忆变压器块和动态延迟训练方法的帧级模型来进行流式自动语音识别。远程历史上下文被存储到增强存储器库中，作为编码器中使用的有限历史上下文的补充。 Key 和 Value 通过缓存机制进行缓存，并在下一个 chunk 中重用，以减少计算量。随后，提出了一种动态延迟训练方法以获得更好的性能并同时支持低延迟和高延迟推理。我们的实验是在基准 960h LibriSpeech 数据集上进行的。平均延迟为 640 毫秒，与截断分块 Transformer 相比，我们的模型在 test-clean 上实现了 6.0% 的相对 WER 减少，在 test-other 上实现了 3.0% 的相对 WER 减少。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于Emformer和动态延迟训练方法的流式自动语音识别模型，以提升性能并降低计算复杂度。
AI.motivation: 流式模型因缺乏未来上下文而性能劣于非流式模型，需在提升性能的同时减少计算量。
AI.method: 采用高效增强记忆Transformer块存储长距离历史上下文，并通过缓存机制复用键值减少计算；提出动态延迟训练方法以支持高低延迟推理。
AI.result: 在LibriSpeech数据集上，平均延迟640ms时，测试集clean和other的词错误率分别降低6.0%和3.0%。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效平衡了流式ASR的性能与计算效率，适用于实时场景。

authors_text: Zhiqing Wei,Rubing Yao,Jie Kang,Xu Chen,Huici Wu
title: Three-Dimensional Spectrum Occupancy Measurement using UAV: Performance Analysis and Algorithm Design
title_zh: 使用无人机进行三维频谱占用测量：性能分析和算法设计
abstract: Spectrum sharing, as an approach to significantly improve spectrum efficiency in the era of 6th generation mobile networks (6G), has attracted extensive attention. Radio Environment Map (REM) based low-complexity spectrum sharing is widely studied where the spectrum occupancy measurement (SOM) is vital to construct REM. The SOM in three-dimensional (3D) space is becoming increasingly essential to support the spectrum sharing with space-air-ground integrated network being a great momentum of 6G. In this paper, we analyze the performance of 3D SOM to further study the tradeoff between accuracy and efficiency in 3D SOM. We discover that the error of 3D SOM is related with the area of the boundary surfaces of licensed networks, the number of discretized cubes, and the length of the edge of 3D space. Moreover, we design a fast and accurate 3D SOM algorithm that utilizes unmanned aerial vehicle (UAV) to measure the spectrum occupancy considering the path planning of UAV, which improves the measurement efficiency by requiring less measurement time and flight time of the UAV for satisfactory performance. The theoretical results obtained in this paper reveal the essential dependencies that describe the 3D SOM methodology, and the proposed algorithm is beneficial to improve the efficiency of 3D SOM. It is noted that the theoretical results and algorithm in this paper may provide a guideline for more areas such as spectrum monitoring, spectrum measurement, network measurement, planning, etc.
summary: Spectrum sharing, as an approach to significantly improve spectrum efficiency in the era of 6th generation mobile networks (6G), has attracted extensive attention. Radio Environment Map (REM) based low-complexity spectrum sharing is widely studied where the spectrum occupancy measurement (SOM) is vital to construct REM. The SOM in three-dimensional (3D) space is becoming increasingly essential to support the spectrum sharing with space-air-ground integrated network being a great momentum of 6G. In this paper, we analyze the performance of 3D SOM to further study the tradeoff between accuracy and efficiency in 3D SOM. We discover that the error of 3D SOM is related with the area of the boundary surfaces of licensed networks, the number of discretized cubes, and the length of the edge of 3D space. Moreover, we design a fast and accurate 3D SOM algorithm that utilizes unmanned aerial vehicle (UAV) to measure the spectrum occupancy considering the path planning of UAV, which improves the measurement efficiency by requiring less measurement time and flight time of the UAV for satisfactory performance. The theoretical results obtained in this paper reveal the essential dependencies that describe the 3D SOM methodology, and the proposed algorithm is beneficial to improve the efficiency of 3D SOM. It is noted that the theoretical results and algorithm in this paper may provide a guideline for more areas such as spectrum monitoring, spectrum measurement, network measurement, planning, etc.
abstract_zh: 频谱共享作为第六代移动网络（6G）时代大幅提高频谱效率的手段，受到了广泛关注。基于无线电环境图（REM）的低复杂度频谱共享被广泛研究，其中频谱占用测量（SOM）对于构建REM至关重要。三维（3D）空间中的SOM对于支持频谱共享变得越来越重要，天地一体化网络是6G的强大动力。在本文中，我们分析 3D SOM 的性能，以进一步研究 3D SOM 精度和效率之间的权衡。我们发现3D SOM的误差与许可网络的边界面面积、离散立方体的数量以及3D空间边的长度有关。此外，我们设计了一种快速、准确的3D SOM算法，利用无人机来测量频谱占用率，同时考虑到无人机的路径规划，通过减少无人机的测量时间和飞行时间来获得令人满意的性能，从而提高了测量效率。本文获得的理论结果揭示了描述3D SOM方法的本质依赖关系，并且所提出的算法有利于提高3D SOM的效率。值得注意的是，本文的理论结果和算法可以为频谱监测、频谱测量、网络测量、规划等更多领域提供指导。

AI.tldr: 本文分析三维频谱占用测量（3D SOM）的性能并设计基于无人机的高效算法。
AI.motivation: 6G时代空天地一体化网络对三维频谱共享需求迫切，但现有3D SOM在精度与效率间存在矛盾，需优化测量方法。
AI.method: 通过理论分析3D SOM误差与边界面积、离散立方体数量及空间边长的关系，并设计结合无人机路径规划的快速测量算法。
AI.result: 揭示了3D SOM误差的关键影响因素，提出减少无人机测量时间与飞行时间的算法，提升测量效率。
AI.conclusion: 理论成果与算法为频谱监测、网络规划等领域提供指导，助力6G高效频谱共享实现。

ai_content.motivation: 6G时代空天地一体化网络对三维频谱共享需求迫切，但现有3D SOM在精度与效率间存在矛盾，需优化测量方法。
ai_content.method: 通过理论分析3D SOM误差与边界面积、离散立方体数量及空间边长的关系，并设计结合无人机路径规划的快速测量算法。
ai_content.result: 揭示了3D SOM误差的关键影响因素，提出减少无人机测量时间与飞行时间的算法，提升测量效率。
ai_content.conclusion: 理论成果与算法为频谱监测、网络规划等领域提供指导，助力6G高效频谱共享实现。
