search_text: Three-Dimensional Spectrum Occupancy Measurement using UAV: Performance Analysis and Algorithm Design 使用无人机进行三维频谱占用测量：性能分析和算法设计 Spectrum sharing, as an approach to significantly improve spectrum efficiency in the era of 6th generation mobile networks (6G), has attracted extensive attention. Radio Environment Map (REM) based low-complexity spectrum sharing is widely studied where the spectrum occupancy measurement (SOM) is vital to construct REM. The SOM in three-dimensional (3D) space is becoming increasingly essential to support the spectrum sharing with space-air-ground integrated network being a great momentum of 6G. In this paper, we analyze the performance of 3D SOM to further study the tradeoff between accuracy and efficiency in 3D SOM. We discover that the error of 3D SOM is related with the area of the boundary surfaces of licensed networks, the number of discretized cubes, and the length of the edge of 3D space. Moreover, we design a fast and accurate 3D SOM algorithm that utilizes unmanned aerial vehicle (UAV) to measure the spectrum occupancy considering the path planning of UAV, which improves the measurement efficiency by requiring less measurement time and flight time of the UAV for satisfactory performance. The theoretical results obtained in this paper reveal the essential dependencies that describe the 3D SOM methodology, and the proposed algorithm is beneficial to improve the efficiency of 3D SOM. It is noted that the theoretical results and algorithm in this paper may provide a guideline for more areas such as spectrum monitoring, spectrum measurement, network measurement, planning, etc. 频谱共享作为第六代移动网络（6G）时代大幅提高频谱效率的手段，受到了广泛关注。基于无线电环境图（REM）的低复杂度频谱共享被广泛研究，其中频谱占用测量（SOM）对于构建REM至关重要。三维（3D）空间中的SOM对于支持频谱共享变得越来越重要，天地一体化网络是6G的强大动力。在本文中，我们分析 3D SOM 的性能，以进一步研究 3D SOM 精度和效率之间的权衡。我们发现3D SOM的误差与许可网络的边界面面积、离散立方体的数量以及3D空间边的长度有关。此外，我们设计了一种快速、准确的3D SOM算法，利用无人机来测量频谱占用率，同时考虑到无人机的路径规划，通过减少无人机的测量时间和飞行时间来获得令人满意的性能，从而提高了测量效率。本文获得的理论结果揭示了描述3D SOM方法的本质依赖关系，并且所提出的算法有利于提高3D SOM的效率。值得注意的是，本文的理论结果和算法可以为频谱监测、频谱测量、网络测量、规划等更多领域提供指导。 本文分析三维频谱占用测量（3D SOM）的性能并设计基于无人机的高效算法。 Zhiqing Wei,Rubing Yao,Jie Kang,Xu Chen,Huici Wu cs.RO

authors_text: Rui Wang,Qibing Bai,Junyi Ao,Long Zhou,Zhixiang Xiong,Zhihua Wei,Yu Zhang,Tom Ko,Haizhou Li
title: LightHuBERT: Lightweight and Configurable Speech Representation Learning with Once-for-All Hidden-Unit BERT
title_zh: LightHuBERT：使用一劳永逸的隐藏单元 BERT 进行轻量级且可配置的语音表示学习
abstract: Self-supervised speech representation learning has shown promising results in various speech processing tasks. However, the pre-trained models, e.g., HuBERT, are storage-intensive Transformers, limiting their scope of applications under low-resource settings. To this end, we propose LightHuBERT, a once-for-all Transformer compression framework, to find the desired architectures automatically by pruning structured parameters. More precisely, we create a Transformer-based supernet that is nested with thousands of weight-sharing subnets and design a two-stage distillation strategy to leverage the contextualized latent representations from HuBERT. Experiments on automatic speech recognition (ASR) and the SUPERB benchmark show the proposed LightHuBERT enables over $10^9$ architectures concerning the embedding dimension, attention dimension, head number, feed-forward network ratio, and network depth. LightHuBERT outperforms the original HuBERT on ASR and five SUPERB tasks with the HuBERT size, achieves comparable performance to the teacher model in most tasks with a reduction of 29% parameters, and obtains a $3.5\times$ compression ratio in three SUPERB tasks, e.g., automatic speaker verification, keyword spotting, and intent classification, with a slight accuracy loss. The code and pre-trained models are available at https://github.com/mechanicalsea/lighthubert.
summary: Self-supervised speech representation learning has shown promising results in various speech processing tasks. However, the pre-trained models, e.g., HuBERT, are storage-intensive Transformers, limiting their scope of applications under low-resource settings. To this end, we propose LightHuBERT, a once-for-all Transformer compression framework, to find the desired architectures automatically by pruning structured parameters. More precisely, we create a Transformer-based supernet that is nested with thousands of weight-sharing subnets and design a two-stage distillation strategy to leverage the contextualized latent representations from HuBERT. Experiments on automatic speech recognition (ASR) and the SUPERB benchmark show the proposed LightHuBERT enables over $10^9$ architectures concerning the embedding dimension, attention dimension, head number, feed-forward network ratio, and network depth. LightHuBERT outperforms the original HuBERT on ASR and five SUPERB tasks with the HuBERT size, achieves comparable performance to the teacher model in most tasks with a reduction of 29% parameters, and obtains a $3.5\times$ compression ratio in three SUPERB tasks, e.g., automatic speaker verification, keyword spotting, and intent classification, with a slight accuracy loss. The code and pre-trained models are available at https://github.com/mechanicalsea/lighthubert.
abstract_zh: 自监督语音表示学习在各种语音处理任务中显示出了有希望的结果。然而，预训练的模型（例如 HuBERT）是存储密集型 Transformer，限制了其在低资源设置下的应用范围。为此，我们提出了 LightHuBERT，一种一劳永逸的 Transformer 压缩框架，通过修剪结构化参数自动找到所需的架构。更准确地说，我们创建了一个基于 Transformer 的超级网，其中嵌套了数千个权重共享子网，并设计了一个两阶段蒸馏策略来利用 HuBERT 的情境化潜在表示。自动语音识别 (ASR) 和 SUPERB 基准测试表明，所提出的 LightHuBERT 在嵌入维度、注意力维度、头数、前馈网络比率和网络深度方面能够实现超过 10^9$ 美元的架构。 LightHuBERT 在 ASR 和 HuBERT 大小的 5 个 SUPERB 任务上优于原始 HuBERT，在大多数任务中实现了与教师模型相当的性能，参数减少了 29%，并在自动说话人验证、关键词识别和意图分类等 3 个 SUPERB 任务中获得了 3.5 美元\times$的压缩比，但准确性略有损失。代码和预训练模型可在 https://github.com/mechanicalsea/lighthubert 上获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出LightHuBERT，一种轻量且可配置的语音表征学习框架，通过一次性的Transformer压缩方法解决预训练模型存储需求高的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有语音表征模型（如HuBERT）基于存储需求高的Transformer架构，在资源受限场景下应用受限，需开发轻量化替代方案。
AI.method: 构建包含数千个共享权重子网络的Transformer超网络，采用两阶段蒸馏策略，利用HuBERT的上下文隐层表征进行参数剪枝和架构搜索。
AI.result: 在ASR和SUPERB基准测试中，LightHuBERT在保持HuBERT规模时优于原模型，参数量减少29%时性能相当，三个任务压缩3.5倍且仅轻微损失精度。
AI.conclusion: LightHuBERT通过一次性的架构搜索实现了高效压缩，在保持性能的同时显著降低存储需求，适用于低资源场景的语音处理任务。

authors_text: Jingyu Sun,Guiping Zhong,Dinghao Zhou,Baoxiang Li,Yiran Zhong
title: Locality Matters: A Locality-Biased Linear Attention for Automatic Speech Recognition
title_zh: 局部性很重要：用于自动语音识别的局部性线性注意力
abstract: Conformer has shown a great success in automatic speech recognition (ASR) on many public benchmarks. One of its crucial drawbacks is the quadratic time-space complexity with respect to the input sequence length, which prohibits the model to scale-up as well as process longer input audio sequences. To solve this issue, numerous linear attention methods have been proposed. However, these methods often have limited performance on ASR as they treat tokens equally in modeling, neglecting the fact that the neighbouring tokens are often more connected than the distanced tokens. In this paper, we take this fact into account and propose a new locality-biased linear attention for Conformer. It not only achieves higher accuracy than the vanilla Conformer, but also enjoys linear space-time computational complexity. To be specific, we replace the softmax attention with a locality-biased linear attention (LBLA) mechanism in Conformer blocks. The LBLA contains a kernel function to ensure the linear complexities and a cosine reweighing matrix to impose more weights on neighbouring tokens. Extensive experiments on the LibriSpeech corpus show that by introducing this locality bias to the Conformer, our method achieves a lower word error rate with more than 22% inference speed.
summary: Conformer has shown a great success in automatic speech recognition (ASR) on many public benchmarks. One of its crucial drawbacks is the quadratic time-space complexity with respect to the input sequence length, which prohibits the model to scale-up as well as process longer input audio sequences. To solve this issue, numerous linear attention methods have been proposed. However, these methods often have limited performance on ASR as they treat tokens equally in modeling, neglecting the fact that the neighbouring tokens are often more connected than the distanced tokens. In this paper, we take this fact into account and propose a new locality-biased linear attention for Conformer. It not only achieves higher accuracy than the vanilla Conformer, but also enjoys linear space-time computational complexity. To be specific, we replace the softmax attention with a locality-biased linear attention (LBLA) mechanism in Conformer blocks. The LBLA contains a kernel function to ensure the linear complexities and a cosine reweighing matrix to impose more weights on neighbouring tokens. Extensive experiments on the LibriSpeech corpus show that by introducing this locality bias to the Conformer, our method achieves a lower word error rate with more than 22% inference speed.
abstract_zh: Conformer 在许多公共基准测试中在自动语音识别 (ASR) 方面取得了巨大成功。其关键缺点之一是输入序列长度的二次时空复杂性，这阻碍了模型的扩展以及处理更长的输入音频序列。为了解决这个问题，人们提出了许多线性注意力方法。然而，这些方法在 ASR 上的性能通常有限，因为它们在建模时平等地对待令牌，忽略了相邻令牌通常比距离较远的令牌连接更紧密的事实。在本文中，我们考虑到这一事实，并为 Conformer 提出了一种新的局部偏置线性注意力。它不仅比普通 Conformer 具有更高的精度，而且还具有线性时空计算复杂度。具体来说，我们在 Conformer 块中将 softmax 注意力替换为局部偏置线性注意力（LBLA）机制。 LBLA 包含一个核函数来确保线性复杂性和一个余弦重新加权矩阵来对相邻标记施加更多权重。在 LibriSpeech 语料库上进行的大量实验表明，通过向 Conformer 引入这种局部性偏差，我们的方法实现了较低的单词错误率，推理速度提高了 22% 以上。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于局部性偏差的线性注意力机制（LBLA），用于改进语音识别中的Conformer模型，以解决其计算复杂度高和性能不足的问题。
AI.motivation: Conformer模型在语音识别中表现优异，但其二次时间-空间复杂度限制了模型扩展性和长序列处理能力，现有线性注意力方法未充分考虑相邻token的关联性。
AI.method: 将Conformer中的softmax注意力替换为LBLA机制，通过核函数保证线性复杂度，并利用余弦重加权矩阵增强相邻token的权重。
AI.result: 在LibriSpeech数据集上，LBLA方法使词错误率降低，推理速度提升超22%，同时保持线性时空复杂度。
AI.conclusion: 局部性偏差的线性注意力机制有效提升了Conformer在语音识别中的效率与准确性，为长序列处理提供了可行方案。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种基于局部性偏差的线性注意力机制（LBLA），用于改进语音识别中的Conformer模型，以解决其计算复杂度高和性能不足的问题。

tldr: 本文提出一种基于局部性偏差的线性注意力机制（LBLA），用于改进语音识别中的Conformer模型，以解决其计算复杂度高和性能不足的问题。
motivation: Conformer模型在语音识别中表现优异，但其二次时间-空间复杂度限制了模型扩展性和长序列处理能力，现有线性注意力方法未充分考虑相邻token的关联性。
method: 将Conformer中的softmax注意力替换为LBLA机制，通过核函数保证线性复杂度，并利用余弦重加权矩阵增强相邻token的权重。
result: 在LibriSpeech数据集上，LBLA方法使词错误率降低，推理速度提升超22%，同时保持线性时空复杂度。
conclusion: 局部性偏差的线性注意力机制有效提升了Conformer在语音识别中的效率与准确性，为长序列处理提供了可行方案。
search_text: Locality Matters: A Locality-Biased Linear Attention for Automatic Speech Recognition 局部性很重要：用于自动语音识别的局部性线性注意力 Conformer has shown a great success in automatic speech recognition (ASR) on many public benchmarks. One of its crucial drawbacks is the quadratic time-space complexity with respect to the input sequence length, which prohibits the model to scale-up as well as process longer input audio sequences. To solve this issue, numerous linear attention methods have been proposed. However, these methods often have limited performance on ASR as they treat tokens equally in modeling, neglecting the fact that the neighbouring tokens are often more connected than the distanced tokens. In this paper, we take this fact into account and propose a new locality-biased linear attention for Conformer. It not only achieves higher accuracy than the vanilla Conformer, but also enjoys linear space-time computational complexity. To be specific, we replace the softmax attention with a locality-biased linear attention (LBLA) mechanism in Conformer blocks. The LBLA contains a kernel function to ensure the linear complexities and a cosine reweighing matrix to impose more weights on neighbouring tokens. Extensive experiments on the LibriSpeech corpus show that by introducing this locality bias to the Conformer, our method achieves a lower word error rate with more than 22% inference speed. Conformer 在许多公共基准测试中在自动语音识别 (ASR) 方面取得了巨大成功。其关键缺点之一是输入序列长度的二次时空复杂性，这阻碍了模型的扩展以及处理更长的输入音频序列。为了解决这个问题，人们提出了许多线性注意力方法。然而，这些方法在 ASR 上的性能通常有限，因为它们在建模时平等地对待令牌，忽略了相邻令牌通常比距离较远的令牌连接更紧密的事实。在本文中，我们考虑到这一事实，并为 Conformer 提出了一种新的局部偏置线性注意力。它不仅比普通 Conformer 具有更高的精度，而且还具有线性时空计算复杂度。具体来说，我们在 Conformer 块中将 softmax 注意力替换为局部偏置线性注意力（LBLA）机制。 LBLA 包含一个核函数来确保线性复杂性和一个余弦重新加权矩阵来对相邻标记施加更多权重。在 LibriSpeech 语料库上进行的大量实验表明，通过向 Conformer 引入这种局部性偏差，我们的方法实现了较低的单词错误率，推理速度提高了 22% 以上。 本文提出一种基于局部性偏差的线性注意力机制（LBLA），用于改进语音识别中的Conformer模型，以解决其计算复杂度高和性能不足的问题。 Jingyu Sun,Guiping Zhong,Dinghao Zhou,Baoxiang Li,Yiran Zhong cs.SD,eess.AS

authors_text: Christian Sigg,Flavia Cavallaro,Tobias Günther,Martin R. Oswald
title: Photographic Visualization of Weather Forecasts with Generative Adversarial Networks
title_zh: 使用生成对抗网络进行天气预报的摄影可视化
abstract: Outdoor webcam images are an information-dense yet accessible visualization of past and present weather conditions, and are consulted by meteorologists and the general public alike. Weather forecasts, however, are still communicated as text, pictograms or charts. We therefore introduce a novel method that uses photographic images to also visualize future weather conditions. This is challenging, because photographic visualizations of weather forecasts should look real, be free of obvious artifacts, and should match the predicted weather conditions. The transition from observation to forecast should be seamless, and there should be visual continuity between images for consecutive lead times. We use conditional Generative Adversarial Networks to synthesize such visualizations. The generator network, conditioned on the analysis and the forecasting state of the numerical weather prediction (NWP) model, transforms the present camera image into the future. The discriminator network judges whether a given image is the real image of the future, or whether it has been synthesized. Training the two networks against each other results in a visualization method that scores well on all four evaluation criteria. We present results for three camera sites across Switzerland that differ in climatology and terrain. We show that users find it challenging to distinguish real from generated images, performing not much better than if they guessed randomly. The generated images match the atmospheric, ground and illumination conditions of the COSMO-1 NWP model forecast in at least 89 % of the examined cases. Nowcasting sequences of generated images achieve a seamless transition from observation to forecast and attain visual continuity.
summary: Outdoor webcam images are an information-dense yet accessible visualization of past and present weather conditions, and are consulted by meteorologists and the general public alike. Weather forecasts, however, are still communicated as text, pictograms or charts. We therefore introduce a novel method that uses photographic images to also visualize future weather conditions. This is challenging, because photographic visualizations of weather forecasts should look real, be free of obvious artifacts, and should match the predicted weather conditions. The transition from observation to forecast should be seamless, and there should be visual continuity between images for consecutive lead times. We use conditional Generative Adversarial Networks to synthesize such visualizations. The generator network, conditioned on the analysis and the forecasting state of the numerical weather prediction (NWP) model, transforms the present camera image into the future. The discriminator network judges whether a given image is the real image of the future, or whether it has been synthesized. Training the two networks against each other results in a visualization method that scores well on all four evaluation criteria. We present results for three camera sites across Switzerland that differ in climatology and terrain. We show that users find it challenging to distinguish real from generated images, performing not much better than if they guessed randomly. The generated images match the atmospheric, ground and illumination conditions of the COSMO-1 NWP model forecast in at least 89 % of the examined cases. Nowcasting sequences of generated images achieve a seamless transition from observation to forecast and attain visual continuity.
abstract_zh: 户外网络摄像头图像是过去和现在天气状况的信息密集且易于理解的可视化图像，可供气象学家和公众参考。然而，天气预报仍然以文本、象形图或图表的形式传达。因此，我们引入了一种新颖的方法，该方法使用摄影图像来可视化未来的天气状况。这是具有挑战性的，因为天气预报的摄影可视化应该看起来真实，没有明显的伪影，并且应该与预测的天气条件相匹配。从观测到预测的过渡应该是无缝的，并且连续交付时间的图像之间应该具有视觉连续性。我们使用条件生成对抗网络来合成此类可视化。生成器网络以数值天气预报（NWP）模型的分析和预测状态为条件，将当前的相机图像转换为未来的图像。判别器网络判断给定的图像是否是未来的真实图像，或者是否已经被合成。相互训练两个网络会产生一种可视化方法，该方法在所有四个评估标准上都得分很高。我们展示了瑞士三个气候和地形不同的相机站点的结果。我们表明，用户发现区分真实图像和生成图像具有挑战性，其表现并不比随机猜测好多少。在至少 89% 的检查案例中，生成的图像与 COSMO-1 NWP 模型预测的大气、地面和照明条件相匹配。生成图像的临近预报序列实现了从观察到预测的无缝过渡，并实现了视觉连续性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出使用生成对抗网络（GAN）将天气预报转化为逼真的照片可视化，以替代传统的文本或图表形式。
AI.motivation: 现有天气预报多以文本、图标或图表呈现，缺乏直观的视觉化未来天气状态的方式，而户外摄像头图像虽能反映实时天气，却无法展示预测信息。
AI.method: 基于条件生成对抗网络（cGAN），生成器以数值天气预测模型的分析和预测数据为条件，将当前摄像头图像转换为未来天气的视觉化图像；判别器则判断图像真实性，通过对抗训练优化生成效果。
AI.result: 在瑞士三个不同气候与地形的摄像头站点测试中，用户难以区分生成图像与真实图像，生成图像在89%的案例中与COSMO-1模型预测一致，并实现观测到预测的无缝视觉过渡。
AI.conclusion: 该方法成功生成符合天气预测的高质量视觉化图像，验证了GAN在气象可视化中的可行性，为未来天气预报提供了直观且具连续性的呈现方式。

authors_text: Matthew Lyon,Paul Armitage,Mauricio A. Álvarez
title: Angular Super-Resolution in Diffusion MRI with a 3D Recurrent Convolutional Autoencoder
title_zh: 使用 3D 循环卷积自动编码器实现扩散 MRI 中的角度超分辨率
comment: Accepted to published in MIDL'22. Openreview link: https://openreview.net/forum?id=U6HJMtAgW-N
comments: Accepted to published in MIDL'22. Openreview link: https://openreview.net/forum?id=U6HJMtAgW-N
abstract: High resolution diffusion MRI (dMRI) data is often constrained by limited scanning time in clinical settings, thus restricting the use of downstream analysis techniques that would otherwise be available. In this work we develop a 3D recurrent convolutional neural network (RCNN) capable of super-resolving dMRI volumes in the angular (q-space) domain. Our approach formulates the task of angular super-resolution as a patch-wise regression using a 3D autoencoder conditioned on target b-vectors. Within the network we use a convolutional long short term memory (ConvLSTM) cell to model the relationship between q-space samples. We compare model performance against a baseline spherical harmonic interpolation and a 1D variant of the model architecture. We show that the 3D model has the lowest error rates across different subsampling schemes and b-values. The relative performance of the 3D RCNN is greatest in the very low angular resolution domain. Code for this project is available at https://github.com/m-lyon/dMRI-RCNN.
summary: High resolution diffusion MRI (dMRI) data is often constrained by limited scanning time in clinical settings, thus restricting the use of downstream analysis techniques that would otherwise be available. In this work we develop a 3D recurrent convolutional neural network (RCNN) capable of super-resolving dMRI volumes in the angular (q-space) domain. Our approach formulates the task of angular super-resolution as a patch-wise regression using a 3D autoencoder conditioned on target b-vectors. Within the network we use a convolutional long short term memory (ConvLSTM) cell to model the relationship between q-space samples. We compare model performance against a baseline spherical harmonic interpolation and a 1D variant of the model architecture. We show that the 3D model has the lowest error rates across different subsampling schemes and b-values. The relative performance of the 3D RCNN is greatest in the very low angular resolution domain. Code for this project is available at https://github.com/m-lyon/dMRI-RCNN.
abstract_zh: 高分辨率扩散 MRI (dMRI) 数据通常受到临床环境中扫描时间有限的限制，从而限制了下游分析技术的使用。在这项工作中，我们开发了一种 3D 循环卷积神经网络 (RCNN)，能够在角度（q 空间）域中超分辨率 dMRI 体积。我们的方法使用以目标 b 向量为条件的 3D 自动编码器将角度超分辨率任务表述为补丁式回归。在网络中，我们使用卷积长短期记忆 (ConvLSTM) 单元来对 q 空间样本之间的关系进行建模。我们将模型性能与基线球谐插值和模型架构的一维变体进行比较。我们表明，3D 模型在不同的子采样方案和 b 值中具有最低的错误率。 3D RCNN 的相对性能在极低角分辨率领域中最高。该项目的代码可在 https://github.com/m-lyon/dMRI-RCNN 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于3D循环卷积自编码器的扩散磁共振成像（dMRI）角超分辨率方法。
AI.motivation: 高分辨率dMRI数据受临床扫描时间限制，现有方法在低角分辨率下性能不足，需改进超分辨率技术以提升下游分析效果。
AI.method: 设计3D循环卷积神经网络（RCNN），结合卷积长短期记忆单元（ConvLSTM）建模q空间样本关系，并以目标b向量为条件进行局部回归。
AI.result: 3D RCNN在不同子采样方案和b值下均取得最低误差率，尤其在极低角分辨率场景下表现显著优于球谐插值和1D模型。
AI.conclusion: 3D RCNN有效解决了dMRI角超分辨率问题，为临床低时间成本下的高精度分析提供了可行方案。

tldr: 本文提出一种基于3D循环卷积自编码器的扩散磁共振成像（dMRI）角超分辨率方法。
motivation: 高分辨率dMRI数据受临床扫描时间限制，现有方法在低角分辨率下性能不足，需改进超分辨率技术以提升下游分析效果。
method: 设计3D循环卷积神经网络（RCNN），结合卷积长短期记忆单元（ConvLSTM）建模q空间样本关系，并以目标b向量为条件进行局部回归。
result: 3D RCNN在不同子采样方案和b值下均取得最低误差率，尤其在极低角分辨率场景下表现显著优于球谐插值和1D模型。
conclusion: 3D RCNN有效解决了dMRI角超分辨率问题，为临床低时间成本下的高精度分析提供了可行方案。
search_text: Angular Super-Resolution in Diffusion MRI with a 3D Recurrent Convolutional Autoencoder 使用 3D 循环卷积自动编码器实现扩散 MRI 中的角度超分辨率 High resolution diffusion MRI (dMRI) data is often constrained by limited scanning time in clinical settings, thus restricting the use of downstream analysis techniques that would otherwise be available. In this work we develop a 3D recurrent convolutional neural network (RCNN) capable of super-resolving dMRI volumes in the angular (q-space) domain. Our approach formulates the task of angular super-resolution as a patch-wise regression using a 3D autoencoder conditioned on target b-vectors. Within the network we use a convolutional long short term memory (ConvLSTM) cell to model the relationship between q-space samples. We compare model performance against a baseline spherical harmonic interpolation and a 1D variant of the model architecture. We show that the 3D model has the lowest error rates across different subsampling schemes and b-values. The relative performance of the 3D RCNN is greatest in the very low angular resolution domain. Code for this project is available at https://github.com/m-lyon/dMRI-RCNN. 高分辨率扩散 MRI (dMRI) 数据通常受到临床环境中扫描时间有限的限制，从而限制了下游分析技术的使用。在这项工作中，我们开发了一种 3D 循环卷积神经网络 (RCNN)，能够在角度（q 空间）域中超分辨率 dMRI 体积。我们的方法使用以目标 b 向量为条件的 3D 自动编码器将角度超分辨率任务表述为补丁式回归。在网络中，我们使用卷积长短期记忆 (ConvLSTM) 单元来对 q 空间样本之间的关系进行建模。我们将模型性能与基线球谐插值和模型架构的一维变体进行比较。我们表明，3D 模型在不同的子采样方案和 b 值中具有最低的错误率。 3D RCNN 的相对性能在极低角分辨率领域中最高。该项目的代码可在 https://github.com/m-lyon/dMRI-RCNN 获取。 本文提出一种基于3D循环卷积自编码器的扩散磁共振成像（dMRI）角超分辨率方法。 Matthew Lyon,Paul Armitage,Mauricio A. Álvarez eess.IV,cs.CV

authors_text: Fang Bai,Teresa Vidal-Calleja,Giorgio Grisetti
title: Sparse Pose Graph Optimization in Cycle Space
title_zh: 循环空间中的稀疏位姿图优化
abstract: The state-of-the-art modern pose-graph optimization (PGO) systems are vertex based. In this context the number of variables might be high, albeit the number of cycles in the graph (loop closures) is relatively low. For sparse problems particularly, the cycle space has a significantly smaller dimension than the number of vertices. By exploiting this observation, in this paper we propose an alternative solution to PGO, that directly exploits the cycle space. We characterize the topology of the graph as a cycle matrix, and re-parameterize the problem using relative poses, which are further constrained by a cycle basis of the graph. We show that by using a minimum cycle basis, the cycle-based approach has superior convergence properties against its vertex-based counterpart, in terms of convergence speed and convergence to the global minimum. For sparse graphs, our cycle-based approach is also more time efficient than the vertex-based. As an additional contribution of this work we present an effective algorithm to compute the minimum cycle basis. Albeit known in computer science, we believe that this algorithm is not familiar to the robotics community. All the claims are validated by experiments on both standard benchmarks and simulated datasets. To foster the reproduction of the results, we provide a complete open-source C++ implementation (Code: \url{https://bitbucket.org/FangBai/cycleBasedPGO) of our approach.
summary: The state-of-the-art modern pose-graph optimization (PGO) systems are vertex based. In this context the number of variables might be high, albeit the number of cycles in the graph (loop closures) is relatively low. For sparse problems particularly, the cycle space has a significantly smaller dimension than the number of vertices. By exploiting this observation, in this paper we propose an alternative solution to PGO, that directly exploits the cycle space. We characterize the topology of the graph as a cycle matrix, and re-parameterize the problem using relative poses, which are further constrained by a cycle basis of the graph. We show that by using a minimum cycle basis, the cycle-based approach has superior convergence properties against its vertex-based counterpart, in terms of convergence speed and convergence to the global minimum. For sparse graphs, our cycle-based approach is also more time efficient than the vertex-based. As an additional contribution of this work we present an effective algorithm to compute the minimum cycle basis. Albeit known in computer science, we believe that this algorithm is not familiar to the robotics community. All the claims are validated by experiments on both standard benchmarks and simulated datasets. To foster the reproduction of the results, we provide a complete open-source C++ implementation (Code: \url{https://bitbucket.org/FangBai/cycleBasedPGO) of our approach.
abstract_zh: 最先进的现代位姿图优化 (PGO) 系统是基于顶点的。在这种情况下，变量的数量可能会很高，尽管图中的循环数量（循环闭合）相对较低。特别是对于稀疏问题，循环空间的维度明显小于顶点数量。通过利用这一观察结果，在本文中，我们提出了 PGO 的替代解决方案，直接利用循环空间。我们将图的拓扑特征描述为循环矩阵，并使用相对位姿重新参数化问题，这进一步受到图的循环基础的约束。我们证明，通过使用最小循环基础，基于循环的方法在收敛速度和收敛到全局最小值方面比基于顶点的方法具有优越的收敛特性。对于稀疏图，我们基于循环的方法也比基于顶点的方法更节省时间。作为这项工作的额外贡献，我们提出了一种有效的算法来计算最小循环基础。尽管该算法在计算机科学中众所周知，但我们认为机器人社区并不熟悉该算法。所有声明均通过标准基准和模拟数据集的实验得到验证。为了促进结果的再现，我们提供了我们方法的完整开源 C++ 实现（代码：\url{https://bitbucket.org/FangBai/cycleBasedPGO）。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于图的环空间的稀疏位姿图优化方法，通过直接利用环空间替代传统顶点基方法来改进优化效率。
AI.motivation: 现有位姿图优化系统基于顶点，变量数量多但环数量少，尤其在稀疏问题中环空间维度远小于顶点数，传统方法效率不足。
AI.method: 通过环矩阵表征图拓扑，用相对位姿重参数化问题并结合图的环基约束，提出基于最小环基的优化方法，并提供计算最小环基的算法。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在收敛速度和全局最优解收敛性上优于顶点基方法，且对稀疏图更高效，开源代码验证了结果可复现性。
AI.conclusion: 基于环空间的优化方法在稀疏场景下具有更优收敛性和效率，同时提出的最小环基算法为机器人领域提供了新工具。

authors_text: Benzhi Wang,Meiyu Liang,Feifei Kou,Mingying Xu
title: Cross-Media Scientific Research Achievements Retrieval Based on Deep Language Model
title_zh: 基于深度语言模型的跨媒体科研成果检索
abstract: Science and technology big data contain a lot of cross-media information.There are images and texts in the scientific paper.The s ingle modal search method cannot well meet the needs of scientific researchers.This paper proposes a cross-media scientific research achievements retrieval method based on deep language model (CARDL).It achieves a unified cross-media semantic representation by learning the semantic association between different modal data, and is applied to the generation of text semantic vector of scientific research achievements, and then cross-media retrieval is realized through semantic similarity matching between different modal data.Experimental results show that the proposed CARDL method achieves better cross-modal retrieval performance than existing methods. Key words science and technology big data ; cross-media retrieval; cross-media semantic association learning; deep language model; semantic similarity
summary: Science and technology big data contain a lot of cross-media information.There are images and texts in the scientific paper.The s ingle modal search method cannot well meet the needs of scientific researchers.This paper proposes a cross-media scientific research achievements retrieval method based on deep language model (CARDL).It achieves a unified cross-media semantic representation by learning the semantic association between different modal data, and is applied to the generation of text semantic vector of scientific research achievements, and then cross-media retrieval is realized through semantic similarity matching between different modal data.Experimental results show that the proposed CARDL method achieves better cross-modal retrieval performance than existing methods. Key words science and technology big data ; cross-media retrieval; cross-media semantic association learning; deep language model; semantic similarity
abstract_zh: 科技大数据包含大量的跨媒体信息，科技论文中有图像和文本，单一模态搜索方法不能很好地满足科研人员的需求。提出一种基于深度语言模型（CARDL）的跨媒体科研成果检索方法，通过学习不同模态数据之间的语义关联实现统一的跨媒体语义表示，并应用于科研成果文本语义向量的生成，然后通过不同模态数据之间的语义相似度匹配实现跨媒体检索。实验结果表明，所提出的CARDL方法比现有方法取得了更好的跨模态检索性能。关键词 科技大数据;跨媒体检索；跨媒体语义关联学习；深层语言模型；语义相似度

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于深度语言模型的跨媒体科研成果检索方法CARDL，解决多模态数据检索难题。
AI.motivation: 现有单模态检索方法无法有效处理科学论文中的图像与文本跨媒体信息，难以满足科研人员需求。
AI.method: 通过学习跨模态语义关联生成统一语义表示，利用深度语言模型构建文本语义向量，基于语义相似性实现跨媒体检索。
AI.result: 实验验证CARDL方法在跨模态检索性能上优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: CARDL方法有效提升了跨媒体科研成果检索的准确性与实用性。

authors_text: Can Cui,Haichun Yang,Yaohong Wang,Shilin Zhao,Zuhayr Asad,Lori A. Coburn,Keith T. Wilson,Bennett A. Landman,Yuankai Huo
title: Deep Multi-modal Fusion of Image and Non-image Data in Disease Diagnosis and Prognosis: A Review
title_zh: 图像和非图像数据的深度多模态融合在疾病诊断和预后中的应用：综述
abstract: The rapid development of diagnostic technologies in healthcare is leading to higher requirements for physicians to handle and integrate the heterogeneous, yet complementary data that are produced during routine practice. For instance, the personalized diagnosis and treatment planning for a single cancer patient relies on the various images (e.g., radiological, pathological, and camera images) and non-image data (e.g., clinical data and genomic data). However, such decision-making procedures can be subjective, qualitative, and have large inter-subject variabilities. With the recent advances in multi-modal deep learning technologies, an increasingly large number of efforts have been devoted to a key question: how do we extract and aggregate multi-modal information to ultimately provide more objective, quantitative computer-aided clinical decision making? This paper reviews the recent studies on dealing with such a question. Briefly, this review will include the (1) overview of current multi-modal learning workflows, (2) summarization of multi-modal fusion methods, (3) discussion of the performance, (4) applications in disease diagnosis and prognosis, and (5) challenges and future directions.
summary: The rapid development of diagnostic technologies in healthcare is leading to higher requirements for physicians to handle and integrate the heterogeneous, yet complementary data that are produced during routine practice. For instance, the personalized diagnosis and treatment planning for a single cancer patient relies on the various images (e.g., radiological, pathological, and camera images) and non-image data (e.g., clinical data and genomic data). However, such decision-making procedures can be subjective, qualitative, and have large inter-subject variabilities. With the recent advances in multi-modal deep learning technologies, an increasingly large number of efforts have been devoted to a key question: how do we extract and aggregate multi-modal information to ultimately provide more objective, quantitative computer-aided clinical decision making? This paper reviews the recent studies on dealing with such a question. Briefly, this review will include the (1) overview of current multi-modal learning workflows, (2) summarization of multi-modal fusion methods, (3) discussion of the performance, (4) applications in disease diagnosis and prognosis, and (5) challenges and future directions.
abstract_zh: 医疗保健诊断技术的快速发展对医生处理和整合日常实践中产生的异构但互补的数据提出了更高的要求。例如，单个癌症患者的个性化诊断和治疗计划依赖于各种图像（例如放射学图像、病理学图像和相机图像）和非图像数据（例如临床数据和基因组数据）。然而，这种决策程序可能是主观的、定性的，并且具有很大的主体间差异。随着多模态深度学习技术的最新进展，越来越多的努力致力于解决一个关键问题：我们如何提取和聚合多模态信息，以最终提供更客观、定量的计算机辅助临床决策？本文回顾了最近处理这一问题的研究。简而言之，本综述将包括（1）当前多模态学习工作流程的概述，（2）多模态融合方法的总结，（3）性能讨论，（4）在疾病诊断和预后中的应用，以及（5）挑战和未来方向。

AI.tldr: 综述多模态深度学习在疾病诊断与预后中的图像与非图像数据融合方法
AI.motivation: 解决传统诊断中数据整合主观性与变异性问题，提升临床决策客观性与定量分析
AI.method: 系统综述多模态学习流程，总结融合方法，分析性能及应用，并讨论挑战与未来方向
AI.result: 总结多模态融合技术在疾病诊断中的应用现状，分析其性能优势及现存挑战
AI.conclusion: 多模态融合提升诊断客观性，但需解决数据异质性、可解释性等问题，未来需结合临床需求优化算法

search_text: Deep Multi-modal Fusion of Image and Non-image Data in Disease Diagnosis and Prognosis: A Review 图像和非图像数据的深度多模态融合在疾病诊断和预后中的应用：综述 The rapid development of diagnostic technologies in healthcare is leading to higher requirements for physicians to handle and integrate the heterogeneous, yet complementary data that are produced during routine practice. For instance, the personalized diagnosis and treatment planning for a single cancer patient relies on the various images (e.g., radiological, pathological, and camera images) and non-image data (e.g., clinical data and genomic data). However, such decision-making procedures can be subjective, qualitative, and have large inter-subject variabilities. With the recent advances in multi-modal deep learning technologies, an increasingly large number of efforts have been devoted to a key question: how do we extract and aggregate multi-modal information to ultimately provide more objective, quantitative computer-aided clinical decision making? This paper reviews the recent studies on dealing with such a question. Briefly, this review will include the (1) overview of current multi-modal learning workflows, (2) summarization of multi-modal fusion methods, (3) discussion of the performance, (4) applications in disease diagnosis and prognosis, and (5) challenges and future directions. 医疗保健诊断技术的快速发展对医生处理和整合日常实践中产生的异构但互补的数据提出了更高的要求。例如，单个癌症患者的个性化诊断和治疗计划依赖于各种图像（例如放射学图像、病理学图像和相机图像）和非图像数据（例如临床数据和基因组数据）。然而，这种决策程序可能是主观的、定性的，并且具有很大的主体间差异。随着多模态深度学习技术的最新进展，越来越多的努力致力于解决一个关键问题：我们如何提取和聚合多模态信息，以最终提供更客观、定量的计算机辅助临床决策？本文回顾了最近处理这一问题的研究。简而言之，本综述将包括（1）当前多模态学习工作流程的概述，（2）多模态融合方法的总结，（3）性能讨论，（4）在疾病诊断和预后中的应用，以及（5）挑战和未来方向。 综述多模态深度学习在疾病诊断与预后中的图像与非图像数据融合方法 Can Cui,Haichun Yang,Yaohong Wang,Shilin Zhao,Zuhayr Asad,Lori A. authors_text: Arnab Dey,Andrew I. Comport
title: RGB-D Neural Radiance Fields: Local Sampling for Faster Training
title_zh: RGB-D 神经辐射场：局部采样以加快训练速度
abstract: Learning a 3D representation of a scene has been a challenging problem for decades in computer vision. Recent advances in implicit neural representation from images using neural radiance fields(NeRF) have shown promising results. Some of the limitations of previous NeRF based methods include longer training time, and inaccurate underlying geometry. The proposed method takes advantage of RGB-D data to reduce training time by leveraging depth sensing to improve local sampling. This paper proposes a depth-guided local sampling strategy and a smaller neural network architecture to achieve faster training time without compromising quality.
summary: Learning a 3D representation of a scene has been a challenging problem for decades in computer vision. Recent advances in implicit neural representation from images using neural radiance fields(NeRF) have shown promising results. Some of the limitations of previous NeRF based methods include longer training time, and inaccurate underlying geometry. The proposed method takes advantage of RGB-D data to reduce training time by leveraging depth sensing to improve local sampling. This paper proposes a depth-guided local sampling strategy and a smaller neural network architecture to achieve faster training time without compromising quality.
abstract_zh: 几十年来，学习场景的 3D 表示一直是计算机视觉领域的一个具有挑战性的问题。使用神经辐射场（NeRF）进行图像隐式神经表示的最新进展已经显示出有希望的结果。先前基于 NeRF 的方法的一些局限性包括较长的训练时间和不准确的基础几何结构。所提出的方法利用 RGB-D 数据，通过利用深度传感来改进局部采样，从而减少训练时间。本文提出了一种深度引导的局部采样策略和更小的神经网络架构，以在不影响质量的情况下实现更快的训练时间。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于RGB-D数据的深度引导局部采样策略与轻量神经网络，以加速NeRF训练过程。
AI.motivation: 传统NeRF方法存在训练耗时长、几何重建不准确的问题，而RGB-D数据的深度信息可为局部采样提供有效指导。
AI.method: 设计深度感知的局部采样机制，结合精简的神经网络架构，在保证重建质量的前提下提升训练效率。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在保持NeRF重建质量的同时，显著缩短了训练时间。
AI.conclusion: 通过融合深度信息与优化网络结构，为实时三维重建应用提供了更高效的NeRF解决方案。

authors_text: Yingjie Cai,Kwan-Yee Lin,Chao Zhang,Qiang Wang,Xiaogang Wang,Hongsheng Li
title: Learning a Structured Latent Space for Unsupervised Point Cloud Completion
title_zh: 学习结构化潜在空间以实现无监督点云完成
abstract: Unsupervised point cloud completion aims at estimating the corresponding complete point cloud of a partial point cloud in an unpaired manner. It is a crucial but challenging problem since there is no paired partial-complete supervision that can be exploited directly. In this work, we propose a novel framework, which learns a unified and structured latent space that encoding both partial and complete point clouds. Specifically, we map a series of related partial point clouds into multiple complete shape and occlusion code pairs and fuse the codes to obtain their representations in the unified latent space. To enforce the learning of such a structured latent space, the proposed method adopts a series of constraints including structured ranking regularization, latent code swapping constraint, and distribution supervision on the related partial point clouds. By establishing such a unified and structured latent space, better partial-complete geometry consistency and shape completion accuracy can be achieved. Extensive experiments show that our proposed method consistently outperforms state-of-the-art unsupervised methods on both synthetic ShapeNet and real-world KITTI, ScanNet, and Matterport3D datasets.
summary: Unsupervised point cloud completion aims at estimating the corresponding complete point cloud of a partial point cloud in an unpaired manner. It is a crucial but challenging problem since there is no paired partial-complete supervision that can be exploited directly. In this work, we propose a novel framework, which learns a unified and structured latent space that encoding both partial and complete point clouds. Specifically, we map a series of related partial point clouds into multiple complete shape and occlusion code pairs and fuse the codes to obtain their representations in the unified latent space. To enforce the learning of such a structured latent space, the proposed method adopts a series of constraints including structured ranking regularization, latent code swapping constraint, and distribution supervision on the related partial point clouds. By establishing such a unified and structured latent space, better partial-complete geometry consistency and shape completion accuracy can be achieved. Extensive experiments show that our proposed method consistently outperforms state-of-the-art unsupervised methods on both synthetic ShapeNet and real-world KITTI, ScanNet, and Matterport3D datasets.
abstract_zh: 无监督点云补全旨在以不成对的方式估计部分点云对应的完整点云。这是一个至关重要但具有挑战性的问题，因为不存在可以直接利用的配对部分完全监督。在这项工作中，我们提出了一个新颖的框架，它学习一个统一的、结构化的潜在空间，对部分和完整的点云进行编码。具体来说，我们将一系列相关的部分点云映射为多个完整的形状和遮挡代码对，并融合这些代码以获得它们在统一潜在空间中的表示。为了加强对这种结构化潜在空间的学习，该方法采用了一系列约束，包括结构化排序正则化、潜在代码交换约束和对相关部分点云的分布监督。通过建立这样一个统一的、结构化的潜在空间，可以实现更好的部分完全几何一致性和形状完成精度。大量实验表明，我们提出的方法在合成 ShapeNet 和现实世界的 KITTI、ScanNet 和 Matterport3D 数据集上始终优于最先进的无监督方法。

AI.tldr: 该论文提出一种无监督点云补全方法，通过学习统一的结构化潜在空间来编码部分和完整点云。
AI.motivation: 无监督点云补全缺乏配对数据，现有方法难以有效学习潜在空间，导致几何一致性和补全精度不足。
AI.method: 将相关部分点云映射为完整形状和遮挡代码对，融合代码构建统一潜在空间，并采用结构化排序正则化、代码交换约束和分布监督进行学习。
AI.result: 在ShapeNet、KITTI、ScanNet和Matterport3D数据集上，该方法优于现有无监督方法。
AI.conclusion: 结构化潜在空间框架有效提升了点云补全的几何一致性与精度，验证了方法的优越性。

authors_text: Ahmed Omran,Neil Zeghidour,Zalán Borsos,Félix de Chaumont Quitry,Malcolm Slaney,Marco Tagliasacchi
title: Disentangling speech from surroundings with neural embeddings
title_zh: 通过神经嵌入将语音与周围环境分离
abstract: We present a method to separate speech signals from noisy environments in the embedding space of a neural audio codec. We introduce a new training procedure that allows our model to produce structured encodings of audio waveforms given by embedding vectors, where one part of the embedding vector represents the speech signal, and the rest represent the environment. We achieve this by partitioning the embeddings of different input waveforms and training the model to faithfully reconstruct audio from mixed partitions, thereby ensuring each partition encodes a separate audio attribute. As use cases, we demonstrate the separation of speech from background noise or from reverberation characteristics. Our method also allows for targeted adjustments of the audio output characteristics.
summary: We present a method to separate speech signals from noisy environments in the embedding space of a neural audio codec. We introduce a new training procedure that allows our model to produce structured encodings of audio waveforms given by embedding vectors, where one part of the embedding vector represents the speech signal, and the rest represent the environment. We achieve this by partitioning the embeddings of different input waveforms and training the model to faithfully reconstruct audio from mixed partitions, thereby ensuring each partition encodes a separate audio attribute. As use cases, we demonstrate the separation of speech from background noise or from reverberation characteristics. Our method also allows for targeted adjustments of the audio output characteristics.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种在神经音频编解码器的嵌入空间中将语音信号与噪声环境分离的方法。我们引入了一种新的训练过程，允许我们的模型生成由嵌入向量给出的音频波形的结构化编码，其中嵌入向量的一部分代表语音信号，其余部分代表环境。我们通过对不同输入波形的嵌入进行分区并训练模型以忠实地从混合分区重建音频来实现这一点，从而确保每个分区编码单独的音频属性。作为用例，我们演示了语音与背景噪声或混响特性的分离。我们的方法还允许有针对性地调整音频输出特性。

AI.tldr: 提出一种在神经音频编码器嵌入空间中分离语音与环境噪声的方法
AI.motivation: 传统语音分离方法在复杂环境中效果有限，需更高效分离语音与环境成分
AI.method: 通过分割嵌入向量并训练模型重建混合分区音频，使不同部分分别编码语音和环境特征
AI.result: 成功分离语音与背景噪声或混响，实现音频输出特性调整
AI.conclusion: 该方法在嵌入空间中有效分离语音与环境，为音频处理提供新思路，具有潜在应用价值

authors_text: Hung-Shin Lee,Yu Tsao,Shyh-Kang Jeng,Hsin-Min Wang
title: Subspace-based Representation and Learning for Phonotactic Spoken Language Recognition
title_zh: 语音口语识别的基于子空间的表示和学习
comment: Published in IEEE/ACM Trans. Audio, Speech, Lang. Process., 2020, vol. 28, pp. 3065-3079
comments: Published in IEEE/ACM Trans. Audio, Speech, Lang. Process., 2020, vol. 28, pp. 3065-3079
abstract: Phonotactic constraints can be employed to distinguish languages by representing a speech utterance as a multinomial distribution or phone events. In the present study, we propose a new learning mechanism based on subspace-based representation, which can extract concealed phonotactic structures from utterances, for language verification and dialect/accent identification. The framework mainly involves two successive parts. The first part involves subspace construction. Specifically, it decodes each utterance into a sequence of vectors filled with phone-posteriors and transforms the vector sequence into a linear orthogonal subspace based on low-rank matrix factorization or dynamic linear modeling. The second part involves subspace learning based on kernel machines, such as support vector machines and the newly developed subspace-based neural networks (SNNs). The input layer of SNNs is specifically designed for the sample represented by subspaces. The topology ensures that the same output can be derived from identical subspaces by modifying the conventional feed-forward pass to fit the mathematical definition of subspace similarity. Evaluated on the "General LR" test of NIST LRE 2007, the proposed method achieved up to 52%, 46%, 56%, and 27% relative reductions in equal error rates over the sequence-based PPR-LM, PPR-VSM, and PPR-IVEC methods and the lattice-based PPR-LM method, respectively. Furthermore, on the dialect/accent identification task of NIST LRE 2009, the SNN-based system performed better than the aforementioned four baseline methods.
summary: Phonotactic constraints can be employed to distinguish languages by representing a speech utterance as a multinomial distribution or phone events. In the present study, we propose a new learning mechanism based on subspace-based representation, which can extract concealed phonotactic structures from utterances, for language verification and dialect/accent identification. The framework mainly involves two successive parts. The first part involves subspace construction. Specifically, it decodes each utterance into a sequence of vectors filled with phone-posteriors and transforms the vector sequence into a linear orthogonal subspace based on low-rank matrix factorization or dynamic linear modeling. The second part involves subspace learning based on kernel machines, such as support vector machines and the newly developed subspace-based neural networks (SNNs). The input layer of SNNs is specifically designed for the sample represented by subspaces. The topology ensures that the same output can be derived from identical subspaces by modifying the conventional feed-forward pass to fit the mathematical definition of subspace similarity. Evaluated on the "General LR" test of NIST LRE 2007, the proposed method achieved up to 52%, 46%, 56%, and 27% relative reductions in equal error rates over the sequence-based PPR-LM, PPR-VSM, and PPR-IVEC methods and the lattice-based PPR-LM method, respectively. Furthermore, on the dialect/accent identification task of NIST LRE 2009, the SNN-based system performed better than the aforementioned four baseline methods.
abstract_zh: 音位约束可用于通过将语音表示为多项分布或电话事件来区分语言。在本研究中，我们提出了一种基于子空间表示的新学习机制，它可以从话语中提取隐藏的语音结构，用于语言验证和方言/口音识别。该框架主要涉及两个连续的部分。第一部分涉及子空间构建。具体来说，它将每个话语解码为充满音素后验的向量序列，并基于低秩矩阵分解或动态线性建模将向量序列转换为线性正交子空间。第二部分涉及基于核机器的子空间学习，例如支持向量机和新开发的基于子空间的神经网络（SNN）。 SNN 的输入层是专门为子空间表示的样本而设计的。该拓扑确保通过修改传统的前馈传递以适应子空间相似性的数学定义，可以从相同的子空间导出相同的输出。在 NIST LRE 2007 的“General LR”测试中进行评估，与基于序列的 PPR-LM、PPR-VSM 和 PPR-IVEC 方法以及基于格的 PPR-LM 方法相比，该方法分别实现了等错误率高达 52%、46%、56% 和 27% 的相对降低。此外，在 NIST LRE 2009 的方言/口音识别任务中，基于 SNN 的系统比上述四种基线方法表现更好。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于子空间表示和学习的语音语言识别方法，用于语言验证和方言/口音识别。
AI.motivation: 传统基于序列的语音语言识别方法难以有效捕捉语音中的隐藏音系结构，需改进模型以提升识别性能。
AI.method: 框架分两步：1）通过低秩矩阵分解或动态线性模型将语音序列转换为正交子空间；2）利用支持向量机和子空间神经网络（SNN）进行子空间学习，SNN的输入层专门适配子空间表示。
AI.result: 在NIST LRE 2007测试中，相对误差率较基线方法降低52%-56%；在NIST LRE 2009方言识别任务中优于所有对比方法。
AI.conclusion: 子空间表示结合SNN的框架能有效提取音系结构，显著提升语言识别和方言区分性能。

authors_text: Maria Moutti,Sofia Eleftheriou,Panagiotis Koromilas,Theodoros Giannakopoulos
title: A Dataset for Speech Emotion Recognition in Greek Theatrical Plays
title_zh: 希腊戏剧中的语音情感识别数据集
abstract: Machine learning methodologies can be adopted in cultural applications and propose new ways to distribute or even present the cultural content to the public. For instance, speech analytics can be adopted to automatically generate subtitles in theatrical plays, in order to (among other purposes) help people with hearing loss. Apart from a typical speech-to-text transcription with Automatic Speech Recognition (ASR), Speech Emotion Recognition (SER) can be used to automatically predict the underlying emotional content of speech dialogues in theatrical plays, and thus to provide a deeper understanding how the actors utter their lines. However, real-world datasets from theatrical plays are not available in the literature. In this work we present GreThE, the Greek Theatrical Emotion dataset, a new publicly available data collection for speech emotion recognition in Greek theatrical plays. The dataset contains utterances from various actors and plays, along with respective valence and arousal annotations. Towards this end, multiple annotators have been asked to provide their input for each speech recording and inter-annotator agreement is taken into account in the final ground truth generation. In addition, we discuss the results of some indicative experiments that have been conducted with machine and deep learning frameworks, using the dataset, along with some widely used databases in the field of speech emotion recognition.
summary: Machine learning methodologies can be adopted in cultural applications and propose new ways to distribute or even present the cultural content to the public. For instance, speech analytics can be adopted to automatically generate subtitles in theatrical plays, in order to (among other purposes) help people with hearing loss. Apart from a typical speech-to-text transcription with Automatic Speech Recognition (ASR), Speech Emotion Recognition (SER) can be used to automatically predict the underlying emotional content of speech dialogues in theatrical plays, and thus to provide a deeper understanding how the actors utter their lines. However, real-world datasets from theatrical plays are not available in the literature. In this work we present GreThE, the Greek Theatrical Emotion dataset, a new publicly available data collection for speech emotion recognition in Greek theatrical plays. The dataset contains utterances from various actors and plays, along with respective valence and arousal annotations. Towards this end, multiple annotators have been asked to provide their input for each speech recording and inter-annotator agreement is taken into account in the final ground truth generation. In addition, we discuss the results of some indicative experiments that have been conducted with machine and deep learning frameworks, using the dataset, along with some widely used databases in the field of speech emotion recognition.
abstract_zh: 机器学习方法可以在文化应用中采用，并提出向公众分发甚至呈现文化内容的新方法。例如，可以采用语音分析来自动生成戏剧中的字幕，以便（除其他目的外）帮助听力损失者。除了使用自动语音识别 (ASR) 进行典型的语音到文本转录之外，语音情感识别 (SER) 还可用于自动预测戏剧表演中语音对话的潜在情感内容，从而更深入地了解演员如何说出台词。然而，文献中没有戏剧戏剧的真实数据集。在这项工作中，我们提出了 GreThE，即希腊戏剧情感数据集，这是一个新的公开数据集，用于希腊戏剧戏剧中的语音情感识别。该数据集包含来自不同演员和戏剧的话语，以及各自的效价和唤醒注释。为此，多个注释者被要求为每个语音记录提供输入，并且在最终的地面事实生成中考虑注释者间的协议。此外，我们还讨论了使用机器和深度学习框架、使用数据集以及语音情感识别领域中一些广泛使用的数据库进行的一些指示性实验的结果。

AI.tldr: 提出一个用于希腊戏剧中语音情感识别的公开数据集GreThE，并探讨其在机器学习和深度学习中的应用。
AI.motivation: 现有研究缺乏真实戏剧场景的语音情感数据集，且语音情感识别可提升戏剧内容的理解与辅助听力障碍者。
AI.method: 收集希腊戏剧中的语音数据，通过多标注者进行情感标注（包括效价和唤醒度），并结合标注一致性生成最终数据集。
AI.result: 使用该数据集进行了机器学习和深度学习实验，验证其有效性，并与现有数据库进行对比分析。
AI.conclusion: GreThE数据集填补了希腊戏剧语音情感数据的空白，为语音情感识别研究提供了新资源，并展示了其在机器学习模型中的应用潜力。

tldr: 提出一个用于希腊戏剧中语音情感识别的公开数据集GreThE，并探讨其在机器学习和深度学习中的应用。
motivation: 现有研究缺乏真实戏剧场景的语音情感数据集，且语音情感识别可提升戏剧内容的理解与辅助听力障碍者。
method: 收集希腊戏剧中的语音数据，通过多标注者进行情感标注（包括效价和唤醒度），并结合标注一致性生成最终数据集。
result: 使用该数据集进行了机器学习和深度学习实验，验证其有效性，并与现有数据库进行对比分析。
conclusion: GreThE数据集填补了希腊戏剧语音情感数据的空白，为语音情感识别研究提供了新资源，并展示了其在机器学习模型中的应用潜力。
search_text: A Dataset for Speech Emotion Recognition in Greek Theatrical Plays 希腊戏剧中的语音情感识别数据集 Machine learning methodologies can be adopted in cultural applications and propose new ways to distribute or even present the cultural content to the public. For instance, speech analytics can be adopted to automatically generate subtitles in theatrical plays, in order to (among other purposes) help people with hearing loss. Apart from a typical speech-to-text transcription with Automatic Speech Recognition (ASR), Speech Emotion Recognition (SER) can be used to automatically predict the underlying emotional content of speech dialogues in theatrical plays, and thus to provide a deeper understanding how the actors utter their lines. However, real-world datasets from theatrical plays are not available in the literature. In this work we present GreThE, the Greek Theatrical Emotion dataset, a new publicly available data collection for speech emotion recognition in Greek theatrical plays. The dataset contains utterances from various actors and plays, along with respective valence and arousal annotations. Towards this end, multiple annotators have been asked to provide their input for each speech recording and inter-annotator agreement is taken into account in the final ground truth generation. In addition, we discuss the results of some indicative experiments that have been conducted with machine and deep learning frameworks, using the dataset, along with some widely used databases in the field of speech emotion recognition. 机器学习方法可以在文化应用中采用，并提出向公众分发甚至呈现文化内容的新方法。例如，可以采用语音分析来自动生成戏剧中的字幕，以便（除其他目的外）帮助听力损失者。除了使用自动语音识别 (ASR) 进行典型的语音到文本转录之外，语音情感识别 (SER) 还可用于自动预测戏剧表演中语音对话的潜在情感内容，从而更深入地了解演员如何说出台词。然而，文献中没有戏剧戏剧的真实数据集。在这项工作中，我们提出了 GreThE，即希腊戏剧情感数据集，这是一个新的公开数据集，用于希腊戏剧戏剧中的语音情感识别。该数据集包含来自不同演员和戏剧的话语，以及各自的效价和唤醒注释。为此，多个注释者被要求为每个语音记录提供输入，并且在最终的地面事实生成中考虑注释者间的协议。此外，我们还讨论了使用机器和深度学习框架、使用数据集以及语音情感识别领域中一些广泛使用的数据库进行的一些指示性实验的结果。 提出一个用于希腊戏剧中语音情感识别的公开数据集GreThE，并探讨其在机器学习和深度学习中的应用。 Maria Moutti,Sofia Eleftheriou,Panagiotis Koromilas,Theodoros Giannakopoulos cs.SD,cs.CL,cs.LG

authors_text: Sahil Singla,Mazda Moayeri,Soheil Feizi
title: Core Risk Minimization using Salient ImageNet
title_zh: 使用 Salient ImageNet 最小化核心风险
abstract: Deep neural networks can be unreliable in the real world especially when they heavily use spurious features for their predictions. Recently, Singla & Feizi (2022) introduced the Salient Imagenet dataset by annotating and localizing core and spurious features of ~52k samples from 232 classes of Imagenet. While this dataset is useful for evaluating the reliance of pretrained models on spurious features, its small size limits its usefulness for training models. In this work, we first introduce the Salient Imagenet-1M dataset with more than 1 million soft masks localizing core and spurious features for all 1000 Imagenet classes. Using this dataset, we first evaluate the reliance of several Imagenet pretrained models (42 total) on spurious features and observe that: (i) transformers are more sensitive to spurious features compared to Convnets, (ii) zero-shot CLIP transformers are highly susceptible to spurious features. Next, we introduce a new learning paradigm called Core Risk Minimization (CoRM) whose objective ensures that the model predicts a class using its core features. We evaluate different computational approaches for solving CoRM and achieve significantly higher (+12%) core accuracy (accuracy when non-core regions corrupted using noise) with no drop in clean accuracy compared to models trained via Empirical Risk Minimization.
summary: Deep neural networks can be unreliable in the real world especially when they heavily use spurious features for their predictions. Recently, Singla & Feizi (2022) introduced the Salient Imagenet dataset by annotating and localizing core and spurious features of ~52k samples from 232 classes of Imagenet. While this dataset is useful for evaluating the reliance of pretrained models on spurious features, its small size limits its usefulness for training models. In this work, we first introduce the Salient Imagenet-1M dataset with more than 1 million soft masks localizing core and spurious features for all 1000 Imagenet classes. Using this dataset, we first evaluate the reliance of several Imagenet pretrained models (42 total) on spurious features and observe that: (i) transformers are more sensitive to spurious features compared to Convnets, (ii) zero-shot CLIP transformers are highly susceptible to spurious features. Next, we introduce a new learning paradigm called Core Risk Minimization (CoRM) whose objective ensures that the model predicts a class using its core features. We evaluate different computational approaches for solving CoRM and achieve significantly higher (+12%) core accuracy (accuracy when non-core regions corrupted using noise) with no drop in clean accuracy compared to models trained via Empirical Risk Minimization.
abstract_zh: 深度神经网络在现实世界中可能不可靠，尤其是当它们大量使用虚假特征进行预测时。最近，Singla 和 Feizi (2022) 通过注释和定位来自 232 个 Imagenet 类别的约 52k 样本的核心和虚假特征，引入了 Salient Imagenet 数据集。虽然该数据集可用于评估预训练模型对虚假特征的依赖性，但其较小的尺寸限制了其对训练模型的有用性。在这项工作中，我们首先引入了 Salient Imagenet-1M 数据集，其中包含超过 100 万个软掩模，用于定位所有 1000 个 Imagenet 类的核心和虚假特征。使用该数据集，我们首先评估几个 Imagenet 预训练模型（总共 42 个）对虚假特征的依赖，并观察到：（i）与 Convnet 相比，变压器对虚假特征更敏感，（ii）零样本 CLIP 变压器非常容易受到虚假特征的影响。接下来，我们引入一种称为核心风险最小化（CoRM）的新学习范式，其目标确保模型使用其核心特征来预测类别。我们评估了解决 CoRM 的不同计算方法，并与通过经验风险最小化训练的模型相比，实现了显着更高 (+12%) 的核心精度（非核心区域被噪声损坏时的精度），且干净精度没有下降。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为核心风险最小化（CoRM）的新学习范式，并构建了包含1000个ImageNet类别的Salient ImageNet-1M数据集，以提升模型对核心特征的依赖性并减少对虚假特征的依赖。
AI.motivation: 现有预训练模型在真实场景中易受虚假特征影响，而原有Salient ImageNet数据集规模较小，难以支持训练。需通过更大规模数据集和新方法提升模型鲁棒性。
AI.method: 构建Salient ImageNet-1M数据集（含1000类超过100万软掩码），提出CoRM目标函数，强制模型基于核心特征进行预测，并评估多种计算方法实现该目标。
AI.result: CoRM方法在核心特征被噪声破坏时，准确率提升12%且清洁数据准确率无下降；发现Transformer和零样本CLIP模型对虚假特征更敏感。
AI.conclusion: CoRM有效提升了模型对核心特征的依赖性，新数据集为训练提供支持，揭示了部分模型对虚假特征的高敏感性问题。

authors_text: Xiang An,Jiankang Deng,Jia Guo,Ziyong Feng,Xuhan Zhu,Jing Yang,Tongliang Liu
title: Killing Two Birds with One Stone:Efficient and Robust Training of Face Recognition CNNs by Partial FC
title_zh: 一石二鸟：通过部分 FC 高效稳健地训练人脸识别 CNN
abstract: Learning discriminative deep feature embeddings by using million-scale in-the-wild datasets and margin-based softmax loss is the current state-of-the-art approach for face recognition. However, the memory and computing cost of the Fully Connected (FC) layer linearly scales up to the number of identities in the training set. Besides, the large-scale training data inevitably suffers from inter-class conflict and long-tailed distribution. In this paper, we propose a sparsely updating variant of the FC layer, named Partial FC (PFC). In each iteration, positive class centers and a random subset of negative class centers are selected to compute the margin-based softmax loss. All class centers are still maintained throughout the whole training process, but only a subset is selected and updated in each iteration. Therefore, the computing requirement, the probability of inter-class conflict, and the frequency of passive update on tail class centers, are dramatically reduced. Extensive experiments across different training data and backbones (e.g. CNN and ViT) confirm the effectiveness, robustness and efficiency of the proposed PFC. The source code is available at \https://github.com/deepinsight/insightface/tree/master/recognition.
summary: Learning discriminative deep feature embeddings by using million-scale in-the-wild datasets and margin-based softmax loss is the current state-of-the-art approach for face recognition. However, the memory and computing cost of the Fully Connected (FC) layer linearly scales up to the number of identities in the training set. Besides, the large-scale training data inevitably suffers from inter-class conflict and long-tailed distribution. In this paper, we propose a sparsely updating variant of the FC layer, named Partial FC (PFC). In each iteration, positive class centers and a random subset of negative class centers are selected to compute the margin-based softmax loss. All class centers are still maintained throughout the whole training process, but only a subset is selected and updated in each iteration. Therefore, the computing requirement, the probability of inter-class conflict, and the frequency of passive update on tail class centers, are dramatically reduced. Extensive experiments across different training data and backbones (e.g. CNN and ViT) confirm the effectiveness, robustness and efficiency of the proposed PFC. The source code is available at \https://github.com/deepinsight/insightface/tree/master/recognition.
abstract_zh: 通过使用百万级野外数据集和基于边际的 softmax 损失来学习有区别的深度特征嵌入是当前最先进的人脸识别方法。然而，全连接 (FC) 层的内存和计算成本会随着训练集中的身份数量线性增加。此外，大规模的训练数据不可避免地会出现类间冲突和长尾分布。在本文中，我们提出了 FC 层的稀疏更新变体，称为部分 FC（PFC）。在每次迭代中，选择正类中心和负类中心的随机子集来计算基于边际的 softmax 损失。在整个训练过程中仍然维护所有类中心，但在每次迭代中仅选择和更新一个子集。因此，计算需求、类间冲突的概率以及尾类中心被动更新的频率都大大降低。跨不同训练数据和骨干网络（例如 CNN 和 ViT）的广泛实验证实了所提出的 PFC 的有效性、鲁棒性和效率。源代码位于 https://github.com/deepinsight/insightface/tree/master/recognition。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为Partial FC（PFC）的高效且鲁棒的人脸识别CNN训练方法，通过稀疏更新全连接层来降低计算成本并解决大规模数据训练中的挑战。
AI.motivation: 当前基于大规模数据集和边距softmax损失的人脸识别方法面临全连接层计算成本高、类别间冲突及长尾分布等问题，亟需更高效的训练策略。
AI.method: 设计稀疏更新的Partial FC层，在每次迭代中仅选择正类中心和随机负类中心计算损失，维持所有类中心但减少更新频率，从而降低计算需求与冲突概率。
AI.result: 在多种训练数据和网络架构（如CNN、ViT）上的实验验证了PFC在效率、鲁棒性和性能上的优势，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: PFC有效解决了大规模人脸识别训练中的计算与分布挑战，提升了模型效率与性能，适用于不同深度学习架构。

conclusion: PFC有效解决了大规模人脸识别训练中的计算与分布挑战，提升了模型效率与性能，适用于不同深度学习架构。
search_text: Killing Two Birds with One Stone:Efficient and Robust Training of Face Recognition CNNs by Partial FC 一石二鸟：通过部分 FC 高效稳健地训练人脸识别 CNN Learning discriminative deep feature embeddings by using million-scale in-the-wild datasets and margin-based softmax loss is the current state-of-the-art approach for face recognition. However, the memory and computing cost of the Fully Connected (FC) layer linearly scales up to the number of identities in the training set. Besides, the large-scale training data inevitably suffers from inter-class conflict and long-tailed distribution. In this paper, we propose a sparsely updating variant of the FC layer, named Partial FC (PFC). In each iteration, positive class centers and a random subset of negative class centers are selected to compute the margin-based softmax loss. All class centers are still maintained throughout the whole training process, but only a subset is selected and updated in each iteration. Therefore, the computing requirement, the probability of inter-class conflict, and the frequency of passive update on tail class centers, are dramatically reduced. Extensive experiments across different training data and backbones (e.g. CNN and ViT) confirm the effectiveness, robustness and efficiency of the proposed PFC. The source code is available at \https://github.com/deepinsight/insightface/tree/master/recognition. 通过使用百万级野外数据集和基于边际的 softmax 损失来学习有区别的深度特征嵌入是当前最先进的人脸识别方法。然而，全连接 (FC) 层的内存和计算成本会随着训练集中的身份数量线性增加。此外，大规模的训练数据不可避免地会出现类间冲突和长尾分布。在本文中，我们提出了 FC 层的稀疏更新变体，称为部分 FC（PFC）。在每次迭代中，选择正类中心和负类中心的随机子集来计算基于边际的 softmax 损失。在整个训练过程中仍然维护所有类中心，但在每次迭代中仅选择和更新一个子集。因此，计算需求、类间冲突的概率以及尾类中心被动更新的频率都大大降低。跨不同训练数据和骨干网络（例如 CNN 和 ViT）的广泛实验证实了所提出的 PFC 的有效性、鲁棒性和效率。源代码位于 https://github.com/deepinsight/insightface/tree/master/recognition。 本文提出一种名为Partial FC（PFC）的高效且鲁棒的人脸识别CNN训练方法，通过稀疏更新全连接层来降低计算成本并解决大规模数据训练中的挑战。 Xiang An,Jiankang Deng,Jia Guo,Ziyong Feng,Xuhan Zhu,Jing Yang,Tongliang Liu cs.CV

authors_text: Nicolas M. Müller,Franziska Dieckmann,Jennifer Williams
title: Attacker Attribution of Audio Deepfakes
title_zh: 音频 Deepfakes 的攻击者归因
abstract: Deepfakes are synthetically generated media often devised with malicious intent. They have become increasingly more convincing with large training datasets advanced neural networks. These fakes are readily being misused for slander, misinformation and fraud. For this reason, intensive research for developing countermeasures is also expanding. However, recent work is almost exclusively limited to deepfake detection - predicting if audio is real or fake. This is despite the fact that attribution (who created which fake?) is an essential building block of a larger defense strategy, as practiced in the field of cybersecurity for a long time. This paper considers the problem of deepfake attacker attribution in the domain of audio. We present several methods for creating attacker signatures using low-level acoustic descriptors and machine learning embeddings. We show that speech signal features are inadequate for characterizing attacker signatures. However, we also demonstrate that embeddings from a recurrent neural network can successfully characterize attacks from both known and unknown attackers. Our attack signature embeddings result in distinct clusters, both for seen and unseen audio deepfakes. We show that these embeddings can be used in downstream-tasks to high-effect, scoring 97.10% accuracy in attacker-id classification.
summary: Deepfakes are synthetically generated media often devised with malicious intent. They have become increasingly more convincing with large training datasets advanced neural networks. These fakes are readily being misused for slander, misinformation and fraud. For this reason, intensive research for developing countermeasures is also expanding. However, recent work is almost exclusively limited to deepfake detection - predicting if audio is real or fake. This is despite the fact that attribution (who created which fake?) is an essential building block of a larger defense strategy, as practiced in the field of cybersecurity for a long time. This paper considers the problem of deepfake attacker attribution in the domain of audio. We present several methods for creating attacker signatures using low-level acoustic descriptors and machine learning embeddings. We show that speech signal features are inadequate for characterizing attacker signatures. However, we also demonstrate that embeddings from a recurrent neural network can successfully characterize attacks from both known and unknown attackers. Our attack signature embeddings result in distinct clusters, both for seen and unseen audio deepfakes. We show that these embeddings can be used in downstream-tasks to high-effect, scoring 97.10% accuracy in attacker-id classification.
abstract_zh: Deepfakes 是合成生成的媒体，通常是出于恶意目的而设计的。他们通过大型训练数据集和先​​进的神经网络变得越来越有说服力。这些假货很容易被滥用于诽谤、错误信息和欺诈。为此，针对制定对策的深入研究也在不断扩大。然而，最近的工作几乎完全局限于深度伪造检测——预测音频是真是假。尽管事实上归因（谁制造了哪个假货？）是更大防御策略的重要组成部分，正如网络安全领域长期以来的实践那样。本文考虑了音频领域的深度伪造攻击者归因问题。我们提出了几种使用低级声学描述符和机器学习嵌入来创建攻击者签名的方法。我们表明语音信号特征不足以表征攻击者签名。然而，我们还证明了循环神经网络的嵌入可以成功地表征来自已知和未知攻击者的攻击。我们的攻击签名嵌入会产生不同的集群，无论是可见的还是不可见的音频深度伪造。我们证明这些嵌入可以在下游任务中发挥高效作用，攻击者 ID 分类的准确率达到 97.10%。

AI.tldr: 本文研究音频深度伪造的攻击者归属问题，提出基于声学特征和神经网络嵌入的方法以识别伪造音频的创建者。
AI.motivation: 尽管深度伪造检测研究较多，但攻击者归属（确定谁制造了伪造内容）对构建完整防御体系至关重要，现有研究对此关注不足。
AI.method: 利用低级声学描述子和循环神经网络（RNN）嵌入生成攻击者签名，通过聚类分析区分已知和未知攻击者的伪造音频。
AI.result: 实验显示RNN嵌入能有效区分攻击者，攻击者ID分类准确率达97.10%，且对已知和未知攻击者均表现良好。
AI.conclusion: 本文方法为音频深度伪造的攻击者归属提供了可行方案，有助于完善防御策略并追踪未知攻击者。

authors_text: Eduardo Rodrigues,Bianca Zadrozny,Campbell Watson
title: Wildfire risk forecast: An optimizable fire danger index
title_zh: 野火风险预测：可优化的火灾危险指数
abstract: Wildfire events have caused severe losses in many places around the world and are expected to increase with climate change. Throughout the years many technologies have been developed to identify fire events early on and to simulate fire behavior once they have started. Another particularly helpful technology is fire risk indices, which use weather forcing to make advanced predictions of the risk of fire. Predictions of fire risk indices can be used, for instance, to allocate resources in places with high risk. These indices have been developed over the years as empirical models with parameters that were estimated in lab experiments and field tests. These parameters, however, may not fit well all places where these models are used. In this paper we propose a novel implementation of one index (NFDRS IC) as a differentiable function in which one can optimize its internal parameters via gradient descent. We leverage existing machine learning frameworks (PyTorch) to construct our model. This approach has two benefits: (1) the NFDRS IC parameters can be improved for each region using actual observed fire events, and (2) the internal variables remain intact for interpretations by specialists instead of meaningless hidden layers as in traditional neural networks. In this paper we evaluate our strategy with actual fire events for locations in the USA and Europe.
summary: Wildfire events have caused severe losses in many places around the world and are expected to increase with climate change. Throughout the years many technologies have been developed to identify fire events early on and to simulate fire behavior once they have started. Another particularly helpful technology is fire risk indices, which use weather forcing to make advanced predictions of the risk of fire. Predictions of fire risk indices can be used, for instance, to allocate resources in places with high risk. These indices have been developed over the years as empirical models with parameters that were estimated in lab experiments and field tests. These parameters, however, may not fit well all places where these models are used. In this paper we propose a novel implementation of one index (NFDRS IC) as a differentiable function in which one can optimize its internal parameters via gradient descent. We leverage existing machine learning frameworks (PyTorch) to construct our model. This approach has two benefits: (1) the NFDRS IC parameters can be improved for each region using actual observed fire events, and (2) the internal variables remain intact for interpretations by specialists instead of meaningless hidden layers as in traditional neural networks. In this paper we evaluate our strategy with actual fire events for locations in the USA and Europe.
abstract_zh: 野火事件在世界许多地方造成了严重损失，预计随着气候变化，损失还会增加。多年来，已经开发了许多技术来及早识别火灾事件并在火灾发生后模拟火灾行为。另一项特别有用的技术是火灾风险指数，它利用天气强迫对火灾风险进行高级预测。例如，火灾风险指数的预测可用于在高风险的地方分配资源。这些指数多年来一直作为经验模型发展起来，其参数是在实验室实验和现场测试中估计的。然而，这些参数可能并不适合所有使用这些模型的地方。在本文中，我们提出了一种将单指数（NFDRS IC）作为可微函数的新颖实现，其中可以通过梯度下降来优化其内部参数。我们利用现有的机器学习框架 (PyTorch) 来构建我们的模型。这种方法有两个好处：(1) 可以使用实际观察到的火灾事件来改进每个区域的 NFDRS IC 参数，(2) 内部变量保持完整以供专家解释，而不是像传统神经网络中那样使用无意义的隐藏层。在本文中，我们根据美国和欧洲地区的实际火灾事件评估了我们的策略。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种可优化的火灾危险指数（NFDRS IC）的实现方法，通过梯度下降优化其内部参数，以提高火灾风险预测的准确性。
AI.motivation: 传统的火灾危险指数参数基于实验室和实地测试估计，可能无法适应所有地区的实际情况，因此需要一种能够根据实际火灾事件优化参数的方法。
AI.method: 本文将NFDRS IC指数作为可微函数，利用PyTorch等机器学习框架，通过梯度下降优化其内部参数，并保留内部变量以供专家解释。
AI.result: 通过美国和欧洲的实际火灾事件验证，该方法能够根据不同地区优化参数，提高火灾风险预测的准确性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为火灾风险预测提供了一种可优化、可解释的模型，有助于更有效地分配资源和应对火灾风险。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种可优化的火灾危险指数（NFDRS IC）的实现方法，通过梯度下降优化其内部参数，以提高火灾风险预测的准确性。

We leverage existing machine learning frameworks (PyTorch) to construct our model. In this paper we evaluate our strategy with actual fire events for locations in the USA and Europe. 野火事件在世界许多地方造成了严重损失，预计随着气候变化，损失还会增加。多年来，已经开发了许多技术来及早识别火灾事件并在火灾发生后模拟火灾行为。另一项特别有用的技术是火灾风险指数，它利用天气强迫对火灾风险进行高级预测。例如，火灾风险指数的预测可用于在高风险的地方分配资源。这些指数多年来一直作为经验模型发展起来，其参数是在实验室实验和现场测试中估计的。然而，这些参数可能并不适合所有使用这些模型的地方。在本文中，我们提出了一种将单指数（NFDRS IC）作为可微函数的新颖实现，其中可以通过梯度下降来优化其内部参数。我们利用现有的机器学习框架 (PyTorch) 来构建我们的模型。这种方法有两个好处：(1) 可以使用实际观察到的火灾事件来改进每个区域的 NFDRS IC 参数，(2) 内部变量保持完整以供专家解释，而不是像传统神经网络中那样使用无意义的隐藏层。在本文中，我们根据美国和欧洲地区的实际火灾事件评估了我们的策略。 本文提出了一种可优化的火灾危险指数（NFDRS IC）的实现方法，通过梯度下降优化其内部参数，以提高火灾风险预测的准确性。 Eduardo Rodrigues,Bianca Zadrozny,Campbell Watson cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Haifeng Li,Weihong Guo,Jun Liu,Li Cui,Dongxing Xie
title: Image Segmentation with Adaptive Spatial Priors from Joint Registration
title_zh: 使用联合配准的自适应空间先验进行图像分割
abstract: Image segmentation is a crucial but challenging task that has many applications. In medical imaging for instance, intensity inhomogeneity and noise are common. In thigh muscle images, different muscles are closed packed together and there are often no clear boundaries between them. Intensity based segmentation models cannot separate one muscle from another. To solve such problems, in this work we present a segmentation model with adaptive spatial priors from joint registration. This model combines segmentation and registration in a unified framework to leverage their positive mutual influence. The segmentation is based on a modified Gaussian mixture model (GMM), which integrates intensity inhomogeneity and spacial smoothness. The registration plays the role of providing a shape prior. We adopt a modified sum of squared difference (SSD) fidelity term and Tikhonov regularity term for registration, and also utilize Gaussian pyramid and parametric method for robustness. The connection between segmentation and registration is guaranteed by the cross entropy metric that aims to make the segmentation map (from segmentation) and deformed atlas (from registration) as similar as possible. This joint framework is implemented within a constraint optimization framework, which leads to an efficient algorithm. We evaluate our proposed model on synthetic and thigh muscle MR images. Numerical results show the improvement as compared to segmentation and registration performed separately and other joint models.
summary: Image segmentation is a crucial but challenging task that has many applications. In medical imaging for instance, intensity inhomogeneity and noise are common. In thigh muscle images, different muscles are closed packed together and there are often no clear boundaries between them. Intensity based segmentation models cannot separate one muscle from another. To solve such problems, in this work we present a segmentation model with adaptive spatial priors from joint registration. This model combines segmentation and registration in a unified framework to leverage their positive mutual influence. The segmentation is based on a modified Gaussian mixture model (GMM), which integrates intensity inhomogeneity and spacial smoothness. The registration plays the role of providing a shape prior. We adopt a modified sum of squared difference (SSD) fidelity term and Tikhonov regularity term for registration, and also utilize Gaussian pyramid and parametric method for robustness. The connection between segmentation and registration is guaranteed by the cross entropy metric that aims to make the segmentation map (from segmentation) and deformed atlas (from registration) as similar as possible. This joint framework is implemented within a constraint optimization framework, which leads to an efficient algorithm. We evaluate our proposed model on synthetic and thigh muscle MR images. Numerical results show the improvement as compared to segmentation and registration performed separately and other joint models.
abstract_zh: 图像分割是一项至关重要但具有挑战性的任务，具有许多应用。例如，在医学成像中，强度不均匀性和噪声很常见。在大腿肌肉图像中，不同的肌肉紧密地堆积在一起，它们之间通常没有明确的界限。基于强度的分割模型无法将一块肌肉与另一块肌肉分开。为了解决这些问题，在这项工作中，我们提出了一种具有来自联合配准的自适应空间先验的分割模型。该模型将分割和注册结合在一个统一的框架中，以充分利用它们的积极相互影响。分割基于改进的高斯混合模型（GMM），该模型集成了强度不均匀性和空间平滑性。配准起到提供先验形状的作用。我们采用修正的平方差和（SSD）保真度项和吉洪诺夫正则项进行配准，并利用高斯金字塔和参数方法来实现鲁棒性。分割和配准之间的联系由交叉熵度量保证，其目的是使分割图（来自分割）和变形图集（来自配准）尽可能相似。该联合框架是在约束优化框架内实现的，从而产生了有效的算法。我们在合成图像和大腿肌肉 MR 图像上评估了我们提出的模型。数值结果显示与单独执行的分割和配准以及其他联合模型相比有所改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合联合配准的自适应空间先验图像分割模型，用于解决医学图像中因强度不均匀性和模糊边界导致的分割难题。
AI.motivation: 传统强度基分割模型难以处理医学图像中肌肉等组织因紧密排列导致的边界模糊问题，需通过引入形状先验信息提升分割准确性。
AI.method: 在统一框架中融合分割与配准：采用改进高斯混合模型（GMM）处理强度不均匀性，结合改进的SSD保真项与Tikhonov正则项进行配准，并通过交叉熵度量连接分割结果与变形图谱，利用约束优化实现高效算法。
AI.result: 在合成数据和大腿肌肉MRI图像上的实验表明，该模型相较独立分割/配准及其他联合模型具有更高的分割精度。
AI.conclusion: 联合框架通过整合配准提供的形状先验有效提升了分割性能，验证了自适应空间先验在医学图像分割中的价值。

authors_text: Jerrin Bright,Suryaprakash Rajkumar,Arockia Selvakumar Arockia Doss
title: ME-CapsNet: A Multi-Enhanced Capsule Networks with Routing Mechanism
title_zh: ME-CapsNet：具有路由机制的多重增强胶囊网络
comment: Submitted to 8th IEEE International Conference on Electronics, Computing and Communication Technologies (IEEE CONECCT'22)
comments: Submitted to 8th IEEE International Conference on Electronics, Computing and Communication Technologies (IEEE CONECCT'22)
abstract: Convolutional Neural Networks need the construction of informative features, which are determined by channel-wise and spatial-wise information at the network's layers. In this research, we focus on bringing in a novel solution that uses sophisticated optimization for enhancing both the spatial and channel components inside each layer's receptive field. Capsule Networks were used to understand the spatial association between features in the feature map. Standalone capsule networks have shown good results on comparatively simple datasets than on complex datasets as a result of the inordinate amount of feature information. Thus, to tackle this issue, we have proposed ME-CapsNet by introducing deeper convolutional layers to extract important features before passing through modules of capsule layers strategically to improve the performance of the network significantly. The deeper convolutional layer includes blocks of Squeeze-Excitation networks which use a stochastic sampling approach for progressively reducing the spatial size thereby dynamically recalibrating the channels by reconstructing their interdependencies without much loss of important feature information. Extensive experimentation was done using commonly used datasets demonstrating the efficiency of the proposed ME-CapsNet, which clearly outperforms various research works by achieving higher accuracy with minimal model complexity in complex datasets.
summary: Convolutional Neural Networks need the construction of informative features, which are determined by channel-wise and spatial-wise information at the network's layers. In this research, we focus on bringing in a novel solution that uses sophisticated optimization for enhancing both the spatial and channel components inside each layer's receptive field. Capsule Networks were used to understand the spatial association between features in the feature map. Standalone capsule networks have shown good results on comparatively simple datasets than on complex datasets as a result of the inordinate amount of feature information. Thus, to tackle this issue, we have proposed ME-CapsNet by introducing deeper convolutional layers to extract important features before passing through modules of capsule layers strategically to improve the performance of the network significantly. The deeper convolutional layer includes blocks of Squeeze-Excitation networks which use a stochastic sampling approach for progressively reducing the spatial size thereby dynamically recalibrating the channels by reconstructing their interdependencies without much loss of important feature information. Extensive experimentation was done using commonly used datasets demonstrating the efficiency of the proposed ME-CapsNet, which clearly outperforms various research works by achieving higher accuracy with minimal model complexity in complex datasets.
abstract_zh: 卷积神经网络需要构建信息特征，这些特征由网络层的通道信息和空间信息决定。在这项研究中，我们专注于引入一种新颖的解决方案，该解决方案使用复杂的优化来增强每层感受野内的空间和通道分量。胶囊网络用于理解特征图中特征之间的空间关联。由于特征信息量过多，独立胶囊网络在相对简单的数据集上比在复杂的数据集上显示出更好的结果。因此，为了解决这个问题，我们提出了 ME-CapsNet，通过引入更深的卷积层来提取重要特征，然后策略性地通过胶囊层模块，从而显着提高网络的性能。更深的卷积层包括挤压激励网络块，该网络使用随机采样方法逐步减小空间大小，从而通过重建通道的相互依赖性来动态重新校准通道，而不会丢失太多重要的特征信息。使用常用数据集进行了广泛的实验，证明了所提出的 ME-CapsNet 的效率，它通过在复杂数据集中以最小的模型复杂性实现更高的精度，明显优于各种研究工作。

AI.tldr: 提出ME-CapsNet，通过多增强胶囊网络和路由机制提升复杂数据集上的分类性能。
AI.motivation: 传统CNN依赖特征构建，而单独胶囊网络在复杂数据集上表现不佳，需增强特征提取能力。
AI.method: 结合深度卷积层与Squeeze-Excitation模块，利用胶囊网络和路由机制，通过随机抽样优化特征提取。
AI.result: 实验表明ME-CapsNet在复杂数据集上准确率更高，模型复杂度低。
AI.conclusion: ME-CapsNet通过多增强机制有效提升复杂数据集的分类性能，验证了方法的有效性。
