authors_text: Andrew Dudzik,Petar Veličković
title: Graph Neural Networks are Dynamic Programmers
title_zh: 图神经网络是动态程序员
comment: To appear at NeurIPS 2022. 18 pages, 4 figures
comments: To appear at NeurIPS 2022. 18 pages, 4 figures
abstract: Recent advances in neural algorithmic reasoning with graph neural networks (GNNs) are propped up by the notion of algorithmic alignment. Broadly, a neural network will be better at learning to execute a reasoning task (in terms of sample complexity) if its individual components align well with the target algorithm. Specifically, GNNs are claimed to align with dynamic programming (DP), a general problem-solving strategy which expresses many polynomial-time algorithms. However, has this alignment truly been demonstrated and theoretically quantified? Here we show, using methods from category theory and abstract algebra, that there exists an intricate connection between GNNs and DP, going well beyond the initial observations over individual algorithms such as Bellman-Ford. Exposing this connection, we easily verify several prior findings in the literature, produce better-grounded GNN architectures for edge-centric tasks, and demonstrate empirical results on the CLRS algorithmic reasoning benchmark. We hope our exposition will serve as a foundation for building stronger algorithmically aligned GNNs.
summary: Recent advances in neural algorithmic reasoning with graph neural networks (GNNs) are propped up by the notion of algorithmic alignment. Broadly, a neural network will be better at learning to execute a reasoning task (in terms of sample complexity) if its individual components align well with the target algorithm. Specifically, GNNs are claimed to align with dynamic programming (DP), a general problem-solving strategy which expresses many polynomial-time algorithms. However, has this alignment truly been demonstrated and theoretically quantified? Here we show, using methods from category theory and abstract algebra, that there exists an intricate connection between GNNs and DP, going well beyond the initial observations over individual algorithms such as Bellman-Ford. Exposing this connection, we easily verify several prior findings in the literature, produce better-grounded GNN architectures for edge-centric tasks, and demonstrate empirical results on the CLRS algorithmic reasoning benchmark. We hope our exposition will serve as a foundation for building stronger algorithmically aligned GNNs.
abstract_zh: 图神经网络（GNN）神经算法推理的最新进展是由算法对齐概念支撑的。一般来说，如果神经网络的各个组件与目标算法很好地匹配，那么神经网络将更好地学习执行推理任务（就样本复杂性而言）。具体来说，GNN 据称与动态规划（DP）保持一致，动态规划是一种表达许多多项式时间算法的通用问题解决策略。然而，这种一致性是否真正得到了论证并在理论上进行了量化？在这里，我们使用范畴论和抽象代数的方法证明，GNN 和 DP 之间存在着复杂的联系，远远超出了对 Bellman-Ford 等单个算法的最初观察。通过揭示这种联系，我们可以轻松验证文献中的几个先前发现，为以边缘为中心的任务生成基础更好的 GNN 架构，并在 CLRS 算法推理基准上展示实证结果。我们希望我们的阐述能够成为构建更强大的算法一致的 GNN 的基础。

AI.tldr: 本文通过理论分析揭示图神经网络（GNNs）与动态规划（DP）之间深层的数学联系，并验证其在算法推理任务中的有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有研究虽提出GNNs与DP存在算法对齐，但缺乏理论层面的严格证明和量化分析，需建立更坚实的理论基础。
AI.method: 采用范畴论和抽象代数方法，构建GNNs与DP的数学映射关系，分析其结构同源性并设计对应实验验证。
AI.result: 理论验证了GNNs与DP的结构性联系，提出针对边中心任务的改进架构，在CLRS基准测试中取得实证效果。
AI.conclusion: 证明GNNs本质是动态规划的数学实现形式，为构建更高效的算法对齐神经网络提供理论框架。

authors_text: Zhifang Fan,Dan Ou,Yulong Gu,Bairan Fu,Xiang Li,Wentian Bao,Xin-Yu Dai,Xiaoyi Zeng,Tao Zhuang,Qingwen Liu
title: Modeling Users' Contextualized Page-wise Feedback for Click-Through Rate Prediction in E-commerce Search
title_zh: 对用户的上下文化页面反馈进行建模，以预测电子商务搜索中的点击率
abstract: Modeling user's historical feedback is essential for Click-Through Rate Prediction in personalized search and recommendation. Existing methods usually only model users' positive feedback information such as click sequences which neglects the context information of the feedback. In this paper, we propose a new perspective for context-aware users' behavior modeling by including the whole page-wisely exposed products and the corresponding feedback as contextualized page-wise feedback sequence. The intra-page context information and inter-page interest evolution can be captured to learn more specific user preference. We design a novel neural ranking model RACP(i.e., Recurrent Attention over Contextualized Page sequence), which utilizes page-context aware attention to model the intra-page context. A recurrent attention process is used to model the cross-page interest convergence evolution as denoising the interest in the previous pages. Experiments on public and real-world industrial datasets verify our model's effectiveness.
summary: Modeling user's historical feedback is essential for Click-Through Rate Prediction in personalized search and recommendation. Existing methods usually only model users' positive feedback information such as click sequences which neglects the context information of the feedback. In this paper, we propose a new perspective for context-aware users' behavior modeling by including the whole page-wisely exposed products and the corresponding feedback as contextualized page-wise feedback sequence. The intra-page context information and inter-page interest evolution can be captured to learn more specific user preference. We design a novel neural ranking model RACP(i.e., Recurrent Attention over Contextualized Page sequence), which utilizes page-context aware attention to model the intra-page context. A recurrent attention process is used to model the cross-page interest convergence evolution as denoising the interest in the previous pages. Experiments on public and real-world industrial datasets verify our model's effectiveness.
abstract_zh: 对用户的历史反馈进行建模对于个性化搜索和推荐中的点击率预测至关重要。现有方法通常仅对用户的正反馈信息（例如点击序列）进行建模，而忽略了反馈的上下文信息。在本文中，我们通过将整个页面明智暴露的产品和相应的反馈作为情境化页面明智反馈序列，提出了上下文感知用户行为建模的新视角。可以捕获页面内上下文信息和页面间兴趣演变以了解更具体的用户偏好。我们设计了一种新颖的神经排名模型 RACP（即上下文化页面序列上的循环注意力），它利用页面上下文感知注意力来建模页面内上下文。使用循环注意力过程来对跨页面兴趣收敛演化进行建模，以对先前页面中的兴趣进行去噪。对公共和现实世界工业数据集的实验验证了我们模型的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新的神经排序模型RACP，通过建模用户页面级上下文反馈来提升电商搜索中的点击率预测效果。
AI.motivation: 现有方法仅建模用户点击序列等正反馈信息，忽略了反馈的上下文信息，导致无法准确捕捉用户兴趣演化和页面内产品关联性。
AI.method: 设计RACP模型，采用页面感知注意力机制建模页面内上下文关系，并通过循环注意力过程建模跨页面兴趣演化，实现对用户兴趣的去噪和动态捕捉。
AI.result: 在公开数据集和工业级数据集上的实验验证了该模型在点击率预测任务中的有效性，优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过建模页面级上下文反馈，能够更准确地刻画用户兴趣演化路径，为电商搜索中的个性化推荐提供更精细的建模方式。

authors_text: Xinhao Mei,Xubo Liu,Jianyuan Sun,Mark D. Plumbley,Wenwu Wang
title: On Metric Learning for Audio-Text Cross-Modal Retrieval
title_zh: 音频文本跨模态检索的度量学习
abstract: Audio-text retrieval aims at retrieving a target audio clip or caption from a pool of candidates given a query in another modality. Solving such cross-modal retrieval task is challenging because it not only requires learning robust feature representations for both modalities, but also requires capturing the fine-grained alignment between these two modalities. Existing cross-modal retrieval models are mostly optimized by metric learning objectives as both of them attempt to map data to an embedding space, where similar data are close together and dissimilar data are far apart. Unlike other cross-modal retrieval tasks such as image-text and video-text retrievals, audio-text retrieval is still an unexplored task. In this work, we aim to study the impact of different metric learning objectives on the audio-text retrieval task. We present an extensive evaluation of popular metric learning objectives on the AudioCaps and Clotho datasets. We demonstrate that NT-Xent loss adapted from self-supervised learning shows stable performance across different datasets and training settings, and outperforms the popular triplet-based losses. Our code is available at https://github.com/XinhaoMei/audio-text_retrieval.
summary: Audio-text retrieval aims at retrieving a target audio clip or caption from a pool of candidates given a query in another modality. Solving such cross-modal retrieval task is challenging because it not only requires learning robust feature representations for both modalities, but also requires capturing the fine-grained alignment between these two modalities. Existing cross-modal retrieval models are mostly optimized by metric learning objectives as both of them attempt to map data to an embedding space, where similar data are close together and dissimilar data are far apart. Unlike other cross-modal retrieval tasks such as image-text and video-text retrievals, audio-text retrieval is still an unexplored task. In this work, we aim to study the impact of different metric learning objectives on the audio-text retrieval task. We present an extensive evaluation of popular metric learning objectives on the AudioCaps and Clotho datasets. We demonstrate that NT-Xent loss adapted from self-supervised learning shows stable performance across different datasets and training settings, and outperforms the popular triplet-based losses. Our code is available at https://github.com/XinhaoMei/audio-text_retrieval.
abstract_zh: 音频文本检索的目的是从以另一种方式给出查询的候选池中检索目标音频剪辑或字幕。解决这种跨模态检索任务具有挑战性，因为它不仅需要学习两种模态的鲁棒特征表示，而且还需要捕获这两种模态之间的细粒度对齐。现有的跨模态检索模型大多通过度量学习目标进行优化，因为它们都试图将数据映射到嵌入空间，其中相似的数据靠得很近，不同的数据相距很远。与图像文本和视频文本检索等其他跨模态检索任务不同，音频文本检索仍然是一个未经探索的任务。在这项工作中，我们的目标是研究不同度量学习目标对音频文本检索任务的影响。我们对 AudioCaps 和 Clotho 数据集上的流行度量学习目标进行了广泛的评估。我们证明，改编自自监督学习的 NT-Xent 损失在不同的数据集和训练设置中表现出稳定的性能，并且优于流行的基于三元组的损失。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/XinhaoMei/audio-text_retrieval 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了不同度量学习目标对音频-文本跨模态检索任务的影响，并通过实验验证了自监督学习中NT-Xent损失函数的有效性。
AI.motivation: 尽管现有跨模态检索模型多采用度量学习方法，但音频-文本检索仍缺乏系统性研究，需探索适合该任务的优化目标。
AI.method: 在AudioCaps和Clotho数据集上对主流度量学习目标进行对比实验，重点评估自监督学习中改进的NT-Xent损失函数性能。
AI.result: NT-Xent损失在不同数据集和训练设置下表现稳定，显著优于传统三元组损失方法。
AI.conclusion: 自监督学习框架下的NT-Xent损失能有效提升音频-文本检索性能，未来可进一步探索其与其他自监督方法的结合。

ai_content.result: NT-Xent损失在不同数据集和训练设置下表现稳定，显著优于传统三元组损失方法。
ai_content.conclusion: 自监督学习框架下的NT-Xent损失能有效提升音频-文本检索性能，未来可进一步探索其与其他自监督方法的结合。

search_text: On Metric Learning for Audio-Text Cross-Modal Retrieval 音频文本跨模态检索的度量学习 Audio-text retrieval aims at retrieving a target audio clip or caption from a pool of candidates given a query in another modality. Solving such cross-modal retrieval task is challenging because it not only requires learning robust feature representations for both modalities, but also requires capturing the fine-grained alignment between these two modalities. Existing cross-modal retrieval models are mostly optimized by metric learning objectives as both of them attempt to map data to an embedding space, where similar data are close together and dissimilar data are far apart. Unlike other cross-modal retrieval tasks such as image-text and video-text retrievals, audio-text retrieval is still an unexplored task. In this work, we aim to study the impact of different metric learning objectives on the audio-text retrieval task. We present an extensive evaluation of popular metric learning objectives on the AudioCaps and Clotho datasets. We demonstrate that NT-Xent loss adapted from self-supervised learning shows stable performance across different datasets and training settings, and outperforms the popular triplet-based losses. Our code is available at https://github.com/XinhaoMei/audio-text_retrieval. 音频文本检索的目的是从以另一种方式给出查询的候选池中检索目标音频剪辑或字幕。解决这种跨模态检索任务具有挑战性，因为它不仅需要学习两种模态的鲁棒特征表示，而且还需要捕获这两种模态之间的细粒度对齐。现有的跨模态检索模型大多通过度量学习目标进行优化，因为它们都试图将数据映射到嵌入空间，其中相似的数据靠得很近，不同的数据相距很远。与图像文本和视频文本检索等其他跨模态检索任务不同，音频文本检索仍然是一个未经探索的任务。在这项工作中，我们的目标是研究不同度量学习目标对音频文本检索任务的影响。我们对 AudioCaps 和 Clotho 数据集上的流行度量学习目标进行了广泛的评估。我们证明，改编自自监督学习的 NT-Xent 损失在不同的数据集和训练设置中表现出稳定的性能，并且优于流行的基于三元组的损失。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/XinhaoMei/audio-text_retrieval 获取。 本文研究了不同度量学习目标对音频-文本跨模态检索任务的影响，并通过实验验证了自监督学习中NT-Xent损失函数的有效性。 Xinhao Mei,Xubo Liu,Jianyuan Sun,Mark D. Plumbley,Wenwu Wang eess.AS,cs.SD

authors_text: Nadine Rueegg,Silvia Zuffi,Konrad Schindler,Michael J. Black
title: BARC: Learning to Regress 3D Dog Shape from Images by Exploiting Breed Information
title_zh: BARC：学习通过利用品种信息从图像中回归 3D 狗形状
abstract: Our goal is to recover the 3D shape and pose of dogs from a single image. This is a challenging task because dogs exhibit a wide range of shapes and appearances, and are highly articulated. Recent work has proposed to directly regress the SMAL animal model, with additional limb scale parameters, from images. Our method, called BARC (Breed-Augmented Regression using Classification), goes beyond prior work in several important ways. First, we modify the SMAL shape space to be more appropriate for representing dog shape. But, even with a better shape model, the problem of regressing dog shape from an image is still challenging because we lack paired images with 3D ground truth. To compensate for the lack of paired data, we formulate novel losses that exploit information about dog breeds. In particular, we exploit the fact that dogs of the same breed have similar body shapes. We formulate a novel breed similarity loss consisting of two parts: One term encourages the shape of dogs from the same breed to be more similar than dogs of different breeds. The second one, a breed classification loss, helps to produce recognizable breed-specific shapes. Through ablation studies, we find that our breed losses significantly improve shape accuracy over a baseline without them. We also compare BARC qualitatively to WLDO with a perceptual study and find that our approach produces dogs that are significantly more realistic. This work shows that a-priori information about genetic similarity can help to compensate for the lack of 3D training data. This concept may be applicable to other animal species or groups of species. Our code is publicly available for research purposes at https://barc.is.tue.mpg.de/.
summary: Our goal is to recover the 3D shape and pose of dogs from a single image. This is a challenging task because dogs exhibit a wide range of shapes and appearances, and are highly articulated. Recent work has proposed to directly regress the SMAL animal model, with additional limb scale parameters, from images. Our method, called BARC (Breed-Augmented Regression using Classification), goes beyond prior work in several important ways. First, we modify the SMAL shape space to be more appropriate for representing dog shape. But, even with a better shape model, the problem of regressing dog shape from an image is still challenging because we lack paired images with 3D ground truth. To compensate for the lack of paired data, we formulate novel losses that exploit information about dog breeds. In particular, we exploit the fact that dogs of the same breed have similar body shapes. We formulate a novel breed similarity loss consisting of two parts: One term encourages the shape of dogs from the same breed to be more similar than dogs of different breeds. The second one, a breed classification loss, helps to produce recognizable breed-specific shapes. Through ablation studies, we find that our breed losses significantly improve shape accuracy over a baseline without them. We also compare BARC qualitatively to WLDO with a perceptual study and find that our approach produces dogs that are significantly more realistic. This work shows that a-priori information about genetic similarity can help to compensate for the lack of 3D training data. This concept may be applicable to other animal species or groups of species. Our code is publicly available for research purposes at https://barc.is.tue.mpg.de/.
abstract_zh: 我们的目标是从单个图像中恢复狗的 3D 形状和姿势。这是一项具有挑战性的任务，因为狗表现出各种各样的形状和外观，并且关节活动度很高。最近的工作提出从图像中直接回归 SMAL 动物模型，并附加肢体尺度参数。我们的方法称为 BARC（使用分类的品种增强回归），在几个重要方面超越了之前的工作。首先，我们修改 SMAL 形状空间以更适合表示狗的形状。但是，即使有了更好的形状模型，从图像中回归狗形状的问题仍然具有挑战性，因为我们缺乏与 3D 地面实况的配对图像。为了弥补配对数据的缺乏，我们利用有关狗品种的信息制定了新颖的损失。特别是，我们利用同一品种的狗具有相似体形的事实。我们制定了一种新颖的品种相似性损失，由两部分组成：一个术语鼓励同一品种的狗的形状比不同品种的狗更相似。第二个是品种分类损失，有助于产生可识别的品种特定形状。通过消融研究，我们发现，与没有品种损失的基线相比，我们的品种损失显着提高了形状准确性。我们还通过感知研究将 BARC 与 WLDO 进行定性比较，发现我们的方法产生的狗明显更加真实。这项工作表明，有关遗传相似性的先验信息有助于弥补 3D 训练数据的缺乏。这个概念可能适用于其他动物物种或物种群体。我们的代码可在 https://barc.is.tue.mpg.de/ 上公开用于研究目的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出BARC方法，通过利用犬种信息从单张图像中回归3D犬形。
AI.motivation: 由于犬类形状和外观差异大且高度可变形，直接从图像中恢复3D犬形具有挑战性。现有方法缺乏配对的3D真实数据，难以准确建模。
AI.method: 改进SMAL模型以适应犬类形状，并设计两种新型损失函数：犬种相似性损失（鼓励同品种犬形相似）和犬种分类损失（生成可识别的品种特征）。
AI.result: 消融实验证明犬种损失显著提升形状精度，感知实验显示BARC生成的犬形比WLDO更真实，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 利用遗传相似性先验信息可弥补3D训练数据不足，该方法可能扩展到其他物种。

authors_text: Giada Galati,Stefano Primatesta,Sergio Grammatico,Simone Macrì,Alessandro Rizzo
title: Game-theoretical trajectory planning enhances social acceptability for humans
title_zh: 博弈论轨迹规划提高了人类的社会接受度
abstract: Since humans and robots are increasingly sharing portions of their operational spaces, experimental evidence is needed to ascertain the safety and social acceptability of robots in human-populated environments. Although several studies have aimed at devising strategies for robot trajectory planning to perform \emph{safe} motion in populated environments, a few efforts have \emph{measured} to what extent a robot trajectory is \emph{accepted} by humans. Here, we present a navigation system for autonomous robotics that ensures safety and social acceptability of robotic trajectories. We overcome the typical reactive nature of state-of-the-art trajectory planners by leveraging non-cooperative game theory to design a planner that encapsulates human-like features of preservation of a vital space, recognition of groups, sequential and strategized decision making, and smooth obstacle avoidance. Social acceptability is measured through a variation of the Turing test administered in the form of a survey questionnaire to a pool of 691 participants. Comparison terms for our tests are a state-of-the-art navigation algorithm (Enhanced Vector Field Histogram, VFH) and purely human trajectories. While all participants easily recognized the non-human nature of VFH-generated trajectories, the distinction between game-theoretical trajectories and human ones were hardly revealed. These results mark a strong milestone toward the full integration of robots in social environments.
summary: Since humans and robots are increasingly sharing portions of their operational spaces, experimental evidence is needed to ascertain the safety and social acceptability of robots in human-populated environments. Although several studies have aimed at devising strategies for robot trajectory planning to perform \emph{safe} motion in populated environments, a few efforts have \emph{measured} to what extent a robot trajectory is \emph{accepted} by humans. Here, we present a navigation system for autonomous robotics that ensures safety and social acceptability of robotic trajectories. We overcome the typical reactive nature of state-of-the-art trajectory planners by leveraging non-cooperative game theory to design a planner that encapsulates human-like features of preservation of a vital space, recognition of groups, sequential and strategized decision making, and smooth obstacle avoidance. Social acceptability is measured through a variation of the Turing test administered in the form of a survey questionnaire to a pool of 691 participants. Comparison terms for our tests are a state-of-the-art navigation algorithm (Enhanced Vector Field Histogram, VFH) and purely human trajectories. While all participants easily recognized the non-human nature of VFH-generated trajectories, the distinction between game-theoretical trajectories and human ones were hardly revealed. These results mark a strong milestone toward the full integration of robots in social environments.
abstract_zh: 由于人类和机器人越来越多地共享部分操作空间，因此需要实验证据来确定机器人在人类居住环境中的安全性和社会可接受性。尽管一些研究旨在设计机器人轨迹规划策略，以在人口稠密的环境中执行\emph{安全}运动，但也有一些研究\emph{测量}了人类对机器人轨迹\emph{接受}的程度。在这里，我们提出了一种用于自主机器人的导航系统，可确保机器人轨迹的安全性和社会可接受性。我们通过利用非合作博弈论来设计一个规划器，该规划器封装了保留重要空间、识别群体、顺序和策略性决策以及平滑避障等类人特征，从而克服了最先进轨迹规划器的典型反应性质。社会可接受性是通过图灵测试的变体来衡量的，该测试以调查问卷的形式向 691 名参与者进行调查。我们测试的比较项是最先进的导航算法（增强型矢量场直方图，VFH）和纯粹的人类轨迹。虽然所有参与者都很容易认识到 VFH 生成轨迹的非人类本质，但博弈论轨迹与人类轨迹之间的区别却很难被揭示。这些结果标志着机器人全面融入社交环境的一个重要里程碑。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于博弈论的轨迹规划方法，旨在提高机器人在人类环境中的安全性和社会接受度。
AI.motivation: 尽管已有研究关注机器人安全运动策略，但缺乏对机器人轨迹被人类接受程度的量化评估，需探索更符合人类社会行为的导航方案。
AI.method: 采用非合作博弈论设计轨迹规划器，模拟人类保有个人空间、群体识别、策略性决策等特征，并通过691人参与的问卷调查（类图灵测试）评估社会接受度。
AI.result: 实验表明，博弈论生成的轨迹与人类轨迹难以区分（而传统VFH算法轨迹被轻易识别为非人类），证明该方法显著提升了社会接受度。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为机器人融入社会环境提供了关键技术突破，通过模拟人类行为特征实现更自然的交互与共存。

method: 采用非合作博弈论设计轨迹规划器，模拟人类保有个人空间、群体识别、策略性决策等特征，并通过691人参与的问卷调查（类图灵测试）评估社会接受度。
result: 实验表明，博弈论生成的轨迹与人类轨迹难以区分（而传统VFH算法轨迹被轻易识别为非人类），证明该方法显著提升了社会接受度。
conclusion: 该研究为机器人融入社会环境提供了关键技术突破，通过模拟人类行为特征实现更自然的交互与共存。
search_text: Game-theoretical trajectory planning enhances social acceptability for humans 博弈论轨迹规划提高了人类的社会接受度 Since humans and robots are increasingly sharing portions of their operational spaces, experimental evidence is needed to ascertain the safety and social acceptability of robots in human-populated environments. Although several studies have aimed at devising strategies for robot trajectory planning to perform \emph{safe} motion in populated environments, a few efforts have \emph{measured} to what extent a robot trajectory is \emph{accepted} by humans. Here, we present a navigation system for autonomous robotics that ensures safety and social acceptability of robotic trajectories. We overcome the typical reactive nature of state-of-the-art trajectory planners by leveraging non-cooperative game theory to design a planner that encapsulates human-like features of preservation of a vital space, recognition of groups, sequential and strategized decision making, and smooth obstacle avoidance. Social acceptability is measured through a variation of the Turing test administered in the form of a survey questionnaire to a pool of 691 participants. Comparison terms for our tests are a state-of-the-art navigation algorithm (Enhanced Vector Field Histogram, VFH) and purely human trajectories. While all participants easily recognized the non-human nature of VFH-generated trajectories, the distinction between game-theoretical trajectories and human ones were hardly revealed. These results mark a strong milestone toward the full integration of robots in social environments. 由于人类和机器人越来越多地共享部分操作空间，因此需要实验证据来确定机器人在人类居住环境中的安全性和社会可接受性。尽管一些研究旨在设计机器人轨迹规划策略，以在人口稠密的环境中执行\emph{安全}运动，但也有一些研究\emph{测量}了人类对机器人轨迹\emph{接受}的程度。在这里，我们提出了一种用于自主机器人的导航系统，可确保机器人轨迹的安全性和社会可接受性。我们通过利用非合作博弈论来设计一个规划器，该规划器封装了保留重要空间、识别群体、顺序和策略性决策以及平滑避障等类人特征，从而克服了最先进轨迹规划器的典型反应性质。社会可接受性是通过图灵测试的变体来衡量的，该测试以调查问卷的形式向 691 名参与者进行调查。我们测试的比较项是最先进的导航算法（增强型矢量场直方图，VFH）和纯粹的人类轨迹。虽然所有参与者都很容易认识到 VFH 生成轨迹的非人类本质，但博弈论轨迹与人类轨迹之间的区别却很难被揭示。这些结果标志着机器人全面融入社交环境的一个重要里程碑。 本文提出一种基于博弈论的轨迹规划方法，旨在提高机器人在人类环境中的安全性和社会接受度。 Giada Galati,Stefano Primatesta,Sergio Grammatico,Simone Macrì,Alessandro Rizzo cs.RO,cs.GT

authors_text: Ivan Shugurov,Fu Li,Benjamin Busam,Slobodan Ilic
title: OSOP: A Multi-Stage One Shot Object Pose Estimation Framework
title_zh: OSOP：一种多阶段一次性物体姿态估计框架
abstract: We present a novel one-shot method for object detection and 6 DoF pose estimation, that does not require training on target objects. At test time, it takes as input a target image and a textured 3D query model. The core idea is to represent a 3D model with a number of 2D templates rendered from different viewpoints. This enables CNN-based direct dense feature extraction and matching. The object is first localized in 2D, then its approximate viewpoint is estimated, followed by dense 2D-3D correspondence prediction. The final pose is computed with PnP. We evaluate the method on LineMOD, Occlusion, Homebrewed, YCB-V and TLESS datasets and report very competitive performance in comparison to the state-of-the-art methods trained on synthetic data, even though our method is not trained on the object models used for testing.
summary: We present a novel one-shot method for object detection and 6 DoF pose estimation, that does not require training on target objects. At test time, it takes as input a target image and a textured 3D query model. The core idea is to represent a 3D model with a number of 2D templates rendered from different viewpoints. This enables CNN-based direct dense feature extraction and matching. The object is first localized in 2D, then its approximate viewpoint is estimated, followed by dense 2D-3D correspondence prediction. The final pose is computed with PnP. We evaluate the method on LineMOD, Occlusion, Homebrewed, YCB-V and TLESS datasets and report very competitive performance in comparison to the state-of-the-art methods trained on synthetic data, even though our method is not trained on the object models used for testing.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种新颖的一次性对象检测和 6 DoF 姿态估计方法，不需要对目标对象进行训练。在测试时，它将目标图像和纹理 3D 查询模型作为输入。核心思想是用多个从不同视点渲染的 2D 模板来表示 3D 模型。这使得基于 CNN 的直接密集特征提取和匹配成为可能。首先对对象进行 2D 定位，然后估计其近似视点，然后进行密集的 2D-3D 对应预测。最终姿势是通过 PnP 计算的。我们在 LineMOD、Occlusion、Homebrewed、YCB-V 和 TLESS 数据集上评估该方法，并报告与在合成数据上训练的最先进方法相比非常有竞争力的性能，即使我们的方法没有在用于测试的对象模型上进行训练。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需针对目标物体进行训练的单次拍摄物体检测与6自由度姿态估计方法。
AI.motivation: 现有方法通常依赖于目标物体的合成数据训练，而本文旨在开发一种无需此类训练、直接利用3D模型进行实时姿态估计的通用方法。
AI.method: 通过从不同视角渲染3D模型生成2D模板，利用CNN进行密集特征提取与匹配，分阶段完成2D定位、视角估计、2D-3D对应预测，最终通过PnP算法计算姿态。
AI.result: 在LineMOD、Occlusion等数据集上，该方法在未使用测试物体模型训练的情况下，性能与基于合成数据训练的最先进方法相当。
AI.conclusion: OSOP框架证明了无需训练即可实现高精度姿态估计的可行性，为实际场景中的物体检测提供了高效解决方案。

authors_text: Chao-Han Huck Yang,I-Te Danny Hung,Yi-Chieh Liu,Pin-Yu Chen
title: Treatment Learning Causal Transformer for Noisy Image Classification
title_zh: 用于噪声图像分类的处理学习因果变换器
comment: Accepted to IEEE WACV 2023. The first version was finished in May 2018
comments: Accepted to IEEE WACV 2023. The first version was finished in May 2018
abstract: Current top-notch deep learning (DL) based vision models are primarily based on exploring and exploiting the inherent correlations between training data samples and their associated labels. However, a known practical challenge is their degraded performance against "noisy" data, induced by different circumstances such as spurious correlations, irrelevant contexts, domain shift, and adversarial attacks. In this work, we incorporate this binary information of "existence of noise" as treatment into image classification tasks to improve prediction accuracy by jointly estimating their treatment effects. Motivated from causal variational inference, we propose a transformer-based architecture, Treatment Learning Causal Transformer (TLT), that uses a latent generative model to estimate robust feature representations from current observational input for noise image classification. Depending on the estimated noise level (modeled as a binary treatment factor), TLT assigns the corresponding inference network trained by the designed causal loss for prediction. We also create new noisy image datasets incorporating a wide range of noise factors (e.g., object masking, style transfer, and adversarial perturbation) for performance benchmarking. The superior performance of TLT in noisy image classification is further validated by several refutation evaluation metrics. As a by-product, TLT also improves visual salience methods for perceiving noisy images.
summary: Current top-notch deep learning (DL) based vision models are primarily based on exploring and exploiting the inherent correlations between training data samples and their associated labels. However, a known practical challenge is their degraded performance against "noisy" data, induced by different circumstances such as spurious correlations, irrelevant contexts, domain shift, and adversarial attacks. In this work, we incorporate this binary information of "existence of noise" as treatment into image classification tasks to improve prediction accuracy by jointly estimating their treatment effects. Motivated from causal variational inference, we propose a transformer-based architecture, Treatment Learning Causal Transformer (TLT), that uses a latent generative model to estimate robust feature representations from current observational input for noise image classification. Depending on the estimated noise level (modeled as a binary treatment factor), TLT assigns the corresponding inference network trained by the designed causal loss for prediction. We also create new noisy image datasets incorporating a wide range of noise factors (e.g., object masking, style transfer, and adversarial perturbation) for performance benchmarking. The superior performance of TLT in noisy image classification is further validated by several refutation evaluation metrics. As a by-product, TLT also improves visual salience methods for perceiving noisy images.
abstract_zh: 当前基于深度学习（DL）的顶尖视觉模型主要基于探索和利用训练数据样本与其相关标签之间的内在相关性。然而，一个已知的实际挑战是它们针对“噪声”数据的性能下降，这是由不同情况引起的，例如虚假相关性、不相关的上下文、域转移和对抗性攻击。在这项工作中，我们将这种“噪声的存在”作为处理的二进制信息纳入图像分类任务中，通过联合估计其处理效果来提高预测精度。受因果变分推理的启发，我们提出了一种基于变压器的架构，即治疗学习因果变压器（TLT），它使用潜在生成模型来估计噪声图像分类的当前观察输入的鲁棒特征表示。根据估计的噪声水平（建模为二元处理因子），TLT 分配由设计的因果损失训练的相应推理网络进行预测。我们还创建了新的噪声图像数据集，其中包含各种噪声因素（例如对象掩蔽、风格转移和对抗性扰动）以进行性能基准测试。 TLT 在噪声图像分类中的优越性能通过多个反驳评估指标得到进一步验证。作为副产品，TLT 还改进了感知噪声图像的视觉显着性方法。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于因果推理的Transformer模型TLT，用于提升噪声图像分类的准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习模型在噪声数据（如虚假相关性、对抗攻击等）下表现不佳，需改进鲁棒性。
AI.method: 提出TLT架构，结合因果变分推理，利用潜在生成模型估计特征，并根据噪声水平选择推理网络，设计新数据集进行评估。
AI.result: 在噪声图像分类任务中，TLT在多个评估指标上优于现有方法，并提升噪声图像的视觉显著性分析效果。
AI.conclusion: TLT通过因果推理有效提升了噪声图像分类的鲁棒性，验证了其在处理噪声数据中的有效性。

authors_text: Chen Chen,Nana Hou,Yuchen Hu,Heqing Zou,Xiaofeng Qi,Eng Siong Chng
title: Interactive Audio-text Representation for Automated Audio Captioning with Contrastive Learning
title_zh: 具有对比学习的自动音频字幕的交互式音频文本表示
abstract: Automated Audio captioning (AAC) is a cross-modal task that generates natural language to describe the content of input audio. Most prior works usually extract single-modality acoustic features and are therefore sub-optimal for the cross-modal decoding task. In this work, we propose a novel AAC system called CLIP-AAC to learn interactive cross-modality representation with both acoustic and textual information. Specifically, the proposed CLIP-AAC introduces an audio-head and a text-head in the pre-trained encoder to extract audio-text information. Furthermore, we also apply contrastive learning to narrow the domain difference by learning the correspondence between the audio signal and its paired captions. Experimental results show that the proposed CLIP-AAC approach surpasses the best baseline by a significant margin on the Clotho dataset in terms of NLP evaluation metrics. The ablation study indicates that both the pre-trained model and contrastive learning contribute to the performance gain of the AAC model.
summary: Automated Audio captioning (AAC) is a cross-modal task that generates natural language to describe the content of input audio. Most prior works usually extract single-modality acoustic features and are therefore sub-optimal for the cross-modal decoding task. In this work, we propose a novel AAC system called CLIP-AAC to learn interactive cross-modality representation with both acoustic and textual information. Specifically, the proposed CLIP-AAC introduces an audio-head and a text-head in the pre-trained encoder to extract audio-text information. Furthermore, we also apply contrastive learning to narrow the domain difference by learning the correspondence between the audio signal and its paired captions. Experimental results show that the proposed CLIP-AAC approach surpasses the best baseline by a significant margin on the Clotho dataset in terms of NLP evaluation metrics. The ablation study indicates that both the pre-trained model and contrastive learning contribute to the performance gain of the AAC model.
abstract_zh: 自动音频字幕 (AAC) 是一项跨模式任务，可生成自然语言来描述输入音频的内容。大多数先前的工作通常提取单模态声学特征，因此对于跨模态解码任务来说不是最佳的。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种名为 CLIP-AAC 的新型 AAC 系统，用于学习具有声学和文本信息的交互式跨模态表示。具体来说，所提出的 CLIP-AAC 在预训练编码器中引入音频头和文本头来提取音频文本信息。此外，我们还应用对比学习通过学习音频信号与其配对字幕之间的对应关系来缩小域差异。实验结果表明，就 NLP 评估指标而言，所提出的 CLIP-AAC 方法在 Clotho 数据集上显着超越了最佳基线。消融研究表明，预训练模型和对比学习都有助于 AAC 模型的性能增益。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于对比学习的交互式音频-文本表示方法，用于自动音频字幕生成任务。
AI.motivation: 现有方法通常仅提取单模态声学特征，难以有效捕捉跨模态语义关联，导致生成的字幕质量有限。
AI.method: 提出CLIP-AAC框架，在预训练编码器中引入音频头和文本头以提取跨模态信息，并通过对比学习对齐音频信号与配对字幕的语义表示。
AI.result: 在Clotho数据集上，CLIP-AAC在NLP评估指标上显著优于最佳基线，消融实验证实了预训练模型与对比学习对性能提升的贡献。
AI.conclusion: 结合交互式跨模态表示与对比学习能有效提升自动音频字幕生成的性能，为跨模态任务提供新思路。

search_text: Interactive Audio-text Representation for Automated Audio Captioning with Contrastive Learning 具有对比学习的自动音频字幕的交互式音频文本表示 Automated Audio captioning (AAC) is a cross-modal task that generates natural language to describe the content of input audio. Most prior works usually extract single-modality acoustic features and are therefore sub-optimal for the cross-modal decoding task. In this work, we propose a novel AAC system called CLIP-AAC to learn interactive cross-modality representation with both acoustic and textual information. Specifically, the proposed CLIP-AAC introduces an audio-head and a text-head in the pre-trained encoder to extract audio-text information. Furthermore, we also apply contrastive learning to narrow the domain difference by learning the correspondence between the audio signal and its paired captions. Experimental results show that the proposed CLIP-AAC approach surpasses the best baseline by a significant margin on the Clotho dataset in terms of NLP evaluation metrics. The ablation study indicates that both the pre-trained model and contrastive learning contribute to the performance gain of the AAC model. 自动音频字幕 (AAC) 是一项跨模式任务，可生成自然语言来描述输入音频的内容。大多数先前的工作通常提取单模态声学特征，因此对于跨模态解码任务来说不是最佳的。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种名为 CLIP-AAC 的新型 AAC 系统，用于学习具有声学和文本信息的交互式跨模态表示。具体来说，所提出的 CLIP-AAC 在预训练编码器中引入音频头和文本头来提取音频文本信息。此外，我们还应用对比学习通过学习音频信号与其配对字幕之间的对应关系来缩小域差异。实验结果表明，就 NLP 评估指标而言，所提出的 CLIP-AAC 方法在 Clotho 数据集上显着超越了最佳基线。消融研究表明，预训练模型和对比学习都有助于 AAC 模型的性能增益。 本文提出了一种基于对比学习的交互式音频-文本表示方法，用于自动音频字幕生成任务。 Chen Chen,Nana Hou,Yuchen Hu,Heqing Zou,Xiaofeng Qi,Eng Siong Chng cs.SD,cs.CL,eess.AS

authors_text: Hesham M. Eraqi,Mena Nagiub,Peter Sidra
title: Collision-Free Navigation using Evolutionary Symmetrical Neural Networks
title_zh: 使用进化对称神经网络的无碰撞导航
comment: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:1609.08414
comments: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:1609.08414
abstract: Collision avoidance systems play a vital role in reducing the number of vehicle accidents and saving human lives. This paper extends the previous work using evolutionary neural networks for reactive collision avoidance. We are proposing a new method we have called symmetric neural networks. The method improves the model's performance by enforcing constraints between the network weights which reduces the model optimization search space and hence, learns more accurate control of the vehicle steering for improved maneuvering. The training and validation processes are carried out using a simulation environment - the codebase is publicly available. Extensive experiments are conducted to analyze the proposed method and evaluate its performance. The method is tested in several simulated driving scenarios. In addition, we have analyzed the effect of the rangefinder sensor resolution and noise on the overall goal of reactive collision avoidance. Finally, we have tested the generalization of the proposed method. The results are encouraging; the proposed method has improved the model's learning curve for training scenarios and generalization to the new test scenarios. Using constrained weights has significantly improved the number of generations required for the Genetic Algorithm optimization.
summary: Collision avoidance systems play a vital role in reducing the number of vehicle accidents and saving human lives. This paper extends the previous work using evolutionary neural networks for reactive collision avoidance. We are proposing a new method we have called symmetric neural networks. The method improves the model's performance by enforcing constraints between the network weights which reduces the model optimization search space and hence, learns more accurate control of the vehicle steering for improved maneuvering. The training and validation processes are carried out using a simulation environment - the codebase is publicly available. Extensive experiments are conducted to analyze the proposed method and evaluate its performance. The method is tested in several simulated driving scenarios. In addition, we have analyzed the effect of the rangefinder sensor resolution and noise on the overall goal of reactive collision avoidance. Finally, we have tested the generalization of the proposed method. The results are encouraging; the proposed method has improved the model's learning curve for training scenarios and generalization to the new test scenarios. Using constrained weights has significantly improved the number of generations required for the Genetic Algorithm optimization.
abstract_zh: 防撞系统在减少车辆事故数量和挽救人员生命方面发挥着至关重要的作用。本文扩展了之前的工作，使用进化神经网络进行反应性碰撞避免。我们提出了一种称为对称神经网络的新方法。该方法通过在网络权重之间施加约束来提高模型的性能，从而减少模型优化搜索空间，从而学习更准确的车辆转向控制以改进操纵。培训和验证过程是使用模拟环境进行的 - 代码库是公开可用的。进行了大量的实验来分析所提出的方法并评估其性能。该方法在多个模拟驾驶场景中进行了测试。此外，我们还分析了测距仪传感器分辨率和噪声对反应性避碰总体目标的影响。最后，我们测试了所提出方法的泛化性。结果令人鼓舞；所提出的方法改进了模型的训练场景学习曲线以及对新测试场景的泛化。使用约束权重显着提高了遗传算法优化所需的代数。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于对称神经网络的进化算法，用于改进车辆避障系统的导航性能。
AI.motivation: 现有避障系统在复杂环境中存在优化效率低、泛化能力弱的问题，需通过约束网络权重提升模型学习效率与控制精度。
AI.method: 设计对称神经网络结构，通过约束权重关系缩小优化空间，并结合遗传算法在仿真环境中进行训练与验证，分析传感器分辨率及噪声影响。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法显著提升了训练场景的学习效率，增强了对新场景的泛化能力，并减少了遗传算法的优化代数。
AI.conclusion: 对称神经网络通过约束优化有效改进了避障控制性能，为复杂环境下的自主导航提供了可行方案。

authors_text: Sarthak Yadav,Neil Zeghidour
title: Learning neural audio features without supervision
title_zh: 无监督学习神经音频特征
abstract: Deep audio classification, traditionally cast as training a deep neural network on top of mel-filterbanks in a supervised fashion, has recently benefited from two independent lines of work. The first one explores "learnable frontends", i.e., neural modules that produce a learnable time-frequency representation, to overcome limitations of fixed features. The second one uses self-supervised learning to leverage unprecedented scales of pre-training data. In this work, we study the feasibility of combining both approaches, i.e., pre-training learnable frontend jointly with the main architecture for downstream classification. First, we show that pretraining two previously proposed frontends (SincNet and LEAF) on Audioset drastically improves linear-probe performance over fixed mel-filterbanks, suggesting that learnable time-frequency representations can benefit self-supervised pre-training even more than supervised training. Surprisingly, randomly initialized learnable filterbanks outperform mel-scaled initialization in the self-supervised setting, a counter-intuitive result that questions the appropriateness of strong priors when designing learnable filters. Through exploratory analysis of the learned frontend components, we uncover crucial differences in properties of these frontends when used in a supervised and self-supervised setting, especially the affinity of self-supervised filters to diverge significantly from the mel-scale to model a broader range of frequencies.
summary: Deep audio classification, traditionally cast as training a deep neural network on top of mel-filterbanks in a supervised fashion, has recently benefited from two independent lines of work. The first one explores "learnable frontends", i.e., neural modules that produce a learnable time-frequency representation, to overcome limitations of fixed features. The second one uses self-supervised learning to leverage unprecedented scales of pre-training data. In this work, we study the feasibility of combining both approaches, i.e., pre-training learnable frontend jointly with the main architecture for downstream classification. First, we show that pretraining two previously proposed frontends (SincNet and LEAF) on Audioset drastically improves linear-probe performance over fixed mel-filterbanks, suggesting that learnable time-frequency representations can benefit self-supervised pre-training even more than supervised training. Surprisingly, randomly initialized learnable filterbanks outperform mel-scaled initialization in the self-supervised setting, a counter-intuitive result that questions the appropriateness of strong priors when designing learnable filters. Through exploratory analysis of the learned frontend components, we uncover crucial differences in properties of these frontends when used in a supervised and self-supervised setting, especially the affinity of self-supervised filters to diverge significantly from the mel-scale to model a broader range of frequencies.
abstract_zh: 深度音频分类传统上是在梅尔滤波器组之上以监督方式训练深度神经网络，最近受益于两条独立的工作。第一个探索“可学习的前端”，即产生可学习的时频表示的神经模块，以克服固定特征的限制。第二个方法使用自我监督学习来利用前所未有的预训练数据规模。在这项工作中，我们研究了结合这两种方法的可行性，即预训练可学习前端与下游分类的主要架构联合。首先，我们表明，在 Audioset 上预训练两个先前提出的前端（SincNet 和 LEAF）可以大大提高固定梅尔滤波器组的线性探针性能，这表明可学习的时频表示可以比监督训练更有利于自监督预训练。令人惊讶的是，在自监督设置中，随机初始化的可学习滤波器组优于梅尔缩放初始化，这是一个反直觉的结果，在设计可学习滤波器时质疑强先验的适当性。通过对学习到的前端组件进行探索性分析，我们发现了这些前端在监督和自监督环境中使用时属性的关键差异，特别是自监督过滤器与梅尔尺度显着不同以模拟更广泛的频率范围的亲和力。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在无监督条件下结合可学习前端与自监督预训练方法，以提升音频分类任务的性能。
AI.motivation: 传统音频分类依赖固定特征（如mel-filterbanks），但其存在局限性。现有工作分别探索了可学习前端和自监督学习，但未研究两者的结合效果。
AI.method: 在Audioset数据集上联合预训练两种可学习前端（SincNet和LEAF），并与固定mel-filterbanks对比；分析自监督设置下随机初始化与mel尺度初始化的差异。
AI.result: 可学习前端在自监督预训练下显著优于固定特征；随机初始化的滤波器在自监督任务中表现更优，且自监督滤波器在频率覆盖范围上偏离mel尺度。
AI.conclusion: 自监督学习与可学习前端结合能有效提升音频特征学习，传统强先验（如mel尺度）可能限制模型表现，需重新审视前端设计原则。

search_text: Learning neural audio features without supervision 无监督学习神经音频特征 Deep audio classification, traditionally cast as training a deep neural network on top of mel-filterbanks in a supervised fashion, has recently benefited from two independent lines of work. The first one explores "learnable frontends", i.e., neural modules that produce a learnable time-frequency representation, to overcome limitations of fixed features. The second one uses self-supervised learning to leverage unprecedented scales of pre-training data. In this work, we study the feasibility of combining both approaches, i.e., pre-training learnable frontend jointly with the main architecture for downstream classification. First, we show that pretraining two previously proposed frontends (SincNet and LEAF) on Audioset drastically improves linear-probe performance over fixed mel-filterbanks, suggesting that learnable time-frequency representations can benefit self-supervised pre-training even more than supervised training. Surprisingly, randomly initialized learnable filterbanks outperform mel-scaled initialization in the self-supervised setting, a counter-intuitive result that questions the appropriateness of strong priors when designing learnable filters. Through exploratory analysis of the learned frontend components, we uncover crucial differences in properties of these frontends when used in a supervised and self-supervised setting, especially the affinity of self-supervised filters to diverge significantly from the mel-scale to model a broader range of frequencies. 深度音频分类传统上是在梅尔滤波器组之上以监督方式训练深度神经网络，最近受益于两条独立的工作。第一个探索“可学习的前端”，即产生可学习的时频表示的神经模块，以克服固定特征的限制。第二个方法使用自我监督学习来利用前所未有的预训练数据规模。在这项工作中，我们研究了结合这两种方法的可行性，即预训练可学习前端与下游分类的主要架构联合。首先，我们表明，在 Audioset 上预训练两个先前提出的前端（SincNet 和 LEAF）可以大大提高固定梅尔滤波器组的线性探针性能，这表明可学习的时频表示可以比监督训练更有利于自监督预训练。令人惊讶的是，在自监督设置中，随机初始化的可学习滤波器组优于梅尔缩放初始化，这是一个反直觉的结果，在设计可学习滤波器时质疑强先验的适当性。通过对学习到的前端组件进行探索性分析，我们发现了这些前端在监督和自监督环境中使用时属性的关键差异，特别是自监督过滤器与梅尔尺度显着不同以模拟更广泛的频率范围的亲和力。 本文研究了在无监督条件下结合可学习前端与自监督预训练方法，以提升音频分类任务的性能。 Sarthak Yadav,Neil Zeghidour cs.SD,cs.LG,eess.AS

authors_text: Jianyu Zhang,David Lopez-Paz,Léon Bottou
title: Rich Feature Construction for the Optimization-Generalization Dilemma
title_zh: 针对优化泛化困境的丰富特征构建
abstract: There often is a dilemma between ease of optimization and robust out-of-distribution (OoD) generalization. For instance, many OoD methods rely on penalty terms whose optimization is challenging. They are either too strong to optimize reliably or too weak to achieve their goals. We propose to initialize the networks with a rich representation containing a palette of potentially useful features, ready to be used by even simple models. On the one hand, a rich representation provides a good initialization for the optimizer. On the other hand, it also provides an inductive bias that helps OoD generalization. Such a representation is constructed with the Rich Feature Construction (RFC) algorithm, also called the Bonsai algorithm, which consists of a succession of training episodes. During discovery episodes, we craft a multi-objective optimization criterion and its associated datasets in a manner that prevents the network from using the features constructed in the previous iterations. During synthesis episodes, we use knowledge distillation to force the network to simultaneously represent all the previously discovered features. Initializing the networks with Bonsai representations consistently helps six OoD methods achieve top performance on ColoredMNIST benchmark. The same technique substantially outperforms comparable results on the Wilds Camelyon17 task, eliminates the high result variance that plagues other methods, and makes hyperparameter tuning and model selection more reliable.
summary: There often is a dilemma between ease of optimization and robust out-of-distribution (OoD) generalization. For instance, many OoD methods rely on penalty terms whose optimization is challenging. They are either too strong to optimize reliably or too weak to achieve their goals. We propose to initialize the networks with a rich representation containing a palette of potentially useful features, ready to be used by even simple models. On the one hand, a rich representation provides a good initialization for the optimizer. On the other hand, it also provides an inductive bias that helps OoD generalization. Such a representation is constructed with the Rich Feature Construction (RFC) algorithm, also called the Bonsai algorithm, which consists of a succession of training episodes. During discovery episodes, we craft a multi-objective optimization criterion and its associated datasets in a manner that prevents the network from using the features constructed in the previous iterations. During synthesis episodes, we use knowledge distillation to force the network to simultaneously represent all the previously discovered features. Initializing the networks with Bonsai representations consistently helps six OoD methods achieve top performance on ColoredMNIST benchmark. The same technique substantially outperforms comparable results on the Wilds Camelyon17 task, eliminates the high result variance that plagues other methods, and makes hyperparameter tuning and model selection more reliable.
abstract_zh: 易于优化和稳健的分布外 (OoD) 泛化之间经常存在两难境地。例如，许多 OoD 方法依赖于惩罚项，其优化具有挑战性。它们要么太强大而无法可靠优化，要么太弱而无法实现目标。我们建议使用丰富的表示来初始化网络，其中包含一系列潜在有用的特征，甚至可供简单的模型使用。一方面，丰富的表示为优化器提供了良好的初始化。另一方面，它还提供了有助于 OoD 泛化的归纳偏差。这种表示是通过丰富特征构建（RFC）算法（也称为盆景算法）构建的，该算法由一系列训练片段组成。在发现过程中，我们以防止网络使用先前迭代中构建的特征的方式制定多目标优化标准及其相关数据集。在综合过程中，我们使用知识蒸馏来强制网络同时表示所有先前发现的特征。使用 Bonsai 表示初始化网络始终有助于六种 OoD 方法在 ColoredMNIST 基准上实现最佳性能。相同的技术在 Wilds Camelyon17 任务上的性能显着优于同类结果，消除了困扰其他方法的高结果方差，并使超参数调整和模型选择更加可靠。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为RFC（Bonsai）的算法，通过构建丰富的初始特征表示来解决优化与泛化之间的矛盾。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在优化难度与分布外泛化性能之间难以平衡，惩罚项过强或过弱均无法有效解决问题。
AI.method: 设计包含发现阶段（防止复用旧特征）和合成阶段（知识蒸馏整合特征）的RFC算法，构建多目标优化准则与数据集。
AI.result: 在ColoredMNIST基准测试中六种泛化方法表现最佳，在Wilds Camelyon17任务上显著优于对比方法并降低结果方差。
AI.conclusion: 通过Bonsai初始化的网络能有效协调优化与泛化，为模型选择和超参数调优提供更可靠的基础。

authors_text: David Solans,Andrea Beretta,Manuel Portela,Carlos Castillo,Anna Monreale
title: Human Response to an AI-Based Decision Support System: A User Study on the Effects of Accuracy and Bias
title_zh: 人类对基于人工智能的决策支持系统的反应：关于准确性和偏差影响的用户研究
abstract: Artificial Intelligence (AI) is increasingly used to build Decision Support Systems (DSS) across many domains. This paper describes a series of experiments designed to observe human response to different characteristics of a DSS such as accuracy and bias, particularly the extent to which participants rely on the DSS, and the performance they achieve. In our experiments, participants play a simple online game inspired by so-called "wildcat" (i.e., exploratory) drilling for oil. The landscape has two layers: a visible layer describing the costs (terrain), and a hidden layer describing the reward (oil yield). Participants in the control group play the game without receiving any assistance, while in treatment groups they are assisted by a DSS suggesting places to drill. For certain treatments, the DSS does not consider costs, but only rewards, which introduces a bias that is observable by users. Between subjects, we vary the accuracy and bias of the DSS, and observe the participants' total score, time to completion, the extent to which they follow or ignore suggestions. We also measure the acceptability of the DSS in an exit survey. Our results show that participants tend to score better with the DSS, that the score increase is due to users following the DSS advice, and related to the difficulty of the game and the accuracy of the DSS. We observe that this setting elicits mostly rational behavior from participants, who place a moderate amount of trust in the DSS and show neither algorithmic aversion (under-reliance) nor automation bias (over-reliance).However, their stated willingness to accept the DSS in the exit survey seems less sensitive to the accuracy of the DSS than their behavior, suggesting that users are only partially aware of the (lack of) accuracy of the DSS.
summary: Artificial Intelligence (AI) is increasingly used to build Decision Support Systems (DSS) across many domains. This paper describes a series of experiments designed to observe human response to different characteristics of a DSS such as accuracy and bias, particularly the extent to which participants rely on the DSS, and the performance they achieve. In our experiments, participants play a simple online game inspired by so-called "wildcat" (i.e., exploratory) drilling for oil. The landscape has two layers: a visible layer describing the costs (terrain), and a hidden layer describing the reward (oil yield). Participants in the control group play the game without receiving any assistance, while in treatment groups they are assisted by a DSS suggesting places to drill. For certain treatments, the DSS does not consider costs, but only rewards, which introduces a bias that is observable by users. Between subjects, we vary the accuracy and bias of the DSS, and observe the participants' total score, time to completion, the extent to which they follow or ignore suggestions. We also measure the acceptability of the DSS in an exit survey. Our results show that participants tend to score better with the DSS, that the score increase is due to users following the DSS advice, and related to the difficulty of the game and the accuracy of the DSS. We observe that this setting elicits mostly rational behavior from participants, who place a moderate amount of trust in the DSS and show neither algorithmic aversion (under-reliance) nor automation bias (over-reliance).However, their stated willingness to accept the DSS in the exit survey seems less sensitive to the accuracy of the DSS than their behavior, suggesting that users are only partially aware of the (lack of) accuracy of the DSS.
abstract_zh: 人工智能 (AI) 越来越多地用于跨多个领域构建决策支持系统 (DSS)。本文描述了一系列实验，旨在观察人类对 DSS 不同特征（例如准确性和偏差）的反应，特别是参与者对 DSS 的依赖程度以及他们取得的表现。在我们的实验中，参与者玩一个简单的在线游戏，其灵感来自所谓的“野猫”（即探索性）石油钻探。景观有两层：描述成本（地形）的可见层和描述奖励（石油产量）的隐藏层。对照组的参与者在没有任何帮助的情况下玩游戏，而在治疗组中，他们得到了 DSS 的帮助，建议了练习的地点。对于某些治疗，DSS 不考虑成本，而只考虑奖励，这会引入用户可以观察到的偏差。在受试者之间，我们改变 DSS 的准确性和偏差，并观察参与者的总分、完成时间、他们遵循或忽略建议的程度。我们还在退出调查中衡量 DSS 的可接受性。我们的结果表明，参与者倾向于通过 DSS 获得更好的分数，分数的增加是由于用户遵循了 DSS 的建议，并且与游戏的难度和 DSS 的准确性有关。我们观察到，这种设置引起了参与者的大部分理性行为，他们对 DSS 给予适度的信任，既没有表现出算法厌恶（依赖不足），也没有表现出自动化偏见（过度依赖）。然而，他们在退出调查中表示愿意接受 DSS 的意愿似乎对 DSS 的准确性不如他们的行为那么敏感，这表明用户仅部分意识到 DSS（缺乏）准确性。

AI.tldr: 该论文通过实验研究人类对基于人工智能的决策支持系统（DSS）的反应，特别是系统准确性和偏见对用户依赖程度及表现的影响。
AI.motivation: 随着AI在决策支持系统中的广泛应用，理解用户如何信任和依赖这些系统至关重要，尤其是系统存在偏差或准确性不同时的行为差异。
AI.method: 设计了一个类似石油勘探的在线游戏实验，通过控制组（无DSS辅助）和实验组（使用不同准确性和偏见的DSS辅助）对比用户表现，测量得分、完成时间、遵循建议程度及对DSS的接受度。
AI.result: 实验发现用户使用DSS时得分更高，且成绩提升与遵循建议程度、游戏难度及DSS准确性相关；用户对DSS的信任度适中，未出现过度依赖或排斥现象，但其对DSS准确性的接受度主观评价与实际行为不完全一致。
AI.conclusion: 用户在实验中表现出理性行为，对DSS的信任度适中，但可能未充分意识到系统准确性的差异，提示需进一步研究用户对AI决策透明度的认知与信任机制。

ai_content_json.method: 设计了一个类似石油勘探的在线游戏实验，通过控制组（无DSS辅助）和实验组（使用不同准确性和偏见的DSS辅助）对比用户表现，测量得分、完成时间、遵循建议程度及对DSS的接受度。
ai_content_json.result: 实验发现用户使用DSS时得分更高，且成绩提升与遵循建议程度、游戏难度及DSS准确性相关；用户对DSS的信任度适中，未出现过度依赖或排斥现象，但其对DSS准确性的接受度主观评价与实际行为不完全一致。
ai_content_json.conclusion: 用户在实验中表现出理性行为，对DSS的信任度适中，但可能未充分意识到系统准确性的差异，提示需进一步研究用户对AI决策透明度的认知与信任机制。

search_text: Human Response to an AI-Based Decision Support System: A User Study on the Effects of Accuracy and Bias 人类对基于人工智能的决策支持系统的反应：关于准确性和偏差影响的用户研究 Artificial Intelligence (AI) is increasingly used to build Decision Support Systems (DSS) across many domains. This paper describes a series of experiments designed to observe human response to different characteristics of a DSS such as accuracy and bias, particularly the extent to which participants rely on the DSS, and the performance they achieve. In our experiments, participants play a simple online game inspired by so-called "wildcat" (i.e., exploratory) drilling for oil. The landscape has two layers: a visible layer describing the costs (terrain), and a hidden layer describing the reward (oil yield). Participants in the control group play the game without receiving any assistance, while in treatment groups they are assisted by a DSS suggesting places to drill. For certain treatments, the DSS does not consider costs, but only rewards, which introduces a bias that is observable by users. Between subjects, we vary the accuracy and bias of the DSS, and observe the participants' total score, time to completion, the extent to which they follow or ignore suggestions. We also measure the acceptability of the DSS in an exit survey. Our results show that participants tend to score better with the DSS, that the score increase is due to users following the DSS advice, and related to the difficulty of the game and the accuracy of the DSS. We observe that this setting elicits mostly rational behavior from participants, who place a moderate amount of trust in the DSS and show neither algorithmic aversion (under-reliance) nor automation bias (over-reliance).However, their stated willingness to accept the DSS in the exit survey seems less sensitive to the accuracy of the DSS than their behavior, suggesting that users are only partially aware of the (lack of) accuracy of the DSS. 人工智能 (AI) 越来越多地用于跨多个领域构建决策支持系统 (DSS)。本文描述了一系列实验，旨在观察人类对 DSS 不同特征（例如准确性和偏差）的反应，特别是参与者对 DSS 的依赖程度以及他们取得的表现。在我们的实验中，参与者玩一个简单的在线游戏，其灵感来自所谓的“野猫”（即探索性）石油钻探。景观有两层：描述成本（地形）的可见层和描述奖励（石油产量）的隐藏层。对照组的参与者在没有任何帮助的情况下玩游戏，而在治疗组中，他们得到了 DSS 的帮助，建议了练习的地点。对于某些治疗，DSS 不考虑成本，而只考虑奖励，这会引入用户可以观察到的偏差。在受试者之间，我们改变 DSS 的准确性和偏差，并观察参与者的总分、完成时间、他们遵循或忽略建议的程度。我们还在退出调查中衡量 DSS 的可接受性。我们的结果表明，参与者倾向于通过 DSS 获得更好的分数，分数的增加是由于用户遵循了 DSS 的建议，并且与游戏的难度和 DSS 的准确性有关。我们观察到，这种设置引起了参与者的大部分理性行为，他们对 DSS 给予适度的信任，既没有表现出算法厌恶（依赖不足），也没有表现出自动化偏见（过度依赖）。然而，他们在退出调查中表示愿意接受 DSS 的意愿似乎对 DSS 的准确性不如他们的行为那么敏感，这表明用户仅部分意识到 DSS（缺乏）准确性。 该论文通过实验研究人类对基于人工智能的决策支持系统（DSS）的反应，特别是系统准确性和偏见对用户依赖程度及表现的影响。 David Solans,Andrea Beretta,Manuel Portela,Carlos Castillo,Anna Monreale cs.AI,cs.HC,cs.LG

authors_text: Klest Dedja,Felipe Kenji Nakano,Konstantinos Pliakos,Celine Vens
title: BELLATREX: Building Explanations through a LocaLly AccuraTe Rule EXtractor
title_zh: BELLATREX：通过本地准确的规则提取器构建解释
abstract: Tree-ensemble algorithms, such as random forest, are effective machine learning methods popular for their flexibility, high performance, and robustness to overfitting. However, since multiple learners are combined, they are not as interpretable as a single decision tree. In this work we propose a novel method that is Building Explanations through a LocalLy AccuraTe Rule EXtractor (Bellatrex), and is able to explain the forest prediction for a given test instance with only a few diverse rules. Starting from the decision trees generated by a random forest, our method 1) pre-selects a subset of the rules used to make the prediction, 2) creates a vector representation of such rules, 3) projects them to a low-dimensional space, 4) clusters such representations to pick a rule from each cluster to explain the instance prediction. We test the effectiveness of Bellatrex on 89 real-world datasets and we demonstrate the validity of our method for binary classification, regression, multi-label classification and time-to-event tasks. To the best of our knowledge, it is the first time that an interpretability toolbox can handle all these tasks within the same framework. We also show that our extracted surrogate model can approximate the performance of the corresponding ensemble model in all considered tasks, while selecting only few trees from the whole forest. We also show that our proposed approach substantially outperforms other explainable methods in terms of predictive performance.
summary: Tree-ensemble algorithms, such as random forest, are effective machine learning methods popular for their flexibility, high performance, and robustness to overfitting. However, since multiple learners are combined, they are not as interpretable as a single decision tree. In this work we propose a novel method that is Building Explanations through a LocalLy AccuraTe Rule EXtractor (Bellatrex), and is able to explain the forest prediction for a given test instance with only a few diverse rules. Starting from the decision trees generated by a random forest, our method 1) pre-selects a subset of the rules used to make the prediction, 2) creates a vector representation of such rules, 3) projects them to a low-dimensional space, 4) clusters such representations to pick a rule from each cluster to explain the instance prediction. We test the effectiveness of Bellatrex on 89 real-world datasets and we demonstrate the validity of our method for binary classification, regression, multi-label classification and time-to-event tasks. To the best of our knowledge, it is the first time that an interpretability toolbox can handle all these tasks within the same framework. We also show that our extracted surrogate model can approximate the performance of the corresponding ensemble model in all considered tasks, while selecting only few trees from the whole forest. We also show that our proposed approach substantially outperforms other explainable methods in terms of predictive performance.
abstract_zh: 树集成算法（例如随机森林）是有效的机器学习方法，因其灵活性、高性能和对过度拟合的鲁棒性而广受欢迎。然而，由于多个学习器被组合在一起，它们不像单个决策树那样可解释。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的方法，即通过本地准确的规则提取器（Bellatrex）构建解释，并且能够仅使用少量不同的规则来解释给定测试实例的森林预测。从随机森林生成的决策树开始，我们的方法 1) 预先选择用于进行预测的规则子集，2) 创建此类规则的向量表示，3) 将它们投影到低维空间，4) 对此类表示进行聚类，以从每个聚类中挑选一个规则来解释实例预测。我们在 89 个真实数据集上测试了 Bellatrex 的有效性，并证明了我们的方法对于二元分类、回归、多标签分类和事件时间任务的有效性。据我们所知，这是第一次可解释性工具箱可以在同一框架内处理所有这些任务。我们还表明，我们提取的代理模型可以在所有考虑的任务中近似相应集成模型的性能，同时仅从整个森林中选择少数树。我们还表明，我们提出的方法在预测性能方面远远优于其他可解释的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Bellatrex方法，通过从随机森林中提取少量规则解释预测结果，提升树集成模型的可解释性。
AI.motivation: 树集成算法（如随机森林）虽性能优越，但因组合多个学习器而缺乏可解释性，现有方法难以统一处理多种任务。
AI.method: 从随机森林生成的决策树中预选规则，向量化后降维聚类，从每个簇中选取规则解释预测，构建代理模型。
AI.result: 在89个真实数据集上验证，Bellatrex在二分类、回归、多标签分类和生存分析任务中均有效，代理模型性能接近原模型且优于其他可解释方法。
AI.conclusion: Bellatrex是首个统一处理多种任务的可解释框架，通过少量规则近似原模型性能，显著提升树集成模型的解释能力。

authors_text: Diptendu Chatterjee,Rishiraj Bhattacharyya
title: Firefighter Problem with Minimum Budget: Hardness and Approximation Algorithm for Unit Disk Graphs
title_zh: 消防员最小预算问题：单位圆盘图的硬度和近似算法
abstract: Unit disk graphs are the set of graphs which represent the intersection of disk graphs and interval graphs. These graphs are of great importance due to their structural similarity with wireless communication networks. Firefighter problem on unit disk graph is interesting as it models the virus spreading in an wireless network and asks for a solution to stop it. In this paper, we consider the MIN-BUDGET firefighter problem where the goal is to determine the minimum number of firefighters required and the nodes to place them at each time instant to save a given set of vertices of a given graph and a fire breakout node. We show that, the MIN-BUDGET firefighter problem in a unit disk graph is NP-Hard. We also present a constant factor approximation algorithm.
summary: Unit disk graphs are the set of graphs which represent the intersection of disk graphs and interval graphs. These graphs are of great importance due to their structural similarity with wireless communication networks. Firefighter problem on unit disk graph is interesting as it models the virus spreading in an wireless network and asks for a solution to stop it. In this paper, we consider the MIN-BUDGET firefighter problem where the goal is to determine the minimum number of firefighters required and the nodes to place them at each time instant to save a given set of vertices of a given graph and a fire breakout node. We show that, the MIN-BUDGET firefighter problem in a unit disk graph is NP-Hard. We also present a constant factor approximation algorithm.
abstract_zh: 单位圆盘图是表示圆盘图和区间图的交集的一组图。这些图由于其与无线通信网络的结构相似而非常重要。单位磁盘图上的消防员问题很有趣，因为它模拟了无线网络中传播的病毒，并要求找到阻止它的解决方案。在本文中，我们考虑最小预算消防员问题，其目标是确定所需的最小消防员数量以及在每个时刻放置消防员的节点，以保存给定图的给定顶点集和火灾爆发节点。我们证明，单位圆盘图中的 MIN-BUDGET 消防员问题是 NP-Hard 问题。我们还提出了一种常数因子近似算法。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在单位圆盘图上解决最小预算消防员问题的复杂性及近似算法。
AI.motivation: 单位圆盘图与无线通信网络结构相似，消防员问题可模拟病毒传播，需确定最少消防员数量及部署位置以阻止病毒扩散。
AI.method: 通过证明问题的NP难性，并设计常数因子近似算法来解决该问题。
AI.result: 证明最小预算消防员问题在单位圆盘图上是NP难的，并提出了一个常数因子近似算法。
AI.conclusion: 该问题在单位圆盘图上具有计算复杂性，但近似算法为实际应用提供了可行的解决方案。

We also present a constant factor approximation algorithm. 单位圆盘图是表示圆盘图和区间图的交集的一组图。这些图由于其与无线通信网络的结构相似而非常重要。单位磁盘图上的消防员问题很有趣，因为它模拟了无线网络中传播的病毒，并要求找到阻止它的解决方案。在本文中，我们考虑最小预算消防员问题，其目标是确定所需的最小消防员数量以及在每个时刻放置消防员的节点，以保存给定图的给定顶点集和火灾爆发节点。我们证明，单位圆盘图中的 MIN-BUDGET 消防员问题是 NP-Hard 问题。我们还提出了一种常数因子近似算法。 本文研究了在单位圆盘图上解决最小预算消防员问题的复杂性及近似算法。 Diptendu Chatterjee,Rishiraj Bhattacharyya cs.DS,cs.CC,cs.DM

authors_text: Zhiwei Liu,Yongjun Chen,Jia Li,Man Luo,Philip S. Yu,Caiming Xiong
title: Improving Contrastive Learning with Model Augmentation
title_zh: 通过模型增强改进对比学习
abstract: The sequential recommendation aims at predicting the next items in user behaviors, which can be solved by characterizing item relationships in sequences. Due to the data sparsity and noise issues in sequences, a new self-supervised learning (SSL) paradigm is proposed to improve the performance, which employs contrastive learning between positive and negative views of sequences. However, existing methods all construct views by adopting augmentation from data perspectives, while we argue that 1) optimal data augmentation methods are hard to devise, 2) data augmentation methods destroy sequential correlations, and 3) data augmentation fails to incorporate comprehensive self-supervised signals. Therefore, we investigate the possibility of model augmentation to construct view pairs. We propose three levels of model augmentation methods: neuron masking, layer dropping, and encoder complementing. This work opens up a novel direction in constructing views for contrastive SSL. Experiments verify the efficacy of model augmentation for the SSL in the sequential recommendation. Code is available\footnote{\url{https://github.com/salesforce/SRMA}}.
summary: The sequential recommendation aims at predicting the next items in user behaviors, which can be solved by characterizing item relationships in sequences. Due to the data sparsity and noise issues in sequences, a new self-supervised learning (SSL) paradigm is proposed to improve the performance, which employs contrastive learning between positive and negative views of sequences. However, existing methods all construct views by adopting augmentation from data perspectives, while we argue that 1) optimal data augmentation methods are hard to devise, 2) data augmentation methods destroy sequential correlations, and 3) data augmentation fails to incorporate comprehensive self-supervised signals. Therefore, we investigate the possibility of model augmentation to construct view pairs. We propose three levels of model augmentation methods: neuron masking, layer dropping, and encoder complementing. This work opens up a novel direction in constructing views for contrastive SSL. Experiments verify the efficacy of model augmentation for the SSL in the sequential recommendation. Code is available\footnote{\url{https://github.com/salesforce/SRMA}}.
abstract_zh: 顺序推荐旨在预测用户行为中的下一个项目，这可以通过表征序列中的项目关系来解决。由于序列中的数据稀疏性和噪声问题，提出了一种新的自监督学习（SSL）范式来提高性能，该范式采用序列的正面和负面视图之间的对比学习。然而，现有的方法都是通过从数据角度采用增强来构建视图，而我们认为：1）最佳的数据增强方法很难设计，2）数据增强方法破坏了顺序相关性，3）数据增强未能纳入全面的自监督信号。因此，我们研究了模型增强来构造视图对的可能性。我们提出了三个级别的模型增强方法：神经元掩蔽、层丢弃和编码器补充。这项工作为构建对比 SSL 视图开辟了一个新的方向。实验验证了 SSL 模型增强在顺序推荐中的有效性。代码可用\footnote{\url{https://github.com/salesforce/SRMA}}。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过模型增强改进对比学习，解决序列推荐中数据增强方法的局限性问题。
AI.motivation: 现有数据增强方法存在难以设计最优策略、破坏序列相关性及无法综合自监督信号等缺陷。
AI.method: 提出三种模型增强技术：神经元掩码、层丢弃和编码器补充，从模型结构层面构建对比学习的视图对。
AI.result: 实验验证了模型增强方法在序列推荐任务中的有效性，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 模型增强为对比自监督学习提供了新视角，开辟了构建视图对的创新方向。

authors_text: Arezoo Rajabi,Bhaskar Ramasubramanian,Radha Poovendran
title: Trojan Horse Training for Breaking Defenses against Backdoor Attacks in Deep Learning
title_zh: 用于突破深度学习中后门攻击防御的特洛伊木马训练
abstract: Machine learning (ML) models that use deep neural networks are vulnerable to backdoor attacks. Such attacks involve the insertion of a (hidden) trigger by an adversary. As a consequence, any input that contains the trigger will cause the neural network to misclassify the input to a (single) target class, while classifying other inputs without a trigger correctly. ML models that contain a backdoor are called Trojan models. Backdoors can have severe consequences in safety-critical cyber and cyber physical systems when only the outputs of the model are available. Defense mechanisms have been developed and illustrated to be able to distinguish between outputs from a Trojan model and a non-Trojan model in the case of a single-target backdoor attack with accuracy > 96 percent. Understanding the limitations of a defense mechanism requires the construction of examples where the mechanism fails. Current single-target backdoor attacks require one trigger per target class. We introduce a new, more general attack that will enable a single trigger to result in misclassification to more than one target class. Such a misclassification will depend on the true (actual) class that the input belongs to. We term this category of attacks multi-target backdoor attacks. We demonstrate that a Trojan model with either a single-target or multi-target trigger can be trained so that the accuracy of a defense mechanism that seeks to distinguish between outputs coming from a Trojan and a non-Trojan model will be reduced. Our approach uses the non-Trojan model as a teacher for the Trojan model and solves a min-max optimization problem between the Trojan model and defense mechanism. Empirical evaluations demonstrate that our training procedure reduces the accuracy of a state-of-the-art defense mechanism from >96 to 0 percent.
summary: Machine learning (ML) models that use deep neural networks are vulnerable to backdoor attacks. Such attacks involve the insertion of a (hidden) trigger by an adversary. As a consequence, any input that contains the trigger will cause the neural network to misclassify the input to a (single) target class, while classifying other inputs without a trigger correctly. ML models that contain a backdoor are called Trojan models. Backdoors can have severe consequences in safety-critical cyber and cyber physical systems when only the outputs of the model are available. Defense mechanisms have been developed and illustrated to be able to distinguish between outputs from a Trojan model and a non-Trojan model in the case of a single-target backdoor attack with accuracy > 96 percent. Understanding the limitations of a defense mechanism requires the construction of examples where the mechanism fails. Current single-target backdoor attacks require one trigger per target class. We introduce a new, more general attack that will enable a single trigger to result in misclassification to more than one target class. Such a misclassification will depend on the true (actual) class that the input belongs to. We term this category of attacks multi-target backdoor attacks. We demonstrate that a Trojan model with either a single-target or multi-target trigger can be trained so that the accuracy of a defense mechanism that seeks to distinguish between outputs coming from a Trojan and a non-Trojan model will be reduced. Our approach uses the non-Trojan model as a teacher for the Trojan model and solves a min-max optimization problem between the Trojan model and defense mechanism. Empirical evaluations demonstrate that our training procedure reduces the accuracy of a state-of-the-art defense mechanism from >96 to 0 percent.
abstract_zh: 使用深度神经网络的机器学习 (ML) 模型容易受到后门攻击。此类攻击涉及对手插入（隐藏的）触发器。因此，任何包含触发器的输入都会导致神经网络将输入错误分类为（单个）目标类，同时对没有触发器的其他输入进行正确分类。包含后门的机器学习模型称为特洛伊木马模型。当只有模型的输出可用时，后门可能会在安全关键的网络和网络物理系统中产生严重后果。防御机制已得到开发和说明，能够在单目标后门攻击的情况下区分特洛伊木马模型和非特洛伊木马模型的输出，准确率 > 96%。了解防御机制的局限性需要构建该机制失败的示例。当前的单目标后门攻击需要每个目标类别一个触发器。我们引入了一种新的、更通用的攻击，该攻击将使单个触发器能够导致错误分类到多个目标类别。这种错误分类将取决于输入所属的真实（实际）类别。我们将此类攻击称为多目标后门攻击。我们证明，可以训练具有单目标或多目标触发器的特洛伊木马模型，从而降低旨在区分来自特洛伊木马和非特洛伊木马模型的输出的防御机制的准确性。我们的方法使用非特洛伊模型作为特洛伊模型的老师，并解决特洛伊模型和防御机制之间的最小-最大优化问题。实证评估表明，我们的训练程序将最先进的防御机制的准确性从 >96% 降低到 0%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新型多目标后门攻击方法，通过单个触发器使模型对不同真实类别的输入产生多个目标类别的错误分类，从而突破现有防御机制。
AI.motivation: 现有防御机制对单目标后门攻击准确率超过96%，但缺乏对多目标攻击的防御能力，需构建能突破防御的攻击示例以揭示防御局限性。
AI.method: 利用非后门模型作为教师模型，通过Trojan模型与防御机制之间的最小-最大优化问题进行训练，实现单触发器多目标误分类。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法将最先进的防御机制准确率从96%以上降至0%，成功突破现有防御体系。
AI.conclusion: 多目标后门攻击能有效对抗现有防御机制，揭示了当前防御体系的脆弱性，为构建更鲁棒的防御方法提供了新方向。

authors_text: Xiangri Lu,Hongbin Ma,Zhanqing Wang
title: Analysis of OODA Loop based on Adversarial for Complex Game Environments
title_zh: 复杂游戏环境下基于对抗的OODA循环分析
abstract: To address the problem of imperfect confrontation strategy caused by the lack of information of game environment in the simulation of non-complete information dynamic countermeasure modeling for intelligent game, the hierarchical analysis game strategy of confrontation model based on OODA ring (Observation, Orientation, Decision, Action) theory is proposed. At the same time, taking into account the trend of unmanned future warfare, NetLogo software simulation is used to construct a dynamic derivation of the confrontation between two tanks. In the validation process, the OODA loop theory is used to describe the operation process of the complex system between red and blue sides, and the four-step cycle of observation, judgment, decision and execution is carried out according to the number of armor of both sides, and then the OODA loop system adjusts the judgment and decision time coefficients for the next confrontation cycle according to the results of the first cycle. Compared with traditional simulation methods that consider objective factors such as loss rate and support rate, the OODA-loop-based hierarchical game analysis can analyze the confrontation situation more comprehensively.
summary: To address the problem of imperfect confrontation strategy caused by the lack of information of game environment in the simulation of non-complete information dynamic countermeasure modeling for intelligent game, the hierarchical analysis game strategy of confrontation model based on OODA ring (Observation, Orientation, Decision, Action) theory is proposed. At the same time, taking into account the trend of unmanned future warfare, NetLogo software simulation is used to construct a dynamic derivation of the confrontation between two tanks. In the validation process, the OODA loop theory is used to describe the operation process of the complex system between red and blue sides, and the four-step cycle of observation, judgment, decision and execution is carried out according to the number of armor of both sides, and then the OODA loop system adjusts the judgment and decision time coefficients for the next confrontation cycle according to the results of the first cycle. Compared with traditional simulation methods that consider objective factors such as loss rate and support rate, the OODA-loop-based hierarchical game analysis can analyze the confrontation situation more comprehensively.
abstract_zh: 针对智能博弈非完全信息动态对抗建模模拟中因博弈环境信息缺乏而导致对抗策略不完善的问题，提出基于OODA环（观察、定向、决策、行动）理论的分层分析对抗模型博弈策略。同时，考虑到未来战争无人化的趋势，采用NetLogo软件模拟构建了两辆坦克对抗的动态推导。在验证过程中，采用OODA循环理论描述红蓝双方复杂系统的运行过程，根据双方的装甲数量进行观察、判断、决策和执行四步循环，然后OODA循环系统根据第一个循环的结果调整下一个对抗周期的判断和决策时间系数。与考虑损失率、支持率等客观因素的传统模拟方法相比，基于OODA循环的层次博弈分析能够更全面地分析对抗态势。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于OODA环理论的分层博弈策略，解决非完全信息动态对抗建模中因环境信息不足导致的策略缺陷问题，并通过NetLogo模拟验证其有效性。
AI.motivation: 传统对抗模拟方法在考虑损失率、支援率等客观因素时，难以全面分析非完全信息环境下复杂系统的动态对抗过程。
AI.method: 结合OODA环理论构建分层博弈模型，利用NetLogo模拟红蓝双方坦克对抗，通过动态调整观察、判断、决策、行动四阶段的时间系数实现循环优化。
AI.result: 相比传统方法，该模型能更全面分析对抗态势，在模拟验证中展现出对复杂系统动态过程的有效描述能力。
AI.conclusion: 基于OODA环的分层博弈分析框架可有效提升非完全信息动态对抗建模的完整性，为未来无人作战系统提供理论支持。

search_text: Analysis of OODA Loop based on Adversarial for Complex Game Environments 复杂游戏环境下基于对抗的OODA循环分析 To address the problem of imperfect confrontation strategy caused by the lack of information of game environment in the simulation of non-complete information dynamic countermeasure modeling for intelligent game, the hierarchical analysis game strategy of confrontation model based on OODA ring (Observation, Orientation, Decision, Action) theory is proposed. At the same time, taking into account the trend of unmanned future warfare, NetLogo software simulation is used to construct a dynamic derivation of the confrontation between two tanks. In the validation process, the OODA loop theory is used to describe the operation process of the complex system between red and blue sides, and the four-step cycle of observation, judgment, decision and execution is carried out according to the number of armor of both sides, and then the OODA loop system adjusts the judgment and decision time coefficients for the next confrontation cycle according to the results of the first cycle. Compared with traditional simulation methods that consider objective factors such as loss rate and support rate, the OODA-loop-based hierarchical game analysis can analyze the confrontation situation more comprehensively. 针对智能博弈非完全信息动态对抗建模模拟中因博弈环境信息缺乏而导致对抗策略不完善的问题，提出基于OODA环（观察、定向、决策、行动）理论的分层分析对抗模型博弈策略。同时，考虑到未来战争无人化的趋势，采用NetLogo软件模拟构建了两辆坦克对抗的动态推导。在验证过程中，采用OODA循环理论描述红蓝双方复杂系统的运行过程，根据双方的装甲数量进行观察、判断、决策和执行四步循环，然后OODA循环系统根据第一个循环的结果调整下一个对抗周期的判断和决策时间系数。与考虑损失率、支持率等客观因素的传统模拟方法相比，基于OODA循环的层次博弈分析能够更全面地分析对抗态势。 本文提出基于OODA环理论的分层博弈策略，解决非完全信息动态对抗建模中因环境信息不足导致的策略缺陷问题，并通过NetLogo模拟验证其有效性。 Xiangri Lu,Hongbin Ma,Zhanqing Wang cs.AI,cs.CV

authors_text: Madushi H. Pathmaperuma,Yogachandran Rahulamathavan,Safak Dogan,Ahmet M. Kondoz,Rongxing Lu
title: Deep Learning for Encrypted Traffic Classification and Unknown Data Detection
title_zh: 加密流量分类和未知数据检测的深度学习
abstract: Despite the widespread use of encryption techniques to provide confidentiality over Internet communications, mobile device users are still susceptible to privacy and security risks. In this paper, a new Deep Neural Network (DNN) based user activity detection framework is proposed to identify fine grained user activities performed on mobile applications (known as in-app activities) from a sniffed encrypted Internet traffic stream. One of the challenges is that there are countless applications, and it is practically impossible to collect and train a DNN model using all possible data from them. Therefore, in this work we exploit the probability distribution of DNN output layer to filter the data from applications that are not considered during the model training (i.e., unknown data). The proposed framework uses a time window based approach to divide the traffic flow of an activity into segments, so that in-app activities can be identified just by observing only a fraction of the activity related traffic. Our tests have shown that the DNN based framework has demonstrated an accuracy of 90% or above in identifying previously trained in-app activities and an average accuracy of 79% in identifying previously untrained in-app activity traffic as unknown data when this framework is employed.
summary: Despite the widespread use of encryption techniques to provide confidentiality over Internet communications, mobile device users are still susceptible to privacy and security risks. In this paper, a new Deep Neural Network (DNN) based user activity detection framework is proposed to identify fine grained user activities performed on mobile applications (known as in-app activities) from a sniffed encrypted Internet traffic stream. One of the challenges is that there are countless applications, and it is practically impossible to collect and train a DNN model using all possible data from them. Therefore, in this work we exploit the probability distribution of DNN output layer to filter the data from applications that are not considered during the model training (i.e., unknown data). The proposed framework uses a time window based approach to divide the traffic flow of an activity into segments, so that in-app activities can be identified just by observing only a fraction of the activity related traffic. Our tests have shown that the DNN based framework has demonstrated an accuracy of 90% or above in identifying previously trained in-app activities and an average accuracy of 79% in identifying previously untrained in-app activity traffic as unknown data when this framework is employed.
abstract_zh: 尽管广泛使用加密技术来提供互联网通信的机密性，但移动设备用户仍然容易受到隐私和安全风险的影响。在本文中，提出了一种新的基于深度神经网络（DNN）的用户活动检测框架，用于从嗅探的加密互联网流量中识别在移动应用程序上执行的细粒度用户活动（称为应用程序内活动）。挑战之一是应用程序无数，几乎不可能使用其中所有可能的数据来收集和训练 DNN 模型。因此，在这项工作中，我们利用 DNN 输出层的概率分布来过滤模型训练期间未考虑的应用程序的数据（即未知数据）。所提出的框架使用基于时间窗口的方法将活动的流量划分为多个片段，以便仅通过观察活动相关流量的一小部分即可识别应用内活动。我们的测试表明，使用该框架时，基于 DNN 的框架在识别之前经过训练的应用内活动方面表现出 90% 或以上的准确度，并且在将之前未经训练的应用内活动流量识别为未知数据方面的平均准确度达到 79%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度神经网络（DNN）的框架，用于从加密的互联网流量中识别移动应用内的用户活动，并检测未知数据。
AI.motivation: 尽管加密技术被广泛使用，但移动设备用户仍面临隐私和安全风险。由于应用数量庞大，无法收集所有可能数据进行训练，因此需要一种有效识别已知活动并检测未知数据的方法。
AI.method: 利用DNN输出层的概率分布过滤未知数据，并采用基于时间窗口的流量分段方法，仅通过部分活动相关流量即可识别应用内活动。
AI.result: 实验表明，该框架在识别已训练的活动时准确率达90%以上，在检测未训练活动的未知数据时平均准确率为79%。
AI.conclusion: 该框架有效解决了加密流量分类和未知数据检测问题，为隐私保护和安全威胁识别提供了可行方案。
