authors_text: Inderjeet Singh,Toshinori Araki,Kazuya Kakizaki
title: Powerful Physical Adversarial Examples Against Practical Face Recognition Systems
title_zh: 针对实际人脸识别系统的强大物理对抗示例
abstract: It is well-known that the most existing machine learning (ML)-based safety-critical applications are vulnerable to carefully crafted input instances called adversarial examples (AXs). An adversary can conveniently attack these target systems from digital as well as physical worlds. This paper aims to the generation of robust physical AXs against face recognition systems. We present a novel smoothness loss function and a patch-noise combo attack for realizing powerful physical AXs. The smoothness loss interjects the concept of delayed constraints during the attack generation process, thereby causing better handling of optimization complexity and smoother AXs for the physical domain. The patch-noise combo attack combines patch noise and imperceptibly small noises from different distributions to generate powerful registration-based physical AXs. An extensive experimental analysis found that our smoothness loss results in robust and more transferable digital and physical AXs than the conventional techniques. Notably, our smoothness loss results in a 1.17 and 1.97 times better mean attack success rate (ASR) in physical white-box and black-box attacks, respectively. Our patch-noise combo attack furthers the performance gains and results in 2.39 and 4.74 times higher mean ASR than conventional technique in physical world white-box and black-box attacks, respectively.
summary: It is well-known that the most existing machine learning (ML)-based safety-critical applications are vulnerable to carefully crafted input instances called adversarial examples (AXs). An adversary can conveniently attack these target systems from digital as well as physical worlds. This paper aims to the generation of robust physical AXs against face recognition systems. We present a novel smoothness loss function and a patch-noise combo attack for realizing powerful physical AXs. The smoothness loss interjects the concept of delayed constraints during the attack generation process, thereby causing better handling of optimization complexity and smoother AXs for the physical domain. The patch-noise combo attack combines patch noise and imperceptibly small noises from different distributions to generate powerful registration-based physical AXs. An extensive experimental analysis found that our smoothness loss results in robust and more transferable digital and physical AXs than the conventional techniques. Notably, our smoothness loss results in a 1.17 and 1.97 times better mean attack success rate (ASR) in physical white-box and black-box attacks, respectively. Our patch-noise combo attack furthers the performance gains and results in 2.39 and 4.74 times higher mean ASR than conventional technique in physical world white-box and black-box attacks, respectively.
abstract_zh: 众所周知，大多数现有的基于机器学习 (ML) 的安全关键应用程序很容易受到精心设计的称为对抗性示例 (AX) 的输入实例的影响。对手可以方便地从数字世界和物理世界攻击这些目标系统。本文旨在针对人脸识别系统生成鲁棒的物理 AX。我们提出了一种新颖的平滑度损失函数和补丁噪声组合攻击，以实现强大的物理 AX。平滑度损失在攻击生成过程中插入了延迟约束的概念，从而更好地处理优化复杂性和物理域的更平滑的 AX。补丁噪声组合攻击将补丁噪声和来自不同分布的难以察觉的小噪声结合起来，生成强大的基于注册的物理 AX。广泛的实验分析发现，与传统技术相比，我们的平滑度损失导致数字和物理 AX 更加强大且可转移。值得注意的是，我们的平滑度损失导致物理白盒和黑盒攻击的平均攻击成功率 (ASR) 分别提高了 1.17 倍和 1.97 倍。我们的补丁噪声组合攻击进一步提高了性能，在物理世界白盒和黑盒攻击中，平均 ASR 分别比传统技术高 2.39 倍和 4.74 倍。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在生成针对实际人脸识别系统的强大物理对抗样本（AXs）。
AI.motivation: 现有基于机器学习的安全关键应用易受对抗样本攻击，需在物理世界中生成更鲁棒的对抗样本以提升攻击效果。
AI.method: 提出平滑损失函数与补丁-噪声组合攻击，通过延迟约束优化生成更平滑的物理对抗样本，并结合不同分布的噪声增强攻击性能。
AI.result: 平滑损失使物理白盒/黑盒攻击成功率提升1.17倍和1.97倍，补丁-噪声组合攻击进一步提升至2.39倍和4.74倍。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法生成的对抗样本更具鲁棒性与可迁移性，对实际人脸识别系统构成显著威胁。

search_text: Powerful Physical Adversarial Examples Against Practical Face Recognition Systems 针对实际人脸识别系统的强大物理对抗示例 It is well-known that the most existing machine learning (ML)-based safety-critical applications are vulnerable to carefully crafted input instances called adversarial examples (AXs). An adversary can conveniently attack these target systems from digital as well as physical worlds. This paper aims to the generation of robust physical AXs against face recognition systems. We present a novel smoothness loss function and a patch-noise combo attack for realizing powerful physical AXs. The smoothness loss interjects the concept of delayed constraints during the attack generation process, thereby causing better handling of optimization complexity and smoother AXs for the physical domain. The patch-noise combo attack combines patch noise and imperceptibly small noises from different distributions to generate powerful registration-based physical AXs. An extensive experimental analysis found that our smoothness loss results in robust and more transferable digital and physical AXs than the conventional techniques. Notably, our smoothness loss results in a 1.17 and 1.97 times better mean attack success rate (ASR) in physical white-box and black-box attacks, respectively. Our patch-noise combo attack furthers the performance gains and results in 2.39 and 4.74 times higher mean ASR than conventional technique in physical world white-box and black-box attacks, respectively. 众所周知，大多数现有的基于机器学习 (ML) 的安全关键应用程序很容易受到精心设计的称为对抗性示例 (AX) 的输入实例的影响。对手可以方便地从数字世界和物理世界攻击这些目标系统。本文旨在针对人脸识别系统生成鲁棒的物理 AX。我们提出了一种新颖的平滑度损失函数和补丁噪声组合攻击，以实现强大的物理 AX。平滑度损失在攻击生成过程中插入了延迟约束的概念，从而更好地处理优化复杂性和物理域的更平滑的 AX。补丁噪声组合攻击将补丁噪声和来自不同分布的难以察觉的小噪声结合起来，生成强大的基于注册的物理 AX。广泛的实验分析发现，与传统技术相比，我们的平滑度损失导致数字和物理 AX 更加强大且可转移。值得注意的是，我们的平滑度损失导致物理白盒和黑盒攻击的平均攻击成功率 (ASR) 分别提高了 1.17 倍和 1.97 倍。我们的补丁噪声组合攻击进一步提高了性能，在物理世界白盒和黑盒攻击中，平均 ASR 分别比传统技术高 2.39 倍和 4.74 倍。 本文旨在生成针对实际人脸识别系统的强大物理对抗样本（AXs）。 Inderjeet Singh,Toshinori Araki,Kazuya Kakizaki cs.CR,cs.AI,cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Éric Fusy,Gregory Kucherov
title: Phase transition in count approximation by Count-Min sketch with conservative updates
title_zh: 通过保守更新的 Count-Min 草图进行计数近似中的相变
abstract: Count-Min sketch is a hash-based data structure to represent a dynamically changing associative array of counters. Here we analyse the counting version of Count-Min under a stronger update rule known as \textit{conservative update}, assuming the uniform distribution of input keys. We show that the accuracy of conservative update strategy undergoes a phase transition, depending on the number of distinct keys in the input as a fraction of the size of the Count-Min array. We prove that below the threshold, the relative error is asymptotically $o(1)$ (as opposed to the regular Count-Min strategy), whereas above the threshold, the relative error is $Θ(1)$. The threshold corresponds to the peelability threshold of random $k$-uniform hypergraphs. We demonstrate that even for small number of keys, peelability of the underlying hypergraph is a crucial property to ensure the $o(1)$ error. Finally, we provide an experimental evidence that the phase transition does not extend to non-uniform distributions, in particular to the popular Zipf's distribution.
summary: Count-Min sketch is a hash-based data structure to represent a dynamically changing associative array of counters. Here we analyse the counting version of Count-Min under a stronger update rule known as \textit{conservative update}, assuming the uniform distribution of input keys. We show that the accuracy of conservative update strategy undergoes a phase transition, depending on the number of distinct keys in the input as a fraction of the size of the Count-Min array. We prove that below the threshold, the relative error is asymptotically $o(1)$ (as opposed to the regular Count-Min strategy), whereas above the threshold, the relative error is $Θ(1)$. The threshold corresponds to the peelability threshold of random $k$-uniform hypergraphs. We demonstrate that even for small number of keys, peelability of the underlying hypergraph is a crucial property to ensure the $o(1)$ error. Finally, we provide an experimental evidence that the phase transition does not extend to non-uniform distributions, in particular to the popular Zipf's distribution.
abstract_zh: Count-Min sketch 是一种基于散列的数据结构，用于表示动态变化的计数器关联数组。在这里，我们假设输入键均匀分布，在称为 \textit{保守更新} 的更强更新规则下分析 Count-Min 的计数版本。我们证明保守更新策略的准确性会经历一个阶段转变，具体取决于输入中不同键的数量占 Count-Min 数组大小的比例。我们证明，低于阈值，相对误差渐近 $o(1)$（与常规的 Count-Min 策略相反），而高于阈值，相对误差为 $θ(1)$。该阈值对应于随机$k$-均匀超图的可剥离性阈值。我们证明，即使对于少量的键，底层超图的可剥离性也是确保 $o(1)$ 错误的关键属性。最后，我们提供了实验证据，证明相变不会扩展到非均匀分布，特别是流行的齐普夫分布。

AI.tldr: 本文分析了在均匀输入键分布下，使用保守更新策略的Count-Min sketch计数版本的精度相变现象。
AI.motivation: Count-Min sketch在处理动态计数时存在误差问题，保守更新策略可能提升精度，但其理论边界尚不明确。
AI.method: 通过理论分析与实验验证，结合随机超图可剥离性阈值研究保守更新策略的误差相变特性。
AI.result: 证明当输入键数量低于阈值时相对误差为o(1)，高于阈值时为Θ(1)，且可剥离性是保证低误差的关键。
AI.conclusion: 均匀分布下存在明确的相变阈值，但非均匀分布（如Zipf分布）中该特性不成立。

authors_text: Dario Izzo,Sebastien Origer
title: Neural representation of a time optimal, constant acceleration rendezvous
title_zh: 时间最优、恒定加速度交会点的神经表示
abstract: We train neural models to represent both the optimal policy (i.e. the optimal thrust direction) and the value function (i.e. the time of flight) for a time optimal, constant acceleration low-thrust rendezvous. In both cases we develop and make use of the data augmentation technique we call backward generation of optimal examples. We are thus able to produce and work with large dataset and to fully exploit the benefit of employing a deep learning framework. We achieve, in all cases, accuracies resulting in successful rendezvous (simulated following the learned policy) and time of flight predictions (using the learned value function). We find that residuals as small as a few m/s, thus well within the possibility of a spacecraft navigation $ΔV$ budget, are achievable for the velocity at rendezvous. We also find that, on average, the absolute error to predict the optimal time of flight to rendezvous from any orbit in the asteroid belt to an Earth-like orbit is small (less than 4\%) and thus also of interest for practical uses, for example, during preliminary mission design phases.
summary: We train neural models to represent both the optimal policy (i.e. the optimal thrust direction) and the value function (i.e. the time of flight) for a time optimal, constant acceleration low-thrust rendezvous. In both cases we develop and make use of the data augmentation technique we call backward generation of optimal examples. We are thus able to produce and work with large dataset and to fully exploit the benefit of employing a deep learning framework. We achieve, in all cases, accuracies resulting in successful rendezvous (simulated following the learned policy) and time of flight predictions (using the learned value function). We find that residuals as small as a few m/s, thus well within the possibility of a spacecraft navigation $ΔV$ budget, are achievable for the velocity at rendezvous. We also find that, on average, the absolute error to predict the optimal time of flight to rendezvous from any orbit in the asteroid belt to an Earth-like orbit is small (less than 4\%) and thus also of interest for practical uses, for example, during preliminary mission design phases.
abstract_zh: 我们训练神经模型来表示最佳策略（即最佳推力方向）和价值函数（即飞行时间），以实现时间最佳、恒定加速度低推力交会。在这两种情况下，我们开发并利用数据增强技术，我们称之为最佳示例的反向生成。因此，我们能够生成和处理大型数据集，并充分利用深度学习框架的优势。在所有情况下，我们都实现了成功交会（根据学习到的策略进行模拟）和飞行时间预测（使用学习到的值函数）的准确性。我们发现交会处速度的残差可以小至几米/秒，因此完全在航天器导航 $ΔV$ 预算的范围内。我们还发现，平均而言，预测从小行星带任何轨道到类地轨道交会的最佳飞行时间的绝对误差都很小（小于 4%），因此对于实际用途也很有意义，例如在初步任务设计阶段。

AI.tldr: 该论文训练神经网络模型，以表示时间最优、恒定加速度的航天器会合任务中的最优策略和价值函数。
AI.motivation: 传统方法在处理复杂轨道转移问题时计算成本高，需探索更高效的解决方案以支持航天任务设计。
AI.method: 开发了反向生成最优示例的数据增强技术，结合深度学习框架训练神经网络模型。
AI.result: 模型成功实现会合模拟，速度残差低于数米每秒，时间预测误差小于4%，满足实际任务需求。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为航天器轨道设计提供了高效、精确的工具，适用于初步任务规划阶段。

authors_text: Salih Marangoz,Tobias Zaenker,Rohit Menon,Maren Bennewitz
title: Fruit Mapping with Shape Completion for Autonomous Crop Monitoring
title_zh: 用于自主作物监测的具有形状补全功能的水果绘图
abstract: Autonomous crop monitoring is a difficult task due to the complex structure of plants. Occlusions from leaves can make it impossible to obtain complete views about all fruits of, e.g., pepper plants. Therefore, accurately estimating the shape and volume of fruits from partial information is crucial to enable further advanced automation tasks such as yield estimation and automated fruit picking. In this paper, we present an approach for mapping fruits on plants and estimating their shape by matching superellipsoids. Our system segments fruits in images and uses their masks to generate point clouds of the fruits. To combine sequences of acquired point clouds, we utilize a real-time 3D mapping framework and build up a fruit map based on truncated signed distance fields. We cluster fruits from this map and use optimized superellipsoids for matching to obtain accurate shape estimates. In our experiments, we show in various simulated scenarios with a robotic arm equipped with an RGB-D camera that our approach can accurately estimate fruit volumes. Additionally, we provide qualitative results of estimated fruit shapes from data recorded in a commercial glasshouse environment.
summary: Autonomous crop monitoring is a difficult task due to the complex structure of plants. Occlusions from leaves can make it impossible to obtain complete views about all fruits of, e.g., pepper plants. Therefore, accurately estimating the shape and volume of fruits from partial information is crucial to enable further advanced automation tasks such as yield estimation and automated fruit picking. In this paper, we present an approach for mapping fruits on plants and estimating their shape by matching superellipsoids. Our system segments fruits in images and uses their masks to generate point clouds of the fruits. To combine sequences of acquired point clouds, we utilize a real-time 3D mapping framework and build up a fruit map based on truncated signed distance fields. We cluster fruits from this map and use optimized superellipsoids for matching to obtain accurate shape estimates. In our experiments, we show in various simulated scenarios with a robotic arm equipped with an RGB-D camera that our approach can accurately estimate fruit volumes. Additionally, we provide qualitative results of estimated fruit shapes from data recorded in a commercial glasshouse environment.
abstract_zh: 由于植物结构复杂，自主作物监测是一项艰巨的任务。叶子的遮挡可能导致无法获得所有果实的完整视图，例如辣椒植物。因此，根据部分信息准确估计水果的形状和体积对于实现产量估计和自动水果采摘等进一步高级自动化任务至关重要。在本文中，我们提出了一种在植物上绘制水果图并通过匹配超椭球来估计其形状的方法。我们的系统分割图像中的水果，并使用它们的掩模生成水果的点云。为了组合获取的点云序列，我们利用实时 3D 映射框架并基于截断的符号距离场构建水果地图。我们从这张地图上对水果进行聚类，并使用优化的超椭球进行匹配，以获得准确的形状估计。在我们的实验中，我们通过配备 RGB-D 相机的机械臂在各种模拟场景中展示了我们的方法可以准确估计水果体积。此外，我们还根据商业温室环境中记录的数据提供估计水果形状的定性结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于形状补全的自主作物监测方法，通过匹配超椭球体估计植物果实的形状和体积。
AI.motivation: 植物叶片遮挡导致无法获取完整果实视图，影响产量估算和自动化采摘等任务，需从部分信息中准确估计果实形状。
AI.method: 通过图像分割生成果实掩膜并构建点云，利用实时3D映射框架和截断符号距离场（TSDF）构建果实地图，聚类后使用优化超椭球体匹配完成形状估计。
AI.result: 在机械臂RGB-D相机的模拟场景和商业温室实测数据中，方法均能准确估计果实体积并生成定性形状结果。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效解决了植物遮挡问题，为自主农业监测提供了可靠形状估计方案，可提升自动化作业精度。

search_text: Fruit Mapping with Shape Completion for Autonomous Crop Monitoring 用于自主作物监测的具有形状补全功能的水果绘图 Autonomous crop monitoring is a difficult task due to the complex structure of plants. Occlusions from leaves can make it impossible to obtain complete views about all fruits of, e.g., pepper plants. Therefore, accurately estimating the shape and volume of fruits from partial information is crucial to enable further advanced automation tasks such as yield estimation and automated fruit picking. In this paper, we present an approach for mapping fruits on plants and estimating their shape by matching superellipsoids. Our system segments fruits in images and uses their masks to generate point clouds of the fruits. To combine sequences of acquired point clouds, we utilize a real-time 3D mapping framework and build up a fruit map based on truncated signed distance fields. We cluster fruits from this map and use optimized superellipsoids for matching to obtain accurate shape estimates. In our experiments, we show in various simulated scenarios with a robotic arm equipped with an RGB-D camera that our approach can accurately estimate fruit volumes. Additionally, we provide qualitative results of estimated fruit shapes from data recorded in a commercial glasshouse environment. 由于植物结构复杂，自主作物监测是一项艰巨的任务。叶子的遮挡可能导致无法获得所有果实的完整视图，例如辣椒植物。因此，根据部分信息准确估计水果的形状和体积对于实现产量估计和自动水果采摘等进一步高级自动化任务至关重要。在本文中，我们提出了一种在植物上绘制水果图并通过匹配超椭球来估计其形状的方法。我们的系统分割图像中的水果，并使用它们的掩模生成水果的点云。为了组合获取的点云序列，我们利用实时 3D 映射框架并基于截断的符号距离场构建水果地图。我们从这张地图上对水果进行聚类，并使用优化的超椭球进行匹配，以获得准确的形状估计。在我们的实验中，我们通过配备 RGB-D 相机的机械臂在各种模拟场景中展示了我们的方法可以准确估计水果体积。此外，我们还根据商业温室环境中记录的数据提供估计水果形状的定性结果。 本文提出一种基于形状补全的自主作物监测方法，通过匹配超椭球体估计植物果实的形状和体积。 Salih Marangoz,Tobias Zaenker,Rohit Menon,Maren Bennewitz cs.RO

authors_text: Ivor J. A. Simpson,Sara Vicente,Neill D. F. Campbell
title: Learning Structured Gaussians to Approximate Deep Ensembles
title_zh: 学习结构化高斯函数来近似深度集成
abstract: This paper proposes using a sparse-structured multivariate Gaussian to provide a closed-form approximator for the output of probabilistic ensemble models used for dense image prediction tasks. This is achieved through a convolutional neural network that predicts the mean and covariance of the distribution, where the inverse covariance is parameterised by a sparsely structured Cholesky matrix. Similarly to distillation approaches, our single network is trained to maximise the probability of samples from pre-trained probabilistic models, in this work we use a fixed ensemble of networks. Once trained, our compact representation can be used to efficiently draw spatially correlated samples from the approximated output distribution. Importantly, this approach captures the uncertainty and structured correlations in the predictions explicitly in a formal distribution, rather than implicitly through sampling alone. This allows direct introspection of the model, enabling visualisation of the learned structure. Moreover, this formulation provides two further benefits: estimation of a sample probability, and the introduction of arbitrary spatial conditioning at test time. We demonstrate the merits of our approach on monocular depth estimation and show that the advantages of our approach are obtained with comparable quantitative performance.
summary: This paper proposes using a sparse-structured multivariate Gaussian to provide a closed-form approximator for the output of probabilistic ensemble models used for dense image prediction tasks. This is achieved through a convolutional neural network that predicts the mean and covariance of the distribution, where the inverse covariance is parameterised by a sparsely structured Cholesky matrix. Similarly to distillation approaches, our single network is trained to maximise the probability of samples from pre-trained probabilistic models, in this work we use a fixed ensemble of networks. Once trained, our compact representation can be used to efficiently draw spatially correlated samples from the approximated output distribution. Importantly, this approach captures the uncertainty and structured correlations in the predictions explicitly in a formal distribution, rather than implicitly through sampling alone. This allows direct introspection of the model, enabling visualisation of the learned structure. Moreover, this formulation provides two further benefits: estimation of a sample probability, and the introduction of arbitrary spatial conditioning at test time. We demonstrate the merits of our approach on monocular depth estimation and show that the advantages of our approach are obtained with comparable quantitative performance.
abstract_zh: 本文提出使用稀疏结构多元高斯为用于密集图像预测任务的概率集成模型的输出提供封闭形式逼近器。这是通过预测分布的均值和协方差的卷积神经网络来实现的，其中逆协方差由稀疏结构的 Cholesky 矩阵参数化。与蒸馏方法类似，我们的单个网络经过训练，可以最大化预先训练的概率模型中的样本概率，在这项工作中，我们使用固定的网络集合。经过训练后，我们的紧凑表示可用于从近似输出分布中有效地绘制空间相关样本。重要的是，这种方法以正式分布的形式明确地捕获了预测中的不确定性和结构化相关性，而不是仅通过抽样隐式地捕获了预测中的不确定性和结构化相关性。这允许直接内省模型，从而实现学习结构的可视化。此外，该公式还提供了两个进一步的好处：样本概率的估计以及在测试时引入任意空间条件。我们展示了我们的方法在单目深度估计方面的优点，并表明我们的方法的优点是通过可比较的定量性能获得的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出使用稀疏结构化多元高斯分布作为闭式近似器，用于密集图像预测任务中的深度集成模型输出近似。
AI.motivation: 传统深度集成模型通过采样隐式处理预测不确定性，难以直接分析结构化相关性，且计算效率较低。
AI.method: 设计卷积神经网络预测分布均值和协方差，逆协方差由稀疏Cholesky矩阵参数化，通过最大似然训练以拟合预训练集成模型的输出分布。
AI.result: 在单目深度估计任务中，该方法在保持定量性能的同时，实现了不确定性显式建模和结构化相关性可视化。
AI.conclusion: 提出的方法为密集预测任务提供了高效、显式的结构化高斯近似框架，支持不确定性估计与空间条件控制。

authors_text: Yuwen Deng,Donghai Guan,Yanyu Chen,Weiwei Yuan,Jiemin Ji,Mingqiang Wei
title: SAR-ShipNet: SAR-Ship Detection Neural Network via Bidirectional Coordinate Attention and Multi-resolution Feature Fusion
title_zh: SAR-ShipNet：通过双向坐标注意力和多分辨率特征融合的 SAR 船舶检测神经网络
comment: This paper was accepted by the International Conference on Acoustics, Speech, and Signal Processing(ICASSP) 2022
comments: This paper was accepted by the International Conference on Acoustics, Speech, and Signal Processing(ICASSP) 2022
abstract: This paper studies a practically meaningful ship detection problem from synthetic aperture radar (SAR) images by the neural network. We broadly extract different types of SAR image features and raise the intriguing question that whether these extracted features are beneficial to (1) suppress data variations (e.g., complex land-sea backgrounds, scattered noise) of real-world SAR images, and (2) enhance the features of ships that are small objects and have different aspect (length-width) ratios, therefore resulting in the improvement of ship detection. To answer this question, we propose a SAR-ship detection neural network (call SAR-ShipNet for short), by newly developing Bidirectional Coordinate Attention (BCA) and Multi-resolution Feature Fusion (MRF) based on CenterNet. Moreover, considering the varying length-width ratio of arbitrary ships, we adopt elliptical Gaussian probability distribution in CenterNet to improve the performance of base detector models. Experimental results on the public SAR-Ship dataset show that our SAR-ShipNet achieves competitive advantages in both speed and accuracy.
summary: This paper studies a practically meaningful ship detection problem from synthetic aperture radar (SAR) images by the neural network. We broadly extract different types of SAR image features and raise the intriguing question that whether these extracted features are beneficial to (1) suppress data variations (e.g., complex land-sea backgrounds, scattered noise) of real-world SAR images, and (2) enhance the features of ships that are small objects and have different aspect (length-width) ratios, therefore resulting in the improvement of ship detection. To answer this question, we propose a SAR-ship detection neural network (call SAR-ShipNet for short), by newly developing Bidirectional Coordinate Attention (BCA) and Multi-resolution Feature Fusion (MRF) based on CenterNet. Moreover, considering the varying length-width ratio of arbitrary ships, we adopt elliptical Gaussian probability distribution in CenterNet to improve the performance of base detector models. Experimental results on the public SAR-Ship dataset show that our SAR-ShipNet achieves competitive advantages in both speed and accuracy.
abstract_zh: 本文通过神经网络研究了合成孔径雷达（SAR）图像中具有实际意义的船舶检测问题。我们广泛提取不同类型的SAR图像特征，并提出了一个有趣的问题：这些提取的特征是否有利于（1）抑制真实SAR图像的数据变化（例如复杂的海陆背景、分散的噪声），以及（2）增强小物体和具有不同纵横比（长宽比）的船舶的特征，从而改善船舶检测。为了回答这个问题，我们通过基于 CenterNet 的新开发的双向坐标注意（BCA）和多分辨率特征融合（MRF）提出了一种 SAR 船舶检测神经网络（简称 SAR-ShipNet）。此外，考虑到任意船舶的长宽比变化，我们在CenterNet中采用椭圆高斯概率分布来提高基础探测器模型的性能。在公共 SAR-Ship 数据集上的实验结果表明，我们的 SAR-ShipNet 在速度和准确性方面都具有竞争优势。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SAR-ShipNet神经网络，通过双向坐标注意力机制和多分辨率特征融合技术，解决合成孔径雷达(SAR)图像中的船舶检测问题。
AI.motivation: SAR图像存在复杂陆海背景、散射噪声等现实挑战，且船舶作为小目标具有不同长宽比，现有方法难以有效抑制数据变化并增强船舶特征。
AI.method: 基于CenterNet框架，开发双向坐标注意力(BCA)和多分辨率特征融合(MRF)模块，并采用椭圆高斯概率分布适应船舶长宽比变化。
AI.result: 在公开SAR-Ship数据集上，SAR-ShipNet在检测速度和准确率方面均表现出竞争性优势。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法通过特征增强和多尺度融合有效解决了SAR船舶检测中的关键挑战，验证了双向坐标注意力与多分辨率特征融合的有效性。

search_text: SAR-ShipNet: SAR-Ship Detection Neural Network via Bidirectional Coordinate Attention and Multi-resolution Feature Fusion SAR-ShipNet：通过双向坐标注意力和多分辨率特征融合的 SAR 船舶检测神经网络 This paper studies a practically meaningful ship detection problem from synthetic aperture radar (SAR) images by the neural network. We broadly extract different types of SAR image features and raise the intriguing question that whether these extracted features are beneficial to (1) suppress data variations (e.g., complex land-sea backgrounds, scattered noise) of real-world SAR images, and (2) enhance the features of ships that are small objects and have different aspect (length-width) ratios, therefore resulting in the improvement of ship detection. To answer this question, we propose a SAR-ship detection neural network (call SAR-ShipNet for short), by newly developing Bidirectional Coordinate Attention (BCA) and Multi-resolution Feature Fusion (MRF) based on CenterNet. Moreover, considering the varying length-width ratio of arbitrary ships, we adopt elliptical Gaussian probability distribution in CenterNet to improve the performance of base detector models. Experimental results on the public SAR-Ship dataset show that our SAR-ShipNet achieves competitive advantages in both speed and accuracy. 本文通过神经网络研究了合成孔径雷达（SAR）图像中具有实际意义的船舶检测问题。我们广泛提取不同类型的SAR图像特征，并提出了一个有趣的问题：这些提取的特征是否有利于（1）抑制真实SAR图像的数据变化（例如复杂的海陆背景、分散的噪声），以及（2）增强小物体和具有不同纵横比（长宽比）的船舶的特征，从而改善船舶检测。为了回答这个问题，我们通过基于 CenterNet 的新开发的双向坐标注意（BCA）和多分辨率特征融合（MRF）提出了一种 SAR 船舶检测神经网络（简称 SAR-ShipNet）。此外，考虑到任意船舶的长宽比变化，我们在CenterNet中采用椭圆高斯概率分布来提高基础探测器模型的性能。在公共 SAR-Ship 数据集上的实验结果表明，我们的 SAR-ShipNet 在速度和准确性方面都具有竞争优势。 本文提出SAR-ShipNet神经网络，通过双向坐标注意力机制和多分辨率特征融合技术，解决合成孔径雷达(SAR)图像中的船舶检测问题。 Yuwen Deng,Donghai Guan,Yanyu Chen,Weiwei Yuan,Jiemin Ji,Mingqiang Wei cs.CV

authors_text: Ryo Fukuda,Katsuhito Sudoh,Satoshi Nakamura
title: Speech Segmentation Optimization using Segmented Bilingual Speech Corpus for End-to-end Speech Translation
title_zh: 使用分段双语语音语料库进行端到端语音翻译的语音分段优化
abstract: Speech segmentation, which splits long speech into short segments, is essential for speech translation (ST). Popular VAD tools like WebRTC VAD have generally relied on pause-based segmentation. Unfortunately, pauses in speech do not necessarily match sentence boundaries, and sentences can be connected by a very short pause that is difficult to detect by VAD. In this study, we propose a speech segmentation method using a binary classification model trained using a segmented bilingual speech corpus. We also propose a hybrid method that combines VAD and the above speech segmentation method. Experimental results revealed that the proposed method is more suitable for cascade and end-to-end ST systems than conventional segmentation methods. The hybrid approach further improved the translation performance.
summary: Speech segmentation, which splits long speech into short segments, is essential for speech translation (ST). Popular VAD tools like WebRTC VAD have generally relied on pause-based segmentation. Unfortunately, pauses in speech do not necessarily match sentence boundaries, and sentences can be connected by a very short pause that is difficult to detect by VAD. In this study, we propose a speech segmentation method using a binary classification model trained using a segmented bilingual speech corpus. We also propose a hybrid method that combines VAD and the above speech segmentation method. Experimental results revealed that the proposed method is more suitable for cascade and end-to-end ST systems than conventional segmentation methods. The hybrid approach further improved the translation performance.
abstract_zh: 语音分段将长语音分割成短片段，对于语音翻译 (ST) 至关重要。 WebRTC VAD 等流行的 VAD 工具通常依赖于基于暂停的分段。不幸的是，语音中的停顿不一定与句子边界匹配，并且句子可以通过非常短的停顿来连接，而 VAD 很难检测到这一点。在本研究中，我们提出了一种语音分割方法，该方法使用使用分段双语语音语料库训练的二元分类模型。我们还提出了一种将 VAD 和上述语音分割方法相结合的混合方法。实验结果表明，该方法比传统的分割方法更适合级联和端到端的ST系统。混合方法进一步提高了翻译性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于分段双语语音语料库的语音分割优化方法，以提升端到端语音翻译的性能。
AI.motivation: 传统基于停顿检测的VAD方法难以准确分割句子边界，导致语音翻译系统性能受限。
AI.method: 构建二分类模型进行语音分割，并提出结合VAD与该模型的混合分割方法。
AI.result: 新方法在级联和端到端ST系统中表现优于传统方法，混合方法进一步提升翻译效果。
AI.conclusion: 基于双语语料库的分割模型能有效优化语音分割，为语音翻译提供更准确的输入单元。

authors_text: Peer Schütt,Radu Alexandru Rosu,Sven Behnke
title: Abstract Flow for Temporal Semantic Segmentation on the Permutohedral Lattice
title_zh: 全面体晶格上的时间语义分割的抽象流程
comment: Accepted IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA) 2022, Code available at https://github.com/AIS-Bonn/temporal_latticenet
comments: Accepted IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA) 2022, Code available at https://github.com/AIS-Bonn/temporal_latticenet
abstract: Semantic segmentation is a core ability required by autonomous agents, as being able to distinguish which parts of the scene belong to which object class is crucial for navigation and interaction with the environment. Approaches which use only one time-step of data cannot distinguish between moving objects nor can they benefit from temporal integration. In this work, we extend a backbone LatticeNet to process temporal point cloud data. Additionally, we take inspiration from optical flow methods and propose a new module called Abstract Flow which allows the network to match parts of the scene with similar abstract features and gather the information temporally. We obtain state-of-the-art results on the SemanticKITTI dataset that contains LiDAR scans from real urban environments. We share the PyTorch implementation of TemporalLatticeNet at https://github.com/AIS-Bonn/temporal_latticenet .
summary: Semantic segmentation is a core ability required by autonomous agents, as being able to distinguish which parts of the scene belong to which object class is crucial for navigation and interaction with the environment. Approaches which use only one time-step of data cannot distinguish between moving objects nor can they benefit from temporal integration. In this work, we extend a backbone LatticeNet to process temporal point cloud data. Additionally, we take inspiration from optical flow methods and propose a new module called Abstract Flow which allows the network to match parts of the scene with similar abstract features and gather the information temporally. We obtain state-of-the-art results on the SemanticKITTI dataset that contains LiDAR scans from real urban environments. We share the PyTorch implementation of TemporalLatticeNet at https://github.com/AIS-Bonn/temporal_latticenet .
abstract_zh: 语义分割是自主代理所需的核心能力，因为能够区分场景的哪些部分属于哪个对象类对于导航和与环境的交互至关重要。仅使用一个时间步数据的方法无法区分移动对象，也无法从时间整合中受益。在这项工作中，我们扩展了主干 LatticeNet 来处理时态点云数据。此外，我们从光流方法中获得灵感，提出了一个名为 Abstract Flow 的新模块，它允许网络将场景中具有相似抽象特征的部分进行匹配并暂时收集信息。我们在 SemanticKITTI 数据集上获得了最先进的结果，其中包含来自真实城市环境的 LiDAR 扫描。我们在 https://github.com/AIS-Bonn/temporal_latticenet 分享 TemporalLatticeNet 的 PyTorch 实现。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于Permutohedral Lattice的时间语义分割方法，通过引入抽象光流模块实现点云数据的时序信息整合。
AI.motivation: 传统单帧语义分割无法区分移动物体且缺乏时序信息，需要改进方法提升动态场景理解能力。
AI.method: 扩展LatticeNet处理时序点云数据，设计抽象光流模块匹配相似特征并进行时序信息聚合。
AI.result: 在SemanticKITTI数据集上取得当时最优性能，开源了PyTorch实现代码。
AI.conclusion: 抽象光流模块有效提升了动态场景语义分割性能，为时序点云处理提供了新思路。

authors_text: Mai Lan Tran,Dongjin Lee,Jae-Hun Jung
title: Machine Composition of Korean Music via Topological Data Analysis and Artificial Neural Network
title_zh: 通过拓扑数据分析和人工神经网络进行韩国音乐的机器作曲
abstract: Common AI music composition algorithms based on artificial neural networks are to train a machine by feeding a large number of music pieces and create artificial neural networks that can produce music similar to the input music data. This approach is a blackbox optimization, that is, the underlying composition algorithm is, in general, not known to users. In this paper, we present a way of machine composition that trains a machine the composition principle embedded in the given music data instead of directly feeding music pieces. We propose this approach by using the concept of {\color{black}{Overlap}} matrix proposed in \cite{TPJ}. In \cite{TPJ}, a type of Korean music, so-called the {\it Dodeuri} music such as Suyeonjangjigok has been analyzed using topological data analysis (TDA), particularly using persistent homology. As the raw music data is not suitable for TDA analysis, the music data is first reconstructed as a graph. The node of the graph is defined as a two-dimensional vector composed of the pitch and duration of each music note. The edge between two nodes is created when those nodes appear consecutively in the music flow. Distance is defined based on the frequency of such appearances. Through TDA on the constructed graph, a unique set of cycles is found for the given music. In \cite{TPJ}, the new concept of the {\it {\color{black}{Overlap}} matrix} has been proposed, which visualizes how those cycles are interconnected over the music flow, in a matrix form. In this paper, we explain how we use the {\color{black}{Overlap}} matrix for machine composition. The {\color{black}{Overlap}} matrix makes it possible to compose a new music piece algorithmically and also provide a seed music towards the desired artificial neural network. In this paper, we use the {\it Dodeuri} music and explain detailed steps.
summary: Common AI music composition algorithms based on artificial neural networks are to train a machine by feeding a large number of music pieces and create artificial neural networks that can produce music similar to the input music data. This approach is a blackbox optimization, that is, the underlying composition algorithm is, in general, not known to users. In this paper, we present a way of machine composition that trains a machine the composition principle embedded in the given music data instead of directly feeding music pieces. We propose this approach by using the concept of {\color{black}{Overlap}} matrix proposed in \cite{TPJ}. In \cite{TPJ}, a type of Korean music, so-called the {\it Dodeuri} music such as Suyeonjangjigok has been analyzed using topological data analysis (TDA), particularly using persistent homology. As the raw music data is not suitable for TDA analysis, the music data is first reconstructed as a graph. The node of the graph is defined as a two-dimensional vector composed of the pitch and duration of each music note. The edge between two nodes is created when those nodes appear consecutively in the music flow. Distance is defined based on the frequency of such appearances. Through TDA on the constructed graph, a unique set of cycles is found for the given music. In \cite{TPJ}, the new concept of the {\it {\color{black}{Overlap}} matrix} has been proposed, which visualizes how those cycles are interconnected over the music flow, in a matrix form. In this paper, we explain how we use the {\color{black}{Overlap}} matrix for machine composition. The {\color{black}{Overlap}} matrix makes it possible to compose a new music piece algorithmically and also provide a seed music towards the desired artificial neural network. In this paper, we use the {\it Dodeuri} music and explain detailed steps.
abstract_zh: 常见的基于人工神经网络的人工智能音乐创作算法是通过输入大量音乐片段来训练机器，并创建能够产生与输入音乐数据相似的音乐的人工神经网络。这种方法是一种黑盒优化，也就是说，底层的合成算法通常不为用户所知。在本文中，我们提出了一种机器作曲的方法，它训练机器嵌入给定音乐数据中的作曲原理，而不是直接输入音乐片段。我们通过使用 \cite{TPJ} 中提出的 {\color{black}{Overlap}} 矩阵的概念来提出这种方法。在 \cite{TPJ} 中，一种韩国音乐，所谓的 {\it Dodeuri} 音乐（例如 Suyeonjangjigok）已使用拓扑数据分析（TDA）进行了分析，特别是使用持久同源性。由于原始音乐数据不适合TDA分析，因此首先将音乐数据重建为图表。该图的节点被定义为由每个音符的音高和持续时间组成的二维向量。当两个节点连续出现在音乐流中时，就会创建两个节点之间的边。距离是根据此类出现的频率来定义的。通过构建图上的 TDA，可以为给定的音乐找到一组独特的周期。在\cite{TPJ}中，提出了{\it {\color{black}{Overlap}}矩阵}的新概念，它以矩阵形式可视化了这些循环如何在音乐流上互连。在本文中，我们解释了如何使用 {\color{black}{Overlap}} 矩阵进行机器组合。 {\color{black}{Overlap}} 矩阵使得可以通过算法创作新的音乐作品，并为所需的人工神经网络提供种子音乐。在本文中，我们使用 {\it Dodeuri} 音乐并解释详细步骤。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于拓扑数据分析和人工神经网络的韩国音乐机器创作方法，通过构建音乐图结构并利用重叠矩阵实现算法化作曲。
AI.motivation: 传统AI音乐创作算法为黑箱优化，无法揭示作曲原理。本文旨在通过分析音乐数据中的拓扑结构，实现可解释的机器作曲方法。
AI.method: 将音乐转化为节点为音高-时长向量的图结构，通过持续同调分析提取循环特征，构建重叠矩阵并用于生成新音乐及训练神经网络种子。
AI.result: 成功实现基于Dodeuri音乐的算法化作曲，验证了重叠矩阵在音乐结构建模和神经网络训练中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过拓扑数据分析揭示音乐创作规律，为透明化AI音乐生成提供了新思路，优于传统黑箱模型。

search_text: Machine Composition of Korean Music via Topological Data Analysis and Artificial Neural Network 通过拓扑数据分析和人工神经网络进行韩国音乐的机器作曲 Common AI music composition algorithms based on artificial neural networks are to train a machine by feeding a large number of music pieces and create artificial neural networks that can produce music similar to the input music data. This approach is a blackbox optimization, that is, the underlying composition algorithm is, in general, not known to users. In this paper, we present a way of machine composition that trains a machine the composition principle embedded in the given music data instead of directly feeding music pieces. We propose this approach by using the concept of {\color{black}{Overlap}} matrix proposed in \cite{TPJ}. In \cite{TPJ}, a type of Korean music, so-called the {\it Dodeuri} music such as Suyeonjangjigok has been analyzed using topological data analysis (TDA), particularly using persistent homology. As the raw music data is not suitable for TDA analysis, the music data is first reconstructed as a graph. The node of the graph is defined as a two-dimensional vector composed of the pitch and duration of each music note. The edge between two nodes is created when those nodes appear consecutively in the music flow. Distance is defined based on the frequency of such appearances. Through TDA on the constructed graph, a unique set of cycles is found for the given music. In \cite{TPJ}, the new concept of the {\it {\color{black}{Overlap}} matrix} has been proposed, which visualizes how those cycles are interconnected over the music flow, in a matrix form. In this paper, we explain how we use the {\color{black}{Overlap}} matrix for machine composition. The {\color{black}{Overlap}} matrix makes it possible to compose a new music piece algorithmically and also provide a seed music towards the desired artificial neural network. In this paper, we use the {\it Dodeuri} music and explain detailed steps. 常见的基于人工神经网络的人工智能音乐创作算法是通过输入大量音乐片段来训练机器，并创建能够产生与输入音乐数据相似的音乐的人工神经网络。这种方法是一种黑盒优化，也就是说，底层的合成算法通常不为用户所知。在本文中，我们提出了一种机器作曲的方法，它训练机器嵌入给定音乐数据中的作曲原理，而不是直接输入音乐片段。我们通过使用 \cite{TPJ} 中提出的 {\color{black}{Overlap}} 矩阵的概念来提出这种方法。在 \cite{TPJ} 中，一种韩国音乐，所谓的 {\it Dodeuri} 音乐（例如 Suyeonjangjigok）已使用拓扑数据分析（TDA）进行了分析，特别是使用持久同源性。由于原始音乐数据不适合TDA分析，因此首先将音乐数据重建为图表。该图的节点被定义为由每个音符的音高和持续时间组成的二维向量。当两个节点连续出现在音乐流中时，就会创建两个节点之间的边。距离是根据此类出现的频率来定义的。通过构建图上的 TDA，可以为给定的音乐找到一组独特的周期。在\cite{TPJ}中，提出了{\it {\color{black}{Overlap}}矩阵}的新概念，它以矩阵形式可视化了这些循环如何在音乐流上互连。在本文中，我们解释了如何使用 {\color{black}{Overlap}} 矩阵进行机器组合。 {\color{black}{Overlap}} 矩阵使得可以通过算法创作新的音乐作品，并为所需的人工神经网络提供种子音乐。在本文中，我们使用 {\it Dodeuri} 音乐并解释详细步骤。 本文提出一种基于拓扑数据分析和人工神经网络的韩国音乐机器创作方法，通过构建音乐图结构并利用重叠矩阵实现算法化作曲。 Mai Lan Tran,Dongjin Lee,Jae-Hun Jung cs.SD,cs.LG,eess.AS

authors_text: Jian Cheng,Yanguang Wan,Dexin Zuo,Cuixia Ma,Jian Gu,Ping Tan,Hongan Wang,Xiaoming Deng,Yinda Zhang
title: Efficient Virtual View Selection for 3D Hand Pose Estimation
title_zh: 用于 3D 手势估计的高效虚拟视图选择
abstract: 3D hand pose estimation from single depth is a fundamental problem in computer vision, and has wide applications.However, the existing methods still can not achieve satisfactory hand pose estimation results due to view variation and occlusion of human hand. In this paper, we propose a new virtual view selection and fusion module for 3D hand pose estimation from single depth.We propose to automatically select multiple virtual viewpoints for pose estimation and fuse the results of all and find this empirically delivers accurate and robust pose estimation. In order to select most effective virtual views for pose fusion, we evaluate the virtual views based on the confidence of virtual views using a light-weight network via network distillation. Experiments on three main benchmark datasets including NYU, ICVL and Hands2019 demonstrate that our method outperforms the state-of-the-arts on NYU and ICVL, and achieves very competitive performance on Hands2019-Task1, and our proposed virtual view selection and fusion module is both effective for 3D hand pose estimation.
summary: 3D hand pose estimation from single depth is a fundamental problem in computer vision, and has wide applications.However, the existing methods still can not achieve satisfactory hand pose estimation results due to view variation and occlusion of human hand. In this paper, we propose a new virtual view selection and fusion module for 3D hand pose estimation from single depth.We propose to automatically select multiple virtual viewpoints for pose estimation and fuse the results of all and find this empirically delivers accurate and robust pose estimation. In order to select most effective virtual views for pose fusion, we evaluate the virtual views based on the confidence of virtual views using a light-weight network via network distillation. Experiments on three main benchmark datasets including NYU, ICVL and Hands2019 demonstrate that our method outperforms the state-of-the-arts on NYU and ICVL, and achieves very competitive performance on Hands2019-Task1, and our proposed virtual view selection and fusion module is both effective for 3D hand pose estimation.
abstract_zh: 单深度的3D手部姿态估计是计算机视觉中的一个基本问题，具有广泛的应用。然而，由于视角变化和人手的遮挡，现有方法仍然不能达到令人满意的手部姿态估计结果。在本文中，我们提出了一种新的虚拟视图选择和融合模块，用于从单深度进行 3D 手部姿势估计。我们建议自动选择多个虚拟视点进行姿势估计并融合所有结果，并发现这在经验上可以提供准确且稳健的姿势估计。为了选择最有效的虚拟视图进行姿势融合，我们通过网络蒸馏使用轻量级网络基于虚拟视图的置信度来评估虚拟视图。在 NYU、ICVL 和 Hands2019 等三个主要基准数据集上的实验表明，我们的方法优于 NYU 和 ICVL 上的最新方法，并且在 Hands2019-Task1 上实现了非常有竞争力的性能，并且我们提出的虚拟视图选择和融合模块对于 3D 手部姿势估计均有效。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种高效的虚拟视角选择与融合模块，用于解决单目深度输入下的3D手部姿态估计问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法因视角变化和遮挡问题导致3D手部姿态估计效果不佳，需通过多视角信息提升鲁棒性。
AI.method: 通过轻量级网络蒸馏评估虚拟视角置信度，自动选择多个有效虚拟视角并融合其估计结果。
AI.result: 在NYU和ICVL数据集上优于现有方法，在Hands2019-Task1上表现接近最优，验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 虚拟视角选择与融合模块能有效提升单目深度输入下3D手部姿态估计的准确性与鲁棒性。

authors_text: Binbin Zhang,Di Wu,Zhendong Peng,Xingchen Song,Zhuoyuan Yao,Hang Lv,Lei Xie,Chao Yang,Fuping Pan,Jianwei Niu
title: WeNet 2.0: More Productive End-to-End Speech Recognition Toolkit
title_zh: WeNet 2.0：更高效的端到端语音识别工具包
abstract: Recently, we made available WeNet, a production-oriented end-to-end speech recognition toolkit, which introduces a unified two-pass (U2) framework and a built-in runtime to address the streaming and non-streaming decoding modes in a single model. To further improve ASR performance and facilitate various production requirements, in this paper, we present WeNet 2.0 with four important updates. (1) We propose U2++, a unified two-pass framework with bidirectional attention decoders, which includes the future contextual information by a right-to-left attention decoder to improve the representative ability of the shared encoder and the performance during the rescoring stage. (2) We introduce an n-gram based language model and a WFST-based decoder into WeNet 2.0, promoting the use of rich text data in production scenarios. (3) We design a unified contextual biasing framework, which leverages user-specific context (e.g., contact lists) to provide rapid adaptation ability for production and improves ASR accuracy in both with-LM and without-LM scenarios. (4) We design a unified IO to support large-scale data for effective model training. In summary, the brand-new WeNet 2.0 achieves up to 10\% relative recognition performance improvement over the original WeNet on various corpora and makes available several important production-oriented features.
summary: Recently, we made available WeNet, a production-oriented end-to-end speech recognition toolkit, which introduces a unified two-pass (U2) framework and a built-in runtime to address the streaming and non-streaming decoding modes in a single model. To further improve ASR performance and facilitate various production requirements, in this paper, we present WeNet 2.0 with four important updates. (1) We propose U2++, a unified two-pass framework with bidirectional attention decoders, which includes the future contextual information by a right-to-left attention decoder to improve the representative ability of the shared encoder and the performance during the rescoring stage. (2) We introduce an n-gram based language model and a WFST-based decoder into WeNet 2.0, promoting the use of rich text data in production scenarios. (3) We design a unified contextual biasing framework, which leverages user-specific context (e.g., contact lists) to provide rapid adaptation ability for production and improves ASR accuracy in both with-LM and without-LM scenarios. (4) We design a unified IO to support large-scale data for effective model training. In summary, the brand-new WeNet 2.0 achieves up to 10\% relative recognition performance improvement over the original WeNet on various corpora and makes available several important production-oriented features.
abstract_zh: 最近，我们推出了WeNet，一个面向生产的端到端语音识别工具包，它引入了统一的双通道（U2）框架和内置运行时来解决单个模型中的流式和非流式解码模式。为了进一步提高 ASR 性能并满足各种生产需求，在本文中，我们提出了 WeNet 2.0 的四个重要更新。 （1）我们提出了U2++，一种具有双向注意解码器的统一两遍框架，其中包含从右到左注意解码器的未来上下文信息，以提高共享编码器的表示能力和重新评分阶段的性能。 (2)我们在WeNet 2.0中引入了基于n-gram的语言模型和基于WFST的解码器，促进了富文本数据在生产场景中的使用。 (3) 我们设计了一个统一的上下文偏差框架，它利用用户特定的上下文（例如联系人列表）为生产提供快速适应能力，并提高有 LM 和无 LM 场景下的 ASR 准确性。 (4)我们设计了统一的IO来支持大规模数据进行有效的模型训练。综上所述，全新的 WeNet 2.0 在各种语料库上比原始 WeNet 实现了高达 10% 的相对识别性能提升，并提供了一些重要的面向生产的功能。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了WeNet 2.0，一个改进的端到端语音识别工具包，旨在提升语音识别性能并满足生产需求。
AI.motivation: 为了进一步提升自动语音识别（ASR）的性能并满足各种生产需求，作者提出了WeNet 2.0。
AI.method: 本文提出了四个重要更新：U2++框架、n-gram语言模型和WFST解码器、统一的上下文偏置框架以及支持大规模数据的统一IO。
AI.result: WeNet 2.0在多个语料库上实现了相对于原始WeNet高达10%的相对识别性能提升，并提供了多项生产导向的功能。
AI.conclusion: WeNet 2.0通过多项改进显著提升了语音识别性能，并增强了其在生产环境中的适用性。

search_text: WeNet 2.0: More Productive End-to-End Speech Recognition Toolkit WeNet 2.0：更高效的端到端语音识别工具包 Recently, we made available WeNet, a production-oriented end-to-end speech recognition toolkit, which introduces a unified two-pass (U2) framework and a built-in runtime to address the streaming and non-streaming decoding modes in a single model. To further improve ASR performance and facilitate various production requirements, in this paper, we present WeNet 2.0 with four important updates. (1) We propose U2++, a unified two-pass framework with bidirectional attention decoders, which includes the future contextual information by a right-to-left attention decoder to improve the representative ability of the shared encoder and the performance during the rescoring stage. (2) We introduce an n-gram based language model and a WFST-based decoder into WeNet 2.0, promoting the use of rich text data in production scenarios. (3) We design a unified contextual biasing framework, which leverages user-specific context (e.g., contact lists) to provide rapid adaptation ability for production and improves ASR accuracy in both with-LM and without-LM scenarios. (4) We design a unified IO to support large-scale data for effective model training. In summary, the brand-new WeNet 2.0 achieves up to 10\% relative recognition performance improvement over the original WeNet on various corpora and makes available several important production-oriented features. 最近，我们推出了WeNet，一个面向生产的端到端语音识别工具包，它引入了统一的双通道（U2）框架和内置运行时来解决单个模型中的流式和非流式解码模式。为了进一步提高 ASR 性能并满足各种生产需求，在本文中，我们提出了 WeNet 2.0 的四个重要更新。 （1）我们提出了U2++，一种具有双向注意解码器的统一两遍框架，其中包含从右到左注意解码器的未来上下文信息，以提高共享编码器的表示能力和重新评分阶段的性能。 (2)我们在WeNet 2.0中引入了基于n-gram的语言模型和基于WFST的解码器，促进了富文本数据在生产场景中的使用。 (3) 我们设计了一个统一的上下文偏差框架，它利用用户特定的上下文（例如联系人列表）为生产提供快速适应能力，并提高有 LM 和无 LM 场景下的 ASR 准确性。 (4)我们设计了统一的IO来支持大规模数据进行有效的模型训练。综上所述，全新的 WeNet 2.0 在各种语料库上比原始 WeNet 实现了高达 10% 的相对识别性能提升，并提供了一些重要的面向生产的功能。 本文介绍了WeNet 2.0，一个改进的端到端语音识别工具包，旨在提升语音识别性能并满足生产需求。 Binbin Zhang,Di Wu,Zhendong Peng,Xingchen Song,Zhuoyuan Yao,Hang Lv,Lei Xie,Chao Yang,Fuping Pan,Jianwei Niu cs.SD,cs.CL,eess.AS

authors_text: Minchan Kim,Myeonghun Jeong,Byoung Jin Choi,Sunghwan Ahn,Joun Yeop Lee,Nam Soo Kim
title: Transfer Learning Framework for Low-Resource Text-to-Speech using a Large-Scale Unlabeled Speech Corpus
title_zh: 使用大规模未标记语音语料库的低资源文本到语音的迁移学习框架
abstract: Training a text-to-speech (TTS) model requires a large scale text labeled speech corpus, which is troublesome to collect. In this paper, we propose a transfer learning framework for TTS that utilizes a large amount of unlabeled speech dataset for pre-training. By leveraging wav2vec2.0 representation, unlabeled speech can highly improve performance, especially in the lack of labeled speech. We also extend the proposed method to zero-shot multi-speaker TTS (ZS-TTS). The experimental results verify the effectiveness of the proposed method in terms of naturalness, intelligibility, and speaker generalization. We highlight that the single speaker TTS model fine-tuned on the only 10 minutes of labeled dataset outperforms the other baselines, and the ZS-TTS model fine-tuned on the only 30 minutes of single speaker dataset can generate the voice of the arbitrary speaker, by pre-training on unlabeled multi-speaker speech corpus.
summary: Training a text-to-speech (TTS) model requires a large scale text labeled speech corpus, which is troublesome to collect. In this paper, we propose a transfer learning framework for TTS that utilizes a large amount of unlabeled speech dataset for pre-training. By leveraging wav2vec2.0 representation, unlabeled speech can highly improve performance, especially in the lack of labeled speech. We also extend the proposed method to zero-shot multi-speaker TTS (ZS-TTS). The experimental results verify the effectiveness of the proposed method in terms of naturalness, intelligibility, and speaker generalization. We highlight that the single speaker TTS model fine-tuned on the only 10 minutes of labeled dataset outperforms the other baselines, and the ZS-TTS model fine-tuned on the only 30 minutes of single speaker dataset can generate the voice of the arbitrary speaker, by pre-training on unlabeled multi-speaker speech corpus.
abstract_zh: 训练文本转语音（TTS）模型需要大规模的文本标记语音语料库，收集起来很麻烦。在本文中，我们提出了一种 TTS 迁移学习框架，利用大量未标记的语音数据集进行预训练。通过利用 wav2vec2.0 表示，未标记语音可以极大地提高性能，尤其是在缺乏标记语音的情况下。我们还将所提出的方法扩展到零样本多说话者 TTS (ZS-TTS)。实验结果验证了该方法在自然度、清晰度和说话人泛化方面的有效性。我们强调，在仅 10 分钟的标记数据集上微调的单说话人 TTS 模型优于其他基线，而在仅 30 分钟的单说话人数据集上微调的 ZS-TTS 模型可以通过在未标记的多说话人语音语料库上进行预训练来生成任意说话人的声音。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于大规模未标记语音语料库的迁移学习框架，用于解决低资源文本到语音（TTS）生成问题。
AI.motivation: 传统TTS模型需要大量带标签的语音数据进行训练，但数据收集成本高且困难，尤其在低资源场景下性能受限。
AI.method: 利用wav2vec2.0预训练模型表征能力，通过未标记语音数据进行预训练，并扩展至零样本多说话人TTS（ZS-TTS）框架。
AI.result: 实验表明，单说话人TTS模型仅需10分钟标记数据即可超越基线，ZS-TTS模型在30分钟单说话人数据下可生成任意说话人语音。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过迁移学习有效利用未标记数据，在低资源场景下显著提升TTS性能，并支持多说话人语音生成。

authors_text: Anna Esposito,Vincenzo Capuano,Jiri Mekyska,Marcos Faundez-Zanuy
title: A Naturalistic Database of Thermal Emotional Facial Expressions and Effects of Induced Emotions on Memory
title_zh: 热情绪面部表情和诱发情绪对记忆影响的自然数据库
comment: 15 pages published in Esposito, A., Esposito, A.M., Vinciarelli, A., Hoffmann, R., Müller, V.C. (eds) Cognitive Behavioural Systems. Lecture Notes in Computer Science, vol 7403. Springer, Berlin, Heidelberg
comments: 15 pages published in Esposito, A., Esposito, A.M., Vinciarelli, A., Hoffmann, R., Müller, V.C. (eds) Cognitive Behavioural Systems. Lecture Notes in Computer Science, vol 7403. Springer, Berlin, Heidelberg
abstract: This work defines a procedure for collecting naturally induced emotional facial expressions through the vision of movie excerpts with high emotional contents and reports experimental data ascertaining the effects of emotions on memory word recognition tasks. The induced emotional states include the four basic emotions of sadness, disgust, happiness, and surprise, as well as the neutral emotional state. The resulting database contains both thermal and visible emotional facial expressions, portrayed by forty Italian subjects and simultaneously acquired by appropriately synchronizing a thermal and a standard visible camera. Each subject's recording session lasted 45 minutes, allowing for each mode (thermal or visible) to collect a minimum of 2000 facial expressions from which a minimum of 400 were selected as highly expressive of each emotion category. The database is available to the scientific community and can be obtained contacting one of the authors. For this pilot study, it was found that emotions and/or emotion categories do not affect individual performance on memory word recognition tasks and temperature changes in the face or in some regions of it do not discriminate among emotional states.
summary: This work defines a procedure for collecting naturally induced emotional facial expressions through the vision of movie excerpts with high emotional contents and reports experimental data ascertaining the effects of emotions on memory word recognition tasks. The induced emotional states include the four basic emotions of sadness, disgust, happiness, and surprise, as well as the neutral emotional state. The resulting database contains both thermal and visible emotional facial expressions, portrayed by forty Italian subjects and simultaneously acquired by appropriately synchronizing a thermal and a standard visible camera. Each subject's recording session lasted 45 minutes, allowing for each mode (thermal or visible) to collect a minimum of 2000 facial expressions from which a minimum of 400 were selected as highly expressive of each emotion category. The database is available to the scientific community and can be obtained contacting one of the authors. For this pilot study, it was found that emotions and/or emotion categories do not affect individual performance on memory word recognition tasks and temperature changes in the face or in some regions of it do not discriminate among emotional states.
abstract_zh: 这项工作定义了一种通过观看具有高情感内容的电影摘录的视觉来收集自然诱发的情感面部表情的程序，并报告了确定情感对记忆词识别任务的影响的实验数据。诱发的情绪状态包括悲伤、厌恶、快乐、惊讶四种基本情绪以及中性情绪状态。由此产生的数据库包含热和可见的情感面部表情，由四十名意大利受试者描绘，并通过适当同步热和标准可见光相机同时获取。每个受试者的记录持续 45 分钟，每种模式（热或可见）可以收集至少 2000 个面部表情，其中至少选择 400 个面部表情，作为每个情绪类别的高度表达。该数据库可供科学界使用，并且可以联系其中一位作者获取。对于这项试点研究，发现情绪和/或情绪类别不会影响记忆词识别任务的个人表现，并且面部或某些区域的温度变化不会区分情绪状态。

AI.tldr: 该论文构建了一个包含热成像和可见光情感面部表情的数据库，并研究情绪对记忆任务的影响。
AI.motivation: 旨在通过自然诱导的情绪面部表情数据库，探索情绪状态对记忆任务的影响，并为情绪识别研究提供多模态数据支持。
AI.method: 通过播放高情感电影片段诱导四种基本情绪（悲伤、厌恶、快乐、惊讶）及中性状态，使用同步热成像仪和可见光相机记录40名意大利受试者的面部表情，每种模式采集至少2000个表情并筛选400个典型样本。
AI.result: 实验发现情绪类别对记忆单词识别任务无显著影响，面部温度变化也无法区分不同情绪状态。
AI.conclusion: 该数据库为情绪研究提供了新资源，但初步研究未发现情绪对记忆任务的显著影响，也未发现热成像数据可有效区分情绪状态。

ai_content_json.method: 通过播放高情感电影片段诱导四种基本情绪（悲伤、厌恶、快乐、惊讶）及中性状态，使用同步热成像仪和可见光相机记录40名意大利受试者的面部表情，每种模式采集至少2000个表情并筛选400个典型样本。
ai_content_json.result: 实验发现情绪类别对记忆单词识别任务无显著影响，面部温度变化也无法区分不同情绪状态。
ai_content_json.conclusion: 该数据库为情绪研究提供了新资源，但初步研究未发现情绪对记忆任务的显著影响，也未发现热成像数据可有效区分情绪状态。

search_text: A Naturalistic Database of Thermal Emotional Facial Expressions and Effects of Induced Emotions on Memory 热情绪面部表情和诱发情绪对记忆影响的自然数据库 This work defines a procedure for collecting naturally induced emotional facial expressions through the vision of movie excerpts with high emotional contents and reports experimental data ascertaining the effects of emotions on memory word recognition tasks. The induced emotional states include the four basic emotions of sadness, disgust, happiness, and surprise, as well as the neutral emotional state. The resulting database contains both thermal and visible emotional facial expressions, portrayed by forty Italian subjects and simultaneously acquired by appropriately synchronizing a thermal and a standard visible camera. Each subject's recording session lasted 45 minutes, allowing for each mode (thermal or visible) to collect a minimum of 2000 facial expressions from which a minimum of 400 were selected as highly expressive of each emotion category. The database is available to the scientific community and can be obtained contacting one of the authors. For this pilot study, it was found that emotions and/or emotion categories do not affect individual performance on memory word recognition tasks and temperature changes in the face or in some regions of it do not discriminate among emotional states. 这项工作定义了一种通过观看具有高情感内容的电影摘录的视觉来收集自然诱发的情感面部表情的程序，并报告了确定情感对记忆词识别任务的影响的实验数据。诱发的情绪状态包括悲伤、厌恶、快乐、惊讶四种基本情绪以及中性情绪状态。由此产生的数据库包含热和可见的情感面部表情，由四十名意大利受试者描绘，并通过适当同步热和标准可见光相机同时获取。每个受试者的记录持续 45 分钟，每种模式（热或可见）可以收集至少 2000 个面部表情，其中至少选择 400 个面部表情，作为每个情绪类别的高度表达。该数据库可供科学界使用，并且可以联系其中一位作者获取。对于这项试点研究，发现情绪和/或情绪类别不会影响记忆词识别任务的个人表现，并且面部或某些区域的温度变化不会区分情绪状态。 该论文构建了一个包含热成像和可见光情感面部表情的数据库，并研究情绪对记忆任务的影响。 Anna Esposito,Vincenzo Capuano,Jiri Mekyska,Marcos Faundez-Zanuy cs.CV

authors_text: Jiabo Ye,Junfeng Tian,Ming Yan,Xiaoshan Yang,Xuwu Wang,Ji Zhang,Liang He,Xin Lin
title: Shifting More Attention to Visual Backbone: Query-modulated Refinement Networks for End-to-End Visual Grounding
title_zh: 将更多注意力转移到视觉主干：用于端到端视觉基础的查询调制细化网络
abstract: Visual grounding focuses on establishing fine-grained alignment between vision and natural language, which has essential applications in multimodal reasoning systems. Existing methods use pre-trained query-agnostic visual backbones to extract visual feature maps independently without considering the query information. We argue that the visual features extracted from the visual backbones and the features really needed for multimodal reasoning are inconsistent. One reason is that there are differences between pre-training tasks and visual grounding. Moreover, since the backbones are query-agnostic, it is difficult to completely avoid the inconsistency issue by training the visual backbone end-to-end in the visual grounding framework. In this paper, we propose a Query-modulated Refinement Network (QRNet) to address the inconsistent issue by adjusting intermediate features in the visual backbone with a novel Query-aware Dynamic Attention (QD-ATT) mechanism and query-aware multiscale fusion. The QD-ATT can dynamically compute query-dependent visual attention at the spatial and channel levels of the feature maps produced by the visual backbone. We apply the QRNet to an end-to-end visual grounding framework. Extensive experiments show that the proposed method outperforms state-of-the-art methods on five widely used datasets.
summary: Visual grounding focuses on establishing fine-grained alignment between vision and natural language, which has essential applications in multimodal reasoning systems. Existing methods use pre-trained query-agnostic visual backbones to extract visual feature maps independently without considering the query information. We argue that the visual features extracted from the visual backbones and the features really needed for multimodal reasoning are inconsistent. One reason is that there are differences between pre-training tasks and visual grounding. Moreover, since the backbones are query-agnostic, it is difficult to completely avoid the inconsistency issue by training the visual backbone end-to-end in the visual grounding framework. In this paper, we propose a Query-modulated Refinement Network (QRNet) to address the inconsistent issue by adjusting intermediate features in the visual backbone with a novel Query-aware Dynamic Attention (QD-ATT) mechanism and query-aware multiscale fusion. The QD-ATT can dynamically compute query-dependent visual attention at the spatial and channel levels of the feature maps produced by the visual backbone. We apply the QRNet to an end-to-end visual grounding framework. Extensive experiments show that the proposed method outperforms state-of-the-art methods on five widely used datasets.
abstract_zh: 视觉基础侧重于在视觉和自然语言之间建立细粒度的对齐，这在多模态推理系统中具有重要的应用。现有方法使用预先训练的与查询无关的视觉主干来独立提取视觉特征图，而不考虑查询信息。我们认为从视觉主干中提取的视觉特征与多模态推理真正需要的特征不一致。原因之一是预训练任务和视觉基础之间存在差异。此外，由于主干与查询无关，因此很难通过在视觉基础框架中端到端地训练视觉主干来完全避免不一致问题。在本文中，我们提出了一种查询调制细化网络（QRNet），通过使用新颖的查询感知动态注意（QD-ATT）机制和查询感知多尺度融合调整视觉主干中的中间特征来解决不一致问题。 QD-ATT 可以在视觉主干生成的特征图的空间和通道级别上动态计算依赖于查询的视觉注意力。我们将 QRNet 应用于端到端视觉基础框架。大量实验表明，所提出的方法在五个广泛使用的数据集上优于最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于查询调制的细化网络（QRNet），用于解决视觉基础任务中视觉主干网络与查询信息不一致的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法使用预训练的查询无关视觉主干网络提取特征，导致视觉特征与多模态推理所需特征不一致，且端到端训练难以完全解决这一问题。
AI.method: 设计Query-aware Dynamic Attention（QD-ATT）机制和多尺度融合模块，动态调整视觉主干网络的中间特征，使其适应查询信息。
AI.result: 在五个常用数据集上，该方法优于现有最先进方法，验证了有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过查询调制细化网络，可有效提升视觉基础任务中视觉与语言对齐的一致性，推动端到端多模态推理发展。

authors_text: Subhrajyoti Dasgupta,Arindam Das,Senthil Yogamani,Sudip Das,Ciaran Eising,Andrei Bursuc,Ujjwal Bhattacharya
title: UnShadowNet: Illumination Critic Guided Contrastive Learning For Shadow Removal
title_zh: UnShadowNet：照明评论家指导阴影去除的对比学习
comment: Accepted for publication at IEEE Access, vol. 11, pp. 87760-87774, 2023
comments: Accepted for publication at IEEE Access, vol. 11, pp. 87760-87774, 2023
abstract: Shadows are frequently encountered natural phenomena that significantly hinder the performance of computer vision perception systems in practical settings, e.g., autonomous driving. A solution to this would be to eliminate shadow regions from the images before the processing of the perception system. Yet, training such a solution requires pairs of aligned shadowed and non-shadowed images which are difficult to obtain. We introduce a novel weakly supervised shadow removal framework UnShadowNet trained using contrastive learning. It is composed of a DeShadower network responsible for the removal of the extracted shadow under the guidance of an Illumination network which is trained adversarially by the illumination critic and a Refinement network to further remove artefacts. We show that UnShadowNet can be easily extended to a fully-supervised set-up to exploit the ground-truth when available. UnShadowNet outperforms existing state-of-the-art approaches on three publicly available shadow datasets (ISTD, adjusted ISTD, SRD) in both the weakly and fully supervised setups.
summary: Shadows are frequently encountered natural phenomena that significantly hinder the performance of computer vision perception systems in practical settings, e.g., autonomous driving. A solution to this would be to eliminate shadow regions from the images before the processing of the perception system. Yet, training such a solution requires pairs of aligned shadowed and non-shadowed images which are difficult to obtain. We introduce a novel weakly supervised shadow removal framework UnShadowNet trained using contrastive learning. It is composed of a DeShadower network responsible for the removal of the extracted shadow under the guidance of an Illumination network which is trained adversarially by the illumination critic and a Refinement network to further remove artefacts. We show that UnShadowNet can be easily extended to a fully-supervised set-up to exploit the ground-truth when available. UnShadowNet outperforms existing state-of-the-art approaches on three publicly available shadow datasets (ISTD, adjusted ISTD, SRD) in both the weakly and fully supervised setups.
abstract_zh: 阴影是经常遇到的自然现象，它会严重阻碍计算机视觉感知系统在实际环境（例如自动驾驶）中的性能。解决这个问题的方法是在感知系统处理之前消除图像中的阴影区域。然而，训练这样的解决方案需要成对对齐的阴影和非阴影图像，而这是很难获得的。我们引入了一种新颖的弱监督阴影去除框架 UnShadowNet，该框架使用对比学习进行训练。它由一个 DeShadower 网络组成，负责在照明网络的指导下去除提取的阴影，照明网络由照明批评家进行对抗性训练，而细化网络则进一步去除伪影。我们表明，UnShadowNet 可以轻松扩展到完全监督的设置，以在可用时利用真实情况。在弱监督和完全监督设置中，UnShadowNet 在三个公开可用的影子数据集（ISTD、调整后的 ISTD、SRD）上均优于现有最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为UnShadowNet的弱监督阴影去除框架，通过对比学习和对抗训练实现阴影区域的自动移除。
AI.motivation: 阴影会严重影响计算机视觉系统的性能，但获取成对的带阴影与无阴影图像用于训练的成本较高，现有方法依赖大量标注数据。
AI.method: 构建包含DeShadower网络（负责阴影去除）、光照网络（通过光照评论家对抗训练）和Refinement网络（消除伪影）的框架，利用对比学习实现弱监督训练，并可扩展为全监督模式。
AI.result: 在ISTD、调整ISTD和SRD三个公开数据集上，UnShadowNet在弱监督和全监督设置下均优于现有最先进的方法。
AI.conclusion: UnShadowNet通过创新的网络结构和训练策略，有效解决了阴影去除中数据获取困难的问题，具有广泛的应用前景。

It is composed of a DeShadower network responsible for the removal of the extracted shadow under the guidance of an Illumination network which is trained adversarially by the illumination critic and a Refinement network to further remove artefacts. We show that UnShadowNet can be easily extended to a fully-supervised set-up to exploit the ground-truth when available. UnShadowNet outperforms existing state-of-the-art approaches on three publicly available shadow datasets (ISTD, adjusted ISTD, SRD) in both the weakly and fully supervised setups. 阴影是经常遇到的自然现象，它会严重阻碍计算机视觉感知系统在实际环境（例如自动驾驶）中的性能。解决这个问题的方法是在感知系统处理之前消除图像中的阴影区域。然而，训练这样的解决方案需要成对对齐的阴影和非阴影图像，而这是很难获得的。我们引入了一种新颖的弱监督阴影去除框架 UnShadowNet，该框架使用对比学习进行训练。它由一个 DeShadower 网络组成，负责在照明网络的指导下去除提取的阴影，照明网络由照明批评家进行对抗性训练，而细化网络则进一步去除伪影。我们表明，UnShadowNet 可以轻松扩展到完全监督的设置，以在可用时利用真实情况。在弱监督和完全监督设置中，UnShadowNet 在三个公开可用的影子数据集（ISTD、调整后的 ISTD、SRD）上均优于现有最先进的方法。 本文提出一种名为UnShadowNet的弱监督阴影去除框架，通过对比学习和对抗训练实现阴影区域的自动移除。 Subhrajyoti Dasgupta,Arindam Das,Senthil Yogamani,Sudip Das,Ciaran Eising,Andrei Bursuc,Ujjwal Bhattacharya cs.CV,cs.RO

authors_text: Mingjun Li,Jianlei Yang,Yingjie Qi,Meng Dong,Yuhao Yang,Runze Liu,Weitao Pan,Bei Yu,Weisheng Zhao
title: Eventor: An Efficient Event-Based Monocular Multi-View Stereo Accelerator on FPGA Platform
title_zh: Eventor：FPGA 平台上高效的基于事件的单目多视图立体加速器
abstract: Event cameras are bio-inspired vision sensors that asynchronously represent pixel-level brightness changes as event streams. Event-based monocular multi-view stereo (EMVS) is a technique that exploits the event streams to estimate semi-dense 3D structure with known trajectory. It is a critical task for event-based monocular SLAM. However, the required intensive computation workloads make it challenging for real-time deployment on embedded platforms. In this paper, Eventor is proposed as a fast and efficient EMVS accelerator by realizing the most critical and time-consuming stages including event back-projection and volumetric ray-counting on FPGA. Highly paralleled and fully pipelined processing elements are specially designed via FPGA and integrated with the embedded ARM as a heterogeneous system to improve the throughput and reduce the memory footprint. Meanwhile, the EMVS algorithm is reformulated to a more hardware-friendly manner by rescheduling, approximate computing and hybrid data quantization. Evaluation results on DAVIS dataset show that Eventor achieves up to $24\times$ improvement in energy efficiency compared with Intel i5 CPU platform.
summary: Event cameras are bio-inspired vision sensors that asynchronously represent pixel-level brightness changes as event streams. Event-based monocular multi-view stereo (EMVS) is a technique that exploits the event streams to estimate semi-dense 3D structure with known trajectory. It is a critical task for event-based monocular SLAM. However, the required intensive computation workloads make it challenging for real-time deployment on embedded platforms. In this paper, Eventor is proposed as a fast and efficient EMVS accelerator by realizing the most critical and time-consuming stages including event back-projection and volumetric ray-counting on FPGA. Highly paralleled and fully pipelined processing elements are specially designed via FPGA and integrated with the embedded ARM as a heterogeneous system to improve the throughput and reduce the memory footprint. Meanwhile, the EMVS algorithm is reformulated to a more hardware-friendly manner by rescheduling, approximate computing and hybrid data quantization. Evaluation results on DAVIS dataset show that Eventor achieves up to $24\times$ improvement in energy efficiency compared with Intel i5 CPU platform.
abstract_zh: 事件相机是仿生视觉传感器，可将像素级亮度变化异步表示为事件流。基于事件的单目多视立体 (EMVS) 是一种利用事件流来估计具有已知轨迹的半密集 3D 结构的技术。这是基于事件的单目 SLAM 的一项关键任务。然而，所需的密集计算工作负载给嵌入式平台上的实时部署带来了挑战。在本文中，Eventor 被提出作为一种快速高效的 EMVS 加速器，通过在 FPGA 上实现最关键和最耗时的阶段（包括事件反投影和体积射线计数）。高度并行和全流水线处理元件通过 FPGA 专门设计，并与嵌入式 ARM 集成为异构系统，以提高吞吐量并减少内存占用。同时，通过重新调度、近似计算和混合数据量化，将EMVS算法重新表述为更加硬件友好的方式。 DAVIS 数据集的评估结果显示，与 Intel i5 CPU 平台相比，Eventor 在能效方面实现了高达 24 倍的提升。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Eventor，一种基于FPGA平台的高效事件驱动单目多视图立体视觉加速器，用于解决事件相机在实时嵌入式系统中的计算挑战。
AI.motivation: 事件相机的事件驱动单目多视图立体视觉（EMVS）技术因计算量大，难以在嵌入式平台实现实时部署，需寻求高效硬件加速方案。
AI.method: 通过FPGA实现事件反投影和体素射线计数等关键阶段，设计高度并行化流水线处理单元，结合ARM异构系统，并对算法进行重调度、近似计算和混合数据量化优化。
AI.result: 在DAVIS数据集上，Eventor相较Intel i5 CPU平台能效提升达24倍。
AI.conclusion: Eventor通过硬件加速与算法优化有效提升了EMVS的实时性与能效，为事件相机在嵌入式SLAM中的应用提供了可行方案。

authors_text: Girisha S,Ujjwal Verma,Manohara Pai M M,Radhika M Pai
title: Contextual Information Based Anomaly Detection for a Multi-Scene UAV Aerial Videos
title_zh: 基于上下文信息的多场景无人机航拍视频异常检测
abstract: UAV based surveillance is gaining much interest worldwide due to its extensive applications in monitoring wildlife, urban planning, disaster management, campus security, etc. These videos are analyzed for strange/odd/anomalous patterns which are essential aspects of surveillance. But manual analysis of these videos is tedious and laborious. Hence, the development of computer-aided systems for the analysis of UAV based surveillance videos is crucial. Despite this interest, in literature, several computer aided systems are developed focusing only on CCTV based surveillance videos. These methods are designed for single scene scenarios and lack contextual knowledge which is required for multi-scene scenarios. Furthermore, the lack of standard UAV based anomaly detection datasets limits the development of these systems. In this regard, the present work aims at the development of a Computer Aided Decision support system to analyse UAV based surveillance videos. A new UAV based multi-scene anomaly detection dataset is developed with frame-level annotations for the development of computer aided systems. It holistically uses contextual, temporal and appearance features for accurate detection of anomalies. Furthermore, a new inference strategy is proposed that utilizes few anomalous samples along with normal samples to identify better decision boundaries. The proposed method is extensively evaluated on the UAV based anomaly detection dataset and performed competitively with respect to state-of-the-art methods.
summary: UAV based surveillance is gaining much interest worldwide due to its extensive applications in monitoring wildlife, urban planning, disaster management, campus security, etc. These videos are analyzed for strange/odd/anomalous patterns which are essential aspects of surveillance. But manual analysis of these videos is tedious and laborious. Hence, the development of computer-aided systems for the analysis of UAV based surveillance videos is crucial. Despite this interest, in literature, several computer aided systems are developed focusing only on CCTV based surveillance videos. These methods are designed for single scene scenarios and lack contextual knowledge which is required for multi-scene scenarios. Furthermore, the lack of standard UAV based anomaly detection datasets limits the development of these systems. In this regard, the present work aims at the development of a Computer Aided Decision support system to analyse UAV based surveillance videos. A new UAV based multi-scene anomaly detection dataset is developed with frame-level annotations for the development of computer aided systems. It holistically uses contextual, temporal and appearance features for accurate detection of anomalies. Furthermore, a new inference strategy is proposed that utilizes few anomalous samples along with normal samples to identify better decision boundaries. The proposed method is extensively evaluated on the UAV based anomaly detection dataset and performed competitively with respect to state-of-the-art methods.
abstract_zh: 基于无人机的监控因其在野生动物监测、城市规划、灾害管理、校园安全等方面的广泛应用而在全世界范围内引起了广泛关注。对这些视频进行分析以找出奇怪/奇怪/异常的模式，这是监控的重要方面。但人工分析这些视频既繁琐又费力。因此，开发用于分析无人机监控视频的计算机辅助系统至关重要。尽管有这种兴趣，但在文献中，开发了几种计算机辅助系统，仅专注于基于闭路电视的监控视频。这些方法是为单场景场景设计的，缺乏多场景场景所需的上下文知识。此外，缺乏基于标准无人机的异常检测数据集限制了这些系统的发展。在这方面，目前的工作旨在开发计算机辅助决策支持系统来分析基于无人机的监控视频。开发了一种新的基于无人机的多场景异常检测数据集，具有帧级注释，用于计算机辅助系统的开发。它整体使用上下文、时间和外观特征来准确检测异常。此外，提出了一种新的推理策略，利用少量异常样本和正常样本来识别更好的决策边界。所提出的方法在基于无人机的异常检测数据集上进行了广泛的评估，并且与最先进的方法相比具有竞争力。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在开发一个计算机辅助决策支持系统，用于分析无人机航拍视频中的异常行为，并构建新的多场景异常检测数据集。
AI.motivation: 现有方法多针对CCTV视频且仅适用于单场景，缺乏多场景所需的上下文知识，同时缺少标准无人机异常检测数据集，限制了系统发展。
AI.method: 融合上下文、时序和外观特征，提出利用少量异常样本与正常样本的新型推理策略，构建包含帧级标注的多场景无人机异常检测数据集。
AI.result: 所提方法在自建数据集上评估表现与现有先进方法具有竞争力，验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过结合多维特征与新型推理策略，本文为无人机视频异常检测提供了有效解决方案，并为后续研究提供了标准化数据支持。

authors_text: Hannah Kniesel,Timo Ropinski,Tim Bergner,Kavitha Shaga Devan,Clarissa Read,Paul Walther,Tobias Ritschel,Pedro Hermosilla
title: Clean Implicit 3D Structure from Noisy 2D STEM Images
title_zh: 从嘈杂的 2D STEM 图像中清理隐式 3D 结构
abstract: Scanning Transmission Electron Microscopes (STEMs) acquire 2D images of a 3D sample on the scale of individual cell components. Unfortunately, these 2D images can be too noisy to be fused into a useful 3D structure and facilitating good denoisers is challenging due to the lack of clean-noisy pairs. Additionally, representing a detailed 3D structure can be difficult even for clean data when using regular 3D grids. Addressing these two limitations, we suggest a differentiable image formation model for STEM, allowing to learn a joint model of 2D sensor noise in STEM together with an implicit 3D model. We show, that the combination of these models are able to successfully disentangle 3D signal and noise without supervision and outperform at the same time several baselines on synthetic and real data.
summary: Scanning Transmission Electron Microscopes (STEMs) acquire 2D images of a 3D sample on the scale of individual cell components. Unfortunately, these 2D images can be too noisy to be fused into a useful 3D structure and facilitating good denoisers is challenging due to the lack of clean-noisy pairs. Additionally, representing a detailed 3D structure can be difficult even for clean data when using regular 3D grids. Addressing these two limitations, we suggest a differentiable image formation model for STEM, allowing to learn a joint model of 2D sensor noise in STEM together with an implicit 3D model. We show, that the combination of these models are able to successfully disentangle 3D signal and noise without supervision and outperform at the same time several baselines on synthetic and real data.
abstract_zh: 扫描透射电子显微镜 (STEM) 可获取单个细胞成分规模的 3D 样品的 2D 图像。不幸的是，这些 2D 图像可能噪声太大，无法融合到有用的 3D 结构中，并且由于缺乏干净噪声对，促进良好的降噪器具有挑战性。此外，在使用常规 3D 网格时，即使对于干净的数据，表示详细的 3D 结构也可能很困难。为了解决这两个限制，我们提出了一种用于 STEM 的可微分图像形成模型，允许学习 STEM 中 2D 传感器噪声的联合模型以及隐式 3D 模型。我们证明，这些模型的组合能够在没有监督的情况下成功地解开 3D 信号和噪声，并且同时优于合成数据和真实数据的多个基线。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种从噪声2D STEM图像中重建干净隐式3D结构的方法，解决传统方法在去噪和3D表示上的不足。
AI.motivation: STEM图像噪声严重且缺乏干净-噪声配对数据，传统3D网格表示难以捕捉复杂结构，需新方法同时处理去噪与建模。
AI.method: 设计可微分STEM图像形成模型，联合学习2D传感器噪声特性与隐式3D表示，实现无监督的信号-噪声分离。
AI.result: 方法在合成与真实数据上均优于基线，成功重建高质量3D结构并有效抑制噪声。
AI.conclusion: 通过联合建模噪声与隐式3D结构，提出的方法为STEM图像的无监督3D重建提供了有效解决方案。

search_text: Clean Implicit 3D Structure from Noisy 2D STEM Images 从嘈杂的 2D STEM 图像中清理隐式 3D 结构 Scanning Transmission Electron Microscopes (STEMs) acquire 2D images of a 3D sample on the scale of individual cell components. Unfortunately, these 2D images can be too noisy to be fused into a useful 3D structure and facilitating good denoisers is challenging due to the lack of clean-noisy pairs. Additionally, representing a detailed 3D structure can be difficult even for clean data when using regular 3D grids. Addressing these two limitations, we suggest a differentiable image formation model for STEM, allowing to learn a joint model of 2D sensor noise in STEM together with an implicit 3D model. We show, that the combination of these models are able to successfully disentangle 3D signal and noise without supervision and outperform at the same time several baselines on synthetic and real data. 扫描透射电子显微镜 (STEM) 可获取单个细胞成分规模的 3D 样品的 2D 图像。不幸的是，这些 2D 图像可能噪声太大，无法融合到有用的 3D 结构中，并且由于缺乏干净噪声对，促进良好的降噪器具有挑战性。此外，在使用常规 3D 网格时，即使对于干净的数据，表示详细的 3D 结构也可能很困难。为了解决这两个限制，我们提出了一种用于 STEM 的可微分图像形成模型，允许学习 STEM 中 2D 传感器噪声的联合模型以及隐式 3D 模型。我们证明，这些模型的组合能够在没有监督的情况下成功地解开 3D 信号和噪声，并且同时优于合成数据和真实数据的多个基线。 本文提出一种从噪声2D STEM图像中重建干净隐式3D结构的方法，解决传统方法在去噪和3D表示上的不足。 Hannah Kniesel,Timo Ropinski,Tim Bergner,Kavitha Shaga Devan,Clarissa Read,Paul Walther,Tobias Ritschel,Pedro Hermosilla eess.IV,cs.CV

authors_text: Lester Phillip Violeta,Wen-Chin Huang,Tomoki Toda
title: Investigating Self-supervised Pretraining Frameworks for Pathological Speech Recognition
title_zh: 研究病理语音识别的自监督预训练框架
abstract: We investigate the performance of self-supervised pretraining frameworks on pathological speech datasets used for automatic speech recognition (ASR). Modern end-to-end models require thousands of hours of data to train well, but only a small number of pathological speech datasets are publicly available. A proven solution to this problem is by first pretraining the model on a huge number of healthy speech datasets and then fine-tuning it on the pathological speech datasets. One new pretraining framework called self-supervised learning (SSL) trains a network using only speech data, providing more flexibility in training data requirements and allowing more speech data to be used in pretraining. We investigate SSL frameworks such as the wav2vec 2.0 and WavLM models using different setups and compare their performance with different supervised pretraining setups, using two types of pathological speech, namely, Japanese electrolaryngeal and English dysarthric. Our results show that although SSL has shown success with minimally resourced healthy speech, we do not find this to be the case with pathological speech. The best supervised setup outperforms the best SSL setup by 13.9% character error rate in electrolaryngeal speech and 16.8% word error rate in dysarthric speech.
summary: We investigate the performance of self-supervised pretraining frameworks on pathological speech datasets used for automatic speech recognition (ASR). Modern end-to-end models require thousands of hours of data to train well, but only a small number of pathological speech datasets are publicly available. A proven solution to this problem is by first pretraining the model on a huge number of healthy speech datasets and then fine-tuning it on the pathological speech datasets. One new pretraining framework called self-supervised learning (SSL) trains a network using only speech data, providing more flexibility in training data requirements and allowing more speech data to be used in pretraining. We investigate SSL frameworks such as the wav2vec 2.0 and WavLM models using different setups and compare their performance with different supervised pretraining setups, using two types of pathological speech, namely, Japanese electrolaryngeal and English dysarthric. Our results show that although SSL has shown success with minimally resourced healthy speech, we do not find this to be the case with pathological speech. The best supervised setup outperforms the best SSL setup by 13.9% character error rate in electrolaryngeal speech and 16.8% word error rate in dysarthric speech.
abstract_zh: 我们研究了用于自动语音识别（ASR）的病态语音数据集上的自监督预训练框架的性能。现代端到端模型需要数千小时的数据才能很好地训练，但只有少量病态语音数据集是公开的。该问题的一个经过验证的解决方案是首先在大量健康语音数据集上对模型进行预训练，然后在病态语音数据集上对其进行微调。一种称为自监督学习 (SSL) 的新预训练框架仅使用语音数据来训练网络，从而在训练数据要求方面提供更大的灵活性，并允许在预训练中使用更多语音数据。我们使用不同的设置研究了 SSL 框架，例如 wav2vec 2.0 和 WavLM 模型，并使用两种类型的病态语音（即日语电喉音和英语构音障碍）将它们的性能与不同的监督预训练设置进行比较。我们的结果表明，尽管 SSL 在资源最少的健康语音方面取得了成功，但我们发现病态语音的情况并非如此。最佳监督设置优于最佳 SSL 设置，电喉语音中的字符错误率为 13.9%，构音障碍语音中的单词错误率为 16.8%。

AI.tldr: 本文研究自监督预训练框架在病理语音识别中的性能，比较其与监督预训练方法在两种病理语音数据集上的效果差异。
AI.motivation: 病理语音数据集稀缺且训练数据不足，而自监督学习（SSL）在健康语音中表现良好，但其在病理语音中的有效性尚未明确。
AI.method: 采用SSL框架（如wav2vec 2.0和WavLM）及监督预训练方法，在日本电声门语音和英语运动性失语语音数据集上进行对比实验。
AI.result: SSL方法在病理语音任务中表现劣于监督预训练，后者在电声门语音上低13.9%字符错误率，在运动性失语语音上低16.8%词错误率。
AI.conclusion: 自监督学习在健康语音有效，但未在病理语音中展现优势，需进一步优化SSL方法以适应病理语音特性。
