authors_text: Sahel Torkamani,Javad B. Ebrahimi,Parastoo Sadeghi,Rafael G. L. D'Oliveira,Muriel Medard
title: Heterogeneous Differential Privacy via Graphs
title_zh: 通过图的异构差分隐私
abstract: We generalize a previous framework for designing utility-optimal differentially private (DP) mechanisms via graphs, where datasets are vertices in the graph and edges represent dataset neighborhood. The boundary set contains datasets where an individual's response changes the binary-valued query compared to its neighbors. Previous work was limited to the homogeneous case where the privacy parameter $\varepsilon$ across all datasets was the same and the mechanism at boundary datasets was identical. In our work, the mechanism can take different distributions at the boundary and the privacy parameter $\varepsilon$ is a function of neighboring datasets, which recovers an earlier definition of personalized DP as special case. The problem is how to extend the mechanism, which is only defined at the boundary set, to other datasets in the graph in a computationally efficient and utility optimal manner. Using the concept of strongest induced DP condition we solve this problem efficiently in polynomial time (in the size of the graph).
summary: We generalize a previous framework for designing utility-optimal differentially private (DP) mechanisms via graphs, where datasets are vertices in the graph and edges represent dataset neighborhood. The boundary set contains datasets where an individual's response changes the binary-valued query compared to its neighbors. Previous work was limited to the homogeneous case where the privacy parameter $\varepsilon$ across all datasets was the same and the mechanism at boundary datasets was identical. In our work, the mechanism can take different distributions at the boundary and the privacy parameter $\varepsilon$ is a function of neighboring datasets, which recovers an earlier definition of personalized DP as special case. The problem is how to extend the mechanism, which is only defined at the boundary set, to other datasets in the graph in a computationally efficient and utility optimal manner. Using the concept of strongest induced DP condition we solve this problem efficiently in polynomial time (in the size of the graph).
abstract_zh: 我们概括了之前通过图设计效用最优差分隐私（DP）机制的框架，其中数据集是图中的顶点，边代表数据集邻域。边界集包含个人响应与其邻居相比改变二进制值查询的数据集。以前的工作仅限于同质情况，其中所有数据集的隐私参数 $\varepsilon$ 相同，并且边界数据集的机制相同。在我们的工作中，该机制可以在边界处采取不同的分布，并且隐私参数 $\varepsilon$ 是相邻数据集的函数，它恢复了个性化 DP 的早期定义作为特例。问题是如何以计算高效且效用最优的方式将仅在边界集定义的机制扩展到图中的其他数据集。使用最强诱导 DP 条件的概念，我们在多项式时间内（以图的大小）有效地解决了这个问题。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于图结构的异构差分隐私机制，允许隐私参数ε根据数据集的邻域动态变化，并通过边界集扩展机制以实现计算效率和效用最优。
AI.motivation: 传统差分隐私机制要求所有数据集使用相同的隐私参数ε，限制了个性化隐私保护能力。本文旨在通过图结构建模数据集关系，实现更灵活的隐私参数分配。
AI.method: 利用图的边界集概念和最强诱导差分隐私条件，通过多项式时间算法将边界机制扩展至全图，支持异构隐私参数分配。
AI.result: 提出的方法在保证隐私性的同时实现了计算效率和效用最优，可退化为个性化差分隐私的特例。
AI.conclusion: 该工作通过图结构建模和边界条件扩展，为异构差分隐私提供了理论框架和高效算法，拓展了差分隐私的应用场景。

tldr: 本文提出了一种基于图结构的异构差分隐私机制，允许隐私参数ε根据数据集的邻域动态变化，并通过边界集扩展机制以实现计算效率和效用最优。
motivation: 传统差分隐私机制要求所有数据集使用相同的隐私参数ε，限制了个性化隐私保护能力。本文旨在通过图结构建模数据集关系，实现更灵活的隐私参数分配。
method: 利用图的边界集概念和最强诱导差分隐私条件，通过多项式时间算法将边界机制扩展至全图，支持异构隐私参数分配。
result: 提出的方法在保证隐私性的同时实现了计算效率和效用最优，可退化为个性化差分隐私的特例。
conclusion: 该工作通过图结构建模和边界条件扩展，为异构差分隐私提供了理论框架和高效算法，拓展了差分隐私的应用场景。
search_text: Heterogeneous Differential Privacy via Graphs 通过图的异构差分隐私 We generalize a previous framework for designing utility-optimal differentially private (DP) mechanisms via graphs, where datasets are vertices in the graph and edges represent dataset neighborhood. The boundary set contains datasets where an individual's response changes the binary-valued query compared to its neighbors. Previous work was limited to the homogeneous case where the privacy parameter $\varepsilon$ across all datasets was the same and the mechanism at boundary datasets was identical. In our work, the mechanism can take different distributions at the boundary and the privacy parameter $\varepsilon$ is a function of neighboring datasets, which recovers an earlier definition of personalized DP as special case. The problem is how to extend the mechanism, which is only defined at the boundary set, to other datasets in the graph in a computationally efficient and utility optimal manner. Using the concept of strongest induced DP condition we solve this problem efficiently in polynomial time (in the size of the graph). 我们概括了之前通过图设计效用最优差分隐私（DP）机制的框架，其中数据集是图中的顶点，边代表数据集邻域。边界集包含个人响应与其邻居相比改变二进制值查询的数据集。以前的工作仅限于同质情况，其中所有数据集的隐私参数 $\varepsilon$ 相同，并且边界数据集的机制相同。在我们的工作中，该机制可以在边界处采取不同的分布，并且隐私参数 $\varepsilon$ 是相邻数据集的函数，它恢复了个性化 DP 的早期定义作为特例。问题是如何以计算高效且效用最优的方式将仅在边界集定义的机制扩展到图中的其他数据集。使用最强诱导 DP 条件的概念，我们在多项式时间内（以图的大小）有效地解决了这个问题。 本文提出了一种基于图结构的异构差分隐私机制，允许隐私参数ε根据数据集的邻域动态变化，并通过边界集扩展机制以实现计算效率和效用最优。 Sahel Torkamani,Javad B. Ebrahimi,Parastoo Sadeghi,Rafael G. L. D'Oliveira,Muriel Medard cs.DS,cs.IT

authors_text: Dawit Mureja Argaw,In So Kweon
title: Long-term Video Frame Interpolation via Feature Propagation
title_zh: 通过特征传播进行长期视频帧插值
abstract: Video frame interpolation (VFI) works generally predict intermediate frame(s) by first estimating the motion between inputs and then warping the inputs to the target time with the estimated motion. This approach, however, is not optimal when the temporal distance between the input sequence increases as existing motion estimation modules cannot effectively handle large motions. Hence, VFI works perform well for small frame gaps and perform poorly as the frame gap increases. In this work, we propose a novel framework to address this problem. We argue that when there is a large gap between inputs, instead of estimating imprecise motion that will eventually lead to inaccurate interpolation, we can safely propagate from one side of the input up to a reliable time frame using the other input as a reference. Then, the rest of the intermediate frames can be interpolated using standard approaches as the temporal gap is now narrowed. To this end, we propose a propagation network (PNet) by extending the classic feature-level forecasting with a novel motion-to-feature approach. To be thorough, we adopt a simple interpolation model along with PNet as our full model and design a simple procedure to train the full model in an end-to-end manner. Experimental results on several benchmark datasets confirm the effectiveness of our method for long-term VFI compared to state-of-the-art approaches.
summary: Video frame interpolation (VFI) works generally predict intermediate frame(s) by first estimating the motion between inputs and then warping the inputs to the target time with the estimated motion. This approach, however, is not optimal when the temporal distance between the input sequence increases as existing motion estimation modules cannot effectively handle large motions. Hence, VFI works perform well for small frame gaps and perform poorly as the frame gap increases. In this work, we propose a novel framework to address this problem. We argue that when there is a large gap between inputs, instead of estimating imprecise motion that will eventually lead to inaccurate interpolation, we can safely propagate from one side of the input up to a reliable time frame using the other input as a reference. Then, the rest of the intermediate frames can be interpolated using standard approaches as the temporal gap is now narrowed. To this end, we propose a propagation network (PNet) by extending the classic feature-level forecasting with a novel motion-to-feature approach. To be thorough, we adopt a simple interpolation model along with PNet as our full model and design a simple procedure to train the full model in an end-to-end manner. Experimental results on several benchmark datasets confirm the effectiveness of our method for long-term VFI compared to state-of-the-art approaches.
abstract_zh: 视频帧插值 (VFI) 通常通过首先估计输入之间的运动，然后使用估计的运动将输入扭曲到目标时间来预测中间帧。然而，当输入序列之间的时间距离增加时，由于现有运动估计模块无法有效处理大运动，这种方法并不是最佳的。因此，VFI 工作对于小帧间隙表现良好，而随着帧间隙增加而表现不佳。在这项工作中，我们提出了一个新的框架来解决这个问题。我们认为，当输入之间存在很大差距时，我们可以使用另一输入作为参考，安全地从输入的一侧传播到可靠的时间范围，而不是估计最终会导致插值不准确的不精确运动。然后，随着时间间隙现在变窄，可以使用标准方法对其余的中间帧进行插值。为此，我们通过使用新颖的运动到特征方法扩展经典的特征级预测，提出了一种传播网络（PNet）。为了彻底起见，我们采用简单的插值模型和 PNet 作为我们的完整模型，并设计一个简单的程序以端到端的方式训练完​​整模型。几个基准数据集的实验结果证实了我们的方法与最先进的方法相比对于长期 VFI 的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过特征传播解决长期视频帧插值问题的新框架，以处理大帧间隔下的不准确插值问题。
AI.motivation: 传统视频帧插值方法在输入序列帧间隔较大时表现不佳，因运动估计模块难以处理大运动，导致插值误差增大。
AI.method: 提出传播网络（PNet），通过特征级预测与运动到特征的结合，分阶段从可靠帧传播并缩小时间间隔，再采用标准方法完成插值，并设计端到端训练流程。
AI.result: 在多个基准数据集上的实验验证了该方法在长期视频帧插值任务中优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的框架有效解决了长期VFI问题，为大帧间隔场景下的视频插值提供了新思路。

authors_text: Rosemary J Thomas,Rebecca Whetton,Andy Doyle,David Coyle
title: Development of a Scale to Measure Technology Acceptance in Smart Agriculture
title_zh: 开发衡量智能农业技术接受度的量表
abstract: This paper describes the development of a scale to measure technology acceptance in smart agriculture. The scale is intended for use in diverse situations, ranging for the evaluation of existing technologies already in widespread use, to the evaluation of prototype systems. A systematic screening of prior literature was conducted to identify initial scale items regarding how technology acceptance is currently understood and measured. These items were iteratively reviewed and systematically categorised to develop the final scale proposed in this paper. In future work, this scale will be validated through user studies. The purpose of this paper is to make the initial scale available to the research community with a view to initial use and further evaluation.
summary: This paper describes the development of a scale to measure technology acceptance in smart agriculture. The scale is intended for use in diverse situations, ranging for the evaluation of existing technologies already in widespread use, to the evaluation of prototype systems. A systematic screening of prior literature was conducted to identify initial scale items regarding how technology acceptance is currently understood and measured. These items were iteratively reviewed and systematically categorised to develop the final scale proposed in this paper. In future work, this scale will be validated through user studies. The purpose of this paper is to make the initial scale available to the research community with a view to initial use and further evaluation.
abstract_zh: 本文介绍了衡量智能农业技术接受程度的量表的开发。该量表适用于各种情况，从评估已广泛使用的现有技术到评估原型系统。对现有文献进行了系统筛选，以确定目前如何理解和衡量技术接受度的初始规模项目。这些项目经过反复审查和系统分类，以制定本文提出的最终量表。在未来的工作中，该量表将通过用户研究进行验证。本文的目的是向研究界提供初始量表，以便初步使用和进一步评估。

AI.tldr: 开发一个用于测量智能农业中技术接受度的量表
AI.motivation: 现有技术接受度测量工具无法满足智能农业领域多样化的评估需求
AI.method: 通过系统文献回顾筛选初始量表条目，经迭代审查和分类形成最终量表
AI.result: 提出包含初步条目的技术接受度测量量表并提供研究社区使用
AI.conclusion: 量表需通过用户研究验证有效性，期待学术界参与进一步评估

authors_text: Christina Stoiber,Conny Walchshofer,Margit Pohl,Benjamin Potzmann,Florian Grassinger,Holger Stitz,Marc Streit,Wolfgang Aigner
title: Comparative Evaluations of Visualization Onboarding Methods
title_zh: 可视化入门方法的比较评估
abstract: Comprehending and exploring large and complex data is becoming increasingly important for users in a wide range of application domains. Still, non-experts in visual data analysis often have problems with correctly reading and interpreting information from visualizations that are new to them. To support novices in learning how to use new digital technologies, the concept of onboarding has been successfully applied in other fields and first approaches also exist in the visualization domain. However, empirical evidence on the effectiveness of such approaches is scarce. Therefore, we conducted 3 studies: 1) Firstly, we explored the effect of vis onboarding, using an interactive step-by-step guide, on user performance for four increasingly complex visualization techniques. We performed a between-subject experiment with 596 participants in total. The results showed that there are no significant differences between the answer correctness of the questions with and without onboarding. Furthermore, participants commented that for highly familiar visualization types no onboarding is needed. 2) Second, we performed another study with MTurk workers to assess if there is a difference in user performances on different onboarding types: step-by-step, scrollytelling tutorial, and video tutorial. The study revealed that the video tutorial was ranked as the most positive on average, based on sentiment analysis, followed by the scrollytelling tutorial and the interactive step-by-step guide. 3) For our third study with students, we gathered data on users' experience in using an in-situ scrollytelling for the VA tool. The results showed that they preferred scrollytelling over the tutorial integrated into the landing page. In summary, the in-situ scrollytelling approach works well for visualization onboarding and a video tutorial can help to introduce interaction techniques.
summary: Comprehending and exploring large and complex data is becoming increasingly important for users in a wide range of application domains. Still, non-experts in visual data analysis often have problems with correctly reading and interpreting information from visualizations that are new to them. To support novices in learning how to use new digital technologies, the concept of onboarding has been successfully applied in other fields and first approaches also exist in the visualization domain. However, empirical evidence on the effectiveness of such approaches is scarce. Therefore, we conducted 3 studies: 1) Firstly, we explored the effect of vis onboarding, using an interactive step-by-step guide, on user performance for four increasingly complex visualization techniques. We performed a between-subject experiment with 596 participants in total. The results showed that there are no significant differences between the answer correctness of the questions with and without onboarding. Furthermore, participants commented that for highly familiar visualization types no onboarding is needed. 2) Second, we performed another study with MTurk workers to assess if there is a difference in user performances on different onboarding types: step-by-step, scrollytelling tutorial, and video tutorial. The study revealed that the video tutorial was ranked as the most positive on average, based on sentiment analysis, followed by the scrollytelling tutorial and the interactive step-by-step guide. 3) For our third study with students, we gathered data on users' experience in using an in-situ scrollytelling for the VA tool. The results showed that they preferred scrollytelling over the tutorial integrated into the landing page. In summary, the in-situ scrollytelling approach works well for visualization onboarding and a video tutorial can help to introduce interaction techniques.
abstract_zh: 对于广泛应用领域的用户来说，理解和探索大型复杂数据变得越来越重要。尽管如此，非可视化数据分析专家在正确读取和解释对他们而言不熟悉的可视化信息时常常会遇到问题。为了支持新手学习如何使用新的数字技术，入职概念已成功应用于其他领域，并且可视化领域也存在第一种方法。然而，关于此类方法有效性的经验证据很少。因此，我们进行了 3 项研究：1) 首先，我们使用交互式分步指南探讨了 vis onboarding 对四种日益复杂的可视化技术的用户性能的影响。我们对总共 596 名参与者进行了受试者间实验。结果表明，有和没有入职的问题的答案正确性没有显着差异。此外，参与者评论说，对于非常熟悉的可视化类型，不需要入门。 2) 其次，我们与 MTurk 工作人员进行了另一项研究，以评估不同入门类型（分步教程、滚动教程和视频教程）的用户表现是否存在差异。研究显示，根据情绪分析，视频教程平均被评为最积极的，其次是滚动教程和交互式分步指南。 3) 对于我们与学生进行的第三次研究，我们收集了用户使用 VA 工具现场滚动讲述的体验数据。结果表明，与集成到登陆页面的教程相比，他们更喜欢滚动讲述。总之，现场滚动讲述方法非常适合可视化入门，视频教程可以帮助介绍交互技术。

AI.tldr: 比较不同可视化入门方法的有效性，评估其对用户学习和使用新可视化技术的影响。
AI.motivation: 非专家用户在理解新可视化技术时存在困难，但现有可视化入门方法缺乏实证研究支持，需通过实验验证不同方法的实际效果。
AI.method: 通过三个实验研究：1) 596名参与者对比有无交互式分步引导的可视化任务表现；2) MTurk工人测试分步引导、滚动叙事教程和视频教程的效果；3) 学生使用in-situ滚动叙事教程的体验分析。
AI.result: 实验发现：1) 有无引导的答题正确率无显著差异，但熟悉用户无需引导；2) 视频教程获最高评价，其次为滚动叙事和分步引导；3) 学生更偏好in-situ滚动叙事教程。
AI.conclusion: in-situ滚动叙事教程适用于可视化入门，视频教程能有效教授交互技术，但需根据用户熟悉度调整引导策略。

search_text: Comparative Evaluations of Visualization Onboarding Methods 可视化入门方法的比较评估 Comprehending and exploring large and complex data is becoming increasingly important for users in a wide range of application domains. Still, non-experts in visual data analysis often have problems with correctly reading and interpreting information from visualizations that are new to them. To support novices in learning how to use new digital technologies, the concept of onboarding has been successfully applied in other fields and first approaches also exist in the visualization domain. However, empirical evidence on the effectiveness of such approaches is scarce. Therefore, we conducted 3 studies: 1) Firstly, we explored the effect of vis onboarding, using an interactive step-by-step guide, on user performance for four increasingly complex visualization techniques. We performed a between-subject experiment with 596 participants in total. The results showed that there are no significant differences between the answer correctness of the questions with and without onboarding. Furthermore, participants commented that for highly familiar visualization types no onboarding is needed. 2) Second, we performed another study with MTurk workers to assess if there is a difference in user performances on different onboarding types: step-by-step, scrollytelling tutorial, and video tutorial. The study revealed that the video tutorial was ranked as the most positive on average, based on sentiment analysis, followed by the scrollytelling tutorial and the interactive step-by-step guide. 3) For our third study with students, we gathered data on users' experience in using an in-situ scrollytelling for the VA tool. The results showed that they preferred scrollytelling over the tutorial integrated into the landing page. In summary, the in-situ scrollytelling approach works well for visualization onboarding and a video tutorial can help to introduce interaction techniques. 对于广泛应用领域的用户来说，理解和探索大型复杂数据变得越来越重要。尽管如此，非可视化数据分析专家在正确读取和解释对他们而言不熟悉的可视化信息时常常会遇到问题。为了支持新手学习如何使用新的数字技术，入职概念已成功应用于其他领域，并且可视化领域也存在第一种方法。然而，关于此类方法有效性的经验证据很少。因此，我们进行了 3 项研究：1) 首先，我们使用交互式分步指南探讨了 vis onboarding 对四种日益复杂的可视化技术的用户性能的影响。我们对总共 596 名参与者进行了受试者间实验。结果表明，有和没有入职的问题的答案正确性没有显着差异。此外，参与者评论说，对于非常熟悉的可视化类型，不需要入门。 2) 其次，我们与 MTurk 工作人员进行了另一项研究，以评估不同入门类型（分步教程、滚动教程和视频教程）的用户表现是否存在差异。研究显示，根据情绪分析，视频教程平均被评为最积极的，其次是滚动教程和交互式分步指南。 3) 对于我们与学生进行的第三次研究，我们收集了用户使用 VA 工具现场滚动讲述的体验数据。结果表明，与集成到登陆页面的教程相比，他们更喜欢滚动讲述。总之，现场滚动讲述方法非常适合可视化入门，视频教程可以帮助介绍交互技术。 比较不同可视化入门方法的有效性，评估其对用户学习和使用新可视化技术的影响。 Christina Stoiber,Conny Walchshofer,Margit Pohl,Benjamin Potzmann,Florian Grassinger,Holger Stitz,Marc Streit,Wolfgang Aigner cs.HC

authors_text: Sean Knight,Navjot Gadda
title: Spatiotemporal Patterns in Neurobiology: An Overview for Future Artificial Intelligence
title_zh: 神经生物学中的时空模式：未来人工智能概述
abstract: In recent years, there has been increasing interest in developing models and tools to address the complex patterns of connectivity found in brain tissue. Specifically, this is due to a need to understand how emergent properties emerge from these network structures at multiple spatiotemporal scales. We argue that computational models are key tools for elucidating the possible functionalities that can emerge from interactions of heterogeneous neurons connected by complex networks on multi-scale temporal and spatial domains. Here we review several classes of models including spiking neurons, integrate and fire neurons with short term plasticity (STP), conductance based integrate-and-fire models with STP, and population density neural field (PDNF) models using simple examples with emphasis on neuroscience applications while also providing some potential future research directions for AI. These computational approaches allow us to explore the impact of changing underlying mechanisms on resulting network function both experimentally as well as theoretically. Thus we hope these studies will inform future developments in artificial intelligence algorithms as well as help validate our understanding of brain processes based on experiments in animals or humans.
summary: In recent years, there has been increasing interest in developing models and tools to address the complex patterns of connectivity found in brain tissue. Specifically, this is due to a need to understand how emergent properties emerge from these network structures at multiple spatiotemporal scales. We argue that computational models are key tools for elucidating the possible functionalities that can emerge from interactions of heterogeneous neurons connected by complex networks on multi-scale temporal and spatial domains. Here we review several classes of models including spiking neurons, integrate and fire neurons with short term plasticity (STP), conductance based integrate-and-fire models with STP, and population density neural field (PDNF) models using simple examples with emphasis on neuroscience applications while also providing some potential future research directions for AI. These computational approaches allow us to explore the impact of changing underlying mechanisms on resulting network function both experimentally as well as theoretically. Thus we hope these studies will inform future developments in artificial intelligence algorithms as well as help validate our understanding of brain processes based on experiments in animals or humans.
abstract_zh: 近年来，人们对开发模型和工具来解决脑组织中复杂的连接模式越来越感兴趣。具体来说，这是因为需要了解这些网络结构在多个时空尺度上如何产生涌现属性。我们认为，计算模型是阐明多尺度时空域上复杂网络连接的异质神经元相互作用中可能出现的功能的关键工具。在这里，我们回顾了几类模型，包括尖峰神经元、具有短期可塑性 (STP) 的集成和激发神经元、基于电导的 STP 集成和激发模型，以及人口密度神经场 (PDNF) 模型，使用简单的例子，重点是神经科学应用，同时也为人工智能提供了一些潜在的未来研究方向。这些计算方法使我们能够从实验和理论上探索改变潜在机制对最终网络功能的影响。因此，我们希望这些研究将为人工智能算法的未来发展提供信息，并帮助验证我们基于动物或人类实验的大脑过程的理解。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了多种计算模型，用于研究神经网络在不同时空尺度上的功能，并探讨其对未来人工智能的启示。
AI.motivation: 理解大脑复杂网络结构中涌现的特性对于神经科学和人工智能的发展具有重要意义，需通过计算模型揭示其潜在功能。
AI.method: 通过回顾尖峰神经元、具有短期可塑性的积分-发放模型、基于电导的神经场模型等，结合简单示例分析其在神经科学中的应用。
AI.result: 这些计算方法能够实验性和理论性地探索网络机制变化对功能的影响，为人工智能算法提供理论支持。
AI.conclusion: 此类研究有助于推动人工智能算法的创新，并通过动物或人类实验验证对大脑过程的理解。

authors_text: Markus Borg,Johan Bengtsson,Harald Österling,Alexander Hagelborn,Isabella Gagner,Piotr Tomaszewski
title: Quality Assurance of Generative Dialog Models in an Evolving Conversational Agent Used for Swedish Language Practice
title_zh: 用于瑞典语练习的不断发展的对话代理中生成对话模型的质量保证
comment: Accepted for publication in the Proc. of the 1st International Conference on AI Engineering, 2022
comments: Accepted for publication in the Proc. of the 1st International Conference on AI Engineering, 2022
abstract: Due to the migration megatrend, efficient and effective second-language acquisition is vital. One proposed solution involves AI-enabled conversational agents for person-centered interactive language practice. We present results from ongoing action research targeting quality assurance of proprietary generative dialog models trained for virtual job interviews. The action team elicited a set of 38 requirements for which we designed corresponding automated test cases for 15 of particular interest to the evolving solution. Our results show that six of the test case designs can detect meaningful differences between candidate models. While quality assurance of natural language processing applications is complex, we provide initial steps toward an automated framework for machine learning model selection in the context of an evolving conversational agent. Future work will focus on model selection in an MLOps setting.
summary: Due to the migration megatrend, efficient and effective second-language acquisition is vital. One proposed solution involves AI-enabled conversational agents for person-centered interactive language practice. We present results from ongoing action research targeting quality assurance of proprietary generative dialog models trained for virtual job interviews. The action team elicited a set of 38 requirements for which we designed corresponding automated test cases for 15 of particular interest to the evolving solution. Our results show that six of the test case designs can detect meaningful differences between candidate models. While quality assurance of natural language processing applications is complex, we provide initial steps toward an automated framework for machine learning model selection in the context of an evolving conversational agent. Future work will focus on model selection in an MLOps setting.
abstract_zh: 由于移民大趋势，高效且有效的第二语言习得至关重要。提出的一种解决方案涉及人工智能支持的对话代理，用于以人为中心的交互式语言练习。我们展示了正在进行的行动研究的结果，该研究的目标是为虚拟工作面试训练的专有生成对话模型的质量保证。行动团队提出了 38 项要求，我们针对不断发展的解决方案特别感兴趣的 15 项要求设计了相应的自动化测试用例。我们的结果表明，六个测试用例设计可以检测候选模型之间有意义的差异。虽然自然语言处理应用程序的质量保证很复杂，但我们提供了在不断发展的对话代理背景下实现机器学习模型选择自动化框架的初步步骤。未来的工作将集中于 MLOps 设置中的模型选择。

AI.tldr: 本文针对用于瑞典语练习的生成对话模型，设计自动化测试用例以确保其质量保证，特别是在不断演进的对话代理系统中。
AI.motivation: 因人口迁移趋势加剧，第二语言学习需求迫切，需通过AI对话代理提供高效互动练习，但模型质量保障面临挑战。
AI.method: 通过行动研究方法，收集38项需求并设计对应自动化测试用例，重点验证15项与系统演进相关的核心指标。
AI.result: 6个测试用例能有效识别候选模型间的显著差异，初步构建了适用于动态对话代理的自动化模型选择框架。
AI.conclusion: 虽NLP质量保障复杂，但本文为演化对话系统提供了自动化测试框架的可行路径，未来将结合MLOps实现模型持续优化。

ai_content.tldr: 本文针对用于瑞典语练习的生成对话模型，设计自动化测试用例以确保其质量保证，特别是在不断演进的对话代理系统中。
ai_content.motivation: 因人口迁移趋势加剧，第二语言学习需求迫切，需通过AI对话代理提供高效互动练习，但模型质量保障面临挑战。
ai_content.method: 通过行动研究方法，收集38项需求并设计对应自动化测试用例，重点验证15项与系统演进相关的核心指标。
ai_content.result: 6个测试用例能有效识别候选模型间的显著差异，初步构建了适用于动态对话代理的自动化模型选择框架。
ai_content.conclusion: 虽NLP质量保障复杂，但本文为演化对话系统提供了自动化测试框架的可行路径，未来将结合MLOps实现模型持续优化。

search_text: Quality Assurance of Generative Dialog Models in an Evolving Conversational Agent Used for Swedish Language Practice 用于瑞典语练习的不断发展的对话代理中生成对话模型的质量保证 Due to the migration megatrend, efficient and effective second-language acquisition is vital. One proposed solution involves AI-enabled conversational agents for person-centered interactive language practice. We present results from ongoing action research targeting quality assurance of proprietary generative dialog models trained for virtual job interviews. The action team elicited a set of 38 requirements for which we designed corresponding automated test cases for 15 of particular interest to the evolving solution. Our results show that six of the test case designs can detect meaningful differences between candidate models. While quality assurance of natural language processing applications is complex, we provide initial steps toward an automated framework for machine learning model selection in the context of an evolving conversational agent. Future work will focus on model selection in an MLOps setting. 由于移民大趋势，高效且有效的第二语言习得至关重要。提出的一种解决方案涉及人工智能支持的对话代理，用于以人为中心的交互式语言练习。我们展示了正在进行的行动研究的结果，该研究的目标是为虚拟工作面试训练的专有生成对话模型的质量保证。行动团队提出了 38 项要求，我们针对不断发展的解决方案特别感兴趣的 15 项要求设计了相应的自动化测试用例。我们的结果表明，六个测试用例设计可以检测候选模型之间有意义的差异。虽然自然语言处理应用程序的质量保证很复杂，但我们提供了在不断发展的对话代理背景下实现机器学习模型选择自动化框架的初步步骤。未来的工作将集中于 MLOps 设置中的模型选择。 本文针对用于瑞典语练习的生成对话模型，设计自动化测试用例以确保其质量保证，特别是在不断演进的对话代理系统中。 Markus Borg,Johan Bengtsson,Harald Österling,Alexander Hagelborn,Isabella Gagner,Piotr Tomaszewski cs.SE,cs.AI,cs.CL

authors_text: Marcel Schloz,Johannes Müller,Thomas C. Pekin,Wouter Van den Broek,Christoph T. Koch
title: Deep Reinforcement Learning for Data-Driven Adaptive Scanning in Ptychography
title_zh: Ptychography 中数据驱动的自适应扫描的深度强化学习
abstract: We present a method that lowers the dose required for a ptychographic reconstruction by adaptively scanning the specimen, thereby providing the required spatial information redundancy in the regions of highest importance. The proposed method is built upon a deep learning model that is trained by reinforcement learning (RL), using prior knowledge of the specimen structure from training data sets. We show that equivalent low-dose experiments using adaptive scanning outperform conventional ptychography experiments in terms of reconstruction resolution.
summary: We present a method that lowers the dose required for a ptychographic reconstruction by adaptively scanning the specimen, thereby providing the required spatial information redundancy in the regions of highest importance. The proposed method is built upon a deep learning model that is trained by reinforcement learning (RL), using prior knowledge of the specimen structure from training data sets. We show that equivalent low-dose experiments using adaptive scanning outperform conventional ptychography experiments in terms of reconstruction resolution.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种方法，通过自适应扫描样本来降低叠层重建所需的剂量，从而在最重要的区域提供所需的空间信息冗余。所提出的方法建立在深度学习模型的基础上，该模型通过强化学习（RL）进行训练，使用训练数据集中样本结构的先验知识。我们表明，在重建分辨率方面，使用自适应扫描的等效低剂量实验优于传统的叠层记录实验。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度强化学习的自适应扫描方法，用于降低ptychography成像的辐射剂量需求，同时保持高分辨率重建。
AI.motivation: 传统ptychography需要高剂量扫描以保证重建质量，可能对样品造成损伤。通过自适应扫描在关键区域补充冗余信息，可在降低剂量的同时维持分辨率。
AI.method: 构建深度强化学习模型，利用训练数据中的样品结构先验知识，动态优化扫描路径以最大化信息获取效率。
AI.result: 实验表明，自适应扫描在等效低剂量下实现的重建分辨率优于传统ptychography方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过数据驱动的自适应扫描策略，有效降低了ptychography的剂量需求，为高分辨率低损伤成像提供了新方案。

authors_text: Mayukh Das,Brijraj Singh,Harsh Kanti Chheda,Pawan Sharma,Pradeep NS
title: AutoCoMet: Smart Neural Architecture Search via Co-Regulated Shaping Reinforcement
title_zh: AutoCoMet：通过共同调节塑造强化进行智能神经架构搜索
abstract: Designing suitable deep model architectures, for AI-driven on-device apps and features, at par with rapidly evolving mobile hardware and increasingly complex target scenarios is a difficult task. Though Neural Architecture Search (NAS/AutoML) has made this easier by shifting paradigm from extensive manual effort to automated architecture learning from data, yet it has major limitations, leading to critical bottlenecks in the context of mobile devices, including model-hardware fidelity, prohibitive search times and deviation from primary target objective(s). Thus, we propose AutoCoMet that can learn the most suitable DNN architecture optimized for varied types of device hardware and task contexts, ~ 3x faster. Our novel co-regulated shaping reinforcement controller together with the high fidelity hardware meta-behavior predictor produces a smart, fast NAS framework that adapts to context via a generalized formalism for any kind of multi-criteria optimization.
summary: Designing suitable deep model architectures, for AI-driven on-device apps and features, at par with rapidly evolving mobile hardware and increasingly complex target scenarios is a difficult task. Though Neural Architecture Search (NAS/AutoML) has made this easier by shifting paradigm from extensive manual effort to automated architecture learning from data, yet it has major limitations, leading to critical bottlenecks in the context of mobile devices, including model-hardware fidelity, prohibitive search times and deviation from primary target objective(s). Thus, we propose AutoCoMet that can learn the most suitable DNN architecture optimized for varied types of device hardware and task contexts, ~ 3x faster. Our novel co-regulated shaping reinforcement controller together with the high fidelity hardware meta-behavior predictor produces a smart, fast NAS framework that adapts to context via a generalized formalism for any kind of multi-criteria optimization.
abstract_zh: 为人工智能驱动的设备上应用程序和功能设计合适的深度模型架构，以适应快速发展的移动硬件和日益复杂的目标场景，是一项艰巨的任务。尽管神经架构搜索 (NAS/AutoML) 通过将范式从大量的手动工作转变为从数据中进行自动架构学习，使这一过程变得更加容易，但它具有重大局限性，导致移动设备环境中的关键瓶颈，包括模型硬件保真度、令人望而却步的搜索时间和偏离主要目标。因此，我们提出 AutoCoMet，它可以学习针对不同类型的设备硬件和任务上下文进行优化的最合适的 DNN 架构，速度提高约 3 倍。我们新颖的共同调节塑造强化控制器与高保真硬件元行为预测器一起产生了一个智能、快速的 NAS 框架，该框架通过通用形式适应上下文，以实现任何类型的多标准优化。

AI.tldr: 本文提出AutoCoMet方法，通过协同调节强化学习和硬件预测器，实现更高效、适应多场景的神经网络架构搜索。
AI.motivation: 现有NAS方法在移动设备上存在模型-硬件适配性差、搜索耗时长及偏离目标优化等问题，限制了其实际应用。
AI.method: 设计协同调节的强化学习控制器与高保真硬件元行为预测器，结合通用多目标优化框架，实现跨硬件和任务的智能架构搜索。
AI.result: AutoCoMet相比现有方法提速约3倍，能有效适配不同硬件条件和多目标优化需求。
AI.conclusion: AutoCoMet通过创新控制器和预测模型，解决了NAS在移动场景中的关键瓶颈，为智能终端AI应用提供高效架构设计方案。

authors_text: Najiba Toron,Janaina Mourao-Miranda,John Shawe-Taylor
title: TransductGAN: a Transductive Adversarial Model for Novelty Detection
title_zh: TransductGAN：用于新颖性检测的转导对抗模型
abstract: Novelty detection, a widely studied problem in machine learning, is the problem of detecting a novel class of data that has not been previously observed. A common setting for novelty detection is inductive whereby only examples of the negative class are available during training time. Transductive novelty detection on the other hand has only witnessed a recent surge in interest, it not only makes use of the negative class during training but also incorporates the (unlabeled) test set to detect novel examples. Several studies have emerged under the transductive setting umbrella that have demonstrated its advantage over its inductive counterpart. Depending on the assumptions about the data, these methods go by different names (e.g. transductive novelty detection, semi-supervised novelty detection, positive-unlabeled learning, out-of-distribution detection). With the use of generative adversarial networks (GAN), a segment of those studies have adopted a transductive setup in order to learn how to generate examples of the novel class. In this study, we propose TransductGAN, a transductive generative adversarial network that attempts to learn how to generate image examples from both the novel and negative classes by using a mixture of two Gaussians in the latent space. It achieves that by incorporating an adversarial autoencoder with a GAN network, the ability to generate examples of novel data points offers not only a visual representation of novelties, but also overcomes the hurdle faced by many inductive methods of how to tune the model hyperparameters at the decision rule level. Our model has shown superior performance over state-of-the-art inductive and transductive methods. Our study is fully reproducible with the code available publicly.
summary: Novelty detection, a widely studied problem in machine learning, is the problem of detecting a novel class of data that has not been previously observed. A common setting for novelty detection is inductive whereby only examples of the negative class are available during training time. Transductive novelty detection on the other hand has only witnessed a recent surge in interest, it not only makes use of the negative class during training but also incorporates the (unlabeled) test set to detect novel examples. Several studies have emerged under the transductive setting umbrella that have demonstrated its advantage over its inductive counterpart. Depending on the assumptions about the data, these methods go by different names (e.g. transductive novelty detection, semi-supervised novelty detection, positive-unlabeled learning, out-of-distribution detection). With the use of generative adversarial networks (GAN), a segment of those studies have adopted a transductive setup in order to learn how to generate examples of the novel class. In this study, we propose TransductGAN, a transductive generative adversarial network that attempts to learn how to generate image examples from both the novel and negative classes by using a mixture of two Gaussians in the latent space. It achieves that by incorporating an adversarial autoencoder with a GAN network, the ability to generate examples of novel data points offers not only a visual representation of novelties, but also overcomes the hurdle faced by many inductive methods of how to tune the model hyperparameters at the decision rule level. Our model has shown superior performance over state-of-the-art inductive and transductive methods. Our study is fully reproducible with the code available publicly.
abstract_zh: 新颖性检测是机器学习中广泛研究的问题，是检测以前未观察到的一类新颖数据的问题。新颖性检测的常见设置是归纳式的，其中在训练期间仅提供负类的示例。另一方面，转导式新颖性检测最近才引起人们的兴趣激增，它不仅在训练期间利用负类，而且还结合了（未标记的）测试集来检测新颖性示例。在转导设置保护伞下出现了几项研究，证明了其相对于感应式对应物的优势。根据对数据的假设，这些方法有不同的名称（例如转导新颖性检测、半监督新颖性检测、正向无标记学习、分布外检测）。通过使用生成对抗网络（GAN），其中一部分研究采用了转导式设置，以学习如何生成新颖类别的示例。在这项研究中，我们提出了 TransductGAN，一种转导生成对抗网络，尝试学习如何通过在潜在空间中使用两个高斯的混合来从新颖类和负类中生成图像示例。它通过将对抗性自动编码器与 GAN 网络相结合，生成新颖数据点示例的能力不仅提供了新颖性的视觉表示，而且克服了许多归纳方法面临的如何在决策规则级别调整模型超参数的障碍。我们的模型显示出优于最先进的归纳和传导方法的性能。我们的研究可以用公开的代码完全重现。

AI.tldr: 本文提出TransductGAN，一种基于生成对抗网络（GAN）的跨导式模型，用于通过结合训练数据和测试数据来检测新类别数据。
AI.motivation: 传统归纳式新颖性检测方法依赖仅负类数据训练，难以调整决策规则超参数；跨导式方法利用测试数据提升性能，但现有方法在生成新类样本方面存在不足。
AI.method: TransductGAN结合对抗自编码器与GAN，在潜在空间中使用双高斯混合分布，同时生成新类和负类样本，避免决策规则超参数调优问题。
AI.result: TransductGAN在多个基准数据集上优于现有归纳式和跨导式方法，且代码公开可复现。
AI.conclusion: 跨导式GAN框架通过整合测试数据与生成模型，有效提升了新颖性检测性能，为相关领域提供了新思路。

search_text: TransductGAN: a Transductive Adversarial Model for Novelty Detection TransductGAN：用于新颖性检测的转导对抗模型 Novelty detection, a widely studied problem in machine learning, is the problem of detecting a novel class of data that has not been previously observed. A common setting for novelty detection is inductive whereby only examples of the negative class are available during training time. Transductive novelty detection on the other hand has only witnessed a recent surge in interest, it not only makes use of the negative class during training but also incorporates the (unlabeled) test set to detect novel examples. Several studies have emerged under the transductive setting umbrella that have demonstrated its advantage over its inductive counterpart. Depending on the assumptions about the data, these methods go by different names (e.g. transductive novelty detection, semi-supervised novelty detection, positive-unlabeled learning, out-of-distribution detection). With the use of generative adversarial networks (GAN), a segment of those studies have adopted a transductive setup in order to learn how to generate examples of the novel class. In this study, we propose TransductGAN, a transductive generative adversarial network that attempts to learn how to generate image examples from both the novel and negative classes by using a mixture of two Gaussians in the latent space. It achieves that by incorporating an adversarial autoencoder with a GAN network, the ability to generate examples of novel data points offers not only a visual representation of novelties, but also overcomes the hurdle faced by many inductive methods of how to tune the model hyperparameters at the decision rule level. Our model has shown superior performance over state-of-the-art inductive and transductive methods. Our study is fully reproducible with the code available publicly. 新颖性检测是机器学习中广泛研究的问题，是检测以前未观察到的一类新颖数据的问题。新颖性检测的常见设置是归纳式的，其中在训练期间仅提供负类的示例。另一方面，转导式新颖性检测最近才引起人们的兴趣激增，它不仅在训练期间利用负类，而且还结合了（未标记的）测试集来检测新颖性示例。在转导设置保护伞下出现了几项研究，证明了其相对于感应式对应物的优势。根据对数据的假设，这些方法有不同的名称（例如转导新颖性检测、半监督新颖性检测、正向无标记学习、分布外检测）。通过使用生成对抗网络（GAN），其中一部分研究采用了转导式设置，以学习如何生成新颖类别的示例。在这项研究中，我们提出了 TransductGAN，一种转导生成对抗网络，尝试学习如何通过在潜在空间中使用两个高斯的混合来从新颖类和负类中生成图像示例。它通过将对抗性自动编码器与 GAN 网络相结合，生成新颖数据点示例的能力不仅提供了新颖性的视觉表示，而且克服了许多归纳方法面临的如何在决策规则级别调整模型超参数的障碍。我们的模型显示出优于最先进的归纳和传导方法的性能。我们的研究可以用公开的代码完全重现。 本文提出TransductGAN，一种基于生成对抗网络（GAN）的跨导式模型，用于通过结合训练数据和测试数据来检测新类别数据。 Najiba Toron,Janaina Mourao-Miranda,John Shawe-Taylor cs.LG,cs.CV

authors_text: Si-Ioi Ng,Cymie Wing-Yee Ng,Jiarui Wang,Tan Lee
title: Automatic Detection of Speech Sound Disorder in Child Speech Using Posterior-based Speaker Representations
title_zh: 使用基于后验的说话人表示自动检测儿童语音中的语音障碍
abstract: This paper presents a macroscopic approach to automatic detection of speech sound disorder (SSD) in child speech. Typically, SSD is manifested by persistent articulation and phonological errors on specific phonemes in the language. The disorder can be detected by focally analyzing the phonemes or the words elicited by the child subject. In the present study, instead of attempting to detect individual phone- and word-level errors, we propose to extract a subject-level representation from a long utterance that is constructed by concatenating multiple test words. The speaker verification approach, and posterior features generated by deep neural network models, are applied to derive various types of holistic representations. A linear classifier is trained to differentiate disordered speech in normal one. On the task of detecting SSD in Cantonese-speaking children, experimental results show that the proposed approach achieves improved detection performance over previous method that requires fusing phone-level detection results. Using articulatory posterior features to derive i-vectors from multiple-word utterances achieves an unweighted average recall of 78.2% and a macro F1 score of 78.0%.
summary: This paper presents a macroscopic approach to automatic detection of speech sound disorder (SSD) in child speech. Typically, SSD is manifested by persistent articulation and phonological errors on specific phonemes in the language. The disorder can be detected by focally analyzing the phonemes or the words elicited by the child subject. In the present study, instead of attempting to detect individual phone- and word-level errors, we propose to extract a subject-level representation from a long utterance that is constructed by concatenating multiple test words. The speaker verification approach, and posterior features generated by deep neural network models, are applied to derive various types of holistic representations. A linear classifier is trained to differentiate disordered speech in normal one. On the task of detecting SSD in Cantonese-speaking children, experimental results show that the proposed approach achieves improved detection performance over previous method that requires fusing phone-level detection results. Using articulatory posterior features to derive i-vectors from multiple-word utterances achieves an unweighted average recall of 78.2% and a macro F1 score of 78.0%.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种自动检测儿童言语中语音障碍（SSD）的宏观方法。通常，SSD 表现为语言中特定音素的持续发音和语音错误。可以通过集中分析儿童受试者引出的音素或单词来检测该疾病。在本研究中，我们不尝试检测单个音素级和单词级错误，而是建议从通过连接多个测试词构建的长话语中提取主题级表示。应用说话者验证方法和深度神经网络模型生成的后验特征来导出各种类型的整体表示。训练线性分类器来区分正常语音和无序语音。在检测粤语儿童SSD的任务上，实验结果表明，与之前需要融合电话级检测结果的方法相比，该方法实现了更高的检测性能。使用发音后验特征从多词话语中导出 i 向量，可实现 78.2% 的未加权平均召回率和 78.0% 的宏观 F1 分数。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于后验特征的儿童言语障碍自动检测方法，通过构建说话人级表示来提升检测性能。
AI.motivation: 传统方法依赖于逐音素或词汇级错误分析，难以捕捉整体言语特征。本文旨在通过宏观视角提取说话人级表示，提高儿童言语障碍检测的准确性。
AI.method: 采用说话人验证技术，利用深度神经网络生成的后验特征构建多词级i-vector表示，并通过线性分类器区分正常与障碍语音。
AI.result: 在粤语儿童数据集上实现78.2%的无权重平均召回率和78.0%的宏F1分数，优于基于音素级融合的现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 基于后验特征的说话人级表示能有效捕捉儿童言语障碍的整体模式，为自动检测提供了更优的解决方案。

authors_text: Anna Volokitin,Stefan Brugger,Ali Benlalah,Sebastian Martin,Brian Amberg,Michael Tschannen
title: Neural Face Video Compression using Multiple Views
title_zh: 使用多个视图的神经人脸视频压缩
abstract: Recent advances in deep generative models led to the development of neural face video compression codecs that use an order of magnitude less bandwidth than engineered codecs. These neural codecs reconstruct the current frame by warping a source frame and using a generative model to compensate for imperfections in the warped source frame. Thereby, the warp is encoded and transmitted using a small number of keypoints rather than a dense flow field, which leads to massive savings compared to traditional codecs. However, by relying on a single source frame only, these methods lead to inaccurate reconstructions (e.g. one side of the head becomes unoccluded when turning the head and has to be synthesized). Here, we aim to tackle this issue by relying on multiple source frames (views of the face) and present encouraging results.
summary: Recent advances in deep generative models led to the development of neural face video compression codecs that use an order of magnitude less bandwidth than engineered codecs. These neural codecs reconstruct the current frame by warping a source frame and using a generative model to compensate for imperfections in the warped source frame. Thereby, the warp is encoded and transmitted using a small number of keypoints rather than a dense flow field, which leads to massive savings compared to traditional codecs. However, by relying on a single source frame only, these methods lead to inaccurate reconstructions (e.g. one side of the head becomes unoccluded when turning the head and has to be synthesized). Here, we aim to tackle this issue by relying on multiple source frames (views of the face) and present encouraging results.
abstract_zh: 深度生成模型的最新进展促进了神经人脸视频压缩编解码器的发展，其使用的带宽比工程编解码器少一个数量级。这些神经编解码器通过扭曲源帧并使用生成模型来补偿扭曲源帧中的缺陷来重建当前帧。因此，使用少量关键点而不是密集流场对扭曲进行编码和传输，与传统编解码器相比，这可以节省大量成本。然而，由于仅依赖于单个源帧，这些方法会导致重建不准确（例如，在转动头部时头部的一侧变得未被遮挡并且必须进行合成）。在这里，我们的目标是通过依赖多个源帧（面部视图）来解决这个问题，并呈现令人鼓舞的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于多视角的神经面部视频压缩方法，通过利用多个源帧提升重建精度。
AI.motivation: 现有神经视频压缩方法依赖单一源帧进行变形重建，导致头部运动时出现遮挡不一致问题，需通过多视角信息提升准确性。
AI.method: 采用多源帧（多视角人脸视图）替代单一帧，结合关键点编码传输变形信息，利用生成模型合成更精确的帧内容。
AI.result: 实验表明多视角方法显著改善了头部运动场景下的重建质量，同时保持了较低的带宽消耗。
AI.conclusion: 多视角神经压缩能有效解决单帧方法的遮挡缺陷，在保证压缩效率的同时提升视频重建质量。

search_text: Neural Face Video Compression using Multiple Views 使用多个视图的神经人脸视频压缩 Recent advances in deep generative models led to the development of neural face video compression codecs that use an order of magnitude less bandwidth than engineered codecs. These neural codecs reconstruct the current frame by warping a source frame and using a generative model to compensate for imperfections in the warped source frame. Thereby, the warp is encoded and transmitted using a small number of keypoints rather than a dense flow field, which leads to massive savings compared to traditional codecs. However, by relying on a single source frame only, these methods lead to inaccurate reconstructions (e.g. one side of the head becomes unoccluded when turning the head and has to be synthesized). Here, we aim to tackle this issue by relying on multiple source frames (views of the face) and present encouraging results. 深度生成模型的最新进展促进了神经人脸视频压缩编解码器的发展，其使用的带宽比工程编解码器少一个数量级。这些神经编解码器通过扭曲源帧并使用生成模型来补偿扭曲源帧中的缺陷来重建当前帧。因此，使用少量关键点而不是密集流场对扭曲进行编码和传输，与传统编解码器相比，这可以节省大量成本。然而，由于仅依赖于单个源帧，这些方法会导致重建不准确（例如，在转动头部时头部的一侧变得未被遮挡并且必须进行合成）。在这里，我们的目标是通过依赖多个源帧（面部视图）来解决这个问题，并呈现令人鼓舞的结果。 本文提出一种基于多视角的神经面部视频压缩方法，通过利用多个源帧提升重建精度。 Anna Volokitin,Stefan Brugger,Ali Benlalah,Sebastian Martin,Brian Amberg,Michael Tschannen cs.CV

authors_text: Charlie Dickens,Justin Thaler,Daniel Ting
title: Order-Invariant Cardinality Estimators Are Differentially Private
title_zh: 阶不变基数估计器是差分私有的
comment: Changed title and updated with camera ready version from conference
comments: Changed title and updated with camera ready version from conference
abstract: We consider privacy in the context of streaming algorithms for cardinality estimation. We show that a large class of algorithms all satisfy $ε$-differential privacy, so long as (a) the algorithm is combined with a simple down-sampling procedure, and (b) the cardinality of the input stream is $Ω(k/ε)$. Here, $k$ is a certain parameter of the sketch that is always at most the sketch size in bits, but is typically much smaller. We also show that, even with no modification, algorithms in our class satisfy $(ε, δ)$-differential privacy, where $δ$ falls exponentially with the stream cardinality. Our analysis applies to essentially all popular cardinality estimation algorithms, and substantially generalizes and tightens privacy bounds from earlier works.
summary: We consider privacy in the context of streaming algorithms for cardinality estimation. We show that a large class of algorithms all satisfy $ε$-differential privacy, so long as (a) the algorithm is combined with a simple down-sampling procedure, and (b) the cardinality of the input stream is $Ω(k/ε)$. Here, $k$ is a certain parameter of the sketch that is always at most the sketch size in bits, but is typically much smaller. We also show that, even with no modification, algorithms in our class satisfy $(ε, δ)$-differential privacy, where $δ$ falls exponentially with the stream cardinality. Our analysis applies to essentially all popular cardinality estimation algorithms, and substantially generalizes and tightens privacy bounds from earlier works.
abstract_zh: 我们在基数估计的流算法的背景下考虑隐私。我们证明一大类算法都满足 $ε$ 差分隐私，只要 (a) 该算法与简单的下采样过程相结合，并且 (b) 输入流的基数为 $Ω(k/ε)$。这里，$k$ 是草图的某个参数，它始终至多是草图大小（以位为单位），但通常要小得多。我们还表明，即使没有修改，我们类中的算法也满足 $(ε, δ)$ 差分隐私，其中 $δ$ 随着流基数呈指数下降。我们的分析基本上适用于所有流行的基数估计算法，并且基本上概括并收紧了早期作品的隐私界限。

AI.tldr: 本文证明了在特定条件下，顺序不变的基数估计算法具有差分隐私性。
AI.motivation: 基数估计算法在流数据处理中广泛应用，但可能泄露敏感信息，需确保其隐私性。
AI.method: 通过结合简单下采样方法和数学分析，证明算法满足差分隐私条件，并分析δ参数随流数据基数指数衰减的特性。
AI.result: 该类算法在满足输入基数条件时满足ε-差分隐私，且无需修改即可满足(ε, δ)-差分隐私，δ随基数指数级下降。
AI.conclusion: 研究结果扩展了现有隐私边界，为流行基数估计算法提供了更严格的隐私保证。

authors_text: Stefano Branchi,Chiara Di Francescomarino,Chiara Ghidini,David Massimo,Francesco Ricci,Massimiliano Ronzani
title: Learning to act: a Reinforcement Learning approach to recommend the best next activities
title_zh: 学习行动：推荐最佳下一步活动的强化学习方法
comment: 16 pages, 3 figures, v2 accepted to the BPM 2022 Forum
comments: 16 pages, 3 figures, v2 accepted to the BPM 2022 Forum
abstract: The rise of process data availability has recently led to the development of data-driven learning approaches. However, most of these approaches restrict the use of the learned model to predict the future of ongoing process executions. The goal of this paper is moving a step forward and leveraging available data to learning to act, by supporting users with recommendations derived from an optimal strategy (measure of performance). We take the optimization perspective of one process actor and we recommend the best activities to execute next, in response to what happens in a complex external environment, where there is no control on exogenous factors. To this aim, we investigate an approach that learns, by means of Reinforcement Learning, the optimal policy from the observation of past executions and recommends the best activities to carry on for optimizing a Key Performance Indicator of interest. The validity of the approach is demonstrated on two scenarios taken from real-life data.
summary: The rise of process data availability has recently led to the development of data-driven learning approaches. However, most of these approaches restrict the use of the learned model to predict the future of ongoing process executions. The goal of this paper is moving a step forward and leveraging available data to learning to act, by supporting users with recommendations derived from an optimal strategy (measure of performance). We take the optimization perspective of one process actor and we recommend the best activities to execute next, in response to what happens in a complex external environment, where there is no control on exogenous factors. To this aim, we investigate an approach that learns, by means of Reinforcement Learning, the optimal policy from the observation of past executions and recommends the best activities to carry on for optimizing a Key Performance Indicator of interest. The validity of the approach is demonstrated on two scenarios taken from real-life data.
abstract_zh: 过程数据可用性的兴起最近导致了数据驱动学习方法的发展。然而，这些方法中的大多数都限制了使用学习模型来预测正在进行的流程执行的未来。本文的目标是向前迈出一步，利用现有数据来学习行动，通过从最佳策略（绩效衡量）得出的建议来支持用户。我们从一个流程参与者的优化角度出发，推荐下一步要执行的最佳活动，以应对复杂的外部环境（外部因素无法控制）中发生的情况。为此，我们研究了一种方法，通过强化学习，从对过去执行的观察中学习最佳策略，并建议进行最佳活动以优化感兴趣的关键绩效指标。该方法的有效性在取自现实生活数据的两个场景中得到了证明。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在利用强化学习方法，根据历史流程数据学习最优策略，为用户提供推荐最佳下一步活动的建议，以优化关键绩效指标。
AI.motivation: 现有数据驱动方法主要用于预测流程未来，但缺乏在复杂外部环境中主动推荐最佳行动的策略，需通过强化学习优化决策。
AI.method: 采用强化学习框架，从历史流程数据中学习最优策略，通过模拟环境训练模型，推荐能优化关键绩效指标的活动。
AI.result: 在两个真实场景的数据验证中，该方法有效提升了关键绩效指标，证明了推荐策略的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出基于强化学习的推荐方法，有效解决了复杂环境中流程活动优化问题，为实际业务决策提供了数据驱动的解决方案。

authors_text: Yusuke Hirota,Yuta Nakashima,Noa Garcia
title: Quantifying Societal Bias Amplification in Image Captioning
title_zh: 量化图像字幕中的社会偏见放大
abstract: We study societal bias amplification in image captioning. Image captioning models have been shown to perpetuate gender and racial biases, however, metrics to measure, quantify, and evaluate the societal bias in captions are not yet standardized. We provide a comprehensive study on the strengths and limitations of each metric, and propose LIC, a metric to study captioning bias amplification. We argue that, for image captioning, it is not enough to focus on the correct prediction of the protected attribute, and the whole context should be taken into account. We conduct extensive evaluation on traditional and state-of-the-art image captioning models, and surprisingly find that, by only focusing on the protected attribute prediction, bias mitigation models are unexpectedly amplifying bias.
summary: We study societal bias amplification in image captioning. Image captioning models have been shown to perpetuate gender and racial biases, however, metrics to measure, quantify, and evaluate the societal bias in captions are not yet standardized. We provide a comprehensive study on the strengths and limitations of each metric, and propose LIC, a metric to study captioning bias amplification. We argue that, for image captioning, it is not enough to focus on the correct prediction of the protected attribute, and the whole context should be taken into account. We conduct extensive evaluation on traditional and state-of-the-art image captioning models, and surprisingly find that, by only focusing on the protected attribute prediction, bias mitigation models are unexpectedly amplifying bias.
abstract_zh: 我们研究图像字幕中的社会偏见放大。图像字幕模型已被证明会延续性别和种族偏见，然而，衡量、量化和评估字幕中社会偏见的指标尚未标准化。我们对每个指标的优点和局限性进行了全面的研究，并提出了 LIC，一种研究字幕偏差放大的指标。我们认为，对于图像字幕，仅仅关注受保护属性的正确预测是不够的，还应该考虑整个上下文。我们对传统和最先进的图像字幕模型进行了广泛的评估，并令人惊讶地发现，通过仅关注受保护的属性预测，偏差缓解模型意外地放大了偏差。

AI.tldr: 本文提出LIC指标，用于量化图像字幕生成中的社会偏见放大问题。
AI.motivation: 现有图像字幕模型存在性别和种族偏见，但缺乏标准化的度量方法来评估和减少这种偏见。
AI.method: 分析现有偏见度量指标的优缺点，提出LIC指标，并在传统及先进模型上进行广泛评估。
AI.result: 发现仅关注受保护属性预测的去偏模型可能意外放大社会偏见。
AI.conclusion: 评估图像字幕偏见需综合考虑上下文，LIC能有效量化偏见放大现象。

search_text: Quantifying Societal Bias Amplification in Image Captioning 量化图像字幕中的社会偏见放大 We study societal bias amplification in image captioning. Image captioning models have been shown to perpetuate gender and racial biases, however, metrics to measure, quantify, and evaluate the societal bias in captions are not yet standardized. We provide a comprehensive study on the strengths and limitations of each metric, and propose LIC, a metric to study captioning bias amplification. We argue that, for image captioning, it is not enough to focus on the correct prediction of the protected attribute, and the whole context should be taken into account. We conduct extensive evaluation on traditional and state-of-the-art image captioning models, and surprisingly find that, by only focusing on the protected attribute prediction, bias mitigation models are unexpectedly amplifying bias. 我们研究图像字幕中的社会偏见放大。图像字幕模型已被证明会延续性别和种族偏见，然而，衡量、量化和评估字幕中社会偏见的指标尚未标准化。我们对每个指标的优点和局限性进行了全面的研究，并提出了 LIC，一种研究字幕偏差放大的指标。我们认为，对于图像字幕，仅仅关注受保护属性的正确预测是不够的，还应该考虑整个上下文。我们对传统和最先进的图像字幕模型进行了广泛的评估，并令人惊讶地发现，通过仅关注受保护的属性预测，偏差缓解模型意外地放大了偏差。 本文提出LIC指标，用于量化图像字幕生成中的社会偏见放大问题。 Yusuke Hirota,Yuta Nakashima,Noa Garcia cs.CV,cs.MM

authors_text: Dmitry Minskiy,Miroslaw Bober
title: Efficient Hybrid Network: Inducting Scattering Features
title_zh: 高效混合网络：引入散射特性
abstract: Recent work showed that hybrid networks, which combine predefined and learnt filters within a single architecture, are more amenable to theoretical analysis and less prone to overfitting in data-limited scenarios. However, their performance has yet to prove competitive against the conventional counterparts when sufficient amounts of training data are available. In an attempt to address this core limitation of current hybrid networks, we introduce an Efficient Hybrid Network (E-HybridNet). We show that it is the first scattering based approach that consistently outperforms its conventional counterparts on a diverse range of datasets. It is achieved with a novel inductive architecture that embeds scattering features into the network flow using Hybrid Fusion Blocks. We also demonstrate that the proposed design inherits the key property of prior hybrid networks -- an effective generalisation in data-limited scenarios. Our approach successfully combines the best of the two worlds: flexibility and power of learnt features and stability and predictability of scattering representations.
summary: Recent work showed that hybrid networks, which combine predefined and learnt filters within a single architecture, are more amenable to theoretical analysis and less prone to overfitting in data-limited scenarios. However, their performance has yet to prove competitive against the conventional counterparts when sufficient amounts of training data are available. In an attempt to address this core limitation of current hybrid networks, we introduce an Efficient Hybrid Network (E-HybridNet). We show that it is the first scattering based approach that consistently outperforms its conventional counterparts on a diverse range of datasets. It is achieved with a novel inductive architecture that embeds scattering features into the network flow using Hybrid Fusion Blocks. We also demonstrate that the proposed design inherits the key property of prior hybrid networks -- an effective generalisation in data-limited scenarios. Our approach successfully combines the best of the two worlds: flexibility and power of learnt features and stability and predictability of scattering representations.
abstract_zh: 最近的研究表明，混合网络将预定义和学习的过滤器结合在一个架构中，更适合理论分析，并且在数据有限的场景中不太容易出现过度拟合。然而，当有足够数量的训练数据可用时，它们的性能尚未证明与传统同行相比具有竞争力。为了解决当前混合网络的这一核心限制，我们引入了高效混合网络（E-HybridNet）。我们证明，这是第一个基于散射的方法，在各种数据集上始终优于传统方法。它是通过一种新颖的归纳架构实现的，该架构使用混合融合块将散射特征嵌入到网络流中。我们还证明，所提出的设计继承了先前混合网络的关键属性——数据有限场景中的有效泛化。我们的方法成功地结合了两个世界的优点：学习特征的灵活性和力量以及散射表示的稳定性和可预测性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种高效混合网络（E-HybridNet），通过嵌入散射特征解决现有混合网络在数据充足场景下性能不足的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有混合网络在数据有限时表现优异但数据充足时性能不及传统方法，需改进以兼顾两种场景的性能。
AI.method: 设计新型Hybrid Fusion Blocks将散射特征嵌入网络流，构建首个基于散射变换的混合网络架构。
AI.result: 在多数据集上持续优于传统方法，同时继承原有混合网络的数据有限场景泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 该方法融合了学习特征的灵活性与散射表示的稳定性，实现了两种范式的性能优势互补。

authors_text: Rom Parnichkun,Matthew N. Dailey,Atsushi Yamashita
title: ReIL: A Framework for Reinforced Intervention-based Imitation Learning
title_zh: ReIL：基于强化干预的模仿学习框架
abstract: Compared to traditional imitation learning methods such as DAgger and DART, intervention-based imitation offers a more convenient and sample efficient data collection process to users. In this paper, we introduce Reinforced Intervention-based Learning (ReIL), a framework consisting of a general intervention-based learning algorithm and a multi-task imitation learning model aimed at enabling non-expert users to train agents in real environments with little supervision or fine tuning. ReIL achieves this with an algorithm that combines the advantages of imitation learning and reinforcement learning and a model capable of concurrently processing demonstrations, past experience, and current observations. Experimental results from real world mobile robot navigation challenges indicate that ReIL learns rapidly from sparse supervisor corrections without suffering deterioration in performance that is characteristic of supervised learning-based methods such as HG-Dagger and IWR. The results also demonstrate that in contrast to other intervention-based methods such as IARL and EGPO, ReIL can utilize an arbitrary reward function for training without any additional heuristics.
summary: Compared to traditional imitation learning methods such as DAgger and DART, intervention-based imitation offers a more convenient and sample efficient data collection process to users. In this paper, we introduce Reinforced Intervention-based Learning (ReIL), a framework consisting of a general intervention-based learning algorithm and a multi-task imitation learning model aimed at enabling non-expert users to train agents in real environments with little supervision or fine tuning. ReIL achieves this with an algorithm that combines the advantages of imitation learning and reinforcement learning and a model capable of concurrently processing demonstrations, past experience, and current observations. Experimental results from real world mobile robot navigation challenges indicate that ReIL learns rapidly from sparse supervisor corrections without suffering deterioration in performance that is characteristic of supervised learning-based methods such as HG-Dagger and IWR. The results also demonstrate that in contrast to other intervention-based methods such as IARL and EGPO, ReIL can utilize an arbitrary reward function for training without any additional heuristics.
abstract_zh: 与DAgger、DART等传统模仿学习方法相比，基于干预的模仿为用户提供了更加便捷、样本高效的数据收集过程。在本文中，我们介绍了基于强化干预的学习（ReIL），这是一个由通用的基于干预的学习算法和多任务模仿学习模型组成的框架，旨在使非专家用户能够在几乎没有监督或微调的情况下在真实环境中训练代理。 ReIL 通过结合了模仿学习和强化学习的优点的算法以及能够同时处理演示、过去的经验和当前观察的模型来实现这一目标。现实世界移动机器人导航挑战的实验结果表明，ReIL 可以从稀疏的监督修正中快速学习，而不会遭受基于监督学习的方法（例如 HG-Dagger 和 IWR）的性能恶化的影响。结果还表明，与 IARL 和 EGPO 等其他基于干预的方法相比，ReIL 可以利用任意奖励函数进行训练，而无需任何额外的启发式方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出ReIL框架，结合模仿学习与强化学习，使非专家用户能在真实环境中以少量监督训练智能体。
AI.motivation: 传统模仿学习方法（如DAgger）数据收集效率低，需大量专家示范；现有干预方法在稀疏反馈下性能下降或依赖特定奖励函数。
AI.method: ReIL框架包含通用干预学习算法与多任务模仿学习模型，可同时处理示范数据、历史经验与实时观测，无需额外启发式规则。
AI.result: 在真实移动机器人导航任务中，ReIL相比HG-Dagger等方法能快速学习稀疏修正指令，且性能不衰减；相较IARL等方法可灵活使用任意奖励函数。
AI.conclusion: ReIL通过融合模仿与强化学习优势，在真实场景中实现了高效、低监督的智能体训练，优于现有干预式学习方法。

authors_text: Xi Lin,Zhiyuan Yang,Qingfu Zhang
title: Pareto Set Learning for Neural Multi-objective Combinatorial Optimization
title_zh: 神经多目标组合优化的帕累托集学习
comment: Accepted by ICLR 2022, Final Camera-Ready Version
comments: Accepted by ICLR 2022, Final Camera-Ready Version
abstract: Multiobjective combinatorial optimization (MOCO) problems can be found in many real-world applications. However, exactly solving these problems would be very challenging, particularly when they are NP-hard. Many handcrafted heuristic methods have been proposed to tackle different MOCO problems over the past decades. In this work, we generalize the idea of neural combinatorial optimization, and develop a learning-based approach to approximate the whole Pareto set for a given MOCO problem without further search procedure. We propose a single preference-conditioned model to directly generate approximate Pareto solutions for any trade-off preference, and design an efficient multiobjective reinforcement learning algorithm to train this model. Our proposed method can be treated as a learning-based extension for the widely-used decomposition-based multiobjective evolutionary algorithm (MOEA/D). It uses a single model to accommodate all the possible preferences, whereas other methods use a finite number of solutions to approximate the Pareto set. Experimental results show that our proposed method significantly outperforms some other methods on the multiobjective traveling salesman problem, multiobjective vehicle routing problem, and multiobjective knapsack problem in terms of solution quality, speed, and model efficiency.
summary: Multiobjective combinatorial optimization (MOCO) problems can be found in many real-world applications. However, exactly solving these problems would be very challenging, particularly when they are NP-hard. We propose a single preference-conditioned model to directly generate approximate Pareto solutions for any trade-off preference, and design an efficient multiobjective reinforcement learning algorithm to train this model. Our proposed method can be treated as a learning-based extension for the widely-used decomposition-based multiobjective evolutionary algorithm (MOEA/D). It uses a single model to accommodate all the possible preferences, whereas other methods use a finite number of solutions to approximate the Pareto set. Experimental results show that our proposed method significantly outperforms some other methods on the multiobjective traveling salesman problem, multiobjective vehicle routing problem, and multiobjective knapsack problem in terms of solution quality, speed, and model efficiency.
abstract_zh: 多目标组合优化（MOCO）问题可以在许多实际应用中找到。然而，准确地解决这些问题将非常具有挑战性，特别是当它们是 NP 困难时。在过去的几十年里，人们提出了许多手工启发式方法来解决不同的 MOCO 问题。在这项工作中，我们概括了神经组合优化的思想，并开发了一种基于学习的方法来近似给定 MOCO 问题的整个 Pareto 集，而无需进一步的搜索过程。我们提出了一个单一的偏好条件模型来直接生成任何权衡偏好的近似帕累托解，并设计一种有效的多目标强化学习算法来训练该模型。我们提出的方法可以被视为广泛使用的基于分解的多目标进化算法（MOEA/D）的基于学习的扩展。它使用单个模型来适应所有可能的偏好，而其他方法则使用有限数量的解来近似帕累托集。实验结果表明，我们提出的方法在多目标旅行商问题、多目标车辆路径问题和多目标背包问题上在解决质量、速度和模型效率方面显着优于其他方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于神经网络的学习方法，用于直接生成多目标组合优化问题的近似帕累托解集，无需额外搜索过程。
AI.motivation: 传统多目标组合优化问题求解方法（如启发式算法）效率低且难以处理NP难问题，需更高效的学习方法。
AI.method: 设计单偏好条件模型直接生成帕累托解，并结合多目标强化学习算法训练模型，作为MOEA/D的扩展方法。
AI.result: 在多目标旅行商问题、车辆路径问题及背包问题上，该方法在解质量、速度和模型效率上均优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法验证了学习在多目标优化中的有效性，为未来研究提供了新的方向。

search_text: Pareto Set Learning for Neural Multi-objective Combinatorial Optimization 神经多目标组合优化的帕累托集学习 Multiobjective combinatorial optimization (MOCO) problems can be found in many real-world applications. However, exactly solving these problems would be very challenging, particularly when they are NP-hard. Many handcrafted heuristic methods have been proposed to tackle different MOCO problems over the past decades. In this work, we generalize the idea of neural combinatorial optimization, and develop a learning-based approach to approximate the whole Pareto set for a given MOCO problem without further search procedure. We propose a single preference-conditioned model to directly generate approximate Pareto solutions for any trade-off preference, and design an efficient multiobjective reinforcement learning algorithm to train this model. Our proposed method can be treated as a learning-based extension for the widely-used decomposition-based multiobjective evolutionary algorithm (MOEA/D). It uses a single model to accommodate all the possible preferences, whereas other methods use a finite number of solutions to approximate the Pareto set. Experimental results show that our proposed method significantly outperforms some other methods on the multiobjective traveling salesman problem, multiobjective vehicle routing problem, and multiobjective knapsack problem in terms of solution quality, speed, and model efficiency. 多目标组合优化（MOCO）问题可以在许多实际应用中找到。然而，准确地解决这些问题将非常具有挑战性，特别是当它们是 NP 困难时。在过去的几十年里，人们提出了许多手工启发式方法来解决不同的 MOCO 问题。在这项工作中，我们概括了神经组合优化的思想，并开发了一种基于学习的方法来近似给定 MOCO 问题的整个 Pareto 集，而无需进一步的搜索过程。我们提出了一个单一的偏好条件模型来直接生成任何权衡偏好的近似帕累托解，并设计一种有效的多目标强化学习算法来训练该模型。我们提出的方法可以被视为广泛使用的基于分解的多目标进化算法（MOEA/D）的基于学习的扩展。它使用单个模型来适应所有可能的偏好，而其他方法则使用有限数量的解来近似帕累托集。实验结果表明，我们提出的方法在多目标旅行商问题、多目标车辆路径问题和多目标背包问题上在解决质量、速度和模型效率方面显着优于其他方法。 本文提出一种基于神经网络的学习方法，用于直接生成多目标组合优化问题的近似帕累托解集，无需额外搜索过程。 Xi Lin,Zhiyuan Yang,Qingfu Zhang cs.LG,cs.NE,math.OC

authors_text: Jiangyun Li,Hong Yu,Chen Chen,Meng Ding,Sen Zha
title: Category Guided Attention Network for Brain Tumor Segmentation in MRI
title_zh: 用于 MRI 脑肿瘤分割的类别引导注意网络
abstract: Objective: Magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) has been widely used for the analysis and diagnosis of brain diseases. Accurate and automatic brain tumor segmentation is of paramount importance for radiation treatment. However, low tissue contrast in tumor regions makes it a challenging task.Approach: We propose a novel segmentation network named Category Guided Attention U-Net (CGA U-Net). In this model, we design a Supervised Attention Module (SAM) based on the attention mechanism, which can capture more accurate and stable long-range dependency in feature maps without introducing much computational cost. Moreover, we propose an intra-class update approach to reconstruct feature maps by aggregating pixels of the same category. Main results: Experimental results on the BraTS 2019 datasets show that the proposed method outperformers the state-of-the-art algorithms in both segmentation performance and computational complexity. Significance: The CGA U-Net can effectively capture the global semantic information in the MRI image by using the SAM module, while significantly reducing the computational cost. Code is available at https://github.com/delugewalker/CGA-U-Net.
summary: Objective: Magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) has been widely used for the analysis and diagnosis of brain diseases. Accurate and automatic brain tumor segmentation is of paramount importance for radiation treatment. However, low tissue contrast in tumor regions makes it a challenging task.Approach: We propose a novel segmentation network named Category Guided Attention U-Net (CGA U-Net). In this model, we design a Supervised Attention Module (SAM) based on the attention mechanism, which can capture more accurate and stable long-range dependency in feature maps without introducing much computational cost. Moreover, we propose an intra-class update approach to reconstruct feature maps by aggregating pixels of the same category. Main results: Experimental results on the BraTS 2019 datasets show that the proposed method outperformers the state-of-the-art algorithms in both segmentation performance and computational complexity. Significance: The CGA U-Net can effectively capture the global semantic information in the MRI image by using the SAM module, while significantly reducing the computational cost. Code is available at https://github.com/delugewalker/CGA-U-Net.
abstract_zh: 目的：磁共振成像（MRI）已广泛应用于脑部疾病的分析和诊断。准确、自动的脑肿瘤分割对于放射治疗至关重要。然而，肿瘤区域的低组织对比度使其成为一项具有挑战性的任务。 方法：我们提出了一种新颖的分割网络，名为类别引导注意 U-Net（CGA U-Net）。在这个模型中，我们设计了一个基于注意力机制的监督注意力模块（SAM），它可以在不引入太多计算成本的情况下捕获特征图中更准确和稳定的长程依赖性。此外，我们提出了一种类内更新方法，通过聚合同一类别的像素来重建特征图。主要结果：BraTS 2019 数据集上的实验结果表明，所提出的方法在分割性能和计算复杂度方面均优于最先进的算法。意义：CGA U-Net可以利用SAM模块有效捕获MRI图像中的全局语义信息，同时显着降低计算成本。代码可从 https://github.com/delugewalker/CGA-U-Net 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于类别引导注意力机制的U-Net网络（CGA U-Net），用于提高MRI图像中脑肿瘤分割的准确性和效率。
AI.motivation: 脑肿瘤MRI图像中肿瘤区域组织对比度低，导致分割困难；现有方法在计算复杂度与分割精度间难以平衡。
AI.method: 设计监督注意力模块（SAM）捕捉特征图长程依赖关系，并引入类内更新策略通过聚合同类像素重构特征图。
AI.result: 在BraTS 2019数据集实验中，CGA U-Net在分割性能和计算复杂度上均优于现有最先进算法。
AI.conclusion: CGA U-Net通过SAM模块有效捕捉MRI全局语义信息，同时显著降低计算成本，代码已开源。

authors_text: Shi Pu,Kaili Zhao,Mao Zheng
title: Alignment-Uniformity aware Representation Learning for Zero-shot Video Classification
title_zh: 零样本视频分类的对齐均匀性感知表示学习
abstract: Most methods tackle zero-shot video classification by aligning visual-semantic representations within seen classes, which limits generalization to unseen classes. To enhance model generalizability, this paper presents an end-to-end framework that preserves alignment and uniformity properties for representations on both seen and unseen classes. Specifically, we formulate a supervised contrastive loss to simultaneously align visual-semantic features (i.e., alignment) and encourage the learned features to distribute uniformly (i.e., uniformity). Unlike existing methods that only consider the alignment, we propose uniformity to preserve maximal-info of existing features, which improves the probability that unobserved features fall around observed data. Further, we synthesize features of unseen classes by proposing a class generator that interpolates and extrapolates the features of seen classes. Besides, we introduce two metrics, closeness and dispersion, to quantify the two properties and serve as new measurements of model generalizability. Experiments show that our method significantly outperforms SoTA by relative improvements of 28.1% on UCF101 and 27.0% on HMDB51. Code is available.
summary: Most methods tackle zero-shot video classification by aligning visual-semantic representations within seen classes, which limits generalization to unseen classes. To enhance model generalizability, this paper presents an end-to-end framework that preserves alignment and uniformity properties for representations on both seen and unseen classes. Specifically, we formulate a supervised contrastive loss to simultaneously align visual-semantic features (i.e., alignment) and encourage the learned features to distribute uniformly (i.e., uniformity). Unlike existing methods that only consider the alignment, we propose uniformity to preserve maximal-info of existing features, which improves the probability that unobserved features fall around observed data. Further, we synthesize features of unseen classes by proposing a class generator that interpolates and extrapolates the features of seen classes. Besides, we introduce two metrics, closeness and dispersion, to quantify the two properties and serve as new measurements of model generalizability. Experiments show that our method significantly outperforms SoTA by relative improvements of 28.1% on UCF101 and 27.0% on HMDB51. Code is available.
abstract_zh: 大多数方法通过在已见类别内对齐视觉语义表示来解决零镜头视频分类问题，这限制了对未见类别的泛化。为了增强模型的通用性，本文提出了一个端到端框架，该框架保留了可见类和不可见类表示的对齐和均匀性属性。具体来说，我们制定了监督对比损失来同时对齐视觉语义特征（即对齐）并鼓励学习的特征均匀分布（即均匀性）。与仅考虑对齐的现有方法不同，我们提出一致性来保留现有特征的最大信息，这提高了未观察到的特征落在观察到的数据周围的概率。此外，我们通过提出一个类生成器来内插和外推已见类的特征，从而合成未见类的特征。此外，我们引入了两个指标：接近度和分散度，来量化这两个属性并作为模型泛化性的新度量。实验表明，我们的方法明显优于 SoTA，在 UCF101 上相对提高了 28.1%，在 HMDB51 上相对提高了 27.0%。代码可用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种端到端框架，通过同时保持视觉-语义表示的对齐性与统一性，解决零样本视频分类中未见类泛化能力不足的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法仅关注已见类的视觉-语义对齐，忽视了特征分布的统一性，导致模型难以有效泛化到未见类。
AI.method: 设计监督对比损失函数联合优化对齐性与统一性，提出类生成器合成未见类特征，并引入接近度与分散度两个指标量化模型泛化能力。
AI.result: 在UCF101和HMDB51数据集上分别较现有方法提升28.1%和27.0%，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 通过联合优化对齐性与统一性，显著提升零样本视频分类性能，提出的度量指标为模型评估提供新视角。

result: 在UCF101和HMDB51数据集上分别较现有方法提升28.1%和27.0%，代码已开源。
conclusion: 通过联合优化对齐性与统一性，显著提升零样本视频分类性能，提出的度量指标为模型评估提供新视角。
search_text: Alignment-Uniformity aware Representation Learning for Zero-shot Video Classification 零样本视频分类的对齐均匀性感知表示学习 Most methods tackle zero-shot video classification by aligning visual-semantic representations within seen classes, which limits generalization to unseen classes. To enhance model generalizability, this paper presents an end-to-end framework that preserves alignment and uniformity properties for representations on both seen and unseen classes. Specifically, we formulate a supervised contrastive loss to simultaneously align visual-semantic features (i.e., alignment) and encourage the learned features to distribute uniformly (i.e., uniformity). Unlike existing methods that only consider the alignment, we propose uniformity to preserve maximal-info of existing features, which improves the probability that unobserved features fall around observed data. Further, we synthesize features of unseen classes by proposing a class generator that interpolates and extrapolates the features of seen classes. Besides, we introduce two metrics, closeness and dispersion, to quantify the two properties and serve as new measurements of model generalizability. Experiments show that our method significantly outperforms SoTA by relative improvements of 28.1% on UCF101 and 27.0% on HMDB51. Code is available. 大多数方法通过在已见类别内对齐视觉语义表示来解决零镜头视频分类问题，这限制了对未见类别的泛化。为了增强模型的通用性，本文提出了一个端到端框架，该框架保留了可见类和不可见类表示的对齐和均匀性属性。具体来说，我们制定了监督对比损失来同时对齐视觉语义特征（即对齐）并鼓励学习的特征均匀分布（即均匀性）。与仅考虑对齐的现有方法不同，我们提出一致性来保留现有特征的最大信息，这提高了未观察到的特征落在观察到的数据周围的概率。此外，我们通过提出一个类生成器来内插和外推已见类的特征，从而合成未见类的特征。此外，我们引入了两个指标：接近度和分散度，来量化这两个属性并作为模型泛化性的新度量。实验表明，我们的方法明显优于 SoTA，在 UCF101 上相对提高了 28.1%，在 HMDB51 上相对提高了 27.0%。代码可用。 本文提出一种端到端框架，通过同时保持视觉-语义表示的对齐性与统一性，解决零样本视频分类中未见类泛化能力不足的问题。 Shi Pu,Kaili Zhao,Mao Zheng cs.CV

authors_text: Wei Li,Xing Wang,Xin Xia,Jie Wu,Jiashi Li,Xuefeng Xiao,Min Zheng,Shiping Wen
title: SepViT: Separable Vision Transformer
title_zh: SepViT：可分离视觉变压器
abstract: Vision Transformers have witnessed prevailing success in a series of vision tasks. However, these Transformers often rely on extensive computational costs to achieve high performance, which is burdensome to deploy on resource-constrained devices. To alleviate this issue, we draw lessons from depthwise separable convolution and imitate its ideology to design an efficient Transformer backbone, i.e., Separable Vision Transformer, abbreviated as SepViT. SepViT helps to carry out the local-global information interaction within and among the windows in sequential order via a depthwise separable self-attention. The novel window token embedding and grouped self-attention are employed to compute the attention relationship among windows with negligible cost and establish long-range visual interactions across multiple windows, respectively. Extensive experiments on general-purpose vision benchmarks demonstrate that SepViT can achieve a state-of-the-art trade-off between performance and latency. Among them, SepViT achieves 84.2% top-1 accuracy on ImageNet-1K classification while decreasing the latency by 40%, compared to the ones with similar accuracy (e.g., CSWin). Furthermore, SepViT achieves 51.0% mIoU on ADE20K semantic segmentation task, 47.9 AP on the RetinaNet-based COCO detection task, 49.4 box AP and 44.6 mask AP on Mask R-CNN-based COCO object detection and instance segmentation tasks.
summary: Vision Transformers have witnessed prevailing success in a series of vision tasks. However, these Transformers often rely on extensive computational costs to achieve high performance, which is burdensome to deploy on resource-constrained devices. To alleviate this issue, we draw lessons from depthwise separable convolution and imitate its ideology to design an efficient Transformer backbone, i.e., Separable Vision Transformer, abbreviated as SepViT. SepViT helps to carry out the local-global information interaction within and among the windows in sequential order via a depthwise separable self-attention. The novel window token embedding and grouped self-attention are employed to compute the attention relationship among windows with negligible cost and establish long-range visual interactions across multiple windows, respectively. Extensive experiments on general-purpose vision benchmarks demonstrate that SepViT can achieve a state-of-the-art trade-off between performance and latency. Among them, SepViT achieves 84.2% top-1 accuracy on ImageNet-1K classification while decreasing the latency by 40%, compared to the ones with similar accuracy (e.g., CSWin). Furthermore, SepViT achieves 51.0% mIoU on ADE20K semantic segmentation task, 47.9 AP on the RetinaNet-based COCO detection task, 49.4 box AP and 44.6 mask AP on Mask R-CNN-based COCO object detection and instance segmentation tasks.
abstract_zh: Vision Transformers 在一系列视觉任务中取得了巨大成功。然而，这些 Transformer 通常依赖大量的计算成本来实现高性能，这在资源受限的设备上部署起来很麻烦。为了缓解这个问题，我们借鉴深度可分离卷积的思想，设计了一个高效的 Transformer 主干，即 Separable Vision Transformer，缩写为 SepViT。 SepViT 通过深度可分离的自注意力，有助于按顺序在窗口内和窗口之间进行局部-全局信息交互。新颖的窗口令牌嵌入和分组自注意力分别用于以可忽略的成本计算窗口之间的注意力关系，并分别建立跨多个窗口的远程视觉交互。对通用视觉基准的大量实验表明，SepViT 可以在性能和延迟之间实现最先进的权衡。其中，SepViT 在 ImageNet-1K 分类上实现了 84.2% 的 top-1 准确率，同时与具有相似准确度的产品（例如 CSWin）相比，延迟降低了 40%。此外，SepViT 在 ADE20K 语义分割任务上实现了 51.0% mIoU，在基于 RetinaNet 的 COCO 检测任务上实现了 47.9 AP，在基于 Mask R-CNN 的 COCO 对象检测和实例分割任务上实现了 49.4 box AP 和 44.6 mask AP。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种高效的视觉Transformer架构SepViT，通过借鉴深度可分离卷积的思想，降低计算成本同时保持高性能。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉Transformer计算成本高，难以部署在资源受限设备上。受深度可分离卷积启发，设计更高效的Transformer骨干网络。
AI.method: 采用深度可分离自注意力机制，结合窗口化token嵌入和分组自注意力，实现局部-全局信息交互与跨窗口长距离依赖建模。
AI.result: 在ImageNet-1K分类任务中达到84.2%准确率（较同类模型延迟降低40%），ADE20K分割任务51.0% mIoU，COCO检测任务达到47.9 AP。
AI.conclusion: SepViT在保持高性能的同时显著降低计算延迟，在多任务基准测试中展现优异的效率-性能平衡能力。
