authors_text: Pol van Rijn,Silvan Mertes,Dominik Schiller,Piotr Dura,Hubert Siuzdak,Peter M. C. Harrison,Elisabeth André,Nori Jacoby
title: VoiceMe: Personalized voice generation in TTS
title_zh: VoiceMe：TTS 中的个性化语音生成
comment: Accepted to Interspeech'22. Audio and video samples are available at: https://polvanrijn.github.io/VoiceMe/
comments: Accepted to Interspeech'22. Audio and video samples are available at: https://polvanrijn.github.io/VoiceMe/
abstract: Novel text-to-speech systems can generate entirely new voices that were not seen during training. However, it remains a difficult task to efficiently create personalized voices from a high-dimensional speaker space. In this work, we use speaker embeddings from a state-of-the-art speaker verification model (SpeakerNet) trained on thousands of speakers to condition a TTS model. We employ a human sampling paradigm to explore this speaker latent space. We show that users can create voices that fit well to photos of faces, art portraits, and cartoons. We recruit online participants to collectively manipulate the voice of a speaking face. We show that (1) a separate group of human raters confirms that the created voices match the faces, (2) speaker gender apparent from the face is well-recovered in the voice, and (3) people are consistently moving towards the real voice prototype for the given face. Our results demonstrate that this technology can be applied in a wide number of applications including character voice development in audiobooks and games, personalized speech assistants, and individual voices for people with speech impairment.
summary: Novel text-to-speech systems can generate entirely new voices that were not seen during training. However, it remains a difficult task to efficiently create personalized voices from a high-dimensional speaker space. In this work, we use speaker embeddings from a state-of-the-art speaker verification model (SpeakerNet) trained on thousands of speakers to condition a TTS model. We employ a human sampling paradigm to explore this speaker latent space. We show that users can create voices that fit well to photos of faces, art portraits, and cartoons. We recruit online participants to collectively manipulate the voice of a speaking face. We show that (1) a separate group of human raters confirms that the created voices match the faces, (2) speaker gender apparent from the face is well-recovered in the voice, and (3) people are consistently moving towards the real voice prototype for the given face. Our results demonstrate that this technology can be applied in a wide number of applications including character voice development in audiobooks and games, personalized speech assistants, and individual voices for people with speech impairment.
abstract_zh: 新颖的文本转语音系统可以生成训练期间未曾见过的全新声音。然而，从高维扬声器空间有效地创建个性化声音仍然是一项艰巨的任务。在这项工作中，我们使用来自最先进的说话人验证模型 (SpeakerNet) 的说话人嵌入（该模型经过数千名说话人的训练）来调节 TTS 模型。我们采用人类采样范式来探索这个说话者的潜在空间。我们表明，用户可以创建非常适合脸部、艺术肖像和卡通照片的声音。我们招募在线参与者来集体操纵说话面孔的声音。我们表明：(1) 一组单独的人类评估者确认创建的声音与面部相匹配，(2) 从面部明显看出的说话者性别在声音中得到了很好的恢复，(3) 人们始终朝着给定面部的真实声音原型发展。我们的研究结果表明，该技术可应用于多种应用，包括有声读物和游戏中的角色语音开发、个性化语音助手以及针对言语障碍人士的个性化语音。

AI.tldr: 本文提出VoiceMe系统，通过结合说话人嵌入和人类采样范式，实现与视觉内容（如照片、卡通）匹配的个性化语音生成。
AI.motivation: 现有TTS系统难以高效生成与高维说话人特征匹配的个性化声音，尤其缺乏与视觉内容（如人脸、艺术形象）的关联性。
AI.method: 利用SpeakerNet提取说话人嵌入，条件化TTS模型；通过在线参与者协作调整语音参数，使生成语音与目标视觉内容匹配。
AI.result: 实验表明生成语音与人脸性别特征一致，且用户倾向接近真实语音原型；技术可应用于有声书、游戏角色配音及语音障碍辅助等场景。
AI.conclusion: 该方法验证了语音与视觉特征联动生成的可行性，为个性化语音应用提供了新思路。

Our results demonstrate that this technology can be applied in a wide number of applications including character voice development in audiobooks and games, personalized speech assistants, and individual voices for people with speech impairment. 新颖的文本转语音系统可以生成训练期间未曾见过的全新声音。然而，从高维扬声器空间有效地创建个性化声音仍然是一项艰巨的任务。在这项工作中，我们使用来自最先进的说话人验证模型 (SpeakerNet) 的说话人嵌入（该模型经过数千名说话人的训练）来调节 TTS 模型。我们采用人类采样范式来探索这个说话者的潜在空间。我们表明，用户可以创建非常适合脸部、艺术肖像和卡通照片的声音。我们招募在线参与者来集体操纵说话面孔的声音。我们表明：(1) 一组单独的人类评估者确认创建的声音与面部相匹配，(2) 从面部明显看出的说话者性别在声音中得到了很好的恢复，(3) 人们始终朝着给定面部的真实声音原型发展。我们的研究结果表明，该技术可应用于多种应用，包括有声读物和游戏中的角色语音开发、个性化语音助手以及针对言语障碍人士的个性化语音。 本文提出VoiceMe系统，通过结合说话人嵌入和人类采样范式，实现与视觉内容（如照片、卡通）匹配的个性化语音生成。 Pol van Rijn,Silvan Mertes,Dominik Schiller,Piotr Dura,Hubert Siuzdak,Peter M. C. Harrison,Elisabeth André,Nori Jacoby cs.SD,cs.HC,eess.AS

authors_text: Haibin Wu,Lingwei Meng,Jiawen Kang,Jinchao Li,Xu Li,Xixin Wu,Hung-yi Lee,Helen Meng
title: Spoofing-Aware Speaker Verification by Multi-Level Fusion
title_zh: 通过多级融合进行欺骗感知扬声器验证
abstract: Recently, many novel techniques have been introduced to deal with spoofing attacks, and achieve promising countermeasure (CM) performances. However, these works only take the stand-alone CM models into account. Nowadays, a spoofing aware speaker verification (SASV) challenge which aims to facilitate the research of integrated CM and ASV models, arguing that jointly optimizing CM and ASV models will lead to better performance, is taking place. In this paper, we propose a novel multi-model and multi-level fusion strategy to tackle the SASV task. Compared with purely scoring fusion and embedding fusion methods, this framework first utilizes embeddings from CM models, propagating CM embeddings into a CM block to obtain a CM score. In the second-level fusion, the CM score and ASV scores directly from ASV systems will be concatenated into a prediction block for the final decision. As a result, the best single fusion system has achieved the SASV-EER of 0.97% on the evaluation set. Then by ensembling the top-5 fusion systems, the final SASV-EER reached 0.89%.
summary: Recently, many novel techniques have been introduced to deal with spoofing attacks, and achieve promising countermeasure (CM) performances. However, these works only take the stand-alone CM models into account. Nowadays, a spoofing aware speaker verification (SASV) challenge which aims to facilitate the research of integrated CM and ASV models, arguing that jointly optimizing CM and ASV models will lead to better performance, is taking place. In this paper, we propose a novel multi-model and multi-level fusion strategy to tackle the SASV task. Compared with purely scoring fusion and embedding fusion methods, this framework first utilizes embeddings from CM models, propagating CM embeddings into a CM block to obtain a CM score. In the second-level fusion, the CM score and ASV scores directly from ASV systems will be concatenated into a prediction block for the final decision. As a result, the best single fusion system has achieved the SASV-EER of 0.97% on the evaluation set. Then by ensembling the top-5 fusion systems, the final SASV-EER reached 0.89%.
abstract_zh: 最近，许多新技术被引入来应对欺骗攻击，并实现有希望的对策（CM）性能。然而，这些工作只考虑了独立的 CM 模型。如今，一场欺骗感知说话人验证（SASV）挑战赛正在进行，旨在促进集成 CM 和 ASV 模型的研究，认为联合优化 CM 和 ASV 模型将带来更好的性能。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的多模型和多层次融合策略来解决 SASV 任务。与纯粹的评分融合和嵌入融合方法相比，该框架首先利用 CM 模型的嵌入，将 CM 嵌入传播到 CM 块中以获得 CM 分数。在第二级融合中，直接来自 ASV 系统的 CM 分数和 ASV 分数将连接成预测块以进行最终决策。结果，最好的单一融合系统在评估集上取得了 0.97% 的 SASV-EER。然后通过集成top-5融合系统，最终的SASV-EER达到0.89%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多级融合策略，通过结合反欺骗模型（CM）和说话人验证模型（ASV），提升防欺骗说话人验证（SASV）性能。
AI.motivation: 现有反欺骗技术多采用独立的CM模型，未充分整合CM与ASV模型，而联合优化两者可提升整体性能。
AI.method: 框架分两阶段融合：首先利用CM模型嵌入生成CM分数，再将CM分数与ASV分数拼接输入预测模块，最终通过多系统集成决策。
AI.result: 最优单融合系统在测试集上达到SASV-EER 0.97%，集成前五名系统后EER进一步降至0.89%。
AI.conclusion: 多级融合策略有效结合CM与ASV优势，为SASV任务提供了性能更优的解决方案。

authors_text: Kunhee Kim,Sanghun Park,Eunyeong Jeon,Taehun Kim,Daijin Kim
title: A Style-aware Discriminator for Controllable Image Translation
title_zh: 用于可控图像翻译的风格感知鉴别器
abstract: Current image-to-image translations do not control the output domain beyond the classes used during training, nor do they interpolate between different domains well, leading to implausible results. This limitation largely arises because labels do not consider the semantic distance. To mitigate such problems, we propose a style-aware discriminator that acts as a critic as well as a style encoder to provide conditions. The style-aware discriminator learns a controllable style space using prototype-based self-supervised learning and simultaneously guides the generator. Experiments on multiple datasets verify that the proposed model outperforms current state-of-the-art image-to-image translation methods. In contrast with current methods, the proposed approach supports various applications, including style interpolation, content transplantation, and local image translation.
summary: Current image-to-image translations do not control the output domain beyond the classes used during training, nor do they interpolate between different domains well, leading to implausible results. This limitation largely arises because labels do not consider the semantic distance. To mitigate such problems, we propose a style-aware discriminator that acts as a critic as well as a style encoder to provide conditions. The style-aware discriminator learns a controllable style space using prototype-based self-supervised learning and simultaneously guides the generator. Experiments on multiple datasets verify that the proposed model outperforms current state-of-the-art image-to-image translation methods. In contrast with current methods, the proposed approach supports various applications, including style interpolation, content transplantation, and local image translation.
abstract_zh: 当前的图像到图像的转换不能控制训练期间使用的类之外​​的输出域，也不能很好地在不同域之间进行插值，从而导致令人难以置信的结果。这种限制很大程度上是因为标签不考虑语义距离。为了缓解此类问题，我们提出了一种风格感知鉴别器，它充当批评者以及提供条件的风格编码器。风格感知鉴别器使用基于原型的自监督学习来学习可控风格空间，并同时指导生成器。对多个数据集的实验验证了所提出的模型优于当前最先进的图像到图像转换方法。与当前的方法相比，所提出的方法支持各种应用，包括风格插值、内容移植和本地图像翻译。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种风格感知判别器，用于实现可控的图像翻译，解决现有方法在领域控制和跨领域插值中的不足。
AI.motivation: 当前图像到图像的翻译方法无法精确控制输出领域，且在不同领域间插值时易产生不合理结果，主要因标签未考虑语义距离。
AI.method: 设计风格感知判别器，兼具评论家和风格编码器功能，通过基于原型的自监督学习构建可控制的风格空间，并指导生成器训练。
AI.result: 在多个数据集上验证，该模型优于现有最先进方法，支持风格插值、内容移植和局部图像翻译等应用。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法通过建模语义距离和风格空间，有效提升了图像翻译的可控性和跨领域生成质量。

authors_text: Xiaotong Li,Yixiao Ge,Kun Yi,Zixuan Hu,Ying Shan,Ling-Yu Duan
title: mc-BEiT: Multi-choice Discretization for Image BERT Pre-training
title_zh: mc-BEiT：图像 BERT 预训练的多选离散化
abstract: Image BERT pre-training with masked image modeling (MIM) becomes a popular practice to cope with self-supervised representation learning. A seminal work, BEiT, casts MIM as a classification task with a visual vocabulary, tokenizing the continuous visual signals into discrete vision tokens using a pre-learned dVAE. Despite a feasible solution, the improper discretization hinders further improvements of image pre-training. Since image discretization has no ground-truth answers, we believe that the masked patch should not be assigned with a unique token id even if a better tokenizer can be obtained. In this work, we introduce an improved BERT-style image pre-training method, namely mc-BEiT, which performs MIM proxy tasks towards eased and refined multi-choice training objectives. Specifically, the multi-choice supervision for the masked image patches is formed by the soft probability vectors of the discrete token ids, which are predicted by the off-the-shelf image tokenizer and further refined by high-level inter-patch perceptions resorting to the observation that similar patches should share their choices. Extensive experiments on classification, segmentation, and detection tasks demonstrate the superiority of our method, e.g., the pre-trained ViT-B achieves 84.1% top-1 fine-tuning accuracy on ImageNet-1K classification, 49.2% AP^b and 44.0% AP^m of object detection and instance segmentation on COCO, 50.8% mIOU on ADE20K semantic segmentation, outperforming the competitive counterparts. The code will be available at https://github.com/lixiaotong97/mc-BEiT.
summary: Image BERT pre-training with masked image modeling (MIM) becomes a popular practice to cope with self-supervised representation learning. A seminal work, BEiT, casts MIM as a classification task with a visual vocabulary, tokenizing the continuous visual signals into discrete vision tokens using a pre-learned dVAE. Despite a feasible solution, the improper discretization hinders further improvements of image pre-training. Since image discretization has no ground-truth answers, we believe that the masked patch should not be assigned with a unique token id even if a better tokenizer can be obtained. In this work, we introduce an improved BERT-style image pre-training method, namely mc-BEiT, which performs MIM proxy tasks towards eased and refined multi-choice training objectives. Specifically, the multi-choice supervision for the masked image patches is formed by the soft probability vectors of the discrete token ids, which are predicted by the off-the-shelf image tokenizer and further refined by high-level inter-patch perceptions resorting to the observation that similar patches should share their choices. Extensive experiments on classification, segmentation, and detection tasks demonstrate the superiority of our method, e.g., the pre-trained ViT-B achieves 84.1% top-1 fine-tuning accuracy on ImageNet-1K classification, 49.2% AP^b and 44.0% AP^m of object detection and instance segmentation on COCO, 50.8% mIOU on ADE20K semantic segmentation, outperforming the competitive counterparts. The code will be available at https://github.com/lixiaotong97/mc-BEiT.
abstract_zh: 使用掩模图像建模（MIM）进行图像 BERT 预训练成为应对自监督表示学习的流行做法。一项开创性的工作 BEiT 将 MIM 视为具有视觉词汇的分类任务，使用预先学习的 dVAE 将连续视觉信号标记为离散视觉标记。尽管有可行的解决方案，但不适当的离散化阻碍了图像预训练的进一步改进。由于图像离散化没有真实答案，因此我们认为即使可以获得更好的标记器，也不应该为屏蔽补丁分配唯一的标记 ID。在这项工作中，我们引入了一种改进的 BERT 式图像预训练方法，即 mc-BEiT，它执行 MIM 代理任务以实现轻松和精细的多选择训练目标。具体来说，屏蔽图像补丁的多选监督是由离散令牌 id 的软概率向量形成的，这些向量由现成的图像令牌生成器预测，并通过高级补丁间感知进一步细化，这些感知依赖于类似补丁应该共享其选择的观察。在分类、分割和检测任务上的大量实验证明了我们方法的优越性，例如，预训练的 ViT-B 在 ImageNet-1K 分类上实现了 84.1% top-1 微调精度，在 COCO 上实现了 49.2% AP^b 和 44.0% AP^m 的对象检测和实例分割，在 ADE20K 语义分割上实现了 50.8% mIOU，优于竞争对手。代码可在 https://github.com/lixiaotong97/mc-BEiT 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种改进的图像预训练方法mc-BEiT，通过多选离散化策略优化视觉信号的分词过程。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在图像离散化过程中存在唯一token分配的局限性，导致预训练效果受限，而合理离散化缺乏明确标准。
AI.method: 通过预训练图像分词器生成软概率向量作为多选监督信号，并利用高阶跨块感知机制优化相似块的共享选择。
AI.result: 在ImageNet-1K分类、COCO检测与分割、ADE20K分割任务中分别达到84.1%、49.2% AP^b/44.0% AP^m、50.8% mIOU的性能指标。
AI.conclusion: 多选离散化策略有效提升了图像预训练的表示能力，为视觉BERT模型提供了更优的预训练框架。

search_text: mc-BEiT: Multi-choice Discretization for Image BERT Pre-training mc-BEiT：图像 BERT 预训练的多选离散化 Image BERT pre-training with masked image modeling (MIM) becomes a popular practice to cope with self-supervised representation learning. A seminal work, BEiT, casts MIM as a classification task with a visual vocabulary, tokenizing the continuous visual signals into discrete vision tokens using a pre-learned dVAE. Despite a feasible solution, the improper discretization hinders further improvements of image pre-training. Since image discretization has no ground-truth answers, we believe that the masked patch should not be assigned with a unique token id even if a better tokenizer can be obtained. In this work, we introduce an improved BERT-style image pre-training method, namely mc-BEiT, which performs MIM proxy tasks towards eased and refined multi-choice training objectives. Specifically, the multi-choice supervision for the masked image patches is formed by the soft probability vectors of the discrete token ids, which are predicted by the off-the-shelf image tokenizer and further refined by high-level inter-patch perceptions resorting to the observation that similar patches should share their choices. Extensive experiments on classification, segmentation, and detection tasks demonstrate the superiority of our method, e.g., the pre-trained ViT-B achieves 84.1% top-1 fine-tuning accuracy on ImageNet-1K classification, 49.2% AP^b and 44.0% AP^m of object detection and instance segmentation on COCO, 50.8% mIOU on ADE20K semantic segmentation, outperforming the competitive counterparts. The code will be available at https://github.com/lixiaotong97/mc-BEiT. 使用掩模图像建模（MIM）进行图像 BERT 预训练成为应对自监督表示学习的流行做法。一项开创性的工作 BEiT 将 MIM 视为具有视觉词汇的分类任务，使用预先学习的 dVAE 将连续视觉信号标记为离散视觉标记。尽管有可行的解决方案，但不适当的离散化阻碍了图像预训练的进一步改进。由于图像离散化没有真实答案，因此我们认为即使可以获得更好的标记器，也不应该为屏蔽补丁分配唯一的标记 ID。在这项工作中，我们引入了一种改进的 BERT 式图像预训练方法，即 mc-BEiT，它执行 MIM 代理任务以实现轻松和精细的多选择训练目标。具体来说，屏蔽图像补丁的多选监督是由离散令牌 id 的软概率向量形成的，这些向量由现成的图像令牌生成器预测，并通过高级补丁间感知进一步细化，这些感知依赖于类似补丁应该共享其选择的观察。在分类、分割和检测任务上的大量实验证明了我们方法的优越性，例如，预训练的 ViT-B 在 ImageNet-1K 分类上实现了 84.1% top-1 微调精度，在 COCO 上实现了 49.2% AP^b 和 44.0% AP^m 的对象检测和实例分割，在 ADE20K 语义分割上实现了 50.8% mIOU，优于竞争对手。代码可在 https://github.com/lixiaotong97/mc-BEiT 获取。 本文提出了一种改进的图像预训练方法mc-BEiT，通过多选离散化策略优化视觉信号的分词过程。 Xiaotong Li,Yixiao Ge,Kun Yi,Zixuan Hu,Ying Shan,Ling-Yu Duan cs.CV

authors_text: Zoe Porter,Ibrahim Habli,John McDermid,Marten Kaas
title: A Principles-based Ethics Assurance Argument Pattern for AI and Autonomous Systems
title_zh: 人工智能和自治系统基于原则的道德保证论证模式
abstract: An assurance case is a structured argument, typically produced by safety engineers, to communicate confidence that a critical or complex system, such as an aircraft, will be acceptably safe within its intended context. Assurance cases often inform third party approval of a system. One emerging proposition within the trustworthy AI and autonomous systems (AI/AS) research community is to use assurance cases to instil justified confidence that specific AI/AS will be ethically acceptable when operational in well-defined contexts. This paper substantially develops the proposition and makes it concrete. It brings together the assurance case methodology with a set of ethical principles to structure a principles-based ethics assurance argument pattern. The principles are justice, beneficence, non-maleficence, and respect for human autonomy, with the principle of transparency playing a supporting role. The argument pattern, shortened to the acronym PRAISE, is described. The objective of the proposed PRAISE argument pattern is to provide a reusable template for individual ethics assurance cases, by which engineers, developers, operators, or regulators could justify, communicate, or challenge a claim about the overall ethical acceptability of the use of a specific AI/AS in a given socio-technical context. We apply the pattern to the hypothetical use case of an autonomous robo-taxi service in a city centre.

Assurance cases often inform third party approval of a system. One emerging proposition within the trustworthy AI and autonomous systems (AI/AS) research community is to use assurance cases to instil justified confidence that specific AI/AS will be ethically acceptable when operational in well-defined contexts. This paper substantially develops the proposition and makes it concrete. It brings together the assurance case methodology with a set of ethical principles to structure a principles-based ethics assurance argument pattern. The principles are justice, beneficence, non-maleficence, and respect for human autonomy, with the principle of transparency playing a supporting role. The argument pattern, shortened to the acronym PRAISE, is described. The objective of the proposed PRAISE argument pattern is to provide a reusable template for individual ethics assurance cases, by which engineers, developers, operators, or regulators could justify, communicate, or challenge a claim about the overall ethical acceptability of the use of a specific AI/AS in a given socio-technical context. We apply the pattern to the hypothetical use case of an autonomous robo-taxi service in a city centre.
abstract_zh: 保证案例是一种结构化论证，通常由安全工程师提出，用于表达对关键或复杂系统（例如飞机）在其预期环境中具有可接受的安全性的信心。保证案例通常会告知第三方对系统的批准。值得信赖的人工智能和自主系统（AI/AS）研究界中的一个新兴主张是使用保证案例来灌输合理的信心，即特定的人工智能/AS在明确定义的环境中运行时在道德上是可接受的。本文实质上发展了这一命题并使之具体化。它将保证案例方法与一组道德原则结合在一起，构建基于原则的道德保证论证模式。其原则是正义、仁慈、非恶意、尊重人类自主权，并以透明原则为支撑。描述了论证模式，缩写为首字母缩略词 PRAISE。所提出的 PRAISE 论证模式的目标是为个人道德保证案例提供一个可重用的模板，工程师、开发人员、运营商或监管机构可以通过该模板来证明、沟通或质疑有关在给定社会技术背景下使用特定 AI/AS 的总体道德可接受性的主张。我们将该模式应用于市中心自动驾驶出租车服务的假设用例。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于伦理原则的论证模式PRAISE，用于确保人工智能和自主系统的伦理可接受性。
AI.motivation: 现有安全工程中的保证案例方法难以直接应用于AI/AS的伦理评估，需建立结构化框架以确保其伦理合规性。
AI.method: 整合保证案例方法与正义、仁爱、不伤害、尊重自主四项伦理原则，构建可复用的PRAISE论证模板。
AI.result: 开发出PRAISE框架并应用于自动驾驶出租车场景，验证其在具体社会技术环境中的伦理论证有效性。
AI.conclusion: PRAISE为工程师和监管者提供系统化工具，可增强AI/AS在特定应用场景中的伦理可接受性论证能力。

authors_text: Jiri Mekyska,Virginia Espinosa-Duró,Marcos Faundez-Zanuy
title: Face segmentation: A comparison between visible and thermal images
title_zh: 人脸分割：可见光图像和热图像之间的比较
comment: 5 pages, published in 44th Annual 2010 IEEE International Carnahan Conference on Security Technology, 2010, pp. 185-189, 5-8 Oct. 2010 San Jose (California, USA)
comments: 5 pages, published in 44th Annual 2010 IEEE International Carnahan Conference on Security Technology, 2010, pp. 185-189, 5-8 Oct. 2010 San Jose (California, USA)
abstract: Face segmentation is a first step for face biometric systems. In this paper we present a face segmentation algorithm for thermographic images. This algorithm is compared with the classic Viola and Jones algorithm used for visible images. Experimental results reveal that, when segmenting a multispectral (visible and thermal) face database, the proposed algorithm is more than 10 times faster, while the accuracy of face segmentation in thermal images is higher than in case of Viola-Jones
summary: Face segmentation is a first step for face biometric systems. In this paper we present a face segmentation algorithm for thermographic images. This algorithm is compared with the classic Viola and Jones algorithm used for visible images. Experimental results reveal that, when segmenting a multispectral (visible and thermal) face database, the proposed algorithm is more than 10 times faster, while the accuracy of face segmentation in thermal images is higher than in case of Viola-Jones
abstract_zh: 人脸分割是人脸生物识别系统的第一步。在本文中，我们提出了一种热成像图像的人脸分割算法。该算法与用于可见图像的经典 Viola 和 Jones 算法进行了比较。实验结果表明，在分割多光谱（可见光和热）人脸数据库时，该算法速度提高了10倍以上，而热图像中人脸分割的准确率比Viola-Jones的情况要高

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于热成像图像的人脸分割算法，并与传统可见光图像分割算法Viola-Jones进行对比分析。
AI.motivation: 传统人脸生物识别系统多依赖可见光图像，但热成像图像在复杂光照条件下具有优势，需开发适应热成像的高效分割算法。
AI.method: 设计针对热成像图像的分割算法，通过实验对比其与Viola-Jones算法在多光谱人脸数据库上的性能差异。
AI.result: 新算法处理多光谱数据库时速度提升超10倍，且热成像图像分割准确率显著高于Viola-Jones算法。
AI.conclusion: 所提算法在热成像人脸分割任务中兼具高效性与高精度，为多光谱生物识别系统提供更优解决方案。

ai_content_json.conclusion: 所提算法在热成像人脸分割任务中兼具高效性与高精度，为多光谱生物识别系统提供更优解决方案。

tldr: 本文提出了一种用于热成像图像的人脸分割算法，并与传统可见光图像分割算法Viola-Jones进行对比分析。
motivation: 传统人脸生物识别系统多依赖可见光图像，但热成像图像在复杂光照条件下具有优势，需开发适应热成像的高效分割算法。
method: 设计针对热成像图像的分割算法，通过实验对比其与Viola-Jones算法在多光谱人脸数据库上的性能差异。
result: 新算法处理多光谱数据库时速度提升超10倍，且热成像图像分割准确率显著高于Viola-Jones算法。
conclusion: 所提算法在热成像人脸分割任务中兼具高效性与高精度，为多光谱生物识别系统提供更优解决方案。
search_text: Face segmentation: A comparison between visible and thermal images 人脸分割：可见光图像和热图像之间的比较 Face segmentation is a first step for face biometric systems. In this paper we present a face segmentation algorithm for thermographic images. This algorithm is compared with the classic Viola and Jones algorithm used for visible images. Experimental results reveal that, when segmenting a multispectral (visible and thermal) face database, the proposed algorithm is more than 10 times faster, while the accuracy of face segmentation in thermal images is higher than in case of Viola-Jones 人脸分割是人脸生物识别系统的第一步。在本文中，我们提出了一种热成像图像的人脸分割算法。该算法与用于可见图像的经典 Viola 和 Jones 算法进行了比较。实验结果表明，在分割多光谱（可见光和热）人脸数据库时，该算法速度提高了10倍以上，而热图像中人脸分割的准确率比Viola-Jones的情况要高 本文提出了一种用于热成像图像的人脸分割算法，并与传统可见光图像分割算法Viola-Jones进行对比分析。 Jiri Mekyska,Virginia Espinosa-Duró,Marcos Faundez-Zanuy cs.CV

authors_text: Koji Takeda,Kanji Tanaka,Yoshimasa Nakamura
title: Domain Invariant Siamese Attention Mask for Small Object Change Detection via Everyday Indoor Robot Navigation
title_zh: 通过日常室内机器人导航检测小物体变化的域不变暹罗注意力掩模
abstract: The problem of image change detection via everyday indoor robot navigation is explored from a novel perspective of the self-attention technique. Detecting semantically non-distinctive and visually small changes remains a key challenge in the robotics community. Intuitively, these small non-distinctive changes may be better handled by the recent paradigm of the attention mechanism, which is the basic idea of this work. However, existing self-attention models require significant retraining cost per domain, so it is not directly applicable to robotics applications. We propose a new self-attention technique with an ability of unsupervised on-the-fly domain adaptation, which introduces an attention mask into the intermediate layer of an image change detection model, without modifying the input and output layers of the model. Experiments, in which an indoor robot aims to detect visually small changes in everyday navigation, demonstrate that our attention technique significantly boosts the state-of-the-art image change detection model.
summary: The problem of image change detection via everyday indoor robot navigation is explored from a novel perspective of the self-attention technique. Detecting semantically non-distinctive and visually small changes remains a key challenge in the robotics community. Intuitively, these small non-distinctive changes may be better handled by the recent paradigm of the attention mechanism, which is the basic idea of this work. However, existing self-attention models require significant retraining cost per domain, so it is not directly applicable to robotics applications. We propose a new self-attention technique with an ability of unsupervised on-the-fly domain adaptation, which introduces an attention mask into the intermediate layer of an image change detection model, without modifying the input and output layers of the model. Experiments, in which an indoor robot aims to detect visually small changes in everyday navigation, demonstrate that our attention technique significantly boosts the state-of-the-art image change detection model.
abstract_zh: 从自注意力技术的新颖角度探讨了通过日常室内机器人导航进行图像变化检测的问题。检测语义上无显着性和视觉上的微小变化仍然是机器人社区的一个关键挑战。直观上，这些小的非显着变化可能可以通过最近的注意力机制范式更好地处理，这是这项工作的基本思想。然而，现有的自注意力模型需要每个领域大量的再训练成本，因此它不能直接适用于机器人应用。我们提出了一种新的自注意力技术，具有无监督的即时域适应能力，它将注意力掩模引入到图像变化检测模型的中间层，而不修改模型的输入和输出层。室内机器人旨在检测日常导航中视觉上的微小变化的实验表明，我们的注意力技术显着提升了最先进的图像变化检测模型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新的自注意力机制，用于解决室内机器人导航中检测微小物体变化的挑战。
AI.motivation: 现有自注意力模型需要高昂的域适应训练成本，难以直接应用于机器人实时导航场景中的小物体变化检测。
AI.method: 设计领域不变的Siamese注意力掩码，在图像变化检测模型中间层引入注意力机制，实现无需修改输入输出层的无监督域适应。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法显著提升现有最先进模型在室内导航场景中检测视觉微小变化的性能。
AI.conclusion: 通过引入注意力掩码机制，有效解决了机器人领域变化检测的域适应问题，为实际应用提供了可行方案。

authors_text: Nenglun Chen,Lei Chu,Hao Pan,Yan Lu,Wenping Wang
title: Self-Supervised Image Representation Learning with Geometric Set Consistency
title_zh: 具有几何集一致性的自监督图像表示学习
abstract: We propose a method for self-supervised image representation learning under the guidance of 3D geometric consistency. Our intuition is that 3D geometric consistency priors such as smooth regions and surface discontinuities may imply consistent semantics or object boundaries, and can act as strong cues to guide the learning of 2D image representations without semantic labels. Specifically, we introduce 3D geometric consistency into a contrastive learning framework to enforce the feature consistency within image views. We propose to use geometric consistency sets as constraints and adapt the InfoNCE loss accordingly. We show that our learned image representations are general. By fine-tuning our pre-trained representations for various 2D image-based downstream tasks, including semantic segmentation, object detection, and instance segmentation on real-world indoor scene datasets, we achieve superior performance compared with state-of-the-art methods.
summary: We propose a method for self-supervised image representation learning under the guidance of 3D geometric consistency. Our intuition is that 3D geometric consistency priors such as smooth regions and surface discontinuities may imply consistent semantics or object boundaries, and can act as strong cues to guide the learning of 2D image representations without semantic labels. Specifically, we introduce 3D geometric consistency into a contrastive learning framework to enforce the feature consistency within image views. We propose to use geometric consistency sets as constraints and adapt the InfoNCE loss accordingly. We show that our learned image representations are general. By fine-tuning our pre-trained representations for various 2D image-based downstream tasks, including semantic segmentation, object detection, and instance segmentation on real-world indoor scene datasets, we achieve superior performance compared with state-of-the-art methods.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种在 3D 几何一致性指导下进行自监督图像表示学习的方法。我们的直觉是，3D 几何一致性先验（例如平滑区域和表面不连续性）可能意味着一致的语义或对象边界，并且可以作为强有力的线索来指导学习没有语义标签的 2D 图像表示。具体来说，我们将 3D 几何一致性引入对比学习框架中，以增强图像视图中的特征一致性。我们建议使用几何一致性集作为约束并相应地调整 InfoNCE 损失。我们证明了我们学习到的图像表示是通用的。通过针对各种基于 2D 图像的下游任务（包括语义分割、对象检测和真实室内场景数据集的实例分割）微调我们的预训练表示，与最先进的方法相比，我们实现了卓越的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于3D几何一致性的自监督图像表示学习方法，通过引入几何先验约束提升无标签数据下的特征学习效果。
AI.motivation: 传统自监督学习缺乏对3D几何结构的有效利用，而3D几何先验（如表面连续性）可隐含语义信息，为无标签图像表示学习提供强约束。
AI.method: 将3D几何一致性约束整合到对比学习框架中，通过几何一致性集合构建正样本对，并基于InfoNCE损失函数进行特征对齐优化。
AI.result: 在室内场景的语义分割、目标检测等下游任务中，微调后的模型性能优于现有最先进的自监督方法。
AI.conclusion: 几何集合一致性约束能有效提升自监督学习的表征能力，为无监督图像理解提供了新的有效范式。

authors_text: Jun Li,Zichang Tan,Jun Wan,Zhen Lei,Guodong Guo
title: Nested Collaborative Learning for Long-Tailed Visual Recognition
title_zh: 长尾视觉识别的嵌套协作学习
abstract: The networks trained on the long-tailed dataset vary remarkably, despite the same training settings, which shows the great uncertainty in long-tailed learning. To alleviate the uncertainty, we propose a Nested Collaborative Learning (NCL), which tackles the problem by collaboratively learning multiple experts together. NCL consists of two core components, namely Nested Individual Learning (NIL) and Nested Balanced Online Distillation (NBOD), which focus on the individual supervised learning for each single expert and the knowledge transferring among multiple experts, respectively. To learn representations more thoroughly, both NIL and NBOD are formulated in a nested way, in which the learning is conducted on not just all categories from a full perspective but some hard categories from a partial perspective. Regarding the learning in the partial perspective, we specifically select the negative categories with high predicted scores as the hard categories by using a proposed Hard Category Mining (HCM). In the NCL, the learning from two perspectives is nested, highly related and complementary, and helps the network to capture not only global and robust features but also meticulous distinguishing ability. Moreover, self-supervision is further utilized for feature enhancement. Extensive experiments manifest the superiority of our method with outperforming the state-of-the-art whether by using a single model or an ensemble.
summary: The networks trained on the long-tailed dataset vary remarkably, despite the same training settings, which shows the great uncertainty in long-tailed learning. To alleviate the uncertainty, we propose a Nested Collaborative Learning (NCL), which tackles the problem by collaboratively learning multiple experts together. NCL consists of two core components, namely Nested Individual Learning (NIL) and Nested Balanced Online Distillation (NBOD), which focus on the individual supervised learning for each single expert and the knowledge transferring among multiple experts, respectively. To learn representations more thoroughly, both NIL and NBOD are formulated in a nested way, in which the learning is conducted on not just all categories from a full perspective but some hard categories from a partial perspective. Regarding the learning in the partial perspective, we specifically select the negative categories with high predicted scores as the hard categories by using a proposed Hard Category Mining (HCM). In the NCL, the learning from two perspectives is nested, highly related and complementary, and helps the network to capture not only global and robust features but also meticulous distinguishing ability. Moreover, self-supervision is further utilized for feature enhancement. Extensive experiments manifest the superiority of our method with outperforming the state-of-the-art whether by using a single model or an ensemble.
abstract_zh: 尽管训练设置相同，但在长尾数据集上训练的网络差异很大，这表明长尾学习存在很大的不确定性。为了减轻不确定性，我们提出了嵌套协作学习（NCL），它通过多个专家一起协作学习来解决这个问题。 NCL由两个核心组成部分组成，即嵌套个体学习（NIL）和嵌套平衡在线蒸馏（NBOD），分别侧重于每个专家的个体监督学习和多个专家之间的知识转移。为了更彻底地学习表示，NIL和NBOD都以嵌套的方式制定，其中不仅从完整的角度对所有类别进行学习，而且从部分的角度对一些硬类别进行学习。关于局部视角的学习，我们通过使用提出的硬类别挖掘（HCM）专门选择具有高预测分数的负类别作为硬类别。在NCL中，两个视角的学习是嵌套的、高度相关和互补的，有助于网络不仅捕获全局和鲁棒的特征，而且捕获细致的区分能力。此外，进一步利用自我监督来增强特征。大量的实验证明了我们的方法的优越性，无论是使用单一模型还是集成模型，其性能都优于最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种嵌套协作学习方法（NCL），用于解决长尾视觉识别中的不确定性问题。
AI.motivation: 在长尾数据集上训练的网络即使使用相同的训练设置，结果也会显著不同，这表明长尾学习存在较大的不确定性，需要一种新的方法来缓解这一问题。
AI.method: NCL包含两个核心组件：嵌套个体学习（NIL）和嵌套平衡在线蒸馏（NBOD）。NIL专注于每个专家的个体监督学习，NBOD则关注多个专家之间的知识传递。通过从全局和部分视角进行嵌套学习，以及使用硬类别挖掘（HCM）选择困难类别，NCL能够提升网络对全局和鲁棒特征以及精细区分能力的捕捉。
AI.result: 实验表明，无论使用单个模型还是集成方法，该方法在多个基准数据集上的表现均优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: NCL通过嵌套学习和知识传递，有效缓解了长尾视觉识别中的不确定性，显著提升了模型性能。

search_text: Nested Collaborative Learning for Long-Tailed Visual Recognition 长尾视觉识别的嵌套协作学习 The networks trained on the long-tailed dataset vary remarkably, despite the same training settings, which shows the great uncertainty in long-tailed learning. To alleviate the uncertainty, we propose a Nested Collaborative Learning (NCL), which tackles the problem by collaboratively learning multiple experts together. NCL consists of two core components, namely Nested Individual Learning (NIL) and Nested Balanced Online Distillation (NBOD), which focus on the individual supervised learning for each single expert and the knowledge transferring among multiple experts, respectively. To learn representations more thoroughly, both NIL and NBOD are formulated in a nested way, in which the learning is conducted on not just all categories from a full perspective but some hard categories from a partial perspective. Regarding the learning in the partial perspective, we specifically select the negative categories with high predicted scores as the hard categories by using a proposed Hard Category Mining (HCM). In the NCL, the learning from two perspectives is nested, highly related and complementary, and helps the network to capture not only global and robust features but also meticulous distinguishing ability. Moreover, self-supervision is further utilized for feature enhancement. Extensive experiments manifest the superiority of our method with outperforming the state-of-the-art whether by using a single model or an ensemble. 尽管训练设置相同，但在长尾数据集上训练的网络差异很大，这表明长尾学习存在很大的不确定性。为了减轻不确定性，我们提出了嵌套协作学习（NCL），它通过多个专家一起协作学习来解决这个问题。 NCL由两个核心组成部分组成，即嵌套个体学习（NIL）和嵌套平衡在线蒸馏（NBOD），分别侧重于每个专家的个体监督学习和多个专家之间的知识转移。为了更彻底地学习表示，NIL和NBOD都以嵌套的方式制定，其中不仅从完整的角度对所有类别进行学习，而且从部分的角度对一些硬类别进行学习。关于局部视角的学习，我们通过使用提出的硬类别挖掘（HCM）专门选择具有高预测分数的负类别作为硬类别。在NCL中，两个视角的学习是嵌套的、高度相关和互补的，有助于网络不仅捕获全局和鲁棒的特征，而且捕获细致的区分能力。此外，进一步利用自我监督来增强特征。大量的实验证明了我们的方法的优越性，无论是使用单一模型还是集成模型，其性能都优于最先进的方法。 本文提出了一种嵌套协作学习方法（NCL），用于解决长尾视觉识别中的不确定性问题。 Jun Li,Zichang Tan,Jun Wan,Zhen Lei,Guodong Guo cs.CV

authors_text: Jihwan Bang,Hyunseo Koh,Seulki Park,Hwanjun Song,Jung-Woo Ha,Jonghyun Choi
title: Online Continual Learning on a Contaminated Data Stream with Blurry Task Boundaries
title_zh: 任务边界模糊的污染数据流在线持续学习
abstract: Learning under a continuously changing data distribution with incorrect labels is a desirable real-world problem yet challenging. A large body of continual learning (CL) methods, however, assumes data streams with clean labels, and online learning scenarios under noisy data streams are yet underexplored. We consider a more practical CL task setup of an online learning from blurry data stream with corrupted labels, where existing CL methods struggle. To address the task, we first argue the importance of both diversity and purity of examples in the episodic memory of continual learning models. To balance diversity and purity in the episodic memory, we propose a novel strategy to manage and use the memory by a unified approach of label noise aware diverse sampling and robust learning with semi-supervised learning. Our empirical validations on four real-world or synthetic noise datasets (CIFAR10 and 100, mini-WebVision, and Food-101N) exhibit that our method significantly outperforms prior arts in this realistic and challenging continual learning scenario. Code and data splits are available in https://github.com/clovaai/puridiver.
summary: Learning under a continuously changing data distribution with incorrect labels is a desirable real-world problem yet challenging. A large body of continual learning (CL) methods, however, assumes data streams with clean labels, and online learning scenarios under noisy data streams are yet underexplored. We consider a more practical CL task setup of an online learning from blurry data stream with corrupted labels, where existing CL methods struggle. To address the task, we first argue the importance of both diversity and purity of examples in the episodic memory of continual learning models. To balance diversity and purity in the episodic memory, we propose a novel strategy to manage and use the memory by a unified approach of label noise aware diverse sampling and robust learning with semi-supervised learning. Our empirical validations on four real-world or synthetic noise datasets (CIFAR10 and 100, mini-WebVision, and Food-101N) exhibit that our method significantly outperforms prior arts in this realistic and challenging continual learning scenario. Code and data splits are available in https://github.com/clovaai/puridiver.
abstract_zh: 在标签不正确的不断变化的数据分布下学习是一个理想的现实问题，但也具有挑战性。然而，大量的持续学习（CL）方法都假设数据流具有干净的标签，而噪声数据流下的在线学习场景尚未得到充分探索。我们考虑一种更实用的 CL 任务设置，即从带有损坏标签的模糊数据流中进行在线学习，而现有的 CL 方法在这方面遇到了困难。为了解决这个任务，我们首先讨论持续学习模型的情景记忆中示例的多样性和纯度的重要性。为了平衡情景记忆的多样性和纯度，我们提出了一种新颖的策略，通过标签噪声感知多样化采样和半监督学习的鲁棒学习的统一方法来管理和使用记忆。我们对四个真实世界或合成噪声数据集（CIFAR10 和 100、mini-WebVision 和 Food-101N）的实证验证表明，在这种现实且具有挑战性的持续学习场景中，我们的方法显着优于现有技术。代码和数据拆分可在 https://github.com/clovaai/puridiver 中找到。

AI.tldr: 本文研究在存在标签污染和模糊任务边界的连续数据流中进行在线持续学习的挑战，并提出有效方法。
AI.motivation: 现有持续学习方法假设数据标签干净且任务边界清晰，但现实场景中数据流常包含噪声标签和模糊任务边界，导致方法效果受限。
AI.method: 提出统一策略管理记忆库，结合噪声感知的多样化采样与半监督学习，平衡记忆库中样本的多样性与纯净度。
AI.result: 在CIFAR10/100、mini-WebVision和Food-101N等四个数据集上显著优于现有方法，验证了方法在噪声和模糊任务边界场景下的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过平衡记忆库的多样性与纯净度，有效应对了现实场景中污染数据流的持续学习挑战，为相关应用提供了新思路。

authors_text: Ben Saunders,Necati Cihan Camgoz,Richard Bowden
title: Signing at Scale: Learning to Co-Articulate Signs for Large-Scale Photo-Realistic Sign Language Production
title_zh: 大规模手语：学习共同表达标志以进行大规模逼真的手语制作
comment: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2011.09846
comments: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2011.09846
abstract: Sign languages are visual languages, with vocabularies as rich as their spoken language counterparts. However, current deep-learning based Sign Language Production (SLP) models produce under-articulated skeleton pose sequences from constrained vocabularies and this limits applicability. To be understandable and accepted by the deaf, an automatic SLP system must be able to generate co-articulated photo-realistic signing sequences for large domains of discourse. In this work, we tackle large-scale SLP by learning to co-articulate between dictionary signs, a method capable of producing smooth signing while scaling to unconstrained domains of discourse. To learn sign co-articulation, we propose a novel Frame Selection Network (FS-Net) that improves the temporal alignment of interpolated dictionary signs to continuous signing sequences. Additionally, we propose SignGAN, a pose-conditioned human synthesis model that produces photo-realistic sign language videos direct from skeleton pose. We propose a novel keypoint-based loss function which improves the quality of synthesized hand images. We evaluate our SLP model on the large-scale meineDGS (mDGS) corpus, conducting extensive user evaluation showing our FS-Net approach improves co-articulation of interpolated dictionary signs. Additionally, we show that SignGAN significantly outperforms all baseline methods for quantitative metrics, human perceptual studies and native deaf signer comprehension.
summary: Sign languages are visual languages, with vocabularies as rich as their spoken language counterparts. However, current deep-learning based Sign Language Production (SLP) models produce under-articulated skeleton pose sequences from constrained vocabularies and this limits applicability. To be understandable and accepted by the deaf, an automatic SLP system must be able to generate co-articulated photo-realistic signing sequences for large domains of discourse. In this work, we tackle large-scale SLP by learning to co-articulate between dictionary signs, a method capable of producing smooth signing while scaling to unconstrained domains of discourse. To learn sign co-articulation, we propose a novel Frame Selection Network (FS-Net) that improves the temporal alignment of interpolated dictionary signs to continuous signing sequences. Additionally, we propose SignGAN, a pose-conditioned human synthesis model that produces photo-realistic sign language videos direct from skeleton pose. We propose a novel keypoint-based loss function which improves the quality of synthesized hand images. We evaluate our SLP model on the large-scale meineDGS (mDGS) corpus, conducting extensive user evaluation showing our FS-Net approach improves co-articulation of interpolated dictionary signs. Additionally, we show that SignGAN significantly outperforms all baseline methods for quantitative metrics, human perceptual studies and native deaf signer comprehension.
abstract_zh: 手语是视觉语言，其词汇与口语一样丰富。然而，当前基于深度学习的手语生成（SLP）模型从受限的词汇量中生成关节不清晰的骨架姿势序列，这限制了适用性。为了让聋人能够理解和接受，自动 SLP 系统必须能够为大范围的话语领域生成共同表达的照片级真实手语序列。在这项工作中，我们通过学习字典符号之间的协同表达来解决大规模 SLP，这种方法能够在扩展到不受约束的语域的同时产生平滑的签名。为了学习符号协同发音，我们提出了一种新颖的帧选择网络（FS-Net），它改进了插值字典符号与连续符号序列的时间对齐。此外，我们还提出了 SignGAN，这是一种姿势条件人体合成模型，可以直接根据骨架姿势生成逼真的手语视频。我们提出了一种新颖的基于关键点的损失函数，可以提高合成手部图像的质量。我们在大规模 meineDGS (mDGS) 语料库上评估我们的 SLP 模型，进行广泛的用户评估，表明我们的 FS-Net 方法改进了内插字典符号的协同发音。此外，我们还表明，SignGAN 在定量指标、人类感知研究和本地聋人手语理解方面显着优于所有基线方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种大规模生成逼真手语视频的方法，通过学习词典手势间的共发音（co-articulation）实现流畅的手语表达。
AI.motivation: 现有手语生成模型因词汇受限且手势不连贯，难以满足聋人社区对自然流畅手语表达的需求。
AI.method: 提出帧选择网络（FS-Net）优化手势时间对齐，结合基于姿态的SignGAN模型生成高质量视频，并设计关键点损失函数提升手部图像质量。
AI.result: 在mDGS数据集上验证，FS-Net显著提升共发音效果，SignGAN在定量指标、人类感知测试及聋人理解度上均优于基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过共发音建模与生成对抗网络，实现了大规模自然逼真的手语生成，为聋人社区提供更有效的沟通工具。

search_text: Signing at Scale: Learning to Co-Articulate Signs for Large-Scale Photo-Realistic Sign Language Production 大规模手语：学习共同表达标志以进行大规模逼真的手语制作 Sign languages are visual languages, with vocabularies as rich as their spoken language counterparts. However, current deep-learning based Sign Language Production (SLP) models produce under-articulated skeleton pose sequences from constrained vocabularies and this limits applicability. To be understandable and accepted by the deaf, an automatic SLP system must be able to generate co-articulated photo-realistic signing sequences for large domains of discourse. In this work, we tackle large-scale SLP by learning to co-articulate between dictionary signs, a method capable of producing smooth signing while scaling to unconstrained domains of discourse. To learn sign co-articulation, we propose a novel Frame Selection Network (FS-Net) that improves the temporal alignment of interpolated dictionary signs to continuous signing sequences. Additionally, we propose SignGAN, a pose-conditioned human synthesis model that produces photo-realistic sign language videos direct from skeleton pose. We propose a novel keypoint-based loss function which improves the quality of synthesized hand images. We evaluate our SLP model on the large-scale meineDGS (mDGS) corpus, conducting extensive user evaluation showing our FS-Net approach improves co-articulation of interpolated dictionary signs. Additionally, we show that SignGAN significantly outperforms all baseline methods for quantitative metrics, human perceptual studies and native deaf signer comprehension. 手语是视觉语言，其词汇与口语一样丰富。然而，当前基于深度学习的手语生成（SLP）模型从受限的词汇量中生成关节不清晰的骨架姿势序列，这限制了适用性。为了让聋人能够理解和接受，自动 SLP 系统必须能够为大范围的话语领域生成共同表达的照片级真实手语序列。在这项工作中，我们通过学习字典符号之间的协同表达来解决大规模 SLP，这种方法能够在扩展到不受约束的语域的同时产生平滑的签名。为了学习符号协同发音，我们提出了一种新颖的帧选择网络（FS-Net），它改进了插值字典符号与连续符号序列的时间对齐。此外，我们还提出了 SignGAN，这是一种姿势条件人体合成模型，可以直接根据骨架姿势生成逼真的手语视频。我们提出了一种新颖的基于关键点的损失函数，可以提高合成手部图像的质量。我们在大规模 meineDGS (mDGS) 语料库上评估我们的 SLP 模型，进行广泛的用户评估，表明我们的 FS-Net 方法改进了内插字典符号的协同发音。此外，我们还表明，SignGAN 在定量指标、人类感知研究和本地聋人手语理解方面显着优于所有基线方法。 本文提出一种大规模生成逼真手语视频的方法，通过学习词典手势间的共发音（co-articulation）实现流畅的手语表达。 Ben Saunders,Necati Cihan Camgoz,Richard Bowden cs.CV

authors_text: Hanjun Li,Xingjia Pan,Ke Yan,Fan Tang,Wei-Shi Zheng
title: SIOD: Single Instance Annotated Per Category Per Image for Object Detection
title_zh: SIOD：每个图像按类别注释单个实例以进行对象检测
abstract: Object detection under imperfect data receives great attention recently. Weakly supervised object detection (WSOD) suffers from severe localization issues due to the lack of instance-level annotation, while semi-supervised object detection (SSOD) remains challenging led by the inter-image discrepancy between labeled and unlabeled data. In this study, we propose the Single Instance annotated Object Detection (SIOD), requiring only one instance annotation for each existing category in an image. Degraded from inter-task (WSOD) or inter-image (SSOD) discrepancies to the intra-image discrepancy, SIOD provides more reliable and rich prior knowledge for mining the rest of unlabeled instances and trades off the annotation cost and performance. Under the SIOD setting, we propose a simple yet effective framework, termed Dual-Mining (DMiner), which consists of a Similarity-based Pseudo Label Generating module (SPLG) and a Pixel-level Group Contrastive Learning module (PGCL). SPLG firstly mines latent instances from feature representation space to alleviate the annotation missing problem. To avoid being misled by inaccurate pseudo labels, we propose PGCL to boost the tolerance to false pseudo labels. Extensive experiments on MS COCO verify the feasibility of the SIOD setting and the superiority of the proposed method, which obtains consistent and significant improvements compared to baseline methods and achieves comparable results with fully supervised object detection (FSOD) methods with only 40% instances annotated.
summary: Object detection under imperfect data receives great attention recently. Weakly supervised object detection (WSOD) suffers from severe localization issues due to the lack of instance-level annotation, while semi-supervised object detection (SSOD) remains challenging led by the inter-image discrepancy between labeled and unlabeled data. In this study, we propose the Single Instance annotated Object Detection (SIOD), requiring only one instance annotation for each existing category in an image. Degraded from inter-task (WSOD) or inter-image (SSOD) discrepancies to the intra-image discrepancy, SIOD provides more reliable and rich prior knowledge for mining the rest of unlabeled instances and trades off the annotation cost and performance. Under the SIOD setting, we propose a simple yet effective framework, termed Dual-Mining (DMiner), which consists of a Similarity-based Pseudo Label Generating module (SPLG) and a Pixel-level Group Contrastive Learning module (PGCL). SPLG firstly mines latent instances from feature representation space to alleviate the annotation missing problem. To avoid being misled by inaccurate pseudo labels, we propose PGCL to boost the tolerance to false pseudo labels. Extensive experiments on MS COCO verify the feasibility of the SIOD setting and the superiority of the proposed method, which obtains consistent and significant improvements compared to baseline methods and achieves comparable results with fully supervised object detection (FSOD) methods with only 40% instances annotated.
abstract_zh: 不完美数据下的目标检测最近受到广泛关注。由于缺乏实例级注释，弱监督对象检测（WSOD）面临严重的定位问题，而半监督对象检测（SSOD）由于标记数据和未标记数据之间的图像间差异而仍然具有挑战性。在这项研究中，我们提出了单实例注释对象检测（SIOD），只需要为图像中的每个现有类别提供一个实例注释。从任务间（WSOD）或图像间（SSOD）差异降级为图像内差异，SIOD为挖掘其余未标记实例提供了更可靠和丰富的先验知识，并权衡了注释成本和性能。在SIOD设置下，我们提出了一个简单而有效的框架，称为双挖掘（DMiner），它由基于相似性的伪标签生成模块（SPLG）和像素级组对比学习模块（PGCL）组成。 SPLG首先从特征表示空间中挖掘潜在实例以缓解注释丢失问题。为了避免被不准确的伪标签误导，我们提出 PGCL 来提高对虚假伪标签的容忍度。 MS COCO 上的大量实验验证了 SIOD 设置的可行性以及所提方法的优越性，与基线方法相比，该方法获得了一致且显着的改进，并且在仅注释 40% 实例的情况下达到了与完全监督目标检测（FSOD）方法相当的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SIOD方法，通过每张图像每类别仅标注一个实例，实现低成本的弱监督目标检测。
AI.motivation: 现有弱监督目标检测（WSOD）因缺乏实例级标注导致定位问题，半监督方法（SSOD）因图像间差异难以提升性能，需在标注成本与性能间寻求平衡。
AI.method: 提出SIOD框架及Dual-Mining（DMiner）方法，包含基于相似性的伪标签生成模块（SPLG）和像素级分组对比学习模块（PGCL），通过挖掘潜在实例并增强对伪标签噪声的鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在MS COCO数据集上验证了SIOD的有效性，仅标注40%实例即可达到与全监督方法相当的性能，显著优于基线方法。
AI.conclusion: SIOD通过将跨任务/图像差异转化为图像内差异，为弱监督检测提供了可行方案，在标注成本与性能间取得良好平衡。

authors_text: Yiyu Wang,Jungang Xu,Yingfei Sun
title: End-to-End Transformer Based Model for Image Captioning
title_zh: 基于端到端变压器的图像字幕模型
abstract: CNN-LSTM based architectures have played an important role in image captioning, but limited by the training efficiency and expression ability, researchers began to explore the CNN-Transformer based models and achieved great success. Meanwhile, almost all recent works adopt Faster R-CNN as the backbone encoder to extract region-level features from given images. However, Faster R-CNN needs a pre-training on an additional dataset, which divides the image captioning task into two stages and limits its potential applications. In this paper, we build a pure Transformer-based model, which integrates image captioning into one stage and realizes end-to-end training. Firstly, we adopt SwinTransformer to replace Faster R-CNN as the backbone encoder to extract grid-level features from given images; Then, referring to Transformer, we build a refining encoder and a decoder. The refining encoder refines the grid features by capturing the intra-relationship between them, and the decoder decodes the refined features into captions word by word. Furthermore, in order to increase the interaction between multi-modal (vision and language) features to enhance the modeling capability, we calculate the mean pooling of grid features as the global feature, then introduce it into refining encoder to refine with grid features together, and add a pre-fusion process of refined global feature and generated words in decoder. To validate the effectiveness of our proposed model, we conduct experiments on MSCOCO dataset. The experimental results compared to existing published works demonstrate that our model achieves new state-of-the-art performances of 138.2% (single model) and 141.0% (ensemble of 4 models) CIDEr scores on `Karpathy' offline test split and 136.0% (c5) and 138.3% (c40) CIDEr scores on the official online test server. Trained models and source code will be released.
summary: CNN-LSTM based architectures have played an important role in image captioning, but limited by the training efficiency and expression ability, researchers began to explore the CNN-Transformer based models and achieved great success. Meanwhile, almost all recent works adopt Faster R-CNN as the backbone encoder to extract region-level features from given images. However, Faster R-CNN needs a pre-training on an additional dataset, which divides the image captioning task into two stages and limits its potential applications. In this paper, we build a pure Transformer-based model, which integrates image captioning into one stage and realizes end-to-end training. Firstly, we adopt SwinTransformer to replace Faster R-CNN as the backbone encoder to extract grid-level features from given images; Then, referring to Transformer, we build a refining encoder and a decoder. The refining encoder refines the grid features by capturing the intra-relationship between them, and the decoder decodes the refined features into captions word by word. Furthermore, in order to increase the interaction between multi-modal (vision and language) features to enhance the modeling capability, we calculate the mean pooling of grid features as the global feature, then introduce it into refining encoder to refine with grid features together, and add a pre-fusion process of refined global feature and generated words in decoder. To validate the effectiveness of our proposed model, we conduct experiments on MSCOCO dataset. The experimental results compared to existing published works demonstrate that our model achieves new state-of-the-art performances of 138.2% (single model) and 141.0% (ensemble of 4 models) CIDEr scores on `Karpathy' offline test split and 136.0% (c5) and 138.3% (c40) CIDEr scores on the official online test server. Trained models and source code will be released.
abstract_zh: 基于CNN-LSTM的架构在图像描述中发挥了重要作用，但受限于训练效率和表达能力，研究人员开始探索基于CNN-Transformer的模型并取得了巨大成功。同时，几乎所有最近的工作都采用 Faster R-CNN 作为骨干编码器来从给定图像中提取区域级特征。然而，Faster R-CNN 需要在额外的数据集上进行预训练，这将图像字幕任务分为两个阶段并限制了其潜在应用。在本文中，我们构建了一个纯粹的基于 Transformer 的模型，它将图像字幕集成到一个阶段并实现端到端的训练。首先，我们采用SwinTransformer代替Faster R-CNN作为主干编码器，从给定图像中提取网格级特征；然后，参考Transformer，我们构建了一个精炼编码器和一个解码器。细化编码器通过捕获网格特征之间的内部关系来细化网格特征，解码器将细化的特征逐字解码为字幕。此外，为了增加多模态（视觉和语言）特征之间的交互以增强建模能力，我们计算网格特征的均值池化作为全局特征，然后将其引入精炼编码器中与网格特征一起精炼，并在解码器中添加精炼全局特征和生成词的预融合过程。为了验证我们提出的模型的有效性，我们在 MSCOCO 数据集上进行了实验。与现有已发表作品相比的实验结果表明，我们的模型在“Karpathy”离线测试拆分上实现了 138.2%（单个模型）和 141.0%（4 个模型的组合）CIDEr 分数，在官方在线测试服务器上实现了 136.0%（c5）和 138.3%（c40）CIDEr 分数。训练后的模型和源代码将被发布。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种端到端的基于Transformer的图像描述生成模型，替代传统的CNN-LSTM和Faster R-CNN架构。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖Faster R-CNN提取区域特征需额外预训练，导致任务分阶段且限制应用潜力，需探索单阶段端到端模型。
AI.method: 采用SwinTransformer替代Faster R-CNN提取网格级特征，构建精炼编码器与解码器，通过全局特征均值池化增强多模态交互，并引入预融合过程。
AI.result: 在MSCOCO数据集上，单模型CIDEr达138.2%（离线测试）和136.0%（在线测试），4模型集成达141.0%和138.3%。
AI.conclusion: 提出的纯Transformer模型通过端到端训练实现更优性能，验证了其在图像描述任务中的有效性。

search_text: End-to-End Transformer Based Model for Image Captioning 基于端到端变压器的图像字幕模型 CNN-LSTM based architectures have played an important role in image captioning, but limited by the training efficiency and expression ability, researchers began to explore the CNN-Transformer based models and achieved great success. Meanwhile, almost all recent works adopt Faster R-CNN as the backbone encoder to extract region-level features from given images. However, Faster R-CNN needs a pre-training on an additional dataset, which divides the image captioning task into two stages and limits its potential applications. In this paper, we build a pure Transformer-based model, which integrates image captioning into one stage and realizes end-to-end training. Firstly, we adopt SwinTransformer to replace Faster R-CNN as the backbone encoder to extract grid-level features from given images; Then, referring to Transformer, we build a refining encoder and a decoder. The refining encoder refines the grid features by capturing the intra-relationship between them, and the decoder decodes the refined features into captions word by word. Furthermore, in order to increase the interaction between multi-modal (vision and language) features to enhance the modeling capability, we calculate the mean pooling of grid features as the global feature, then introduce it into refining encoder to refine with grid features together, and add a pre-fusion process of refined global feature and generated words in decoder. To validate the effectiveness of our proposed model, we conduct experiments on MSCOCO dataset. The experimental results compared to existing published works demonstrate that our model achieves new state-of-the-art performances of 138.2% (single model) and 141.0% (ensemble of 4 models) CIDEr scores on `Karpathy' offline test split and 136.0% (c5) and 138.3% (c40) CIDEr scores on the official online test server. Trained models and source code will be released. 基于CNN-LSTM的架构在图像描述中发挥了重要作用，但受限于训练效率和表达能力，研究人员开始探索基于CNN-Transformer的模型并取得了巨大成功。同时，几乎所有最近的工作都采用 Faster R-CNN 作为骨干编码器来从给定图像中提取区域级特征。然而，Faster R-CNN 需要在额外的数据集上进行预训练，这将图像字幕任务分为两个阶段并限制了其潜在应用。在本文中，我们构建了一个纯粹的基于 Transformer 的模型，它将图像字幕集成到一个阶段并实现端到端的训练。首先，我们采用SwinTransformer代替Faster R-CNN作为主干编码器，从给定图像中提取网格级特征；然后，参考Transformer，我们构建了一个精炼编码器和一个解码器。细化编码器通过捕获网格特征之间的内部关系来细化网格特征，解码器将细化的特征逐字解码为字幕。此外，为了增加多模态（视觉和语言）特征之间的交互以增强建模能力，我们计算网格特征的均值池化作为全局特征，然后将其引入精炼编码器中与网格特征一起精炼，并在解码器中添加精炼全局特征和生成词的预融合过程。为了验证我们提出的模型的有效性，我们在 MSCOCO 数据集上进行了实验。与现有已发表作品相比的实验结果表明，我们的模型在“Karpathy”离线测试拆分上实现了 138.2%（单个模型）和 141.0%（4 个模型的组合）CIDEr 分数，在官方在线测试服务器上实现了 136.0%（c5）和 138.3%（c40）CIDEr 分数。训练后的模型和源代码将被发布。 本文提出一种端到端的基于Transformer的图像描述生成模型，替代传统的CNN-LSTM和Faster R-CNN架构。 Yiyu Wang,Jungang Xu,Yingfei Sun cs.CV

authors_text: Yunlong Zhang,Xin Lin,Yihong Zhuang,LiyanSun,Yue Huang,Xinghao Ding,Guisheng Wang,Lin Yang,Yizhou Yu
title: Harmonizing Pathological and Normal Pixels for Pseudo-healthy Synthesis
title_zh: 协调病理和正常像素以进行伪健康合成
abstract: Synthesizing a subject-specific pathology-free image from a pathological image is valuable for algorithm development and clinical practice. In recent years, several approaches based on the Generative Adversarial Network (GAN) have achieved promising results in pseudo-healthy synthesis. However, the discriminator (i.e., a classifier) in the GAN cannot accurately identify lesions and further hampers from generating admirable pseudo-healthy images. To address this problem, we present a new type of discriminator, the segmentor, to accurately locate the lesions and improve the visual quality of pseudo-healthy images. Then, we apply the generated images into medical image enhancement and utilize the enhanced results to cope with the low contrast problem existing in medical image segmentation. Furthermore, a reliable metric is proposed by utilizing two attributes of label noise to measure the health of synthetic images. Comprehensive experiments on the T2 modality of BraTS demonstrate that the proposed method substantially outperforms the state-of-the-art methods. The method achieves better performance than the existing methods with only 30\% of the training data. The effectiveness of the proposed method is also demonstrated on the LiTS and the T1 modality of BraTS. The code and the pre-trained model of this study are publicly available at https://github.com/Au3C2/Generator-Versus-Segmentor.
summary: Synthesizing a subject-specific pathology-free image from a pathological image is valuable for algorithm development and clinical practice. In recent years, several approaches based on the Generative Adversarial Network (GAN) have achieved promising results in pseudo-healthy synthesis. However, the discriminator (i.e., a classifier) in the GAN cannot accurately identify lesions and further hampers from generating admirable pseudo-healthy images. To address this problem, we present a new type of discriminator, the segmentor, to accurately locate the lesions and improve the visual quality of pseudo-healthy images. Then, we apply the generated images into medical image enhancement and utilize the enhanced results to cope with the low contrast problem existing in medical image segmentation. Furthermore, a reliable metric is proposed by utilizing two attributes of label noise to measure the health of synthetic images. Comprehensive experiments on the T2 modality of BraTS demonstrate that the proposed method substantially outperforms the state-of-the-art methods. The method achieves better performance than the existing methods with only 30\% of the training data. The effectiveness of the proposed method is also demonstrated on the LiTS and the T1 modality of BraTS. The code and the pre-trained model of this study are publicly available at https://github.com/Au3C2/Generator-Versus-Segmentor.
abstract_zh: 从病理图像合成特定于主题的无病理图像对于算法开发和临床实践很有价值。近年来，几种基于生成对抗网络（GAN）的方法在伪健康合成方面取得了可喜的成果。然而，GAN 中的鉴别器（即分类器）无法准确识别病变，进一步阻碍了生成令人惊叹的伪健康图像。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种新型的鉴别器——分割器，来准确定位病变并提高伪健康图像的视觉质量。然后，我们将生成的图像应用于医学图像增强，并利用增强结果来解决医学图像分割中存在的低对比度问题。此外，通过利用标签噪声的两个属性来衡量合成图像的健康状况，提出了一种可靠的度量标准。对 BraTS T2 模态的综合实验表明，所提出的方法大大优于最先进的方法。该方法仅用 30% 的训练数据就取得了比现有方法更好的性能。该方法的有效性也在 LiTS 和 BraTS 的 T1 模态上得到了证明。本研究的代码和预训练模型可在 https://github.com/Au3C2/Generator-Versus-Segmentor 上公开获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于生成对抗网络（GAN）的新方法，通过引入分割器作为判别器来提高伪健康图像的合成质量，用于医学图像增强和分割。
AI.motivation: 传统GAN判别器难以准确识别病变区域，导致生成的伪健康图像质量不足，影响医学图像分割和增强效果。
AI.method: 设计新型分割器作为判别器以精确定位病变区域，生成高质量伪健康图像；结合医学图像增强技术解决低对比度问题，并提出基于标签噪声属性的评估指标。
AI.result: 在BraTS T2模态数据集上，该方法在仅使用30%训练数据时显著优于现有方法，且在LiTS和BraTS T1模态中验证了有效性，代码和预训练模型已开源。
AI.conclusion: 通过分割器替代传统判别器，有效提升了伪健康图像的合成质量，为医学图像分割和增强提供了可靠解决方案。

authors_text: Liang Zhao,Limin Wang
title: Task-specific Inconsistency Alignment for Domain Adaptive Object Detection
title_zh: 用于域自适应对象检测的特定于任务的不一致对齐
abstract: Detectors trained with massive labeled data often exhibit dramatic performance degradation in some particular scenarios with data distribution gap. To alleviate this problem of domain shift, conventional wisdom typically concentrates solely on reducing the discrepancy between the source and target domains via attached domain classifiers, yet ignoring the difficulty of such transferable features in coping with both classification and localization subtasks in object detection. To address this issue, in this paper, we propose Task-specific Inconsistency Alignment (TIA), by developing a new alignment mechanism in separate task spaces, improving the performance of the detector on both subtasks. Specifically, we add a set of auxiliary predictors for both classification and localization branches, and exploit their behavioral inconsistencies as finer-grained domain-specific measures. Then, we devise task-specific losses to align such cross-domain disagreement of both subtasks. By optimizing them individually, we are able to well approximate the category- and boundary-wise discrepancies in each task space, and therefore narrow them in a decoupled manner. TIA demonstrates superior results on various scenarios to the previous state-of-the-art methods. It is also observed that both the classification and localization capabilities of the detector are sufficiently strengthened, further demonstrating the effectiveness of our TIA method. Code and trained models are publicly available at https://github.com/MCG-NJU/TIA.
summary: Detectors trained with massive labeled data often exhibit dramatic performance degradation in some particular scenarios with data distribution gap. To alleviate this problem of domain shift, conventional wisdom typically concentrates solely on reducing the discrepancy between the source and target domains via attached domain classifiers, yet ignoring the difficulty of such transferable features in coping with both classification and localization subtasks in object detection. To address this issue, in this paper, we propose Task-specific Inconsistency Alignment (TIA), by developing a new alignment mechanism in separate task spaces, improving the performance of the detector on both subtasks. Specifically, we add a set of auxiliary predictors for both classification and localization branches, and exploit their behavioral inconsistencies as finer-grained domain-specific measures. Then, we devise task-specific losses to align such cross-domain disagreement of both subtasks. By optimizing them individually, we are able to well approximate the category- and boundary-wise discrepancies in each task space, and therefore narrow them in a decoupled manner. TIA demonstrates superior results on various scenarios to the previous state-of-the-art methods. It is also observed that both the classification and localization capabilities of the detector are sufficiently strengthened, further demonstrating the effectiveness of our TIA method. Code and trained models are publicly available at https://github.com/MCG-NJU/TIA.
abstract_zh: 使用大量标记数据训练的检测器在某些具有数据分布差距的特定场景中通常会表现出急剧的性能下降。为了缓解域转移的问题，传统观点通常只专注于通过附加的域分类器来减少源域和目标域之间的差异，但却忽略了这种可转移特征在处理对象检测中的分类和定位子任务时的困难。为了解决这个问题，在本文中，我们提出了任务特定的不一致对齐（TIA），通过在单独的任务空间中开发一种新的对齐机制，提高检测器在两个子任务上的性能。具体来说，我们为分类和本地化分支添加了一组辅助预测器，并利用它们的行为不一致作为更细粒度的特定领域测量。然后，我们设计特定于任务的损失来协调两个子任务的跨域分歧。通过单独优化它们，我们能够很好地近似每个任务空间中的类别和边界差异，从而以解耦的方式缩小它们。 TIA 在各种场景下都表现出了优于之前最先进方法的结果。还观察到探测器的分类和定位能力都得到了充分加强，进一步证明了我们的 TIA 方法的有效性。代码和训练模型可在 https://github.com/MCG-NJU/TIA 上公开获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种任务特定不一致性对齐（TIA）方法，通过在分类和定位子任务中分别对齐领域差异，提升领域自适应目标检测的性能。
AI.motivation: 传统领域自适应方法仅关注减少源域与目标域的整体差异，忽视了分类和定位子任务在跨领域中的具体挑战，导致检测性能下降。
AI.method: 设计分类和定位分支的辅助预测器，利用其行为不一致性作为细粒度领域差异度量，并开发任务特定损失函数分别对齐两类子任务的跨领域分歧。
AI.result: TIA在多个场景中优于现有最先进方法，显著提升了检测器的分类和定位能力。
AI.conclusion: 通过解耦对齐分类与定位任务的领域差异，TIA有效增强了检测器在目标领域的适应性，验证了方法的有效性。

ai_content_json.conclusion: 通过解耦对齐分类与定位任务的领域差异，TIA有效增强了检测器在目标领域的适应性，验证了方法的有效性。

tldr: 本文提出了一种任务特定不一致性对齐（TIA）方法，通过在分类和定位子任务中分别对齐领域差异，提升领域自适应目标检测的性能。
motivation: 传统领域自适应方法仅关注减少源域与目标域的整体差异，忽视了分类和定位子任务在跨领域中的具体挑战，导致检测性能下降。
method: 设计分类和定位分支的辅助预测器，利用其行为不一致性作为细粒度领域差异度量，并开发任务特定损失函数分别对齐两类子任务的跨领域分歧。
result: TIA在多个场景中优于现有最先进方法，显著提升了检测器的分类和定位能力。
conclusion: 通过解耦对齐分类与定位任务的领域差异，TIA有效增强了检测器在目标领域的适应性，验证了方法的有效性。
search_text: Task-specific Inconsistency Alignment for Domain Adaptive Object Detection 用于域自适应对象检测的特定于任务的不一致对齐 Detectors trained with massive labeled data often exhibit dramatic performance degradation in some particular scenarios with data distribution gap. To alleviate this problem of domain shift, conventional wisdom typically concentrates solely on reducing the discrepancy between the source and target domains via attached domain classifiers, yet ignoring the difficulty of such transferable features in coping with both classification and localization subtasks in object detection. To address this issue, in this paper, we propose Task-specific Inconsistency Alignment (TIA), by developing a new alignment mechanism in separate task spaces, improving the performance of the detector on both subtasks. Specifically, we add a set of auxiliary predictors for both classification and localization branches, and exploit their behavioral inconsistencies as finer-grained domain-specific measures. Then, we devise task-specific losses to align such cross-domain disagreement of both subtasks. By optimizing them individually, we are able to well approximate the category- and boundary-wise discrepancies in each task space, and therefore narrow them in a decoupled manner. TIA demonstrates superior results on various scenarios to the previous state-of-the-art methods. It is also observed that both the classification and localization capabilities of the detector are sufficiently strengthened, further demonstrating the effectiveness of our TIA method. Code and trained models are publicly available at https://github.com/MCG-NJU/TIA. 使用大量标记数据训练的检测器在某些具有数据分布差距的特定场景中通常会表现出急剧的性能下降。为了缓解域转移的问题，传统观点通常只专注于通过附加的域分类器来减少源域和目标域之间的差异，但却忽略了这种可转移特征在处理对象检测中的分类和定位子任务时的困难。为了解决这个问题，在本文中，我们提出了任务特定的不一致对齐（TIA），通过在单独的任务空间中开发一种新的对齐机制，提高检测器在两个子任务上的性能。具体来说，我们为分类和本地化分支添加了一组辅助预测器，并利用它们的行为不一致作为更细粒度的特定领域测量。然后，我们设计特定于任务的损失来协调两个子任务的跨域分歧。通过单独优化它们，我们能够很好地近似每个任务空间中的类别和边界差异，从而以解耦的方式缩小它们。 TIA 在各种场景下都表现出了优于之前最先进方法的结果。还观察到探测器的分类和定位能力都得到了充分加强，进一步证明了我们的 TIA 方法的有效性。代码和训练模型可在 https://github.com/MCG-NJU/TIA 上公开获取。 本文提出了一种任务特定不一致性对齐（TIA）方法，通过在分类和定位子任务中分别对齐领域差异，提升领域自适应目标检测的性能。 Liang Zhao,Limin Wang cs.CV

authors_text: Zhishe Wang,Wenyu Shao,Yanlin Chen,Jiawei Xu,Xiaoqin Zhang
title: Infrared and Visible Image Fusion via Interactive Compensatory Attention Adversarial Learning
title_zh: 通过交互式补偿性注意力对抗学习实现红外和可见光图像融合
abstract: The existing generative adversarial fusion methods generally concatenate source images and extract local features through convolution operation, without considering their global characteristics, which tends to produce an unbalanced result and is biased towards the infrared image or visible image. Toward this end, we propose a novel end-to-end mode based on generative adversarial training to achieve better fusion balance, termed as \textit{interactive compensatory attention fusion network} (ICAFusion). In particular, in the generator, we construct a multi-level encoder-decoder network with a triple path, and adopt infrared and visible paths to provide additional intensity and gradient information. Moreover, we develop interactive and compensatory attention modules to communicate their pathwise information, and model their long-range dependencies to generate attention maps, which can more focus on infrared target perception and visible detail characterization, and further increase the representation power for feature extraction and feature reconstruction. In addition, dual discriminators are designed to identify the similar distribution between fused result and source images, and the generator is optimized to produce a more balanced result. Extensive experiments illustrate that our ICAFusion obtains superior fusion performance and better generalization ability, which precedes other advanced methods in the subjective visual description and objective metric evaluation. Our codes will be public at \url{https://github.com/Zhishe-Wang/ICAFusion}
summary: The existing generative adversarial fusion methods generally concatenate source images and extract local features through convolution operation, without considering their global characteristics, which tends to produce an unbalanced result and is biased towards the infrared image or visible image. Toward this end, we propose a novel end-to-end mode based on generative adversarial training to achieve better fusion balance, termed as \textit{interactive compensatory attention fusion network} (ICAFusion). In particular, in the generator, we construct a multi-level encoder-decoder network with a triple path, and adopt infrared and visible paths to provide additional intensity and gradient information. Moreover, we develop interactive and compensatory attention modules to communicate their pathwise information, and model their long-range dependencies to generate attention maps, which can more focus on infrared target perception and visible detail characterization, and further increase the representation power for feature extraction and feature reconstruction. In addition, dual discriminators are designed to identify the similar distribution between fused result and source images, and the generator is optimized to produce a more balanced result. Extensive experiments illustrate that our ICAFusion obtains superior fusion performance and better generalization ability, which precedes other advanced methods in the subjective visual description and objective metric evaluation. Our codes will be public at \url{https://github.com/Zhishe-Wang/ICAFusion}
abstract_zh: 现有的生成对抗性融合方法一般将源图像连接起来，通过卷积运算提取局部特征，没有考虑其全局特征，容易产生不平衡的结果，偏向红外图像或可见光图像。为此，我们提出了一种基于生成对抗训练的新颖的端到端模式，以实现更好的融合平衡，称为\textit{交互式补偿注意融合网络}（ICAFusion）。特别是，在生成器中，我们构建了具有三重路径的多级编码器-解码器网络，并采用红外和可见光路径来提供额外的强度和梯度信息。此外，我们开发了交互式和补偿性注意力模块来传达其路径信息，并对它们的长程依赖关系进行建模以生成注意力图，从而可以更加关注红外目标感知和可见细节表征，并进一步提高特征提取和特征重建的表示能力。此外，双鉴别器被设计来识别融合结果和源图像之间的相似分布，并且生成器被优化以产生更平衡的结果。大量的实验表明，我们的ICAFusion获得了优越的融合性能和更好的泛化能力，在主观视觉描述和客观度量评估方面领先于其他先进方法。我们的代码将在 \url{https://github.com/Zhishe-Wang/ICAFusion} 公开

AI.tldr: 提出一种新的生成对抗网络方法，解决红外与可见光图像融合中的不平衡问题，提升融合效果。
AI.motivation: 现有方法因忽略全局特征导致融合结果不平衡，需改进以实现更均衡的融合效果。
AI.method: 构建三路径多级编码器-解码器网络，结合交互补偿注意力模块增强特征表示，并采用双判别器优化生成器以实现平衡融合。
AI.result: 实验显示该方法在主观视觉描述和客观指标上均优于现有先进方法，具有更好的泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 提出的ICAFusion通过全局特征建模和注意力机制有效提升了图像融合的平衡性与质量。

authors_text: Congcong Li,Xinyao Wang,Longyin Wen,Dexiang Hong,Tiejian Luo,Libo Zhang
title: End-to-End Compressed Video Representation Learning for Generic Event Boundary Detection
title_zh: 用于通用事件边界检测的端到端压缩视频表示学习
abstract: Generic event boundary detection aims to localize the generic, taxonomy-free event boundaries that segment videos into chunks. Existing methods typically require video frames to be decoded before feeding into the network, which demands considerable computational power and storage space. To that end, we propose a new end-to-end compressed video representation learning for event boundary detection that leverages the rich information in the compressed domain, i.e., RGB, motion vectors, residuals, and the internal group of pictures (GOP) structure, without fully decoding the video. Specifically, we first use the ConvNets to extract features of the I-frames in the GOPs. After that, a light-weight spatial-channel compressed encoder is designed to compute the feature representations of the P-frames based on the motion vectors, residuals and representations of their dependent I-frames. A temporal contrastive module is proposed to determine the event boundaries of video sequences. To remedy the ambiguities of annotations and speed up the training process, we use the Gaussian kernel to preprocess the ground-truth event boundaries. Extensive experiments conducted on the Kinetics-GEBD dataset demonstrate that the proposed method achieves comparable results to the state-of-the-art methods with $4.5\times$ faster running speed.
summary: Generic event boundary detection aims to localize the generic, taxonomy-free event boundaries that segment videos into chunks. Existing methods typically require video frames to be decoded before feeding into the network, which demands considerable computational power and storage space. To that end, we propose a new end-to-end compressed video representation learning for event boundary detection that leverages the rich information in the compressed domain, i.e., RGB, motion vectors, residuals, and the internal group of pictures (GOP) structure, without fully decoding the video. Specifically, we first use the ConvNets to extract features of the I-frames in the GOPs. After that, a light-weight spatial-channel compressed encoder is designed to compute the feature representations of the P-frames based on the motion vectors, residuals and representations of their dependent I-frames. A temporal contrastive module is proposed to determine the event boundaries of video sequences. To remedy the ambiguities of annotations and speed up the training process, we use the Gaussian kernel to preprocess the ground-truth event boundaries. Extensive experiments conducted on the Kinetics-GEBD dataset demonstrate that the proposed method achieves comparable results to the state-of-the-art methods with $4.5\times$ faster running speed.
abstract_zh: 通用事件边界检测旨在定位通用的、无分类的事件边界，将视频分割成块。现有方法通常需要在输入网络之前对视频帧进行解码，这需要相当大的计算能力和存储空间。为此，我们提出了一种用于事件边界检测的新的端到端压缩视频表示学习，它利用压缩域中的丰富信息，即 RGB、运动向量、残差和内部图片组 (GOP) 结构，而无需完全解码视频。具体来说，我们首先使用 ConvNet 来提取 GOP 中 I 帧的特征。之后，设计一个轻量级空间通道压缩编码器，根据运动矢量、残差及其相关 I 帧的表示来计算 P 帧的特征表示。提出了时间对比模块来确定视频序列的事件边界。为了纠正注释的歧义并加快训练过程，我们使用高斯核来预处理真实事件边界。在 Kinetics-GEBD 数据集上进行的大量实验表明，所提出的方法取得了与最先进方法相当的结果，运行速度快了 4.5 倍。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种端到端压缩视频表示学习方法，用于检测通用事件边界，无需完全解码视频。
AI.motivation: 现有事件边界检测方法需先解码视频帧，导致计算和存储开销大，而压缩域信息（如运动矢量、残差等）未被充分利用。
AI.method: 利用I帧卷积特征提取、轻量级空间-通道压缩编码器处理P帧、时间对比模块定位边界，并采用高斯核预处理标注以加速训练。
AI.result: 在Kinetics-GEBD数据集上达到与最先进方法相当的检测精度，运行速度提升4.5倍。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过压缩域特征学习显著降低计算成本，在保持性能的同时提升事件边界检测效率。

Existing methods typically require video frames to be decoded before feeding into the network, which demands considerable computational power and storage space. A temporal contrastive module is proposed to determine the event boundaries of video sequences. To remedy the ambiguities of annotations and speed up the training process, we use the Gaussian kernel to preprocess the ground-truth event boundaries. Extensive experiments conducted on the Kinetics-GEBD dataset demonstrate that the proposed method achieves comparable results to the state-of-the-art methods with $4.5\times$ faster running speed. 通用事件边界检测旨在定位通用的、无分类的事件边界，将视频分割成块。现有方法通常需要在输入网络之前对视频帧进行解码，这需要相当大的计算能力和存储空间。为此，我们提出了一种用于事件边界检测的新的端到端压缩视频表示学习，它利用压缩域中的丰富信息，即 RGB、运动向量、残差和内部图片组 (GOP) 结构，而无需完全解码视频。具体来说，我们首先使用 ConvNet 来提取 GOP 中 I 帧的特征。之后，设计一个轻量级空间通道压缩编码器，根据运动矢量、残差及其相关 I 帧的表示来计算 P 帧的特征表示。提出了时间对比模块来确定视频序列的事件边界。为了纠正注释的歧义并加快训练过程，我们使用高斯核来预处理真实事件边界。在 Kinetics-GEBD 数据集上进行的大量实验表明，所提出的方法取得了与最先进方法相当的结果，运行速度快了 4.5 倍。 本文提出一种端到端压缩视频表示学习方法，用于检测通用事件边界，无需完全解码视频。 Congcong Li,Xinyao Wang,Longyin Wen,Dexiang Hong,Tiejian Luo,Libo Zhang cs.CV

authors_text: Danial Ebrat,Farzad Didehvar,Milad Dadgar
title: Iranian Modal Music (Dastgah) detection using deep neural networks
title_zh: 使用深度神经网络检测伊朗情态音乐 (Dastgah)
abstract: Music classification and genre detection are topics in music information retrieval (MIR) that many articles have been published regarding their utilities in the modern world. However, this contribution is insufficient in non-western music, such as Iranian modal music. In this work, we have implemented several deep neural networks to recognize Iranian modal music in seven highly correlated categories. The best model, BiLGNet, which achieved 92 percent overall accuracy, uses an architecture inspired by autoencoders, including bidirectional LSTM and GRU layers. We trained the models using the Nava dataset, which includes 1786 records and up to 55 hours of music played solo by Kamanche, Tar, Setar, Reed, and Santoor (Dulcimer). We considered Multiple features such as MFCC, Chroma CENS, and Mel spectrogram as input. The results indicate that MFCC carries more valuable information for detecting Iranian modal music (Dastgah) than other sound representations. Moreover, the architecture inspired by autoencoders is robust in distinguishing highly correlated data like Dastgahs. It also shows that because of the precise order in Iranian Dastgah Music, Bidirectional Recurrent networks are more efficient than any other networks that have been implemented in this study.
summary: Music classification and genre detection are topics in music information retrieval (MIR) that many articles have been published regarding their utilities in the modern world. However, this contribution is insufficient in non-western music, such as Iranian modal music. In this work, we have implemented several deep neural networks to recognize Iranian modal music in seven highly correlated categories. The best model, BiLGNet, which achieved 92 percent overall accuracy, uses an architecture inspired by autoencoders, including bidirectional LSTM and GRU layers. We trained the models using the Nava dataset, which includes 1786 records and up to 55 hours of music played solo by Kamanche, Tar, Setar, Reed, and Santoor (Dulcimer). We considered Multiple features such as MFCC, Chroma CENS, and Mel spectrogram as input. The results indicate that MFCC carries more valuable information for detecting Iranian modal music (Dastgah) than other sound representations. Moreover, the architecture inspired by autoencoders is robust in distinguishing highly correlated data like Dastgahs. It also shows that because of the precise order in Iranian Dastgah Music, Bidirectional Recurrent networks are more efficient than any other networks that have been implemented in this study.
abstract_zh: 音乐分类和流派检测是音乐信息检索（MIR）中的主题，已经发表了许多关于它们在现代世界中的实用性的文章。然而，这种贡献在非西方音乐中还不够，例如伊朗情态音乐。在这项工作中，我们实现了几个深度神经网络来识别七个高度相关类别的伊朗情态音乐。最好的模型 BiLGNet 总体准确率达到 92%，它使用受自动编码器启发的架构，包括双向 LSTM 和 GRU 层。我们使用 Nava 数据集训练模型，该数据集包括 Kamanche、Tar、Setar、Reed 和 Santoor（扬琴）独奏的 1786 条记录和长达 55 小时的音乐。我们考虑了 MFCC、Chroma CENS 和 Mel 谱图等多个特征作为输入。结果表明，与其他声音表示相比，MFCC 在检测伊朗情态音乐 (Dastgah) 方面携带了更有价值的信息。此外，受自动编码器启发的架构在区分 Dastgah 等高度相关的数据方面非常强大。它还表明，由于伊朗 Dastgah 音乐中的精确顺序，双向循环网络比本研究中实施的任何其他网络都更有效。

AI.tldr: 本论文使用深度神经网络实现对伊朗模态音乐（Dastgah）的分类检测。
AI.motivation: 现有音乐分类研究主要针对西方音乐，对非西方音乐如伊朗Dastgah的分类方法存在不足，需探索更有效的模型。
AI.method: 基于自编码器架构设计BiLGNet模型，结合双向LSTM和GRU层，采用MFCC、Chroma CENS和Mel频谱图作为输入特征，使用Nava数据集训练。
AI.result: BiLGNet模型在七类Dastgah中达到92%准确率，MFCC特征表现最优，自编码器架构能有效区分高度相关数据，双向网络处理顺序信息更高效。
AI.conclusion: BiLGNet模型及MFCC特征在伊朗Dastgah分类中效果显著，双向循环网络适合处理具有精确顺序的音乐数据。
