authors_text: Jianxin Sun,Qiyao Deng,Qi Li,Muyi Sun,Min Ren,Zhenan Sun
title: AnyFace: Free-style Text-to-Face Synthesis and Manipulation
title_zh: AnyFace：自由式文本到面部合成和操作
abstract: Existing text-to-image synthesis methods generally are only applicable to words in the training dataset. However, human faces are so variable to be described with limited words. So this paper proposes the first free-style text-to-face method namely AnyFace enabling much wider open world applications such as metaverse, social media, cosmetics, forensics, etc. AnyFace has a novel two-stream framework for face image synthesis and manipulation given arbitrary descriptions of the human face. Specifically, one stream performs text-to-face generation and the other conducts face image reconstruction. Facial text and image features are extracted using the CLIP (Contrastive Language-Image Pre-training) encoders. And a collaborative Cross Modal Distillation (CMD) module is designed to align the linguistic and visual features across these two streams. Furthermore, a Diverse Triplet Loss (DT loss) is developed to model fine-grained features and improve facial diversity. Extensive experiments on Multi-modal CelebA-HQ and CelebAText-HQ demonstrate significant advantages of AnyFace over state-of-the-art methods. AnyFace can achieve high-quality, high-resolution, and high-diversity face synthesis and manipulation results without any constraints on the number and content of input captions.
summary: Existing text-to-image synthesis methods generally are only applicable to words in the training dataset. However, human faces are so variable to be described with limited words. So this paper proposes the first free-style text-to-face method namely AnyFace enabling much wider open world applications such as metaverse, social media, cosmetics, forensics, etc. AnyFace has a novel two-stream framework for face image synthesis and manipulation given arbitrary descriptions of the human face. Specifically, one stream performs text-to-face generation and the other conducts face image reconstruction. Facial text and image features are extracted using the CLIP (Contrastive Language-Image Pre-training) encoders. And a collaborative Cross Modal Distillation (CMD) module is designed to align the linguistic and visual features across these two streams. Furthermore, a Diverse Triplet Loss (DT loss) is developed to model fine-grained features and improve facial diversity. Extensive experiments on Multi-modal CelebA-HQ and CelebAText-HQ demonstrate significant advantages of AnyFace over state-of-the-art methods. AnyFace can achieve high-quality, high-resolution, and high-diversity face synthesis and manipulation results without any constraints on the number and content of input captions.
abstract_zh: 现有的文本到图像的合成方法通常仅适用于训练数据集中的单词。然而，人的面孔千变万化，无法用有限的言语来描述。因此，本文提出了第一个自由式文本到脸部的方法，即 AnyFace，它能够实现更广泛的开放世界应用，例如元宇宙、社交媒体、化妆品、取证等。AnyFace 具有新颖的双流框架，用于在给定人脸任意描述的情况下进行人脸图像合成和操作。具体来说，一个流执行文本到面部的生成，另一个流进行面部图像重建。使用 CLIP（对比语言图像预训练）编码器提取面部文本和图像特征。协作式跨模态蒸馏 (CMD) 模块旨在协调这两个流中的语言和视觉特征。此外，还开发了多样化三重态损失（DT loss）来建模细粒度特征并提高面部多样性。对多模态 CelebA-HQ 和 CelebAText-HQ 的大量实验证明了 AnyFace 相对于最先进方法的显着优势。 AnyFace可以实现高质量、高分辨率、高多样性的人脸合成和操作结果，并且对输入字幕的数量和内容没有任何限制。

AI.tldr: 本文提出AnyFace，一种无约束的文本到人脸合成与编辑方法，支持开放世界应用场景。
AI.motivation: 现有文本到图像方法受限于训练数据词汇，难以描述高度变化的人脸特征，需更灵活的解决方案。
AI.method: 采用双流框架：文本生成流与图像重建流，结合CLIP编码器提取特征，并引入跨模态蒸馏模块与多样性三元组损失函数。
AI.result: 在Multi-modal CelebA-HQ和CelebAText-HQ数据集上显著优于现有方法，实现高质量、高分辨率且多样化的合成结果。
AI.conclusion: AnyFace突破输入描述限制，为元宇宙、社交媒体等场景提供高效人脸生成与编辑工具。

authors_text: Xiaokang Peng,Yake Wei,Andong Deng,Dong Wang,Di Hu
title: Balanced Multimodal Learning via On-the-fly Gradient Modulation
title_zh: 通过动态梯度调制平衡多模态学习
abstract: Multimodal learning helps to comprehensively understand the world, by integrating different senses. Accordingly, multiple input modalities are expected to boost model performance, but we actually find that they are not fully exploited even when the multimodal model outperforms its uni-modal counterpart. Specifically, in this paper we point out that existing multimodal discriminative models, in which uniform objective is designed for all modalities, could remain under-optimized uni-modal representations, caused by another dominated modality in some scenarios, e.g., sound in blowing wind event, vision in drawing picture event, etc. To alleviate this optimization imbalance, we propose on-the-fly gradient modulation to adaptively control the optimization of each modality, via monitoring the discrepancy of their contribution towards the learning objective. Further, an extra Gaussian noise that changes dynamically is introduced to avoid possible generalization drop caused by gradient modulation. As a result, we achieve considerable improvement over common fusion methods on different multimodal tasks, and this simple strategy can also boost existing multimodal methods, which illustrates its efficacy and versatility. The source code is available at \url{https://github.com/GeWu-Lab/OGM-GE_CVPR2022}.
summary: Multimodal learning helps to comprehensively understand the world, by integrating different senses. Accordingly, multiple input modalities are expected to boost model performance, but we actually find that they are not fully exploited even when the multimodal model outperforms its uni-modal counterpart. Specifically, in this paper we point out that existing multimodal discriminative models, in which uniform objective is designed for all modalities, could remain under-optimized uni-modal representations, caused by another dominated modality in some scenarios, e.g., sound in blowing wind event, vision in drawing picture event, etc. To alleviate this optimization imbalance, we propose on-the-fly gradient modulation to adaptively control the optimization of each modality, via monitoring the discrepancy of their contribution towards the learning objective. Further, an extra Gaussian noise that changes dynamically is introduced to avoid possible generalization drop caused by gradient modulation. As a result, we achieve considerable improvement over common fusion methods on different multimodal tasks, and this simple strategy can also boost existing multimodal methods, which illustrates its efficacy and versatility. The source code is available at \url{https://github.com/GeWu-Lab/OGM-GE_CVPR2022}.
abstract_zh: 多模态学习通过整合不同的感官来帮助全面理解世界。因此，多种输入模态有望提高模型性能，但我们实际上发现，即使多模态模型优于单模态模型，它们也没有得到充分利用。具体来说，在本文中，我们指出，现有的多模态判别模型（其中为所有模态设计统一的目标）可能仍然是未优化的单模态表示，这是由某些场景中的另一种主导模态引起的，例如，吹风事件中的声音、绘图事件中的视觉等。为了缓解这种优化不平衡，我们提出了动态梯度调制，通过监控它们对学习目标的贡献的差异，自适应地控制每种模态的优化。此外，引入动态变化的额外高斯噪声以避免梯度调制可能导致的泛化下降。因此，我们在不同的多模态任务上比常见的融合方法取得了相当大的改进，并且这种简单的策略还可以促进现有的多模态方法，这说明了其有效性和多功能性。源代码可在 \url{https://github.com/GeWu-Lab/OGM-GE_CVPR2022} 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过即时梯度调制实现平衡的多模态学习，解决现有模型中模态优化不平衡的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有多模态模型在统一目标下可能因主导模态抑制其他模态，导致未充分利用所有模态信息。
AI.method: 设计即时梯度调制方法，动态调整各模态优化权重并引入动态噪声以避免泛化下降。
AI.result: 在多种多模态任务中显著优于常见融合方法，且能有效提升现有方法性能。
AI.conclusion: 该方法简单有效，证明了梯度调制在平衡多模态学习中的广泛适用性。

search_text: Balanced Multimodal Learning via On-the-fly Gradient Modulation 通过动态梯度调制平衡多模态学习 Multimodal learning helps to comprehensively understand the world, by integrating different senses. Accordingly, multiple input modalities are expected to boost model performance, but we actually find that they are not fully exploited even when the multimodal model outperforms its uni-modal counterpart. Specifically, in this paper we point out that existing multimodal discriminative models, in which uniform objective is designed for all modalities, could remain under-optimized uni-modal representations, caused by another dominated modality in some scenarios, e.g., sound in blowing wind event, vision in drawing picture event, etc. To alleviate this optimization imbalance, we propose on-the-fly gradient modulation to adaptively control the optimization of each modality, via monitoring the discrepancy of their contribution towards the learning objective. Further, an extra Gaussian noise that changes dynamically is introduced to avoid possible generalization drop caused by gradient modulation. As a result, we achieve considerable improvement over common fusion methods on different multimodal tasks, and this simple strategy can also boost existing multimodal methods, which illustrates its efficacy and versatility. The source code is available at \url{https://github.com/GeWu-Lab/OGM-GE_CVPR2022}. 多模态学习通过整合不同的感官来帮助全面理解世界。因此，多种输入模态有望提高模型性能，但我们实际上发现，即使多模态模型优于单模态模型，它们也没有得到充分利用。具体来说，在本文中，我们指出，现有的多模态判别模型（其中为所有模态设计统一的目标）可能仍然是未优化的单模态表示，这是由某些场景中的另一种主导模态引起的，例如，吹风事件中的声音、绘图事件中的视觉等。为了缓解这种优化不平衡，我们提出了动态梯度调制，通过监控它们对学习目标的贡献的差异，自适应地控制每种模态的优化。此外，引入动态变化的额外高斯噪声以避免梯度调制可能导致的泛化下降。因此，我们在不同的多模态任务上比常见的融合方法取得了相当大的改进，并且这种简单的策略还可以促进现有的多模态方法，这说明了其有效性和多功能性。源代码可在 \url{https://github.com/GeWu-Lab/OGM-GE_CVPR2022} 获取。 本文提出通过即时梯度调制实现平衡的多模态学习，解决现有模型中模态优化不平衡的问题。 Xiaokang Peng,Yake Wei,Andong Deng,Dong Wang,Di Hu cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Paul Gavrikov,Janis Keuper
title: CNN Filter DB: An Empirical Investigation of Trained Convolutional Filters
title_zh: CNN Filter DB：训练卷积滤波器的实证研究
comment: significantly reduced PDF size in v2; Accepted as ORAL at IEEE/CVF Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition 2022 (CVPR)
comments: significantly reduced PDF size in v2; Accepted as ORAL at IEEE/CVF Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition 2022 (CVPR)
abstract: Currently, many theoretical as well as practically relevant questions towards the transferability and robustness of Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) remain unsolved. While ongoing research efforts are engaging these problems from various angles, in most computer vision related cases these approaches can be generalized to investigations of the effects of distribution shifts in image data. In this context, we propose to study the shifts in the learned weights of trained CNN models. Here we focus on the properties of the distributions of dominantly used 3x3 convolution filter kernels. We collected and publicly provide a dataset with over 1.4 billion filters from hundreds of trained CNNs, using a wide range of datasets, architectures, and vision tasks. In a first use case of the proposed dataset, we can show highly relevant properties of many publicly available pre-trained models for practical applications: I) We analyze distribution shifts (or the lack thereof) between trained filters along different axes of meta-parameters, like visual category of the dataset, task, architecture, or layer depth. Based on these results, we conclude that model pre-training can succeed on arbitrary datasets if they meet size and variance conditions. II) We show that many pre-trained models contain degenerated filters which make them less robust and less suitable for fine-tuning on target applications. Data & Project website: https://github.com/paulgavrikov/cnn-filter-db
summary: Currently, many theoretical as well as practically relevant questions towards the transferability and robustness of Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) remain unsolved. While ongoing research efforts are engaging these problems from various angles, in most computer vision related cases these approaches can be generalized to investigations of the effects of distribution shifts in image data. In this context, we propose to study the shifts in the learned weights of trained CNN models. Here we focus on the properties of the distributions of dominantly used 3x3 convolution filter kernels. We collected and publicly provide a dataset with over 1.4 billion filters from hundreds of trained CNNs, using a wide range of datasets, architectures, and vision tasks. In a first use case of the proposed dataset, we can show highly relevant properties of many publicly available pre-trained models for practical applications: I) We analyze distribution shifts (or the lack thereof) between trained filters along different axes of meta-parameters, like visual category of the dataset, task, architecture, or layer depth. Based on these results, we conclude that model pre-training can succeed on arbitrary datasets if they meet size and variance conditions. II) We show that many pre-trained models contain degenerated filters which make them less robust and less suitable for fine-tuning on target applications. Data & Project website: https://github.com/paulgavrikov/cnn-filter-db
abstract_zh: 目前，关于卷积神经网络（CNN）的可迁移性和鲁棒性的许多理论和实践相关问题仍未解决。虽然正在进行的研究工作正在从各个角度解决这些问题，但在大多数计算机视觉相关案例中，这些方法可以推广到图像数据分布变化影响的研究。在这种背景下，我们建议研究经过训练的 CNN 模型的学习权重的变化。在这里，我们重点关注主要使用的 3x3 卷积滤波器内核的分布特性。我们使用广泛的数据集、架构和视觉任务，收集并公开提供了一个数据集，其中包含来自数百个训练有素的 CNN 的超过 14 亿个过滤器。在所提出的数据集的第一个用例中，我们可以展示许多公开可用的预训练模型的高度相关属性，用于实际应用：I）我们分析沿不同元参数轴的训练过滤器之间的分布变化（或缺乏分布变化），例如数据集的视觉类别、任务、架构或层深度。基于这些结果，我们得出结论，如果满足大小和方差条件，模型预训练可以在任意数据集上成功。 II）我们表明，许多预训练模型包含退化滤波器，这使得它们的鲁棒性较差，并且不太适合在目标应用程序上进行微调。数据和项目网站：https://github.com/paulgavrikov/cnn-filter-db

AI.tldr: 本文通过构建包含14亿个卷积滤波器的公开数据集，研究训练好的CNN模型中滤波器分布的特性及其对模型泛化能力的影响。
AI.motivation: 现有研究尚未解决CNN模型的可迁移性和鲁棒性问题，尤其需要理解滤波器权重分布与数据集、任务类型等元参数的关系。
AI.method: 收集数百个CNN模型的3x3卷积滤波器，按数据集类别、任务类型、网络结构等维度分析其分布特性，并验证预训练模型在不同场景下的表现。
AI.result: 发现预训练模型在满足数据规模和方差条件时可适配任意数据集，但许多模型存在退化滤波器，导致微调时鲁棒性下降。
AI.conclusion: 滤波器分布特性揭示了预训练模型的适应性边界，为改进模型设计和微调策略提供了实证依据。

authors_text: Heqing Zou,Yuke Si,Chen Chen,Deepu Rajan,Eng Siong Chng
title: Speech Emotion Recognition with Co-Attention based Multi-level Acoustic Information
title_zh: 基于多级声学信息的共同关注的语音情感识别
abstract: Speech Emotion Recognition (SER) aims to help the machine to understand human's subjective emotion from only audio information. However, extracting and utilizing comprehensive in-depth audio information is still a challenging task. In this paper, we propose an end-to-end speech emotion recognition system using multi-level acoustic information with a newly designed co-attention module. We firstly extract multi-level acoustic information, including MFCC, spectrogram, and the embedded high-level acoustic information with CNN, BiLSTM and wav2vec2, respectively. Then these extracted features are treated as multimodal inputs and fused by the proposed co-attention mechanism. Experiments are carried on the IEMOCAP dataset, and our model achieves competitive performance with two different speaker-independent cross-validation strategies. Our code is available on GitHub.
summary: Speech Emotion Recognition (SER) aims to help the machine to understand human's subjective emotion from only audio information. However, extracting and utilizing comprehensive in-depth audio information is still a challenging task. In this paper, we propose an end-to-end speech emotion recognition system using multi-level acoustic information with a newly designed co-attention module. We firstly extract multi-level acoustic information, including MFCC, spectrogram, and the embedded high-level acoustic information with CNN, BiLSTM and wav2vec2, respectively. Then these extracted features are treated as multimodal inputs and fused by the proposed co-attention mechanism. Experiments are carried on the IEMOCAP dataset, and our model achieves competitive performance with two different speaker-independent cross-validation strategies. Our code is available on GitHub.
abstract_zh: 语音情感识别（SER）旨在帮助机器仅从音频信息中理解人类的主观情感。然而，提取和利用全面深入的音频信息仍然是一项具有挑战性的任务。在本文中，我们提出了一种使用多级声学信息和新设计的共同注意模块的端到端语音情感识别系统。我们首先提取多级声学信息，包括 MFCC、声谱图，以及分别使用 CNN、BiLSTM 和 wav2vec2 嵌入的高级声学信息。然后，这些提取的特征被视为多模态输入，并通过所提出的共同注意机制进行融合。在 IEMOCAP 数据集上进行了实验，我们的模型通过两种不同的独立于说话人的交叉验证策略实现了有竞争力的性能。我们的代码可以在 GitHub 上找到。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于共注意机制的多级声学信息语音情感识别系统，通过融合不同层次的音频特征提升识别效果。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在提取和利用深度音频信息时存在局限，难以全面捕捉语音中的情感特征，需更有效的多模态融合机制。
AI.method: 提取MFCC、频谱图及CNN/BiLSTM/wav2vec2的高层声学特征，通过自设计的共注意模块进行多模态特征融合。
AI.result: 在IEMOCAP数据集上，模型在两种说话人独立交叉验证策略下均取得竞争性性能，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 共注意机制有效整合多级声学信息，提升了语音情感识别的准确性和泛化能力。

motivation: 现有方法在提取和利用深度音频信息时存在局限，难以全面捕捉语音中的情感特征，需更有效的多模态融合机制。

search_text: Speech Emotion Recognition with Co-Attention based Multi-level Acoustic Information 基于多级声学信息的共同关注的语音情感识别 Speech Emotion Recognition (SER) aims to help the machine to understand human's subjective emotion from only audio information. However, extracting and utilizing comprehensive in-depth audio information is still a challenging task. In this paper, we propose an end-to-end speech emotion recognition system using multi-level acoustic information with a newly designed co-attention module. We firstly extract multi-level acoustic information, including MFCC, spectrogram, and the embedded high-level acoustic information with CNN, BiLSTM and wav2vec2, respectively. Then these extracted features are treated as multimodal inputs and fused by the proposed co-attention mechanism. Experiments are carried on the IEMOCAP dataset, and our model achieves competitive performance with two different speaker-independent cross-validation strategies. Our code is available on GitHub. 语音情感识别（SER）旨在帮助机器仅从音频信息中理解人类的主观情感。然而，提取和利用全面深入的音频信息仍然是一项具有挑战性的任务。在本文中，我们提出了一种使用多级声学信息和新设计的共同注意模块的端到端语音情感识别系统。我们首先提取多级声学信息，包括 MFCC、声谱图，以及分别使用 CNN、BiLSTM 和 wav2vec2 嵌入的高级声学信息。然后，这些提取的特征被视为多模态输入，并通过所提出的共同注意机制进行融合。在 IEMOCAP 数据集上进行了实验，我们的模型通过两种不同的独立于说话人的交叉验证策略实现了有竞争力的性能。我们的代码可以在 GitHub 上找到。 本文提出一种基于共注意机制的多级声学信息语音情感识别系统，通过融合不同层次的音频特征提升识别效果。 Heqing Zou,Yuke Si,Chen Chen,Deepu Rajan,Eng Siong Chng cs.SD,cs.AI,eess.AS

authors_text: De Cheng,Yan Li,Dingwen Zhang,Nannan Wang,Xinbo Gao,Jiande Sun
title: Robust Single Image Dehazing Based on Consistent and Contrast-Assisted Reconstruction
title_zh: 基于一致性和对比度辅助重建的鲁棒单幅图像去雾
abstract: Single image dehazing as a fundamental low-level vision task, is essential for the development of robust intelligent surveillance system. In this paper, we make an early effort to consider dehazing robustness under variational haze density, which is a realistic while under-studied problem in the research filed of singe image dehazing. To properly address this problem, we propose a novel density-variational learning framework to improve the robustness of the image dehzing model assisted by a variety of negative hazy images, to better deal with various complex hazy scenarios. Specifically, the dehazing network is optimized under the consistency-regularized framework with the proposed Contrast-Assisted Reconstruction Loss (CARL). The CARL can fully exploit the negative information to facilitate the traditional positive-orient dehazing objective function, by squeezing the dehazed image to its clean target from different directions. Meanwhile, the consistency regularization keeps consistent outputs given multi-level hazy images, thus improving the model robustness. Extensive experimental results on two synthetic and three real-world datasets demonstrate that our method significantly surpasses the state-of-the-art approaches.
summary: Single image dehazing as a fundamental low-level vision task, is essential for the development of robust intelligent surveillance system. In this paper, we make an early effort to consider dehazing robustness under variational haze density, which is a realistic while under-studied problem in the research filed of singe image dehazing. To properly address this problem, we propose a novel density-variational learning framework to improve the robustness of the image dehzing model assisted by a variety of negative hazy images, to better deal with various complex hazy scenarios. Specifically, the dehazing network is optimized under the consistency-regularized framework with the proposed Contrast-Assisted Reconstruction Loss (CARL). The CARL can fully exploit the negative information to facilitate the traditional positive-orient dehazing objective function, by squeezing the dehazed image to its clean target from different directions. Meanwhile, the consistency regularization keeps consistent outputs given multi-level hazy images, thus improving the model robustness. Extensive experimental results on two synthetic and three real-world datasets demonstrate that our method significantly surpasses the state-of-the-art approaches.
abstract_zh: 单图像去雾作为一项基本的低级视觉任务，对于开发强大的智能监控系统至关重要。在本文中，我们早期努力考虑变化雾度密度下的去雾鲁棒性，这是单图像去雾研究领域中一个现实但尚未研究的问题。为了妥善解决这个问题，我们提出了一种新颖的密度变分学习框架，以提高各种负雾图像辅助的图像去赫模型的鲁棒性，以更好地处理各种复杂的雾场景。具体来说，去雾网络在一致性正则化框架下使用所提出的对比度辅助重建损失（CARL）进行优化。 CARL可以充分利用负信息，通过从不同方向将去雾图像挤压到干净的目标，以促进传统的正向去雾目标函数。同时，一致性正则化在给定多级模糊图像的情况下保持一致的输出，从而提高了模型的鲁棒性。对两个合成数据集和三个真实世界数据集的广泛实验结果表明，我们的方法显着超越了最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于一致性和对比辅助重建的鲁棒单幅图像去雾方法，以应对不同雾密度的复杂场景。
AI.motivation: 现有单幅图像去雾方法在雾密度变化时鲁棒性不足，而实际场景中雾密度差异显著，需提升模型适应复杂雾况的能力。
AI.method: 设计密度可变学习框架，结合对比辅助重建损失（CARL）和一致性正则化，利用负样本信息多方向优化去雾网络，确保多层级雾图输出一致。
AI.result: 在两个合成数据集和三个真实数据集上实验表明，该方法显著优于现有最先进算法。
AI.conclusion: 通过引入CARL和一致性约束，模型在雾密度变化场景下表现出更强的鲁棒性和重建质量，为实际智能监控系统提供有效解决方案。

authors_text: Chen Chen,Nana Hou,Yuchen Hu,Shashank Shirol,Eng Siong Chng
title: Noise-robust Speech Recognition with 10 Minutes Unparalleled In-domain Data
title_zh: 通过 10 分钟无与伦比的域内数据进行抗噪语音识别
abstract: Noise-robust speech recognition systems require large amounts of training data including noisy speech data and corresponding transcripts to achieve state-of-the-art performances in face of various practical environments. However, such plenty of in-domain data is not always available in the real-life world. In this paper, we propose a generative adversarial network to simulate noisy spectrum from the clean spectrum (Simu-GAN), where only 10 minutes of unparalleled in-domain noisy speech data is required as labels. Furthermore, we also propose a dual-path speech recognition system to improve the robustness of the system under noisy conditions. Experimental results show that the proposed speech recognition system achieves 7.3% absolute improvement with simulated noisy data by Simu-GAN over the best baseline in terms of word error rate (WER).
summary: Noise-robust speech recognition systems require large amounts of training data including noisy speech data and corresponding transcripts to achieve state-of-the-art performances in face of various practical environments. However, such plenty of in-domain data is not always available in the real-life world. In this paper, we propose a generative adversarial network to simulate noisy spectrum from the clean spectrum (Simu-GAN), where only 10 minutes of unparalleled in-domain noisy speech data is required as labels. Furthermore, we also propose a dual-path speech recognition system to improve the robustness of the system under noisy conditions. Experimental results show that the proposed speech recognition system achieves 7.3% absolute improvement with simulated noisy data by Simu-GAN over the best baseline in terms of word error rate (WER).
abstract_zh: 抗噪声语音识别系统需要大量的训练数据，包括噪声语音数据和相应的转录本，才能在各种实际环境中实现最先进的性能。然而，如此大量的领域内数据在现实世界中并不总是可用。在本文中，我们提出了一种生成对抗网络来模拟干净频谱中的噪声频谱（Simu-GAN），其中仅需要 10 分钟无与伦比的域内噪声语音数据作为标签。此外，我们还提出了一种双路径语音识别系统，以提高系统在噪声条件下的鲁棒性。实验结果表明，所提出的语音识别系统通过 Simu-GAN 模拟噪声数据，在字错误率 (WER) 方面比最佳基线实现了 7.3% 的绝对改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于生成对抗网络（Simu-GAN）和双路径语音识别系统的噪声鲁棒语音识别方法，仅需10分钟领域内噪声数据即可提升识别性能。
AI.motivation: 现有噪声鲁棒语音识别系统依赖大量标注噪声数据，但实际场景中难以获取充足且高质量的领域内噪声数据。
AI.method: 设计Simu-GAN从干净语音生成噪声频谱，结合双路径语音识别架构增强噪声环境下的模型鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在词错误率（WER）指标上，使用Simu-GAN生成的噪声数据相比最佳基线绝对提升了7.3%。
AI.conclusion: 通过数据生成与模型结构改进的协同优化，可在极少量领域内噪声数据条件下显著提升语音识别系统的噪声鲁棒性。

authors_text: Xin Dong,Fuwei Zhao,Zhenyu Xie,Xijin Zhang,Daniel K. Du,Min Zheng,Xiang Long,Xiaodan Liang,Jianchao Yang
title: Dressing in the Wild by Watching Dance Videos
title_zh: 通过观看舞蹈视频在野外穿衣
abstract: While significant progress has been made in garment transfer, one of the most applicable directions of human-centric image generation, existing works overlook the in-the-wild imagery, presenting severe garment-person misalignment as well as noticeable degradation in fine texture details. This paper, therefore, attends to virtual try-on in real-world scenes and brings essential improvements in authenticity and naturalness especially for loose garment (e.g., skirts, formal dresses), challenging poses (e.g., cross arms, bent legs), and cluttered backgrounds. Specifically, we find that the pixel flow excels at handling loose garments whereas the vertex flow is preferred for hard poses, and by combining their advantages we propose a novel generative network called wFlow that can effectively push up garment transfer to in-the-wild context. Moreover, former approaches require paired images for training. Instead, we cut down the laboriousness by working on a newly constructed large-scale video dataset named Dance50k with self-supervised cross-frame training and an online cycle optimization. The proposed Dance50k can boost real-world virtual dressing by covering a wide variety of garments under dancing poses. Extensive experiments demonstrate the superiority of our wFlow in generating realistic garment transfer results for in-the-wild images without resorting to expensive paired datasets.
summary: While significant progress has been made in garment transfer, one of the most applicable directions of human-centric image generation, existing works overlook the in-the-wild imagery, presenting severe garment-person misalignment as well as noticeable degradation in fine texture details. This paper, therefore, attends to virtual try-on in real-world scenes and brings essential improvements in authenticity and naturalness especially for loose garment (e.g., skirts, formal dresses), challenging poses (e.g., cross arms, bent legs), and cluttered backgrounds. Specifically, we find that the pixel flow excels at handling loose garments whereas the vertex flow is preferred for hard poses, and by combining their advantages we propose a novel generative network called wFlow that can effectively push up garment transfer to in-the-wild context. Moreover, former approaches require paired images for training. Instead, we cut down the laboriousness by working on a newly constructed large-scale video dataset named Dance50k with self-supervised cross-frame training and an online cycle optimization. The proposed Dance50k can boost real-world virtual dressing by covering a wide variety of garments under dancing poses. Extensive experiments demonstrate the superiority of our wFlow in generating realistic garment transfer results for in-the-wild images without resorting to expensive paired datasets.
abstract_zh: 虽然在以人为中心的图像生成最适用的方向之一——服装转移方面取得了重大进展，但现有的作品忽视了野外图像，呈现出严重的服装与人的错位以及精细纹理细节的明显退化。因此，本文着眼于现实世界场景中的虚拟试穿，并在真实性和自然性方面带来了本质的改进，特别是对于宽松的服装（例如裙子、礼服）、具有挑战性的姿势（例如交叉双臂、弯曲双腿）和杂乱的背景。具体来说，我们发现像素流擅长处理宽松的服装，而顶点流更适合处理硬姿势，通过结合它们的优势，我们提出了一种名为 wFlow 的新型生成网络，它可以有效地将服装转移到野外环境中。此外，以前的方法需要配对图像进行训练。相反，我们通过使用新构建的名为 Dance50k 的大型视频数据集以及自我监督的跨帧训练和在线循环优化来减少工作量。拟议的 Dance50k 可以通过在舞蹈姿势下覆盖各种服装来增强现实世界的虚拟着装。大量的实验证明了我们的 wFlow 在为野外图像生成逼真的服装转移结果方面的优越性，而无需求助于昂贵的配对数据集。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种在真实场景中实现虚拟试衣的方法，通过观看舞蹈视频提升服装转移的逼真度和自然度。
AI.motivation: 现有服装转移方法在真实场景中存在服装与人体对齐误差大、纹理细节退化等问题，尤其在宽松服装、复杂姿势和杂乱背景下表现不足。
AI.method: 结合像素流（处理宽松服装）与顶点流（处理复杂姿势）优势，提出wFlow生成网络；构建Dance50k大规模视频数据集，采用自监督跨帧训练与在线循环优化，无需配对图像。
AI.result: 实验表明，wFlow在真实场景下生成的服装转移结果优于现有方法，且无需昂贵的配对数据集即可实现高质量虚拟试衣。
AI.conclusion: 通过融合流场优势与自监督学习，本文为真实场景下的虚拟试衣提供了更自然、实用的解决方案，推动了服装迁移技术的落地应用。

search_text: Dressing in the Wild by Watching Dance Videos 通过观看舞蹈视频在野外穿衣 While significant progress has been made in garment transfer, one of the most applicable directions of human-centric image generation, existing works overlook the in-the-wild imagery, presenting severe garment-person misalignment as well as noticeable degradation in fine texture details. This paper, therefore, attends to virtual try-on in real-world scenes and brings essential improvements in authenticity and naturalness especially for loose garment (e.g., skirts, formal dresses), challenging poses (e.g., cross arms, bent legs), and cluttered backgrounds. Specifically, we find that the pixel flow excels at handling loose garments whereas the vertex flow is preferred for hard poses, and by combining their advantages we propose a novel generative network called wFlow that can effectively push up garment transfer to in-the-wild context. Moreover, former approaches require paired images for training. Instead, we cut down the laboriousness by working on a newly constructed large-scale video dataset named Dance50k with self-supervised cross-frame training and an online cycle optimization. The proposed Dance50k can boost real-world virtual dressing by covering a wide variety of garments under dancing poses. Extensive experiments demonstrate the superiority of our wFlow in generating realistic garment transfer results for in-the-wild images without resorting to expensive paired datasets. 虽然在以人为中心的图像生成最适用的方向之一——服装转移方面取得了重大进展，但现有的作品忽视了野外图像，呈现出严重的服装与人的错位以及精细纹理细节的明显退化。因此，本文着眼于现实世界场景中的虚拟试穿，并在真实性和自然性方面带来了本质的改进，特别是对于宽松的服装（例如裙子、礼服）、具有挑战性的姿势（例如交叉双臂、弯曲双腿）和杂乱的背景。具体来说，我们发现像素流擅长处理宽松的服装，而顶点流更适合处理硬姿势，通过结合它们的优势，我们提出了一种名为 wFlow 的新型生成网络，它可以有效地将服装转移到野外环境中。此外，以前的方法需要配对图像进行训练。相反，我们通过使用新构建的名为 Dance50k 的大型视频数据集以及自我监督的跨帧训练和在线循环优化来减少工作量。拟议的 Dance50k 可以通过在舞蹈姿势下覆盖各种服装来增强现实世界的虚拟着装。大量的实验证明了我们的 wFlow 在为野外图像生成逼真的服装转移结果方面的优越性，而无需求助于昂贵的配对数据集。 本文提出一种在真实场景中实现虚拟试衣的方法，通过观看舞蹈视频提升服装转移的逼真度和自然度。 Xin Dong,Fuwei Zhao,Zhenyu Xie,Xijin Zhang,Daniel K. Du,Min Zheng,Xiang Long,Xiaodan Liang,Jianchao Yang cs.CV

authors_text: Edwin Lughofer
title: Evolving Multi-Label Fuzzy Classifier
title_zh: 不断发展的多标签模糊分类器
abstract: Multi-label classification has attracted much attention in the machine learning community to address the problem of assigning single samples to more than one class at the same time. We propose an evolving multi-label fuzzy classifier (EFC-ML) which is able to self-adapt and self-evolve its structure with new incoming multi-label samples in an incremental, single-pass manner. It is based on a multi-output Takagi-Sugeno type architecture, where for each class a separate consequent hyper-plane is defined. The learning procedure embeds a locally weighted incremental correlation-based algorithm combined with (conventional) recursive fuzzily weighted least squares and Lasso-based regularization. The correlation-based part ensures that the interrelations between class labels, a specific well-known property in multi-label classification for improved performance, are preserved properly; the Lasso-based regularization reduces the curse of dimensionality effects in the case of a higher number of inputs. Antecedent learning is achieved by product-space clustering and conducted for all class labels together, which yields a single rule base, allowing a compact knowledge view. Furthermore, our approach comes with an online active learning (AL) strategy for updating the classifier on just a number of selected samples, which in turn makes the approach applicable for scarcely labelled streams in applications, where the annotation effort is typically expensive. Our approach was evaluated on several data sets from the MULAN repository and showed significantly improved classification accuracy compared to (evolving) one-versus-rest or classifier chaining concepts. A significant result was that, due to the online AL method, a 90\% reduction in the number of samples used for classifier updates had little effect on the accumulated accuracy trend lines compared to a full update in most data set cases.
summary: Multi-label classification has attracted much attention in the machine learning community to address the problem of assigning single samples to more than one class at the same time. We propose an evolving multi-label fuzzy classifier (EFC-ML) which is able to self-adapt and self-evolve its structure with new incoming multi-label samples in an incremental, single-pass manner. It is based on a multi-output Takagi-Sugeno type architecture, where for each class a separate consequent hyper-plane is defined. The learning procedure embeds a locally weighted incremental correlation-based algorithm combined with (conventional) recursive fuzzily weighted least squares and Lasso-based regularization. The correlation-based part ensures that the interrelations between class labels, a specific well-known property in multi-label classification for improved performance, are preserved properly; the Lasso-based regularization reduces the curse of dimensionality effects in the case of a higher number of inputs. Antecedent learning is achieved by product-space clustering and conducted for all class labels together, which yields a single rule base, allowing a compact knowledge view. Furthermore, our approach comes with an online active learning (AL) strategy for updating the classifier on just a number of selected samples, which in turn makes the approach applicable for scarcely labelled streams in applications, where the annotation effort is typically expensive. Our approach was evaluated on several data sets from the MULAN repository and showed significantly improved classification accuracy compared to (evolving) one-versus-rest or classifier chaining concepts. A significant result was that, due to the online AL method, a 90\% reduction in the number of samples used for classifier updates had little effect on the accumulated accuracy trend lines compared to a full update in most data set cases.
abstract_zh: 多标签分类在机器学习界引起了广泛关注，以解决同时将单个样本分配到多个类别的问题。我们提出了一种进化的多标签模糊分类器（EFC-ML），它能够以增量、单通道的方式利用新传入的多标签样本来自适应和自我进化其结构。它基于多输出 Takagi-Sugeno 型架构，其中为每个类定义了一个单独的后续超平面。学习过程嵌入了基于局部加权增量相关的算法，并结合了（传统）递归模糊加权最小二乘法和基于 Lasso 的正则化。基于相关性的部分确保正确保留类标签之间的相互关系，这是多标签分类中用于提高性能的特定众所周知的属性；基于 Lasso 的正则化减少了输入数量较多的情况下的维数效应灾难。前因学习是通过产品空间聚类来实现的，并对所有类标签一起进行，从而产生单个规则库，从而实现紧凑的知识视图。此外，我们的方法配备了在线主动学习（AL）策略，用于仅在多个选定样本上更新分类器，这反过来又使该方法适用于应用程序中几乎没有标记的流，其中注释工作通常很昂贵。我们的方法在 MULAN 存储库中的多个数据集上进行了评估，结果表明，与（不断发展的）一对一或分类器链接概念相比，分类准确性显着提高。一个重要的结果是，由于采用了在线 AL 方法，在大多数数据集情况下，与完全更新相比，用于分类器更新的样本数量减少 90% 对累积精度趋势线影响很小。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种能够自适应和自演化的多标签模糊分类器（EFC-ML），用于处理增量多标签样本的分类问题。
AI.motivation: 传统多标签分类方法（如一对多或分类链）在处理标签间相关性和高维数据时存在性能瓶颈，且标注成本高昂。
AI.method: 基于多输出Takagi-Sugeno结构，结合局部加权增量相关性算法、模糊加权最小二乘法及Lasso正则化，并通过产品空间聚类实现前件学习，配合在线主动学习策略减少标注依赖。
AI.result: 在MULAN数据集上显著优于现有方法，且通过主动学习策略减少90%样本更新量时准确率下降极小。
AI.conclusion: EFC-ML通过结构自演化和主动学习有效提升了多标签分类性能，适用于标注成本高的应用场景。

authors_text: Jiarun Liu,Daguang Jiang,Yukun Yang,Ruirui Li
title: Agreement or Disagreement in Noise-tolerant Mutual Learning?
title_zh: 容忍噪声的相互学习中同意还是不同意？
abstract: Deep learning has made many remarkable achievements in many fields but suffers from noisy labels in datasets. The state-of-the-art learning with noisy label method Co-teaching and Co-teaching+ confronts the noisy label by mutual-information between dual-network. However, the dual network always tends to convergent which would weaken the dual-network mechanism to resist the noisy labels. In this paper, we proposed a noise-tolerant framework named MLC in an end-to-end manner. It adjusts the dual-network with divergent regularization to ensure the effectiveness of the mechanism. In addition, we correct the label distribution according to the agreement between dual-networks. The proposed method can utilize the noisy data to improve the accuracy, generalization, and robustness of the network. We test the proposed method on the simulate noisy dataset MNIST, CIFAR-10, and the real-world noisy dataset Clothing1M. The experimental result shows that our method outperforms the previous state-of-the-art method. Besides, our method is network-free thus it is applicable to many tasks. Our code can be found at https://github.com/JiarunLiu/MLC.
summary: Deep learning has made many remarkable achievements in many fields but suffers from noisy labels in datasets. The state-of-the-art learning with noisy label method Co-teaching and Co-teaching+ confronts the noisy label by mutual-information between dual-network. However, the dual network always tends to convergent which would weaken the dual-network mechanism to resist the noisy labels. In this paper, we proposed a noise-tolerant framework named MLC in an end-to-end manner. It adjusts the dual-network with divergent regularization to ensure the effectiveness of the mechanism. In addition, we correct the label distribution according to the agreement between dual-networks. The proposed method can utilize the noisy data to improve the accuracy, generalization, and robustness of the network. We test the proposed method on the simulate noisy dataset MNIST, CIFAR-10, and the real-world noisy dataset Clothing1M. The experimental result shows that our method outperforms the previous state-of-the-art method. Besides, our method is network-free thus it is applicable to many tasks. Our code can be found at https://github.com/JiarunLiu/MLC.
abstract_zh: 深度学习在许多领域取得了许多令人瞩目的成就，但受到数据集中标签噪声的困扰。最先进的带有噪声标签的学习方法Co-teaching和Co-teaching+通过双网络之间的互信息来对抗噪声标签。然而，双网络总是趋于收敛，这会削弱双网络抵抗噪声标签的机制。在本文中，我们以端到端的方式提出了一种名为 MLC 的噪声容忍框架。它通过发散正则化来调整双网络，以确保机制的有效性。此外，我们根据双网络之间的协议修正标签分配。所提出的方法可以利用噪声数据来提高网络的准确性、泛化性和鲁棒性。我们在模拟噪声数据集 MNIST、CIFAR-10 和真实世界噪声数据集 Clothing1M 上测试了所提出的方法。实验结果表明，我们的方法优于之前最先进的方法。此外，我们的方法是无网络的，因此适用于许多任务。我们的代码可以在 https://github.com/JiarunLiu/MLC 找到。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为MLC的噪声容忍互学习框架，通过调整双网络的分歧正则化和标签分布校正，提升模型在噪声数据下的准确性、泛化性和鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有方法如Co-teaching存在双网络收敛问题，导致其对抗噪声标签的能力减弱，需设计保持网络分歧并利用网络间一致性的新机制。
AI.method: 提出MLC框架，采用分歧正则化防止双网络收敛，并根据双网络一致性修正标签分布，以端到端方式利用噪声数据提升模型性能。
AI.result: 在MNIST、CIFAR-10及Clothing1M等噪声数据集上，MLC方法优于现有最先进算法，且具有网络无关性，适用于多种任务。
AI.conclusion: MLC通过保持双网络分歧与一致性校正标签分布，有效提升噪声环境下的模型性能，为噪声学习提供通用解决方案。

search_text: Agreement or Disagreement in Noise-tolerant Mutual Learning? 容忍噪声的相互学习中同意还是不同意？ Deep learning has made many remarkable achievements in many fields but suffers from noisy labels in datasets. The state-of-the-art learning with noisy label method Co-teaching and Co-teaching+ confronts the noisy label by mutual-information between dual-network. However, the dual network always tends to convergent which would weaken the dual-network mechanism to resist the noisy labels. In this paper, we proposed a noise-tolerant framework named MLC in an end-to-end manner. It adjusts the dual-network with divergent regularization to ensure the effectiveness of the mechanism. In addition, we correct the label distribution according to the agreement between dual-networks. The proposed method can utilize the noisy data to improve the accuracy, generalization, and robustness of the network. We test the proposed method on the simulate noisy dataset MNIST, CIFAR-10, and the real-world noisy dataset Clothing1M. The experimental result shows that our method outperforms the previous state-of-the-art method. Besides, our method is network-free thus it is applicable to many tasks. Our code can be found at https://github.com/JiarunLiu/MLC. 深度学习在许多领域取得了许多令人瞩目的成就，但受到数据集中标签噪声的困扰。最先进的带有噪声标签的学习方法Co-teaching和Co-teaching+通过双网络之间的互信息来对抗噪声标签。然而，双网络总是趋于收敛，这会削弱双网络抵抗噪声标签的机制。在本文中，我们以端到端的方式提出了一种名为 MLC 的噪声容忍框架。它通过发散正则化来调整双网络，以确保机制的有效性。此外，我们根据双网络之间的协议修正标签分配。所提出的方法可以利用噪声数据来提高网络的准确性、泛化性和鲁棒性。我们在模拟噪声数据集 MNIST、CIFAR-10 和真实世界噪声数据集 Clothing1M 上测试了所提出的方法。实验结果表明，我们的方法优于之前最先进的方法。此外，我们的方法是无网络的，因此适用于许多任务。我们的代码可以在 https://github.com/JiarunLiu/MLC 找到。 本文提出一种名为MLC的噪声容忍互学习框架，通过调整双网络的分歧正则化和标签分布校正，提升模型在噪声数据下的准确性、泛化性和鲁棒性。 Jiarun Liu,Daguang Jiang,Yukun Yang,Ruirui Li cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Chaowei Fang,Dingwen Zhang,Liang Wang,Yulun Zhang,Lechao Cheng,Junwei Han
title: Cross-Modality High-Frequency Transformer for MR Image Super-Resolution
title_zh: 用于 MR 图像超分辨率的跨模态高频变压器
abstract: Improving the resolution of magnetic resonance (MR) image data is critical to computer-aided diagnosis and brain function analysis. Higher resolution helps to capture more detailed content, but typically induces to lower signal-to-noise ratio and longer scanning time. To this end, MR image super-resolution has become a widely-interested topic in recent times. Existing works establish extensive deep models with the conventional architectures based on convolutional neural networks (CNN). In this work, to further advance this research field, we make an early effort to build a Transformer-based MR image super-resolution framework, with careful designs on exploring valuable domain prior knowledge. Specifically, we consider two-fold domain priors including the high-frequency structure prior and the inter-modality context prior, and establish a novel Transformer architecture, called Cross-modality high-frequency Transformer (Cohf-T), to introduce such priors into super-resolving the low-resolution (LR) MR images. Experiments on two datasets indicate that Cohf-T achieves new state-of-the-art performance.
summary: Improving the resolution of magnetic resonance (MR) image data is critical to computer-aided diagnosis and brain function analysis. Higher resolution helps to capture more detailed content, but typically induces to lower signal-to-noise ratio and longer scanning time. To this end, MR image super-resolution has become a widely-interested topic in recent times. Existing works establish extensive deep models with the conventional architectures based on convolutional neural networks (CNN). In this work, to further advance this research field, we make an early effort to build a Transformer-based MR image super-resolution framework, with careful designs on exploring valuable domain prior knowledge. Specifically, we consider two-fold domain priors including the high-frequency structure prior and the inter-modality context prior, and establish a novel Transformer architecture, called Cross-modality high-frequency Transformer (Cohf-T), to introduce such priors into super-resolving the low-resolution (LR) MR images. Experiments on two datasets indicate that Cohf-T achieves new state-of-the-art performance.
abstract_zh: 提高磁共振（MR）图像数据的分辨率对于计算机辅助诊断和脑功能分析至关重要。更高的分辨率有助于捕获更详细的内容，但通常会导致信噪比降低和扫描时间更长。为此，MR图像超分辨率成为近年来广泛关注的话题。现有的工作使用基于卷积神经网络（CNN）的传统架构建立了广泛的深度模型。在这项工作中，为了进一步推进这一研究领域，我们早期努力构建一个基于 Transformer 的 MR 图像超分辨率框架，并仔细设计探索有价值的领域先验知识。具体来说，我们考虑了两重域先验，包括高频结构先验和模态间上下文先验，并建立了一种新颖的 Transformer 架构，称为跨模态高频 Transformer (Cohf-T)，将此类先验引入到超分辨率 (LR) MR 图像中。对两个数据集的实验表明，Cohf-T 实现了新的最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于Transformer的MRI图像超分辨率框架，称为Cross-modality high-frequency Transformer (Cohf-T)，旨在提高磁共振图像的分辨率。
AI.motivation: 提高MRI图像的分辨率对于计算机辅助诊断和大脑功能分析至关重要，但高分辨率通常会导致信噪比降低和扫描时间增加。现有方法主要基于卷积神经网络，本文旨在通过引入Transformer架构和领域先验知识，进一步推动该领域的发展。
AI.method: 本文设计了一种新的Transformer架构，称为Cohf-T，引入了两种领域先验知识：高频结构先验和跨模态上下文先验，以提升低分辨率MRI图像的超分辨率效果。
AI.result: 在两个数据集上的实验表明，Cohf-T在MRI图像超分辨率任务中取得了新的最先进性能。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的Cohf-T框架通过引入跨模态上下文和高频结构先验，有效提升了MRI图像的超分辨率性能，为该领域提供了新的研究方向。

authors_text: Xiao Pan,Peike Li,Zongxin Yang,Huiling Zhou,Chang Zhou,Hongxia Yang,Jingren Zhou,Yi Yang
title: In-N-Out Generative Learning for Dense Unsupervised Video Segmentation
title_zh: 用于密集无监督视频分割的 In-N-Out 生成学习
abstract: In this paper, we focus on unsupervised learning for Video Object Segmentation (VOS) which learns visual correspondence (i.e., the similarity between pixel-level features) from unlabeled videos. Previous methods are mainly based on the contrastive learning paradigm, which optimize either in image level or pixel level. Image-level optimization (e.g., the spatially pooled feature of ResNet) learns robust high-level semantics but is sub-optimal since the pixel-level features are optimized implicitly. By contrast, pixel-level optimization is more explicit, however, it is sensitive to the visual quality of training data and is not robust to object deformation. To complementarily perform these two levels of optimization in a unified framework, we propose the In-aNd-Out (INO) generative learning from a purely generative perspective with the help of naturally designed class tokens and patch tokens in Vision Transformer (ViT). Specifically, for image-level optimization, we force the out-view imagination from local to global views on class tokens, which helps capture high-level semantics, and we name it as out-generative learning. As to pixel-level optimization, we perform in-view masked image modeling on patch tokens, which recovers the corrupted parts of an image via inferring its fine-grained structure, and we term it as in-generative learning. To discover the temporal information better, we additionally force the inter-frame consistency from both feature and affinity matrix levels. Extensive experiments on DAVIS-2017 val and YouTube-VOS 2018 val show that our INO outperforms previous state-of-the-art methods by significant margins. Code is available: https://github.com/pansanity666/INO_VOS
summary: In this paper, we focus on unsupervised learning for Video Object Segmentation (VOS) which learns visual correspondence (i.e., the similarity between pixel-level features) from unlabeled videos. Previous methods are mainly based on the contrastive learning paradigm, which optimize either in image level or pixel level. Image-level optimization (e.g., the spatially pooled feature of ResNet) learns robust high-level semantics but is sub-optimal since the pixel-level features are optimized implicitly. By contrast, pixel-level optimization is more explicit, however, it is sensitive to the visual quality of training data and is not robust to object deformation. To complementarily perform these two levels of optimization in a unified framework, we propose the In-aNd-Out (INO) generative learning from a purely generative perspective with the help of naturally designed class tokens and patch tokens in Vision Transformer (ViT). Specifically, for image-level optimization, we force the out-view imagination from local to global views on class tokens, which helps capture high-level semantics, and we name it as out-generative learning. As to pixel-level optimization, we perform in-view masked image modeling on patch tokens, which recovers the corrupted parts of an image via inferring its fine-grained structure, and we term it as in-generative learning. To discover the temporal information better, we additionally force the inter-frame consistency from both feature and affinity matrix levels. Extensive experiments on DAVIS-2017 val and YouTube-VOS 2018 val show that our INO outperforms previous state-of-the-art methods by significant margins. Code is available: https://github.com/pansanity666/INO_VOS
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们重点关注视频对象分割（VOS）的无监督学习，它从未标记的视频中学习视觉对应（即像素级特征之间的相似性）。以前的方法主要基于对比学习范式，在图像级或像素级进行优化。图像级优化（例如 ResNet 的空间池化特征）可以学习鲁棒的高级语义，但由于像素级特征是隐式优化的，因此不是最佳的。相比之下，像素级优化更加明确，但对训练数据的视觉质量敏感，并且对对象变形不鲁棒。为了在统一框架中互补地执行这两个级别的优化，我们借助 Vision Transformer (ViT) 中自然设计的类标记和补丁标记，从纯粹生成的角度提出了 In-aNd-Out (INO) 生成学习。具体来说，对于图像级优化，我们将类标记上的外视图想象力从局部视图强制到全局视图，这有助于捕获高级语义，我们将其命名为外生成学习。至于像素级优化，我们对补丁令牌进行视图内蒙版图像建模，通过推断其细粒度结构来恢复图像的损坏部分，我们将其称为生成学习。为了更好地发现时间信息，我们还从特征和亲和力矩阵层面强制帧间一致性。对 DAVIS-2017 val 和 YouTube-VOS 2018 val 的大量实验表明，我们的 INO 明显优于之前最先进的方法。代码可用：https://github.com/pansanity666/INO_VOS

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于生成学习的无监督视频密集分割方法INO，通过结合图像级和像素级优化，利用Vision Transformer的类标记和补丁标记实现更优的视频对象分割。
AI.motivation: 传统对比学习方法在图像级优化时无法显式优化像素特征，在像素级优化时又容易受数据质量和物体形变影响，需在统一框架中互补两种优化方式。
AI.method: 提出In-aNd-Out（INO）生成学习框架，通过类标记的out-generative学习捕获高层语义，利用补丁标记的in-generative学习恢复像素细节，并引入帧间特征与亲和矩阵一致性约束以增强时序信息。
AI.result: 在DAVIS-2017和YouTube-VOS 2018验证集上显著优于现有最先进方法，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: INO通过生成学习框架有效结合多层级优化，利用ViT结构设计实现更鲁棒的无监督视频分割，为后续研究提供新思路。

search_text: In-N-Out Generative Learning for Dense Unsupervised Video Segmentation 用于密集无监督视频分割的 In-N-Out 生成学习 In this paper, we focus on unsupervised learning for Video Object Segmentation (VOS) which learns visual correspondence (i.e., the similarity between pixel-level features) from unlabeled videos. Previous methods are mainly based on the contrastive learning paradigm, which optimize either in image level or pixel level. Image-level optimization (e.g., the spatially pooled feature of ResNet) learns robust high-level semantics but is sub-optimal since the pixel-level features are optimized implicitly. By contrast, pixel-level optimization is more explicit, however, it is sensitive to the visual quality of training data and is not robust to object deformation. To complementarily perform these two levels of optimization in a unified framework, we propose the In-aNd-Out (INO) generative learning from a purely generative perspective with the help of naturally designed class tokens and patch tokens in Vision Transformer (ViT). Specifically, for image-level optimization, we force the out-view imagination from local to global views on class tokens, which helps capture high-level semantics, and we name it as out-generative learning. As to pixel-level optimization, we perform in-view masked image modeling on patch tokens, which recovers the corrupted parts of an image via inferring its fine-grained structure, and we term it as in-generative learning. To discover the temporal information better, we additionally force the inter-frame consistency from both feature and affinity matrix levels. Extensive experiments on DAVIS-2017 val and YouTube-VOS 2018 val show that our INO outperforms previous state-of-the-art methods by significant margins. Code is available: https://github.com/pansanity666/INO_VOS 在本文中，我们重点关注视频对象分割（VOS）的无监督学习，它从未标记的视频中学习视觉对应（即像素级特征之间的相似性）。以前的方法主要基于对比学习范式，在图像级或像素级进行优化。图像级优化（例如 ResNet 的空间池化特征）可以学习鲁棒的高级语义，但由于像素级特征是隐式优化的，因此不是最佳的。相比之下，像素级优化更加明确，但对训练数据的视觉质量敏感，并且对对象变形不鲁棒。为了在统一框架中互补地执行这两个级别的优化，我们借助 Vision Transformer (ViT) 中自然设计的类标记和补丁标记，从纯粹生成的角度提出了 In-aNd-Out (INO) 生成学习。具体来说，对于图像级优化，我们将类标记上的外视图想象力从局部视图强制到全局视图，这有助于捕获高级语义，我们将其命名为外生成学习。至于像素级优化，我们对补丁令牌进行视图内蒙版图像建模，通过推断其细粒度结构来恢复图像的损坏部分，我们将其称为生成学习。为了更好地发现时间信息，我们还从特征和亲和力矩阵层面强制帧间一致性。对 DAVIS-2017 val 和 YouTube-VOS 2018 val 的大量实验表明，我们的 INO 明显优于之前最先进的方法。代码可用：https://github.com/pansanity666/INO_VOS 本文提出一种基于生成学习的无监督视频密集分割方法INO，通过结合图像级和像素级优化，利用Vision Transformer的类标记和补丁标记实现更优的视频对象分割。 Xiao Pan,Peike Li,Zongxin Yang,Huiling Zhou,Chang Zhou,Hongxia Yang,Jingren Zhou,Yi Yang cs.CV

authors_text: De Cheng,Gerong Wang,Bo Wang,Qiang Zhang,Jungong Han,Dingwen Zhang
title: Hybrid Routing Transformer for Zero-Shot Learning
title_zh: 用于零样本学习的混合路由变压器
abstract: Zero-shot learning (ZSL) aims to learn models that can recognize unseen image semantics based on the training of data with seen semantics. Recent studies either leverage the global image features or mine discriminative local patch features to associate the extracted visual features to the semantic attributes. However, due to the lack of the necessary top-down guidance and semantic alignment for ensuring the model attending to the real attribute-correlation regions, these methods still encounter a significant semantic gap between the visual modality and the attribute modality, which makes their prediction on unseen semantics unreliable. To solve this problem, this paper establishes a novel transformer encoder-decoder model, called hybrid routing transformer (HRT). In HRT encoder, we embed an active attention, which is constructed by both the bottom-up and the top-down dynamic routing pathways to generate the attribute-aligned visual feature. While in HRT decoder, we use static routing to calculate the correlation among the attribute-aligned visual features, the corresponding attribute semantics, and the class attribute vectors to generate the final class label predictions. This design makes the presented transformer model a hybrid of 1) top-down and bottom-up attention pathways and 2) dynamic and static routing pathways. Comprehensive experiments on three widely-used benchmark datasets, namely CUB, SUN, and AWA2, are conducted. The obtained experimental results demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed method.
summary: Zero-shot learning (ZSL) aims to learn models that can recognize unseen image semantics based on the training of data with seen semantics. Recent studies either leverage the global image features or mine discriminative local patch features to associate the extracted visual features to the semantic attributes. However, due to the lack of the necessary top-down guidance and semantic alignment for ensuring the model attending to the real attribute-correlation regions, these methods still encounter a significant semantic gap between the visual modality and the attribute modality, which makes their prediction on unseen semantics unreliable. To solve this problem, this paper establishes a novel transformer encoder-decoder model, called hybrid routing transformer (HRT). In HRT encoder, we embed an active attention, which is constructed by both the bottom-up and the top-down dynamic routing pathways to generate the attribute-aligned visual feature. While in HRT decoder, we use static routing to calculate the correlation among the attribute-aligned visual features, the corresponding attribute semantics, and the class attribute vectors to generate the final class label predictions. This design makes the presented transformer model a hybrid of 1) top-down and bottom-up attention pathways and 2) dynamic and static routing pathways. Comprehensive experiments on three widely-used benchmark datasets, namely CUB, SUN, and AWA2, are conducted. The obtained experimental results demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed method.
abstract_zh: 零样本学习（ZSL）旨在基于具有可见语义的数据训练来学习能够识别不可见图像语义的模型。最近的研究要么利用全局图像特征，要么挖掘有区别的局部补丁特征，将提取的视觉特征与语义属性相关联。然而，由于缺乏必要的自上而下的指导和语义对齐来确保模型关注真实的属性相关区域，这些方法仍然遇到视觉模态和属性模态之间的显着语义差距，这使得它们对不可见语义的预测不可靠。为了解决这个问题，本文建立了一种新颖的变压器编码器-解码器模型，称为混合路由变压器（HRT）。在 HRT 编码器中，我们嵌入了主动注意力，它是由自下而上和自上而下的动态路由路径构建的，以生成属性对齐的视觉特征。而在HRT解码器中，我们使用静态路由来计算属性对齐的视觉特征、相应的属性语义和类属性向量之间的相关性，以生成最终的类标签预测。这种设计使所提出的变压器模型成为 1）自上而下和自下而上注意路径以及 2）动态和静态路由路径的混合体。对 CUB、SUN 和 AWA2 三个广泛使用的基准数据集进行了综合实验。获得的实验结果证明了该方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种混合路由Transformer（HRT）模型，用于解决零样本学习中视觉与语义模态间的语义鸿沟问题。
AI.motivation: 现有零样本学习方法因缺乏自上而下引导和语义对齐机制，导致视觉特征与属性语义关联不准确，预测结果不可靠。
AI.method: 设计HRT编码器-解码器框架：编码器通过自下而上与自上而下动态路由路径生成属性对齐的视觉特征；解码器采用静态路由计算视觉特征、属性语义与类别向量间的关联，生成最终预测。
AI.result: 在CUB、SUN、AWA2三个基准数据集上的实验验证了HRT方法的有效性，显著提升了零样本学习的性能。
AI.conclusion: HRT通过融合动态/静态路由与双向注意力机制，有效弥合了视觉-语义模态间的语义鸿沟，为零样本学习提供了新思路。

authors_text: Zheng Dang,Lizhou Wang,Yu Guo,Mathieu Salzmann
title: MatchNorm: Learning-based Point Cloud Registration for 6D Object Pose Estimation in the Real World
title_zh: MatchNorm：基于学习的点云配准，用于现实世界中的 6D 物体姿态估计
comment: ECCV2022 accepted. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2111.10399
comments: ECCV2022 accepted. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2111.10399
abstract: In this work, we tackle the task of estimating the 6D pose of an object from point cloud data. While recent learning-based approaches to addressing this task have shown great success on synthetic datasets, we have observed them to fail in the presence of real-world data. We thus analyze the causes of these failures, which we trace back to the difference between the feature distributions of the source and target point clouds, and the sensitivity of the widely-used SVD-based loss function to the range of rotation between the two point clouds. We address the first challenge by introducing a new normalization strategy, Match Normalization, and the second via the use of a loss function based on the negative log likelihood of point correspondences. Our two contributions are general and can be applied to many existing learning-based 3D object registration frameworks, which we illustrate by implementing them in two of them, DCP and IDAM. Our experiments on the real-scene TUD-L, LINEMOD and Occluded-LINEMOD datasets evidence the benefits of our strategies. They allow for the first time learning-based 3D object registration methods to achieve meaningful results on real-world data. We therefore expect them to be key to the future development of point cloud registration methods.
summary: In this work, we tackle the task of estimating the 6D pose of an object from point cloud data. While recent learning-based approaches to addressing this task have shown great success on synthetic datasets, we have observed them to fail in the presence of real-world data. We thus analyze the causes of these failures, which we trace back to the difference between the feature distributions of the source and target point clouds, and the sensitivity of the widely-used SVD-based loss function to the range of rotation between the two point clouds. We address the first challenge by introducing a new normalization strategy, Match Normalization, and the second via the use of a loss function based on the negative log likelihood of point correspondences. Our two contributions are general and can be applied to many existing learning-based 3D object registration frameworks, which we illustrate by implementing them in two of them, DCP and IDAM. Our experiments on the real-scene TUD-L, LINEMOD and Occluded-LINEMOD datasets evidence the benefits of our strategies. They allow for the first time learning-based 3D object registration methods to achieve meaningful results on real-world data. We therefore expect them to be key to the future development of point cloud registration methods.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们解决了根据点云数据估计物体 6D 位姿的任务。虽然最近用于解决此任务的基于学习的方法在合成数据集上取得了巨大成功，但我们观察到它们在存在现实世界数据的情况下失败了。因此，我们分析了这些故障的原因，追溯到源点云和目标点云的特征分布之间的差异，以及广泛使用的基于 SVD 的损失函数对两个点云之间旋转范围的敏感性。我们通过引入新的归一化策略“匹配归一化”来解决第一个挑战，通过使用基于点对应的负对数似然的损失函数来解决第二个挑战。我们的两个贡献是通用的，可以应用于许多现有的基于学习的 3D 对象注册框架，我们通过在其中的两个框架（DCP 和 IDAM）中实现它们来说明这些框架。我们在真实场景 TUD-L、LINEMOD 和 Occlusion-LINEMOD 数据集上的实验证明了我们策略的优势。它们首次允许基于学习的 3D 对象注册方法在现实世界数据上取得有意义的结果。因此，我们期望它们成为点云配准方法未来发展的关键。

AI.tldr: 本文提出MatchNorm方法，解决基于点云数据的6D物体位姿估计在真实世界中的失效问题。
AI.motivation: 现有基于学习的点云配准方法在合成数据集上表现良好，但在真实场景中因特征分布差异和SVD损失函数对旋转范围敏感而失效。
AI.method: 引入Match Normalization策略对齐特征分布，并采用基于点对应负对数似然的损失函数，改进DCP和IDAM等框架。
AI.result: 在TUD-L、LINEMOD和Occluded-LINEMOD真实数据集上首次实现基于学习的点云配准方法的有效性验证。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法具有通用性，可作为未来点云配准技术发展的关键技术基础。

search_text: MatchNorm: Learning-based Point Cloud Registration for 6D Object Pose Estimation in the Real World MatchNorm：基于学习的点云配准，用于现实世界中的 6D 物体姿态估计 In this work, we tackle the task of estimating the 6D pose of an object from point cloud data. While recent learning-based approaches to addressing this task have shown great success on synthetic datasets, we have observed them to fail in the presence of real-world data. We thus analyze the causes of these failures, which we trace back to the difference between the feature distributions of the source and target point clouds, and the sensitivity of the widely-used SVD-based loss function to the range of rotation between the two point clouds. We address the first challenge by introducing a new normalization strategy, Match Normalization, and the second via the use of a loss function based on the negative log likelihood of point correspondences. Our two contributions are general and can be applied to many existing learning-based 3D object registration frameworks, which we illustrate by implementing them in two of them, DCP and IDAM. Our experiments on the real-scene TUD-L, LINEMOD and Occluded-LINEMOD datasets evidence the benefits of our strategies. They allow for the first time learning-based 3D object registration methods to achieve meaningful results on real-world data. We therefore expect them to be key to the future development of point cloud registration methods. 在这项工作中，我们解决了根据点云数据估计物体 6D 位姿的任务。虽然最近用于解决此任务的基于学习的方法在合成数据集上取得了巨大成功，但我们观察到它们在存在现实世界数据的情况下失败了。因此，我们分析了这些故障的原因，追溯到源点云和目标点云的特征分布之间的差异，以及广泛使用的基于 SVD 的损失函数对两个点云之间旋转范围的敏感性。我们通过引入新的归一化策略“匹配归一化”来解决第一个挑战，通过使用基于点对应的负对数似然的损失函数来解决第二个挑战。我们的两个贡献是通用的，可以应用于许多现有的基于学习的 3D 对象注册框架，我们通过在其中的两个框架（DCP 和 IDAM）中实现它们来说明这些框架。我们在真实场景 TUD-L、LINEMOD 和 Occlusion-LINEMOD 数据集上的实验证明了我们策略的优势。它们首次允许基于学习的 3D 对象注册方法在现实世界数据上取得有意义的结果。因此，我们期望它们成为点云配准方法未来发展的关键。 本文提出MatchNorm方法，解决基于点云数据的6D物体位姿估计在真实世界中的失效问题。 Zheng Dang,Lizhou Wang,Yu Guo,Mathieu Salzmann cs.CV

authors_text: Dongkwon Jin,Wonhui Park,Seong-Gyun Jeong,Heeyeon Kwon,Chang-Su Kim
title: Eigenlanes: Data-Driven Lane Descriptors for Structurally Diverse Lanes
title_zh: Eigenlanes：结构多样化车道的数据驱动车道描述符
abstract: A novel algorithm to detect road lanes in the eigenlane space is proposed in this paper. First, we introduce the notion of eigenlanes, which are data-driven descriptors for structurally diverse lanes, including curved, as well as straight, lanes. To obtain eigenlanes, we perform the best rank-M approximation of a lane matrix containing all lanes in a training set. Second, we generate a set of lane candidates by clustering the training lanes in the eigenlane space. Third, using the lane candidates, we determine an optimal set of lanes by developing an anchor-based detection network, called SIIC-Net. Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed algorithm provides excellent detection performance for structurally diverse lanes. Our codes are available at https://github.com/dongkwonjin/Eigenlanes.
summary: A novel algorithm to detect road lanes in the eigenlane space is proposed in this paper. First, we introduce the notion of eigenlanes, which are data-driven descriptors for structurally diverse lanes, including curved, as well as straight, lanes. To obtain eigenlanes, we perform the best rank-M approximation of a lane matrix containing all lanes in a training set. Second, we generate a set of lane candidates by clustering the training lanes in the eigenlane space. Third, using the lane candidates, we determine an optimal set of lanes by developing an anchor-based detection network, called SIIC-Net. Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed algorithm provides excellent detection performance for structurally diverse lanes. Our codes are available at https://github.com/dongkwonjin/Eigenlanes.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种在本征车道空间中检测道路车道的新算法。首先，我们介绍特征车道的概念，它是结构多样化车道的数据驱动描述符，包括弯曲车道和直车道。为了获得特征车道，我们对包含训练集中所有车道的车道矩阵执行最佳的 M 级近似。其次，我们通过对特征车道空间中的训练车道进行聚类来生成一组候选车道。第三，使用候选车道，我们通过开发基于锚点的检测网络（称为 SIIC-Net）来确定最佳车道集。实验结果表明，该算法对结构多样的车道提供了优异的检测性能。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/dongkwonjin/Eigenlanes 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于数据驱动的车道描述符Eigenlanes，用于检测结构多样（包括弯曲和直线）的车道。
AI.motivation: 现有车道检测方法难以有效处理结构复杂的车道，需开发适应多样车道形态的数据驱动方法。
AI.method: 通过训练集车道矩阵的最优秩-M近似生成Eigenlanes，利用聚类生成候选车道，并设计基于锚点的SIIC-Net网络确定最优车道集。
AI.result: 实验表明该算法在结构多样的车道检测中表现优异，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: Eigenlanes框架为复杂车道检测提供了有效解决方案，验证了数据驱动方法在该领域的潜力。

authors_text: Yuhuang Hu,Shih-Chii Liu
title: Kernel Modulation: A Parameter-Efficient Method for Training Convolutional Neural Networks
title_zh: 内核调制：一种参数高效的卷积神经网络训练方法
comment: Accepted at 2022 26th International Conference on Pattern Recognition (ICPR)
comments: Accepted at 2022 26th International Conference on Pattern Recognition (ICPR)
abstract: Deep Neural Networks, particularly Convolutional Neural Networks (ConvNets), have achieved incredible success in many vision tasks, but they usually require millions of parameters for good accuracy performance. With increasing applications that use ConvNets, updating hundreds of networks for multiple tasks on an embedded device can be costly in terms of memory, bandwidth, and energy. Approaches to reduce this cost include model compression and parameter-efficient models that adapt a subset of network layers for each new task. This work proposes a novel parameter-efficient kernel modulation (KM) method that adapts all parameters of a base network instead of a subset of layers. KM uses lightweight task-specialized kernel modulators that require only an additional 1.4% of the base network parameters. With multiple tasks, only the task-specialized KM weights are communicated and stored on the end-user device. We applied this method in training ConvNets for Transfer Learning and Meta-Learning scenarios. Our results show that KM delivers up to 9% higher accuracy than other parameter-efficient methods on the Transfer Learning benchmark.
summary: Deep Neural Networks, particularly Convolutional Neural Networks (ConvNets), have achieved incredible success in many vision tasks, but they usually require millions of parameters for good accuracy performance. With increasing applications that use ConvNets, updating hundreds of networks for multiple tasks on an embedded device can be costly in terms of memory, bandwidth, and energy. Approaches to reduce this cost include model compression and parameter-efficient models that adapt a subset of network layers for each new task. This work proposes a novel parameter-efficient kernel modulation (KM) method that adapts all parameters of a base network instead of a subset of layers. KM uses lightweight task-specialized kernel modulators that require only an additional 1.4% of the base network parameters. With multiple tasks, only the task-specialized KM weights are communicated and stored on the end-user device. We applied this method in training ConvNets for Transfer Learning and Meta-Learning scenarios. Our results show that KM delivers up to 9% higher accuracy than other parameter-efficient methods on the Transfer Learning benchmark.
abstract_zh: 深度神经网络，特别是卷积神经网络（ConvNet），在许多视觉任务中取得了令人难以置信的成功，但它们通常需要数百万个参数才能获得良好的准确性性能。随着使用 ConvNet 的应用程序不断增加，在嵌入式设备上更新数百个网络以执行多项任务可能会耗费大量内存、带宽和能源。降低成本的方法包括模型压缩和参数高效模型，为每个新任务调整网络层的子集。这项工作提出了一种新颖的参数高效内核调制（KM）方法，该方法适应基础网络的所有参数而不是层的子集。 KM 使用轻量级任务专用内核调制器，仅需要额外 1.4% 的基本网络参数。对于多个任务，仅传输特定于任务的 KM 权重并将其存储在最终用户设备上。我们将此方法应用于训练用于迁移学习和元学习场景的卷积网络。我们的结果表明，在迁移学习基准上，KM 的准确度比其他参数高效方法高出 9%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为内核调制（KM）的参数高效方法，用于训练卷积神经网络（ConvNets），以减少嵌入式设备上的内存、带宽和能耗成本。
AI.motivation: 深度神经网络（尤其是ConvNets）参数众多，导致在嵌入式设备上部署多个任务时面临高昂的内存、带宽和能耗成本，现有参数高效方法仅适应部分网络层，效果有限。
AI.method: KM通过轻量级任务专用内核调制器适应整个基础网络的参数，仅增加1.4%的参数量，任务专用权重在终端设备上传输和存储，适用于迁移学习和元学习场景。
AI.result: 在迁移学习基准测试中，KM方法的准确率比其他参数高效方法高出9%。
AI.conclusion: KM是一种有效的参数高效训练方法，在保持高准确性的同时显著降低资源消耗，适用于多任务嵌入式场景。

With increasing applications that use ConvNets, updating hundreds of networks for multiple tasks on an embedded device can be costly in terms of memory, bandwidth, and energy. Approaches to reduce this cost include model compression and parameter-efficient models that adapt a subset of network layers for each new task. This work proposes a novel parameter-efficient kernel modulation (KM) method that adapts all parameters of a base network instead of a subset of layers. KM uses lightweight task-specialized kernel modulators that require only an additional 1.4% of the base network parameters. With multiple tasks, only the task-specialized KM weights are communicated and stored on the end-user device. We applied this method in training ConvNets for Transfer Learning and Meta-Learning scenarios. Our results show that KM delivers up to 9% higher accuracy than other parameter-efficient methods on the Transfer Learning benchmark. 深度神经网络，特别是卷积神经网络（ConvNet），在许多视觉任务中取得了令人难以置信的成功，但它们通常需要数百万个参数才能获得良好的准确性性能。随着使用 ConvNet 的应用程序不断增加，在嵌入式设备上更新数百个网络以执行多项任务可能会耗费大量内存、带宽和能源。降低成本的方法包括模型压缩和参数高效模型，为每个新任务调整网络层的子集。这项工作提出了一种新颖的参数高效内核调制（KM）方法，该方法适应基础网络的所有参数而不是层的子集。 KM 使用轻量级任务专用内核调制器，仅需要额外 1.4% 的基本网络参数。对于多个任务，仅传输特定于任务的 KM 权重并将其存储在最终用户设备上。我们将此方法应用于训练用于迁移学习和元学习场景的卷积网络。我们的结果表明，在迁移学习基准上，KM 的准确度比其他参数高效方法高出 9%。 本文提出了一种名为内核调制（KM）的参数高效方法，用于训练卷积神经网络（ConvNets），以减少嵌入式设备上的内存、带宽和能耗成本。 Yuhuang Hu,Shih-Chii Liu cs.CV,cs.NE,stat.ML

authors_text: Jogendra Nath Kundu,Siddharth Seth,Pradyumna YM,Varun Jampani,Anirban Chakraborty,R. Venkatesh Babu
title: Uncertainty-Aware Adaptation for Self-Supervised 3D Human Pose Estimation
title_zh: 自监督 3D 人体姿势估计的不确定性感知适应
abstract: The advances in monocular 3D human pose estimation are dominated by supervised techniques that require large-scale 2D/3D pose annotations. Such methods often behave erratically in the absence of any provision to discard unfamiliar out-of-distribution data. To this end, we cast the 3D human pose learning as an unsupervised domain adaptation problem. We introduce MRP-Net that constitutes a common deep network backbone with two output heads subscribing to two diverse configurations; a) model-free joint localization and b) model-based parametric regression. Such a design allows us to derive suitable measures to quantify prediction uncertainty at both pose and joint level granularity. While supervising only on labeled synthetic samples, the adaptation process aims to minimize the uncertainty for the unlabeled target images while maximizing the same for an extreme out-of-distribution dataset (backgrounds). Alongside synthetic-to-real 3D pose adaptation, the joint-uncertainties allow expanding the adaptation to work on in-the-wild images even in the presence of occlusion and truncation scenarios. We present a comprehensive evaluation of the proposed approach and demonstrate state-of-the-art performance on benchmark datasets.
summary: The advances in monocular 3D human pose estimation are dominated by supervised techniques that require large-scale 2D/3D pose annotations. Such methods often behave erratically in the absence of any provision to discard unfamiliar out-of-distribution data. To this end, we cast the 3D human pose learning as an unsupervised domain adaptation problem. We introduce MRP-Net that constitutes a common deep network backbone with two output heads subscribing to two diverse configurations; a) model-free joint localization and b) model-based parametric regression. Such a design allows us to derive suitable measures to quantify prediction uncertainty at both pose and joint level granularity. While supervising only on labeled synthetic samples, the adaptation process aims to minimize the uncertainty for the unlabeled target images while maximizing the same for an extreme out-of-distribution dataset (backgrounds). Alongside synthetic-to-real 3D pose adaptation, the joint-uncertainties allow expanding the adaptation to work on in-the-wild images even in the presence of occlusion and truncation scenarios. We present a comprehensive evaluation of the proposed approach and demonstrate state-of-the-art performance on benchmark datasets.
abstract_zh: 单目 3D 人体姿势估计的进步主要由需要大规模 2D/3D 姿势注释的监督技术主导。在没有任何丢弃不熟悉的分布外数据的规定的情况下，此类方法通常表现不稳定。为此，我们将 3D 人体姿势学习视为无监督的领域适应问题。我们引入了 MRP-Net，它构成了一个公共的深度网络主干，具有两个订阅两种不同配置的输出头； a）无模型联合定位和 b）基于模型的参数回归。这样的设计使我们能够得出适当的措施来量化姿态和关节级别粒度上的预测不确定性。虽然仅监督标记的合成样本，但适应过程旨在最小化未标记的目标图像的不确定性，同时最大化极端分布外数据集（背景）的不确定性。除了合成到真实的 3D 姿态适应之外，即使存在遮挡和截断场景，关节不确定性也允许扩展适应范围以处理野外图像。我们对所提出的方法进行了全面评估，并在基准数据集上展示了最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于不确定性的自监督3D人体姿态估计方法，解决单目估计中对分布外数据鲁棒性不足的问题。
AI.motivation: 传统监督方法依赖大量标注数据且难以处理未知分布数据，需通过无监督域适应提升模型在真实场景中的鲁棒性。
AI.method: 设计MRP-Net网络，包含两种输出头（无模型关节定位和基于模型参数回归），通过量化姿态与关节层级的不确定性实现域适应，利用合成数据监督并优化目标域不确定性。
AI.result: 在基准数据集上达到SOTA性能，有效处理遮挡和截断等复杂场景。
AI.conclusion: 通过不确定性感知的域适应框架，显著提升3D姿态估计在真实世界中的泛化能力。

authors_text: Ryoji Tanabe,Youhei Akimoto,Ken Kobayashi,Hiroshi Umeki,Shinichi Shirakawa,Naoki Hamada
title: A Two-phase Framework with a Bézier Simplex-based Interpolation Method for Computationally Expensive Multi-objective Optimization
title_zh: 具有基于贝塞尔单纯形插值方法的两阶段框架，用于计算昂贵的多目标优化
comment: This is an accepted version of a paper published in the proceedings of GECCO 2022
comments: This is an accepted version of a paper published in the proceedings of GECCO 2022
abstract: This paper proposes a two-phase framework with a Bézier simplex-based interpolation method (TPB) for computationally expensive multi-objective optimization. The first phase in TPB aims to approximate a few Pareto optimal solutions by optimizing a sequence of single-objective scalar problems. The first phase in TPB can fully exploit a state-of-the-art single-objective derivative-free optimizer. The second phase in TPB utilizes a Bézier simplex model to interpolate the solutions obtained in the first phase. The second phase in TPB fully exploits the fact that a Bézier simplex model can approximate the Pareto optimal solution set by exploiting its simplex structure when a given problem is simplicial. We investigate the performance of TPB on the 55 bi-objective BBOB problems. The results show that TPB performs significantly better than HMO-CMA-ES and some state-of-the-art meta-model-based optimizers.
summary: This paper proposes a two-phase framework with a Bézier simplex-based interpolation method (TPB) for computationally expensive multi-objective optimization. The first phase in TPB aims to approximate a few Pareto optimal solutions by optimizing a sequence of single-objective scalar problems. The first phase in TPB can fully exploit a state-of-the-art single-objective derivative-free optimizer. The second phase in TPB utilizes a Bézier simplex model to interpolate the solutions obtained in the first phase. The second phase in TPB fully exploits the fact that a Bézier simplex model can approximate the Pareto optimal solution set by exploiting its simplex structure when a given problem is simplicial. We investigate the performance of TPB on the 55 bi-objective BBOB problems. The results show that TPB performs significantly better than HMO-CMA-ES and some state-of-the-art meta-model-based optimizers.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种两阶段框架，采用基于贝塞尔单纯形的插值方法（TPB），用于计算成本高昂的多目标优化。 TPB 的第一阶段旨在通过优化一系列单目标标量问题来近似一些帕累托最优解。 TPB 的第一阶段可以充分利用最先进的单目标无导数优化器。 TPB 的第二阶段利用贝塞尔单纯形模型对第一阶段获得的解进行插值。 TPB 的第二阶段充分利用了这样一个事实：当给定问题是单纯的时，贝塞尔单纯形模型可以通过利用其单纯形结构来逼近 Pareto 最优解集。我们研究了 TPB 在 55 个双目标 BBOB 问题上的性能。结果表明，TPB 的性能明显优于 HMO-CMA-ES 和一些最先进的基于元模型的优化器。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于Bézier单纯形插值的两阶段框架（TPB），用于解决计算密集型多目标优化问题。
AI.motivation: 针对计算成本高的多目标优化问题，现有方法在效率和精度上存在不足，需开发更高效的优化框架。
AI.method: TPB分为两阶段：第一阶段通过单目标优化器求解帕累托前沿近似解；第二阶段利用Bézier单纯形模型插值第一阶段结果，借助单纯形结构逼近帕累托最优集。
AI.result: 在55个双目标BBOB测试问题中，TPB显著优于HMO-CMA-ES及部分先进元模型优化器。
AI.conclusion: TPB通过结合单目标优化与Bézier插值，在计算密集型多目标优化中展现出更高的效率和精度。

authors_text: Haruto Sawada,Naoki Wake,Kazuhiro Sasabuchi,Jun Takamatsu,Hirokazu Takahashi,Katsushi Ikeuchi
title: Design strategies for controlling neuron-connected robots using reinforcement learning
title_zh: 使用强化学习控制神经元连接机器人的设计策略
abstract: Despite the growing interest in robot control utilizing the computation of biological neurons, context-dependent behavior by neuron-connected robots remains a challenge. Context-dependent behavior here is defined as behavior that is not the result of a simple sensory-motor coupling, but rather based on an understanding of the task goal. This paper proposes design principles for training neuron-connected robots based on task goals to achieve context-dependent behavior. First, we employ deep reinforcement learning (RL) to enable training that accounts for goal achievements. Second, we propose a neuron simulator as a probability distribution based on recorded neural data, aiming to represent physiologically valid neural dynamics while avoiding complex modeling with high computational costs. Furthermore, we propose to update the simulators during the training to bridge the gap between the simulation and the real settings. The experiments showed that the robot gradually learned context-dependent behaviors in pole balancing and robot navigation tasks. Moreover, the learned policies were valid for neural simulators based on novel neural data, and the task performance increased by updating the simulators during training. These results suggest the effectiveness of the proposed design principle for the context-dependent behavior of neuron-connected robots.
summary: Despite the growing interest in robot control utilizing the computation of biological neurons, context-dependent behavior by neuron-connected robots remains a challenge. Context-dependent behavior here is defined as behavior that is not the result of a simple sensory-motor coupling, but rather based on an understanding of the task goal. This paper proposes design principles for training neuron-connected robots based on task goals to achieve context-dependent behavior. First, we employ deep reinforcement learning (RL) to enable training that accounts for goal achievements. Second, we propose a neuron simulator as a probability distribution based on recorded neural data, aiming to represent physiologically valid neural dynamics while avoiding complex modeling with high computational costs. Furthermore, we propose to update the simulators during the training to bridge the gap between the simulation and the real settings. The experiments showed that the robot gradually learned context-dependent behaviors in pole balancing and robot navigation tasks. Moreover, the learned policies were valid for neural simulators based on novel neural data, and the task performance increased by updating the simulators during training. These results suggest the effectiveness of the proposed design principle for the context-dependent behavior of neuron-connected robots.
abstract_zh: 尽管人们对利用生物神经元计算进行机器人控制越来越感兴趣，但神经元连接机器人的上下文相关行为仍然是一个挑战。这里的上下文相关行为被定义为不是简单的感觉-运动耦合结果的行为，而是基于对任务目标的理解的行为。本文提出了基于任务目标训练神经元连接机器人以实现上下文相关行为的设计原则。首先，我们采用深度强化学习 (RL) 来实现实现目标的培训。其次，我们提出了一种神经元模拟器作为基于记录的神经数据的概率分布，旨在表示生理上有效的神经动力学，同时避免高计算成本的复杂建模。此外，我们建议在训练期间更新模拟器，以弥合模拟和真实设置之间的差距。实验表明，机器人在杆平衡和机器人导航任务中逐渐学习了上下文相关的行为。此外，学习的策略对于基于新神经数据的神经模拟器是有效的，并且通过在训练期间更新模拟器来提高任务性能。这些结果表明所提出的设计原则对于神经元连接机器人的上下文相关行为的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于任务目标的神经元连接机器人控制设计原则，以实现上下文相关行为。
AI.motivation: 现有神经元连接机器人难以实现依赖任务目标的上下文相关行为，需解决生理有效神经动力学建模与计算成本高的矛盾。
AI.method: 采用深度强化学习训练目标导向策略，结合基于神经数据的概率分布神经元模拟器，并在训练中动态更新模拟器以弥合仿真与现实差距。
AI.result: 机器人成功习得杆平衡和导航任务的上下文相关行为，新神经数据下策略有效性得到验证，训练中模拟器更新提升了任务表现。
AI.conclusion: 所提设计原则有效实现了神经元连接机器人的目标导向上下文行为，为生物启发机器人控制提供新思路。
