search_text: Design strategies for controlling neuron-connected robots using reinforcement learning 使用强化学习控制神经元连接机器人的设计策略 Despite the growing interest in robot control utilizing the computation of biological neurons, context-dependent behavior by neuron-connected robots remains a challenge. Context-dependent behavior here is defined as behavior that is not the result of a simple sensory-motor coupling, but rather based on an understanding of the task goal. This paper proposes design principles for training neuron-connected robots based on task goals to achieve context-dependent behavior. First, we employ deep reinforcement learning (RL) to enable training that accounts for goal achievements. Second, we propose a neuron simulator as a probability distribution based on recorded neural data, aiming to represent physiologically valid neural dynamics while avoiding complex modeling with high computational costs. Furthermore, we propose to update the simulators during the training to bridge the gap between the simulation and the real settings. The experiments showed that the robot gradually learned context-dependent behaviors in pole balancing and robot navigation tasks. Moreover, the learned policies were valid for neural simulators based on novel neural data, and the task performance increased by updating the simulators during training. These results suggest the effectiveness of the proposed design principle for the context-dependent behavior of neuron-connected robots. 尽管人们对利用生物神经元计算进行机器人控制越来越感兴趣，但神经元连接机器人的上下文相关行为仍然是一个挑战。这里的上下文相关行为被定义为不是简单的感觉-运动耦合结果的行为，而是基于对任务目标的理解的行为。本文提出了基于任务目标训练神经元连接机器人以实现上下文相关行为的设计原则。首先，我们采用深度强化学习 (RL) 来实现实现目标的培训。其次，我们提出了一种神经元模拟器作为基于记录的神经数据的概率分布，旨在表示生理上有效的神经动力学，同时避免高计算成本的复杂建模。此外，我们建议在训练期间更新模拟器，以弥合模拟和真实设置之间的差距。实验表明，机器人在杆平衡和机器人导航任务中逐渐学习了上下文相关的行为。此外，学习的策略对于基于新神经数据的神经模拟器是有效的，并且通过在训练期间更新模拟器来提高任务性能。这些结果表明所提出的设计原则对于神经元连接机器人的上下文相关行为的有效性。 本文提出基于任务目标的神经元连接机器人控制设计原则，以实现上下文相关行为。 Haruto Sawada,Naoki Wake,Kazuhiro Sasabuchi,Jun Takamatsu,Hirokazu Takahashi,Katsushi Ikeuchi cs.RO

authors_text: Wenchao Gu,Yanlin Wang,Lun Du,Hongyu Zhang,Shi Han,Dongmei Zhang,Michael R. Lyu
title: Accelerating Code Search with Deep Hashing and Code Classification
title_zh: 通过深度哈希和代码分类加速代码搜索
comment: Accepted to 60th Annual Meeting of the Association for Computational Linguistics (ACL 2022)
comments: Accepted to 60th Annual Meeting of the Association for Computational Linguistics (ACL 2022)
abstract: Code search is to search reusable code snippets from source code corpus based on natural languages queries. Deep learning-based methods of code search have shown promising results. However, previous methods focus on retrieval accuracy but lacked attention to the efficiency of the retrieval process. We propose a novel method CoSHC to accelerate code search with deep hashing and code classification, aiming to perform an efficient code search without sacrificing too much accuracy. To evaluate the effectiveness of CoSHC, we apply our method to five code search models. Extensive experimental results indicate that compared with previous code search baselines, CoSHC can save more than 90% of retrieval time meanwhile preserving at least 99% of retrieval accuracy.
summary: Code search is to search reusable code snippets from source code corpus based on natural languages queries. Deep learning-based methods of code search have shown promising results. However, previous methods focus on retrieval accuracy but lacked attention to the efficiency of the retrieval process. We propose a novel method CoSHC to accelerate code search with deep hashing and code classification, aiming to perform an efficient code search without sacrificing too much accuracy. To evaluate the effectiveness of CoSHC, we apply our method to five code search models. Extensive experimental results indicate that compared with previous code search baselines, CoSHC can save more than 90% of retrieval time meanwhile preserving at least 99% of retrieval accuracy.
abstract_zh: 代码搜索是基于自然语言查询从源代码语料库中搜索可重用的代码片段。基于深度学习的代码搜索方法已经显示出有希望的结果。然而，以往的方法关注检索准确性，而缺乏对检索过程效率的关注。我们提出了一种新方法 CoSHC，通过深度哈希和代码分类来加速代码搜索，旨在在不牺牲太多准确性的情况下执行高效的代码搜索。为了评估 CoSHC 的有效性，我们将我们的方法应用于五个代码搜索模型。大量的实验结果表明，与之前的代码搜索基线相比，CoSHC 可以节省 90% 以上的检索时间，同时保留至少 99% 的检索准确性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合深度哈希和代码分类的新方法CoSHC，用于在保持高检索准确率的同时显著提升代码搜索效率。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习代码搜索方法过度关注检索准确率，忽视了检索过程的效率问题，亟需在保证精度的前提下提升搜索速度。
AI.method: 设计CoSHC框架，通过深度哈希技术生成代码嵌入表示，并结合代码分类任务优化特征学习，应用于五个主流代码搜索模型进行验证。
AI.result: 实验表明CoSHC相比基线方法节省超90%检索时间，同时保持至少99%的检索准确率。
AI.conclusion: CoSHC有效平衡了代码搜索的效率与精度，为大规模代码检索提供了可行优化方案，未来可探索更高效的哈希策略与分类融合机制。

authors_text: Dongkwon Jin,Jun-Tae Lee,Chang-Su Kim
title: Semantic Line Detection Using Mirror Attention and Comparative Ranking and Matching
title_zh: 使用镜像注意力以及比较排序和匹配的语义线检测
abstract: A novel algorithm to detect semantic lines is proposed in this paper. We develop three networks: detection network with mirror attention (D-Net) and comparative ranking and matching networks (R-Net and M-Net). D-Net extracts semantic lines by exploiting rich contextual information. To this end, we design the mirror attention module. Then, through pairwise comparisons of extracted semantic lines, we iteratively select the most semantic line and remove redundant ones overlapping with the selected one. For the pairwise comparisons, we develop R-Net and M-Net in the Siamese architecture. Experiments demonstrate that the proposed algorithm outperforms the conventional semantic line detector significantly. Moreover, we apply the proposed algorithm to detect two important kinds of semantic lines successfully: dominant parallel lines and reflection symmetry axes. Our codes are available at https://github.com/dongkwonjin/Semantic-Line-DRM.
summary: A novel algorithm to detect semantic lines is proposed in this paper. We develop three networks: detection network with mirror attention (D-Net) and comparative ranking and matching networks (R-Net and M-Net). D-Net extracts semantic lines by exploiting rich contextual information. To this end, we design the mirror attention module. Then, through pairwise comparisons of extracted semantic lines, we iteratively select the most semantic line and remove redundant ones overlapping with the selected one. For the pairwise comparisons, we develop R-Net and M-Net in the Siamese architecture. Experiments demonstrate that the proposed algorithm outperforms the conventional semantic line detector significantly. Moreover, we apply the proposed algorithm to detect two important kinds of semantic lines successfully: dominant parallel lines and reflection symmetry axes. Our codes are available at https://github.com/dongkwonjin/Semantic-Line-DRM.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种检测语义线的新算法。我们开发了三个网络：具有镜像注意力的检测网络（D-Net）以及比较排名和匹配网络（R-Net 和 M-Net）。 D-Net 通过利用丰富的上下文信息来提取语义线。为此，我们设计了镜子注意力模块。然后，通过对提取的语义线进行两两比较，我们迭代地选择最有语义的线，并删除与所选语义线重叠的冗余线。为了进行成对比较，我们在 Siamese 架构中开发了 R-Net 和 M-Net。实验表明，所提出的算法显着优于传统的语义线检测器。此外，我们应用所提出的算法成功地检测了两种重要的语义线：主导平行线和反射对称轴。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/dongkwonjin/Semantic-Line-DRM 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于镜像注意力和比较排序匹配的语义线检测新算法。
AI.motivation: 传统语义线检测方法难以有效处理复杂场景中的冗余线段和结构化特征，需提升检测精度与语义理解能力。
AI.method: 设计D-Net（含镜像注意力模块）提取语义线，结合Siamese架构的R-Net和M-Net通过迭代比较排序，筛选关键语义线并消除冗余。
AI.result: 实验表明算法显著优于传统方法，成功应用于检测主导平行线和反射对称轴两类重要语义线。
AI.conclusion: 该算法通过模块化网络设计和迭代优化策略，有效提升了语义线检测的准确性，为复杂场景分析提供新思路。

We develop three networks: detection network with mirror attention (D-Net) and comparative ranking and matching networks (R-Net and M-Net). D-Net extracts semantic lines by exploiting rich contextual information. To this end, we design the mirror attention module. Then, through pairwise comparisons of extracted semantic lines, we iteratively select the most semantic line and remove redundant ones overlapping with the selected one. For the pairwise comparisons, we develop R-Net and M-Net in the Siamese architecture. Experiments demonstrate that the proposed algorithm outperforms the conventional semantic line detector significantly. Moreover, we apply the proposed algorithm to detect two important kinds of semantic lines successfully: dominant parallel lines and reflection symmetry axes. Our codes are available at https://github.com/dongkwonjin/Semantic-Line-DRM. 本文提出了一种检测语义线的新算法。我们开发了三个网络：具有镜像注意力的检测网络（D-Net）以及比较排名和匹配网络（R-Net 和 M-Net）。 D-Net 通过利用丰富的上下文信息来提取语义线。为此，我们设计了镜子注意力模块。然后，通过对提取的语义线进行两两比较，我们迭代地选择最有语义的线，并删除与所选语义线重叠的冗余线。为了进行成对比较，我们在 Siamese 架构中开发了 R-Net 和 M-Net。实验表明，所提出的算法显着优于传统的语义线检测器。此外，我们应用所提出的算法成功地检测了两种重要的语义线：主导平行线和反射对称轴。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/dongkwonjin/Semantic-Line-DRM 获取。 本文提出一种基于镜像注意力和比较排序匹配的语义线检测新算法。 Dongkwon Jin,Jun-Tae Lee,Chang-Su Kim cs.CV

authors_text: Nicholas Mehlman,Anirudh Sreeram,Raghuveer Peri,Shrikanth Narayanan
title: Mel Frequency Spectral Domain Defenses against Adversarial Attacks on Speech Recognition Systems
title_zh: 梅尔频谱域防御语音识别系统的对抗性攻击
comment: This paper is 5 pages long and was submitted to Interspeech 2022
comments: This paper is 5 pages long and was submitted to Interspeech 2022
abstract: A variety of recent works have looked into defenses for deep neural networks against adversarial attacks particularly within the image processing domain. Speech processing applications such as automatic speech recognition (ASR) are increasingly relying on deep learning models, and so are also prone to adversarial attacks. However, many of the defenses explored for ASR simply adapt the image-domain defenses, which may not provide optimal robustness. This paper explores speech specific defenses using the mel spectral domain, and introduces a novel defense method called 'mel domain noise flooding' (MDNF). MDNF applies additive noise to the mel spectrogram of a speech utterance prior to re-synthesising the audio signal. We test the defenses against strong white-box adversarial attacks such as projected gradient descent (PGD) and Carlini-Wagner (CW) attacks, and show better robustness compared to a randomized smoothing baseline across strong threat models.
summary: A variety of recent works have looked into defenses for deep neural networks against adversarial attacks particularly within the image processing domain. Speech processing applications such as automatic speech recognition (ASR) are increasingly relying on deep learning models, and so are also prone to adversarial attacks. However, many of the defenses explored for ASR simply adapt the image-domain defenses, which may not provide optimal robustness. This paper explores speech specific defenses using the mel spectral domain, and introduces a novel defense method called 'mel domain noise flooding' (MDNF). MDNF applies additive noise to the mel spectrogram of a speech utterance prior to re-synthesising the audio signal. We test the defenses against strong white-box adversarial attacks such as projected gradient descent (PGD) and Carlini-Wagner (CW) attacks, and show better robustness compared to a randomized smoothing baseline across strong threat models.
abstract_zh: 最近的各种工作研究了深度神经网络针对对抗性攻击的防御，特别是在图像处理领域。自动语音识别 (ASR) 等语音处理应用越来越依赖深度学习模型，因此也容易受到对抗性攻击。然而，为 ASR 探索的许多防御措施只是简单地适应图像域防御，这可能无法提供最佳的鲁棒性。本文探索使用梅尔谱域的语音特定防御，并介绍了一种称为“梅尔域噪声泛洪”（MDNF）的新颖防御方法。 MDNF 在重新合成音频信号之前将加性噪声应用于语音话语的梅尔频谱图。我们测试了针对强白盒对抗性攻击（例如投影梯度下降（PGD）和 Carlini-Wagner（CW）攻击）的防御，并且与跨强威胁模型的随机平滑基线相比显示出更好的鲁棒性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于梅尔频谱域的新型防御方法（MDNF），用于增强语音识别系统对对抗攻击的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有语音识别系统的对抗防御多沿用图像领域的防御方法，但可能无法提供最佳鲁棒性，需探索语音特定的防御机制。
AI.method: 通过在梅尔频谱图中添加噪声（MDNF），在音频信号重新合成前扰动频谱域特征以抵御对抗攻击。
AI.result: 在强白盒攻击（如PGD、CW）下，MDNF相比随机平滑基线方法展现出更优的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 基于梅尔频谱域的噪声注入方法能有效提升语音识别系统对抗对抗攻击的防御能力。

authors_text: Seong-Hu Kim,Hyeonuk Nam,Yong-Hwa Park
title: Decomposed Temporal Dynamic CNN: Efficient Time-Adaptive Network for Text-Independent Speaker Verification Explained with Speaker Activation Map
title_zh: 分解的时间动态 CNN：用说话人激活图解释的用于文本独立说话人验证的高效时间自适应网络
abstract: To extract accurate speaker information for text-independent speaker verification, temporal dynamic CNNs (TDY-CNNs) adapting kernels to each time bin was proposed. However, model size of TDY-CNN is too large and the adaptive kernel's degree of freedom is limited. To address these limitations, we propose decomposed temporal dynamic CNNs (DTDY-CNNs) which forms time-adaptive kernel by combining static kernel with dynamic residual based on matrix decomposition. Proposed DTDY-ResNet-34(x0.50) using attentive statistical pooling without data augmentation shows EER of 0.96%, which is better than other state-of-the-art methods. DTDY-CNNs are successful upgrade of TDY-CNNs, reducing the model size by 64% and enhancing the performance. We showed that DTDY-CNNs extract more accurate frame-level speaker embeddings as well compared to TDY-CNNs. Detailed behaviors of DTDY-ResNet-34(x0.50) on extraction of speaker information were analyzed using speaker activation map (SAM) produced by modified gradient-weighted class activation mapping (Grad-CAM) for speaker verification. DTDY-ResNet-34(x0.50) effectively extracts speaker information from not only formant frequencies but also high frequency information of unvoiced phonemes, thus explaining its outstanding performance on text-independent speaker verification.
summary: To extract accurate speaker information for text-independent speaker verification, temporal dynamic CNNs (TDY-CNNs) adapting kernels to each time bin was proposed. However, model size of TDY-CNN is too large and the adaptive kernel's degree of freedom is limited. To address these limitations, we propose decomposed temporal dynamic CNNs (DTDY-CNNs) which forms time-adaptive kernel by combining static kernel with dynamic residual based on matrix decomposition. Proposed DTDY-ResNet-34(x0.50) using attentive statistical pooling without data augmentation shows EER of 0.96%, which is better than other state-of-the-art methods. DTDY-CNNs are successful upgrade of TDY-CNNs, reducing the model size by 64% and enhancing the performance. We showed that DTDY-CNNs extract more accurate frame-level speaker embeddings as well compared to TDY-CNNs. Detailed behaviors of DTDY-ResNet-34(x0.50) on extraction of speaker information were analyzed using speaker activation map (SAM) produced by modified gradient-weighted class activation mapping (Grad-CAM) for speaker verification. DTDY-ResNet-34(x0.50) effectively extracts speaker information from not only formant frequencies but also high frequency information of unvoiced phonemes, thus explaining its outstanding performance on text-independent speaker verification.
abstract_zh: 为了提取准确的说话人信息以进行与文本无关的说话人验证，提出了使内核适应每个时间段的时间动态 CNN（TDY-CNN）。然而TDY-CNN的模型规模太大，自适应核的自由度有限。为了解决这些限制，我们提出了分解时间动态 CNN（DTDY-CNN），它通过将静态内核与基于矩阵分解的动态残差相结合来形成时间自适应内核。所提出的 DTDY-ResNet-34(x0.50) 使用细心的统计池化而无需数据增强，显示 EER 为 0.96%，这比其他最先进的方法更好。 DTDY-CNN 是 TDY-CNN 的成功升级，模型大小减少了 64%，性能得到提升。我们证明，与 TDY-CNN 相比，DTDY-CNN 还可以提取更准确的帧级说话人嵌入。使用由改进的梯度加权类激活映射 (Grad-CAM) 生成的说话人激活图 (SAM) 来分析 DTDY-ResNet-34(x0.50) 在提取说话人信息方面的详细行为，以进行说话人验证。 DTDY-ResNet-34(x0.50)不仅可以从共振峰频率中有效地提取说话人信息，还可以从清音音素的高频信息中提取说话人信息，从而解释了其在与文本无关的说话人验证方面的出色性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种分解时序动态卷积神经网络（DTDY-CNN），用于改进文本无关说话人验证任务，通过结合静态核与动态残差实现更高效的时序自适应建模。
AI.motivation: 现有时序动态CNN（TDY-CNN）模型存在参数量过大且自适应核自由度受限的问题，难以兼顾效率与性能。
AI.method: 基于矩阵分解技术，将静态核与动态残差结合形成时序自适应核，构建DTDY-ResNet-34(x0.50)模型，并采用注意力统计池化策略，通过改进的Grad-CAM生成说话人激活图（SAM）分析模型行为。
AI.result: 在无需数据增强的情况下，DTDY-ResNet-34(x0.50)达到0.96%的EER，优于现有方法；模型体积缩减64%，且提取的帧级说话人嵌入更准确。
AI.conclusion: DTDY-CNN通过分解设计有效解决了TDY-CNN的局限性，SAM分析表明其能同时捕捉共振峰频率与无声音素高频信息，验证了模型在文本无关说话人验证中的优越性。

authors_text: Kei Furukawa,Takeshi Kishiyama,Satoshi Nakamura
title: Applying Syntax$\unicode{x2013}$Prosody Mapping Hypothesis and Prosodic Well-Formedness Constraints to Neural Sequence-to-Sequence Speech Synthesis
title_zh: 将语法$\unicode{x2013}$韵律映射假设和韵律格式良好约束应用于神经序列到序列语音合成
abstract: End-to-end text-to-speech synthesis (TTS), which generates speech sounds directly from strings of texts or phonemes, has improved the quality of speech synthesis over the conventional TTS. However, most previous studies have been evaluated based on subjective naturalness and have not objectively examined whether they can reproduce pitch patterns of phonological phenomena such as downstep, rhythmic boost, and initial lowering that reflect syntactic structures in Japanese. These phenomena can be linguistically explained by phonological constraints and the syntax$\unicode{x2013}$prosody mapping hypothesis (SPMH), which assumes projections from syntactic structures to phonological hierarchy. Although some experiments in psycholinguistics have verified the validity of the SPMH, it is crucial to investigate whether it can be implemented in TTS. To synthesize linguistic phenomena involving syntactic or phonological constraints, we propose a model using phonological symbols based on the SPMH and prosodic well-formedness constraints. Experimental results showed that the proposed method synthesized similar pitch patterns to those reported in linguistics experiments for the phenomena of initial lowering and rhythmic boost. The proposed model efficiently synthesizes phonological phenomena in the test data that were not explicitly included in the training data.
summary: End-to-end text-to-speech synthesis (TTS), which generates speech sounds directly from strings of texts or phonemes, has improved the quality of speech synthesis over the conventional TTS. However, most previous studies have been evaluated based on subjective naturalness and have not objectively examined whether they can reproduce pitch patterns of phonological phenomena such as downstep, rhythmic boost, and initial lowering that reflect syntactic structures in Japanese. These phenomena can be linguistically explained by phonological constraints and the syntax$\unicode{x2013}$prosody mapping hypothesis (SPMH), which assumes projections from syntactic structures to phonological hierarchy. Although some experiments in psycholinguistics have verified the validity of the SPMH, it is crucial to investigate whether it can be implemented in TTS. To synthesize linguistic phenomena involving syntactic or phonological constraints, we propose a model using phonological symbols based on the SPMH and prosodic well-formedness constraints. Experimental results showed that the proposed method synthesized similar pitch patterns to those reported in linguistics experiments for the phenomena of initial lowering and rhythmic boost. The proposed model efficiently synthesizes phonological phenomena in the test data that were not explicitly included in the training data.
abstract_zh: 端到端文本到语音合成 (TTS) 直接从文本字符串或音素生成语音，与传统 TTS 相比，提高了语音合成的质量。然而，之前的大多数研究都是基于主观自然度进行评估，并没有客观地检验它们是否可以再现反映日语句法结构的音系现象的音高模式，例如降音、节奏提升和初始降音。这些现象可以通过音系约束和语法$\unicode{x2013}$韵律映射假设（SPMH）来解释，该假设假设从句法结构到音系层次的投影。尽管心理语言学方面的一些实验已经验证了SPMH的有效性，但研究它是否可以在TTS中实现是至关重要的。为了综合涉及句法或语音约束的语言现象，我们提出了一种使用基于 SPMH 和韵律格式良好约束的语音符号的模型。实验结果表明，该方法合成了与语言学实验中报告的初始降低和节奏提升现象相似的音高模式。所提出的模型有效地综合了测试数据中未明确包含在训练数据中的语音现象。

AI.tldr: 本文将语法则-韵律映射假设（SPMH）和韵律合理性约束应用于神经序列到序列语音合成，以更准确地生成反映句法结构的韵律模式。
AI.motivation: 现有端到端文本到语音合成（TTS）系统缺乏对句法结构影响韵律现象（如日语的初始降调、节奏增强）的客观验证，需探索语言学理论在TTS中的可实现性。
AI.method: 提出基于SPMH和韵律合理性约束的模型，利用音系符号建模句法-韵律映射关系，无需显式训练数据即可生成目标韵律模式。
AI.result: 实验表明，该模型能合成与语言学实验中报告的初始降调和节奏增强现象相似的基频模式，且可泛化到未在训练数据中出现的测试案例。
AI.conclusion: 将SPMH与韵律约束整合到TTS框架中，验证了语言学理论在语音合成中的有效性，为生成符合句法结构的韵律提供了新方法。

authors_text: Guangwei Yu,Gang Li,Xingtong Si,Zhuoyuan Song
title: A Multi-size Kernel based Adaptive Convolutional Neural Network for Bearing Fault Diagnosis
title_zh: 基于多尺寸核的自适应卷积神经网络轴承故障诊断
abstract: Bearing fault identification and analysis is an important research area in the field of machinery fault diagnosis. Aiming at the common faults of rolling bearings, we propose a data-driven diagnostic algorithm based on the characteristics of bearing vibrations called multi-size kernel based adaptive convolutional neural network (MSKACNN). Using raw bearing vibration signals as the inputs, MSKACNN provides vibration feature learning and signal classification capabilities to identify and analyze bearing faults. Ball mixing is a ball bearing production quality problem that is difficult to identify using traditional frequency domain analysis methods since it requires high frequency resolutions of the measurement signals and results in a long analyzing time. The proposed MSKACNN is shown to improve the efficiency and accuracy of ball mixing diagnosis. To further demonstrate the effectiveness of MSKACNN in bearing fault identification, a bearing vibration data acquisition system was developed, and vibration signal acquisition was performed on rolling bearings under five different fault conditions including ball mixing. The resulting datasets were used to analyze the performance of our proposed model. To validate the adaptive ability of MSKACNN, fault test data from the Case Western Reserve University Bearing Data Center were also used. Test results show that MSKACNN can identify the different bearing conditions with high accuracy with high generalization ability. We presented an implementation of the MSKACNN as a lightweight module for a real-time bearing fault diagnosis system that is suitable for production.
summary: Bearing fault identification and analysis is an important research area in the field of machinery fault diagnosis. Aiming at the common faults of rolling bearings, we propose a data-driven diagnostic algorithm based on the characteristics of bearing vibrations called multi-size kernel based adaptive convolutional neural network (MSKACNN). Using raw bearing vibration signals as the inputs, MSKACNN provides vibration feature learning and signal classification capabilities to identify and analyze bearing faults. Ball mixing is a ball bearing production quality problem that is difficult to identify using traditional frequency domain analysis methods since it requires high frequency resolutions of the measurement signals and results in a long analyzing time. The proposed MSKACNN is shown to improve the efficiency and accuracy of ball mixing diagnosis. To further demonstrate the effectiveness of MSKACNN in bearing fault identification, a bearing vibration data acquisition system was developed, and vibration signal acquisition was performed on rolling bearings under five different fault conditions including ball mixing. The resulting datasets were used to analyze the performance of our proposed model. To validate the adaptive ability of MSKACNN, fault test data from the Case Western Reserve University Bearing Data Center were also used. Test results show that MSKACNN can identify the different bearing conditions with high accuracy with high generalization ability. We presented an implementation of the MSKACNN as a lightweight module for a real-time bearing fault diagnosis system that is suitable for production.
abstract_zh: 轴承故障识别与分析是机械故障诊断领域的一个重要研究领域。针对滚动轴承的常见故障，我们提出了一种基于轴承振动特征的数据驱动的诊断算法，称为基于多尺寸核的自适应卷积神经网络（MSKACNN）。 MSKACNN 使用原始轴承振动信号作为输入，提供振动特征学习和信号分类功能，以识别和分析轴承故障。混球是滚珠轴承的生产质量问题，使用传统的频域分析方法很难识别，因为它需要测量信号的高频分辨率，导致分析时间较长。所提出的 MSKACNN 被证明可以提高球混合诊断的效率和准确性。为了进一步证明MSKACNN在轴承故障识别方面的有效性，开发了轴承振动数据采集系统，对滚动轴承在混球等5种不同故障条件下进行了振动信号采集。所得数据集用于分析我们提出的模型的性能。为了验证 MSKACNN 的自适应能力，还使用了来自凯斯西储大学轴承数据中心的故障测试数据。测试结果表明，MSKACNN能够高精度地识别不同的轴承工况，具有较高的泛化能力。我们提出了 MSKACNN 的实现，作为适合生产的实时轴承故障诊断系统的轻量级模块。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于多尺寸核的自适应卷积神经网络（MSKACNN），用于提高滚动轴承故障诊断的效率和准确性。
AI.motivation: 传统频域分析方法在检测轴承球混合故障时存在高频分辨率需求高和分析时间长的缺陷，亟需更高效的数据驱动诊断方法。
AI.method: 设计多尺寸核自适应卷积神经网络（MSKACNN），利用原始振动信号进行特征学习与分类，并构建振动数据采集系统验证模型性能。
AI.result: 实验表明MSKACNN在球混合故障诊断中准确率高且泛化能力强，且能作为轻量模块应用于实时诊断系统。
AI.conclusion: MSKACNN有效解决了传统方法的局限性，为生产环境中的轴承故障实时诊断提供了可行方案。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于多尺寸核的自适应卷积神经网络（MSKACNN），用于提高滚动轴承故障诊断的效率和准确性。

authors_text: Matej Zečević,Florian Peter Busch,Devendra Singh Dhami,Kristian Kersting
title: Finding Structure and Causality in Linear Programs
title_zh: 寻找线性规划中的结构和因果关系
comment: Main paper: 5 pages, References: 2 pages, Appendix: 1 page. Figures: 8 main, 1 appendix. Tables: 1 appendix
comments: Main paper: 5 pages, References: 2 pages, Appendix: 1 page. Figures: 8 main, 1 appendix. Tables: 1 appendix
abstract: Linear Programs (LP) are celebrated widely, particularly so in machine learning where they have allowed for effectively solving probabilistic inference tasks or imposing structure on end-to-end learning systems. Their potential might seem depleted but we propose a foundational, causal perspective that reveals intriguing intra- and inter-structure relations for LP components. We conduct a systematic, empirical investigation on general-, shortest path- and energy system LPs.
summary: Linear Programs (LP) are celebrated widely, particularly so in machine learning where they have allowed for effectively solving probabilistic inference tasks or imposing structure on end-to-end learning systems. Their potential might seem depleted but we propose a foundational, causal perspective that reveals intriguing intra- and inter-structure relations for LP components. We conduct a systematic, empirical investigation on general-, shortest path- and energy system LPs.
abstract_zh: 线性程序（LP）广受赞誉，特别是在机器学习领域，它们可以有效解决概率推理任务或在端到端学习系统上强加结构。它们的潜力似乎已经耗尽，但我们提出了一个基本的因果视角，揭示了 LP 组件有趣的结构内和结构间关系。我们对一般、最短路径和能源系统 LP 进行了系统的实证研究。

AI.tldr: 从因果角度揭示线性规划（LP）组件的内部及相互结构关系
AI.motivation: 尽管线性规划在机器学习中应用广泛，但其潜在结构和因果关系尚未被充分挖掘，需通过新视角揭示其内在联系
AI.method: 通过系统性实证研究，分析一般性、最短路径及能源系统中的线性规划问题，探索其结构与因果关联
AI.result: 揭示了不同线性规划问题中的结构特征及因果关系，验证了因果视角的有效性

search_text: Finding Structure and Causality in Linear Programs 寻找线性规划中的结构和因果关系 Linear Programs (LP) are celebrated widely, particularly so in machine learning where they have allowed for effectively solving probabilistic inference tasks or imposing structure on end-to-end learning systems. Their potential might seem depleted but we propose a foundational, causal perspective that reveals intriguing intra- and inter-structure relations for LP components. We conduct a systematic, empirical investigation on general-, shortest path- and energy system LPs. 线性程序（LP）广受赞誉，特别是在机器学习领域，它们可以有效解决概率推理任务或在端到端学习系统上强加结构。它们的潜力似乎已经耗尽，但我们提出了一个基本的因果视角，揭示了 LP 组件有趣的结构内和结构间关系。我们对一般、最短路径和能源系统 LP 进行了系统的实证研究。 从因果角度揭示线性规划（LP）组件的内部及相互结构关系 Matej Zečević,Florian Peter Busch,Devendra Singh Dhami,Kristian Kersting cs.AI

authors_text: Pranay Mathur,Rajesh Kumar,Sarthak Upadhyay
title: Sparse Image based Navigation Architecture to Mitigate the need of precise Localization in Mobile Robots
title_zh: 基于稀疏图像的导航架构可减轻移动机器人精确定位的需求
abstract: Traditional simultaneous localization and mapping (SLAM) methods focus on improvement in the robot's localization under environment and sensor uncertainty. This paper, however, focuses on mitigating the need for exact localization of a mobile robot to pursue autonomous navigation using a sparse set of images. The proposed method consists of a model architecture - RoomNet, for unsupervised learning resulting in a coarse identification of the environment and a separate local navigation policy for local identification and navigation. The former learns and predicts the scene based on the short term image sequences seen by the robot along with the transition image scenarios using long term image sequences. The latter uses sparse image matching to characterise the similarity of frames achieved vis-a-vis the frames viewed by the robot during the mapping and training stage. A sparse graph of the image sequence is created which is then used to carry out robust navigation purely on the basis of visual goals. The proposed approach is evaluated on two robots in a test environment and demonstrates the ability to navigate in dynamic environments where landmarks are obscured and classical localization methods fail.
summary: Traditional simultaneous localization and mapping (SLAM) methods focus on improvement in the robot's localization under environment and sensor uncertainty. This paper, however, focuses on mitigating the need for exact localization of a mobile robot to pursue autonomous navigation using a sparse set of images. The proposed method consists of a model architecture - RoomNet, for unsupervised learning resulting in a coarse identification of the environment and a separate local navigation policy for local identification and navigation. The former learns and predicts the scene based on the short term image sequences seen by the robot along with the transition image scenarios using long term image sequences. The latter uses sparse image matching to characterise the similarity of frames achieved vis-a-vis the frames viewed by the robot during the mapping and training stage. A sparse graph of the image sequence is created which is then used to carry out robust navigation purely on the basis of visual goals. The proposed approach is evaluated on two robots in a test environment and demonstrates the ability to navigate in dynamic environments where landmarks are obscured and classical localization methods fail.
abstract_zh: 传统的同步定位与建图（SLAM）方法侧重于在环境和传感器不确定性下改进机器人的定位。然而，本文的重点是减轻移动机器人精确定位的需求，以使用稀疏图像集进行自主导航。所提出的方法由模型架构 - RoomNet 组成，用于无监督学习，从而对环境进行粗略识别，以及用于本地识别和导航的单独本地导航策略。前者根据机器人看到的短期图像序列以及使用长期图像序列的过渡图像场景来学习和预测场景。后者使用稀疏图像匹配来表征在映射和训练阶段获得的帧与机器人查看的帧的相似性。创建图像序列的稀疏图，然后将其用于纯粹基于视觉目标进行鲁棒导航。所提出的方法在测试环境中的两个机器人上进行了评估，并展示了在地标被遮挡且经典定位方法失败的动态环境中导航的能力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于稀疏图像的导航架构，通过减少移动机器人对精确定位的依赖来实现自主导航。
AI.motivation: 传统SLAM方法在动态环境和传感器不确定性下定位精度不足，而精确定位在复杂场景中存在技术挑战，需探索无需高精度定位的导航方案。
AI.method: 提出RoomNet模型进行无监督学习，结合短期和长期图像序列预测场景；通过稀疏图像匹配构建图像序列稀疏图，实现基于视觉目标的鲁棒导航。
AI.result: 在两个机器人测试环境中验证了方法有效性，尤其在动态环境及地标被遮挡时，传统定位方法失效情况下仍能实现稳定导航。
AI.conclusion: 该架构通过视觉信息替代精确定位，为动态复杂环境下的机器人导航提供了新思路，具有实际应用潜力。

authors_text: Wenbo Li,Zhe Lin,Kun Zhou,Lu Qi,Yi Wang,Jiaya Jia
title: MAT: Mask-Aware Transformer for Large Hole Image Inpainting
title_zh: MAT：用于大孔图像修复的掩模感知变压器
comment: Accepted in the CVPR2022 Best Paper Finalists, Oral
comments: Accepted in the CVPR2022 Best Paper Finalists, Oral
abstract: Recent studies have shown the importance of modeling long-range interactions in the inpainting problem. To achieve this goal, existing approaches exploit either standalone attention techniques or transformers, but usually under a low resolution in consideration of computational cost. In this paper, we present a novel transformer-based model for large hole inpainting, which unifies the merits of transformers and convolutions to efficiently process high-resolution images. We carefully design each component of our framework to guarantee the high fidelity and diversity of recovered images. Specifically, we customize an inpainting-oriented transformer block, where the attention module aggregates non-local information only from partial valid tokens, indicated by a dynamic mask. Extensive experiments demonstrate the state-of-the-art performance of the new model on multiple benchmark datasets. Code is released at https://github.com/fenglinglwb/MAT.
summary: Recent studies have shown the importance of modeling long-range interactions in the inpainting problem. To achieve this goal, existing approaches exploit either standalone attention techniques or transformers, but usually under a low resolution in consideration of computational cost. In this paper, we present a novel transformer-based model for large hole inpainting, which unifies the merits of transformers and convolutions to efficiently process high-resolution images. We carefully design each component of our framework to guarantee the high fidelity and diversity of recovered images. Specifically, we customize an inpainting-oriented transformer block, where the attention module aggregates non-local information only from partial valid tokens, indicated by a dynamic mask. Extensive experiments demonstrate the state-of-the-art performance of the new model on multiple benchmark datasets. Code is released at https://github.com/fenglinglwb/MAT.
abstract_zh: 最近的研究表明了在修复问题中对远程交互进行建模的重要性。为了实现这一目标，现有方法利用独立注意力技术或变压器，但考虑到计算成本，通常采用低分辨率。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于变压器的新型大孔修复模型，它结合了变压器和卷积的优点，可以有效地处理高分辨率图像。我们精心设计框架的每个组件，以保证恢复图像的高保真度和多样性。具体来说，我们定制了一个面向修复的变压器块，其中注意模块仅从动态掩码指示的部分有效标记中聚合非局部信息。大量的实验证明了新模型在多个基准数据集上的最先进的性能。代码发布于https://github.com/fenglinglwb/MAT。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于Transformer的图像修复模型MAT，专门用于处理大孔洞图像的修复问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在计算成本限制下通常处理低分辨率图像，无法有效处理大孔洞修复，因此需要一种高效处理高分辨率图像的模型。
AI.method: 设计了一种面向修复的Transformer块，利用动态掩码仅从有效token中聚合非局部信息，并结合Transformer与卷积的优势。
AI.result: 在多个基准数据集上取得了最先进的修复效果。
AI.conclusion: MAT模型通过结合Transformer与卷积的优势，有效提升了大孔洞图像修复的质量和多样性。

authors_text: Arshi Parvaiz,Muhammad Anwaar Khalid,Rukhsana Zafar,Huma Ameer,Muhammad Ali,Muhammad Moazam Fraz
title: Vision Transformers in Medical Computer Vision -- A Contemplative Retrospection
title_zh: 医学计算机视觉中的视觉转换器——沉思性回顾
abstract: Recent escalation in the field of computer vision underpins a huddle of algorithms with the magnificent potential to unravel the information contained within images. These computer vision algorithms are being practised in medical image analysis and are transfiguring the perception and interpretation of Imaging data. Among these algorithms, Vision Transformers are evolved as one of the most contemporary and dominant architectures that are being used in the field of computer vision. These are immensely utilized by a plenty of researchers to perform new as well as former experiments. Here, in this article we investigate the intersection of Vision Transformers and Medical images and proffered an overview of various ViTs based frameworks that are being used by different researchers in order to decipher the obstacles in Medical Computer Vision. We surveyed the application of Vision transformers in different areas of medical computer vision such as image-based disease classification, anatomical structure segmentation, registration, region-based lesion Detection, captioning, report generation, reconstruction using multiple medical imaging modalities that greatly assist in medical diagnosis and hence treatment process. Along with this, we also demystify several imaging modalities used in Medical Computer Vision. Moreover, to get more insight and deeper understanding, self-attention mechanism of transformers is also explained briefly. Conclusively, we also put some light on available data sets, adopted methodology, their performance measures, challenges and their solutions in form of discussion. We hope that this review article will open future directions for researchers in medical computer vision.

Conclusively, we also put some light on available data sets, adopted methodology, their performance measures, challenges and their solutions in form of discussion. We hope that this review article will open future directions for researchers in medical computer vision.
abstract_zh: 计算机视觉领域最近的升级支撑了一系列算法，这些算法具有揭示图像中包含的信息的巨大潜力。这些计算机视觉算法正在医学图像分析中得到实践，并正在改变成像数据的感知和解释。在这些算法中，Vision Transformers 已发展成为计算机视觉领域使用的最现代、最占主导地位的架构之一。许多研究人员广泛利用它们来进行新的和以前的实验。在本文中，我们研究了视觉变换器和医学图像的交叉点，并概述了不同研究人员正在使用的各种基于 ViT 的框架，以破译医学计算机视觉中的障碍。我们调查了视觉转换器在医学计算机视觉不同领域的应用，例如基于图像的疾病分类、解剖结构分割、配准、基于区域的病变检测、字幕、报告生成、使用多种医学成像模式进行重建，这些模式极大地有助于医疗诊断和治疗过程。除此之外，我们还揭开了医学计算机视觉中使用的几种成像模式的神秘面纱。此外，为了获得更深入的了解和更深入的理解，还简要解释了 Transformer 的自注意力机制。最后，我们还以讨论的形式介绍了可用的数据集、采用的方法、其绩效衡量标准、挑战及其解决方案。我们希望这篇综述文章能为医学计算机视觉研究人员开辟未来的方向。

AI.tldr: 本文回顾了视觉Transformer（ViT）在医学计算机视觉中的应用，总结了其在医学图像分析中的框架、方法及面临的挑战。
AI.motivation: 随着ViT在计算机视觉领域的兴起，其在医学影像分析中的潜力亟需系统梳理，以推动医疗诊断技术的进一步发展。
AI.method: 通过文献综述方法，分析ViT在医学图像分类、分割、病变检测等任务中的应用，解释自注意力机制，并讨论数据集、性能指标及现有挑战。
AI.result: 总结了ViT在医学领域的多种应用框架，揭示了当前数据集、方法性能及主要挑战（如数据稀缺性、模型可解释性），并提出可能的解决方案。
AI.conclusion: ViT为医学计算机视觉提供了新思路，但需解决数据、模型优化等问题，未来研究应聚焦于提升模型泛化能力与临床实用性。

search_text: Vision Transformers in Medical Computer Vision -- A Contemplative Retrospection 医学计算机视觉中的视觉转换器——沉思性回顾 Recent escalation in the field of computer vision underpins a huddle of algorithms with the magnificent potential to unravel the information contained within images. These computer vision algorithms are being practised in medical image analysis and are transfiguring the perception and interpretation of Imaging data. Among these algorithms, Vision Transformers are evolved as one of the most contemporary and dominant architectures that are being used in the field of computer vision. These are immensely utilized by a plenty of researchers to perform new as well as former experiments. Here, in this article we investigate the intersection of Vision Transformers and Medical images and proffered an overview of various ViTs based frameworks that are being used by different researchers in order to decipher the obstacles in Medical Computer Vision. We surveyed the application of Vision transformers in different areas of medical computer vision such as image-based disease classification, anatomical structure segmentation, registration, region-based lesion Detection, captioning, report generation, reconstruction using multiple medical imaging modalities that greatly assist in medical diagnosis and hence treatment process. Along with this, we also demystify several imaging modalities used in Medical Computer Vision. Moreover, to get more insight and deeper understanding, self-attention mechanism of transformers is also explained briefly. Conclusively, we also put some light on available data sets, adopted methodology, their performance measures, challenges and their solutions in form of discussion. We hope that this review article will open future directions for researchers in medical computer vision. 计算机视觉领域最近的升级支撑了一系列算法，这些算法具有揭示图像中包含的信息的巨大潜力。这些计算机视觉算法正在医学图像分析中得到实践，并正在改变成像数据的感知和解释。在这些算法中，Vision Transformers 已发展成为计算机视觉领域使用的最现代、最占主导地位的架构之一。许多研究人员广泛利用它们来进行新的和以前的实验。在本文中，我们研究了视觉变换器和医学图像的交叉点，并概述了不同研究人员正在使用的各种基于 ViT 的框架，以破译医学计算机视觉中的障碍。我们调查了视觉转换器在医学计算机视觉不同领域的应用，例如基于图像的疾病分类、解剖结构分割、配准、基于区域的病变检测、字幕、报告生成、使用多种医学成像模式进行重建，这些模式极大地有助于医疗诊断和治疗过程。除此之外，我们还揭开了医学计算机视觉中使用的几种成像模式的神秘面纱。此外，为了获得更深入的了解和更深入的理解，还简要解释了 Transformer 的自注意力机制。最后，我们还以讨论的形式介绍了可用的数据集、采用的方法、其绩效衡量标准、挑战及其解决方案。我们希望这篇综述文章能为医学计算机视觉研究人员开辟未来的方向。 本文回顾了视觉Transformer（ViT）在医学计算机视觉中的应用，总结了其在医学图像分析中的框架、方法及面临的挑战。 Arshi Parvaiz,Muhammad Anwaar Khalid,Rukhsana Zafar,Huma Ameer,Muhammad Ali,Muhammad Moazam Fraz eess.IV,cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Chunggi Lee,Seonwook Park,Heon Song,Jeongun Ryu,Sanghoon Kim,Haejoon Kim,Sérgio Pereira,Donggeun Yoo
title: Interactive Multi-Class Tiny-Object Detection
title_zh: 交互式多类微小物体检测
abstract: Annotating tens or hundreds of tiny objects in a given image is laborious yet crucial for a multitude of Computer Vision tasks. Such imagery typically contains objects from various categories, yet the multi-class interactive annotation setting for the detection task has thus far been unexplored. To address these needs, we propose a novel interactive annotation method for multiple instances of tiny objects from multiple classes, based on a few point-based user inputs. Our approach, C3Det, relates the full image context with annotator inputs in a local and global manner via late-fusion and feature-correlation, respectively. We perform experiments on the Tiny-DOTA and LCell datasets using both two-stage and one-stage object detection architectures to verify the efficacy of our approach. Our approach outperforms existing approaches in interactive annotation, achieving higher mAP with fewer clicks. Furthermore, we validate the annotation efficiency of our approach in a user study where it is shown to be 2.85x faster and yield only 0.36x task load (NASA-TLX, lower is better) compared to manual annotation. The code is available at https://github.com/ChungYi347/Interactive-Multi-Class-Tiny-Object-Detection.
summary: Annotating tens or hundreds of tiny objects in a given image is laborious yet crucial for a multitude of Computer Vision tasks. Such imagery typically contains objects from various categories, yet the multi-class interactive annotation setting for the detection task has thus far been unexplored. To address these needs, we propose a novel interactive annotation method for multiple instances of tiny objects from multiple classes, based on a few point-based user inputs. Our approach, C3Det, relates the full image context with annotator inputs in a local and global manner via late-fusion and feature-correlation, respectively. We perform experiments on the Tiny-DOTA and LCell datasets using both two-stage and one-stage object detection architectures to verify the efficacy of our approach. Our approach outperforms existing approaches in interactive annotation, achieving higher mAP with fewer clicks. Furthermore, we validate the annotation efficiency of our approach in a user study where it is shown to be 2.85x faster and yield only 0.36x task load (NASA-TLX, lower is better) compared to manual annotation. The code is available at https://github.com/ChungYi347/Interactive-Multi-Class-Tiny-Object-Detection.
abstract_zh: 在给定图像中注释数十或数百个微小物体虽然很费力，但对于众多计算机视觉任务来说却至关重要。此类图像通常包含来自不同类别的对象，但迄今为止尚未探索用于检测任务的多类交互式注释设置。为了满足这些需求，我们基于一些基于点的用户输入，提出了一种新颖的交互式注释方法，用于多个类的微小对象的多个实例。我们的方法 C3Det 分别通过后期融合和特征相关，以局部和全局方式将完整图像上下文与注释器输入相关联。我们使用两阶段和一阶段目标检测架构在 Tiny-DOTA 和 LCell 数据集上进行实验，以验证我们方法的有效性。我们的方法优于交互式注释中的现有方法，以更少的点击次数实现更高的 mAP。此外，我们在用户研究中验证了我们方法的注释效率，与手动注释相比，该方法的注释效率提高了 2.85 倍，而任务负载仅为 0.36 倍（NASA-TLX，越低越好）。该代码可在 https://github.com/ChungYi347/Interactive-Multi-Class-Tiny-Object-Detection 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种交互式多类别微小目标检测方法C3Det，通过少量点输入实现高效标注。
AI.motivation: 微小目标标注耗时且现有方法未探索多类别交互式标注，需提升标注效率与精度。
AI.method: 通过晚融合与特征关联结合局部和全局上下文，基于点输入实现多类别微小目标检测。
AI.result: 在Tiny-DOTA和LCell数据集上mAP更高且点击次数更少，用户研究显示效率为人工标注的2.85倍。
AI.conclusion: C3Det在交互式标注任务中显著优于现有方法，兼具高效性与低任务负荷。

authors_text: Annie Marsden,Vatsal Sharan,Aaron Sidford,Gregory Valiant
title: Efficient Convex Optimization Requires Superlinear Memory
title_zh: 高效的凸优化需要超线性内存
abstract: We show that any memory-constrained, first-order algorithm which minimizes $d$-dimensional, $1$-Lipschitz convex functions over the unit ball to $1/\mathrm{poly}(d)$ accuracy using at most $d^{1.25 - δ}$ bits of memory must make at least $\tildeΩ(d^{1 + (4/3)δ})$ first-order queries (for any constant $δ\in [0, 1/4]$). Consequently, the performance of such memory-constrained algorithms are a polynomial factor worse than the optimal $\tilde{O}(d)$ query bound for this problem obtained by cutting plane methods that use $\tilde{O}(d^2)$ memory. This resolves a COLT 2019 open problem of Woodworth and Srebro.
summary: We show that any memory-constrained, first-order algorithm which minimizes $d$-dimensional, $1$-Lipschitz convex functions over the unit ball to $1/\mathrm{poly}(d)$ accuracy using at most $d^{1.25 - δ}$ bits of memory must make at least $\tildeΩ(d^{1 + (4/3)δ})$ first-order queries (for any constant $δ\in [0, 1/4]$). Consequently, the performance of such memory-constrained algorithms are a polynomial factor worse than the optimal $\tilde{O}(d)$ query bound for this problem obtained by cutting plane methods that use $\tilde{O}(d^2)$ memory. This resolves a COLT 2019 open problem of Woodworth and Srebro.
abstract_zh: 我们证明，任何内存受限的一阶算法，只要使用最多 $d^{1.25 - δ}$ 位内存，将单位球上的 $d$ 维、$1$-Lipschitz 凸函数最小化到 $1/\mathrm{poly}(d)$ 精度，就必须至少进行 $\tildeΩ(d^{1 + (4/3)δ})$ 一阶查询（对于任何常数 $δ\in [0, 1/4]$）。因此，此类内存受限算法的性能比通过使用 $\tilde{O}(d^2)$ 内存的切割平面方法获得的该问题的最佳 $\tilde{O}(d)$ 查询范围差一个多项式因子。这解决了 Woodworth 和 Srebro 的 COLT 2019 开放问题。

AI.tldr: 本文证明了在记忆受限的情况下，高效凸优化需要超线性内存，且第一阶算法的查询次数必须达到多项式因子的下限。
AI.motivation: 研究内存约束下凸优化算法的效率与内存需求之间的权衡关系，解决COLT 2019年提出的开放性问题。
AI.method: 通过分析第一阶算法在记忆限制下的查询次数下界，结合凸函数的性质与单位球域的约束条件进行理论推导。
AI.result: 证明了任何使用至多$d^{1.25 - δ}$位内存的算法，其查询次数必须达到$\tildeΩ(d^{1 + (4/3)δ})$，优于传统切割平面法的$\tilde{O}(d^2)$内存复杂度。
AI.conclusion: 内存约束显著影响凸优化算法效率，揭示了第一阶算法在内存受限场景下的性能瓶颈，解决了相关开放性问题。

motivation: 研究内存约束下凸优化算法的效率与内存需求之间的权衡关系，解决COLT 2019年提出的开放性问题。
method: 通过分析第一阶算法在记忆限制下的查询次数下界，结合凸函数的性质与单位球域的约束条件进行理论推导。
result: 证明了任何使用至多$d^{1.25 - δ}$位内存的算法，其查询次数必须达到$\tildeΩ(d^{1 + (4/3)δ})$，优于传统切割平面法的$\tilde{O}(d^2)$内存复杂度。
conclusion: 内存约束显著影响凸优化算法效率，揭示了第一阶算法在内存受限场景下的性能瓶颈，解决了相关开放性问题。
search_text: Efficient Convex Optimization Requires Superlinear Memory 高效的凸优化需要超线性内存 We show that any memory-constrained, first-order algorithm which minimizes $d$-dimensional, $1$-Lipschitz convex functions over the unit ball to $1/\mathrm{poly}(d)$ accuracy using at most $d^{1.25 - δ}$ bits of memory must make at least $\tildeΩ(d^{1 + (4/3)δ})$ first-order queries (for any constant $δ\in [0, 1/4]$). Consequently, the performance of such memory-constrained algorithms are a polynomial factor worse than the optimal $\tilde{O}(d)$ query bound for this problem obtained by cutting plane methods that use $\tilde{O}(d^2)$ memory. This resolves a COLT 2019 open problem of Woodworth and Srebro. 我们证明，任何内存受限的一阶算法，只要使用最多 $d^{1.25 - δ}$ 位内存，将单位球上的 $d$ 维、$1$-Lipschitz 凸函数最小化到 $1/\mathrm{poly}(d)$ 精度，就必须至少进行 $\tildeΩ(d^{1 + (4/3)δ})$ 一阶查询（对于任何常数 $δ\in [0, 1/4]$）。因此，此类内存受限算法的性能比通过使用 $\tilde{O}(d^2)$ 内存的切割平面方法获得的该问题的最佳 $\tilde{O}(d)$ 查询范围差一个多项式因子。这解决了 Woodworth 和 Srebro 的 COLT 2019 开放问题。 本文证明了在记忆受限的情况下，高效凸优化需要超线性内存，且第一阶算法的查询次数必须达到多项式因子的下限。 Annie Marsden,Vatsal Sharan,Aaron Sidford,Gregory Valiant cs.LG,cs.CC,cs.DS,math.OC,stat.ML

authors_text: Wonhui Park,Dongkwon Jin,Chang-Su Kim
title: Eigencontours: Novel Contour Descriptors Based on Low-Rank Approximation
title_zh: 特征轮廓：基于低阶近似的新颖轮廓描述符
abstract: Novel contour descriptors, called eigencontours, based on low-rank approximation are proposed in this paper. First, we construct a contour matrix containing all object boundaries in a training set. Second, we decompose the contour matrix into eigencontours via the best rank-M approximation. Third, we represent an object boundary by a linear combination of the M eigencontours. We also incorporate the eigencontours into an instance segmentation framework. Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed eigencontours can represent object boundaries more effectively and more efficiently than existing descriptors in a low-dimensional space. Furthermore, the proposed algorithm yields meaningful performances on instance segmentation datasets.
summary: Novel contour descriptors, called eigencontours, based on low-rank approximation are proposed in this paper. First, we construct a contour matrix containing all object boundaries in a training set. Second, we decompose the contour matrix into eigencontours via the best rank-M approximation. Third, we represent an object boundary by a linear combination of the M eigencontours. We also incorporate the eigencontours into an instance segmentation framework. Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed eigencontours can represent object boundaries more effectively and more efficiently than existing descriptors in a low-dimensional space. Furthermore, the proposed algorithm yields meaningful performances on instance segmentation datasets.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了基于低秩近似的新型轮廓描述符，称为特征轮廓。首先，我们构建一个包含训练集中所有对象边界的轮廓矩阵。其次，我们通过最佳的 M 阶近似将轮廓矩阵分解为特征轮廓。第三，我们通过 M 特征轮廓的线性组合来表示对象边界。我们还将特征轮廓合并到实例分割框架中。实验结果表明，所提出的特征轮廓可以比低维空间中现有的描述符更有效、更高效地表示对象边界。此外，所提出的算法在实例分割数据集上产生了有意义的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于低秩近似的新型轮廓描述符——eigencontours，并将其应用于实例分割任务。
AI.motivation: 现有轮廓描述符在低维空间中可能无法有效捕捉物体边界特征，需更高效且具表现力的描述方法。
AI.method: 通过构建包含所有训练集物体边界的轮廓矩阵，利用最佳秩-M近似分解得到eigencontours，并用其线性组合表示目标边界，同时集成到实例分割框架中。
AI.result: 实验表明，eigencontours在低维空间中更高效地表示物体边界，且在实例分割任务中表现优异。
AI.conclusion: eigencontours有效提升了轮廓表示的效率与性能，验证了其在实例分割中的应用潜力。

authors_text: Xiaohe Ma,Yaxin Yu,Hongzhi Wu,Kun Zhou
title: Efficient Reflectance Capture with a Deep Gated Mixture-of-Experts
title_zh: 利用深度门控专家组合进行高效反射捕获
abstract: We present a novel framework to efficiently acquire near-planar anisotropic reflectance in a pixel-independent fashion, using a deep gated mixtureof-experts. While existing work employs a unified network to handle all possible input, our network automatically learns to condition on the input for enhanced reconstruction. We train a gating module to select one out of a number of specialized decoders for reflectance reconstruction, based on photometric measurements, essentially trading generality for quality. A common, pre-trained latent transform module is also appended to each decoder, to offset the burden of the increased number of decoders. In addition, the illumination conditions during acquisition can be jointly optimized. The effectiveness of our framework is validated on a wide variety of challenging samples using a near-field lightstage. Compared with the state-of-the-art technique, our results are improved at the same input bandwidth, and our bandwidth can be reduced to about 1/3 for equal-quality results.
summary: We present a novel framework to efficiently acquire near-planar anisotropic reflectance in a pixel-independent fashion, using a deep gated mixtureof-experts. While existing work employs a unified network to handle all possible input, our network automatically learns to condition on the input for enhanced reconstruction. We train a gating module to select one out of a number of specialized decoders for reflectance reconstruction, based on photometric measurements, essentially trading generality for quality. A common, pre-trained latent transform module is also appended to each decoder, to offset the burden of the increased number of decoders. In addition, the illumination conditions during acquisition can be jointly optimized. The effectiveness of our framework is validated on a wide variety of challenging samples using a near-field lightstage. Compared with the state-of-the-art technique, our results are improved at the same input bandwidth, and our bandwidth can be reduced to about 1/3 for equal-quality results.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种新颖的框架，使用深度门控专家混合，以与像素无关的方式有效地获取近平面各向异性反射率。虽然现有的工作采用统一的网络来处理所有可能的输入，但我们的网络会自动学习以输入为条件以增强重建。我们训练一个选通模块，根据光度测量从众多专用解码器中选择一个进行反射率重建，本质上是用通用性换取质量。每个解码器还附加了一个通用的、预先训练的潜在变换模块，以抵消增加的解码器数量的负担。此外，还可以共同优化采集期间的照明条件。使用近场光台在各种具有挑战性的样本上验证了我们框架的有效性。与最先进的技术相比，我们的结果在相同的输入带宽下得到了改进，并且我们的带宽可以减少到大约 1/3 以获得同等质量的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度门控混合专家模型的高效近平面各向异性反射率获取框架。
AI.motivation: 现有方法使用统一网络处理所有输入导致通用性与重建质量难以兼顾，需在效率与质量间寻求平衡。
AI.method: 设计门控模块动态选择专用解码器进行反射率重建，结合预训练潜在转换模块并联合优化光照条件。
AI.result: 在相同输入带宽下重建效果优于现有技术，带宽可缩减至1/3仍保持同等质量。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过条件化网络结构与模块化设计，在反射率捕获任务中实现了效率与质量的显著提升。

authors_text: Shankhanil Ghosh,Chhanda Saha,Naagamani Molakathaala
title: NeuraGen-A Low-Resource Neural Network based approach for Gender Classification
title_zh: NeuraGen-基于低资源神经网络的性别分类方法
abstract: Human voice is the source of several important information. This is in the form of features. These Features help in interpreting various features associated with the speaker and speech. The speaker dependent work researchersare targeted towards speaker identification, Speaker verification, speaker biometric, forensics using feature, and cross-modal matching via speech and face images. In such context research, it is a very difficult task to come across clean, and well annotated publicly available speech corpus as data set. Acquiring volunteers to generate such dataset is also very expensive, not to mention the enormous amount of effort and time researchers spend to gather such data. The present paper work, a Neural Network proposal as NeuraGen focused which is a low-resource ANN architecture. The proposed tool used to classify gender of the speaker from the speech recordings. We have used speech recordings collected from the ELSDSR and limited TIMIT datasets, from which we extracted 8 speech features, which were pre-processed and then fed into NeuraGen to identify the gender. NeuraGen has successfully achieved accuracy of 90.7407% and F1 score of 91.227% in train and 20-fold cross validation dataset.
summary: Human voice is the source of several important information. This is in the form of features. These Features help in interpreting various features associated with the speaker and speech. The speaker dependent work researchersare targeted towards speaker identification, Speaker verification, speaker biometric, forensics using feature, and cross-modal matching via speech and face images. In such context research, it is a very difficult task to come across clean, and well annotated publicly available speech corpus as data set. Acquiring volunteers to generate such dataset is also very expensive, not to mention the enormous amount of effort and time researchers spend to gather such data. The present paper work, a Neural Network proposal as NeuraGen focused which is a low-resource ANN architecture. The proposed tool used to classify gender of the speaker from the speech recordings. We have used speech recordings collected from the ELSDSR and limited TIMIT datasets, from which we extracted 8 speech features, which were pre-processed and then fed into NeuraGen to identify the gender. NeuraGen has successfully achieved accuracy of 90.7407% and F1 score of 91.227% in train and 20-fold cross validation dataset.
abstract_zh: 人的声音是一些重要信息的来源。这是特征的形式。这些特征有助于解释与说话者和语音相关的各种特征。说话人相关工作研究人员的目标是说话人识别、说话人验证、说话人生物识别、使用特征的取证以及通过语音和面部图像进行跨模式匹配。在这样的背景研究中，找到干净的、注释良好的公开语音语料库作为数据集是一项非常困难的任务。招募志愿者来生成此类数据集也非常昂贵，更不用说研究人员花费大量精力和时间来收集此类数据。目前的论文工作是 NeuraGen 重点关注的神经网络提案，它是一种低资源 ANN 架构。所提出的工具用于从语音录音中对说话者的性别进行分类。我们使用从 ELSDSR 和有限的 TIMIT 数据集中收集的语音录音，从中提取 8 个语音特征，对这些特征进行预处理，然后输入 NeuraGen 来识别性别。 NeuraGen 在训练和 20 倍交叉验证数据集中成功实现了 90.7407% 的准确率和 91.227% 的 F1 分数。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于低资源神经网络的性别分类方法NeuraGen，利用语音特征进行说话人性别识别。
AI.motivation: 现有研究面临高质量语音数据集获取困难且成本高昂的问题，亟需一种低资源消耗的性别分类解决方案。
AI.method: 采用ELSDSR和TIMIT数据集提取8个语音特征，经预处理后输入低资源ANN架构NeuraGen进行性别分类，并通过20折交叉验证评估性能。
AI.result: 在训练集和20折交叉验证中达到90.7407%的准确率和91.227%的F1分数。
AI.conclusion: NeuraGen在有限数据条件下实现了高精度性别分类，为资源受限场景下的语音性别识别提供了有效方法。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种基于低资源神经网络的性别分类方法NeuraGen，利用语音特征进行说话人性别识别。
ai_content.motivation: 现有研究面临高质量语音数据集获取困难且成本高昂的问题，亟需一种低资源消耗的性别分类解决方案。
ai_content.method: 采用ELSDSR和TIMIT数据集提取8个语音特征，经预处理后输入低资源ANN架构NeuraGen进行性别分类，并通过20折交叉验证评估性能。

ai_content.conclusion: NeuraGen在有限数据条件下实现了高精度性别分类，为资源受限场景下的语音性别识别提供了有效方法。

search_text: NeuraGen-A Low-Resource Neural Network based approach for Gender Classification NeuraGen-基于低资源神经网络的性别分类方法 Human voice is the source of several important information. This is in the form of features. These Features help in interpreting various features associated with the speaker and speech. The speaker dependent work researchersare targeted towards speaker identification, Speaker verification, speaker biometric, forensics using feature, and cross-modal matching via speech and face images. In such context research, it is a very difficult task to come across clean, and well annotated publicly available speech corpus as data set. Acquiring volunteers to generate such dataset is also very expensive, not to mention the enormous amount of effort and time researchers spend to gather such data. The present paper work, a Neural Network proposal as NeuraGen focused which is a low-resource ANN architecture. The proposed tool used to classify gender of the speaker from the speech recordings. We have used speech recordings collected from the ELSDSR and limited TIMIT datasets, from which we extracted 8 speech features, which were pre-processed and then fed into NeuraGen to identify the gender. NeuraGen has successfully achieved accuracy of 90.7407% and F1 score of 91.227% in train and 20-fold cross validation dataset. 人的声音是一些重要信息的来源。这是特征的形式。这些特征有助于解释与说话者和语音相关的各种特征。说话人相关工作研究人员的目标是说话人识别、说话人验证、说话人生物识别、使用特征的取证以及通过语音和面部图像进行跨模式匹配。在这样的背景研究中，找到干净的、注释良好的公开语音语料库作为数据集是一项非常困难的任务。招募志愿者来生成此类数据集也非常昂贵，更不用说研究人员花费大量精力和时间来收集此类数据。目前的论文工作是 NeuraGen 重点关注的神经网络提案，它是一种低资源 ANN 架构。所提出的工具用于从语音录音中对说话者的性别进行分类。我们使用从 ELSDSR 和有限的 TIMIT 数据集中收集的语音录音，从中提取 8 个语音特征，对这些特征进行预处理，然后输入 NeuraGen 来识别性别。 NeuraGen 在训练和 20 倍交叉验证数据集中成功实现了 90.7407% 的准确率和 91.227% 的 F1 分数。 本文提出一种基于低资源神经网络的性别分类方法NeuraGen，利用语音特征进行说话人性别识别。 Shankhanil Ghosh,Chhanda Saha,Naagamani Molakathaala cs.SD,cs.LG,eess.AS

authors_text: Soroush Mahjoubi,Fan Ye,Yi Bao,Weina Meng,Xian Zhang
title: Identification and classification of exfoliated graphene flakes from microscopy images using a hierarchical deep convolutional neural network
title_zh: 使用分层深度卷积神经网络对显微镜图像中剥离的石墨烯薄片进行识别和分类
abstract: Identification of the mechanically exfoliated graphene flakes and classification of the thickness is important in the nanomanufacturing of next-generation materials and devices that overcome the bottleneck of Moore's Law. Currently, identification and classification of exfoliated graphene flakes are conducted by human via inspecting the optical microscope images. The existing state-of-the-art automatic identification by machine learning is not able to accommodate images with different backgrounds while different backgrounds are unavoidable in experiments. This paper presents a deep learning method to automatically identify and classify the thickness of exfoliated graphene flakes on Si/SiO2 substrates from optical microscope images with various settings and background colors. The presented method uses a hierarchical deep convolutional neural network that is capable of learning new images while preserving the knowledge from previous images. The deep learning model was trained and used to classify exfoliated graphene flakes into monolayer (1L), bi-layer (2L), tri-layer (3L), four-to-six-layer (4-6L), seven-to-ten-layer (7-10L), and bulk categories. Compared with existing machine learning methods, the presented method possesses high accuracy and efficiency as well as robustness to the backgrounds and resolutions of images. The results indicated that our deep learning model has accuracy as high as 99% in identifying and classifying exfoliated graphene flakes. This research will shed light on scaled-up manufacturing and characterization of graphene for advanced materials and devices.

The presented method uses a hierarchical deep convolutional neural network that is capable of learning new images while preserving the knowledge from previous images. The deep learning model was trained and used to classify exfoliated graphene flakes into monolayer (1L), bi-layer (2L), tri-layer (3L), four-to-six-layer (4-6L), seven-to-ten-layer (7-10L), and bulk categories. Compared with existing machine learning methods, the presented method possesses high accuracy and efficiency as well as robustness to the backgrounds and resolutions of images. The results indicated that our deep learning model has accuracy as high as 99% in identifying and classifying exfoliated graphene flakes. This research will shed light on scaled-up manufacturing and characterization of graphene for advanced materials and devices.
abstract_zh: 机械剥离石墨烯薄片的识别和厚度分类对于克服摩尔定律瓶颈的下一代材料和器件的纳米制造非常重要。目前，剥离石墨烯薄片的识别和分类是由人类通过检查光学显微镜图像来进行的。现有最先进的机器学习自动识别无法适应不同背景的图像，而不同背景在实验中是不可避免的。本文提出了一种深度学习方法，可根据各种设置和背景颜色的光学显微镜图像自动识别和分类 Si/SiO2 基板上剥离石墨烯薄片的厚度。所提出的方法使用分层深度卷积神经网络，该网络能够学习新图像，同时保留先前图像的知识。深度学习模型经过训练，用于将剥离石墨烯薄片分类为单层（1L）、双层（2L）、三层（3L）、四到六层（4-6L）、七到十层（7-10L）和散装类别。与现有的机器学习方法相比，该方法具有较高的准确率和效率，并对图像的背景和分辨率具有鲁棒性。结果表明，我们的深度学习模型在识别和分类剥离石墨烯薄片方面的准确率高达 99%。这项研究将为先进材料和设备的石墨烯的放大制造和表征提供线索。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于分层深度卷积神经网络的方法，用于从光学显微镜图像中自动识别和分类机械剥离的石墨烯片的厚度。
AI.motivation: 当前石墨烯片的识别和分类依赖人工操作，且现有机器学习方法无法处理不同背景的图像，限制了其在实验中的应用。
AI.method: 采用分层深度卷积神经网络，通过保留先前图像知识并学习新图像，实现对石墨烯片厚度的分类，包括单层至块体共六类。
AI.result: 该模型在不同背景和分辨率的图像中均表现出高准确率（高达99%），验证了其高效性和鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为石墨烯的大规模制造和表征提供了技术支持，推动下一代先进材料与器件的发展。

authors_text: Yueming Jin,Yang Yu,Cheng Chen,Zixu Zhao,Pheng-Ann Heng,Danail Stoyanov
title: Exploring Intra- and Inter-Video Relation for Surgical Semantic Scene Segmentation
title_zh: 探索手术语义场景分割的视频内和视频间关系
abstract: Automatic surgical scene segmentation is fundamental for facilitating cognitive intelligence in the modern operating theatre. Previous works rely on conventional aggregation modules (e.g., dilated convolution, convolutional LSTM), which only make use of the local context. In this paper, we propose a novel framework STswinCL that explores the complementary intra- and inter-video relations to boost segmentation performance, by progressively capturing the global context. We firstly develop a hierarchy Transformer to capture intra-video relation that includes richer spatial and temporal cues from neighbor pixels and previous frames. A joint space-time window shift scheme is proposed to efficiently aggregate these two cues into each pixel embedding. Then, we explore inter-video relation via pixel-to-pixel contrastive learning, which well structures the global embedding space. A multi-source contrast training objective is developed to group the pixel embeddings across videos with the ground-truth guidance, which is crucial for learning the global property of the whole data. We extensively validate our approach on two public surgical video benchmarks, including EndoVis18 Challenge and CaDIS dataset. Experimental results demonstrate the promising performance of our method, which consistently exceeds previous state-of-the-art approaches. Code is available at https://github.com/YuemingJin/STswinCL.
summary: Automatic surgical scene segmentation is fundamental for facilitating cognitive intelligence in the modern operating theatre. Previous works rely on conventional aggregation modules (e.g., dilated convolution, convolutional LSTM), which only make use of the local context. In this paper, we propose a novel framework STswinCL that explores the complementary intra- and inter-video relations to boost segmentation performance, by progressively capturing the global context. We firstly develop a hierarchy Transformer to capture intra-video relation that includes richer spatial and temporal cues from neighbor pixels and previous frames. A joint space-time window shift scheme is proposed to efficiently aggregate these two cues into each pixel embedding. Then, we explore inter-video relation via pixel-to-pixel contrastive learning, which well structures the global embedding space. A multi-source contrast training objective is developed to group the pixel embeddings across videos with the ground-truth guidance, which is crucial for learning the global property of the whole data. We extensively validate our approach on two public surgical video benchmarks, including EndoVis18 Challenge and CaDIS dataset. Experimental results demonstrate the promising performance of our method, which consistently exceeds previous state-of-the-art approaches. Code is available at https://github.com/YuemingJin/STswinCL.
abstract_zh: 自动手术场景分割是促进现代手术室认知智能的基础。以前的工作依赖于传统的聚合模块（例如扩张卷积、卷积 LSTM），这些模块仅利用局部上下文。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的框架 STswinCL，该框架探索视频内和视频间的互补关系，通过逐步捕获全局上下文来提高分割性能。我们首先开发了一个层次结构 Transformer 来捕获视频内关系，其中包括来自相邻像素和先前帧的更丰富的空间和时间线索。提出了联合时空窗口移位方案，以有效地将这两个线索聚合到每个像素嵌入中。然后，我们通过像素到像素对比学习探索视频间关系，这很好地构建了全局嵌入空间。开发了多源对比训练目标，以在地面实况指导下对视频中的像素嵌入进行分组，这对于学习整个数据的全局属性至关重要。我们在两个公共手术视频基准上广泛验证了我们的方法，包括 EndoVis18 Challenge 和 CaDIS 数据集。实验结果证明了我们的方法的良好性能，它始终超过了以前最先进的方法。代码可在 https://github.com/YuemingJin/STswinCL 获取。

AI.tldr: 提出STswinCL框架，通过捕捉手术视频的视频内和跨视频关系，提升语义分割性能。
AI.motivation: 传统方法依赖局部上下文，难以有效捕捉全局信息，影响分割效果。
AI.method: 设计层次Transformer和空间-时间窗口位移机制，结合像素级对比学习，同时捕捉视频内时空关系和跨视频全局特征。
AI.result: 在EndoVis18和CaDIS数据集上表现优于现有SOTA方法。
AI.conclusion: STswinCL通过有效整合全局上下文，显著提升了手术视频语义分割效果。

We firstly develop a hierarchy Transformer to capture intra-video relation that includes richer spatial and temporal cues from neighbor pixels and previous frames. A joint space-time window shift scheme is proposed to efficiently aggregate these two cues into each pixel embedding. Then, we explore inter-video relation via pixel-to-pixel contrastive learning, which well structures the global embedding space. A multi-source contrast training objective is developed to group the pixel embeddings across videos with the ground-truth guidance, which is crucial for learning the global property of the whole data. We extensively validate our approach on two public surgical video benchmarks, including EndoVis18 Challenge and CaDIS dataset. Experimental results demonstrate the promising performance of our method, which consistently exceeds previous state-of-the-art approaches. Code is available at https://github.com/YuemingJin/STswinCL. 自动手术场景分割是促进现代手术室认知智能的基础。以前的工作依赖于传统的聚合模块（例如扩张卷积、卷积 LSTM），这些模块仅利用局部上下文。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的框架 STswinCL，该框架探索视频内和视频间的互补关系，通过逐步捕获全局上下文来提高分割性能。我们首先开发了一个层次结构 Transformer 来捕获视频内关系，其中包括来自相邻像素和先前帧的更丰富的空间和时间线索。提出了联合时空窗口移位方案，以有效地将这两个线索聚合到每个像素嵌入中。然后，我们通过像素到像素对比学习探索视频间关系，这很好地构建了全局嵌入空间。开发了多源对比训练目标，以在地面实况指导下对视频中的像素嵌入进行分组，这对于学习整个数据的全局属性至关重要。我们在两个公共手术视频基准上广泛验证了我们的方法，包括 EndoVis18 Challenge 和 CaDIS 数据集。实验结果证明了我们的方法的良好性能，它始终超过了以前最先进的方法。代码可在 https://github.com/YuemingJin/STswinCL 获取。 提出STswinCL框架，通过捕捉手术视频的视频内和跨视频关系，提升语义分割性能。 Yueming Jin,Yang Yu,Cheng Chen,Zixu Zhao,Pheng-Ann Heng,Danail Stoyanov cs.CV

authors_text: Ayush Tripathi
title: Analysis of EEG frequency bands for Envisioned Speech Recognition
title_zh: 设想语音识别的脑电图频段分析
abstract: The use of Automatic speech recognition (ASR) interfaces have become increasingly popular in daily life for use in interaction and control of electronic devices. The interfaces currently being used are not feasible for a variety of users such as those suffering from a speech disorder, locked-in syndrome, paralysis or people with utmost privacy requirements. In such cases, an interface that can identify envisioned speech using electroencephalogram (EEG) signals can be of great benefit. Various works targeting this problem have been done in the past. However, there has been limited work in identifying the frequency bands ($δ, θ, α, β, γ$) of the EEG signal that contribute towards envisioned speech recognition. Therefore, in this work, we aim to analyze the significance of different EEG frequency bands and signals obtained from different lobes of the brain and their contribution towards recognizing envisioned speech. Signals obtained from different lobes and bandpass filtered for different frequency bands are fed to a spatio-temporal deep learning architecture with Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) and Long Short-Term Memory (LSTM). The performance is evaluated on a publicly available dataset comprising of three classification tasks - digit, character and images. We obtain a classification accuracy of $85.93\%$, $87.27\%$ and $87.51\%$ for the three tasks respectively. The code for the implementation has been made available at https://github.com/ayushayt/ImaginedSpeechRecognition.
summary: The use of Automatic speech recognition (ASR) interfaces have become increasingly popular in daily life for use in interaction and control of electronic devices. The interfaces currently being used are not feasible for a variety of users such as those suffering from a speech disorder, locked-in syndrome, paralysis or people with utmost privacy requirements. In such cases, an interface that can identify envisioned speech using electroencephalogram (EEG) signals can be of great benefit. Various works targeting this problem have been done in the past. However, there has been limited work in identifying the frequency bands ($δ, θ, α, β, γ$) of the EEG signal that contribute towards envisioned speech recognition. Therefore, in this work, we aim to analyze the significance of different EEG frequency bands and signals obtained from different lobes of the brain and their contribution towards recognizing envisioned speech. Signals obtained from different lobes and bandpass filtered for different frequency bands are fed to a spatio-temporal deep learning architecture with Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) and Long Short-Term Memory (LSTM). The performance is evaluated on a publicly available dataset comprising of three classification tasks - digit, character and images. We obtain a classification accuracy of $85.93\%$, $87.27\%$ and $87.51\%$ for the three tasks respectively. The code for the implementation has been made available at https://github.com/ayushayt/ImaginedSpeechRecognition.
abstract_zh: 自动语音识别（ASR）接口在日常生活中用于电子设备的交互和控制已经变得越来越流行。目前使用的界面对于各种用户来说并不可行，例如患有语言障碍、闭锁综合症、瘫痪的用户或对隐私有最高要求的用户。在这种情况下，能够使用脑电图 (EEG) 信号识别设想的语音的界面可能会大有裨益。过去已经针对这个问题进行了各种工作。然而，在识别有助于设想的语音识别的脑电图信号频带（$δ、θ、α、β、γ$）方面的工作有限。因此，在这项工作中，我们的目标是分析不同脑电图频段和从不同脑叶获得的信号的重要性及其对识别预想语音的贡献。从不同波瓣获得的信号以及针对不同频段进行带通滤波的信号被馈送到具有卷积神经网络 (CNN) 和长短期记忆 (LSTM) 的时空深度学习架构。性能是在一个公开的数据集上进行评估的，该数据集包含三个分类任务——数字、字符和图像。这三个任务的分类准确度分别为 $85.93\%$、$87.27\%$ 和 $87.51\%$。实现代码已在 https://github.com/ayushayt/ImaginedSpeechRecognition 上提供。

AI.tldr: 本文分析不同脑电波频段对意象语音识别的贡献，提出基于深度学习的识别方法。
AI.motivation: 现有语音识别接口无法满足言语障碍患者、闭锁综合征患者及隐私需求者的使用需求，需探索基于脑电信号的意象语音识别方案。
AI.method: 采用时空深度学习架构（CNN+LSTM），对不同脑区的EEG信号进行带通滤波处理，分析δ、θ、α、β、γ频段对意象语音识别的贡献。
AI.result: 在公开数据集上实现数字、字符和图像三类任务的分类准确率分别为85.93%、87.27%和87.51%。
AI.conclusion: 提出的深度学习方法有效识别意象语音，明确了不同脑区和频段对识别任务的关键作用。

authors_text: Yang Zhang,Zhiqiang Lv,Haibin Wu,Shanshan Zhang,Pengfei Hu,Zhiyong Wu,Hung-yi Lee,Helen Meng
title: MFA-Conformer: Multi-scale Feature Aggregation Conformer for Automatic Speaker Verification
title_zh: MFA-Conformer：用于自动说话人验证的多尺度特征聚合Conformer
abstract: In this paper, we present Multi-scale Feature Aggregation Conformer (MFA-Conformer), an easy-to-implement, simple but effective backbone for automatic speaker verification based on the Convolution-augmented Transformer (Conformer). The architecture of the MFA-Conformer is inspired by recent stateof-the-art models in speech recognition and speaker verification. Firstly, we introduce a convolution subsampling layer to decrease the computational cost of the model. Secondly, we adopt Conformer blocks which combine Transformers and convolution neural networks (CNNs) to capture global and local features effectively. Finally, the output feature maps from all Conformer blocks are concatenated to aggregate multi-scale representations before final pooling. We evaluate the MFA-Conformer on the widely used benchmarks. The best system obtains 0.64%, 1.29% and 1.63% EER on VoxCeleb1-O, SITW.Dev, and SITW.Eval set, respectively. MFA-Conformer significantly outperforms the popular ECAPA-TDNN systems in both recognition performance and inference speed. Last but not the least, the ablation studies clearly demonstrate that the combination of global and local feature learning can lead to robust and accurate speaker embedding extraction. We have also released the code for future comparison.
summary: In this paper, we present Multi-scale Feature Aggregation Conformer (MFA-Conformer), an easy-to-implement, simple but effective backbone for automatic speaker verification based on the Convolution-augmented Transformer (Conformer). The architecture of the MFA-Conformer is inspired by recent stateof-the-art models in speech recognition and speaker verification. Firstly, we introduce a convolution subsampling layer to decrease the computational cost of the model. Secondly, we adopt Conformer blocks which combine Transformers and convolution neural networks (CNNs) to capture global and local features effectively. Finally, the output feature maps from all Conformer blocks are concatenated to aggregate multi-scale representations before final pooling. We evaluate the MFA-Conformer on the widely used benchmarks. The best system obtains 0.64%, 1.29% and 1.63% EER on VoxCeleb1-O, SITW.Dev, and SITW.Eval set, respectively. MFA-Conformer significantly outperforms the popular ECAPA-TDNN systems in both recognition performance and inference speed. Last but not the least, the ablation studies clearly demonstrate that the combination of global and local feature learning can lead to robust and accurate speaker embedding extraction. We have also released the code for future comparison.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了多尺度特征聚合Conformer（MFA-Conformer），这是一种易于实现、简单但有效的基于卷积增强变压器（Conformer）的自动说话人验证骨干。 MFA-Conformer 的架构受到语音识别和说话人验证领域最新模型的启发。首先，我们引入卷积子采样层来降低模型的计算成本。其次，我们采用结合 Transformer 和卷积神经网络（CNN）的 Conformer 模块来有效捕获全局和局部特征。最后，在最终池化之前，将所有 Conformer 块的输出特征图连接起来以聚合多尺度表示。我们根据广泛使用的基准评估 MFA-Conformer。最佳系统在 VoxCeleb1-O、SITW.Dev 和 SITW.Eval 集上分别获得 0.64%、1.29% 和 1.63% EER。 MFA-Conformer 在识别性能和推理速度方面都明显优于流行的 ECAPA-TDNN 系统。最后但并非最不重要的一点是，消融研究清楚地表明，全局和局部特征学习的结合可以实现稳健且准确的说话人嵌入提取。我们还发布了代码以供将来比较。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于Conformer的多尺度特征聚合模型MFA-Conformer，用于自动说话人验证任务。
AI.motivation: 为解决现有说话人验证模型在计算效率与特征表达能力之间的平衡问题，提出更高效且准确的模型架构。
AI.method: 设计包含卷积下采样层、Conformer块（融合Transformer与CNN）及多尺度特征拼接的模型结构，通过全局与局部特征联合学习提升表征能力。
AI.result: 在VoxCeleb1-O、SITW.Dev和SITW.Eval数据集上分别达到0.64%、1.29%和1.63%的EER，较ECAPA-TDNN系统在准确率与推理速度上均有显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 多尺度特征聚合策略有效增强了模型鲁棒性，验证了全局与局部特征联合学习的优势，代码开源便于后续研究对比。

authors_text: Tianyi Hao,Xuxin Huang,Chunjing Jia,Cheng Peng
title: A quantum-inspired tensor network method for constrained combinatorial optimization problems
title_zh: 用于约束组合优化问题的量子启发张量网络方法
abstract: Combinatorial optimization is of general interest for both theoretical study and real-world applications. Fast-developing quantum algorithms provide a different perspective on solving combinatorial optimization problems. In this paper, we propose a quantum-inspired tensor-network-based algorithm for general locally constrained combinatorial optimization problems. Our algorithm constructs a Hamiltonian for the problem of interest, effectively mapping it to a quantum problem, then encodes the constraints directly into a tensor network state and solves the optimal solution by evolving the system to the ground state of the Hamiltonian. We demonstrate our algorithm with the open-pit mining problem, which results in a quadratic asymptotic time complexity. Our numerical results show the effectiveness of this construction and potential applications in further studies for general combinatorial optimization problems.
summary: Combinatorial optimization is of general interest for both theoretical study and real-world applications. Fast-developing quantum algorithms provide a different perspective on solving combinatorial optimization problems. In this paper, we propose a quantum-inspired tensor-network-based algorithm for general locally constrained combinatorial optimization problems. Our algorithm constructs a Hamiltonian for the problem of interest, effectively mapping it to a quantum problem, then encodes the constraints directly into a tensor network state and solves the optimal solution by evolving the system to the ground state of the Hamiltonian. We demonstrate our algorithm with the open-pit mining problem, which results in a quadratic asymptotic time complexity. Our numerical results show the effectiveness of this construction and potential applications in further studies for general combinatorial optimization problems.
abstract_zh: 组合优化在理论研究和实际应用中都受到普遍关注。快速发展的量子算法为解决组合优化问题提供了不同的视角。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于量子启发的张量网络的算法，用于解决一般局部约束组合优化问题。我们的算法为感兴趣的问题构造一个哈密顿量，有效地将其映射到量子问题，然后将约束直接编码为张量网络状态，并通过将系统演化到哈密顿量的基态来求解最优解。我们用露天采矿问题演示了我们的算法，这导致了二次渐近时间复杂度。我们的数值结果表明了这种结构的有效性以及在一般组合优化问题的进一步研究中的潜在应用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种受量子启发的张量网络方法，用于解决具有局部约束的组合优化问题。
AI.motivation: 组合优化问题在理论和实际应用中均具有重要意义，而快速发展的量子算法为解决此类问题提供了新视角，但传统方法在处理约束条件时存在局限性。
AI.method: 通过构建问题对应的哈密顿量将其映射为量子问题，利用张量网络直接编码约束条件，并通过演化系统至哈密顿量基态求解最优解。以露天采矿问题为例验证方法有效性。
AI.result: 数值实验表明该方法在二次时间复杂度下有效求解约束组合优化问题，验证了其构造的可行性及在更广泛问题中的应用潜力。
AI.conclusion: 本文方法为解决一般性组合优化问题提供了新的量子启发式框架，未来可进一步拓展至更多实际应用场景。

authors_text: Kaidong Li,Ziming Zhang,Cuncong Zhong,Guanghui Wang
title: Robust Structured Declarative Classifiers for 3D Point Clouds: Defending Adversarial Attacks with Implicit Gradients
title_zh: 用于 3D 点云的鲁棒结构化声明性分类器：使用隐式梯度防御对抗性攻击
abstract: Deep neural networks for 3D point cloud classification, such as PointNet, have been demonstrated to be vulnerable to adversarial attacks. Current adversarial defenders often learn to denoise the (attacked) point clouds by reconstruction, and then feed them to the classifiers as input. In contrast to the literature, we propose a family of robust structured declarative classifiers for point cloud classification, where the internal constrained optimization mechanism can effectively defend adversarial attacks through implicit gradients. Such classifiers can be formulated using a bilevel optimization framework. We further propose an effective and efficient instantiation of our approach, namely, Lattice Point Classifier (LPC), based on structured sparse coding in the permutohedral lattice and 2D convolutional neural networks (CNNs) that is end-to-end trainable. We demonstrate state-of-the-art robust point cloud classification performance on ModelNet40 and ScanNet under seven different attackers. For instance, we achieve 89.51% and 83.16% test accuracy on each dataset under the recent JGBA attacker that outperforms DUP-Net and IF-Defense with PointNet by ~70%. Demo code is available at https://zhang-vislab.github.io.
summary: Deep neural networks for 3D point cloud classification, such as PointNet, have been demonstrated to be vulnerable to adversarial attacks. Current adversarial defenders often learn to denoise the (attacked) point clouds by reconstruction, and then feed them to the classifiers as input. In contrast to the literature, we propose a family of robust structured declarative classifiers for point cloud classification, where the internal constrained optimization mechanism can effectively defend adversarial attacks through implicit gradients. Such classifiers can be formulated using a bilevel optimization framework. We further propose an effective and efficient instantiation of our approach, namely, Lattice Point Classifier (LPC), based on structured sparse coding in the permutohedral lattice and 2D convolutional neural networks (CNNs) that is end-to-end trainable. We demonstrate state-of-the-art robust point cloud classification performance on ModelNet40 and ScanNet under seven different attackers. For instance, we achieve 89.51% and 83.16% test accuracy on each dataset under the recent JGBA attacker that outperforms DUP-Net and IF-Defense with PointNet by ~70%. Demo code is available at https://zhang-vislab.github.io.
abstract_zh: 用于 3D 点云分类的深度神经网络（例如 PointNet）已被证明容易受到对抗性攻击。当前的对抗性防御者经常学习通过重建对（被攻击的）点云进行去噪，然后将它们作为输入提供给分类器。与文献相反，我们提出了一系列用于点云分类的鲁棒结构化声明性分类器，其中内部约束优化机制可以通过隐式梯度有效防御对抗性攻击。可以使用双层优化框架来制定此类分类器。我们进一步提出了一种有效且高效的方法实例，即格点分类器（LPC），它基于全面体晶格中的结构化稀疏编码和端到端可训练的二维卷积神经网络（CNN）。我们在 ModelNet40 和 ScanNet 上展示了七种不同攻击者下最先进的稳健点云分类性能。例如，在最近的 JGBA 攻击下，我们在每个数据集上实现了 89.51% 和 83.16% 的测试准确率，其性能比 DUP-Net 和 IF-Defense with PointNet 好约 70%。演示代码可在 https://zhang-vislab.github.io 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于隐式梯度的鲁棒结构化声明分类器，用于防御3D点云分类中的对抗攻击。
AI.motivation: 现有对抗防御方法通过重建点云进行去噪，但效果有限，需更有效的防御机制。
AI.method: 采用双层优化框架，提出基于排列晶格结构化稀疏编码和2D CNN的Lattice Point Classifier（LPC）模型。
AI.result: 在ModelNet40和ScanNet数据集上，对抗攻击下测试准确率分别达89.51%和83.16%，优于现有方法约70%。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法通过隐式梯度机制有效防御对抗攻击，实现点云分类的最先进鲁棒性。
