authors_text: Mark Sandler,Andrey Zhmoginov,Max Vladymyrov,Andrew Jackson
title: Fine-tuning Image Transformers using Learnable Memory
title_zh: 使用可学习内存微调图像转换器
abstract: In this paper we propose augmenting Vision Transformer models with learnable memory tokens. Our approach allows the model to adapt to new tasks, using few parameters, while optionally preserving its capabilities on previously learned tasks. At each layer we introduce a set of learnable embedding vectors that provide contextual information useful for specific datasets. We call these "memory tokens". We show that augmenting a model with just a handful of such tokens per layer significantly improves accuracy when compared to conventional head-only fine-tuning, and performs only slightly below the significantly more expensive full fine-tuning. We then propose an attention-masking approach that enables extension to new downstream tasks, with a computation reuse. In this setup in addition to being parameters efficient, models can execute both old and new tasks as a part of single inference at a small incremental cost.
summary: In this paper we propose augmenting Vision Transformer models with learnable memory tokens. Our approach allows the model to adapt to new tasks, using few parameters, while optionally preserving its capabilities on previously learned tasks. At each layer we introduce a set of learnable embedding vectors that provide contextual information useful for specific datasets. We call these "memory tokens". We show that augmenting a model with just a handful of such tokens per layer significantly improves accuracy when compared to conventional head-only fine-tuning, and performs only slightly below the significantly more expensive full fine-tuning. We then propose an attention-masking approach that enables extension to new downstream tasks, with a computation reuse. In this setup in addition to being parameters efficient, models can execute both old and new tasks as a part of single inference at a small incremental cost.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们建议使用可学习的记忆标记来增强 Vision Transformer 模型。我们的方法允许模型使用很少的参数来适应新任务，同时可以选择保留其在先前学习的任务上的功能。在每一层，我们引入一组可学习的嵌入向量，它们提供对特定数据集有用的上下文信息。我们称这些为“记忆令牌”。我们表明，与传统的仅头部微调相比，每层仅使用少量此类标记来增强模型可以显着提高准确性，并且性能仅略低于昂贵得多的完全微调。然后，我们提出了一种注意力屏​​蔽方法，可以通过计算重用扩展到新的下游任务。在此设置中，除了参数高效之外，模型还可以以较小的增量成本执行新旧任务，作为单一推理的一部分。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过引入可学习记忆标记来增强视觉Transformer模型，以更少参数适应新任务并保留旧任务能力。
AI.motivation: 传统微调方法参数消耗大且难以保留多任务能力，需开发参数高效且支持任务扩展的模型优化方案。
AI.method: 在Transformer各层嵌入可学习记忆标记，并设计注意力掩码机制实现新任务扩展与计算复用。
AI.result: 少量记忆标记显著提升准确率，接近全量微调效果，且支持单次推理处理多任务，增量成本低。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在参数效率与任务适应性上表现优异，为多任务视觉模型提供了轻量化扩展新路径。

At each layer we introduce a set of learnable embedding vectors that provide contextual information useful for specific datasets. We call these "memory tokens". We show that augmenting a model with just a handful of such tokens per layer significantly improves accuracy when compared to conventional head-only fine-tuning, and performs only slightly below the significantly more expensive full fine-tuning. We then propose an attention-masking approach that enables extension to new downstream tasks, with a computation reuse. In this setup in addition to being parameters efficient, models can execute both old and new tasks as a part of single inference at a small incremental cost. 在本文中，我们建议使用可学习的记忆标记来增强 Vision Transformer 模型。我们的方法允许模型使用很少的参数来适应新任务，同时可以选择保留其在先前学习的任务上的功能。在每一层，我们引入一组可学习的嵌入向量，它们提供对特定数据集有用的上下文信息。我们称这些为“记忆令牌”。我们表明，与传统的仅头部微调相比，每层仅使用少量此类标记来增强模型可以显着提高准确性，并且性能仅略低于昂贵得多的完全微调。然后，我们提出了一种注意力屏​​蔽方法，可以通过计算重用扩展到新的下游任务。在此设置中，除了参数高效之外，模型还可以以较小的增量成本执行新旧任务，作为单一推理的一部分。 本文提出通过引入可学习记忆标记来增强视觉Transformer模型，以更少参数适应新任务并保留旧任务能力。 Mark Sandler,Andrey Zhmoginov,Max Vladymyrov,Andrew Jackson cs.CV

authors_text: Pan Zhang,Jianmin Bao,Ting Zhang,Dong Chen,Fang Wen
title: Semi-Supervised Image-to-Image Translation using Latent Space Mapping
title_zh: 使用潜在空间映射的半监督图像到图像转换
abstract: Recent image-to-image translation works have been transferred from supervised to unsupervised settings due to the expensive cost of capturing or labeling large amounts of paired data. However, current unsupervised methods using the cycle-consistency constraint may not find the desired mapping, especially for difficult translation tasks. On the other hand, a small number of paired data are usually accessible. We therefore introduce a general framework for semi-supervised image translation. Unlike previous works, our main idea is to learn the translation over the latent feature space instead of the image space. Thanks to the low dimensional feature space, it is easier to find the desired mapping function, resulting in improved quality of translation results as well as the stability of the translation model. Empirically we show that using feature translation generates better results, even using a few bits of paired data. Experimental comparisons with state-of-the-art approaches demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed framework on a variety of challenging image-to-image translation tasks
summary: Recent image-to-image translation works have been transferred from supervised to unsupervised settings due to the expensive cost of capturing or labeling large amounts of paired data. However, current unsupervised methods using the cycle-consistency constraint may not find the desired mapping, especially for difficult translation tasks. On the other hand, a small number of paired data are usually accessible. We therefore introduce a general framework for semi-supervised image translation. Unlike previous works, our main idea is to learn the translation over the latent feature space instead of the image space. Thanks to the low dimensional feature space, it is easier to find the desired mapping function, resulting in improved quality of translation results as well as the stability of the translation model. Empirically we show that using feature translation generates better results, even using a few bits of paired data. Experimental comparisons with state-of-the-art approaches demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed framework on a variety of challenging image-to-image translation tasks
abstract_zh: 由于捕获或标记大量配对数据的成本高昂，最近的图像到图像翻译工作已从监督设置转移到无监督设置。然而，当前使用循环一致性约束的无监督方法可能找不到所需的映射，特别是对于困难的翻译任务。另一方面，通常可以访问少量的配对数据。因此，我们引入了半监督图像翻译的通用框架。与之前的工作不同，我们的主要思想是学习潜在特征空间而不是图像空间上的翻译。由于低维特征空间，更容易找到所需的映射函数，从而提高翻译结果的质量以及翻译模型的稳定性。根据经验，我们表明，即使使用一些配对数据，使用特征转换也会产生更好的结果。与最先进方法的实验比较证明了所提出的框架在各种具有挑战性的图像到图像翻译任务上的有效性

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种半监督图像到图像翻译的框架，通过在潜在特征空间中进行映射来提升翻译效果。
AI.motivation: 由于获取大量配对数据的成本较高，当前的无监督图像到图像翻译方法在处理复杂任务时可能无法找到理想的映射。而少量的配对数据通常是可获得的，因此需要一种半监督的方法。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种在潜在特征空间中进行图像翻译的框架，利用低维特征空间更容易找到目标映射函数，从而提高翻译质量和模型稳定性。
AI.result: 实验表明，使用特征翻译的方法即使在仅有少量配对数据的情况下也能生成更高质量的翻译结果，并且在多种具有挑战性的图像翻译任务中优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过在潜在特征空间中进行映射，有效提升了半监督图像到图像翻译的性能，适用于多种复杂任务。

authors_text: Xuhai Xu,Jun Gong,Carolina Brum,Lilian Liang,Bongsoo Suh,Kumar Gupta,Yash Agarwal,Laurence Lindsey,Runchang Kang,Behrooz Shahsavari,Tu Nguyen,Heriberto Nieto,Scott E. Hudson,Charlie Maalouf,Seyed Mousavi,Gierad Laput
title: Enabling hand gesture customization on wrist-worn devices
title_zh: 在腕戴式设备上启用手势自定义
comment: Proceedings of the 2022 CHI Conference on Human Factors in Computing Systems
comments: Proceedings of the 2022 CHI Conference on Human Factors in Computing Systems
abstract: We present a framework for gesture customization requiring minimal examples from users, all without degrading the performance of existing gesture sets. To achieve this, we first deployed a large-scale study (N=500+) to collect data and train an accelerometer-gyroscope recognition model with a cross-user accuracy of 95.7% and a false-positive rate of 0.6 per hour when tested on everyday non-gesture data. Next, we design a few-shot learning framework which derives a lightweight model from our pre-trained model, enabling knowledge transfer without performance degradation. We validate our approach through a user study (N=20) examining on-device customization from 12 new gestures, resulting in an average accuracy of 55.3%, 83.1%, and 87.2% on using one, three, or five shots when adding a new gesture, while maintaining the same recognition accuracy and false-positive rate from the pre-existing gesture set. We further evaluate the usability of our real-time implementation with a user experience study (N=20). Our results highlight the effectiveness, learnability, and usability of our customization framework. Our approach paves the way for a future where users are no longer bound to pre-existing gestures, freeing them to creatively introduce new gestures tailored to their preferences and abilities.
summary: We present a framework for gesture customization requiring minimal examples from users, all without degrading the performance of existing gesture sets. To achieve this, we first deployed a large-scale study (N=500+) to collect data and train an accelerometer-gyroscope recognition model with a cross-user accuracy of 95.7% and a false-positive rate of 0.6 per hour when tested on everyday non-gesture data. Next, we design a few-shot learning framework which derives a lightweight model from our pre-trained model, enabling knowledge transfer without performance degradation. We validate our approach through a user study (N=20) examining on-device customization from 12 new gestures, resulting in an average accuracy of 55.3%, 83.1%, and 87.2% on using one, three, or five shots when adding a new gesture, while maintaining the same recognition accuracy and false-positive rate from the pre-existing gesture set. We further evaluate the usability of our real-time implementation with a user experience study (N=20). Our results highlight the effectiveness, learnability, and usability of our customization framework. Our approach paves the way for a future where users are no longer bound to pre-existing gestures, freeing them to creatively introduce new gestures tailored to their preferences and abilities.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一个手势定制框架，需要用户提供最少的示例，并且不会降低现有手势集的性能。为了实现这一目标，我们首先部署了一项大规模研究（N=500+）来收集数据并训练加速度计陀螺仪识别模型，在日常非手势数据上进行测试时，该模型的跨用户准确度为 95.7%，误报率为 0.6 每小时。接下来，我们设计了一个几次学习框架，该框架从我们预先训练的模型中派生出一个轻量级模型，从而在不降低性能的情况下实现知识​​转移。我们通过一项用户研究 (N=20) 验证了我们的方法，该研究检查了 12 个新手势的设备上自定义，结果在添加新手势时使用 1、3 或 5 个镜头的平均准确度分别为 55.3%、83.1% 和 87.2%，同时保持与现有手势集相同的识别准确度和误报率。我们通过用户体验研究（N=20）进一步评估实时实施的可用性。我们的结果突出了我们的定制框架的有效性、可学习性和可用性。我们的方法为未来铺平了道路，用户不再受现有手势的束缚，让他们能够创造性地引入适合自己喜好和能力的新手势。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需大量样本即可在可穿戴设备上实现手势自定义的框架，同时保持原有手势识别性能。
AI.motivation: 现有可穿戴设备的手势集无法满足用户个性化需求，需提供灵活的手势自定义方案。
AI.method: 通过大规模用户数据训练高精度预识别模型，结合少样本学习框架实现轻量化模型迁移与新手势快速适配。
AI.result: 用户实验显示，新手势识别准确率在1/3/5样本下分别达55.3%/83.1%/87.2%，且原有手势性能保持不变。
AI.conclusion: 该框架验证了可穿戴设备手势自定义的可行性，为用户个性化交互提供了技术基础。

authors_text: Jihyun Lee,Minhyuk Sung,Hyunjin Kim,Tae-Kyun Kim
title: Pop-Out Motion: 3D-Aware Image Deformation via Learning the Shape Laplacian
title_zh: 弹出运动：通过学习形状拉普拉斯进行 3D 感知图像变形
abstract: We propose a framework that can deform an object in a 2D image as it exists in 3D space. Most existing methods for 3D-aware image manipulation are limited to (1) only changing the global scene information or depth, or (2) manipulating an object of specific categories. In this paper, we present a 3D-aware image deformation method with minimal restrictions on shape category and deformation type. While our framework leverages 2D-to-3D reconstruction, we argue that reconstruction is not sufficient for realistic deformations due to the vulnerability to topological errors. Thus, we propose to take a supervised learning-based approach to predict the shape Laplacian of the underlying volume of a 3D reconstruction represented as a point cloud. Given the deformation energy calculated using the predicted shape Laplacian and user-defined deformation handles (e.g., keypoints), we obtain bounded biharmonic weights to model plausible handle-based image deformation. In the experiments, we present our results of deforming 2D character and clothed human images. We also quantitatively show that our approach can produce more accurate deformation weights compared to alternative methods (i.e., mesh reconstruction and point cloud Laplacian methods).
summary: We propose a framework that can deform an object in a 2D image as it exists in 3D space. Most existing methods for 3D-aware image manipulation are limited to (1) only changing the global scene information or depth, or (2) manipulating an object of specific categories. In this paper, we present a 3D-aware image deformation method with minimal restrictions on shape category and deformation type. While our framework leverages 2D-to-3D reconstruction, we argue that reconstruction is not sufficient for realistic deformations due to the vulnerability to topological errors. Thus, we propose to take a supervised learning-based approach to predict the shape Laplacian of the underlying volume of a 3D reconstruction represented as a point cloud. Given the deformation energy calculated using the predicted shape Laplacian and user-defined deformation handles (e.g., keypoints), we obtain bounded biharmonic weights to model plausible handle-based image deformation. In the experiments, we present our results of deforming 2D character and clothed human images. We also quantitatively show that our approach can produce more accurate deformation weights compared to alternative methods (i.e., mesh reconstruction and point cloud Laplacian methods).
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一个框架，可以使 2D 图像中的对象变形，就像它存在于 3D 空间中一样。大多数现有的 3D 感知图像操作方法仅限于 (1) 仅更改全局场景信息或深度，或 (2) 操作特定类别的对象。在本文中，我们提出了一种对形状类别和变形类型限制最少的 3D 感知图像变形方法。虽然我们的框架利用 2D 到 3D 重建，但我们认为，由于容易受到拓扑错误的影响，重建不足以实现现实变形。因此，我们建议采用基于监督学习的方法来预测表示为点云的 3D 重建的基础体积的拉普拉斯形状。给定使用预测形状拉普拉斯和用户定义的变形手柄（例如关键点）计算的变形能量，我们获得有界双调和权重来模拟合理的基于手柄的图像变形。在实验中，我们展示了变形 2D 角色和穿着人类图像的结果。我们还定量地表明，与替代方法（即网格重建和点云拉普拉斯方法）相比，我们的方法可以产生更准确的变形权重。

AI.motivation: 现有3D图像变形方法受限于全局场景修改或特定物体类别，且依赖2D-3D重建易产生拓扑错误。

AI.result: 在角色和穿衣人体图像变形任务中，定量结果优于网格重建和点云拉普拉斯等替代方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过学习形状拉普拉斯克服了重建误差，实现了更准确且灵活的3D感知图像变形。

search_text: Pop-Out Motion: 3D-Aware Image Deformation via Learning the Shape Laplacian 弹出运动：通过学习形状拉普拉斯进行 3D 感知图像变形 We propose a framework that can deform an object in a 2D image as it exists in 3D space. Most existing methods for 3D-aware image manipulation are limited to (1) only changing the global scene information or depth, or (2) manipulating an object of specific categories. In this paper, we present a 3D-aware image deformation method with minimal restrictions on shape category and deformation type. While our framework leverages 2D-to-3D reconstruction, we argue that reconstruction is not sufficient for realistic deformations due to the vulnerability to topological errors. Thus, we propose to take a supervised learning-based approach to predict the shape Laplacian of the underlying volume of a 3D reconstruction represented as a point cloud. Given the deformation energy calculated using the predicted shape Laplacian and user-defined deformation handles (e.g., keypoints), we obtain bounded biharmonic weights to model plausible handle-based image deformation. In the experiments, we present our results of deforming 2D character and clothed human images. We also quantitatively show that our approach can produce more accurate deformation weights compared to alternative methods (i.e., mesh reconstruction and point cloud Laplacian methods). 我们提出了一个框架，可以使 2D 图像中的对象变形，就像它存在于 3D 空间中一样。大多数现有的 3D 感知图像操作方法仅限于 (1) 仅更改全局场景信息或深度，或 (2) 操作特定类别的对象。在本文中，我们提出了一种对形状类别和变形类型限制最少的 3D 感知图像变形方法。虽然我们的框架利用 2D 到 3D 重建，但我们认为，由于容易受到拓扑错误的影响，重建不足以实现现实变形。因此，我们建议采用基于监督学习的方法来预测表示为点云的 3D 重建的基础体积的拉普拉斯形状。给定使用预测形状拉普拉斯和用户定义的变形手柄（例如关键点）计算的变形能量，我们获得有界双调和权重来模拟合理的基于手柄的图像变形。在实验中，我们展示了变形 2D 角色和穿着人类图像的结果。我们还定量地表明，与替代方法（即网格重建和点云拉普拉斯方法）相比，我们的方法可以产生更准确的变形权重。 本文提出一种基于学习形状拉普拉斯的3D感知图像变形方法，可在2D图像中实现更自由的物体变形。 Jihyun Lee,Minhyuk Sung,Hyunjin Kim,Tae-Kyun Kim cs.CV

authors_text: Vishnu Suresh Lokhande,Rudrasis Chakraborty,Sathya N. Ravi,Vikas Singh
title: Equivariance Allows Handling Multiple Nuisance Variables When Analyzing Pooled Neuroimaging Datasets
title_zh: 等方差允许在分析汇集的神经影像数据集时处理多个有害变量
comment: Accepted at 2022 IEEE/CVF Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (CVPR)
comments: Accepted at 2022 IEEE/CVF Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (CVPR)
abstract: Pooling multiple neuroimaging datasets across institutions often enables improvements in statistical power when evaluating associations (e.g., between risk factors and disease outcomes) that may otherwise be too weak to detect. When there is only a {\em single} source of variability (e.g., different scanners), domain adaptation and matching the distributions of representations may suffice in many scenarios. But in the presence of {\em more than one} nuisance variable which concurrently influence the measurements, pooling datasets poses unique challenges, e.g., variations in the data can come from both the acquisition method as well as the demographics of participants (gender, age). Invariant representation learning, by itself, is ill-suited to fully model the data generation process. In this paper, we show how bringing recent results on equivariant representation learning (for studying symmetries in neural networks) instantiated on structured spaces together with simple use of classical results on causal inference provides an effective practical solution. In particular, we demonstrate how our model allows dealing with more than one nuisance variable under some assumptions and can enable analysis of pooled scientific datasets in scenarios that would otherwise entail removing a large portion of the samples.
summary: Pooling multiple neuroimaging datasets across institutions often enables improvements in statistical power when evaluating associations (e.g., between risk factors and disease outcomes) that may otherwise be too weak to detect. When there is only a {\em single} source of variability (e.g., different scanners), domain adaptation and matching the distributions of representations may suffice in many scenarios. But in the presence of {\em more than one} nuisance variable which concurrently influence the measurements, pooling datasets poses unique challenges, e.g., variations in the data can come from both the acquisition method as well as the demographics of participants (gender, age). Invariant representation learning, by itself, is ill-suited to fully model the data generation process. In this paper, we show how bringing recent results on equivariant representation learning (for studying symmetries in neural networks) instantiated on structured spaces together with simple use of classical results on causal inference provides an effective practical solution. In particular, we demonstrate how our model allows dealing with more than one nuisance variable under some assumptions and can enable analysis of pooled scientific datasets in scenarios that would otherwise entail removing a large portion of the samples.
abstract_zh: 在评估关联性（例如风险因素和疾病结果之间）时，跨机构汇集多个神经影像数据集通常可以提高统计能力，否则这些关联性可能太弱而无法检测。当只有一个可变性来源（例如不同的扫描仪）时，域适应和匹配表示的分布在许多情况下可能就足够了。但是，在存在同时影响测量的{\em多个}干扰变量的情况下，汇集数据集带来了独特的挑战，例如，数据的变化可能来自采集方法以及参与者的人口统计数据（性别、年龄）。不变表示学习本身并不适合对数据生成过程进行完全建模。在本文中，我们展示了如何将在结构化空间上实例化的等变表示学习（用于研究神经网络中的对称性）的最新结果与因果推理的经典结果的简单使用结合起来，提供了一种有效的实用解决方案。特别是，我们演示了我们的模型如何允许在某些假设下处理多个有害变量，并能够在需要删除大部分样本的情况下分析汇集的科学数据集。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了如何利用等变表示学习和经典因果推理方法，解决多干扰变量下神经影像数据集的合并分析问题。
AI.motivation: 在神经影像数据分析中，合并多个数据集可以提升统计功效，但多干扰变量（如扫描设备和人口统计学特征）的存在给分析带来了挑战。
AI.method: 结合等变表示学习和经典因果推理方法，以处理多个干扰变量的影响，并在假设条件下对合并数据集进行分析。
AI.result: 该模型能够在多个干扰变量的假设下有效分析合并数据集，避免了因去除大量样本而导致的信息损失。
AI.conclusion: 等变表示学习和因果推理的结合为多干扰变量下的神经影像数据集合并分析提供了有效方法。

authors_text: I-Chao Shen,Yu Ju Chen,Oliver van Kaick,Takeo Igarashi
title: AutoPoly: Predicting a Polygonal Mesh Construction Sequence from a Silhouette Image
title_zh: AutoPoly：从轮廓图像预测多边形网格构造序列
abstract: Polygonal modeling is a core task of content creation in Computer Graphics. The complexity of modeling, in terms of the number and the order of operations and time required to execute them makes it challenging to learn and execute. Our goal is to automatically derive a polygonal modeling sequence for a given target. Then, one can learn polygonal modeling by observing the resulting sequence and also expedite the modeling process by starting from the auto-generated result. As a starting point for building a system for 3D modeling in the future, we tackle the 2D shape modeling problem and present AutoPoly, a hybrid method that generates a polygonal mesh construction sequence from a silhouette image. The key idea of our method is the use of the Monte Carlo tree search (MCTS) algorithm and differentiable rendering to separately predict sequential topological actions and geometric actions. Our hybrid method can alter topology, whereas the recently proposed inverse shape estimation methods using differentiable rendering can only handle a fixed topology. Our novel reward function encourages MCTS to select topological actions that lead to a simpler shape without self-intersection. We further designed two deep learning-based methods to improve the expansion and simulation steps in the MCTS search process: an $n$-step "future action prediction" network (nFAP-Net) to generate candidates for potential topological actions, and a shape warping network (WarpNet) to predict polygonal shapes given the predicted rendered images and topological actions. We demonstrate the efficiency of our method on 2D polygonal shapes of multiple man-made object categories.
summary: Polygonal modeling is a core task of content creation in Computer Graphics. The complexity of modeling, in terms of the number and the order of operations and time required to execute them makes it challenging to learn and execute. Our goal is to automatically derive a polygonal modeling sequence for a given target. Then, one can learn polygonal modeling by observing the resulting sequence and also expedite the modeling process by starting from the auto-generated result. As a starting point for building a system for 3D modeling in the future, we tackle the 2D shape modeling problem and present AutoPoly, a hybrid method that generates a polygonal mesh construction sequence from a silhouette image. The key idea of our method is the use of the Monte Carlo tree search (MCTS) algorithm and differentiable rendering to separately predict sequential topological actions and geometric actions. Our hybrid method can alter topology, whereas the recently proposed inverse shape estimation methods using differentiable rendering can only handle a fixed topology. Our novel reward function encourages MCTS to select topological actions that lead to a simpler shape without self-intersection. We further designed two deep learning-based methods to improve the expansion and simulation steps in the MCTS search process: an $n$-step "future action prediction" network (nFAP-Net) to generate candidates for potential topological actions, and a shape warping network (WarpNet) to predict polygonal shapes given the predicted rendered images and topological actions. We demonstrate the efficiency of our method on 2D polygonal shapes of multiple man-made object categories.
abstract_zh: 多边形建模是计算机图形学内容创建的核心任务。建模的复杂性（就操作的数量和顺序以及执行它们所需的时间而言）使得学习和执行具有挑战性。我们的目标是自动导出给定目标的多边形建模序列。然后，人们可以通过观察结果序列来学习多边形建模，还可以从自动生成的结果开始加快建模过程。作为未来构建 3D 建模系统的起点，我们解决了 2D 形状建模问题并提出了 AutoPoly，这是一种从轮廓图像生成多边形网格构造序列的混合方法。我们方法的关键思想是使用蒙特卡罗树搜索（MCTS）算法和可微渲染来分别预测顺序拓扑动作和几何动作。我们的混合方法可以改变拓扑，而最近提出的使用可微渲染的逆形状估计方法只能处理固定的拓扑。我们新颖的奖励函数鼓励 MCTS 选择拓扑动作，从而产生更简单的形状而无需自相交。我们进一步设计了两种基于深度学习的方法来改进 MCTS 搜索过程中的扩展和模拟步骤：一个 $n$ 步的“未来动作预测”网络（nFAP-Net），用于生成潜在拓扑动作的候选者；以及一个形状扭曲网络（WarpNet），用于在给定预测的渲染图像和拓扑动作的情况下预测多边形形状。我们展示了我们的方法在多个人造物体类别的 2D 多边形形状上的效率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出AutoPoly方法，通过蒙特卡洛树搜索（MCTS）和可微渲染从轮廓图像生成多边形网格构建序列。
AI.motivation: 多边形建模过程复杂且学习门槛高，现有逆向形状估计方法无法处理拓扑变化。本文旨在通过自动生成建模序列简化学习过程并提升效率。
AI.method: 结合MCTS预测拓扑操作序列与几何操作，设计奖励函数避免自相交，引入nFAP-Net预测未来操作及WarpNet生成多边形形状。
AI.result: 在多种人造物体的2D多边形形状上验证了方法的有效性，展示了生成序列的高效性。
AI.conclusion: AutoPoly的混合方法成功解决了2D形状建模问题，为未来3D建模系统提供了基础框架。

search_text: AutoPoly: Predicting a Polygonal Mesh Construction Sequence from a Silhouette Image AutoPoly：从轮廓图像预测多边形网格构造序列 Polygonal modeling is a core task of content creation in Computer Graphics. The complexity of modeling, in terms of the number and the order of operations and time required to execute them makes it challenging to learn and execute. Our goal is to automatically derive a polygonal modeling sequence for a given target. Then, one can learn polygonal modeling by observing the resulting sequence and also expedite the modeling process by starting from the auto-generated result. As a starting point for building a system for 3D modeling in the future, we tackle the 2D shape modeling problem and present AutoPoly, a hybrid method that generates a polygonal mesh construction sequence from a silhouette image. The key idea of our method is the use of the Monte Carlo tree search (MCTS) algorithm and differentiable rendering to separately predict sequential topological actions and geometric actions. Our hybrid method can alter topology, whereas the recently proposed inverse shape estimation methods using differentiable rendering can only handle a fixed topology. Our novel reward function encourages MCTS to select topological actions that lead to a simpler shape without self-intersection. We further designed two deep learning-based methods to improve the expansion and simulation steps in the MCTS search process: an $n$-step "future action prediction" network (nFAP-Net) to generate candidates for potential topological actions, and a shape warping network (WarpNet) to predict polygonal shapes given the predicted rendered images and topological actions. We demonstrate the efficiency of our method on 2D polygonal shapes of multiple man-made object categories. 多边形建模是计算机图形学内容创建的核心任务。建模的复杂性（就操作的数量和顺序以及执行它们所需的时间而言）使得学习和执行具有挑战性。我们的目标是自动导出给定目标的多边形建模序列。然后，人们可以通过观察结果序列来学习多边形建模，还可以从自动生成的结果开始加快建模过程。作为未来构建 3D 建模系统的起点，我们解决了 2D 形状建模问题并提出了 AutoPoly，这是一种从轮廓图像生成多边形网格构造序列的混合方法。我们方法的关键思想是使用蒙特卡罗树搜索（MCTS）算法和可微渲染来分别预测顺序拓扑动作和几何动作。我们的混合方法可以改变拓扑，而最近提出的使用可微渲染的逆形状估计方法只能处理固定的拓扑。我们新颖的奖励函数鼓励 MCTS 选择拓扑动作，从而产生更简单的形状而无需自相交。我们进一步设计了两种基于深度学习的方法来改进 MCTS 搜索过程中的扩展和模拟步骤：一个 $n$ 步的“未来动作预测”网络（nFAP-Net），用于生成潜在拓扑动作的候选者；以及一个形状扭曲网络（WarpNet），用于在给定预测的渲染图像和拓扑动作的情况下预测多边形形状。我们展示了我们的方法在多个人造物体类别的 2D 多边形形状上的效率。 本文提出AutoPoly方法，通过蒙特卡洛树搜索（MCTS）和可微渲染从轮廓图像生成多边形网格构建序列。 I-Chao Shen,Yu Ju Chen,Oliver van Kaick,Takeo Igarashi cs.CV,cs.CG,cs.GR

authors_text: Zikui Cai,Shantanu Rane,Alejandro E. Brito,Chengyu Song,Srikanth V. Krishnamurthy,Amit K. Roy-Chowdhury,M. Salman Asif
title: Zero-Query Transfer Attacks on Context-Aware Object Detectors
title_zh: 对上下文感知对象检测器的零查询传输攻击
abstract: Adversarial attacks perturb images such that a deep neural network produces incorrect classification results. A promising approach to defend against adversarial attacks on natural multi-object scenes is to impose a context-consistency check, wherein, if the detected objects are not consistent with an appropriately defined context, then an attack is suspected. Stronger attacks are needed to fool such context-aware detectors. We present the first approach for generating context-consistent adversarial attacks that can evade the context-consistency check of black-box object detectors operating on complex, natural scenes. Unlike many black-box attacks that perform repeated attempts and open themselves to detection, we assume a "zero-query" setting, where the attacker has no knowledge of the classification decisions of the victim system. First, we derive multiple attack plans that assign incorrect labels to victim objects in a context-consistent manner. Then we design and use a novel data structure that we call the perturbation success probability matrix, which enables us to filter the attack plans and choose the one most likely to succeed. This final attack plan is implemented using a perturbation-bounded adversarial attack algorithm. We compare our zero-query attack against a few-query scheme that repeatedly checks if the victim system is fooled. We also compare against state-of-the-art context-agnostic attacks. Against a context-aware defense, the fooling rate of our zero-query approach is significantly higher than context-agnostic approaches and higher than that achievable with up to three rounds of the few-query scheme.
summary: Adversarial attacks perturb images such that a deep neural network produces incorrect classification results. A promising approach to defend against adversarial attacks on natural multi-object scenes is to impose a context-consistency check, wherein, if the detected objects are not consistent with an appropriately defined context, then an attack is suspected. Stronger attacks are needed to fool such context-aware detectors. We present the first approach for generating context-consistent adversarial attacks that can evade the context-consistency check of black-box object detectors operating on complex, natural scenes. Unlike many black-box attacks that perform repeated attempts and open themselves to detection, we assume a "zero-query" setting, where the attacker has no knowledge of the classification decisions of the victim system. First, we derive multiple attack plans that assign incorrect labels to victim objects in a context-consistent manner. Then we design and use a novel data structure that we call the perturbation success probability matrix, which enables us to filter the attack plans and choose the one most likely to succeed. This final attack plan is implemented using a perturbation-bounded adversarial attack algorithm. We compare our zero-query attack against a few-query scheme that repeatedly checks if the victim system is fooled. We also compare against state-of-the-art context-agnostic attacks. Against a context-aware defense, the fooling rate of our zero-query approach is significantly higher than context-agnostic approaches and higher than that achievable with up to three rounds of the few-query scheme.
abstract_zh: 对抗性攻击会扰乱图像，导致深度神经网络产生错误的分类结果。防御对自然多对象场景的对抗性攻击的一种有前景的方法是进行上下文一致性检查，其中，如果检测到的对象与适当定义的上下文不一致，则怀疑存在攻击。需要更强的攻击来愚弄此类上下文感知检测器。我们提出了第一种生成上下文一致的对抗性攻击的方法，该方法可以逃避在复杂的自然场景上运行的黑盒对象检测器的上下文一致性检查。与许多执行重复尝试并开放自身进行检测的黑盒攻击不同，我们假设“零查询”设置，其中攻击者不知道受害者系统的分类决策。首先，我们得出多个攻击计划，以上下文一致的方式为受害者对象分配不正确的标签。然后，我们设计并使用一种称为扰动成功概率矩阵的新颖数据结构，它使我们能够过滤攻击计划并选择最有可能成功的计划。最终的攻击计划是使用扰动限制的对抗性攻击算法来实现的。我们将零查询攻击与少数查询方案进行比较，该方案反复检查受害者系统是否被愚弄。我们还与最先进的上下文无关攻击进行比较。针对上下文感知防御，我们的零查询方法的愚弄率明显高于上下文无关方法，并且高于通过最多三轮少查询方案可实现的愚弄率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需查询的零查询迁移攻击方法，针对上下文感知目标检测器生成上下文一致的对抗样本。
AI.motivation: 现有上下文一致性防御机制能有效检测对抗攻击，但传统黑盒攻击需多次查询易被发现，且上下文无关攻击效果有限。
AI.method: 设计上下文一致的错误标签分配方案，构建扰动成功概率矩阵筛选最优攻击计划，并采用有界扰动算法生成对抗样本。
AI.result: 零查询攻击在上下文感知防御下的欺骗率显著高于上下文无关攻击及最多三轮少查询方案。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过上下文一致性约束和概率矩阵优化，在无目标系统反馈情况下实现了更高效的对抗攻击。

authors_text: Zhewei Chen,Sami Ahmed Haider
title: Edge Detection and Deep Learning Based SETI Signal Classification Method
title_zh: 基于边缘检测和深度学习的 SETI 信号分类方法
comment: Article submitted to Computers, Materials & Continua
comments: Article submitted to Computers, Materials & Continua
abstract: Scientists at the Berkeley SETI Research Center are Searching for Extraterrestrial Intelligence (SETI) by a new signal detection method that converts radio signals into spectrograms through Fourier transforms and classifies signals represented by two-dimensional time-frequency spectrums, which successfully converts a signal classification problem into an image classification task. In view of the negative impact of background noises on the accuracy of spectrograms classification, a new method is introduced in this paper. After Gaussian convolution smoothing the signals, edge detection functions are applied to detect the edge of the signals and enhance the outline of the signals, then the processed spectrograms are used to train the deep neural network to compare the classification accuracy of various image classification networks. The results show that the proposed method can effectively improve the classification accuracy of SETI spectrums.
summary: Scientists at the Berkeley SETI Research Center are Searching for Extraterrestrial Intelligence (SETI) by a new signal detection method that converts radio signals into spectrograms through Fourier transforms and classifies signals represented by two-dimensional time-frequency spectrums, which successfully converts a signal classification problem into an image classification task. In view of the negative impact of background noises on the accuracy of spectrograms classification, a new method is introduced in this paper. After Gaussian convolution smoothing the signals, edge detection functions are applied to detect the edge of the signals and enhance the outline of the signals, then the processed spectrograms are used to train the deep neural network to compare the classification accuracy of various image classification networks. The results show that the proposed method can effectively improve the classification accuracy of SETI spectrums.
abstract_zh: 伯克利SETI研究中心的科学家正在通过一种新的信号检测方法寻找地外文明（SETI），该方法将无线电信号通过傅里叶变换转换为频谱图，并对二维​​时频频谱表示的信号进行分类，成功地将信号分类问题转化为图像分类任务。针对背景噪声对频谱图分类精度的负面影响，本文提出了一种新方法。对信号进行高斯卷积平滑后，应用边缘检测函数来检测信号的边缘并增强信号的轮廓，然后使用处理后的频谱图来训练深度神经网络，以比较各种图像分类网络的分类精度。结果表明，该方法能够有效提高SETI频谱的分类精度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合边缘检测与深度学习的SETI信号分类方法，通过傅里叶变换将射电信号转换为频谱图，并利用图像分类网络提升分类准确性。
AI.motivation: 背景噪声会显著降低频谱图分类的精度，传统方法难以有效抑制噪声干扰，需探索新方法提升信号分类性能。
AI.method: 对信号进行高斯卷积平滑处理后应用边缘检测算法增强信号轮廓，将处理后的频谱图输入深度神经网络进行分类模型训练与对比。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法能有效提升SETI频谱图的分类准确率，验证了边缘检测预处理对深度学习模型性能的增强作用。
AI.conclusion: 通过边缘检测增强信号特征轮廓的预处理策略，可显著改善深度学习模型在SETI信号分类任务中的表现。

search_text: Edge Detection and Deep Learning Based SETI Signal Classification Method 基于边缘检测和深度学习的 SETI 信号分类方法 Scientists at the Berkeley SETI Research Center are Searching for Extraterrestrial Intelligence (SETI) by a new signal detection method that converts radio signals into spectrograms through Fourier transforms and classifies signals represented by two-dimensional time-frequency spectrums, which successfully converts a signal classification problem into an image classification task. In view of the negative impact of background noises on the accuracy of spectrograms classification, a new method is introduced in this paper. After Gaussian convolution smoothing the signals, edge detection functions are applied to detect the edge of the signals and enhance the outline of the signals, then the processed spectrograms are used to train the deep neural network to compare the classification accuracy of various image classification networks. The results show that the proposed method can effectively improve the classification accuracy of SETI spectrums. 伯克利SETI研究中心的科学家正在通过一种新的信号检测方法寻找地外文明（SETI），该方法将无线电信号通过傅里叶变换转换为频谱图，并对二维​​时频频谱表示的信号进行分类，成功地将信号分类问题转化为图像分类任务。针对背景噪声对频谱图分类精度的负面影响，本文提出了一种新方法。对信号进行高斯卷积平滑后，应用边缘检测函数来检测信号的边缘并增强信号的轮廓，然后使用处理后的频谱图来训练深度神经网络，以比较各种图像分类网络的分类精度。结果表明，该方法能够有效提高SETI频谱的分类精度。 本文提出一种结合边缘检测与深度学习的SETI信号分类方法，通过傅里叶变换将射电信号转换为频谱图，并利用图像分类网络提升分类准确性。 Zhewei Chen,Sami Ahmed Haider cs.CV,eess.IV,eess.SP

authors_text: Abhinav Ganguly,Amar C Gandhi,Sylvia E,Jeffrey D Chang,Ian M Hudson
title: SHOP: A Deep Learning Based Pipeline for near Real-Time Detection of Small Handheld Objects Present in Blurry Video
title_zh: SHOP：基于深度学习的管道，用于近实时检测模糊视频中存在的小型手持物体
comment: 8 pages, 5 figures. Accepted to IEEE SoutheastCon 2022
comments: 8 pages, 5 figures. Accepted to IEEE SoutheastCon 2022
abstract: While prior works have investigated and developed computational models capable of object detection, models still struggle to reliably interpret images with motion blur and small objects. Moreover, none of these models are specifically designed for handheld object detection. In this work, we present SHOP (Small Handheld Object Pipeline), a pipeline that reliably and efficiently interprets blurry images containing handheld objects. The specific models used in each stage of the pipeline are flexible and can be changed based on performance requirements. First, images are deblurred and then run through a pose detection system where areas-of-interest are proposed around the hands of any people present. Next, object detection is performed on the images by a single-stage object detector. Finally, the proposed areas-of-interest are used to filter out low confidence detections. Testing on a handheld subset of Microsoft Common Objects in Context (MS COCO) demonstrates that this 3 stage process results in a 70 percent decrease in false positives while only reducing true positives by 17 percent in its strongest configuration. We also present a subset of MS COCO consisting solely of handheld objects that can be used to continue the development of handheld object detection methods. https://github.com/spider-sense/SHOP
summary: While prior works have investigated and developed computational models capable of object detection, models still struggle to reliably interpret images with motion blur and small objects. Moreover, none of these models are specifically designed for handheld object detection. In this work, we present SHOP (Small Handheld Object Pipeline), a pipeline that reliably and efficiently interprets blurry images containing handheld objects. The specific models used in each stage of the pipeline are flexible and can be changed based on performance requirements. First, images are deblurred and then run through a pose detection system where areas-of-interest are proposed around the hands of any people present. Next, object detection is performed on the images by a single-stage object detector. Finally, the proposed areas-of-interest are used to filter out low confidence detections. Testing on a handheld subset of Microsoft Common Objects in Context (MS COCO) demonstrates that this 3 stage process results in a 70 percent decrease in false positives while only reducing true positives by 17 percent in its strongest configuration. We also present a subset of MS COCO consisting solely of handheld objects that can be used to continue the development of handheld object detection methods. https://github.com/spider-sense/SHOP
abstract_zh: 虽然之前的工作已经研究和开发了能够进行物体检测的计算模型，但模型仍然难以可靠地解释具有运动模糊和小物体的图像。此外，这些模型都不是专门为手持物体检测而设计的。在这项工作中，我们提出了 SHOP（小型手持物体管道），这是一种能够可靠且高效地解释包含手持物体的模糊图像的管道。管道每个阶段使用的具体模型是灵活的，可以根据性能要求进行更改。首先，图像被去模糊，然后通过姿势检测系统运行，其中在场的任何人的手周围提出感兴趣的区域。接下来，通过单级物体检测器对图像进行物体检测。最后，建议的感兴趣区域用于过滤掉低置信度检测。对 Microsoft Common Objects in Context (MS COCO) 的手持子集进行的测试表明，这 3 阶段过程可将误报率降低 70%，而在其最强配置下，真报率仅降低 17%。我们还提出了仅由手持物体组成的 MS COCO 子集，可用于继续开发手持物体检测方法。 https://github.com/spider-sense/SHOP

AI.tldr: 本文提出SHOP管道，用于实时检测模糊视频中的小型手持物体。
AI.motivation: 现有模型难以处理运动模糊和小型物体检测，且缺乏针对手持物体检测的专门设计。
AI.method: 采用三阶段流程：图像去模糊、基于姿态检测的感兴趣区域提取、单阶段目标检测器过滤低置信度检测。
AI.result: 最强配置下减少70%误检率，仅降低17%真检率，并提供MS COCO手持物体子集。
AI.conclusion: SHOP有效提升手持物体检测精度，其数据集可推动相关方法的持续发展。

authors_text: Zhenguang Liu,Runyang Feng,Haoming Chen,Shuang Wu,Yixing Gao,Yunjun Gao,Xiang Wang
title: Temporal Feature Alignment and Mutual Information Maximization for Video-Based Human Pose Estimation
title_zh: 基于视频的人体姿势估计的时间特征对齐和互信息最大化
comment: This paper is accepted to CVPR2022 (ORAL presentation)
comments: This paper is accepted to CVPR2022 (ORAL presentation)
abstract: Multi-frame human pose estimation has long been a compelling and fundamental problem in computer vision. This task is challenging due to fast motion and pose occlusion that frequently occur in videos. State-of-the-art methods strive to incorporate additional visual evidences from neighboring frames (supporting frames) to facilitate the pose estimation of the current frame (key frame). One aspect that has been obviated so far, is the fact that current methods directly aggregate unaligned contexts across frames. The spatial-misalignment between pose features of the current frame and neighboring frames might lead to unsatisfactory results. More importantly, existing approaches build upon the straightforward pose estimation loss, which unfortunately cannot constrain the network to fully leverage useful information from neighboring frames. To tackle these problems, we present a novel hierarchical alignment framework, which leverages coarse-to-fine deformations to progressively update a neighboring frame to align with the current frame at the feature level. We further propose to explicitly supervise the knowledge extraction from neighboring frames, guaranteeing that useful complementary cues are extracted. To achieve this goal, we theoretically analyzed the mutual information between the frames and arrived at a loss that maximizes the task-relevant mutual information. These allow us to rank No.1 in the Multi-frame Person Pose Estimation Challenge on benchmark dataset PoseTrack2017, and obtain state-of-the-art performance on benchmarks Sub-JHMDB and Pose-Track2018. Our code is released at https://github. com/Pose-Group/FAMI-Pose, hoping that it will be useful to the community.
summary: Multi-frame human pose estimation has long been a compelling and fundamental problem in computer vision. This task is challenging due to fast motion and pose occlusion that frequently occur in videos. State-of-the-art methods strive to incorporate additional visual evidences from neighboring frames (supporting frames) to facilitate the pose estimation of the current frame (key frame). One aspect that has been obviated so far, is the fact that current methods directly aggregate unaligned contexts across frames. The spatial-misalignment between pose features of the current frame and neighboring frames might lead to unsatisfactory results. More importantly, existing approaches build upon the straightforward pose estimation loss, which unfortunately cannot constrain the network to fully leverage useful information from neighboring frames. To tackle these problems, we present a novel hierarchical alignment framework, which leverages coarse-to-fine deformations to progressively update a neighboring frame to align with the current frame at the feature level. We further propose to explicitly supervise the knowledge extraction from neighboring frames, guaranteeing that useful complementary cues are extracted. To achieve this goal, we theoretically analyzed the mutual information between the frames and arrived at a loss that maximizes the task-relevant mutual information. These allow us to rank No.1 in the Multi-frame Person Pose Estimation Challenge on benchmark dataset PoseTrack2017, and obtain state-of-the-art performance on benchmarks Sub-JHMDB and Pose-Track2018. Our code is released at https://github. com/Pose-Group/FAMI-Pose, hoping that it will be useful to the community.
abstract_zh: 多帧人体姿态估计长期以来一直是计算机视觉中一个引人注目的基本问题。由于视频中经常出现快速运动和姿势遮挡，因此这项任务具有挑战性。最先进的方法努力结合来自相邻帧（支持帧）的额外视觉证据，以促进当前帧（关键帧）的姿势估计。到目前为止已经避免的一个方面是，当前的方法直接聚合跨帧的未对齐上下文。当前帧和相邻帧的姿态特征之间的空间失准可能会导致不令人满意的结果。更重要的是，现有的方法建立在简单的姿态估计损失的基础上，不幸的是，这不能限制网络充分利用相邻帧的有用信息。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一种新颖的分层对齐框架，该框架利用从粗到细的变形来逐步更新相邻帧，以在特征级别与当前帧对齐。我们进一步建议明确监督从相邻帧中提取知识，确保提取有用的补充线索。为了实现这一目标，我们从理论上分析了帧之间的互信息，并得出了最大化任务相关互信息的损失。这些使我们能够在基准数据集 PoseTrack2017 的多帧人体姿势估计挑战赛中排名第一，并在基准数据集 Sub-JHMDB 和 Pose-Track2018 上获得最先进的性能。我们的代码发布在 https://github 上。 com/Pose-Group/FAMI-Pose，希望它对社区有用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于时间特征对齐和互信息最大化的视频人体姿态估计方法，通过改进多帧信息的利用来提升姿态估计性能。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理视频中人体姿态估计时，未充分解决相邻帧与当前帧的空间对齐问题，且依赖简单损失函数难以有效挖掘邻帧信息。
AI.method: 设计分层对齐框架，利用粗到细的形变逐步对齐邻帧特征，并通过理论分析提出最大化任务相关互信息的损失函数以显式引导知识提取。
AI.result: 在PoseTrack2017数据集的多帧人体姿态估计挑战中排名第一，在Sub-JHMDB和Pose-Track2018基准上达到SOTA性能。
AI.conclusion: 通过特征级对齐与互信息约束，有效解决了视频姿态估计中的运动模糊和遮挡问题，为社区提供了开源代码。

authors_text: Xiao Fu,Shangzhan Zhang,Tianrun Chen,Yichong Lu,Lanyun Zhu,Xiaowei Zhou,Andreas Geiger,Yiyi Liao
title: Panoptic NeRF: 3D-to-2D Label Transfer for Panoptic Urban Scene Segmentation
title_zh: Panoptic NeRF：用于全景城市场景分割的 3D 到 2D 标签传输
abstract: Large-scale training data with high-quality annotations is critical for training semantic and instance segmentation models. Unfortunately, pixel-wise annotation is labor-intensive and costly, raising the demand for more efficient labeling strategies. In this work, we present a novel 3D-to-2D label transfer method, Panoptic NeRF, which aims for obtaining per-pixel 2D semantic and instance labels from easy-to-obtain coarse 3D bounding primitives. Our method utilizes NeRF as a differentiable tool to unify coarse 3D annotations and 2D semantic cues transferred from existing datasets. We demonstrate that this combination allows for improved geometry guided by semantic information, enabling rendering of accurate semantic maps across multiple views. Furthermore, this fusion process resolves label ambiguity of the coarse 3D annotations and filters noise in the 2D predictions. By inferring in 3D space and rendering to 2D labels, our 2D semantic and instance labels are multi-view consistent by design. Experimental results show that Panoptic NeRF outperforms existing label transfer methods in terms of accuracy and multi-view consistency on challenging urban scenes of the KITTI-360 dataset.
summary: Large-scale training data with high-quality annotations is critical for training semantic and instance segmentation models. Unfortunately, pixel-wise annotation is labor-intensive and costly, raising the demand for more efficient labeling strategies. In this work, we present a novel 3D-to-2D label transfer method, Panoptic NeRF, which aims for obtaining per-pixel 2D semantic and instance labels from easy-to-obtain coarse 3D bounding primitives. Our method utilizes NeRF as a differentiable tool to unify coarse 3D annotations and 2D semantic cues transferred from existing datasets. We demonstrate that this combination allows for improved geometry guided by semantic information, enabling rendering of accurate semantic maps across multiple views. Furthermore, this fusion process resolves label ambiguity of the coarse 3D annotations and filters noise in the 2D predictions. By inferring in 3D space and rendering to 2D labels, our 2D semantic and instance labels are multi-view consistent by design. Experimental results show that Panoptic NeRF outperforms existing label transfer methods in terms of accuracy and multi-view consistency on challenging urban scenes of the KITTI-360 dataset.
abstract_zh: 具有高质量注释的大规模训练数据对于训练语义和实例分割模型至关重要。不幸的是，逐像素注释是劳动密集型且成本高昂的，这就提高了对更有效的标记策略的需求。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的 3D 到 2D 标签传输方法 Panoptic NeRF，其目的是从易于获得的粗略 3D 边界基元中获取每像素 2D 语义和实例标签。我们的方法利用 NeRF 作为可微分工具来统一从现有数据集传输的粗略 3D 注释和 2D 语义线索。我们证明，这种组合可以改进由语义信息引导的几何形状，从而能够跨多个视图渲染准确的语义图。此外，该融合过程解决了粗略 3D 注释的标签模糊性并过滤了 2D 预测中的噪声。通过在 3D 空间中推断并渲染为 2D 标签，我们的 2D 语义和实例标签在设计上是多视图一致的。实验结果表明，在 KITTI-360 数据集的具有挑战性的城市场景中，Panoptic NeRF 在准确性和多视图一致性方面优于现有的标签传输方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种从3D粗略标注生成2D全景语义标签的方法Panoptic NeRF，用于城市场景分割。
AI.motivation: 像素级标注成本高昂，现有方法在多视角一致性和标签模糊性方面存在不足。
AI.method: 利用NeRF作为可微工具，融合3D标注与2D语义线索，通过3D空间推理生成多视角一致的2D标签。
AI.result: 在KITTI-360数据集上，该方法在准确率和多视角一致性指标上优于现有标签转移方法。
AI.conclusion: Panoptic NeRF通过3D-2D联合优化有效解决标签模糊问题，生成的多视角一致标签适用于复杂城市场景分割。

authors_text: Jingqun Tang,Wenqing Zhang,Hongye Liu,MingKun Yang,Bo Jiang,Guanglong Hu,Xiang Bai
title: Few Could Be Better Than All: Feature Sampling and Grouping for Scene Text Detection
title_zh: 少数胜过一切：用于场景文本检测的特征采样和分组
abstract: Recently, transformer-based methods have achieved promising progresses in object detection, as they can eliminate the post-processes like NMS and enrich the deep representations. However, these methods cannot well cope with scene text due to its extreme variance of scales and aspect ratios. In this paper, we present a simple yet effective transformer-based architecture for scene text detection. Different from previous approaches that learn robust deep representations of scene text in a holistic manner, our method performs scene text detection based on a few representative features, which avoids the disturbance by background and reduces the computational cost. Specifically, we first select a few representative features at all scales that are highly relevant to foreground text. Then, we adopt a transformer for modeling the relationship of the sampled features, which effectively divides them into reasonable groups. As each feature group corresponds to a text instance, its bounding box can be easily obtained without any post-processing operation. Using the basic feature pyramid network for feature extraction, our method consistently achieves state-of-the-art results on several popular datasets for scene text detection.
summary: Recently, transformer-based methods have achieved promising progresses in object detection, as they can eliminate the post-processes like NMS and enrich the deep representations. However, these methods cannot well cope with scene text due to its extreme variance of scales and aspect ratios. In this paper, we present a simple yet effective transformer-based architecture for scene text detection. Different from previous approaches that learn robust deep representations of scene text in a holistic manner, our method performs scene text detection based on a few representative features, which avoids the disturbance by background and reduces the computational cost. Specifically, we first select a few representative features at all scales that are highly relevant to foreground text. Then, we adopt a transformer for modeling the relationship of the sampled features, which effectively divides them into reasonable groups. As each feature group corresponds to a text instance, its bounding box can be easily obtained without any post-processing operation. Using the basic feature pyramid network for feature extraction, our method consistently achieves state-of-the-art results on several popular datasets for scene text detection.
abstract_zh: 最近，基于 Transformer 的方法在目标检测方面取得了有希望的进展，因为它们可以消除 NMS 等后处理并丰富深度表示。然而，由于场景文本的尺度和长宽比变化极大，这些方法不能很好地处理场景文本。在本文中，我们提出了一种简单而有效的基于变压器的场景文本检测架构。与以前以整体方式学习场景文本的鲁棒深度表示的方法不同，我们的方法基于一些代表性特征进行场景文本检测，这避免了背景的干扰并降低了计算成本。具体来说，我们首先选择一些与前景文本高度相关的所有尺度的代表性特征。然后，我们采用变压器对采样特征的关系进行建模，有效地将它们分为合理的组。由于每个特征组对应一个文本实例，因此无需任何后处理操作即可轻松获得其边界框。使用基本特征金字塔网络进行特征提取，我们的方法在几个流行的场景文本检测数据集上始终取得了最先进的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于Transformer的场景文本检测方法，通过特征采样与分组实现高效检测。
AI.motivation: 现有Transformer方法在场景文本检测中因文本尺度和长宽比变化大而表现不佳，且存在背景干扰和计算成本高的问题。
AI.method: 首先在全尺度中选取与文本高度相关的代表性特征，再通过Transformer建模特征间关系进行分组，每组对应一个文本实例并直接生成边界框。
AI.result: 在多个主流场景文本检测数据集上取得最先进性能，且无需后处理操作。
AI.conclusion: 通过聚焦代表性特征与分组策略，该方法在保持检测精度的同时显著降低了计算复杂度。

authors_text: Morris Gu,Elizabeth Croft,Akansel Cosgun
title: AR Point&Click: An Interface for Setting Robot Navigation Goals
title_zh: AR Point&Click：用于设置机器人导航目标的界面
comment: Accepted at ICSR 2022 "14th International Conference on Social Robotics", 6 Pages, 5 Figures, 4 Tables
comments: Accepted at ICSR 2022 "14th International Conference on Social Robotics", 6 Pages, 5 Figures, 4 Tables
abstract: This paper considers the problem of designating navigation goal locations for interactive mobile robots. We propose a point-and-click interface, implemented with an Augmented Reality (AR) headset. The cameras on the AR headset are used to detect natural pointing gestures performed by the user. The selected goal is visualized through the AR headset, allowing the users to adjust the goal location if desired. We conduct a user study in which participants set consecutive navigation goals for the robot using three different interfaces: AR Point & Click, Person Following and Tablet (birdeye map view). Results show that the proposed AR Point&Click interface improved the perceived accuracy, efficiency and reduced mental load compared to the baseline tablet interface, and it performed on-par to the Person Following method. These results show that the AR Point\&Click is a feasible interaction model for setting navigation goals.
summary: This paper considers the problem of designating navigation goal locations for interactive mobile robots. We propose a point-and-click interface, implemented with an Augmented Reality (AR) headset. The cameras on the AR headset are used to detect natural pointing gestures performed by the user. The selected goal is visualized through the AR headset, allowing the users to adjust the goal location if desired. We conduct a user study in which participants set consecutive navigation goals for the robot using three different interfaces: AR Point & Click, Person Following and Tablet (birdeye map view). Results show that the proposed AR Point&Click interface improved the perceived accuracy, efficiency and reduced mental load compared to the baseline tablet interface, and it performed on-par to the Person Following method. These results show that the AR Point\&Click is a feasible interaction model for setting navigation goals.
abstract_zh: 本文考虑了为交互式移动机器人指定导航目标位置的问题。我们提出了一个点击式界面，通过增强现实 (AR) 耳机实现。 AR 耳机上的摄像头用于检测用户执行的自然指向手势。所选目标通过 AR 耳机可视化，允许用户根据需要调整目标位置。我们进行了一项用户研究，参与者使用三种不同的界面为机器人设置连续的导航目标：AR Point & Click、人员跟踪和平板电脑（鸟瞰图视图）。结果表明，与基线平板电脑界面相比，所提出的 AR Point&Click 界面提高了感知准确性、效率并减少了心理负担，并且其性能与人员跟踪方法相当。这些结果表明，AR Point\&Click 是设置导航目标的可行交互模型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于增强现实（AR）的点按界面，用于为交互式移动机器人设置导航目标。
AI.motivation: 传统导航目标设置方法（如平板地图视图）存在准确性不足和认知负担高的问题，需探索更直观高效的交互方式。
AI.method: 通过AR头显的摄像头检测用户自然指向手势，实时可视化目标位置并允许调整，对比测试AR点按、人工跟随和平板三种界面。
AI.result: AR点按界面相比平板界面显著提升感知准确性与效率并降低认知负荷，且性能与人工跟随方法相当。
AI.conclusion: AR点按界面为机器人导航目标设置提供了可行的交互模型，兼具效率与直观性。

method: 通过AR头显的摄像头检测用户自然指向手势，实时可视化目标位置并允许调整，对比测试AR点按、人工跟随和平板三种界面。
result: AR点按界面相比平板界面显著提升感知准确性与效率并降低认知负荷，且性能与人工跟随方法相当。
conclusion: AR点按界面为机器人导航目标设置提供了可行的交互模型，兼具效率与直观性。
search_text: AR Point&Click: An Interface for Setting Robot Navigation Goals AR Point&Click：用于设置机器人导航目标的界面 This paper considers the problem of designating navigation goal locations for interactive mobile robots. We propose a point-and-click interface, implemented with an Augmented Reality (AR) headset. The cameras on the AR headset are used to detect natural pointing gestures performed by the user. The selected goal is visualized through the AR headset, allowing the users to adjust the goal location if desired. We conduct a user study in which participants set consecutive navigation goals for the robot using three different interfaces: AR Point & Click, Person Following and Tablet (birdeye map view). Results show that the proposed AR Point&Click interface improved the perceived accuracy, efficiency and reduced mental load compared to the baseline tablet interface, and it performed on-par to the Person Following method. These results show that the AR Point\&Click is a feasible interaction model for setting navigation goals. 本文考虑了为交互式移动机器人指定导航目标位置的问题。我们提出了一个点击式界面，通过增强现实 (AR) 耳机实现。 AR 耳机上的摄像头用于检测用户执行的自然指向手势。所选目标通过 AR 耳机可视化，允许用户根据需要调整目标位置。我们进行了一项用户研究，参与者使用三种不同的界面为机器人设置连续的导航目标：AR Point & Click、人员跟踪和平板电脑（鸟瞰图视图）。结果表明，与基线平板电脑界面相比，所提出的 AR Point&Click 界面提高了感知准确性、效率并减少了心理负担，并且其性能与人员跟踪方法相当。这些结果表明，AR Point\&Click 是设置导航目标的可行交互模型。 本文提出了一种基于增强现实（AR）的点按界面，用于为交互式移动机器人设置导航目标。 Morris Gu,Elizabeth Croft,Akansel Cosgun cs.RO

authors_text: Tony C. W. Mok,Albert C. S. Chung
title: Affine Medical Image Registration with Coarse-to-Fine Vision Transformer
title_zh: 使用粗到细视觉转换器的仿射医学图像配准
abstract: Affine registration is indispensable in a comprehensive medical image registration pipeline. However, only a few studies focus on fast and robust affine registration algorithms. Most of these studies utilize convolutional neural networks (CNNs) to learn joint affine and non-parametric registration, while the standalone performance of the affine subnetwork is less explored. Moreover, existing CNN-based affine registration approaches focus either on the local misalignment or the global orientation and position of the input to predict the affine transformation matrix, which are sensitive to spatial initialization and exhibit limited generalizability apart from the training dataset. In this paper, we present a fast and robust learning-based algorithm, Coarse-to-Fine Vision Transformer (C2FViT), for 3D affine medical image registration. Our method naturally leverages the global connectivity and locality of the convolutional vision transformer and the multi-resolution strategy to learn the global affine registration. We evaluate our method on 3D brain atlas registration and template-matching normalization. Comprehensive results demonstrate that our method is superior to the existing CNNs-based affine registration methods in terms of registration accuracy, robustness and generalizability while preserving the runtime advantage of the learning-based methods. The source code is available at https://github.com/cwmok/C2FViT.
summary: Affine registration is indispensable in a comprehensive medical image registration pipeline. However, only a few studies focus on fast and robust affine registration algorithms. Most of these studies utilize convolutional neural networks (CNNs) to learn joint affine and non-parametric registration, while the standalone performance of the affine subnetwork is less explored. Moreover, existing CNN-based affine registration approaches focus either on the local misalignment or the global orientation and position of the input to predict the affine transformation matrix, which are sensitive to spatial initialization and exhibit limited generalizability apart from the training dataset. In this paper, we present a fast and robust learning-based algorithm, Coarse-to-Fine Vision Transformer (C2FViT), for 3D affine medical image registration. Our method naturally leverages the global connectivity and locality of the convolutional vision transformer and the multi-resolution strategy to learn the global affine registration. We evaluate our method on 3D brain atlas registration and template-matching normalization. Comprehensive results demonstrate that our method is superior to the existing CNNs-based affine registration methods in terms of registration accuracy, robustness and generalizability while preserving the runtime advantage of the learning-based methods. The source code is available at https://github.com/cwmok/C2FViT.
abstract_zh: 仿射配准在综合医学图像配准流程中是不可或缺的。然而，只有少数研究关注快速且鲁棒的仿射配准算法。这些研究大多数利用卷积神经网络（CNN）来学习联合仿射和非参数配准，而仿射子网络的独立性能却很少被探索。此外，现有的基于 CNN 的仿射配准方法要么关注输入的局部失准，要么关注输入的全局方向和位置来预测仿射变换矩阵，这些方法对空间初始化敏感，并且除了训练数据集之外，表现出有限的通用性。在本文中，我们提出了一种快速且稳健的基于学习的算法，即粗到细视觉变换器 (C2FViT)，用于 3D 仿射医学图像配准。我们的方法自然地利用卷积视觉变换器的全局连接性和局部性以及多分辨率策略来学习全局仿射配准。我们评估了 3D 脑图谱注册和模板匹配标准化的方法。综合结果表明，我们的方法在配准精度、鲁棒性和泛化性方面优于现有的基于 CNN 的仿射配准方法，同时保留了基于学习的方法的运行时优势。源代码可在 https://github.com/cwmok/C2FViT 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于粗到细视觉Transformer（C2FViT）的快速且鲁棒的3D医学图像仿射配准算法。
AI.motivation: 现有基于卷积神经网络（CNN）的仿射配准方法在局部错位或全局方向位置预测上存在敏感性，且泛化能力有限，缺乏对仿射子网络独立性能的探索。
AI.method: 利用视觉Transformer的全局连接性和局部性，结合多分辨率策略，设计粗到细的C2FViT方法以学习全局仿射配准。
AI.result: 在3D脑图谱配准和模板匹配归一化任务中，C2FViT在配准精度、鲁棒性和泛化能力上优于现有CNN方法，同时保持学习方法的运行效率优势。
AI.conclusion: C2FViT为医学图像配准提供了更优的解决方案，验证了视觉Transformer在仿射配准任务中的有效性。

authors_text: Chao Wu,Wenhang Ge,Ancong Wu,Xiaobin Chang
title: Camera-Conditioned Stable Feature Generation for Isolated Camera Supervised Person Re-IDentification
title_zh: 用于孤立摄像机监督人员重新识别的摄像机条件稳定特征生成
abstract: To learn camera-view invariant features for person Re-IDentification (Re-ID), the cross-camera image pairs of each person play an important role. However, such cross-view training samples could be unavailable under the ISolated Camera Supervised (ISCS) setting, e.g., a surveillance system deployed across distant scenes. To handle this challenging problem, a new pipeline is introduced by synthesizing the cross-camera samples in the feature space for model training. Specifically, the feature encoder and generator are end-to-end optimized under a novel method, Camera-Conditioned Stable Feature Generation (CCSFG). Its joint learning procedure raises concern on the stability of generative model training. Therefore, a new feature generator, $σ$-Regularized Conditional Variational Autoencoder ($σ$-Reg.~CVAE), is proposed with theoretical and experimental analysis on its robustness. Extensive experiments on two ISCS person Re-ID datasets demonstrate the superiority of our CCSFG to the competitors.
summary: To learn camera-view invariant features for person Re-IDentification (Re-ID), the cross-camera image pairs of each person play an important role. However, such cross-view training samples could be unavailable under the ISolated Camera Supervised (ISCS) setting, e.g., a surveillance system deployed across distant scenes. To handle this challenging problem, a new pipeline is introduced by synthesizing the cross-camera samples in the feature space for model training. Specifically, the feature encoder and generator are end-to-end optimized under a novel method, Camera-Conditioned Stable Feature Generation (CCSFG). Its joint learning procedure raises concern on the stability of generative model training. Therefore, a new feature generator, $σ$-Regularized Conditional Variational Autoencoder ($σ$-Reg.~CVAE), is proposed with theoretical and experimental analysis on its robustness. Extensive experiments on two ISCS person Re-ID datasets demonstrate the superiority of our CCSFG to the competitors.
abstract_zh: 为了学习用于人员重新识别（Re-ID）的摄像机视图不变特征，每个人的跨摄像机图像对发挥着重要作用。然而，这种跨视图训练样本在独立摄像机监督（ISCS）设置下可能不可用，例如跨远距离场景部署的监控系统。为了解决这个具有挑战性的问题，通过在特征空间中合成跨相机样本来进行模型训练，引入了一种新的流程。具体来说，特征编码器和生成器在相机条件稳定特征生成（CCSFG）这一新颖方法下进行了端到端优化。其联合学习过程引起了人们对生成模型训练稳定性的担忧。因此，提出了一种新的特征生成器$σ$-Regularized Conditional Variational Autoencoder ($σ$-Reg.~CVAE)，并对其鲁棒性进行了理论和实验分析。对两个 ISCS 人员 Re-ID 数据集的广泛实验证明了我们的 CCSFG 相对于竞争对手的优越性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种在孤立摄像头监督（ISCS）设置下生成跨摄像头样本特征的稳定方法，以解决跨摄像头人员重识别（Re-ID）问题。
AI.motivation: 传统跨摄像头人员重识别依赖于跨摄像头图像对，但在ISCS场景中这些样本可能不可用，导致模型性能下降。
AI.method: 提出Camera-Conditioned Stable Feature Generation（CCSFG）框架，结合σ-正则化条件变分自编码器（σ-Reg. CVAE）生成稳定特征，通过端到端优化解决生成模型训练稳定性问题。
AI.result: 在两个ISCS人员重识别数据集上实验表明，该方法优于现有竞争算法。
AI.conclusion: CCSFG通过特征空间合成跨摄像头样本，有效解决了ISCS场景下的人员重识别挑战。

authors_text: Shoukang Hu,Ruochen Wang,Lanqing Hong,Zhenguo Li,Cho-Jui Hsieh,Jiashi Feng
title: Generalizing Few-Shot NAS with Gradient Matching
title_zh: 使用梯度匹配推广少样本 NAS
abstract: Efficient performance estimation of architectures drawn from large search spaces is essential to Neural Architecture Search. One-Shot methods tackle this challenge by training one supernet to approximate the performance of every architecture in the search space via weight-sharing, thereby drastically reducing the search cost. However, due to coupled optimization between child architectures caused by weight-sharing, One-Shot supernet's performance estimation could be inaccurate, leading to degraded search outcomes. To address this issue, Few-Shot NAS reduces the level of weight-sharing by splitting the One-Shot supernet into multiple separated sub-supernets via edge-wise (layer-wise) exhaustive partitioning. Since each partition of the supernet is not equally important, it necessitates the design of a more effective splitting criterion. In this work, we propose a gradient matching score (GM) that leverages gradient information at the shared weight for making informed splitting decisions. Intuitively, gradients from different child models can be used to identify whether they agree on how to update the shared modules, and subsequently to decide if they should share the same weight. Compared with exhaustive partitioning, the proposed criterion significantly reduces the branching factor per edge. This allows us to split more edges (layers) for a given budget, resulting in substantially improved performance as NAS search spaces usually include dozens of edges (layers). Extensive empirical evaluations of the proposed method on a wide range of search spaces (NASBench-201, DARTS, MobileNet Space), datasets (cifar10, cifar100, ImageNet) and search algorithms (DARTS, SNAS, RSPS, ProxylessNAS, OFA) demonstrate that it significantly outperforms its Few-Shot counterparts while surpassing previous comparable methods in terms of the accuracy of derived architectures.
summary: Efficient performance estimation of architectures drawn from large search spaces is essential to Neural Architecture Search. One-Shot methods tackle this challenge by training one supernet to approximate the performance of every architecture in the search space via weight-sharing, thereby drastically reducing the search cost. However, due to coupled optimization between child architectures caused by weight-sharing, One-Shot supernet's performance estimation could be inaccurate, leading to degraded search outcomes. To address this issue, Few-Shot NAS reduces the level of weight-sharing by splitting the One-Shot supernet into multiple separated sub-supernets via edge-wise (layer-wise) exhaustive partitioning. Since each partition of the supernet is not equally important, it necessitates the design of a more effective splitting criterion. In this work, we propose a gradient matching score (GM) that leverages gradient information at the shared weight for making informed splitting decisions. Intuitively, gradients from different child models can be used to identify whether they agree on how to update the shared modules, and subsequently to decide if they should share the same weight. Compared with exhaustive partitioning, the proposed criterion significantly reduces the branching factor per edge. This allows us to split more edges (layers) for a given budget, resulting in substantially improved performance as NAS search spaces usually include dozens of edges (layers). Extensive empirical evaluations of the proposed method on a wide range of search spaces (NASBench-201, DARTS, MobileNet Space), datasets (cifar10, cifar100, ImageNet) and search algorithms (DARTS, SNAS, RSPS, ProxylessNAS, OFA) demonstrate that it significantly outperforms its Few-Shot counterparts while surpassing previous comparable methods in terms of the accuracy of derived architectures.
abstract_zh: 从大型搜索空间中提取的架构的高效性能估计对于神经架构搜索至关重要。 One-Shot 方法通过训练一个超级网络来通过权重共享来近似搜索空间中每个架构的性能，从而解决这一挑战，从而大大降低搜索成本。然而，由于权重共享导致子架构之间的耦合优化，One-Shot 超网的性能估计可能不准确，导致搜索结果下降。为了解决这个问题，Few-Shot NAS 通过边缘（逐层）穷举分区将 One-Shot 超网分成多个独立的子超网，从而降低了权重共享的级别。由于超网的每个划分并不同等重要，因此需要设计更有效的划分准则。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种梯度匹配分数（GM），它利用共享权重的梯度信息来做出明智的分裂决策。直观上，来自不同子模型的梯度可用于识别它们是否同意如何更新共享模块，并随后决定它们是否应该共享相同的权重。与穷举划分相比，所提出的标准显着减少了每条边的分支因子。这使我们能够在给定的预算下分割更多的边（层），从而显着提高性能，因为 NAS 搜索空间通常包含数十个边（层）。对所提出的方法在各种搜索空间（NASBench-201、DARTS、MobileNet Space）、数据集（cifar10、cifar100、ImageNet）和搜索算法（DARTS、SNAS、RSPS、ProxylessNAS、OFA）上进行的广泛实证评估表明，它显着优于其Few-Shot同类方法，同时在派生架构的准确性方面超越了以前的同类方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于梯度匹配的少样本神经网络架构搜索（Few-Shot NAS）方法，通过改进超网分割策略提升搜索效率与准确性。
AI.motivation: 传统One-Shot NAS因权重共享导致的优化耦合问题，使得子网络性能估计不准确，而现有少样本方法依赖耗时的穷举分割，难以平衡搜索开销与效果。
AI.method: 设计梯度匹配得分（GM），利用共享权重处的梯度信息判断子模型对共享模块更新的一致性，据此动态决定权重分割策略，显著降低每层分支因子。
AI.result: 在NASBench-201、DARTS等多搜索空间及ImageNet等数据集上，该方法在保持较低计算成本的同时，优于现有少样本NAS方法及可比基准的架构准确性。
AI.conclusion: 梯度匹配策略有效解决了少样本NAS中的分割决策难题，为高效探索大规模搜索空间提供了新思路。

authors_text: Fangyuan Wang,Bo Xu
title: Shifted Chunk Encoder for Transformer Based Streaming End-to-End ASR
title_zh: 用于基于 Transformer 的流式传输端到端 ASR 的移位块编码器
comment: This paper has been accepted by iconip 2022, update the latest version
comments: This paper has been accepted by iconip 2022, update the latest version
abstract: Currently, there are mainly three kinds of Transformer encoder based streaming End to End (E2E) Automatic Speech Recognition (ASR) approaches, namely time-restricted methods, chunk-wise methods, and memory-based methods. Generally, all of them have limitations in aspects of linear computational complexity, global context modeling, and parallel training. In this work, we aim to build a model to take all these three advantages for streaming Transformer ASR. Particularly, we propose a shifted chunk mechanism for the chunk-wise Transformer which provides cross-chunk connections between chunks. Therefore, the global context modeling ability of chunk-wise models can be significantly enhanced while all the original merits inherited. We integrate this scheme with the chunk-wise Transformer and Conformer, and identify them as SChunk-Transformer and SChunk-Conformer, respectively. Experiments on AISHELL-1 show that the SChunk-Transformer and SChunk-Conformer can respectively achieve CER 6.43% and 5.77%. And the linear complexity makes them possible to train with large batches and infer more efficiently. Our models can significantly outperform their conventional chunk-wise counterparts, while being competitive, with only 0.22 absolute CER drop, when compared with U2 which has quadratic complexity. A better CER can be achieved if compared with existing chunk-wise or memory-based methods, such as HS-DACS and MMA. Code is released.
summary: Currently, there are mainly three kinds of Transformer encoder based streaming End to End (E2E) Automatic Speech Recognition (ASR) approaches, namely time-restricted methods, chunk-wise methods, and memory-based methods. Generally, all of them have limitations in aspects of linear computational complexity, global context modeling, and parallel training. In this work, we aim to build a model to take all these three advantages for streaming Transformer ASR. Particularly, we propose a shifted chunk mechanism for the chunk-wise Transformer which provides cross-chunk connections between chunks. Therefore, the global context modeling ability of chunk-wise models can be significantly enhanced while all the original merits inherited. We integrate this scheme with the chunk-wise Transformer and Conformer, and identify them as SChunk-Transformer and SChunk-Conformer, respectively. Experiments on AISHELL-1 show that the SChunk-Transformer and SChunk-Conformer can respectively achieve CER 6.43% and 5.77%. And the linear complexity makes them possible to train with large batches and infer more efficiently. Our models can significantly outperform their conventional chunk-wise counterparts, while being competitive, with only 0.22 absolute CER drop, when compared with U2 which has quadratic complexity. A better CER can be achieved if compared with existing chunk-wise or memory-based methods, such as HS-DACS and MMA. Code is released.
abstract_zh: 目前，基于 Transformer 编码器的流式端到端（E2E）自动语音识别（ASR）方法主要有三种，即时间限制方法、分块方法和基于内存的方法。一般来说，它们在线性计算复杂性、全局上下文建模和并行训练方面都有局限性。在这项工作中，我们的目标是建立一个模型，以利用流式传输 Transformer ASR 的所有这三个优势。特别是，我们为 chunk-wise Transformer 提出了一种转移块机制，它提供了块之间的跨块连接。因此，在继承所有原有优点的同时，chunk-wise模型的全局上下文建模能力可以得到显着增强。我们将该方案与 chunk-wise Transformer 和 Conformer 集成，并将它们分别称为 SChunk-Transformer 和 SChunk-Conformer。在AISHELL-1上的实验表明，SChunk-Transformer和SChunk-Conformer分别可以达到6.43%和5.77%的CER。线性复杂性使它们可以进行大批量训练并更有效地进行推理。我们的模型可以显着优于传统的分块模型，同时具有竞争力，与具有二次复杂度的 U2 相比，绝对 CER 仅下降 0.22。与现有的基于块或基于内存的方法（例如 HS-DACS 和 MMA）相比，可以获得更好的 CER。代码已发布。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种改进的流式端到端语音识别模型，通过引入移位分块编码机制增强全局上下文建模能力。
AI.motivation: 现有流式Transformer语音识别方法在计算复杂度、全局上下文建模和并行训练方面存在局限，需整合多种方法的优势。
AI.method: 设计移位分块机制实现跨块连接，在分块Transformer和Conformer中集成该机制，形成SChunk-Transformer和SChunk-Conformer模型。
AI.result: 在AISHELL-1数据集上分别达到6.43%和5.77%的字符错误率，优于传统分块方法且接近二次复杂度的U2模型。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法有效结合了多种技术优势，在保持线性复杂度的同时显著提升流式语音识别性能。

authors_text: Ishan Rajendrakumar Dave,Chen Chen,Mubarak Shah
title: SPAct: Self-supervised Privacy Preservation for Action Recognition
title_zh: SPAct：用于动作识别的自监督隐私保护
abstract: Visual private information leakage is an emerging key issue for the fast growing applications of video understanding like activity recognition. Existing approaches for mitigating privacy leakage in action recognition require privacy labels along with the action labels from the video dataset. However, annotating frames of video dataset for privacy labels is not feasible. Recent developments of self-supervised learning (SSL) have unleashed the untapped potential of the unlabeled data. For the first time, we present a novel training framework which removes privacy information from input video in a self-supervised manner without requiring privacy labels. Our training framework consists of three main components: anonymization function, self-supervised privacy removal branch, and action recognition branch. We train our framework using a minimax optimization strategy to minimize the action recognition cost function and maximize the privacy cost function through a contrastive self-supervised loss. Employing existing protocols of known-action and privacy attributes, our framework achieves a competitive action-privacy trade-off to the existing state-of-the-art supervised methods. In addition, we introduce a new protocol to evaluate the generalization of learned the anonymization function to novel-action and privacy attributes and show that our self-supervised framework outperforms existing supervised methods. Code available at: https://github.com/DAVEISHAN/SPAct
summary: Visual private information leakage is an emerging key issue for the fast growing applications of video understanding like activity recognition. Existing approaches for mitigating privacy leakage in action recognition require privacy labels along with the action labels from the video dataset. However, annotating frames of video dataset for privacy labels is not feasible. Recent developments of self-supervised learning (SSL) have unleashed the untapped potential of the unlabeled data. For the first time, we present a novel training framework which removes privacy information from input video in a self-supervised manner without requiring privacy labels. Our training framework consists of three main components: anonymization function, self-supervised privacy removal branch, and action recognition branch. We train our framework using a minimax optimization strategy to minimize the action recognition cost function and maximize the privacy cost function through a contrastive self-supervised loss. Employing existing protocols of known-action and privacy attributes, our framework achieves a competitive action-privacy trade-off to the existing state-of-the-art supervised methods. In addition, we introduce a new protocol to evaluate the generalization of learned the anonymization function to novel-action and privacy attributes and show that our self-supervised framework outperforms existing supervised methods. Code available at: https://github.com/DAVEISHAN/SPAct
abstract_zh: 对于活动识别等快速增长的视频理解应用来说，视觉隐私信息泄露是一个新兴的关键问题。用于减轻动作识别中的隐私泄漏的现有方法需要隐私标签以及来自视频数据集的动作标签。然而，为隐私标签注释视频数据集的帧是不可行的。自监督学习（SSL）的最新发展释放了未标记数据的未开发潜力。我们首次提出了一种新颖的训练框架，该框架以自我监督的方式从输入视频中删除隐私信息，而不需要隐私标签。我们的训练框架由三个主要部分组成：匿名功能、自监督隐私删除分支和动作识别分支。我们使用极小极大优化策略来训练我们的框架，以最小化动作识别成本函数，并通过对比自监督损失最大化隐私成本函数。利用已知行为和隐私属性的现有协议，我们的框架实现了与现有最​​先进的监督方法的竞争性行为隐私权衡。此外，我们引入了一种新协议来评估学习到的匿名化函数对新动作和隐私属性的泛化，并表明我们的自监督框架优于现有的监督方法。代码位于：https://github.com/DAVEISHAN/SPAct

AI.tldr: 本文提出SPAct框架，在无需隐私标签的情况下，通过自监督学习实现动作识别中的隐私保护。
AI.motivation: 现有隐私保护方法依赖隐私标签标注，但视频数据隐私标注成本高且不可行，需探索无需标签的自监督解决方案。
AI.method: 设计包含匿名化函数、自监督隐私移除分支和动作识别分支的框架，通过对比自监督损失函数进行最小最大化优化，实现隐私信息去除与动作识别的平衡。
AI.result: 在现有协议下达到与监督方法相当的动作-隐私权衡，并通过新协议验证了框架在新型动作和隐私属性上的泛化能力优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: SPAct通过自监督学习有效解决了隐私保护与动作识别的矛盾，为无标签场景下的隐私保护提供了新思路。

authors_text: Renu Sharma,Arun Ross
title: Periocular Biometrics and its Relevance to Partially Masked Faces: A Survey
title_zh: 眼周生物识别技术及其与部分蒙面面孔的相关性：一项调查
abstract: The performance of face recognition systems can be negatively impacted in the presence of masks and other types of facial coverings that have become prevalent due to the COVID-19 pandemic. In such cases, the periocular region of the human face becomes an important biometric cue. In this article, we present a detailed review of periocular biometrics. We first examine the various face and periocular techniques specially designed to recognize humans wearing a face mask. Then, we review different aspects of periocular biometrics: (a) the anatomical cues present in the periocular region useful for recognition, (b) the various feature extraction and matching techniques developed, (c) recognition across different spectra, (d) fusion with other biometric modalities (face or iris), (e) recognition on mobile devices, (f) its usefulness in other applications, (g) periocular datasets, and (h) competitions organized for evaluating the efficacy of this biometric modality. Finally, we discuss various challenges and future directions in the field of periocular biometrics.
summary: The performance of face recognition systems can be negatively impacted in the presence of masks and other types of facial coverings that have become prevalent due to the COVID-19 pandemic. In such cases, the periocular region of the human face becomes an important biometric cue. In this article, we present a detailed review of periocular biometrics. We first examine the various face and periocular techniques specially designed to recognize humans wearing a face mask. Then, we review different aspects of periocular biometrics: (a) the anatomical cues present in the periocular region useful for recognition, (b) the various feature extraction and matching techniques developed, (c) recognition across different spectra, (d) fusion with other biometric modalities (face or iris), (e) recognition on mobile devices, (f) its usefulness in other applications, (g) periocular datasets, and (h) competitions organized for evaluating the efficacy of this biometric modality. Finally, we discuss various challenges and future directions in the field of periocular biometrics.
abstract_zh: 由于 COVID-19 大流行而流行的口罩和其他类型的面部遮盖物的存在，人脸识别系统的性能可能会受到负面影响。在这种情况下，人脸的眼周区域成为重要的生物识别线索。在本文中，我们详细回顾了眼周生物识别技术。我们首先检查专门用于识别戴口罩的人的各种面部和眼周技术。然后，我们回顾眼周生物识别的不同方面：（a）眼周区域中存在的可用于识别的解剖线索，（b）开发的各种特征提取和匹配技术，（c）跨不同光谱的识别，（d）与其他生物识别模式（面部或虹膜）融合，（e）移动设备上的识别，（f）其在其他应用中的有用性，（g）眼周数据集，以及（h）为评估该生物识别功效而组织的竞赛情态。最后，我们讨论了眼周生物识别领域的各种挑战和未来方向。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了围ocular（眼周）生物特征识别技术及其在部分遮掩面部识别中的应用，分析了现有技术、数据集和挑战。
AI.motivation: 新冠疫情导致面部遮挡（如口罩）普遍，传统面部识别系统性能下降，需寻找替代生物特征（如围ocular区域）以提升识别准确性。
AI.method: 系统性回顾了围ocular生物特征识别的多个方面，包括解剖特征、特征提取与匹配技术、多光谱识别、与其他生物特征（人脸/虹膜）融合、移动端应用、数据集及竞赛评估。
AI.result: 总结了围ocular识别的关键技术、现有数据集和竞赛成果，明确了当前技术局限性及未来研究方向。
AI.conclusion: 围ocular生物特征为遮挡面部识别提供了有效解决方案，但仍需在跨模态融合、多光谱技术及实际应用鲁棒性方面进一步研究。
