authors_text: Xiaoqing Guo,Jie Liu,Tongliang Liu,Yixuan Yuan
title: SimT: Handling Open-set Noise for Domain Adaptive Semantic Segmentation
title_zh: SimT：处理域自适应语义分割的开放集噪声
abstract: This paper studies a practical domain adaptive (DA) semantic segmentation problem where only pseudo-labeled target data is accessible through a black-box model. Due to the domain gap and label shift between two domains, pseudo-labeled target data contains mixed closed-set and open-set label noises. In this paper, we propose a simplex noise transition matrix (SimT) to model the mixed noise distributions in DA semantic segmentation and formulate the problem as estimation of SimT. By exploiting computational geometry analysis and properties of segmentation, we design three complementary regularizers, i.e. volume regularization, anchor guidance, convex guarantee, to approximate the true SimT. Specifically, volume regularization minimizes the volume of simplex formed by rows of the non-square SimT, which ensures outputs of segmentation model to fit into the ground truth label distribution. To compensate for the lack of open-set knowledge, anchor guidance and convex guarantee are devised to facilitate the modeling of open-set noise distribution and enhance the discriminative feature learning among closed-set and open-set classes. The estimated SimT is further utilized to correct noise issues in pseudo labels and promote the generalization ability of segmentation model on target domain data. Extensive experimental results demonstrate that the proposed SimT can be flexibly plugged into existing DA methods to boost the performance. The source code is available at https://github.com/CityU-AIM-Group/SimT.
summary: This paper studies a practical domain adaptive (DA) semantic segmentation problem where only pseudo-labeled target data is accessible through a black-box model. Due to the domain gap and label shift between two domains, pseudo-labeled target data contains mixed closed-set and open-set label noises. In this paper, we propose a simplex noise transition matrix (SimT) to model the mixed noise distributions in DA semantic segmentation and formulate the problem as estimation of SimT. By exploiting computational geometry analysis and properties of segmentation, we design three complementary regularizers, i.e. volume regularization, anchor guidance, convex guarantee, to approximate the true SimT. Specifically, volume regularization minimizes the volume of simplex formed by rows of the non-square SimT, which ensures outputs of segmentation model to fit into the ground truth label distribution. To compensate for the lack of open-set knowledge, anchor guidance and convex guarantee are devised to facilitate the modeling of open-set noise distribution and enhance the discriminative feature learning among closed-set and open-set classes. The estimated SimT is further utilized to correct noise issues in pseudo labels and promote the generalization ability of segmentation model on target domain data. Extensive experimental results demonstrate that the proposed SimT can be flexibly plugged into existing DA methods to boost the performance. The source code is available at https://github.com/CityU-AIM-Group/SimT.
abstract_zh: 本文研究了一个实用的领域自适应（DA）语义分割问题，其中只能通过黑盒模型访问伪标记的目标数据。由于两个域之间的域间隙和标签偏移，伪标记目标数据包含混合的封闭集和开放集标签噪声。在本文中，我们提出了一个单纯形噪声转移矩阵（SimT）来对 DA 语义分割中的混合噪声分布进行建模，并将问题表述为 SimT 的估计。通过利用计算几何分析和分割特性，我们设计了三个互补的正则化器，即体积正则化、锚引导、凸保证，以逼近真实的 SimT。具体来说，体积正则化最小化了由非方形 SimT 的行形成的单纯形的体积，这确保了分割模型的输出适合地面真实标签分布。为了弥补开放集知识的缺乏，设计了锚引导和凸保证来促进开放集噪声分布的建模并增强封闭集和开放集类之间的判别特征学习。估计的 SimT 进一步用于纠正伪标签中的噪声问题，并提高分割模型对目标域数据的泛化能力。大量的实验结果表明，所提出的 SimT 可以灵活地插入现有的 DA 方法中以提高性能。源代码可在 https://github.com/CityU-AIM-Group/SimT 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SimT方法，解决领域自适应语义分割中目标域伪标签数据存在的封闭集和开放集混合噪声问题。
AI.motivation: 现有领域自适应方法难以有效处理目标域伪标签中的开放集噪声，导致分割性能下降，需建模混合噪声分布以提升模型泛化能力。
AI.method: 设计简单形噪声转移矩阵（SimT）建模混合噪声，结合体积正则化（约束输出分布）、锚点引导（辅助开放集建模）和凸性保证（增强特征判别性）三类正则化项估计SimT，并利用其修正伪标签噪声。
AI.result: 实验表明SimT可灵活集成至现有领域自适应方法中，显著提升目标域分割性能，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: SimT通过精确建模混合噪声分布并修正伪标签，有效解决了开放集噪声对领域自适应语义分割的干扰问题。

search_text: SimT: Handling Open-set Noise for Domain Adaptive Semantic Segmentation SimT：处理域自适应语义分割的开放集噪声 This paper studies a practical domain adaptive (DA) semantic segmentation problem where only pseudo-labeled target data is accessible through a black-box model. Due to the domain gap and label shift between two domains, pseudo-labeled target data contains mixed closed-set and open-set label noises. In this paper, we propose a simplex noise transition matrix (SimT) to model the mixed noise distributions in DA semantic segmentation and formulate the problem as estimation of SimT. By exploiting computational geometry analysis and properties of segmentation, we design three complementary regularizers, i.e. volume regularization, anchor guidance, convex guarantee, to approximate the true SimT. Specifically, volume regularization minimizes the volume of simplex formed by rows of the non-square SimT, which ensures outputs of segmentation model to fit into the ground truth label distribution. To compensate for the lack of open-set knowledge, anchor guidance and convex guarantee are devised to facilitate the modeling of open-set noise distribution and enhance the discriminative feature learning among closed-set and open-set classes. The estimated SimT is further utilized to correct noise issues in pseudo labels and promote the generalization ability of segmentation model on target domain data. Extensive experimental results demonstrate that the proposed SimT can be flexibly plugged into existing DA methods to boost the performance. The source code is available at https://github.com/CityU-AIM-Group/SimT. 本文研究了一个实用的领域自适应（DA）语义分割问题，其中只能通过黑盒模型访问伪标记的目标数据。由于两个域之间的域间隙和标签偏移，伪标记目标数据包含混合的封闭集和开放集标签噪声。在本文中，我们提出了一个单纯形噪声转移矩阵（SimT）来对 DA 语义分割中的混合噪声分布进行建模，并将问题表述为 SimT 的估计。通过利用计算几何分析和分割特性，我们设计了三个互补的正则化器，即体积正则化、锚引导、凸保证，以逼近真实的 SimT。具体来说，体积正则化最小化了由非方形 SimT 的行形成的单纯形的体积，这确保了分割模型的输出适合地面真实标签分布。为了弥补开放集知识的缺乏，设计了锚引导和凸保证来促进开放集噪声分布的建模并增强封闭集和开放集类之间的判别特征学习。估计的 SimT 进一步用于纠正伪标签中的噪声问题，并提高分割模型对目标域数据的泛化能力。大量的实验结果表明，所提出的 SimT 可以灵活地插入现有的 DA 方法中以提高性能。源代码可在 https://github.com/CityU-AIM-Group/SimT 获取。 本文提出SimT方法，解决领域自适应语义分割中目标域伪标签数据存在的封闭集和开放集混合噪声问题。 Xiaoqing Guo,Jie Liu,Tongliang Liu,Yixuan Yuan cs.CV

authors_text: Ping Zhou,Langqing Shi,Xiaoyang Liu,Jing Jin,Yuting Zhang,Junhui Hou
title: Light Field Depth Estimation via Stitched Epipolar Plane Images
title_zh: 通过缝合极平面图像进行光场深度估计
abstract: Depth estimation is a fundamental problem in light field processing. Epipolar-plane image (EPI)-based methods often encounter challenges such as low accuracy in slope computation due to discretization errors and limited angular resolution. Besides, existing methods perform well in most regions but struggle to produce sharp edges in occluded regions and resolve ambiguities in texture-less regions. To address these issues, we propose the concept of stitched-EPI (SEPI) to enhance slope computation. SEPI achieves this by shifting and concatenating lines from different EPIs that correspond to the same 3D point. Moreover, we introduce the half-SEPI algorithm, which focuses exclusively on the non-occluded portion of lines to handle occlusion. Additionally, we present a depth propagation strategy aimed at improving depth estimation in texture-less regions. This strategy involves determining the depth of such regions by progressing from the edges towards the interior, prioritizing accurate regions over coarse regions. Through extensive experimental evaluations and ablation studies, we validate the effectiveness of our proposed method. The results demonstrate its superior ability to generate more accurate and robust depth maps across all regions compared to state-of-the-art methods. The source code will be publicly available at https://github.com/PingZhou-LF/Light-Field-Depth-Estimation-Based-on-Stitched-EPIs.
summary: Depth estimation is a fundamental problem in light field processing. Epipolar-plane image (EPI)-based methods often encounter challenges such as low accuracy in slope computation due to discretization errors and limited angular resolution. Besides, existing methods perform well in most regions but struggle to produce sharp edges in occluded regions and resolve ambiguities in texture-less regions. To address these issues, we propose the concept of stitched-EPI (SEPI) to enhance slope computation. SEPI achieves this by shifting and concatenating lines from different EPIs that correspond to the same 3D point. Moreover, we introduce the half-SEPI algorithm, which focuses exclusively on the non-occluded portion of lines to handle occlusion. Additionally, we present a depth propagation strategy aimed at improving depth estimation in texture-less regions. This strategy involves determining the depth of such regions by progressing from the edges towards the interior, prioritizing accurate regions over coarse regions. Through extensive experimental evaluations and ablation studies, we validate the effectiveness of our proposed method. The results demonstrate its superior ability to generate more accurate and robust depth maps across all regions compared to state-of-the-art methods. The source code will be publicly available at https://github.com/PingZhou-LF/Light-Field-Depth-Estimation-Based-on-Stitched-EPIs.
abstract_zh: 深度估计是光场处理中的一个基本问题。基于对极平面图像（EPI）的方法经常遇到挑战，例如由于离散化误差和有限的角分辨率而导致斜率计算精度低。此外，现有方法在大多数区域中表现良好，但难以在遮挡区域中产生锐利边缘并解决无纹理区域中的模糊性。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了缝合 EPI (SEPI) 的概念来增强斜率计算。 SEPI 通过移动和连接来自对应于同一 3D 点的不同 EPI 的线来实现此目的。此外，我们引入了 half-SEPI 算法，该算法专门关注线的非遮挡部分来处理遮挡。此外，我们提出了一种深度传播策略，旨在改进无纹理区域的深度估计。该策略涉及通过从边缘向内部前进来确定这些区域的深度，优先考虑精确区域而不是粗糙区域。通过广泛的实验评估和消融研究，我们验证了我们提出的方法的有效性。结果表明，与最先进的方法相比，它具有在所有区域生成更准确、更稳健的深度图的卓越能力。源代码将在 https://github.com/PingZhou-LF/Light-Field-Depth-Estimation-Based-on-Stitched-EPIs 上公开提供。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于拼接视差平面图像（SEPI）的光场深度估计方法，以解决现有方法在精度和边缘处理上的不足。
AI.motivation: 现有基于视差平面图像（EPI）的深度估计方法存在离散化误差导致的精度问题，且难以处理遮挡区域和纹理缺失区域的深度估计。
AI.method: 提出拼接EPI（SEPI）方法，通过拼接不同EPI中对应同一3D点的线条以增强坡度计算；引入半SEPI算法专注于非遮挡区域，并设计深度传播策略从边缘向内推算纹理缺失区域的深度。
AI.result: 实验验证表明，该方法在所有区域（包括遮挡和纹理缺失区域）的深度图精度和鲁棒性均优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: SEPI方法通过改进坡度计算和区域特定策略，有效提升了光场深度估计的准确性与稳定性。

authors_text: Ashwin Khadke,Hartmut Geyer
title: Search Methods for Policy Decompositions
title_zh: 策略分解的搜索方法
abstract: Computing optimal control policies for complex dynamical systems requires approximation methods to remain computationally tractable. Several approximation methods have been developed to tackle this problem. However, these methods do not reason about the suboptimality induced in the resulting control policies due to these approximations. We introduced Policy Decomposition, an approximation method that provides a suboptimality estimate, in our earlier work. Policy decomposition proposes strategies to break an optimal control problem into lower-dimensional subproblems, whose optimal solutions are combined to build a control policy for the original system. However, the number of possible strategies to decompose a system scale quickly with the complexity of a system, posing a combinatorial challenge. In this work we investigate the use of Genetic Algorithm and Monte-Carlo Tree Search to alleviate this challenge. We identify decompositions for swing-up control of a 4 degree-of-freedom manipulator, balance control of a simplified biped, and hover control of a quadcopter.
summary: Computing optimal control policies for complex dynamical systems requires approximation methods to remain computationally tractable. Several approximation methods have been developed to tackle this problem. However, these methods do not reason about the suboptimality induced in the resulting control policies due to these approximations. We introduced Policy Decomposition, an approximation method that provides a suboptimality estimate, in our earlier work. Policy decomposition proposes strategies to break an optimal control problem into lower-dimensional subproblems, whose optimal solutions are combined to build a control policy for the original system. However, the number of possible strategies to decompose a system scale quickly with the complexity of a system, posing a combinatorial challenge. In this work we investigate the use of Genetic Algorithm and Monte-Carlo Tree Search to alleviate this challenge. We identify decompositions for swing-up control of a 4 degree-of-freedom manipulator, balance control of a simplified biped, and hover control of a quadcopter.
abstract_zh: 计算复杂动力系统的最优控制策略需要近似方法来保持计算上的易处理性。已经开发了几种近似方法来解决这个问题。然而，这些方法并没有推理出由于这些近似而导致的控制策略的次优性。我们在早期的工作中引入了策略分解，这是一种提供次优估计的近似方法。策略分解提出了将最优控制问题分解为低维子问题的策略，这些子问题的最优解被组合起来为原始系统构建控制策略。然而，分解系统的可能策略的数量随着系统的复杂性而快速增加，带来了组合挑战。在这项工作中，我们研究使用遗传算法和蒙特卡罗树搜索来缓解这一挑战。我们确定了 4 自由度操纵器的摆动控制、简化的两足动物的平衡控制以及四轴飞行器的悬停控制的分解。

AI.tldr: 本文研究使用遗传算法和蒙特卡洛树搜索来解决复杂动态系统中策略分解的组合挑战，以生成近似最优控制策略。
AI.motivation: 现有近似方法无法量化因分解导致的次优性，且分解策略数量随系统复杂度指数级增长，需寻找有效搜索方法。
AI.method: 提出结合遗传算法与蒙特卡洛树搜索的混合方法，用于高效探索策略分解空间并评估分解质量。
AI.result: 成功应用于四自由度机械臂摆动控制、简化双足机器人平衡控制及四旋翼飞行器悬停控制的分解策略搜索。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法能有效应对分解策略的组合爆炸问题，在实际复杂控制任务中验证了策略分解的可行性与实用性。

search_text: Search Methods for Policy Decompositions 策略分解的搜索方法 Computing optimal control policies for complex dynamical systems requires approximation methods to remain computationally tractable. Several approximation methods have been developed to tackle this problem. However, these methods do not reason about the suboptimality induced in the resulting control policies due to these approximations. We introduced Policy Decomposition, an approximation method that provides a suboptimality estimate, in our earlier work. Policy decomposition proposes strategies to break an optimal control problem into lower-dimensional subproblems, whose optimal solutions are combined to build a control policy for the original system. However, the number of possible strategies to decompose a system scale quickly with the complexity of a system, posing a combinatorial challenge. In this work we investigate the use of Genetic Algorithm and Monte-Carlo Tree Search to alleviate this challenge. We identify decompositions for swing-up control of a 4 degree-of-freedom manipulator, balance control of a simplified biped, and hover control of a quadcopter. 计算复杂动力系统的最优控制策略需要近似方法来保持计算上的易处理性。已经开发了几种近似方法来解决这个问题。然而，这些方法并没有推理出由于这些近似而导致的控制策略的次优性。我们在早期的工作中引入了策略分解，这是一种提供次优估计的近似方法。策略分解提出了将最优控制问题分解为低维子问题的策略，这些子问题的最优解被组合起来为原始系统构建控制策略。然而，分解系统的可能策略的数量随着系统的复杂性而快速增加，带来了组合挑战。在这项工作中，我们研究使用遗传算法和蒙特卡罗树搜索来缓解这一挑战。我们确定了 4 自由度操纵器的摆动控制、简化的两足动物的平衡控制以及四轴飞行器的悬停控制的分解。 本文研究使用遗传算法和蒙特卡洛树搜索来解决复杂动态系统中策略分解的组合挑战，以生成近似最优控制策略。 Ashwin Khadke,Hartmut Geyer cs.RO,eess.SY

authors_text: Zhiwu Zheng,Prakhar Kumar,Yenan Chen,Hsin Cheng,Sigurd Wagner,Minjie Chen,Naveen Verma,James C. Sturm
title: Model-Based Control of Planar Piezoelectric Inchworm Soft Robot for Crawling in Constrained Environments
title_zh: 基于模型的平面压电尺蠖软机器人在受限环境中爬行的控制
comment: Accepted to the 2022 IEEE 5th International Conference on Soft Robotics (RoboSoft). Project website: https://piezorobotcontroller.github.io/ Summary video: https://youtu.be/Md-Uo-pUaIs
comments: Accepted to the 2022 IEEE 5th International Conference on Soft Robotics (RoboSoft). Project website: https://piezorobotcontroller.github.io/ Summary video: https://youtu.be/Md-Uo-pUaIs
abstract: Soft robots have drawn significant attention recently for their ability to achieve rich shapes when interacting with complex environments. However, their elasticity and flexibility compared to rigid robots also pose significant challenges for precise and robust shape control in real-time. Motivated by their potential to operate in highly-constrained environments, as in search-and-rescue operations, this work addresses these challenges of soft robots by developing a model-based full-shape controller, validated and demonstrated by experiments. A five-actuator planar soft robot was constructed with planar piezoelectric layers bonded to a steel foil substrate, enabling inchworm-like motion. The controller uses a soft-body continuous model for shape planning and control, given target shapes and/or environmental constraints, such as crawling under overhead barriers or "roof" safety lines. An approach to background model calibrations is developed to address deviations of actual robot shape due to material parameter variations and drift. Full experimental shape control and optimal movement under a roof safety line are demonstrated, where the robot maximizes its speed within the overhead constraint. The mean-squared error between the measured and target shapes improves from ~0.05 cm$^{2}$ without calibration to ~0.01 cm$^{2}$ with calibration. Simulation-based validation is also performed with various different roof shapes.
summary: Soft robots have drawn significant attention recently for their ability to achieve rich shapes when interacting with complex environments. However, their elasticity and flexibility compared to rigid robots also pose significant challenges for precise and robust shape control in real-time. Motivated by their potential to operate in highly-constrained environments, as in search-and-rescue operations, this work addresses these challenges of soft robots by developing a model-based full-shape controller, validated and demonstrated by experiments. A five-actuator planar soft robot was constructed with planar piezoelectric layers bonded to a steel foil substrate, enabling inchworm-like motion. The controller uses a soft-body continuous model for shape planning and control, given target shapes and/or environmental constraints, such as crawling under overhead barriers or "roof" safety lines. An approach to background model calibrations is developed to address deviations of actual robot shape due to material parameter variations and drift. Full experimental shape control and optimal movement under a roof safety line are demonstrated, where the robot maximizes its speed within the overhead constraint. The mean-squared error between the measured and target shapes improves from ~0.05 cm$^{2}$ without calibration to ~0.01 cm$^{2}$ with calibration. Simulation-based validation is also performed with various different roof shapes.
abstract_zh: 软机器人最近因其在与复杂环境交互时实现丰富形状的能力而引起了广泛关注。然而，与刚性机器人相比，它们的弹性和灵活性也对实时精确和稳健的形状控制提出了重大挑战。受其在搜索和救援行动等高度受限环境中运行的潜力的启发，这项工作通过开发基于模型的全形状控制器来解决软机器人的这些挑战，并通过实验进行验证和演示。一个五驱动器平面软机器人由粘合到钢箔基板上的平面压电层构成，可实现尺蠖般的运动。控制器使用软体连续模型进行形状规划和控制，给定目标形状和/或环境约束，例如在高架障碍物或“屋顶”安全线下爬行。开发了一种背景模型校准方法，以解决由于材料参数变化和漂移而导致的实际机器人形状的偏差。演示了在屋顶安全线下的完整实验形状控制和最佳运动，其中机器人在头顶限制内最大化其速度。测量形状和目标形状之间的均方误差从无校准时的约 0.05 cm$^{2}$ 改善到经过校准后的约 0.01 cm$^{2}$。还对各种不同的屋顶形状进行基于模拟的验证。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于模型的平面压电软体机器人控制器，用于在受限环境中爬行。
AI.motivation: 软体机器人因其在复杂环境中的适应性而受到关注，但其弹性和灵活性也给实时精确控制带来了挑战，尤其是在受限环境如救援任务中。
AI.method: 研究开发了一种基于软体连续模型的全形状控制器，通过实验验证其效果。使用五驱动器平面软体机器人，结合压电层和钢箔基板，实现类似昆虫的爬行运动。
AI.result: 实验表明，经过校准后，测量形状与目标形状之间的均方误差从约0.05 cm²降低到约0.01 cm²，验证了控制器在不同屋顶形状下的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该研究展示了基于模型的控制器在受限环境中实现软体机器人精确形状控制和最优运动的潜力。

authors_text: Zhixue Wang,Yu Zhang,Lin Luo,Nan Wang
title: AnoDFDNet: A Deep Feature Difference Network for Anomaly Detection
title_zh: AnoDFDNet：用于异常检测的深度特征差异网络
abstract: This paper proposed a novel anomaly detection (AD) approach of High-speed Train images based on convolutional neural networks and the Vision Transformer. Different from previous AD works, in which anomalies are identified with a single image using classification, segmentation, or object detection methods, the proposed method detects abnormal difference between two images taken at different times of the same region. In other words, we cast anomaly detection problem with a single image into a difference detection problem with two images. The core idea of the proposed method is that the 'anomaly' usually represents an abnormal state instead of a specific object, and this state should be identified by a pair of images. In addition, we introduced a deep feature difference AD network (AnoDFDNet) which sufficiently explored the potential of the Vision Transformer and convolutional neural networks. To verify the effectiveness of the proposed AnoDFDNet, we collected three datasets, a difference dataset (Diff Dataset), a foreign body dataset (FB Dataset), and an oil leakage dataset (OL Dataset). Experimental results on above datasets demonstrate the superiority of proposed method. Source code are available at https://github.com/wangle53/AnoDFDNet.
summary: This paper proposed a novel anomaly detection (AD) approach of High-speed Train images based on convolutional neural networks and the Vision Transformer. Different from previous AD works, in which anomalies are identified with a single image using classification, segmentation, or object detection methods, the proposed method detects abnormal difference between two images taken at different times of the same region. In other words, we cast anomaly detection problem with a single image into a difference detection problem with two images. The core idea of the proposed method is that the 'anomaly' usually represents an abnormal state instead of a specific object, and this state should be identified by a pair of images. In addition, we introduced a deep feature difference AD network (AnoDFDNet) which sufficiently explored the potential of the Vision Transformer and convolutional neural networks. To verify the effectiveness of the proposed AnoDFDNet, we collected three datasets, a difference dataset (Diff Dataset), a foreign body dataset (FB Dataset), and an oil leakage dataset (OL Dataset). Experimental results on above datasets demonstrate the superiority of proposed method. Source code are available at https://github.com/wangle53/AnoDFDNet.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种基于卷积神经网络和视觉变换器的高速列车图像异常检测（AD）方法。与以前的 AD 工作不同，以前的 AD 工作使用分类、分割或对象检测方法来识别单个图像的异常，所提出的方法检测在同一区域的不同时间拍摄的两幅图像之间的异常差异。换句话说，我们将单个图像的异常检测问题转化为两个图像的差异检测问题。该方法的核心思想是“异常”通常代表一种异常状态而不是特定对象，并且这种状态应该通过一对图像来识别。此外，我们还引入了深度特征差异AD网络（AnoDFDNet），它充分挖掘了Vision Transformer和卷积神经网络的潜力。为了验证所提出的 AnoDFDNet 的有效性，我们收集了三个数据集：差异数据集（Diff Dataset）、异物数据集（FB Dataset）和漏油数据集（OL Dataset）。上述数据集上的实验结果证明了所提出方法的优越性。源代码可在 https://github.com/wangle53/AnoDFDNet 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于卷积神经网络和视觉Transformer的高速列车图像异常检测方法AnoDFDNet。
AI.motivation: 与以往使用单张图像进行分类、分割或目标检测来识别异常的方法不同，本文旨在通过比较同一区域在不同时间拍摄的两张图像之间的差异来检测异常。
AI.method: 本文引入了一种深度特征差异异常检测网络（AnoDFDNet），充分利用了视觉Transformer和卷积神经网络的潜力，通过比较两张图像的差异来识别异常。
AI.result: 在三个数据集（Diff Dataset、FB Dataset和OL Dataset）上的实验结果验证了所提出方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: AnoDFDNet在异常检测任务中表现出色，展示了其在高速列车图像检测中的优越性。

search_text: AnoDFDNet: A Deep Feature Difference Network for Anomaly Detection AnoDFDNet：用于异常检测的深度特征差异网络 This paper proposed a novel anomaly detection (AD) approach of High-speed Train images based on convolutional neural networks and the Vision Transformer. Different from previous AD works, in which anomalies are identified with a single image using classification, segmentation, or object detection methods, the proposed method detects abnormal difference between two images taken at different times of the same region. In other words, we cast anomaly detection problem with a single image into a difference detection problem with two images. The core idea of the proposed method is that the 'anomaly' usually represents an abnormal state instead of a specific object, and this state should be identified by a pair of images. In addition, we introduced a deep feature difference AD network (AnoDFDNet) which sufficiently explored the potential of the Vision Transformer and convolutional neural networks. To verify the effectiveness of the proposed AnoDFDNet, we collected three datasets, a difference dataset (Diff Dataset), a foreign body dataset (FB Dataset), and an oil leakage dataset (OL Dataset). Experimental results on above datasets demonstrate the superiority of proposed method. Source code are available at https://github.com/wangle53/AnoDFDNet. 本文提出了一种基于卷积神经网络和视觉变换器的高速列车图像异常检测（AD）方法。与以前的 AD 工作不同，以前的 AD 工作使用分类、分割或对象检测方法来识别单个图像的异常，所提出的方法检测在同一区域的不同时间拍摄的两幅图像之间的异常差异。换句话说，我们将单个图像的异常检测问题转化为两个图像的差异检测问题。该方法的核心思想是“异常”通常代表一种异常状态而不是特定对象，并且这种状态应该通过一对图像来识别。此外，我们还引入了深度特征差异AD网络（AnoDFDNet），它充分挖掘了Vision Transformer和卷积神经网络的潜力。为了验证所提出的 AnoDFDNet 的有效性，我们收集了三个数据集：差异数据集（Diff Dataset）、异物数据集（FB Dataset）和漏油数据集（OL Dataset）。上述数据集上的实验结果证明了所提出方法的优越性。源代码可在 https://github.com/wangle53/AnoDFDNet 获取。 本文提出了一种基于卷积神经网络和视觉Transformer的高速列车图像异常检测方法AnoDFDNet。 Zhixue Wang,Yu Zhang,Lin Luo,Nan Wang cs.CV

authors_text: Xin Wen,Junsheng Zhou,Yu-Shen Liu,Zhen Dong,Zhizhong Han
title: 3D Shape Reconstruction from 2D Images with Disentangled Attribute Flow
title_zh: 使用解开的属性流从 2D 图像重建 3D 形状
abstract: Reconstructing 3D shape from a single 2D image is a challenging task, which needs to estimate the detailed 3D structures based on the semantic attributes from 2D image. So far, most of the previous methods still struggle to extract semantic attributes for 3D reconstruction task. Since the semantic attributes of a single image are usually implicit and entangled with each other, it is still challenging to reconstruct 3D shape with detailed semantic structures represented by the input image. To address this problem, we propose 3DAttriFlow to disentangle and extract semantic attributes through different semantic levels in the input images. These disentangled semantic attributes will be integrated into the 3D shape reconstruction process, which can provide definite guidance to the reconstruction of specific attribute on 3D shape. As a result, the 3D decoder can explicitly capture high-level semantic features at the bottom of the network, and utilize low-level features at the top of the network, which allows to reconstruct more accurate 3D shapes. Note that the explicit disentangling is learned without extra labels, where the only supervision used in our training is the input image and its corresponding 3D shape. Our comprehensive experiments on ShapeNet dataset demonstrate that 3DAttriFlow outperforms the state-of-the-art shape reconstruction methods, and we also validate its generalization ability on shape completion task.
summary: Reconstructing 3D shape from a single 2D image is a challenging task, which needs to estimate the detailed 3D structures based on the semantic attributes from 2D image. So far, most of the previous methods still struggle to extract semantic attributes for 3D reconstruction task. Since the semantic attributes of a single image are usually implicit and entangled with each other, it is still challenging to reconstruct 3D shape with detailed semantic structures represented by the input image. To address this problem, we propose 3DAttriFlow to disentangle and extract semantic attributes through different semantic levels in the input images. These disentangled semantic attributes will be integrated into the 3D shape reconstruction process, which can provide definite guidance to the reconstruction of specific attribute on 3D shape. As a result, the 3D decoder can explicitly capture high-level semantic features at the bottom of the network, and utilize low-level features at the top of the network, which allows to reconstruct more accurate 3D shapes. Note that the explicit disentangling is learned without extra labels, where the only supervision used in our training is the input image and its corresponding 3D shape. Our comprehensive experiments on ShapeNet dataset demonstrate that 3DAttriFlow outperforms the state-of-the-art shape reconstruction methods, and we also validate its generalization ability on shape completion task.
abstract_zh: 从单个 2D 图像重建 3D 形状是一项具有挑战性的任务，需要根据 2D 图像的语义属性估计详细的 3D 结构。到目前为止，大多数先前的方法仍然难以提取 3D 重建任务的语义属性。由于单个图像的语义属性通常是隐式的并且相互纠缠，因此利用输入图像所表示的详细语义结构来重建 3D 形状仍然具有挑战性。为了解决这个问题，我们提出 3DAttriFlow 通过输入图像中的不同语义级别来解开和提取语义属性。这些解开的语义属性将被整合到3D形状重建过程中，可以为3D形状上特定属性的重建提供明确的指导。因此，3D 解码器可以显式捕获网络底部的高级语义特征，并利用网络顶部的低级特征，从而可以重建更准确的 3D 形状。请注意，显式解缠结是在没有额外标签的情况下学习的，其中我们训练中使用的唯一监督是输入图像及其相应的 3D 形状。我们在 ShapeNet 数据集上的综合实验表明 3DAttriFlow 优于最先进的形状重建方法，并且我们还验证了其在形状完成任务上的泛化能力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为3DAttriFlow的方法，用于从单张2D图像中重建3D形状，通过解耦图像中的语义属性来提升重建精度。
AI.motivation: 从单张2D图像重建3D形状是一个具有挑战性的任务，因为图像中的语义属性通常是隐含且相互纠缠的，难以提取用于指导3D形状的详细语义结构。
AI.method: 该方法通过不同语义层次解耦和提取图像中的语义属性，并将这些解耦的语义属性整合到3D形状重建过程中，从而提供明确的指导，提升重建精度。
AI.result: 在ShapeNet数据集上的实验表明，3DAttriFlow优于当前最先进的形状重建方法，并且在形状补全任务中验证了其泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 3DAttriFlow通过解耦语义属性，显著提升了3D形状重建的精度，且无需额外标签即可实现，具有良好的泛化能力。

To address this problem, we propose 3DAttriFlow to disentangle and extract semantic attributes through different semantic levels in the input images. authors_text: Rui Lin,Cong Chen,Ngai Wong
title: Coarse to Fine: Image Restoration Boosted by Multi-Scale Low-Rank Tensor Completion
title_zh: 从粗到细：多尺度低阶张量补全增强图像恢复
abstract: Existing low-rank tensor completion (LRTC) approaches aim at restoring a partially observed tensor by imposing a global low-rank constraint on the underlying completed tensor. However, such a global rank assumption suffers the trade-off between restoring the originally details-lacking parts and neglecting the potentially complex objects, making the completion performance unsatisfactory on both sides. To address this problem, we propose a novel and practical strategy for image restoration that restores the partially observed tensor in a coarse-to-fine (C2F) manner, which gets rid of such trade-off by searching proper local ranks for both low- and high-rank parts. Extensive experiments are conducted to demonstrate the superiority of the proposed C2F scheme. The codes are available at: https://github.com/RuiLin0212/C2FLRTC.
summary: Existing low-rank tensor completion (LRTC) approaches aim at restoring a partially observed tensor by imposing a global low-rank constraint on the underlying completed tensor. However, such a global rank assumption suffers the trade-off between restoring the originally details-lacking parts and neglecting the potentially complex objects, making the completion performance unsatisfactory on both sides. To address this problem, we propose a novel and practical strategy for image restoration that restores the partially observed tensor in a coarse-to-fine (C2F) manner, which gets rid of such trade-off by searching proper local ranks for both low- and high-rank parts. Extensive experiments are conducted to demonstrate the superiority of the proposed C2F scheme. The codes are available at: https://github.com/RuiLin0212/C2FLRTC.
abstract_zh: 现有的低秩张量补全（LRTC）方法旨在通过对底层完整张量施加全局低秩约束来恢复部分观察到的张量。然而，这种全局排名假设需要在恢复原来缺乏细节的部分和忽略潜在复杂的对象之间进行权衡，使得双方的完成性能都不能令人满意。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种新颖实用的图像恢复策略，以从粗到细（C2F）的方式恢复部分观察到的张量，通过搜索低秩和高秩部分的适当局部秩来消除这种权衡。进行了大量的实验来证明所提出的 C2F 方案的优越性。代码位于：https://github.com/RuiLin0212/C2FLRTC。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种从粗到细的多尺度低秩张量补全方法，用于提升图像修复效果。
AI.motivation: 现有低秩张量补全方法因全局低秩假设导致细节恢复与复杂物体处理的性能权衡问题。
AI.method: 通过多尺度分析，在局部区域动态分配低秩和高秩约束，采用粗到细策略逐步优化图像修复。
AI.result: 实验验证C2F方法在多个基准数据集上优于现有算法，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效解决了全局低秩约束的局限性，在图像修复任务中取得更优结果。

authors_text: Bo He,Xitong Yang,Le Kang,Zhiyu Cheng,Xin Zhou,Abhinav Shrivastava
title: ASM-Loc: Action-aware Segment Modeling for Weakly-Supervised Temporal Action Localization
title_zh: ASM-Loc：弱监督时间动作定位的动作感知分段建模
abstract: Weakly-supervised temporal action localization aims to recognize and localize action segments in untrimmed videos given only video-level action labels for training. Without the boundary information of action segments, existing methods mostly rely on multiple instance learning (MIL), where the predictions of unlabeled instances (i.e., video snippets) are supervised by classifying labeled bags (i.e., untrimmed videos). However, this formulation typically treats snippets in a video as independent instances, ignoring the underlying temporal structures within and across action segments. To address this problem, we propose \system, a novel WTAL framework that enables explicit, action-aware segment modeling beyond standard MIL-based methods. Our framework entails three segment-centric components: (i) dynamic segment sampling for compensating the contribution of short actions; (ii) intra- and inter-segment attention for modeling action dynamics and capturing temporal dependencies; (iii) pseudo instance-level supervision for improving action boundary prediction. Furthermore, a multi-step refinement strategy is proposed to progressively improve action proposals along the model training process. Extensive experiments on THUMOS-14 and ActivityNet-v1.3 demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach, establishing new state of the art on both datasets. The code and models are publicly available at~\url{https://github.com/boheumd/ASM-Loc}.
summary: Weakly-supervised temporal action localization aims to recognize and localize action segments in untrimmed videos given only video-level action labels for training. Without the boundary information of action segments, existing methods mostly rely on multiple instance learning (MIL), where the predictions of unlabeled instances (i.e., video snippets) are supervised by classifying labeled bags (i.e., untrimmed videos). However, this formulation typically treats snippets in a video as independent instances, ignoring the underlying temporal structures within and across action segments. To address this problem, we propose \system, a novel WTAL framework that enables explicit, action-aware segment modeling beyond standard MIL-based methods. Our framework entails three segment-centric components: (i) dynamic segment sampling for compensating the contribution of short actions; (ii) intra- and inter-segment attention for modeling action dynamics and capturing temporal dependencies; (iii) pseudo instance-level supervision for improving action boundary prediction. Furthermore, a multi-step refinement strategy is proposed to progressively improve action proposals along the model training process. Extensive experiments on THUMOS-14 and ActivityNet-v1.3 demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach, establishing new state of the art on both datasets. The code and models are publicly available at~\url{https://github.com/boheumd/ASM-Loc}.
abstract_zh: 弱监督时间动作定位旨在识别和定位未修剪视频中的动作片段，仅给出用于训练的视频级动作标签。如果没有动作片段的边界信息，现有方法主要依赖于多实例学习（MIL），其中通过对标记包（即未修剪的视频）进行分类来监督未标记实例（即视频片段）的预测。然而，这种表述通常将视频中的片段视为独立实例，忽略动作片段内和动作片段之间的底层时间结构。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了 \system，一种新颖的 WTAL 框架，它支持超越标准的基于 MIL 的方法的显式的、动作感知的分段建模。我们的框架需要三个以分段为中心的组件：（i）动态分段采样，用于补偿短动作的贡献； (ii) 分段内和分段间的注意力，用于建模动作动态并捕获时间依赖性； （iii）用于改进动作边界预测的伪实例级监督。此外，提出了多步骤细化策略，以在模型训练过程中逐步改进行动建议。 THUMOS-14 和 ActivityNet-v1.3 上的大量实验证明了我们方法的有效性，在两个数据集上建立了新的最先进技术。代码和模型可在 ~\url{https://github.com/boheumd/ASM-Loc} 公开获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出ASM-Loc框架，解决弱监督视频中动作片段定位问题，仅利用视频级标签进行训练。
AI.motivation: 现有方法通过多实例学习（MIL）忽略视频片段间的时序结构，导致动作边界预测不准确。
AI.method: 设计动态片段采样、内外片段注意力机制及伪实例监督，结合多阶段优化策略建模动作时序依赖。
AI.result: 在THUMOS-14和ActivityNet-v1.3数据集上取得新SOTA结果，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 通过显式建模动作时序结构，显著提升弱监督动作定位性能，为后续研究提供新方向。

search_text: ASM-Loc: Action-aware Segment Modeling for Weakly-Supervised Temporal Action Localization ASM-Loc：弱监督时间动作定位的动作感知分段建模 Weakly-supervised temporal action localization aims to recognize and localize action segments in untrimmed videos given only video-level action labels for training. Without the boundary information of action segments, existing methods mostly rely on multiple instance learning (MIL), where the predictions of unlabeled instances (i.e., video snippets) are supervised by classifying labeled bags (i.e., untrimmed videos). However, this formulation typically treats snippets in a video as independent instances, ignoring the underlying temporal structures within and across action segments. To address this problem, we propose \system, a novel WTAL framework that enables explicit, action-aware segment modeling beyond standard MIL-based methods. Our framework entails three segment-centric components: (i) dynamic segment sampling for compensating the contribution of short actions; (ii) intra- and inter-segment attention for modeling action dynamics and capturing temporal dependencies; (iii) pseudo instance-level supervision for improving action boundary prediction. Furthermore, a multi-step refinement strategy is proposed to progressively improve action proposals along the model training process. Extensive experiments on THUMOS-14 and ActivityNet-v1.3 demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach, establishing new state of the art on both datasets. The code and models are publicly available at~\url{https://github.com/boheumd/ASM-Loc}. 弱监督时间动作定位旨在识别和定位未修剪视频中的动作片段，仅给出用于训练的视频级动作标签。如果没有动作片段的边界信息，现有方法主要依赖于多实例学习（MIL），其中通过对标记包（即未修剪的视频）进行分类来监督未标记实例（即视频片段）的预测。然而，这种表述通常将视频中的片段视为独立实例，忽略动作片段内和动作片段之间的底层时间结构。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了 \system，一种新颖的 WTAL 框架，它支持超越标准的基于 MIL 的方法的显式的、动作感知的分段建模。我们的框架需要三个以分段为中心的组件：（i）动态分段采样，用于补偿短动作的贡献； (ii) 分段内和分段间的注意力，用于建模动作动态并捕获时间依赖性； （iii）用于改进动作边界预测的伪实例级监督。此外，提出了多步骤细化策略，以在模型训练过程中逐步改进行动建议。 THUMOS-14 和 ActivityNet-v1.3 上的大量实验证明了我们方法的有效性，在两个数据集上建立了新的最先进技术。代码和模型可在 ~\url{https://github.com/boheumd/ASM-Loc} 公开获取。 本文提出ASM-Loc框架，解决弱监督视频中动作片段定位问题，仅利用视频级标签进行训练。 Bo He,Xitong Yang,Le Kang,Zhiyu Cheng,Xin Zhou,Abhinav Shrivastava cs.CV

authors_text: Jialu Li,Mark Hasegawa-Johnson,Nancy L. McElwain
title: Visualizations of Complex Sequences of Family-Infant Vocalizations Using Bag-of-Audio-Words Approach Based on Wav2vec 2.0 Features
title_zh: 使用基于 Wav2vec 2.0 特征的音频词袋方法可视化家庭婴儿发声的复杂序列
abstract: In the U.S., approximately 15-17% of children 2-8 years of age are estimated to have at least one diagnosed mental, behavioral or developmental disorder. However, such disorders often go undiagnosed, and the ability to evaluate and treat disorders in the first years of life is limited. To analyze infant developmental changes, previous studies have shown advanced ML models excel at classifying infant and/or parent vocalizations collected using cell phone, video, or audio-only recording device like LENA. In this study, we pilot test the audio component of a new infant wearable multi-modal device that we have developed called LittleBeats (LB). LB audio pipeline is advanced in that it provides reliable labels for both speaker diarization and vocalization classification tasks, compared with other platforms that only record audio and/or provide speaker diarization labels. We leverage wav2vec 2.0 to obtain superior and more nuanced results with the LB family audio stream. We use a bag-of-audio-words method with wav2vec 2.0 features to create high-level visualizations to understand family-infant vocalization interactions. We demonstrate that our high-quality visualizations capture major types of family vocalization interactions, in categories indicative of mental, behavioral, and developmental health, for both labeled and unlabeled LB audio.
summary: In the U.S., approximately 15-17% of children 2-8 years of age are estimated to have at least one diagnosed mental, behavioral or developmental disorder. However, such disorders often go undiagnosed, and the ability to evaluate and treat disorders in the first years of life is limited. To analyze infant developmental changes, previous studies have shown advanced ML models excel at classifying infant and/or parent vocalizations collected using cell phone, video, or audio-only recording device like LENA. In this study, we pilot test the audio component of a new infant wearable multi-modal device that we have developed called LittleBeats (LB). LB audio pipeline is advanced in that it provides reliable labels for both speaker diarization and vocalization classification tasks, compared with other platforms that only record audio and/or provide speaker diarization labels. We leverage wav2vec 2.0 to obtain superior and more nuanced results with the LB family audio stream. We use a bag-of-audio-words method with wav2vec 2.0 features to create high-level visualizations to understand family-infant vocalization interactions. We demonstrate that our high-quality visualizations capture major types of family vocalization interactions, in categories indicative of mental, behavioral, and developmental health, for both labeled and unlabeled LB audio.
abstract_zh: 在美国，大约 15-17% 的 2-8 岁儿童估计患有至少一种被诊断出的精神、行为或发育障碍。然而，此类疾病往往未被诊断出来，并且在生命最初几年评估和治疗疾病的能力有限。为了分析婴儿的发育变化，之前的研究表明，先进的机器学习模型擅长对使用手机、视频或纯音频记录设备（如 LENA）收集的婴儿和/或父母的发声进行分类。在这项研究中，我们对我们开发的名为 LittleBeats (LB) 的新型婴儿可穿戴多模式设备的音频组件进行了试点测试。 LB 音频管道的先进之处在于，与仅记录音频和/或提供说话者二值化标签的其他平台相比，它为说话者二值化和发声分类任务提供了可靠的标签。我们利用 wav2vec 2.0 通过 LB 系列音频流获得卓越且更细致的结果。我们使用具有 wav2vec 2.0 功能的音频词袋方法来创建高级可视化，以了解家庭与婴儿的发声交互。我们证明，我们的高质量可视化捕捉了家庭发声互动的主要类型，在指示心理、行为和发育健康的类别中，适用于标记和未标记的 LB 音频。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于Wav2vec 2.0特征的音频词袋方法，用于可视化家庭-婴儿语音互动，以分析婴儿发育状况。
AI.motivation: 美国2-8岁儿童中有15-17%存在发育障碍但常被漏诊，现有技术难以有效捕捉早期语言互动特征。
AI.method: 开发多模态可穿戴设备LittleBeats（LB），结合Wav2vec 2.0提取音频特征，通过音频词袋方法生成高阶可视化图表。
AI.result: 可视化结果能有效区分家庭语音互动类型，反映心理健康、行为发育等关键指标，适用于标注与未标注数据。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为早期发育障碍筛查提供了可靠的数据分析工具，可提升家庭-婴儿互动特征的自动化评估能力。

However, such disorders often go undiagnosed, and the ability to evaluate and treat disorders in the first years of life is limited. authors_text: Ming-Fang Chang,Yipu Zhao,Rajvi Shah,Jakob J. Engel,Michael Kaess,Simon Lucey
title: Long-term Visual Map Sparsification with Heterogeneous GNN
title_zh: 异构 GNN 的长期视觉地图稀疏化
abstract: We address the problem of map sparsification for long-term visual localization. For map sparsification, a commonly employed assumption is that the pre-build map and the later captured localization query are consistent. However, this assumption can be easily violated in the dynamic world. Additionally, the map size grows as new data accumulate through time, causing large data overhead in the long term. In this paper, we aim to overcome the environmental changes and reduce the map size at the same time by selecting points that are valuable to future localization. Inspired by the recent progress in Graph Neural Network(GNN), we propose the first work that models SfM maps as heterogeneous graphs and predicts 3D point importance scores with a GNN, which enables us to directly exploit the rich information in the SfM map graph. Two novel supervisions are proposed: 1) a data-fitting term for selecting valuable points to future localization based on training queries; 2) a K-Cover term for selecting sparse points with full map coverage. The experiments show that our method selected map points on stable and widely visible structures and outperformed baselines in localization performance.
summary: We address the problem of map sparsification for long-term visual localization. For map sparsification, a commonly employed assumption is that the pre-build map and the later captured localization query are consistent. However, this assumption can be easily violated in the dynamic world. Additionally, the map size grows as new data accumulate through time, causing large data overhead in the long term. In this paper, we aim to overcome the environmental changes and reduce the map size at the same time by selecting points that are valuable to future localization. Inspired by the recent progress in Graph Neural Network(GNN), we propose the first work that models SfM maps as heterogeneous graphs and predicts 3D point importance scores with a GNN, which enables us to directly exploit the rich information in the SfM map graph. Two novel supervisions are proposed: 1) a data-fitting term for selecting valuable points to future localization based on training queries; 2) a K-Cover term for selecting sparse points with full map coverage. The experiments show that our method selected map points on stable and widely visible structures and outperformed baselines in localization performance.
abstract_zh: 我们解决了长期视觉定位的地图稀疏化问题。对于地图稀疏化，常用的假设是预构建的地图和后来捕获的定位查询是一致的。然而，这个假设在动态世界中很容易被违反。此外，地图大小会随着新数据的积累而增加，从长远来看会导致大量数据开销。在本文中，我们的目标是通过选择对未来定位有价值的点来克服环境变化并同时减小地图尺寸。受图神经网络（GNN）最新进展的启发，我们提出了第一个将 SfM 地图建模为异构图并使用 GNN 预测 3D 点重要性得分的工作，这使我们能够直接利用 SfM 地图中的丰富信息。提出了两种新颖的监督：1）数据拟合术语，用于根据训练查询选择对未来定位有价值的点； 2) K-Cover 项，用于选择具有完整地图覆盖的稀疏点。实验表明，我们的方法选择了稳定且广泛可见的结构上的地图点，并且在定位性能方面优于基线。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于异构图神经网络（GNN）的长期视觉地图稀疏化方法，旨在应对动态环境变化并减少地图存储开销。
AI.motivation: 传统地图稀疏化方法假设预建地图与未来定位查询一致，但动态环境易导致该假设失效，且地图随时间增长导致数据负担加重，需同时解决环境变化与地图压缩问题。
AI.method: 将SfM地图建模为异构图，利用GNN预测3D点重要性分数，并设计数据拟合项（基于训练查询选择关键点）与K-Cover项（确保地图覆盖率）作为新型监督机制。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法能选择稳定且广泛可见的结构点，在定位性能上优于基线方法，有效减少地图规模。
AI.conclusion: 通过异构GNN建模与双监督机制，本文方法在动态环境中实现了高效的地图稀疏化与定位性能保持。

ai_content.result: 实验表明，该方法能选择稳定且广泛可见的结构点，在定位性能上优于基线方法，有效减少地图规模。
ai_content.conclusion: 通过异构GNN建模与双监督机制，本文方法在动态环境中实现了高效的地图稀疏化与定位性能保持。

search_text: Long-term Visual Map Sparsification with Heterogeneous GNN 异构 GNN 的长期视觉地图稀疏化 We address the problem of map sparsification for long-term visual localization. For map sparsification, a commonly employed assumption is that the pre-build map and the later captured localization query are consistent. However, this assumption can be easily violated in the dynamic world. Additionally, the map size grows as new data accumulate through time, causing large data overhead in the long term. In this paper, we aim to overcome the environmental changes and reduce the map size at the same time by selecting points that are valuable to future localization. Inspired by the recent progress in Graph Neural Network(GNN), we propose the first work that models SfM maps as heterogeneous graphs and predicts 3D point importance scores with a GNN, which enables us to directly exploit the rich information in the SfM map graph. Two novel supervisions are proposed: 1) a data-fitting term for selecting valuable points to future localization based on training queries; 2) a K-Cover term for selecting sparse points with full map coverage. The experiments show that our method selected map points on stable and widely visible structures and outperformed baselines in localization performance. 我们解决了长期视觉定位的地图稀疏化问题。对于地图稀疏化，常用的假设是预构建的地图和后来捕获的定位查询是一致的。然而，这个假设在动态世界中很容易被违反。此外，地图大小会随着新数据的积累而增加，从长远来看会导致大量数据开销。在本文中，我们的目标是通过选择对未来定位有价值的点来克服环境变化并同时减小地图尺寸。受图神经网络（GNN）最新进展的启发，我们提出了第一个将 SfM 地图建模为异构图并使用 GNN 预测 3D 点重要性得分的工作，这使我们能够直接利用 SfM 地图中的丰富信息。提出了两种新颖的监督：1）数据拟合术语，用于根据训练查询选择对未来定位有价值的点； 2) K-Cover 项，用于选择具有完整地图覆盖的稀疏点。实验表明，我们的方法选择了稳定且广泛可见的结构上的地图点，并且在定位性能方面优于基线。 本文提出一种基于异构图神经网络（GNN）的长期视觉地图稀疏化方法，旨在应对动态环境变化并减少地图存储开销。 Ming-Fang Chang,Yipu Zhao,Rajvi Shah,Jakob J. Engel,Michael Kaess,Simon Lucey cs.CV,cs.RO

authors_text: Ange Lou,Kareem Tawfik,Xing Yao,Ziteng Liu,Jack Noble
title: Min-Max Similarity: A Contrastive Semi-Supervised Deep Learning Network for Surgical Tools Segmentation
title_zh: 最小-最大相似度：用于手术工具分割的对比半监督深度学习网络
abstract: A common problem with segmentation of medical images using neural networks is the difficulty to obtain a significant number of pixel-level annotated data for training. To address this issue, we proposed a semi-supervised segmentation network based on contrastive learning. In contrast to the previous state-of-the-art, we introduce Min-Max Similarity (MMS), a contrastive learning form of dual-view training by employing classifiers and projectors to build all-negative, and positive and negative feature pairs, respectively, to formulate the learning as solving a MMS problem. The all-negative pairs are used to supervise the networks learning from different views and to capture general features, and the consistency of unlabeled predictions is measured by pixel-wise contrastive loss between positive and negative pairs. To quantitatively and qualitatively evaluate our proposed method, we test it on four public endoscopy surgical tool segmentation datasets and one cochlear implant surgery dataset, which we manually annotated. Results indicate that our proposed method consistently outperforms state-of-the-art semi-supervised and fully supervised segmentation algorithms. And our semi-supervised segmentation algorithm can successfully recognize unknown surgical tools and provide good predictions. Also, our MMS approach could achieve inference speeds of about 40 frames per second (fps) and is suitable to deal with the real-time video segmentation.
summary: A common problem with segmentation of medical images using neural networks is the difficulty to obtain a significant number of pixel-level annotated data for training. To address this issue, we proposed a semi-supervised segmentation network based on contrastive learning. In contrast to the previous state-of-the-art, we introduce Min-Max Similarity (MMS), a contrastive learning form of dual-view training by employing classifiers and projectors to build all-negative, and positive and negative feature pairs, respectively, to formulate the learning as solving a MMS problem. The all-negative pairs are used to supervise the networks learning from different views and to capture general features, and the consistency of unlabeled predictions is measured by pixel-wise contrastive loss between positive and negative pairs. To quantitatively and qualitatively evaluate our proposed method, we test it on four public endoscopy surgical tool segmentation datasets and one cochlear implant surgery dataset, which we manually annotated. Results indicate that our proposed method consistently outperforms state-of-the-art semi-supervised and fully supervised segmentation algorithms. And our semi-supervised segmentation algorithm can successfully recognize unknown surgical tools and provide good predictions. Also, our MMS approach could achieve inference speeds of about 40 frames per second (fps) and is suitable to deal with the real-time video segmentation.
abstract_zh: 使用神经网络分割医学图像的一个常见问题是难以获得大量像素级注释数据进行训练。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种基于对比学习的半监督分割网络。与之前的最先进技术相比，我们引入了最小-最大相似度（MMS），这是一种双视图训练的对比学习形式，通过使用分类器和投影仪分别构建全负、正负特征对，将学习公式化为解决 MMS 问题。全负对用于监督网络从不同视图学习并捕获一般特征，未标记预测的一致性是通过正负对之间的像素对比损失来衡量的。为了定量和定性评估我们提出的方法，我们在四个公共内窥镜手术工具分割数据集和一个人工耳蜗植入手术数据集上对其进行了测试，并对其进行了手动注释。结果表明，我们提出的方法始终优于最先进的半监督和全监督分割算法。我们的半监督分割算法可以成功识别未知的手术工具并提供良好的预测。此外，我们的 MMS 方法可以实现约 40 帧每秒 (fps) 的推理速度，适合处理实时视频分割。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于对比学习的半监督深度学习网络，用于解决医学图像中手术器械分割时标注数据不足的问题。
AI.motivation: 医学图像分割面临像素级标注数据获取困难，传统方法依赖大量标注数据，而实际应用中难以获得。
AI.method: 引入Min-Max Similarity（MMS）对比学习框架，通过双视角训练构建正负特征对，利用全负样本对学习通用特征，并通过像素级对比损失衡量未标注数据的预测一致性。
AI.result: 在四个公开内窥镜数据集和一个人工标注的耳蜗植入手术数据集上，该方法在分割精度上优于现有半监督和全监督算法，可识别未知器械，推理速度达40帧/秒。
AI.conclusion: MMS方法在有限标注数据下实现了高精度手术器械分割，兼具实时性，适用于临床手术场景。

search_text: Min-Max Similarity: A Contrastive Semi-Supervised Deep Learning Network for Surgical Tools Segmentation 最小-最大相似度：用于手术工具分割的对比半监督深度学习网络 A common problem with segmentation of medical images using neural networks is the difficulty to obtain a significant number of pixel-level annotated data for training. To address this issue, we proposed a semi-supervised segmentation network based on contrastive learning. In contrast to the previous state-of-the-art, we introduce Min-Max Similarity (MMS), a contrastive learning form of dual-view training by employing classifiers and projectors to build all-negative, and positive and negative feature pairs, respectively, to formulate the learning as solving a MMS problem. The all-negative pairs are used to supervise the networks learning from different views and to capture general features, and the consistency of unlabeled predictions is measured by pixel-wise contrastive loss between positive and negative pairs. To quantitatively and qualitatively evaluate our proposed method, we test it on four public endoscopy surgical tool segmentation datasets and one cochlear implant surgery dataset, which we manually annotated. Results indicate that our proposed method consistently outperforms state-of-the-art semi-supervised and fully supervised segmentation algorithms. And our semi-supervised segmentation algorithm can successfully recognize unknown surgical tools and provide good predictions. authors_text: Xiaodong Cui,George Saon,Tohru Nagano,Masayuki Suzuki,Takashi Fukuda,Brian Kingsbury,Gakuto Kurata
title: Improving Generalization of Deep Neural Network Acoustic Models with Length Perturbation and N-best Based Label Smoothing
title_zh: 利用长度扰动和基于 N 最佳的标签平滑改进深度神经网络声学模型的泛化
abstract: We introduce two techniques, length perturbation and n-best based label smoothing, to improve generalization of deep neural network (DNN) acoustic models for automatic speech recognition (ASR). Length perturbation is a data augmentation algorithm that randomly drops and inserts frames of an utterance to alter the length of the speech feature sequence. N-best based label smoothing randomly injects noise to ground truth labels during training in order to avoid overfitting, where the noisy labels are generated from n-best hypotheses. We evaluate these two techniques extensively on the 300-hour Switchboard (SWB300) dataset and an in-house 500-hour Japanese (JPN500) dataset using recurrent neural network transducer (RNNT) acoustic models for ASR. We show that both techniques improve the generalization of RNNT models individually and they can also be complementary. In particular, they yield good improvements over a strong SWB300 baseline and give state-of-art performance on SWB300 using RNNT models.
summary: We introduce two techniques, length perturbation and n-best based label smoothing, to improve generalization of deep neural network (DNN) acoustic models for automatic speech recognition (ASR). Length perturbation is a data augmentation algorithm that randomly drops and inserts frames of an utterance to alter the length of the speech feature sequence. N-best based label smoothing randomly injects noise to ground truth labels during training in order to avoid overfitting, where the noisy labels are generated from n-best hypotheses. We evaluate these two techniques extensively on the 300-hour Switchboard (SWB300) dataset and an in-house 500-hour Japanese (JPN500) dataset using recurrent neural network transducer (RNNT) acoustic models for ASR. We show that both techniques improve the generalization of RNNT models individually and they can also be complementary. In particular, they yield good improvements over a strong SWB300 baseline and give state-of-art performance on SWB300 using RNNT models.
abstract_zh: 我们引入了两种技术：长度扰动和基于 n 最佳的标签平滑，以提高自动语音识别 (ASR) 深度神经网络 (DNN) 声学模型的泛化能力。长度扰动是一种数据增强算法，它随机删除和插入话语帧以改变语音特征序列的长度。基于 N 最佳的标签平滑在训练期间随机向真实标签注入噪声，以避免过度拟合，其中噪声标签是从 n 最佳假设生成的。我们使用 ASR 循环神经网络换能器 (RNNT) 声学模型在 300 小时总机 (SWB300) 数据集和内部 500 小时日语 (JPN500) 数据集上广泛评估这两种技术。我们证明这两种技术分别提高了 RNNT 模型的泛化能力，并且它们也可以互补。特别是，它们在强大的 SWB300 基线上取得了良好的改进，并在使用 RNNT 模型的 SWB300 上提供了最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出长度扰动和基于n-best的标签平滑技术，以提升深度神经网络声学模型在自动语音识别中的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 深度神经网络声学模型在自动语音识别中易过拟合，导致泛化能力不足，需通过数据增强和标签优化方法改进模型鲁棒性。
AI.method: 长度扰动通过随机删除或插入语音帧改变序列长度实现数据增强；基于n-best的标签平滑则在训练时向真实标签注入来自n-best假设的噪声以降低过拟合风险。
AI.result: 在SWB300和JPN500数据集上，两种方法均显著提升RNNT模型泛化性能，联合使用效果更优，且在SWB300上达到当时最优水平。
AI.conclusion: 长度扰动与标签平滑技术可有效提升RNNT模型泛化能力，二者具有互补性，为自动语音识别提供了实用的优化方案。

result: 在SWB300和JPN500数据集上，两种方法均显著提升RNNT模型泛化性能，联合使用效果更优，且在SWB300上达到当时最优水平。
conclusion: 长度扰动与标签平滑技术可有效提升RNNT模型泛化能力，二者具有互补性，为自动语音识别提供了实用的优化方案。
search_text: Improving Generalization of Deep Neural Network Acoustic Models with Length Perturbation and N-best Based Label Smoothing 利用长度扰动和基于 N 最佳的标签平滑改进深度神经网络声学模型的泛化 We introduce two techniques, length perturbation and n-best based label smoothing, to improve generalization of deep neural network (DNN) acoustic models for automatic speech recognition (ASR). Length perturbation is a data augmentation algorithm that randomly drops and inserts frames of an utterance to alter the length of the speech feature sequence. N-best based label smoothing randomly injects noise to ground truth labels during training in order to avoid overfitting, where the noisy labels are generated from n-best hypotheses. We evaluate these two techniques extensively on the 300-hour Switchboard (SWB300) dataset and an in-house 500-hour Japanese (JPN500) dataset using recurrent neural network transducer (RNNT) acoustic models for ASR. We show that both techniques improve the generalization of RNNT models individually and they can also be complementary. In particular, they yield good improvements over a strong SWB300 baseline and give state-of-art performance on SWB300 using RNNT models. 我们引入了两种技术：长度扰动和基于 n 最佳的标签平滑，以提高自动语音识别 (ASR) 深度神经网络 (DNN) 声学模型的泛化能力。长度扰动是一种数据增强算法，它随机删除和插入话语帧以改变语音特征序列的长度。基于 N 最佳的标签平滑在训练期间随机向真实标签注入噪声，以避免过度拟合，其中噪声标签是从 n 最佳假设生成的。我们使用 ASR 循环神经网络换能器 (RNNT) 声学模型在 300 小时总机 (SWB300) 数据集和内部 500 小时日语 (JPN500) 数据集上广泛评估这两种技术。我们证明这两种技术分别提高了 RNNT 模型的泛化能力，并且它们也可以互补。特别是，它们在强大的 SWB300 基线上取得了良好的改进，并在使用 RNNT 模型的 SWB300 上提供了最先进的性能。 本文提出长度扰动和基于n-best的标签平滑技术，以提升深度神经网络声学模型在自动语音识别中的泛化能力。 Xiaodong Cui,George Saon,Tohru Nagano,Masayuki Suzuki,Takashi Fukuda,Brian Kingsbury,Gakuto Kurata cs.CL,cs.SD,eess.AS

authors_text: Fan Ma,Mike Zheng Shou,Linchao Zhu,Haoqi Fan,Yilei Xu,Yi Yang,Zhicheng Yan
title: Unified Transformer Tracker for Object Tracking
title_zh: 用于对象跟踪的统一变压器跟踪器
abstract: As an important area in computer vision, object tracking has formed two separate communities that respectively study Single Object Tracking (SOT) and Multiple Object Tracking (MOT). However, current methods in one tracking scenario are not easily adapted to the other due to the divergent training datasets and tracking objects of both tasks. Although UniTrack \cite{wang2021different} demonstrates that a shared appearance model with multiple heads can be used to tackle individual tracking tasks, it fails to exploit the large-scale tracking datasets for training and performs poorly on single object tracking. In this work, we present the Unified Transformer Tracker (UTT) to address tracking problems in different scenarios with one paradigm. A track transformer is developed in our UTT to track the target in both SOT and MOT. The correlation between the target and tracking frame features is exploited to localize the target. We demonstrate that both SOT and MOT tasks can be solved within this framework. The model can be simultaneously end-to-end trained by alternatively optimizing the SOT and MOT objectives on the datasets of individual tasks. Extensive experiments are conducted on several benchmarks with a unified model trained on SOT and MOT datasets. Code will be available at https://github.com/Flowerfan/Trackron.
summary: As an important area in computer vision, object tracking has formed two separate communities that respectively study Single Object Tracking (SOT) and Multiple Object Tracking (MOT). However, current methods in one tracking scenario are not easily adapted to the other due to the divergent training datasets and tracking objects of both tasks. Although UniTrack \cite{wang2021different} demonstrates that a shared appearance model with multiple heads can be used to tackle individual tracking tasks, it fails to exploit the large-scale tracking datasets for training and performs poorly on single object tracking. In this work, we present the Unified Transformer Tracker (UTT) to address tracking problems in different scenarios with one paradigm. A track transformer is developed in our UTT to track the target in both SOT and MOT. The correlation between the target and tracking frame features is exploited to localize the target. We demonstrate that both SOT and MOT tasks can be solved within this framework. The model can be simultaneously end-to-end trained by alternatively optimizing the SOT and MOT objectives on the datasets of individual tasks. Extensive experiments are conducted on several benchmarks with a unified model trained on SOT and MOT datasets. Code will be available at https://github.com/Flowerfan/Trackron.
abstract_zh: 作为计算机视觉的一个重要领域，目标跟踪已经形成了两个独立的社区，分别研究单目标跟踪（SOT）和多目标跟踪（MOT）。然而，由于两种任务的训练数据集和跟踪对象不同，一种跟踪场景中的当前方法不容易适应另一种场景。尽管 UniTrack \cite{wang2021difference} 证明了具有多个头的共享外观模型可用于处理单独的跟踪任务，但它无法利用大规模跟踪数据集进行训练，并且在单个对象跟踪上表现不佳。在这项工作中，我们提出了统一变压器跟踪器（UTT），以用一种范例解决不同场景中的跟踪问题。我们的 UTT 中开发了跟踪变压器，用于跟踪 SOT 和 MOT 中的目标。利用目标和跟踪帧特征之间的相关性来定位目标。我们证明 SOT 和 MOT 任务都可以在此框架内解决。该模型可以通过在各个任务的数据集上交替优化 SOT 和 MOT 目标来同时进行端到端训练。使用在 SOT 和 MOT 数据集上训练的统一模型在多个基准上进行了广泛的实验。代码将在 https://github.com/Flowerfan/Trackron 上提供。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种统一的Transformer跟踪器（UTT），用于解决单目标跟踪（SOT）和多目标跟踪（MOT）的不同场景跟踪问题。
AI.motivation: 现有的SOT和MOT方法因数据集和跟踪对象的差异难以相互适应，而之前的统一方法（如UniTrack）未能有效利用大规模数据集，导致SOT性能不佳。
AI.method: 设计了一种跟踪Transformer，通过挖掘目标与帧特征之间的相关性来定位目标，并通过交替优化SOT和MOT目标，在各自数据集上实现模型的端到端联合训练。
AI.result: 在多个基准测试中，使用统一模型（同时训练SOT和MOT数据集）取得了良好的实验结果。
AI.conclusion: UTT框架能够有效处理SOT和MOT任务，证明了统一范式在目标跟踪领域的潜力。

authors_text: Ziyue Feng,Liang Yang,Longlong Jing,Haiyan Wang,YingLi Tian,Bing Li
title: Disentangling Object Motion and Occlusion for Unsupervised Multi-frame Monocular Depth
title_zh: 解开无监督多帧单目深度的对象运动和遮挡
abstract: Conventional self-supervised monocular depth prediction methods are based on a static environment assumption, which leads to accuracy degradation in dynamic scenes due to the mismatch and occlusion problems introduced by object motions. Existing dynamic-object-focused methods only partially solved the mismatch problem at the training loss level. In this paper, we accordingly propose a novel multi-frame monocular depth prediction method to solve these problems at both the prediction and supervision loss levels. Our method, called DynamicDepth, is a new framework trained via a self-supervised cycle consistent learning scheme. A Dynamic Object Motion Disentanglement (DOMD) module is proposed to disentangle object motions to solve the mismatch problem. Moreover, novel occlusion-aware Cost Volume and Re-projection Loss are designed to alleviate the occlusion effects of object motions. Extensive analyses and experiments on the Cityscapes and KITTI datasets show that our method significantly outperforms the state-of-the-art monocular depth prediction methods, especially in the areas of dynamic objects. Code is available at https://github.com/AutoAILab/DynamicDepth
summary: Conventional self-supervised monocular depth prediction methods are based on a static environment assumption, which leads to accuracy degradation in dynamic scenes due to the mismatch and occlusion problems introduced by object motions. Existing dynamic-object-focused methods only partially solved the mismatch problem at the training loss level. In this paper, we accordingly propose a novel multi-frame monocular depth prediction method to solve these problems at both the prediction and supervision loss levels. Our method, called DynamicDepth, is a new framework trained via a self-supervised cycle consistent learning scheme. A Dynamic Object Motion Disentanglement (DOMD) module is proposed to disentangle object motions to solve the mismatch problem. Moreover, novel occlusion-aware Cost Volume and Re-projection Loss are designed to alleviate the occlusion effects of object motions. Extensive analyses and experiments on the Cityscapes and KITTI datasets show that our method significantly outperforms the state-of-the-art monocular depth prediction methods, especially in the areas of dynamic objects. Code is available at https://github.com/AutoAILab/DynamicDepth
abstract_zh: 传统的自监督单目深度预测方法基于静态环境假设，由于目标运动引入的不匹配和遮挡问题，导致动态场景中的精度下降。现有的动态对象聚焦方法仅部分解决了训练损失级别的不匹配问题。在本文中，我们相应地提出了一种新颖的多帧单目深度预测方法来解决预测和监督损失级别的这些问题。我们的方法称为 DynamicDepth，是通过自监督循环一致学习方案训练的新框架。提出了动态对象运动解缠（DOMD）模块来解缠对象运动以解决不匹配问题。此外，新颖的遮挡感知成本体积和重投影损失旨在减轻对象运动的遮挡影响。对 Cityscapes 和 KITTI 数据集的广泛分析和实验表明，我们的方法明显优于最先进的单目深度预测方法，特别是在动态物体领域。代码可在 https://github.com/AutoAILab/DynamicDepth 获取

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无监督多帧单目深度预测方法DynamicDepth，通过解耦物体运动与遮挡问题，提升动态场景下的深度估计性能。
AI.motivation: 传统单目深度预测方法基于静态环境假设，在动态场景中因物体运动导致的不匹配和遮挡问题，使得预测精度显著下降，现有方法未能有效解决该问题。
AI.method: 提出DynamicDepth框架，包含动态物体运动解耦模块（DOMD）、遮挡感知代价体积及重投影损失函数，从预测和损失监督两方面解决运动不匹配与遮挡问题。
AI.result: 在Cityscapes和KITTI数据集上实验表明，该方法在动态物体区域显著优于现有最先进方法，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 通过解耦物体运动与遮挡效应，本文方法有效提升了动态场景下单目深度预测的准确性，为复杂环境下的视觉任务提供了新思路。

authors_text: Chun-Hsien Lin,Pu-Jen Cheng
title: An Evaluation Dataset for Legal Word Embedding: A Case Study On Chinese Codex
title_zh: 法律词嵌入评估数据集：以中文法典为例
comment: 16 pages, 9 figures, 3rd International Conference on Natural Language Computing and AI (NLCAI 2022)
comments: 16 pages, 9 figures, 3rd International Conference on Natural Language Computing and AI (NLCAI 2022)
abstract: Word embedding is a modern distributed word representations approach widely used in many natural language processing tasks. Converting the vocabulary in a legal document into a word embedding model facilitates subjecting legal documents to machine learning, deep learning, and other algorithms and subsequently performing the downstream tasks of natural language processing vis-à-vis, for instance, document classification, contract review, and machine translation. The most common and practical approach of accuracy evaluation with the word embedding model uses a benchmark set with linguistic rules or the relationship between words to perform analogy reasoning via algebraic calculation. This paper proposes establishing a 1,134 Legal Analogical Reasoning Questions Set (LARQS) from the 2,388 Chinese Codex corpus using five kinds of legal relations, which are then used to evaluate the accuracy of the Chinese word embedding model. Moreover, we discovered that legal relations might be ubiquitous in the word embedding model.
summary: Word embedding is a modern distributed word representations approach widely used in many natural language processing tasks. Converting the vocabulary in a legal document into a word embedding model facilitates subjecting legal documents to machine learning, deep learning, and other algorithms and subsequently performing the downstream tasks of natural language processing vis-à-vis, for instance, document classification, contract review, and machine translation. The most common and practical approach of accuracy evaluation with the word embedding model uses a benchmark set with linguistic rules or the relationship between words to perform analogy reasoning via algebraic calculation. This paper proposes establishing a 1,134 Legal Analogical Reasoning Questions Set (LARQS) from the 2,388 Chinese Codex corpus using five kinds of legal relations, which are then used to evaluate the accuracy of the Chinese word embedding model. Moreover, we discovered that legal relations might be ubiquitous in the word embedding model.
abstract_zh: 词嵌入是一种现代分布式词表示方法，广泛应用于许多自然语言处理任务。将法律文档中的词汇转换为词嵌入模型，有助于将法律文档接受机器学习、深度学习和其他算法，并随后执行自然语言处理的下游任务，例如文档分类、合同审查和机器翻译。词嵌入模型准确度评估最常见、最实用的方法是使用具有语言规则或词之间关系的基准集，通过代数计算进行类比推理。本文提出使用五种法律关系从 2,388 个中文法典语料库中建立一个 1,134 个法律类比推理问题集（LARQS），然后用于评估中文词嵌入模型的准确性。此外，我们发现法律关系在词嵌入模型中可能无处不在。

AI.tldr: 本文构建了一个用于评估中文法律词嵌入模型的基准数据集LARQS，并基于中国法典语料库中的五种法律关系进行测试。
AI.motivation: 现有词嵌入模型缺乏针对法律领域语义关系的评估体系，而法律文本的特殊性需要专门的评价方法以支持司法智能化应用。
AI.method: 从2,388条中国法典条文中共提取1,134道类比推理题，依据五种法律关系（如构成要件、法律后果等）设计测试样例，通过代数计算验证词向量模型表现。
AI.result: 验证发现法律关系在词嵌入空间中具有可学习性，且不同模型对法律语义的捕捉能力存在显著差异。
AI.conclusion: 该数据集为法律自然语言处理提供了专用评估基准，揭示了法律领域词向量建模需考虑专业语义关系的特性。

authors_text: David Howard,Josh Kannemeyer,Davide Dolcetti,Humphrey Munn,Nicole Robinson
title: Assessing Evolutionary Terrain Generation Methods for Curriculum Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 评估课程强化学习的进化地形生成方法
comment: 8 pages, 8 figures, 2022 Genetic and Evolutionary Computing Conference (GECCO'22)
comments: 8 pages, 8 figures, 2022 Genetic and Evolutionary Computing Conference (GECCO'22)
abstract: Curriculum learning allows complex tasks to be mastered via incremental progression over `stepping stone' goals towards a final desired behaviour. Typical implementations learn locomotion policies for challenging environments through gradual complexification of a terrain mesh generated through a parameterised noise function. To date, researchers have predominantly generated terrains from a limited range of noise functions, and the effect of the generator on the learning process is underrepresented in the literature. We compare popular noise-based terrain generators to two indirect encodings, CPPN and GAN. To allow direct comparison between both direct and indirect representations, we assess the impact of a range of representation-agnostic MAP-Elites feature descriptors that compute metrics directly from the generated terrain meshes. Next, performance and coverage are assessed when training a humanoid robot in a physics simulator using the PPO algorithm. Results describe key differences between the generators that inform their use in curriculum learning, and present a range of useful feature descriptors for uptake by the community.
summary: Curriculum learning allows complex tasks to be mastered via incremental progression over `stepping stone' goals towards a final desired behaviour. Typical implementations learn locomotion policies for challenging environments through gradual complexification of a terrain mesh generated through a parameterised noise function. To date, researchers have predominantly generated terrains from a limited range of noise functions, and the effect of the generator on the learning process is underrepresented in the literature. We compare popular noise-based terrain generators to two indirect encodings, CPPN and GAN. To allow direct comparison between both direct and indirect representations, we assess the impact of a range of representation-agnostic MAP-Elites feature descriptors that compute metrics directly from the generated terrain meshes. Next, performance and coverage are assessed when training a humanoid robot in a physics simulator using the PPO algorithm. Results describe key differences between the generators that inform their use in curriculum learning, and present a range of useful feature descriptors for uptake by the community.
abstract_zh: 课程学习允许通过逐步推进“垫脚石”目标来掌握复杂的任务，以实现最终期望的行为。典型的实现是通过参数化噪声函数生成的地形网格的逐渐复杂化来学习具有挑战性的环境的运动策略。迄今为止，研究人员主要从有限范围的噪声函数生成地形，并且生成器对学习过程的影响在文献中并未得到充分体现。我们将流行的基于噪声的地形生成器与两种间接编码 CPPN 和 GAN 进行比较。为了允许直接和间接表示之间的直接比较，我们评估了一系列与表示无关的 MAP-Elite 特征描述符的影响，这些描述符直接从生成的地形网格计算度量。接下来，使用 PPO 算法在物理模拟器中训练人形机器人时评估性能和覆盖范围。结果描述了生成器之间的主要差异，这些差异为它们在课程学习中的使用提供了信息，并提供了一系列有用的特征描述符供社区采用。

AI.tldr: 本文比较了多种地形生成方法在课程强化学习中的效果，评估其对学习过程的影响。
AI.motivation: 现有研究多依赖有限的噪声函数生成地形，而生成方法对学习过程的影响缺乏系统分析。
AI.method: 对比噪声基生成器、CPPN和GAN，结合MAP-Elites特征描述符，通过PPO算法训练人形机器人验证性能。
AI.result: 发现不同生成器的关键差异，并提出适用于课程学习的特征描述符集合。
AI.conclusion: 为社区提供了选择地形生成方法和特征描述符的指导依据，促进课程强化学习的发展。

authors_text: Kunyuan Li,Jun Zhang,Jun Gao,Meibin Qi
title: Self-Supervised Light Field Depth Estimation Using Epipolar Plane Images
title_zh: 使用极平面图像的自监督光场深度估计
abstract: Exploiting light field data makes it possible to obtain dense and accurate depth map. However, synthetic scenes with limited disparity range cannot contain the diversity of real scenes. By training in synthetic data, current learning-based methods do not perform well in real scenes. In this paper, we propose a self-supervised learning framework for light field depth estimation. Different from the existing end-to-end training methods using disparity label per pixel, our approach implements network training by estimating EPI disparity shift after refocusing, which extends the disparity range of epipolar lines. To reduce the sensitivity of EPI to noise, we propose a new input mode called EPI-Stack, which stacks EPIs in the view dimension. This method is less sensitive to noise scenes than traditional input mode and improves the efficiency of estimation. Compared with other state-of-the-art methods, the proposed method can also obtain higher quality results in real-world scenarios, especially in the complex occlusion and depth discontinuity.
summary: Exploiting light field data makes it possible to obtain dense and accurate depth map. However, synthetic scenes with limited disparity range cannot contain the diversity of real scenes. By training in synthetic data, current learning-based methods do not perform well in real scenes. In this paper, we propose a self-supervised learning framework for light field depth estimation. Different from the existing end-to-end training methods using disparity label per pixel, our approach implements network training by estimating EPI disparity shift after refocusing, which extends the disparity range of epipolar lines. To reduce the sensitivity of EPI to noise, we propose a new input mode called EPI-Stack, which stacks EPIs in the view dimension. This method is less sensitive to noise scenes than traditional input mode and improves the efficiency of estimation. Compared with other state-of-the-art methods, the proposed method can also obtain higher quality results in real-world scenarios, especially in the complex occlusion and depth discontinuity.
abstract_zh: 利用光场数据可以获得密集且准确的深度图。然而，视差范围有限的合成场景无法包含真实场景的多样性。通过合成数据的训练，当前基于学习的方法在真实场景中表现不佳。在本文中，我们提出了一种用于光场深度估计的自监督学习框架。与现有的使用每个像素视差标签的端到端训练方法不同，我们的方法通过估计重新聚焦后的EPI视差偏移来实现网络训练，从而扩展了极线的视差范围。为了降低 EPI 对噪声的敏感性，我们提出了一种称为 EPI-Stack 的新输入模式，它将 EPI 堆叠在视图维度中。该方法比传统输入方式对噪声场景不敏感，提高了估计效率。与其他最先进的方法相比，所提出的方法还可以在现实场景中获得更高质量的结果，特别是在复杂的遮挡和深度不连续的情况下。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于自监督学习的光场深度估计方法，利用视差平面图像（EPI）进行训练，以提高真实场景中的深度估计效果。
AI.motivation: 现有基于合成数据的深度估计方法在真实场景中表现不佳，因真实场景的视差范围和复杂性难以通过合成数据覆盖，需更鲁棒的自监督方法。
AI.method: 提出自监督框架，通过估计重聚焦后EPI的视差位移进行训练，并引入EPI-Stack输入模式，堆叠多视角EPI以降低噪声敏感性，提升估计效率。
AI.result: 在真实场景中优于现有方法，尤其在复杂遮挡和深度不连续区域表现更优，且对噪声更鲁棒。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过扩展视差范围和优化输入模式，有效提升了光场深度估计在真实场景中的准确性和鲁棒性。

ai_content.tldr: 提出一种基于自监督学习的光场深度估计方法，利用视差平面图像（EPI）进行训练，以提高真实场景中的深度估计效果。

tldr: 提出一种基于自监督学习的光场深度估计方法，利用视差平面图像（EPI）进行训练，以提高真实场景中的深度估计效果。
motivation: 现有基于合成数据的深度估计方法在真实场景中表现不佳，因真实场景的视差范围和复杂性难以通过合成数据覆盖，需更鲁棒的自监督方法。
method: 提出自监督框架，通过估计重聚焦后EPI的视差位移进行训练，并引入EPI-Stack输入模式，堆叠多视角EPI以降低噪声敏感性，提升估计效率。
result: 在真实场景中优于现有方法，尤其在复杂遮挡和深度不连续区域表现更优，且对噪声更鲁棒。
conclusion: 该方法通过扩展视差范围和优化输入模式，有效提升了光场深度估计在真实场景中的准确性和鲁棒性。
search_text: Self-Supervised Light Field Depth Estimation Using Epipolar Plane Images 使用极平面图像的自监督光场深度估计 Exploiting light field data makes it possible to obtain dense and accurate depth map. However, synthetic scenes with limited disparity range cannot contain the diversity of real scenes. By training in synthetic data, current learning-based methods do not perform well in real scenes. In this paper, we propose a self-supervised learning framework for light field depth estimation. Different from the existing end-to-end training methods using disparity label per pixel, our approach implements network training by estimating EPI disparity shift after refocusing, which extends the disparity range of epipolar lines. To reduce the sensitivity of EPI to noise, we propose a new input mode called EPI-Stack, which stacks EPIs in the view dimension. This method is less sensitive to noise scenes than traditional input mode and improves the efficiency of estimation. Compared with other state-of-the-art methods, the proposed method can also obtain higher quality results in real-world scenarios, especially in the complex occlusion and depth discontinuity. 利用光场数据可以获得密集且准确的深度图。然而，视差范围有限的合成场景无法包含真实场景的多样性。通过合成数据的训练，当前基于学习的方法在真实场景中表现不佳。在本文中，我们提出了一种用于光场深度估计的自监督学习框架。与现有的使用每个像素视差标签的端到端训练方法不同，我们的方法通过估计重新聚焦后的EPI视差偏移来实现网络训练，从而扩展了极线的视差范围。为了降低 EPI 对噪声的敏感性，我们提出了一种称为 EPI-Stack 的新输入模式，它将 EPI 堆叠在视图维度中。该方法比传统输入方式对噪声场景不敏感，提高了估计效率。与其他最先进的方法相比，所提出的方法还可以在现实场景中获得更高质量的结果，特别是在复杂的遮挡和深度不连续的情况下。 提出一种基于自监督学习的光场深度估计方法，利用视差平面图像（EPI）进行训练，以提高真实场景中的深度估计效果。 Kunyuan Li,Jun Zhang,Jun Gao,Meibin Qi cs.CV

authors_text: Evan Lowe,Levent Güvenç
title: Autonomous Road Vehicle Emergency Obstacle Avoidance Maneuver Framework at Highway Speeds
title_zh: 高速公路自动驾驶车辆紧急避障机动框架
abstract: An Autonomous Road Vehicle (ARV) can navigate various types of road networks using inputs such as throttle (acceleration), braking (deceleration), and steering (change of lateral direction). In most ARV driving scenarios that involve normal vehicle traffic and encounters with vulnerable road users (VRUs), ARVs are not required to take evasive action. This paper presents a novel Emergency Obstacle Avoidance Maneuver (EOAM) methodology for ARVs traveling at higher speeds and lower road surface friction, involving time-critical maneuver determination and control. The proposed EOAM Framework offers usage of the ARV's sensing, perception, control, and actuation system abilities as one cohesive system, to accomplish avoidance of an on-road obstacle, based first on performance feasibility and second on passenger comfort, and is designed to be well-integrated within an ARV high-level system. Co-simulation including the ARV EOAM logic in Simulink and a vehicle model in CarSim is conducted with speeds ranging from 55 to 165 km/h and on road surfaces with friction ranging from 1.0 to 0.1. The results are analyzed and given in the context of an entire ARV system, with implications for future work.
summary: An Autonomous Road Vehicle (ARV) can navigate various types of road networks using inputs such as throttle (acceleration), braking (deceleration), and steering (change of lateral direction). In most ARV driving scenarios that involve normal vehicle traffic and encounters with vulnerable road users (VRUs), ARVs are not required to take evasive action. This paper presents a novel Emergency Obstacle Avoidance Maneuver (EOAM) methodology for ARVs traveling at higher speeds and lower road surface friction, involving time-critical maneuver determination and control. The proposed EOAM Framework offers usage of the ARV's sensing, perception, control, and actuation system abilities as one cohesive system, to accomplish avoidance of an on-road obstacle, based first on performance feasibility and second on passenger comfort, and is designed to be well-integrated within an ARV high-level system. Co-simulation including the ARV EOAM logic in Simulink and a vehicle model in CarSim is conducted with speeds ranging from 55 to 165 km/h and on road surfaces with friction ranging from 1.0 to 0.1. The results are analyzed and given in the context of an entire ARV system, with implications for future work.
abstract_zh: 自动道路车辆 (ARV) 可以使用油门（加速）、制动（减速）和转向（改变横向方向）等输入来导航各种类型的道路网络。在大多数涉及正常车辆交通和遇到弱势道路使用者 (VRU) 的 ARV 驾驶场景中，ARV 不需要采取规避行动。本文提出了一种新颖的紧急避障机动（EOAM）方法，用于以较高速度和较低路面摩擦行驶的 ARV，涉及时间关键的机动确定和控制。拟议的 EOAM 框架将 ARV 的传感、感知、控制和驱动系统功能作为一个整体系统来使用，首先基于性能可行性，其次基于乘客舒适度，从而实现避开道路障碍物，并且旨在与 ARV 高级系统良好集成。联合仿真包括 Simulink 中的 ARV EOAM 逻辑和 CarSim 中的车辆模型，测试速度范围为 55 至 165 km/h，路面摩擦力范围为 1.0 至 0.1。结果在整个 ARV 系统的背景下进行分析和给出，对未来的工作具有影响。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于高速公路上自动驾驶车辆（ARV）的紧急避障机动框架，以应对高速和低摩擦路面条件下的突发障碍物。
AI.motivation: 现有自动驾驶系统在高速和低摩擦路面上的紧急避障能力不足，可能导致事故，因此需要开发一种结合感知、控制和执行系统的综合框架。
AI.method: 通过Simulink和CarSim联合仿真，测试速度55-165 km/h及路面摩擦系数0.1-1.0条件下的避障逻辑，优先考虑性能可行性与乘客舒适度。
AI.result: 仿真结果验证了框架在不同速度和摩擦条件下的有效性，为ARV系统的整体设计提供了参考，并指出未来需进一步整合至高阶系统中。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为高速场景下的紧急避障提供了可行方案，后续研究应关注其与ARV高阶系统的深度集成及实际道路验证。
