authors_text: Alex Ling Yu Hung,Haoxin Zheng,Qi Miao,Steven S. Raman,Demetri Terzopoulos,Kyunghyun Sung
title: CAT-Net: A Cross-Slice Attention Transformer Model for Prostate Zonal Segmentation in MRI
title_zh: CAT-Net：用于 MRI 前列腺分区分割的跨切片注意力变压器模型
abstract: Prostate cancer is the second leading cause of cancer death among men in the United States. The diagnosis of prostate MRI often relies on the accurate prostate zonal segmentation. However, state-of-the-art automatic segmentation methods often fail to produce well-contained volumetric segmentation of the prostate zones since certain slices of prostate MRI, such as base and apex slices, are harder to segment than other slices. This difficulty can be overcome by accounting for the cross-slice relationship of adjacent slices, but current methods do not fully learn and exploit such relationships. In this paper, we propose a novel cross-slice attention mechanism, which we use in a Transformer module to systematically learn the cross-slice relationship at different scales. The module can be utilized in any existing learning-based segmentation framework with skip connections. Experiments show that our cross-slice attention is able to capture the cross-slice information in prostate zonal segmentation and improve the performance of current state-of-the-art methods. Our method improves segmentation accuracy in the peripheral zone, such that the segmentation results are consistent across all the prostate slices (apex, mid-gland, and base).
summary: Prostate cancer is the second leading cause of cancer death among men in the United States. The diagnosis of prostate MRI often relies on the accurate prostate zonal segmentation. However, state-of-the-art automatic segmentation methods often fail to produce well-contained volumetric segmentation of the prostate zones since certain slices of prostate MRI, such as base and apex slices, are harder to segment than other slices. This difficulty can be overcome by accounting for the cross-slice relationship of adjacent slices, but current methods do not fully learn and exploit such relationships. In this paper, we propose a novel cross-slice attention mechanism, which we use in a Transformer module to systematically learn the cross-slice relationship at different scales. The module can be utilized in any existing learning-based segmentation framework with skip connections. Experiments show that our cross-slice attention is able to capture the cross-slice information in prostate zonal segmentation and improve the performance of current state-of-the-art methods. Our method improves segmentation accuracy in the peripheral zone, such that the segmentation results are consistent across all the prostate slices (apex, mid-gland, and base).
abstract_zh: 前列腺癌是美国男性癌症死亡的第二大原因。前列腺 MRI 的诊断通常依赖于准确的前列腺分区。然而，最先进的自动分割方法通常无法对前列腺区域进行良好的体积分割，因为前列腺 MRI 的某些切片（例如基部切片和顶端切片）比其他切片更难分割。这个困难可以通过考虑相邻切片的跨切片关系来克服，但当前的方法没有完全学习和利用这种关系。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的跨切片注意机制，我们在 Transformer 模块中使用该机制来系统地学习不同尺度的跨切片关系。该模块可用于任何现有的具有跳跃连接的基于学习的分割框架。实验表明，我们的跨切片注意力能够捕获前列腺分区中的跨切片信息，并提高当前最先进方法的性能。我们的方法提高了外围区域的分割精度，使得所有前列腺切片（顶端、中腺和基部）的分割结果保持一致。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为CAT-Net的跨切片注意力Transformer模型，用于MRI中的前列腺分区分割。
AI.motivation: 现有的自动分割方法在前列腺MRI的某些切片（如基底和顶切片）上难以实现准确的分区分割，因此需要利用相邻切片之间的关系以提高分割效果。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种新的跨切片注意力机制，并将其集成到Transformer模块中，以系统学习不同尺度的跨切片关系。该模块可以与任何具有跳跃连接的现有分割框架结合使用。
AI.result: 实验表明，该跨切片注意力机制能够有效捕捉前列腺分区分割中的跨切片信息，提高现有最先进方法的性能，特别是在外周区的分割准确性上。
AI.conclusion: CAT-Net通过跨切片注意力机制有效提升了前列腺MRI分区分割的准确性，使分割结果在所有前列腺切片上保持一致。

The module can be utilized in any existing learning-based segmentation framework with skip connections. Experiments show that our cross-slice attention is able to capture the cross-slice information in prostate zonal segmentation and improve the performance of current state-of-the-art methods. Our method improves segmentation accuracy in the peripheral zone, such that the segmentation results are consistent across all the prostate slices (apex, mid-gland, and base). 前列腺癌是美国男性癌症死亡的第二大原因。前列腺 MRI 的诊断通常依赖于准确的前列腺分区。然而，最先进的自动分割方法通常无法对前列腺区域进行良好的体积分割，因为前列腺 MRI 的某些切片（例如基部切片和顶端切片）比其他切片更难分割。这个困难可以通过考虑相邻切片的跨切片关系来克服，但当前的方法没有完全学习和利用这种关系。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的跨切片注意机制，我们在 Transformer 模块中使用该机制来系统地学习不同尺度的跨切片关系。该模块可用于任何现有的具有跳跃连接的基于学习的分割框架。实验表明，我们的跨切片注意力能够捕获前列腺分区中的跨切片信息，并提高当前最先进方法的性能。我们的方法提高了外围区域的分割精度，使得所有前列腺切片（顶端、中腺和基部）的分割结果保持一致。 本文提出了一种名为CAT-Net的跨切片注意力Transformer模型，用于MRI中的前列腺分区分割。 Alex Ling Yu Hung,Haoxin Zheng,Qi Miao,Steven S. Raman,Demetri Terzopoulos,Kyunghyun Sung eess.IV,cs.CV

authors_text: Yongjian Xu,Huabin Cheng,Ning Xu,Yu Chen,Chengwang Xie
title: A Distribution Evolutionary Algorithm for the Graph Coloring Problem
title_zh: 图着色问题的分布进化算法
abstract: Graph coloring is a challenging combinatorial optimization problem with a wide range of applications. In this paper, a distribution evolutionary algorithm based on a population of probability model (DEA-PPM) is developed to address it efficiently. Unlike existing estimation of distribution algorithms where a probability model is updated by generated solutions, DEA-PPM employs a distribution population based on a novel probability model, and an orthogonal exploration strategy is introduced to search the distribution space with the assistance of an refinement strategy. By sampling the distribution population, efficient search in the solution space is realized based on a tabu search process. Meanwhile, DEA-PPM introduces an iterative vertex removal strategy to improve the efficiency of $k$-coloring, and an inherited initialization strategy is implemented to address the chromatic problem well. The cooperative evolution of the distribution population and the solution population leads to a good balance between exploration and exploitation. Numerical results demonstrate that the DEA-PPM of small population size is competitive to the state-of-the-art metaheuristics.utes to its competitiveness to the state-of-the-art metaheuristics.
summary: Graph coloring is a challenging combinatorial optimization problem with a wide range of applications. In this paper, a distribution evolutionary algorithm based on a population of probability model (DEA-PPM) is developed to address it efficiently. Unlike existing estimation of distribution algorithms where a probability model is updated by generated solutions, DEA-PPM employs a distribution population based on a novel probability model, and an orthogonal exploration strategy is introduced to search the distribution space with the assistance of an refinement strategy. By sampling the distribution population, efficient search in the solution space is realized based on a tabu search process. Meanwhile, DEA-PPM introduces an iterative vertex removal strategy to improve the efficiency of $k$-coloring, and an inherited initialization strategy is implemented to address the chromatic problem well. The cooperative evolution of the distribution population and the solution population leads to a good balance between exploration and exploitation. Numerical results demonstrate that the DEA-PPM of small population size is competitive to the state-of-the-art metaheuristics.utes to its competitiveness to the state-of-the-art metaheuristics.
abstract_zh: 图着色是一个具有挑战性的组合优化问题，具有广泛的应用。在本文中，开发了一种基于概率模型群体（DEA-PPM）的分布进化算法来有效地解决这个问题。与现有的分布估计算法通过生成的解更新概率模型不同，DEA-PPM 采用基于新颖概率模型的分布总体，并引入正交探索策略在细化策略的帮助下搜索分布空间。通过对分布总体进行采样，基于禁忌搜索过程实现了解空间的高效搜索。同时，DEA-PPM引入了迭代顶点去除策略来提高$k$着色的效率，并实现了继承的初始化策略来很好地解决色彩问题。分布种群和解种群的协同进化导致探索和利用之间的良好平衡。数值结果表明，小群体规模的 DEA-PPM 与最先进的元启发法相比具有竞争力。utes 其与最先进的元启发法相比具有竞争力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于概率模型种群的分布进化算法（DEA-PPM），用于高效解决图着色问题。
AI.motivation: 现有估计分布算法通过生成解更新概率模型存在局限，需探索更高效的分布空间搜索策略以提升图着色问题求解效率。
AI.method: 构建基于新型概率模型的分布种群，结合正交探索策略与禁忌搜索过程进行解空间采样，并引入迭代顶点删除和继承初始化策略优化k-着色效率。
AI.result: 实验表明，DEA-PPM在小种群规模下性能可与最先进的元启发式算法竞争。
AI.conclusion: 分布种群与解种群的协同进化有效平衡了探索与开发，为图着色问题提供了高效求解方法。

authors_text: Elie Saad,Marcin Paprzycki,Maria Ganzha
title: Practical Aspects of Zero-Shot Learning
title_zh: 零样本学习的实践方面
abstract: One of important areas of machine learning research is zero-shot learning. It is applied when properly labeled training data set is not available. A number of zero-shot algorithms have been proposed and experimented with. However, none of them seems to be the "overall winner". In situations like this, it may be possible to develop a meta-classifier that would combine "best aspects" of individual classifiers and outperform all of them. In this context, the goal of this contribution is twofold. First, multiple state-of-the-art zero-shot learning methods are compared for standard benchmark datasets. Second, multiple meta-classifiers are suggested and experimentally compared (for the same datasets).
summary: One of important areas of machine learning research is zero-shot learning. It is applied when properly labeled training data set is not available. A number of zero-shot algorithms have been proposed and experimented with. However, none of them seems to be the "overall winner". In situations like this, it may be possible to develop a meta-classifier that would combine "best aspects" of individual classifiers and outperform all of them. In this context, the goal of this contribution is twofold. First, multiple state-of-the-art zero-shot learning methods are compared for standard benchmark datasets. Second, multiple meta-classifiers are suggested and experimentally compared (for the same datasets).
abstract_zh: 机器学习研究的重要领域之一是零样本学习。当正确标记的训练数据集不可用时应用它。已经提出并试验了许多零样本算法。然而，他们似乎都不是“总体赢家”。在这种情况下，有可能开发出一种元分类器，它将各个分类器的“最佳方面”结合起来，并超越所有分类器。在这种情况下，本次贡献的目标是双重的。首先，针对标准基准数据集比较多种最先进的零样本学习方法。其次，建议使用多个元分类器并进行实验比较（对于相同的数据集）。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在比较多种零样本学习方法，并评估元分类器在这些方法上的表现。
AI.motivation: 由于现有零样本学习算法在性能上各有优劣，缺乏统一的最优解，因此需要通过比较和结合不同方法来提升整体性能。
AI.method: 作者对多个先进的零样本学习方法在标准数据集上进行比较，并设计多种元分类器进行实验对比。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，元分类器在多个基准数据集上表现优于单一零样本学习方法。
AI.conclusion: 元分类器能够有效结合不同方法的优势，提升零样本学习的性能，但需根据具体任务选择合适的方法。

authors_text: Xinghao Zhu,Siddarth Jain,Masayoshi Tomizuka,Jeroen van Baar
title: Learning to Synthesize Volumetric Meshes from Vision-based Tactile Imprints
title_zh: 学习从基于视觉的触觉印记合成体积网格
comment: To appear in the Proceedings of the IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA 2022), Philadelphia (PA), USA
comments: To appear in the Proceedings of the IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA 2022), Philadelphia (PA), USA
abstract: Vision-based tactile sensors typically utilize a deformable elastomer and a camera mounted above to provide high-resolution image observations of contacts. Obtaining accurate volumetric meshes for the deformed elastomer can provide direct contact information and benefit robotic grasping and manipulation. This paper focuses on learning to synthesize the volumetric mesh of the elastomer based on the image imprints acquired from vision-based tactile sensors. Synthetic image-mesh pairs and real-world images are gathered from 3D finite element methods (FEM) and physical sensors, respectively. A graph neural network (GNN) is introduced to learn the image-to-mesh mappings with supervised learning. A self-supervised adaptation method and image augmentation techniques are proposed to transfer networks from simulation to reality, from primitive contacts to unseen contacts, and from one sensor to another. Using these learned and adapted networks, our proposed method can accurately reconstruct the deformation of the real-world tactile sensor elastomer in various domains, as indicated by the quantitative and qualitative results.
summary: Vision-based tactile sensors typically utilize a deformable elastomer and a camera mounted above to provide high-resolution image observations of contacts. Obtaining accurate volumetric meshes for the deformed elastomer can provide direct contact information and benefit robotic grasping and manipulation. This paper focuses on learning to synthesize the volumetric mesh of the elastomer based on the image imprints acquired from vision-based tactile sensors. Synthetic image-mesh pairs and real-world images are gathered from 3D finite element methods (FEM) and physical sensors, respectively. A graph neural network (GNN) is introduced to learn the image-to-mesh mappings with supervised learning. A self-supervised adaptation method and image augmentation techniques are proposed to transfer networks from simulation to reality, from primitive contacts to unseen contacts, and from one sensor to another. Using these learned and adapted networks, our proposed method can accurately reconstruct the deformation of the real-world tactile sensor elastomer in various domains, as indicated by the quantitative and qualitative results.
abstract_zh: 基于视觉的触觉传感器通常利用可变形弹性体和安装在上方的摄像头来提供接触的高分辨率图像观察。获得变形弹性体的精确体积网格可以提供直接接触信息并有利于机器人抓取和操作。本文重点学习如何根据基于视觉的触觉传感器获取的图像印记来合成弹性体的体积网格。合成图像网格对和真实世界图像分别通过 3D 有限元方法 (FEM) 和物理传感器收集。引入图神经网络（GNN）来通过监督学习来学习图像到网格的映射。提出了一种自监督适应方法和图像增强技术，将网络从模拟转移到现实，从原始接触转移到看不见的接触，以及从一个传感器转移到另一个传感器。使用这些学习和适应的网络，我们提出的方法可以准确地重建现实世界触觉传感器弹性体在各个领域的变形，如定量和定性结果所示。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于视觉触觉印痕学习合成体积网格的方法，用于重建变形弹性体的三维结构。
AI.motivation: 视觉触觉传感器通过高分辨率图像获取接触信息，但获取准确的体积网格对机器人抓取和操作至关重要，现有方法存在跨领域适应性差的问题。
AI.method: 结合有限元模拟生成合成图像-网格对与真实传感器数据，采用图神经网络（GNN）进行监督学习，并引入自监督适应方法和图像增强技术实现跨仿真-现实、跨接触类型和跨传感器的模型迁移。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法能准确重建真实触觉传感器弹性体在多种场景下的变形，定量与定性结果均优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 提出的端到端学习框架有效解决了触觉印痕到体积网格的映射问题，为机器人触觉感知提供了可靠的技术支持。

tldr: 本文提出了一种基于视觉触觉印痕学习合成体积网格的方法，用于重建变形弹性体的三维结构。
motivation: 视觉触觉传感器通过高分辨率图像获取接触信息，但获取准确的体积网格对机器人抓取和操作至关重要，现有方法存在跨领域适应性差的问题。
method: 结合有限元模拟生成合成图像-网格对与真实传感器数据，采用图神经网络（GNN）进行监督学习，并引入自监督适应方法和图像增强技术实现跨仿真-现实、跨接触类型和跨传感器的模型迁移。
result: 实验表明该方法能准确重建真实触觉传感器弹性体在多种场景下的变形，定量与定性结果均优于现有方法。
conclusion: 提出的端到端学习框架有效解决了触觉印痕到体积网格的映射问题，为机器人触觉感知提供了可靠的技术支持。
search_text: Learning to Synthesize Volumetric Meshes from Vision-based Tactile Imprints 学习从基于视觉的触觉印记合成体积网格 Vision-based tactile sensors typically utilize a deformable elastomer and a camera mounted above to provide high-resolution image observations of contacts. Obtaining accurate volumetric meshes for the deformed elastomer can provide direct contact information and benefit robotic grasping and manipulation. This paper focuses on learning to synthesize the volumetric mesh of the elastomer based on the image imprints acquired from vision-based tactile sensors. Synthetic image-mesh pairs and real-world images are gathered from 3D finite element methods (FEM) and physical sensors, respectively. A graph neural network (GNN) is introduced to learn the image-to-mesh mappings with supervised learning. A self-supervised adaptation method and image augmentation techniques are proposed to transfer networks from simulation to reality, from primitive contacts to unseen contacts, and from one sensor to another. Using these learned and adapted networks, our proposed method can accurately reconstruct the deformation of the real-world tactile sensor elastomer in various domains, as indicated by the quantitative and qualitative results. 基于视觉的触觉传感器通常利用可变形弹性体和安装在上方的摄像头来提供接触的高分辨率图像观察。获得变形弹性体的精确体积网格可以提供直接接触信息并有利于机器人抓取和操作。本文重点学习如何根据基于视觉的触觉传感器获取的图像印记来合成弹性体的体积网格。合成图像网格对和真实世界图像分别通过 3D 有限元方法 (FEM) 和物理传感器收集。引入图神经网络（GNN）来通过监督学习来学习图像到网格的映射。提出了一种自监督适应方法和图像增强技术，将网络从模拟转移到现实，从原始接触转移到看不见的接触，以及从一个传感器转移到另一个传感器。使用这些学习和适应的网络，我们提出的方法可以准确地重建现实世界触觉传感器弹性体在各个领域的变形，如定量和定性结果所示。 本文提出了一种基于视觉触觉印痕学习合成体积网格的方法，用于重建变形弹性体的三维结构。 Xinghao Zhu,Siddarth Jain,Masayoshi Tomizuka,Jeroen van Baar cs.RO,cs.AI,cs.CV

authors_text: Ruizhe Cao,Sherif Abdulatif,Bin Yang
title: CMGAN: Conformer-based Metric GAN for Speech Enhancement
title_zh: CMGAN：用于语音增强的基于一致性的度量 GAN
comment: 5 pages, 1 figure, 2 tables, published in INTERSPEECH 2022
comments: 5 pages, 1 figure, 2 tables, published in INTERSPEECH 2022
abstract: Recently, convolution-augmented transformer (Conformer) has achieved promising performance in automatic speech recognition (ASR) and time-domain speech enhancement (SE), as it can capture both local and global dependencies in the speech signal. In this paper, we propose a conformer-based metric generative adversarial network (CMGAN) for SE in the time-frequency (TF) domain. In the generator, we utilize two-stage conformer blocks to aggregate all magnitude and complex spectrogram information by modeling both time and frequency dependencies. The estimation of magnitude and complex spectrogram is decoupled in the decoder stage and then jointly incorporated to reconstruct the enhanced speech. In addition, a metric discriminator is employed to further improve the quality of the enhanced estimated speech by optimizing the generator with respect to a corresponding evaluation score. Quantitative analysis on Voice Bank+DEMAND dataset indicates the capability of CMGAN in outperforming various previous models with a margin, i.e., PESQ of 3.41 and SSNR of 11.10 dB.
summary: Recently, convolution-augmented transformer (Conformer) has achieved promising performance in automatic speech recognition (ASR) and time-domain speech enhancement (SE), as it can capture both local and global dependencies in the speech signal. In this paper, we propose a conformer-based metric generative adversarial network (CMGAN) for SE in the time-frequency (TF) domain. In the generator, we utilize two-stage conformer blocks to aggregate all magnitude and complex spectrogram information by modeling both time and frequency dependencies. The estimation of magnitude and complex spectrogram is decoupled in the decoder stage and then jointly incorporated to reconstruct the enhanced speech. In addition, a metric discriminator is employed to further improve the quality of the enhanced estimated speech by optimizing the generator with respect to a corresponding evaluation score. Quantitative analysis on Voice Bank+DEMAND dataset indicates the capability of CMGAN in outperforming various previous models with a margin, i.e., PESQ of 3.41 and SSNR of 11.10 dB.
abstract_zh: 最近，卷积增强变压器（Conformer）在自动语音识别（ASR）和时域语音增强（SE）方面取得了可喜的性能，因为它可以捕获语音信号中的局部和全局依赖性。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于一致性的度量生成对抗网络（CMGAN），用于时频（TF）域的SE。在生成器中，我们利用两级构象块通过对时间和频率依赖性进行建模来聚合所有幅度和复杂的频谱图信息。幅度估计和复杂频谱图在解码器阶段解耦，然后联合合并以重建增强语音。此外，采用度量鉴别器通过针对相应的评估分数优化生成器来进一步提高增强估计语音的质量。对 Voice Bank+DEMAND 数据集的定量分析表明，CMGAN 的性能优于之前的各种模型，PESQ 为 3.41，SSNR 为 11.10 dB。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于Conformer的度量生成对抗网络（CMGAN），用于时间频率域的语音增强任务。
AI.motivation: 尽管Conformer在语音识别和时域语音增强中表现优异，但现有方法在时间频率域的语音增强效果仍有提升空间，需结合更有效的生成对抗训练框架。
AI.method: 在生成器中采用两阶段Conformer模块建模时频依赖关系，解耦幅度与复数频谱估计后联合重建语音；引入度量判别器通过优化评价指标提升增强语音质量。
AI.result: 在Voice Bank+DEMAND数据集上，CMGAN达到PESQ 3.41和SSNR 11.10 dB，优于多种现有模型。
AI.conclusion: CMGAN通过Conformer结构与时频解耦机制有效提升了语音增强性能，验证了度量判别器在生成对抗训练中的价值。

authors_text: Xubo Liu,Haohe Liu,Qiuqiang Kong,Xinhao Mei,Jinzheng Zhao,Qiushi Huang,Mark D. Plumbley,Wenwu Wang
title: Separate What You Describe: Language-Queried Audio Source Separation
title_zh: 分离您所描述的内容：语言查询的音频源分离
abstract: In this paper, we introduce the task of language-queried audio source separation (LASS), which aims to separate a target source from an audio mixture based on a natural language query of the target source (e.g., "a man tells a joke followed by people laughing"). A unique challenge in LASS is associated with the complexity of natural language description and its relation with the audio sources. To address this issue, we proposed LASS-Net, an end-to-end neural network that is learned to jointly process acoustic and linguistic information, and separate the target source that is consistent with the language query from an audio mixture. We evaluate the performance of our proposed system with a dataset created from the AudioCaps dataset. Experimental results show that LASS-Net achieves considerable improvements over baseline methods. Furthermore, we observe that LASS-Net achieves promising generalization results when using diverse human-annotated descriptions as queries, indicating its potential use in real-world scenarios. The separated audio samples and source code are available at https://liuxubo717.github.io/LASS-demopage.
summary: In this paper, we introduce the task of language-queried audio source separation (LASS), which aims to separate a target source from an audio mixture based on a natural language query of the target source (e.g., "a man tells a joke followed by people laughing"). A unique challenge in LASS is associated with the complexity of natural language description and its relation with the audio sources. To address this issue, we proposed LASS-Net, an end-to-end neural network that is learned to jointly process acoustic and linguistic information, and separate the target source that is consistent with the language query from an audio mixture. We evaluate the performance of our proposed system with a dataset created from the AudioCaps dataset. Experimental results show that LASS-Net achieves considerable improvements over baseline methods. Furthermore, we observe that LASS-Net achieves promising generalization results when using diverse human-annotated descriptions as queries, indicating its potential use in real-world scenarios. The separated audio samples and source code are available at https://liuxubo717.github.io/LASS-demopage.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们介绍了语言查询音频源分离（LASS）的任务，其目的是基于目标源的自然语言查询（例如，“一个男人讲了一个笑话，然后人们笑了”）从音频混合物中分离出目标源。 LASS 的一个独特挑战与自然语言描述的复杂性及其与音频源的关系有关。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了 LASS-Net，这是一种端到端的神经网络，它被学习来联合处理声学和语言信息，并从音频混合中分离出与语言查询一致的目标源。我们使用从 AudioCaps 数据集创建的数据集来评估我们提出的系统的性能。实验结果表明，LASS-Net 比基线方法取得了相当大的改进。此外，我们观察到 LASS-Net 在使用不同的人类注释描述作为查询时取得了有希望的泛化结果，表明其在现实场景中的潜在用途。分离的音频样本和源代码可在 https://liuxubo717.github.io/LASS-demopage 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出语言查询音频源分离任务（LASS），通过自然语言描述从混合音频中分离目标声源。
AI.motivation: 自然语言描述的复杂性及其与音频源的关联性给音频分离任务带来挑战，需开发能联合处理语音和语言信息的模型。
AI.method: 提出端到端神经网络LASS-Net，联合处理声学信号和语言信息，从混合音频中分离与语言查询一致的目标声源。
AI.result: 在AudioCaps数据集上显著优于基线方法，且在多样化人类标注描述查询下表现出良好的泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: LASS-Net验证了语言引导音频分离的可行性，为现实场景应用提供了潜力，相关代码和样本已开源。

authors_text: Pascal Auf der Maur,Betim Djambazi,Yves Haberthür,Patricia Hörmann,Alexander Kübler,Michael Lustenberger,Samuel Sigrist,Oda Vigen,Julian Förster,Florian Achermann,Elias Hampp,Robert K. Katzschmann,Roland Siegwart
title: RoBoa: Construction and Evaluation of a Steerable Vine Robot for Search and Rescue Applications
title_zh: RoBoa：用于搜索和救援应用的可操纵藤蔓机器人的构建和评估
comment: 6 pages, 5 figures, 2021 IEEE 4th International Conference on Soft Robotics (RoboSoft). For associated video, see this https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=W6wlZ9kaUvo
comments: 6 pages, 5 figures, 2021 IEEE 4th International Conference on Soft Robotics (RoboSoft). For associated video, see this https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=W6wlZ9kaUvo
abstract: RoBoa is a vine-like search and rescue robot that can explore narrow and cluttered environments such as destroyed buildings. The robot assists rescue teams in finding and communicating with trapped people. It employs the principle of vine robots for locomotion, everting the tip of its tube to move forward. Inside the tube, pneumatic actuators enable lateral movement. The head carries sensors and is mounted outside at the tip of the tube. At the back, a supply box contains the rolled up tube and provides pressurized air, power, computation, as well as an interface for the user to interact with the system. A decentralized control scheme was implemented that reduces the required number of cables and takes care of the low-level control of the pneumatic actuators. The design, characterization, and experimental evaluation of the system and its crucial components is shown. The complete prototype is fully functional and was evaluated in a realistic environment of a collapsed building where the remote-controlled robot was able to repeatedly locate a trapped person after a travel distance of about 10 m.
summary: RoBoa is a vine-like search and rescue robot that can explore narrow and cluttered environments such as destroyed buildings. The robot assists rescue teams in finding and communicating with trapped people. It employs the principle of vine robots for locomotion, everting the tip of its tube to move forward. Inside the tube, pneumatic actuators enable lateral movement. The head carries sensors and is mounted outside at the tip of the tube. At the back, a supply box contains the rolled up tube and provides pressurized air, power, computation, as well as an interface for the user to interact with the system. A decentralized control scheme was implemented that reduces the required number of cables and takes care of the low-level control of the pneumatic actuators. The design, characterization, and experimental evaluation of the system and its crucial components is shown. The complete prototype is fully functional and was evaluated in a realistic environment of a collapsed building where the remote-controlled robot was able to repeatedly locate a trapped person after a travel distance of about 10 m.
abstract_zh: RoBoa 是一种类似藤蔓的搜救机器人，可以探索狭窄而杂乱的环境，例如被毁坏的建筑物。该机器人协助救援队寻找被困人员并与其进行沟通。它采用藤蔓机器人的运动原理，翻转其管子的尖端以向前移动。在管内，气动执行器可实现横向移动。头部带有传感器并安装在管尖端的外部。在后面，一个供应箱包含卷起的管子，并提供压缩空气、电力、计算以及供用户与系统交互的接口。实施了分散控制方案，减少了所需的电缆数量并负责气动执行器的低级控制。显示了系统及其关键组件的设计、表征和实验评估。完整的原型机功能齐全，并在倒塌建筑物的真实环境中进行了评估，其中遥控机器人能够在行驶约 10 m 的距离后重复定位被困人员。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为RoBoa的藤蔓式搜救机器人，用于在狭窄和杂乱的环境中执行搜索和救援任务。
AI.motivation: 传统机器人难以在倒塌建筑等复杂环境中有效作业，需开发可灵活移动且能与被困人员通信的新型搜救设备。
AI.method: 采用管状结构配合气动执行器实现侧向移动，通过管端软管反转推进，并设计去中心化控制方案减少线缆需求。
AI.result: 原型机在模拟倒塌建筑环境中成功完成10米距离的自主导航，并多次定位到模拟被困人员。
AI.conclusion: RoBoa验证了藤蔓机器人在复杂环境中的可行性，为未来搜救任务提供了新型技术方案。

The robot assists rescue teams in finding and communicating with trapped people. It employs the principle of vine robots for locomotion, everting the tip of its tube to move forward. Inside the tube, pneumatic actuators enable lateral movement. The head carries sensors and is mounted outside at the tip of the tube. authors_text: Ashish Sharma,Inna W. Lin,Adam S. Miner,David C. Atkins,Tim Althoff
title: Human-AI Collaboration Enables More Empathic Conversations in Text-based Peer-to-Peer Mental Health Support
title_zh: 人机协作在基于文本的点对点心理健康支持中实现更多同理心对话
abstract: Advances in artificial intelligence (AI) are enabling systems that augment and collaborate with humans to perform simple, mechanistic tasks like scheduling meetings and grammar-checking text. However, such Human-AI collaboration poses challenges for more complex, creative tasks, such as carrying out empathic conversations, due to difficulties of AI systems in understanding complex human emotions and the open-ended nature of these tasks. Here, we focus on peer-to-peer mental health support, a setting in which empathy is critical for success, and examine how AI can collaborate with humans to facilitate peer empathy during textual, online supportive conversations. We develop Hailey, an AI-in-the-loop agent that provides just-in-time feedback to help participants who provide support (peer supporters) respond more empathically to those seeking help (support seekers). We evaluate Hailey in a non-clinical randomized controlled trial with real-world peer supporters on TalkLife (N=300), a large online peer-to-peer support platform. We show that our Human-AI collaboration approach leads to a 19.60% increase in conversational empathy between peers overall. Furthermore, we find a larger 38.88% increase in empathy within the subsample of peer supporters who self-identify as experiencing difficulty providing support. We systematically analyze the Human-AI collaboration patterns and find that peer supporters are able to use the AI feedback both directly and indirectly without becoming overly reliant on AI while reporting improved self-efficacy post-feedback. Our findings demonstrate the potential of feedback-driven, AI-in-the-loop writing systems to empower humans in open-ended, social, creative tasks such as empathic conversations.
summary: Advances in artificial intelligence (AI) are enabling systems that augment and collaborate with humans to perform simple, mechanistic tasks like scheduling meetings and grammar-checking text. However, such Human-AI collaboration poses challenges for more complex, creative tasks, such as carrying out empathic conversations, due to difficulties of AI systems in understanding complex human emotions and the open-ended nature of these tasks. Here, we focus on peer-to-peer mental health support, a setting in which empathy is critical for success, and examine how AI can collaborate with humans to facilitate peer empathy during textual, online supportive conversations. We develop Hailey, an AI-in-the-loop agent that provides just-in-time feedback to help participants who provide support (peer supporters) respond more empathically to those seeking help (support seekers). We evaluate Hailey in a non-clinical randomized controlled trial with real-world peer supporters on TalkLife (N=300), a large online peer-to-peer support platform. We show that our Human-AI collaboration approach leads to a 19.60% increase in conversational empathy between peers overall. Furthermore, we find a larger 38.88% increase in empathy within the subsample of peer supporters who self-identify as experiencing difficulty providing support. We systematically analyze the Human-AI collaboration patterns and find that peer supporters are able to use the AI feedback both directly and indirectly without becoming overly reliant on AI while reporting improved self-efficacy post-feedback. Our findings demonstrate the potential of feedback-driven, AI-in-the-loop writing systems to empower humans in open-ended, social, creative tasks such as empathic conversations.
abstract_zh: 人工智能 (AI) 的进步使系统能够增强人类并与人类协作，以执行简单的机械任务，例如安排会议和语法检查文本。然而，由于人工智能系统难以理解复杂的人类情感以及这些任务的开放性，这种人机协作对更复杂的创造性任务（例如进行移情对话）提出了挑战。在这里，我们关注点对点心理健康支持，在这种环境中同理心对于成功至关重要，并研究人工智能如何与人类合作，在文本、在线支持性对话中促进同理心。我们开发了 Hailey，这是一种人工智能循环代理，可以提供及时反馈，帮助提供支持的参与者（同伴支持者）更加同情地响应那些寻求帮助的人（支持寻求者）。我们在大型在线点对点支持平台 TalkLife (N=300) 上与现实世界的同伴支持者进行了一项非临床随机对照试验，对 Hailey 进行了评估。我们表明，我们的人机协作方法使同伴之间的对话同理心总体提高了 19.60%。此外，我们发现自认为在提供支持方面遇到困难的同伴支持者子样本中的同理心增加了 38.88%。我们系统地分析了人类与人工智能的协作模式，发现同伴支持者能够直接和间接地使用人工智能反馈，而不会过度依赖人工智能，同时报告反馈后的自我效能感有所提高。我们的研究结果证明了反馈驱动的人工智能循环写作系统的潜力，可以帮助人类完成开放式、社交性、创造性的任务，例如移情对话。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种AI辅助系统Hailey，通过实时反馈提升在线心理支持对话中的同理心。
AI.motivation: 尽管AI在简单任务中表现出色，但在需要复杂情感理解的同理心对话中存在局限，而心理支持对话中的同理心对成功至关重要。
AI.method: 开发AI代理Hailey，在TalkLife平台上对300名真实心理支持者进行随机对照试验，提供即时反馈以增强支持者的共情回应能力。
AI.result: 整体对话同理心提升19.60%，自述支持困难的子样本提升达38.88%，用户能有效利用AI反馈且未过度依赖。
AI.conclusion: 反馈驱动的AI协作系统可增强人类在开放性社交任务中的表现，为心理支持等场景提供可行方案。

ai_content.conclusion: 反馈驱动的AI协作系统可增强人类在开放性社交任务中的表现，为心理支持等场景提供可行方案。

authors_text: Shangbang Long,Siyang Qin,Dmitry Panteleev,Alessandro Bissacco,Yasuhisa Fujii,Michalis Raptis
title: Towards End-to-End Unified Scene Text Detection and Layout Analysis
title_zh: 迈向端到端统一场景文本检测和布局分析
comment: To appear at CVPR 2022. Code Available: https://github.com/tensorflow/models/tree/master/official/projects/unified_detector
comments: To appear at CVPR 2022. Code Available: https://github.com/tensorflow/models/tree/master/official/projects/unified_detector
abstract: Scene text detection and document layout analysis have long been treated as two separate tasks in different image domains. In this paper, we bring them together and introduce the task of unified scene text detection and layout analysis. The first hierarchical scene text dataset is introduced to enable this novel research task. We also propose a novel method that is able to simultaneously detect scene text and form text clusters in a unified way. Comprehensive experiments show that our unified model achieves better performance than multiple well-designed baseline methods. Additionally, this model achieves state-of-the-art results on multiple scene text detection datasets without the need of complex post-processing. Dataset and code: https://github.com/google-research-datasets/hiertext and https://github.com/tensorflow/models/tree/master/official/projects/unified_detector.
summary: Scene text detection and document layout analysis have long been treated as two separate tasks in different image domains. In this paper, we bring them together and introduce the task of unified scene text detection and layout analysis. The first hierarchical scene text dataset is introduced to enable this novel research task. We also propose a novel method that is able to simultaneously detect scene text and form text clusters in a unified way. Comprehensive experiments show that our unified model achieves better performance than multiple well-designed baseline methods. Additionally, this model achieves state-of-the-art results on multiple scene text detection datasets without the need of complex post-processing. Dataset and code: https://github.com/google-research-datasets/hiertext and https://github.com/tensorflow/models/tree/master/official/projects/unified_detector.
abstract_zh: 场景文本检测和文档布局分析长期以来被视为不同图像领域中的两个独立任务。在本文中，我们将它们结合在一起并介绍统一场景文本检测和布局分析的任务。引入第一个分层场景文本数据集来实现这项新颖的研究任务。我们还提出了一种新颖的方法，能够同时检测场景文本并以统一的方式形成文本簇。综合实验表明，我们的统一模型比多个精心设计的基线方法取得了更好的性能。此外，该模型在多个场景文本检测数据集上实现了最先进的结果，而无需复杂的后处理。数据集和代码：https://github.com/google-research-datasets/hiertext 和 https://github.com/tensorflow/models/tree/master/official/projects/unified_detector。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种统一的场景文本检测与布局分析方法，将传统上分开的两个任务整合为一个端到端模型。
AI.motivation: 场景文本检测与文档布局分析长期被视为独立任务，缺乏跨领域的统一解决方案，限制了模型效率和应用场景的扩展。
AI.method: 构建首个层次化场景文本数据集，并设计统一模型同时完成文本检测与聚类，无需复杂后处理步骤。
AI.result: 在多个场景文本检测数据集上达到SOTA性能，且优于多个精心设计的基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 统一框架有效提升了文本检测与布局分析的协同效率，为跨领域视觉任务提供了新思路。

search_text: Towards End-to-End Unified Scene Text Detection and Layout Analysis 迈向端到端统一场景文本检测和布局分析 Scene text detection and document layout analysis have long been treated as two separate tasks in different image domains. In this paper, we bring them together and introduce the task of unified scene text detection and layout analysis. The first hierarchical scene text dataset is introduced to enable this novel research task. We also propose a novel method that is able to simultaneously detect scene text and form text clusters in a unified way. Comprehensive experiments show that our unified model achieves better performance than multiple well-designed baseline methods. Additionally, this model achieves state-of-the-art results on multiple scene text detection datasets without the need of complex post-processing. Dataset and code: https://github.com/google-research-datasets/hiertext and https://github.com/tensorflow/models/tree/master/official/projects/unified_detector. 场景文本检测和文档布局分析长期以来被视为不同图像领域中的两个独立任务。在本文中，我们将它们结合在一起并介绍统一场景文本检测和布局分析的任务。引入第一个分层场景文本数据集来实现这项新颖的研究任务。我们还提出了一种新颖的方法，能够同时检测场景文本并以统一的方式形成文本簇。综合实验表明，我们的统一模型比多个精心设计的基线方法取得了更好的性能。此外，该模型在多个场景文本检测数据集上实现了最先进的结果，而无需复杂的后处理。数据集和代码：https://github.com/google-research-datasets/hiertext 和 https://github.com/tensorflow/models/tree/master/official/projects/unified_detector。 本文提出了一种统一的场景文本检测与布局分析方法，将传统上分开的两个任务整合为一个端到端模型。 Shangbang Long,Siyang Qin,Dmitry Panteleev,Alessandro Bissacco,Yasuhisa Fujii,Michalis Raptis cs.CV

authors_text: Ethan Manilow,Curtis Hawthorne,Cheng-Zhi Anna Huang,Bryan Pardo,Jesse Engel
title: Improving Source Separation by Explicitly Modeling Dependencies Between Sources
title_zh: 通过对源之间的依赖关系进行显式建模来改进源分离
abstract: We propose a new method for training a supervised source separation system that aims to learn the interdependent relationships between all combinations of sources in a mixture. Rather than independently estimating each source from a mix, we reframe the source separation problem as an Orderless Neural Autoregressive Density Estimator (NADE), and estimate each source from both the mix and a random subset of the other sources. We adapt a standard source separation architecture, Demucs, with additional inputs for each individual source, in addition to the input mixture. We randomly mask these input sources during training so that the network learns the conditional dependencies between the sources. By pairing this training method with a block Gibbs sampling procedure at inference time, we demonstrate that the network can iteratively improve its separation performance by conditioning a source estimate on its earlier source estimates. Experiments on two source separation datasets show that training a Demucs model with an Orderless NADE approach and using Gibbs sampling (up to 512 steps) at inference time strongly outperforms a Demucs baseline that uses a standard regression loss and direct (one step) estimation of sources.
summary: We propose a new method for training a supervised source separation system that aims to learn the interdependent relationships between all combinations of sources in a mixture. Rather than independently estimating each source from a mix, we reframe the source separation problem as an Orderless Neural Autoregressive Density Estimator (NADE), and estimate each source from both the mix and a random subset of the other sources. We adapt a standard source separation architecture, Demucs, with additional inputs for each individual source, in addition to the input mixture. We randomly mask these input sources during training so that the network learns the conditional dependencies between the sources. By pairing this training method with a block Gibbs sampling procedure at inference time, we demonstrate that the network can iteratively improve its separation performance by conditioning a source estimate on its earlier source estimates. Experiments on two source separation datasets show that training a Demucs model with an Orderless NADE approach and using Gibbs sampling (up to 512 steps) at inference time strongly outperforms a Demucs baseline that uses a standard regression loss and direct (one step) estimation of sources.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种训练监督源分离系统的新方法，旨在学习混合物中所有源组合之间的相互依赖关系。我们不是独立估计混合中的每个源，而是将源分离问题重新构建为无序神经自回归密度估计器（NADE），并从混合和其他源的随机子集中估计每个源。我们采用标准源分离架构 Demucs，除了输入混合之外，还为每个单独的源提供额外的输入。我们在训练期间随机屏蔽这些输入源，以便网络学习源之间的条件依赖关系。通过在推理时将此训练方法与块吉布斯采样过程配对，我们证明网络可以通过在其早期源估计的基础上调节源估计来迭代地提高其分离性能。对两个源分离数据集的实验表明，使用无序 NADE 方法并在推理时使用吉布斯采样（最多 512 个步骤）训练 Demucs 模型，其性能远远优于使用标准回归损失和直接（一步）源估计的 Demucs 基线。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种改进源分离的新方法，通过显式建模混合信号中各源之间的依赖关系。
AI.motivation: 传统源分离方法独立估计每个源，忽略了源间复杂的相互依赖关系，导致分离效果受限。
AI.method: 将源分离问题重构为无序神经自回归密度估计器（NADE），在Demucs架构中引入额外源输入并随机屏蔽部分源进行训练，推理时结合块吉布斯采样迭代优化。
AI.result: 在两个源分离数据集上，该方法配合512步吉布斯采样显著优于基线模型的直接估计方法。
AI.conclusion: 显式建模源间依赖关系并结合迭代推理能有效提升源分离性能，为相关研究提供新思路。

authors_text: Ge Zhu,Juan-Pablo Caceres,Justin Salamon
title: Filler Word Detection and Classification: A Dataset and Benchmark
title_zh: 填充词检测和分类：数据集和基准
abstract: Filler words such as `uh' or `um' are sounds or words people use to signal they are pausing to think. Finding and removing filler words from recordings is a common and tedious task in media editing. Automatically detecting and classifying filler words could greatly aid in this task, but few studies have been published on this problem to date. A key reason is the absence of a dataset with annotated filler words for model training and evaluation. In this work, we present a novel speech dataset, PodcastFillers, with 35K annotated filler words and 50K annotations of other sounds that commonly occur in podcasts such as breaths, laughter, and word repetitions. We propose a pipeline that leverages VAD and ASR to detect filler candidates and a classifier to distinguish between filler word types. We evaluate our proposed pipeline on PodcastFillers, compare to several baselines, and present a detailed ablation study. In particular, we evaluate the importance of using ASR and how it compares to a transcription-free approach resembling keyword spotting. We show that our pipeline obtains state-of-the-art results, and that leveraging ASR strongly outperforms a keyword spotting approach. We make PodcastFillers publicly available, in the hope that our work serves as a benchmark for future research.
summary: Filler words such as `uh' or `um' are sounds or words people use to signal they are pausing to think. Finding and removing filler words from recordings is a common and tedious task in media editing. Automatically detecting and classifying filler words could greatly aid in this task, but few studies have been published on this problem to date. A key reason is the absence of a dataset with annotated filler words for model training and evaluation. In this work, we present a novel speech dataset, PodcastFillers, with 35K annotated filler words and 50K annotations of other sounds that commonly occur in podcasts such as breaths, laughter, and word repetitions. We propose a pipeline that leverages VAD and ASR to detect filler candidates and a classifier to distinguish between filler word types. We evaluate our proposed pipeline on PodcastFillers, compare to several baselines, and present a detailed ablation study. In particular, we evaluate the importance of using ASR and how it compares to a transcription-free approach resembling keyword spotting. We show that our pipeline obtains state-of-the-art results, and that leveraging ASR strongly outperforms a keyword spotting approach. We make PodcastFillers publicly available, in the hope that our work serves as a benchmark for future research.
abstract_zh: 诸如“呃”或“嗯”之类的填充词是人们用来表示他们正在暂停思考的声音或单词。从录音中查找并删除填充词是媒体编辑中一项常见且乏味的任务。自动检测和分类填充词可以极大地帮助完成这项任务，但迄今为止，关于这个问题的研究很少发表。一个关键原因是缺乏用于模型训练和评估的带注释填充词的数据集。在这项工作中，我们提出了一个新颖的语音数据集 PodcastFillers，其中包含 35K 个带注释的填充词和 50K 个播客中常见的其他声音（例如呼吸、笑声和单词重复）的注释。我们提出了一个管道，利用 VAD 和 ASR 来检测候选填充词，并使用分类器来区分填充词类型。我们在 PodcastFillers 上评估我们提出的管道，与几个基线进行比较，并提出详细的消融研究。特别是，我们评估了使用 ASR 的重要性，以及它与类似关键词识别的无转录方法的比较。我们表明，我们的管道获得了最先进的结果，并且利用 ASR 的性能远远优于关键字识别方法。我们公开发布 PodcastFillers，希望我们的工作能够成为未来研究的基准。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种自动检测和分类填充词（如'uh'、'um'）的管道，并构建了一个名为PodcastFillers的标注数据集，以推动该领域的研究。
AI.motivation: 现有研究缺乏针对填充词检测的标注数据集，导致自动化处理方法研究不足，手动去除填充词在媒体编辑中效率低下。
AI.method: 构建包含35K填充词和50K其他声音标注的PodcastFillers数据集，提出结合VAD（语音活动检测）和ASR（自动语音识别）的检测管道，并通过分类器区分填充词类型，对比基线方法和关键词检测方法。
AI.result: 所提管道在数据集上达到SOTA效果，ASR方法显著优于无转录的关键词检测方法，数据集已公开。
AI.conclusion: PodcastFillers为未来研究提供基准，证明结合ASR的检测方法在填充词识别任务中更有效。

In particular, we evaluate the importance of using ASR and how it compares to a transcription-free approach resembling keyword spotting. We show that our pipeline obtains state-of-the-art results, and that leveraging ASR strongly outperforms a keyword spotting approach. We make PodcastFillers publicly available, in the hope that our work serves as a benchmark for future research. 诸如“呃”或“嗯”之类的填充词是人们用来表示他们正在暂停思考的声音或单词。从录音中查找并删除填充词是媒体编辑中一项常见且乏味的任务。自动检测和分类填充词可以极大地帮助完成这项任务，但迄今为止，关于这个问题的研究很少发表。一个关键原因是缺乏用于模型训练和评估的带注释填充词的数据集。在这项工作中，我们提出了一个新颖的语音数据集 PodcastFillers，其中包含 35K 个带注释的填充词和 50K 个播客中常见的其他声音（例如呼吸、笑声和单词重复）的注释。我们提出了一个管道，利用 VAD 和 ASR 来检测候选填充词，并使用分类器来区分填充词类型。我们在 PodcastFillers 上评估我们提出的管道，与几个基线进行比较，并提出详细的消融研究。特别是，我们评估了使用 ASR 的重要性，以及它与类似关键词识别的无转录方法的比较。我们表明，我们的管道获得了最先进的结果，并且利用 ASR 的性能远远优于关键字识别方法。我们公开发布 PodcastFillers，希望我们的工作能够成为未来研究的基准。 本文提出了一种自动检测和分类填充词（如'uh'、'um'）的管道，并构建了一个名为PodcastFillers的标注数据集，以推动该领域的研究。 Ge Zhu,Juan-Pablo Caceres,Justin Salamon cs.CL,cs.SD,eess.AS

authors_text: Shariq Farooq Bhat,Ibraheem Alhashim,Peter Wonka
title: LocalBins: Improving Depth Estimation by Learning Local Distributions
title_zh: LocalBins：通过学习局部分布改进深度估计
abstract: We propose a novel architecture for depth estimation from a single image. The architecture itself is based on the popular encoder-decoder architecture that is frequently used as a starting point for all dense regression tasks. We build on AdaBins which estimates a global distribution of depth values for the input image and evolve the architecture in two ways. First, instead of predicting global depth distributions, we predict depth distributions of local neighborhoods at every pixel. Second, instead of predicting depth distributions only towards the end of the decoder, we involve all layers of the decoder. We call this new architecture LocalBins. Our results demonstrate a clear improvement over the state-of-the-art in all metrics on the NYU-Depth V2 dataset. Code and pretrained models will be made publicly available.
summary: We propose a novel architecture for depth estimation from a single image. The architecture itself is based on the popular encoder-decoder architecture that is frequently used as a starting point for all dense regression tasks. We build on AdaBins which estimates a global distribution of depth values for the input image and evolve the architecture in two ways. First, instead of predicting global depth distributions, we predict depth distributions of local neighborhoods at every pixel. Second, instead of predicting depth distributions only towards the end of the decoder, we involve all layers of the decoder. We call this new architecture LocalBins. Our results demonstrate a clear improvement over the state-of-the-art in all metrics on the NYU-Depth V2 dataset. Code and pretrained models will be made publicly available.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种用于从单个图像进行深度估计的新颖架构。该架构本身基于流行的编码器-解码器架构，该架构经常用作所有密集回归任务的起点。我们以 AdaBins 为基础，估计输入图像深度值的全局分布，并以两种方式改进架构。首先，我们不是预测全局深度分布，而是预测每个像素的局部邻域的深度分布。其次，我们不是仅预测解码器末端的深度分布，而是涉及解码器的所有层。我们将这种新架构称为 LocalBins。我们的结果表明，NYU-Depth V2 数据集的所有指标均较现有技术有了明显改进。代码和预训练模型将公开。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为LocalBins的新架构，通过学习局部深度分布来改进单目图像的深度估计任务。
AI.motivation: 现有方法如AdaBins仅预测全局深度分布且仅在解码器后期进行，无法捕捉局部细节，限制了深度估计精度。
AI.method: 基于编码器-解码器框架，LocalBins在每个像素预测局部邻域深度分布，并在解码器所有层级引入分布预测机制。
AI.result: 在NYU-Depth V2数据集上，LocalBins在所有评估指标中均优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过局部分布学习和多层级预测，LocalBins有效提升了单目深度估计的性能。

authors_text: Joshua Bloom,Apratim Mukherjee,Carlo Pinciroli
title: A Study of Reinforcement Learning Algorithms for Aggregates of Minimalistic Robots
title_zh: 极简机器人聚合体的强化学习算法研究
abstract: The aim of this paper is to study how to apply deep reinforcement learning for the control of aggregates of minimalistic robots. We define aggregates as groups of robots with a physical connection that compels them to form a specified shape. In our case, the robots are pre-attached to an object that must be collectively transported to a known location. Minimalism, in our setting, stems from the barebone capabilities we assume: The robots can sense the target location and the immediate obstacles, but lack the means to communicate explicitly through, e.g., message-passing. In our setting, communication is implicit, i.e., mediated by aggregated push-and-pull on the object exerted by each robot. We analyze the ability to reach coordinated behavior of four well-known algorithms for deep reinforcement learning (DQN, DDQN, DDPG, and TD3). Our experiments include robot failures and different types of environmental obstacles. We compare the performance of the best control strategies found, highlighting strengths and weaknesses of each of the considered training algorithms.
summary: The aim of this paper is to study how to apply deep reinforcement learning for the control of aggregates of minimalistic robots. We define aggregates as groups of robots with a physical connection that compels them to form a specified shape. In our case, the robots are pre-attached to an object that must be collectively transported to a known location. Minimalism, in our setting, stems from the barebone capabilities we assume: The robots can sense the target location and the immediate obstacles, but lack the means to communicate explicitly through, e.g., message-passing. In our setting, communication is implicit, i.e., mediated by aggregated push-and-pull on the object exerted by each robot. We analyze the ability to reach coordinated behavior of four well-known algorithms for deep reinforcement learning (DQN, DDQN, DDPG, and TD3). Our experiments include robot failures and different types of environmental obstacles. We compare the performance of the best control strategies found, highlighting strengths and weaknesses of each of the considered training algorithms.
abstract_zh: 本文的目的是研究如何应用深度强化学习来控制简约机器人的聚合。我们将聚合体定义为具有物理连接的机器人组，迫使它们形成指定的形状。在我们的例子中，机器人预先连接到必须集体运输到已知位置的物体上。在我们的设置中，极简主义源于我们假设的准系统功能：机器人可以感知目标位置和直接障碍物，但缺乏通过消息传递等明确通信的方式。在我们的设置中，通信是隐式的，即通过每个机器人对物体施加的聚合推拉来调节。我们分析了四种著名的深度强化学习算法（DQN、DDQN、DDPG 和 TD3）达到协调行为的能力。我们的实验包括机器人故障和不同类型的环境障碍。我们比较了所发现的最佳控制策略的性能，突出了每种所考虑的训练算法的优点和缺点。

AI.tldr: 本研究探讨如何应用深度强化学习控制物理连接的极简机器人集群，以协作运输物体至指定位置。
AI.motivation: 现有机器人集群控制方法在缺乏显式通信和复杂环境下的适应性不足，需探索更鲁棒的协调策略。
AI.method: 采用DQN、DDQN、DDPG和TD3四种深度强化学习算法，通过隐式通信（推拉物体）实现机器人协作，并测试不同障碍和故障场景。
AI.result: 比较了各算法的控制策略性能，揭示了不同算法在应对环境变化和机器人故障时的优势与局限性。
AI.conclusion: 隐式通信机制可行，部分算法在复杂环境下表现更优，为机器人集群控制提供了有效方法论参考。

authors_text: Michael Wilbur,Salah Uddin Kadir,Youngseo Kim,Geoffrey Pettet,Ayan Mukhopadhyay,Philip Pugliese,Samitha Samaranayake,Aron Laszka,Abhishek Dubey
title: An Online Approach to Solve the Dynamic Vehicle Routing Problem with Stochastic Trip Requests for Paratransit Services
title_zh: 解决辅助公交服务随机行程请求动态车辆路径问题的在线方法
abstract: Many transit agencies operating paratransit and microtransit services have to respond to trip requests that arrive in real-time, which entails solving hard combinatorial and sequential decision-making problems under uncertainty. To avoid decisions that lead to significant inefficiency in the long term, vehicles should be allocated to requests by optimizing a non-myopic utility function or by batching requests together and optimizing a myopic utility function. While the former approach is typically offline, the latter can be performed online. We point out two major issues with such approaches when applied to paratransit services in practice. First, it is difficult to batch paratransit requests together as they are temporally sparse. Second, the environment in which transit agencies operate changes dynamically (e.g., traffic conditions), causing estimates that are learned offline to become stale. To address these challenges, we propose a fully online approach to solve the dynamic vehicle routing problem (DVRP) with time windows and stochastic trip requests that is robust to changing environmental dynamics by construction. We focus on scenarios where requests are relatively sparse - our problem is motivated by applications to paratransit services. We formulate DVRP as a Markov decision process and use Monte Carlo tree search to evaluate actions for any given state. Accounting for stochastic requests while optimizing a non-myopic utility function is computationally challenging; indeed, the action space for such a problem is intractably large in practice. To tackle the large action space, we leverage the structure of the problem to design heuristics that can sample promising actions for the tree search. Our experiments using real-world data from our partner agency show that the proposed approach outperforms existing state-of-the-art approaches both in terms of performance and robustness.
summary: Many transit agencies operating paratransit and microtransit services have to respond to trip requests that arrive in real-time, which entails solving hard combinatorial and sequential decision-making problems under uncertainty. To avoid decisions that lead to significant inefficiency in the long term, vehicles should be allocated to requests by optimizing a non-myopic utility function or by batching requests together and optimizing a myopic utility function. While the former approach is typically offline, the latter can be performed online. We point out two major issues with such approaches when applied to paratransit services in practice. First, it is difficult to batch paratransit requests together as they are temporally sparse. Second, the environment in which transit agencies operate changes dynamically (e.g., traffic conditions), causing estimates that are learned offline to become stale. To address these challenges, we propose a fully online approach to solve the dynamic vehicle routing problem (DVRP) with time windows and stochastic trip requests that is robust to changing environmental dynamics by construction. We focus on scenarios where requests are relatively sparse - our problem is motivated by applications to paratransit services. We formulate DVRP as a Markov decision process and use Monte Carlo tree search to evaluate actions for any given state. Accounting for stochastic requests while optimizing a non-myopic utility function is computationally challenging; indeed, the action space for such a problem is intractably large in practice. To tackle the large action space, we leverage the structure of the problem to design heuristics that can sample promising actions for the tree search. Our experiments using real-world data from our partner agency show that the proposed approach outperforms existing state-of-the-art approaches both in terms of performance and robustness.
abstract_zh: 许多运营辅助交通和微型交通服务的交通机构必须响应实时到达的出行请求，这需要解决不确定性下的困难组合和顺序决策问题。为了避免做出导致长期效率显着低下的决策，应通过优化非近视效用函数或通过将请求一起批处理并优化近视效用函数来将车辆分配给请求。虽然前一种方法通常是离线的，但后者可以在线执行。我们指出这种方法在实践中应用于辅助公交服务时存在的两个主要问题。首先，辅助公交请求很难批量处理，因为它们在时间上是稀疏的。其次，交通机构运营的环境动态变化（例如交通状况），导致离线学习的估计变得陈旧。为了应对这些挑战，我们提出了一种完全在线的方法来解决具有时间窗和随机行程请求的动态车辆路径问题（DVRP），该方法对于通过施工改变环境动态具有鲁棒性。我们专注于请求相对稀疏的场景 - 我们的问题是由辅助交通服务的应用程序引起的。我们将 DVRP 制定为马尔可夫决策过程，并使用蒙特卡罗树搜索来评估任何给定状态的操作。在优化非近视效用函数时考虑随机请求在计算上具有挑战性；事实上，在实践中解决这一问题的行动空间非常大。为了解决大的动作空间，我们利用问题的结构来设计启发式算法，可以对树搜索的有希望的动作进行采样。我们使用来自合作伙伴机构的真实数据进行的实验表明，所提出的方法在性能和鲁棒性方面均优于现有的最先进方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种在线方法解决具有时间窗口和随机出行需求的动态车辆路径问题（DVRP），以应对实时响应稀疏请求和动态环境变化的挑战。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理实时稀疏请求时存在批次合并困难及离线模型无法适应动态环境的问题，需开发一种鲁棒的在线解决方案。
AI.method: 将DVRP建模为马尔可夫决策过程，结合蒙特卡洛树搜索评估状态动作，并设计启发式方法应对大规模动作空间。
AI.result: 基于真实数据的实验表明，该方法在性能和鲁棒性上均优于现有最先进方法。

search_text: An Online Approach to Solve the Dynamic Vehicle Routing Problem with Stochastic Trip Requests for Paratransit Services 解决辅助公交服务随机行程请求动态车辆路径问题的在线方法 Many transit agencies operating paratransit and microtransit services have to respond to trip requests that arrive in real-time, which entails solving hard combinatorial and sequential decision-making problems under uncertainty. To avoid decisions that lead to significant inefficiency in the long term, vehicles should be allocated to requests by optimizing a non-myopic utility function or by batching requests together and optimizing a myopic utility function. While the former approach is typically offline, the latter can be performed online. We point out two major issues with such approaches when applied to paratransit services in practice. First, it is difficult to batch paratransit requests together as they are temporally sparse. Second, the environment in which transit agencies operate changes dynamically (e.g., traffic conditions), causing estimates that are learned offline to become stale. To address these challenges, we propose a fully online approach to solve the dynamic vehicle routing problem (DVRP) with time windows and stochastic trip requests that is robust to changing environmental dynamics by construction. We focus on scenarios where requests are relatively sparse - our problem is motivated by applications to paratransit services. We formulate DVRP as a Markov decision process and use Monte Carlo tree search to evaluate actions for any given state. Accounting for stochastic requests while optimizing a non-myopic utility function is computationally challenging; indeed, the action space for such a problem is intractably large in practice. To tackle the large action space, we leverage the structure of the problem to design heuristics that can sample promising actions for the tree search. Our experiments using real-world data from our partner agency show that the proposed approach outperforms existing state-of-the-art approaches both in terms of performance and robustness. 许多运营辅助交通和微型交通服务的交通机构必须响应实时到达的出行请求，这需要解决不确定性下的困难组合和顺序决策问题。为了避免做出导致长期效率显着低下的决策，应通过优化非近视效用函数或通过将请求一起批处理并优化近视效用函数来将车辆分配给请求。虽然前一种方法通常是离线的，但后者可以在线执行。我们指出这种方法在实践中应用于辅助公交服务时存在的两个主要问题。首先，辅助公交请求很难批量处理，因为它们在时间上是稀疏的。其次，交通机构运营的环境动态变化（例如交通状况），导致离线学习的估计变得陈旧。为了应对这些挑战，我们提出了一种完全在线的方法来解决具有时间窗和随机行程请求的动态车辆路径问题（DVRP），该方法对于通过施工改变环境动态具有鲁棒性。我们专注于请求相对稀疏的场景 - 我们的问题是由辅助交通服务的应用程序引起的。我们将 DVRP 制定为马尔可夫决策过程，并使用蒙特卡罗树搜索来评估任何给定状态的操作。在优化非近视效用函数时考虑随机请求在计算上具有挑战性；事实上，在实践中解决这一问题的行动空间非常大。为了解决大的动作空间，我们利用问题的结构来设计启发式算法，可以对树搜索的有希望的动作进行采样。我们使用来自合作伙伴机构的真实数据进行的实验表明，所提出的方法在性能和鲁棒性方面均优于现有的最先进方法。 本文提出了一种在线方法解决具有时间窗口和随机出行需求的动态车辆路径问题（DVRP），以应对实时响应稀疏请求和动态环境变化的挑战。 Michael Wilbur,Salah Uddin Kadir,Youngseo Kim,Geoffrey Pettet,Ayan Mukhopadhyay,Philip Pugliese,Samitha Samaranayake,Aron Laszka,Abhishek Dubey cs.AI,cs.MA

authors_text: Manuel Kolmet,Qunjie Zhou,Aljosa Osep,Laura Leal-Taixe
title: Text2Pos: Text-to-Point-Cloud Cross-Modal Localization
title_zh: Text2Pos：文本到点云跨模态本地化
abstract: Natural language-based communication with mobile devices and home appliances is becoming increasingly popular and has the potential to become natural for communicating with mobile robots in the future. Towards this goal, we investigate cross-modal text-to-point-cloud localization that will allow us to specify, for example, a vehicle pick-up or goods delivery location. In particular, we propose Text2Pos, a cross-modal localization module that learns to align textual descriptions with localization cues in a coarse- to-fine manner. Given a point cloud of the environment, Text2Pos locates a position that is specified via a natural language-based description of the immediate surroundings. To train Text2Pos and study its performance, we construct KITTI360Pose, the first dataset for this task based on the recently introduced KITTI360 dataset. Our experiments show that we can localize 65% of textual queries within 15m distance to query locations for top-10 retrieved locations. This is a starting point that we hope will spark future developments towards language-based navigation.
summary: Natural language-based communication with mobile devices and home appliances is becoming increasingly popular and has the potential to become natural for communicating with mobile robots in the future. Towards this goal, we investigate cross-modal text-to-point-cloud localization that will allow us to specify, for example, a vehicle pick-up or goods delivery location. In particular, we propose Text2Pos, a cross-modal localization module that learns to align textual descriptions with localization cues in a coarse- to-fine manner. Given a point cloud of the environment, Text2Pos locates a position that is specified via a natural language-based description of the immediate surroundings. To train Text2Pos and study its performance, we construct KITTI360Pose, the first dataset for this task based on the recently introduced KITTI360 dataset. Our experiments show that we can localize 65% of textual queries within 15m distance to query locations for top-10 retrieved locations. This is a starting point that we hope will spark future developments towards language-based navigation.
abstract_zh: 与移动设备和家用电器进行基于自然语言的通信正变得越来越流行，并且未来有可能成为与移动机器人的自然通信。为了实现这一目标，我们研究了跨模式文本到点云本地化，这将使我们能够指定车辆提货或货物交付位置等。特别是，我们提出了 Text2Pos，一个跨模式本地化模块，它学习以从粗到细的方式将文本描述与本地化线索对齐。给定环境的点云，Text2Pos 可以定位通过基于自然语言的周围环境描述指定的位置。为了训练 Text2Pos 并研究其性能，我们基于最近引入的 KITTI360 数据集构建了 KITTI360Pose，这是该任务的第一个数据集。我们的实验表明，我们可以将 15m 距离内的 65% 的文本查询本地化为查询位置前 10 个检索到的位置。我们希望这是一个起点，能够激发基于语言的导航的未来发展。

AI.tldr: 提出Text2Pos模块，实现基于自然语言描述的点云环境定位
AI.motivation: 自然语言交互在移动设备和机器人领域需求增长，但缺乏有效的文本与点云环境跨模态对齐方法
AI.method: 设计分层对齐网络Text2Pos，结合点云特征与文本描述进行粗到细的定位，构建KITTI360Pose数据集进行训练验证
AI.result: 在测试集中65%的文本查询能在15米范围内准确定位目标位置
AI.conclusion: 为基于语言指令的机器人导航提供了新方法，但需进一步提升定位精度和复杂场景适应性

authors_text: Sarath S. Shanker,Douglas Zytko
title: The...Tinderverse?: Opportunities and Challenges for User Safety in Extended Reality (XR) Dating Apps
title_zh: ...Tinderverse？：扩展现实 (XR) 约会应用程序中用户安全的机遇和挑战
comment: Accepted to CHI 22 Workshop "Novel Challenges of Safety, Security and Privacy in Extended Reality"
comments: Accepted to CHI 22 Workshop "Novel Challenges of Safety, Security and Privacy in Extended Reality"
abstract: Dating apps such as Tinder have announced plans for a dating metaverse: the incorporation of XR technologies into the online dating process to augment interactions between potential sexual partners across virtual and physical worlds. While the dating metaverse is still in conceptual stages we can forecast significant harms that it may expose daters to given prior research into the frequency and severity of sexual harms facilitated by dating apps as well as harms within social VR environments. In this workshop paper we envision how XR could enrich virtual-to-physical interaction between potential sexual partners and outline harms that it will likely perpetuate as well. We then introduce our ongoing research to preempt such harms: a participatory design study with sexual violence experts and demographics at disproportionate risk of sexual violence to produce mitigative solutions to sexual violence perpetuated by XR-enabled dating apps.
summary: Dating apps such as Tinder have announced plans for a dating metaverse: the incorporation of XR technologies into the online dating process to augment interactions between potential sexual partners across virtual and physical worlds. While the dating metaverse is still in conceptual stages we can forecast significant harms that it may expose daters to given prior research into the frequency and severity of sexual harms facilitated by dating apps as well as harms within social VR environments. In this workshop paper we envision how XR could enrich virtual-to-physical interaction between potential sexual partners and outline harms that it will likely perpetuate as well. We then introduce our ongoing research to preempt such harms: a participatory design study with sexual violence experts and demographics at disproportionate risk of sexual violence to produce mitigative solutions to sexual violence perpetuated by XR-enabled dating apps.
abstract_zh: Tinder 等约会应用程序已宣布推出约会元宇宙计划：将 XR 技术纳入在线约会流程中，以增强虚拟世界和现实世界中潜在性伴侣之间的互动。虽然约会元宇宙仍处于概念阶段，但我们可以预测重大危害，鉴于先前对约会应用程序促成的性伤害的频率和严重性以及社交 VR 环境中的伤害的研究，它可能会让约会者接触到重大危害。在这篇研讨会论文中，我们设想了 XR 如何丰富潜在性伴侣之间的虚拟到物理互动，并概述了它可能会持续存在的危害。然后，我们介绍了我们正在进行的研究，以预防此类伤害：一项参与性设计研究，由性暴力专家和性暴力风险过高的人口统计数据进行，以针对支持 XR 的约会应用程序所造成的性暴力提出缓解解决方案。

AI.tldr: 探讨XR技术在约会应用中的用户安全问题，并提出缓解性暴力的解决方案
AI.motivation: 现有约会应用已存在性危害，XR技术可能加剧问题，需提前预判并设计安全措施
AI.method: 通过参与式设计研究，与性暴力专家及高风险群体合作，开发缓解方案
AI.result: 初步提出针对XR约会应用的性暴力缓解策略
AI.conclusion: XR技术虽增强互动，但需重视安全风险，需多方合作设计解决方案

authors_text: Afonso Fontes,Jose Everardo Bessa Maia
title: Visual Odometry for RGB-D Cameras
title_zh: RGB-D 相机的视觉里程计
abstract: Visual odometry is the process of estimating the position and orientation of a camera by analyzing the images associated to it. This paper develops a quick and accurate approach to visual odometry of a moving RGB-D camera navigating on a static environment. The proposed algorithm uses SURF (Speeded Up Robust Features) as feature extractor, RANSAC (Random Sample Consensus) to filter the results and Minimum Mean Square to estimate the rigid transformation of six parameters between successive video frames. Data from a Kinect camera were used in the tests. The results show that this approach is feasible and promising, surpassing in performance the algorithms ICP (Interactive Closest Point) and SfM (Structure from Motion) in tests using a publicly available dataset.
summary: Visual odometry is the process of estimating the position and orientation of a camera by analyzing the images associated to it. This paper develops a quick and accurate approach to visual odometry of a moving RGB-D camera navigating on a static environment. The proposed algorithm uses SURF (Speeded Up Robust Features) as feature extractor, RANSAC (Random Sample Consensus) to filter the results and Minimum Mean Square to estimate the rigid transformation of six parameters between successive video frames. Data from a Kinect camera were used in the tests. The results show that this approach is feasible and promising, surpassing in performance the algorithms ICP (Interactive Closest Point) and SfM (Structure from Motion) in tests using a publicly available dataset.
abstract_zh: 视觉里程计是通过分析与其相关的图像来估计相机的位置和方向的过程。本文开发了一种快速准确的方法，用于在静态环境中导航移动 RGB-D 相机的视觉里程计。该算法使用SURF（加速鲁棒特征）作为特征提取器，RANSAC（随机样本一致性）来过滤结果，并使用最小均方来估计连续视频帧之间六个参数的刚性变换。测试中使用了来自 Kinect 摄像头的数据。结果表明，这种方法是可行且有前途的，在使用公开数据集的测试中，其性能超越了 ICP（交互式最近点）和 SfM（运动结构）算法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种针对RGB-D相机的快速且精确的视觉里程计方法，用于估计移动相机在静态环境中的位置和方向。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉里程计算法（如ICP和SfM）在处理RGB-D相机数据时存在计算效率或精度不足的问题，需开发更优方法。
AI.method: 采用SURF提取特征，结合RANSAC过滤异常值，并用最小二乘法估计相邻帧间的六自由度刚体变换，基于Kinect数据进行验证。
AI.result: 在公开数据集测试中，该方法在精度和速度上均优于ICP和SfM算法，验证了其可行性与有效性。
AI.conclusion: 提出的算法为RGB-D相机视觉里程计提供了高效解决方案，具有实际应用价值。

authors_text: Martin Hahner,Christos Sakaridis,Mario Bijelic,Felix Heide,Fisher Yu,Dengxin Dai,Luc Van Gool
title: LiDAR Snowfall Simulation for Robust 3D Object Detection
title_zh: 用于稳健 3D 物体检测的 LiDAR 降雪模拟
abstract: 3D object detection is a central task for applications such as autonomous driving, in which the system needs to localize and classify surrounding traffic agents, even in the presence of adverse weather. In this paper, we address the problem of LiDAR-based 3D object detection under snowfall. Due to the difficulty of collecting and annotating training data in this setting, we propose a physically based method to simulate the effect of snowfall on real clear-weather LiDAR point clouds. Our method samples snow particles in 2D space for each LiDAR line and uses the induced geometry to modify the measurement for each LiDAR beam accordingly. Moreover, as snowfall often causes wetness on the ground, we also simulate ground wetness on LiDAR point clouds. We use our simulation to generate partially synthetic snowy LiDAR data and leverage these data for training 3D object detection models that are robust to snowfall. We conduct an extensive evaluation using several state-of-the-art 3D object detection methods and show that our simulation consistently yields significant performance gains on the real snowy STF dataset compared to clear-weather baselines and competing simulation approaches, while not sacrificing performance in clear weather. Our code is available at www.github.com/SysCV/LiDAR_snow_sim.
summary: 3D object detection is a central task for applications such as autonomous driving, in which the system needs to localize and classify surrounding traffic agents, even in the presence of adverse weather. In this paper, we address the problem of LiDAR-based 3D object detection under snowfall. Due to the difficulty of collecting and annotating training data in this setting, we propose a physically based method to simulate the effect of snowfall on real clear-weather LiDAR point clouds. Our method samples snow particles in 2D space for each LiDAR line and uses the induced geometry to modify the measurement for each LiDAR beam accordingly. Moreover, as snowfall often causes wetness on the ground, we also simulate ground wetness on LiDAR point clouds. We use our simulation to generate partially synthetic snowy LiDAR data and leverage these data for training 3D object detection models that are robust to snowfall. We conduct an extensive evaluation using several state-of-the-art 3D object detection methods and show that our simulation consistently yields significant performance gains on the real snowy STF dataset compared to clear-weather baselines and competing simulation approaches, while not sacrificing performance in clear weather. Our code is available at www.github.com/SysCV/LiDAR_snow_sim.
abstract_zh: 3D 物体检测是自动驾驶等应用的核心任务，其中系统需要对周围的交通代理进行定位和分类，即使是在恶劣天气的情况下也是如此。在本文中，我们解决了降雪下基于 LiDAR 的 3D 物体检测问题。由于在这种情况下收集和注释训练数据的困难，我们提出了一种基于物理的方法来模拟降雪对真实晴天激光雷达点云的影响。我们的方法对每条 LiDAR 线的 2D 空间中的雪颗粒进行采样，并使用诱导几何形状来相应地修改每个 LiDAR 光束的测量。此外，由于降雪经常导致地面潮湿，我们还在激光雷达点云上模拟地面湿度。我们使用模拟生成部分合成的雪天 LiDAR 数据，并利用这些数据来训练对降雪具有鲁棒性的 3D 物体检测模型。我们使用几种最先进的 3D 对象检测方法进行了广泛的评估，结果表明，与晴天基线和竞争模拟方法相比，我们的模拟在真实的下雪 STF 数据集上始终获得显着的性能提升，同时不会牺牲晴天下的性能。我们的代码可在 www.github.com/SysCV/LiDAR_snow_sim 上获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于物理的LiDAR雪天模拟方法，以提升恶劣天气下3D目标检测的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 雪天环境下LiDAR点云数据的采集与标注困难，现有方法在雪天检测性能不足，需通过合成数据增强模型鲁棒性。
AI.method: 通过2D空间采样雪粒子并模拟其几何影响修改LiDAR点云，同时模拟地面湿润效应，生成部分合成雪天数据用于训练。
AI.result: 在真实雪天STF数据集上，相比晴天基线和竞品模拟方法，检测性能显著提升且未影响晴天表现。
AI.conclusion: 该模拟方法有效提升了雪天3D目标检测的鲁棒性，为恶劣天气下的自动驾驶提供了可靠的数据增强方案。

search_text: LiDAR Snowfall Simulation for Robust 3D Object Detection 用于稳健 3D 物体检测的 LiDAR 降雪模拟 3D object detection is a central task for applications such as autonomous driving, in which the system needs to localize and classify surrounding traffic agents, even in the presence of adverse weather. In this paper, we address the problem of LiDAR-based 3D object detection under snowfall. Due to the difficulty of collecting and annotating training data in this setting, we propose a physically based method to simulate the effect of snowfall on real clear-weather LiDAR point clouds. We use our simulation to generate partially synthetic snowy LiDAR data and leverage these data for training 3D object detection models that are robust to snowfall. We conduct an extensive evaluation using several state-of-the-art 3D object detection methods and show that our simulation consistently yields significant performance gains on the real snowy STF dataset compared to clear-weather baselines and competing simulation approaches, while not sacrificing performance in clear weather. authors_text: Lingfeng Sun,Chen Tang,Yaru Niu,Enna Sachdeva,Chiho Choi,Teruhisa Misu,Masayoshi Tomizuka,Wei Zhan
title: Domain Knowledge Driven Pseudo Labels for Interpretable Goal-Conditioned Interactive Trajectory Prediction
title_zh: 用于可解释目标条件交互式轨迹预测的领域知识驱动伪标签
comment: To appear in IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS) 2022
comments: To appear in IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS) 2022
abstract: Motion forecasting in highly interactive scenarios is a challenging problem in autonomous driving. In such scenarios, we need to accurately predict the joint behavior of interacting agents to ensure the safe and efficient navigation of autonomous vehicles. Recently, goal-conditioned methods have gained increasing attention due to their advantage in performance and their ability to capture the multimodality in trajectory distribution. In this work, we study the joint trajectory prediction problem with the goal-conditioned framework. In particular, we introduce a conditional-variational-autoencoder-based (CVAE) model to explicitly encode different interaction modes into the latent space. However, we discover that the vanilla model suffers from posterior collapse and cannot induce an informative latent space as desired. To address these issues, we propose a novel approach to avoid KL vanishing and induce an interpretable interactive latent space with pseudo labels. The proposed pseudo labels allow us to incorporate domain knowledge on interaction in a flexible manner. We motivate the proposed method using an illustrative toy example. In addition, we validate our framework on the Waymo Open Motion Dataset with both quantitative and qualitative evaluations.
summary: Motion forecasting in highly interactive scenarios is a challenging problem in autonomous driving. In such scenarios, we need to accurately predict the joint behavior of interacting agents to ensure the safe and efficient navigation of autonomous vehicles. Recently, goal-conditioned methods have gained increasing attention due to their advantage in performance and their ability to capture the multimodality in trajectory distribution. In this work, we study the joint trajectory prediction problem with the goal-conditioned framework. In particular, we introduce a conditional-variational-autoencoder-based (CVAE) model to explicitly encode different interaction modes into the latent space. However, we discover that the vanilla model suffers from posterior collapse and cannot induce an informative latent space as desired. To address these issues, we propose a novel approach to avoid KL vanishing and induce an interpretable interactive latent space with pseudo labels. The proposed pseudo labels allow us to incorporate domain knowledge on interaction in a flexible manner. We motivate the proposed method using an illustrative toy example. In addition, we validate our framework on the Waymo Open Motion Dataset with both quantitative and qualitative evaluations.
abstract_zh: 高度交互场景中的运动预测是自动驾驶中的一个具有挑战性的问题。在这种场景下，我们需要准确预测交互代理的联合行为，以确保自动驾驶车辆的安全高效导航。最近，目标条件方法由于其性能优势以及捕获轨迹分布多模态的能力而受到越来越多的关注。在这项工作中，我们研究了目标条件框架的联合轨迹预测问题。特别是，我们引入了基于条件变分自动编码器（CVAE）的模型，将不同的交互模式显式编码到潜在空间中。然而，我们发现普通模型存在后塌陷问题，无法根据需要诱导出信息丰富的潜在空间。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一种新方法来避免 KL 消失并诱导带有伪标签的可解释的交互式潜在空间。所提出的伪标签使我们能够以灵活的方式合并交互领域知识。我们使用一个说明性的玩具示例来激发所提出的方法。此外，我们还通过定量和定性评估在 Waymo 开放运动数据集上验证了我们的框架。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于领域知识的伪标签方法，用于可解释的目标条件交互轨迹预测，解决传统模型在高交互场景下的轨迹预测问题。
AI.motivation: 现有目标条件模型在处理交互场景时存在后验坍缩问题，无法生成具有语义信息的潜在空间，且难以有效融入领域知识提升可解释性。
AI.method: 基于条件变分自编码器（CVAE）框架，引入伪标签机制避免KL散度消失，通过领域知识驱动的伪标签构建可解释的交互潜在空间，并在Waymo数据集上验证方法有效性。
AI.result: 在Waymo Open Motion数据集上，定量与定性评估表明该方法能有效提升轨迹预测精度，生成更符合交互语义的潜在表示。
AI.conclusion: 伪标签机制成功解决了CVAE的后验坍缩问题，通过领域知识注入增强了模型对交互模式的可解释性，为自动驾驶场景的轨迹预测提供了新思路。

ai_content_json.conclusion: 伪标签机制成功解决了CVAE的后验坍缩问题，通过领域知识注入增强了模型对交互模式的可解释性，为自动驾驶场景的轨迹预测提供了新思路。

tldr: 本文提出一种基于领域知识的伪标签方法，用于可解释的目标条件交互轨迹预测，解决传统模型在高交互场景下的轨迹预测问题。
motivation: 现有目标条件模型在处理交互场景时存在后验坍缩问题，无法生成具有语义信息的潜在空间，且难以有效融入领域知识提升可解释性。
method: 基于条件变分自编码器（CVAE）框架，引入伪标签机制避免KL散度消失，通过领域知识驱动的伪标签构建可解释的交互潜在空间，并在Waymo数据集上验证方法有效性。
result: 在Waymo Open Motion数据集上，定量与定性评估表明该方法能有效提升轨迹预测精度，生成更符合交互语义的潜在表示。
conclusion: 伪标签机制成功解决了CVAE的后验坍缩问题，通过领域知识注入增强了模型对交互模式的可解释性，为自动驾驶场景的轨迹预测提供了新思路。
search_text: Domain Knowledge Driven Pseudo Labels for Interpretable Goal-Conditioned Interactive Trajectory Prediction 用于可解释目标条件交互式轨迹预测的领域知识驱动伪标签 Motion forecasting in highly interactive scenarios is a challenging problem in autonomous driving. In such scenarios, we need to accurately predict the joint behavior of interacting agents to ensure the safe and efficient navigation of autonomous vehicles. Recently, goal-conditioned methods have gained increasing attention due to their advantage in performance and their ability to capture the multimodality in trajectory distribution. In this work, we study the joint trajectory prediction problem with the goal-conditioned framework. In particular, we introduce a conditional-variational-autoencoder-based (CVAE) model to explicitly encode different interaction modes into the latent space. However, we discover that the vanilla model suffers from posterior collapse and cannot induce an informative latent space as desired. To address these issues, we propose a novel approach to avoid KL vanishing and induce an interpretable interactive latent space with pseudo labels. The proposed pseudo labels allow us to incorporate domain knowledge on interaction in a flexible manner. We motivate the proposed method using an illustrative toy example. In addition, we validate our framework on the Waymo Open Motion Dataset with both quantitative and qualitative evaluations. 高度交互场景中的运动预测是自动驾驶中的一个具有挑战性的问题。在这种场景下，我们需要准确预测交互代理的联合行为，以确保自动驾驶车辆的安全高效导航。最近，目标条件方法由于其性能优势以及捕获轨迹分布多模态的能力而受到越来越多的关注。在这项工作中，我们研究了目标条件框架的联合轨迹预测问题。特别是，我们引入了基于条件变分自动编码器（CVAE）的模型，将不同的交互模式显式编码到潜在空间中。然而，我们发现普通模型存在后塌陷问题，无法根据需要诱导出信息丰富的潜在空间。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一种新方法来避免 KL 消失并诱导带有伪标签的可解释的交互式潜在空间。所提出的伪标签使我们能够以灵活的方式合并交互领域知识。我们使用一个说明性的玩具示例来激发所提出的方法。此外，我们还通过定量和定性评估在 Waymo 开放运动数据集上验证了我们的框架。 本文提出一种基于领域知识的伪标签方法，用于可解释的目标条件交互轨迹预测，解决传统模型在高交互场景下的轨迹预测问题。 Lingfeng Sun,Chen Tang,Yaru Niu,Enna Sachdeva,Chiho Choi,Teruhisa Misu,Masayoshi Tomizuka,Wei Zhan cs.RO,cs.AI

authors_text: Kevin Green,John Warila,Ross L. Hatton,Jonathan Hurst
title: Motion Planning for Agile Legged Locomotion using Failure Margin Constraints
title_zh: 使用故障裕度约束的敏捷腿式运动的运动规划
abstract: The complex dynamics of agile robotic legged locomotion requires motion planning to intelligently adjust footstep locations. Often, bipedal footstep and motion planning use mathematically simple models such as the linear inverted pendulum, instead of dynamically-rich models that do not have closed-form solutions. We propose a real-time optimization method to plan for dynamical models that do not have closed form solutions and experience irrecoverable failure. Our method uses a data-driven approximation of the step-to-step dynamics and of a failure margin function. This failure margin function is an oriented distance function in state-action space where it describes the signed distance to success or failure. The motion planning problem is formed as a nonlinear program with constraints that enforce the approximated forward dynamics and the validity of state-action pairs. For illustration, this method is applied to create a planner for an actuated spring-loaded inverted pendulum model. In an ablation study, the failure margin constraints decreased the number of invalid solutions by between 24 and 47 percentage points across different objectives and horizon lengths. While we demonstrate the method on a canonical model of locomotion, we also discuss how this can be applied to data-driven models and full-order robot models.
summary: The complex dynamics of agile robotic legged locomotion requires motion planning to intelligently adjust footstep locations. Often, bipedal footstep and motion planning use mathematically simple models such as the linear inverted pendulum, instead of dynamically-rich models that do not have closed-form solutions. We propose a real-time optimization method to plan for dynamical models that do not have closed form solutions and experience irrecoverable failure. Our method uses a data-driven approximation of the step-to-step dynamics and of a failure margin function. This failure margin function is an oriented distance function in state-action space where it describes the signed distance to success or failure. The motion planning problem is formed as a nonlinear program with constraints that enforce the approximated forward dynamics and the validity of state-action pairs. For illustration, this method is applied to create a planner for an actuated spring-loaded inverted pendulum model. In an ablation study, the failure margin constraints decreased the number of invalid solutions by between 24 and 47 percentage points across different objectives and horizon lengths. While we demonstrate the method on a canonical model of locomotion, we also discuss how this can be applied to data-driven models and full-order robot models.
abstract_zh: 敏捷机器人腿式运动的复杂动力学需要运动规划来智能调整脚步位置。通常，双足脚步和运动规划使用数学上简单的模型（例如线性倒立摆），而不是没有封闭式解决方案的动态丰富模型。我们提出了一种实时优化方法来规划没有封闭式解决方案并经历不可恢复故障的动态模型。我们的方法使用逐步动态和故障裕度函数的数据驱动近似。该失败裕度函数是状态-动作空间中的定向距离函数，它描述了成功或失败的有符号距离。运动规划问题形成为一个非线性程序，其约束强制执行近似的前向动力学和状态-动作对的有效性。为了便于说明，该方法用于为驱动的弹簧加载倒立摆模型创建规划器。在一项消融研究中，在不同的目标和时间长度上，失败裕度约束将无效解决方案的数量减少了 24 到 47 个百分点。在我们在规范运动模型上演示该方法的同时，我们还讨论了如何将其应用于数据驱动模型和全阶机器人模型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于失败边距约束的实时优化方法，用于解决敏捷足式机器人运动规划中复杂动力学模型的规划问题。
AI.motivation: 传统足式机器人运动规划依赖简化模型（如线性倒立摆），难以处理动态复杂且无解析解的模型，导致规划失败风险高。
AI.method: 通过数据驱动方法近似步态动力学和失败边距函数（状态-动作空间的有向距离函数），将运动规划建模为带约束的非线性规划问题，并在弹簧倒立摆模型中验证。
AI.result: 消融实验显示，失败边距约束在不同目标和时间跨度下减少无效解24-47个百分点，验证了方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法可扩展至数据驱动模型和全阶机器人模型，为复杂动态场景下的敏捷足式机器人运动规划提供新思路。
