authors_text: Galina Lavrentyeva,Sergey Novoselov,Andrey Shulipa,Marina Volkova,Aleksandr Kozlov
title: Investigation of Different Calibration Methods for Deep Speaker Embedding based Verification Systems
title_zh: 基于深度扬声器嵌入的验证系统的不同校准方法的研究
abstract: Deep speaker embedding extractors have already become new state-of-the-art systems in the speaker verification field. However, the problem of verification score calibration for such systems often remains out of focus. An irrelevant score calibration leads to serious issues, especially in the case of unknown acoustic conditions, even if we use a strong speaker verification system in terms of threshold-free metrics. This paper presents an investigation over several methods of score calibration: a classical approach based on the logistic regression model; the recently presented magnitude estimation network MagnetO that uses activations from the pooling layer of the trained deep speaker extractor and generalization of such approach based on separate scale and offset prediction neural networks. An additional focus of this research is to estimate the impact of score normalization on the calibration performance of the system. The obtained results demonstrate that there are no serious problems if in-domain development data are used for calibration tuning. Otherwise, a trade-off between good calibration performance and threshold-free system quality arises. In most cases using adaptive s-norm helps to stabilize score distributions and to improve system performance. Meanwhile, some experiments demonstrate that novel approaches have their limits in score stabilization on several datasets.
summary: Deep speaker embedding extractors have already become new state-of-the-art systems in the speaker verification field. However, the problem of verification score calibration for such systems often remains out of focus. An irrelevant score calibration leads to serious issues, especially in the case of unknown acoustic conditions, even if we use a strong speaker verification system in terms of threshold-free metrics. This paper presents an investigation over several methods of score calibration: a classical approach based on the logistic regression model; the recently presented magnitude estimation network MagnetO that uses activations from the pooling layer of the trained deep speaker extractor and generalization of such approach based on separate scale and offset prediction neural networks. An additional focus of this research is to estimate the impact of score normalization on the calibration performance of the system. The obtained results demonstrate that there are no serious problems if in-domain development data are used for calibration tuning. Otherwise, a trade-off between good calibration performance and threshold-free system quality arises. In most cases using adaptive s-norm helps to stabilize score distributions and to improve system performance. Meanwhile, some experiments demonstrate that novel approaches have their limits in score stabilization on several datasets.
abstract_zh: 深度说话人嵌入提取器已经成为说话人验证领域最先进的新系统。然而，此类系统的验证分数校准问题通常仍然不受关注。即使我们在无阈值指标方面使用强大的说话人验证系统，不相关的分数校准也会导致严重的问题，特别是在未知声学条件的情况下。本文对几种评分校准方法进行了研究：基于逻辑回归模型的经典方法；最近提出的幅度估计网络 MagnetO，它使用经过训练的深度说话人提取器的池化层的激活，以及基于单独的尺度和偏移预测神经网络的这种方法的泛化。这项研究的另一个重点是估计分数归一化对系统校准性能的影响。获得的结果表明，如果使用域内开发数据进行校准调整，则不会出现严重问题。否则，就会出现良好的校准性能和无阈值系统质量之间的权衡。在大多数情况下，使用自适应 s-范数有助于稳定分数分布并提高系统性能。同时，一些实验表明，新方法在几个数据集上的分数稳定性方面存在局限性。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了用于深度说话人嵌入验证系统的不同校准方法，以提高其在不同声学条件下的性能。
AI.motivation: 尽管深度说话人嵌入提取器已成为说话人验证领域的前沿系统，但其验证分数校准问题仍未得到充分关注，特别是在未知声学条件下，校准不当可能导致严重问题。
AI.method: 本文调查了多种校准方法，包括基于逻辑回归的经典方法、利用深度说话人提取器池化层激活的MagnetO方法，以及基于独立尺度和偏移预测神经网络的方法，并评估了分数归一化对系统校准性能的影响。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，使用域内开发数据进行校准调优时，系统不会出现严重问题，但在其他情况下会出现校准性能与无阈值系统质量之间的权衡。大多数情况下，自适应s-norm有助于稳定分数分布并提高系统性能，但新方法在某些数据集上的分数稳定性存在局限。
AI.conclusion: 本文得出结论，分数校准对于深度说话人嵌入验证系统至关重要，使用自适应s-norm和适当的校准方法可以显著提高系统性能，但需注意新方法在某些情况下的局限性。

tldr: 本文研究了用于深度说话人嵌入验证系统的不同校准方法，以提高其在不同声学条件下的性能。
motivation: 尽管深度说话人嵌入提取器已成为说话人验证领域的前沿系统，但其验证分数校准问题仍未得到充分关注，特别是在未知声学条件下，校准不当可能导致严重问题。
method: 本文调查了多种校准方法，包括基于逻辑回归的经典方法、利用深度说话人提取器池化层激活的MagnetO方法，以及基于独立尺度和偏移预测神经网络的方法，并评估了分数归一化对系统校准性能的影响。
result: 实验结果表明，使用域内开发数据进行校准调优时，系统不会出现严重问题，但在其他情况下会出现校准性能与无阈值系统质量之间的权衡。大多数情况下，自适应s-norm有助于稳定分数分布并提高系统性能，但新方法在某些数据集上的分数稳定性存在局限。
conclusion: 本文得出结论，分数校准对于深度说话人嵌入验证系统至关重要，使用自适应s-norm和适当的校准方法可以显著提高系统性能，但需注意新方法在某些情况下的局限性。
search_text: Investigation of Different Calibration Methods for Deep Speaker Embedding based Verification Systems 基于深度扬声器嵌入的验证系统的不同校准方法的研究 Deep speaker embedding extractors have already become new state-of-the-art systems in the speaker verification field. However, the problem of verification score calibration for such systems often remains out of focus. An irrelevant score calibration leads to serious issues, especially in the case of unknown acoustic conditions, even if we use a strong speaker verification system in terms of threshold-free metrics. This paper presents an investigation over several methods of score calibration: a classical approach based on the logistic regression model; the recently presented magnitude estimation network MagnetO that uses activations from the pooling layer of the trained deep speaker extractor and generalization of such approach based on separate scale and offset prediction neural networks. An additional focus of this research is to estimate the impact of score normalization on the calibration performance of the system. The obtained results demonstrate that there are no serious problems if in-domain development data are used for calibration tuning. Otherwise, a trade-off between good calibration performance and threshold-free system quality arises. In most cases using adaptive s-norm helps to stabilize score distributions and to improve system performance. Meanwhile, some experiments demonstrate that novel approaches have their limits in score stabilization on several datasets. 深度说话人嵌入提取器已经成为说话人验证领域最先进的新系统。然而，此类系统的验证分数校准问题通常仍然不受关注。即使我们在无阈值指标方面使用强大的说话人验证系统，不相关的分数校准也会导致严重的问题，特别是在未知声学条件的情况下。本文对几种评分校准方法进行了研究：基于逻辑回归模型的经典方法；最近提出的幅度估计网络 MagnetO，它使用经过训练的深度说话人提取器的池化层的激活，以及基于单独的尺度和偏移预测神经网络的这种方法的泛化。这项研究的另一个重点是估计分数归一化对系统校准性能的影响。获得的结果表明，如果使用域内开发数据进行校准调整，则不会出现严重问题。否则，就会出现良好的校准性能和无阈值系统质量之间的权衡。在大多数情况下，使用自适应 s-范数有助于稳定分数分布并提高系统性能。同时，一些实验表明，新方法在几个数据集上的分数稳定性方面存在局限性。 本文研究了用于深度说话人嵌入验证系统的不同校准方法，以提高其在不同声学条件下的性能。 Galina Lavrentyeva,Sergey Novoselov,Andrey Shulipa,Marina Volkova,Aleksandr Kozlov cs.SD,cs.LG,eess.AS

authors_text: Alejandro Escontrela,Xue Bin Peng,Wenhao Yu,Tingnan Zhang,Atil Iscen,Ken Goldberg,Pieter Abbeel
title: Adversarial Motion Priors Make Good Substitutes for Complex Reward Functions
title_zh: 对抗性运动先验可以很好地替代复杂的奖励函数
abstract: Training a high-dimensional simulated agent with an under-specified reward function often leads the agent to learn physically infeasible strategies that are ineffective when deployed in the real world. To mitigate these unnatural behaviors, reinforcement learning practitioners often utilize complex reward functions that encourage physically plausible behaviors. However, a tedious labor-intensive tuning process is often required to create hand-designed rewards which might not easily generalize across platforms and tasks. We propose substituting complex reward functions with "style rewards" learned from a dataset of motion capture demonstrations. A learned style reward can be combined with an arbitrary task reward to train policies that perform tasks using naturalistic strategies. These natural strategies can also facilitate transfer to the real world. We build upon Adversarial Motion Priors -- an approach from the computer graphics domain that encodes a style reward from a dataset of reference motions -- to demonstrate that an adversarial approach to training policies can produce behaviors that transfer to a real quadrupedal robot without requiring complex reward functions. We also demonstrate that an effective style reward can be learned from a few seconds of motion capture data gathered from a German Shepherd and leads to energy-efficient locomotion strategies with natural gait transitions.
summary: Training a high-dimensional simulated agent with an under-specified reward function often leads the agent to learn physically infeasible strategies that are ineffective when deployed in the real world. To mitigate these unnatural behaviors, reinforcement learning practitioners often utilize complex reward functions that encourage physically plausible behaviors. However, a tedious labor-intensive tuning process is often required to create hand-designed rewards which might not easily generalize across platforms and tasks. We propose substituting complex reward functions with "style rewards" learned from a dataset of motion capture demonstrations. A learned style reward can be combined with an arbitrary task reward to train policies that perform tasks using naturalistic strategies. These natural strategies can also facilitate transfer to the real world. We build upon Adversarial Motion Priors -- an approach from the computer graphics domain that encodes a style reward from a dataset of reference motions -- to demonstrate that an adversarial approach to training policies can produce behaviors that transfer to a real quadrupedal robot without requiring complex reward functions. We also demonstrate that an effective style reward can be learned from a few seconds of motion capture data gathered from a German Shepherd and leads to energy-efficient locomotion strategies with natural gait transitions.
abstract_zh: 使用未指定的奖励函数训练高维模拟智能体通常会导致智能体学习物理上不可行的策略，这些策略在现实世界中部署时无效。为了减轻这些不自然的行为，强化学习实践者经常利用复杂的奖励函数来鼓励物理上合理的行为。然而，创建手工设计的奖励通常需要繁琐的劳动密集型调整过程，而这些奖励可能不容易跨平台和任务推广。我们建议用从动作捕捉演示数据集中学到的“风格奖励”来代替复杂的奖励函数。学习风格奖励可以与任意任务奖励相结合，以训练使用自然策略执行任务的策略。这些自然策略也可以促进向现实世界的转移。我们以对抗性运动先验（一种来自计算机图形领域的方法，从参考运动数据集编码风格奖励）为基础，证明训练策略的对抗性方法可以产生转移到真正的四足机器人的行为，而不需要复杂的奖励函数。我们还证明，可以从德国牧羊犬收集的几秒钟的动作捕捉数据中学习有效的风格奖励，并导致具有自然步态转换的节能运动策略。

AI.tldr: 本文提出用从动作捕捉数据中学到的'风格奖励'替代复杂奖励函数，以训练出更符合物理规律且能迁移至真实世界的机器人策略。
AI.motivation: 传统复杂奖励函数设计耗时且难以跨平台通用，导致智能体学习出不自然的行为模式，而简化的奖励函数又可能产生物理不可行的策略。
AI.method: 基于对抗运动先验方法，从少量动作捕捉数据（如德国牧羊犬动作）中学习风格奖励，并将其与任务奖励结合训练策略。
AI.result: 在真实四足机器人上成功验证了方法有效性，实现了能量高效的自然步态转换，且仅需数秒动作数据即可学习有效风格奖励。
AI.conclusion: 风格奖励为复杂任务提供了可迁移的物理合理性约束，证明了对抗学习方法在减少人工设计奖励依赖方面的潜力。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出用从动作捕捉数据中学到的'风格奖励'替代复杂奖励函数，以训练出更符合物理规律且能迁移至真实世界的机器人策略。

authors_text: Tianfei Zhou,Wenguan Wang,Ender Konukoglu,Luc Van Gool
title: Rethinking Semantic Segmentation: A Prototype View
title_zh: 重新思考语义分割：原型视图
abstract: Prevalent semantic segmentation solutions, despite their different network designs (FCN based or attention based) and mask decoding strategies (parametric softmax based or pixel-query based), can be placed in one category, by considering the softmax weights or query vectors as learnable class prototypes. In light of this prototype view, this study uncovers several limitations of such parametric segmentation regime, and proposes a nonparametric alternative based on non-learnable prototypes. Instead of prior methods learning a single weight/query vector for each class in a fully parametric manner, our model represents each class as a set of non-learnable prototypes, relying solely on the mean features of several training pixels within that class. The dense prediction is thus achieved by nonparametric nearest prototype retrieving. This allows our model to directly shape the pixel embedding space, by optimizing the arrangement between embedded pixels and anchored prototypes. It is able to handle arbitrary number of classes with a constant amount of learnable parameters. We empirically show that, with FCN based and attention based segmentation models (i.e., HRNet, Swin, SegFormer) and backbones (i.e., ResNet, HRNet, Swin, MiT), our nonparametric framework yields compelling results over several datasets (i.e., ADE20K, Cityscapes, COCO-Stuff), and performs well in the large-vocabulary situation. We expect this work will provoke a rethink of the current de facto semantic segmentation model design.
summary: Prevalent semantic segmentation solutions, despite their different network designs (FCN based or attention based) and mask decoding strategies (parametric softmax based or pixel-query based), can be placed in one category, by considering the softmax weights or query vectors as learnable class prototypes. In light of this prototype view, this study uncovers several limitations of such parametric segmentation regime, and proposes a nonparametric alternative based on non-learnable prototypes. Instead of prior methods learning a single weight/query vector for each class in a fully parametric manner, our model represents each class as a set of non-learnable prototypes, relying solely on the mean features of several training pixels within that class. The dense prediction is thus achieved by nonparametric nearest prototype retrieving. This allows our model to directly shape the pixel embedding space, by optimizing the arrangement between embedded pixels and anchored prototypes. It is able to handle arbitrary number of classes with a constant amount of learnable parameters. We empirically show that, with FCN based and attention based segmentation models (i.e., HRNet, Swin, SegFormer) and backbones (i.e., ResNet, HRNet, Swin, MiT), our nonparametric framework yields compelling results over several datasets (i.e., ADE20K, Cityscapes, COCO-Stuff), and performs well in the large-vocabulary situation. We expect this work will provoke a rethink of the current de facto semantic segmentation model design.
abstract_zh: 流行的语义分割解决方案，尽管其网络设计（基于 FCN 或基于注意力）和掩码解码策略（基于参数化 softmax 或基于像素查询）不同，但可以通过将 softmax 权重或查询向量视为可学习的类原型来归为一类。根据这种原型视图，本研究揭示了这种参数分割机制的一些局限性，并提出了一种基于不可学习原型的非参数替代方案。我们的模型不是以完全参数化的方式为每个类学习单个权重/查询向量，而是将每个类表示为一组不可学习的原型，仅依赖于该类中多个训练像素的平均特征。因此，密集预测是通过非参数最近原型检索来实现的。这使得我们的模型能够通过优化嵌入像素和锚定原型之间的排列来直接塑造像素嵌入空间。它能够处理任意数量的具有恒定数量的可学习参数的类。我们的经验表明，通过基于 FCN 和基于注意力的分割模型（即 HRNet、Swin、SegFormer）和骨干网（即 ResNet、HRNet、Swin、MiT），我们的非参数框架在多个数据集（即 ADE20K、Cityscapes、COCO-Stuff）上产生了引人注目的结果，并且在大词汇量情况下表现良好。我们预计这项工作将引发对当前事实上的语义分割模型设计的重新思考。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于非可学习原型的非参数化语义分割框架，通过像素嵌入空间与锚定原型的优化排列实现密集预测。
AI.motivation: 现有参数化分割方法存在参数量随类别数增长、难以处理大词汇量场景的问题，且未充分利用训练数据特征信息。
AI.method: 将每个类别表示为基于训练像素均值特征的非可学习原型集合，通过非参数最近邻检索实现像素预测，保持参数量恒定。
AI.result: 在ADE20K、Cityscapes等数据集上优于现有方法，尤其在大词汇量场景下表现突出，兼容HRNet、Swin等多种主流模型结构。
AI.conclusion: 非参数化原型视角为语义分割模型设计提供新思路，有望推动当前主流参数化方法的范式转变。

search_text: Rethinking Semantic Segmentation: A Prototype View 重新思考语义分割：原型视图 Prevalent semantic segmentation solutions, despite their different network designs (FCN based or attention based) and mask decoding strategies (parametric softmax based or pixel-query based), can be placed in one category, by considering the softmax weights or query vectors as learnable class prototypes. In light of this prototype view, this study uncovers several limitations of such parametric segmentation regime, and proposes a nonparametric alternative based on non-learnable prototypes. Instead of prior methods learning a single weight/query vector for each class in a fully parametric manner, our model represents each class as a set of non-learnable prototypes, relying solely on the mean features of several training pixels within that class. The dense prediction is thus achieved by nonparametric nearest prototype retrieving. This allows our model to directly shape the pixel embedding space, by optimizing the arrangement between embedded pixels and anchored prototypes. It is able to handle arbitrary number of classes with a constant amount of learnable parameters. We empirically show that, with FCN based and attention based segmentation models (i.e., HRNet, Swin, SegFormer) and backbones (i.e., ResNet, HRNet, Swin, MiT), our nonparametric framework yields compelling results over several datasets (i.e., ADE20K, Cityscapes, COCO-Stuff), and performs well in the large-vocabulary situation. We expect this work will provoke a rethink of the current de facto semantic segmentation model design. 流行的语义分割解决方案，尽管其网络设计（基于 FCN 或基于注意力）和掩码解码策略（基于参数化 softmax 或基于像素查询）不同，但可以通过将 softmax 权重或查询向量视为可学习的类原型来归为一类。根据这种原型视图，本研究揭示了这种参数分割机制的一些局限性，并提出了一种基于不可学习原型的非参数替代方案。我们的模型不是以完全参数化的方式为每个类学习单个权重/查询向量，而是将每个类表示为一组不可学习的原型，仅依赖于该类中多个训练像素的平均特征。因此，密集预测是通过非参数最近原型检索来实现的。这使得我们的模型能够通过优化嵌入像素和锚定原型之间的排列来直接塑造像素嵌入空间。它能够处理任意数量的具有恒定数量的可学习参数的类。我们的经验表明，通过基于 FCN 和基于注意力的分割模型（即 HRNet、Swin、SegFormer）和骨干网（即 ResNet、HRNet、Swin、MiT），我们的非参数框架在多个数据集（即 ADE20K、Cityscapes、COCO-Stuff）上产生了引人注目的结果，并且在大词汇量情况下表现良好。我们预计这项工作将引发对当前事实上的语义分割模型设计的重新思考。 本文提出一种基于非可学习原型的非参数化语义分割框架，通过像素嵌入空间与锚定原型的优化排列实现密集预测。 Tianfei Zhou,Wenguan Wang,Ender Konukoglu,Luc Van Gool cs.CV

authors_text: Joel Mathew,Dimitris Stripelis,José Luis Ambite
title: Federated Named Entity Recognition
title_zh: 联合命名实体识别
abstract: We present an analysis of the performance of Federated Learning in a paradigmatic natural-language processing task: Named-Entity Recognition (NER). For our evaluation, we use the language-independent CoNLL-2003 dataset as our benchmark dataset and a Bi-LSTM-CRF model as our benchmark NER model. We show that federated training reaches almost the same performance as the centralized model, though with some performance degradation as the learning environments become more heterogeneous. We also show the convergence rate of federated models for NER. Finally, we discuss existing challenges of Federated Learning for NLP applications that can foster future research directions.
summary: We present an analysis of the performance of Federated Learning in a paradigmatic natural-language processing task: Named-Entity Recognition (NER). For our evaluation, we use the language-independent CoNLL-2003 dataset as our benchmark dataset and a Bi-LSTM-CRF model as our benchmark NER model. We show that federated training reaches almost the same performance as the centralized model, though with some performance degradation as the learning environments become more heterogeneous. We also show the convergence rate of federated models for NER. Finally, we discuss existing challenges of Federated Learning for NLP applications that can foster future research directions.
abstract_zh: 我们对联邦学习在范式自然语言处理任务中的性能进行了分析：命名实体识别（NER）。为了进行评估，我们使用独立于语言的 CoNLL-2003 数据集作为基准数据集，使用 Bi-LSTM-CRF 模型作为基准 NER 模型。我们表明，联合训练的性能几乎与集中式模型相同，但随着学习环境变得更加异构，性能会有所下降。我们还展示了 NER 联合模型的收敛速度。最后，我们讨论了 NLP 应用联邦学习的现有挑战，这些挑战可以促进未来的研究方向。

AI.tldr: 分析联邦学习在命名实体识别任务中的性能表现
AI.motivation: 评估联邦学习在自然语言处理任务中的可行性，特别是命名实体识别（NER）的性能及面临的挑战
AI.method: 使用语言无关的CoNLL-2003数据集和Bi-LSTM-CRF模型作为基准，对比联邦训练与集中式模型的性能差异，并分析收敛速度
AI.result: 联邦训练性能接近集中式模型，但异构环境导致性能下降；同时量化了联邦模型在NER任务中的收敛速度
AI.conclusion: 指出联邦学习在NLP中需解决异构性影响等挑战，并为未来研究提供方向

authors_text: Berfin Simsek,Melissa Hall,Levent Sagun
title: Understanding out-of-distribution accuracies through quantifying difficulty of test samples
title_zh: 通过量化测试样本的难度来了解分布外精度
abstract: Existing works show that although modern neural networks achieve remarkable generalization performance on the in-distribution (ID) dataset, the accuracy drops significantly on the out-of-distribution (OOD) datasets \cite{recht2018cifar, recht2019imagenet}. To understand why a variety of models consistently make more mistakes in the OOD datasets, we propose a new metric to quantify the difficulty of the test images (either ID or OOD) that depends on the interaction of the training dataset and the model. In particular, we introduce \textit{confusion score} as a label-free measure of image difficulty which quantifies the amount of disagreement on a given test image based on the class conditional probabilities estimated by an ensemble of trained models. Using the confusion score, we investigate CIFAR-10 and its OOD derivatives. Next, by partitioning test and OOD datasets via their confusion scores, we predict the relationship between ID and OOD accuracies for various architectures. This allows us to obtain an estimator of the OOD accuracy of a given model only using ID test labels. Our observations indicate that the biggest contribution to the accuracy drop comes from images with high confusion scores. Upon further inspection, we report on the nature of the misclassified images grouped by their confusion scores: \textit{(i)} images with high confusion scores contain \textit{weak spurious correlations} that appear in multiple classes in the training data and lack clear \textit{class-specific features}, and \textit{(ii)} images with low confusion scores exhibit spurious correlations that belong to another class, namely \textit{class-specific spurious correlations}.
summary: Existing works show that although modern neural networks achieve remarkable generalization performance on the in-distribution (ID) dataset, the accuracy drops significantly on the out-of-distribution (OOD) datasets \cite{recht2018cifar, recht2019imagenet}. To understand why a variety of models consistently make more mistakes in the OOD datasets, we propose a new metric to quantify the difficulty of the test images (either ID or OOD) that depends on the interaction of the training dataset and the model. In particular, we introduce \textit{confusion score} as a label-free measure of image difficulty which quantifies the amount of disagreement on a given test image based on the class conditional probabilities estimated by an ensemble of trained models. Using the confusion score, we investigate CIFAR-10 and its OOD derivatives. Next, by partitioning test and OOD datasets via their confusion scores, we predict the relationship between ID and OOD accuracies for various architectures. This allows us to obtain an estimator of the OOD accuracy of a given model only using ID test labels. Our observations indicate that the biggest contribution to the accuracy drop comes from images with high confusion scores. Upon further inspection, we report on the nature of the misclassified images grouped by their confusion scores: \textit{(i)} images with high confusion scores contain \textit{weak spurious correlations} that appear in multiple classes in the training data and lack clear \textit{class-specific features}, and \textit{(ii)} images with low confusion scores exhibit spurious correlations that belong to another class, namely \textit{class-specific spurious correlations}.
abstract_zh: 现有的工作表明，尽管现代神经网络在分布内（ID）数据集上取得了显着的泛化性能，但在分布外（OOD）数据集上的准确性显着下降\cite{recht2018cifar，recht2019imagenet}。为了理解为什么各种模型在 OOD 数据集中总是犯更多错误，我们提出了一种新的度量来量化测试图像（ID 或 OOD）的难度，该难度取决于训练数据集和模型的交互。特别是，我们引入 \textit{confusion Score} 作为图像难度的无标签度量，它根据训练模型集合估计的类条件概率来量化给定测试图像上的分歧量。使用混淆评分，我们研究了 CIFAR-10 及其 OOD 衍生物。接下来，通过混淆分数对测试和 OOD 数据集进行分区，我们预测各种架构的 ID 和 OOD 准确度之间的关系。这使我们能够仅使用 ID 测试标签来获得给定模型的 OOD 准确性的估计值。我们的观察表明，对准确率下降的最大贡献来自于具有高混淆分数的图像。经过进一步检查，我们报告了按混淆分数分组的错误分类图像的性质：具有高混淆分数的 \textit{(i)} 图像包含出现在训练数据中多个类中的 \textit{弱虚假相关性}，并且缺乏清晰的 \textit{类特定特征}，而具有低混淆分数的 \textit{(ii)} 图像表现出属于另一个类的虚假相关性，即 \textit{特定于类的虚假相关性}。

AI.tldr: 本文通过量化测试样本的难度，分析模型在分布外数据集（OOD）上准确率下降的原因。
AI.motivation: 现有模型在分布内数据（ID）表现优异，但在OOD数据上准确率显著下降，但具体原因尚未明确。
AI.method: 提出无监督的混淆分数（confusion score）度量，基于模型集成预测结果的不一致性，分析CIFAR-10及其OOD衍生数据集的样本难度分布。
AI.result: 高混淆分数样本导致准确率大幅下降，其特征为存在弱虚假相关性且缺乏类特异性特征；低混淆分数样本则具有类特异性虚假相关性。
AI.conclusion: 混淆分数可有效预测OOD准确率，揭示了不同错误类型背后的样本特征差异，为模型鲁棒性分析提供新视角。

authors_text: Santiago Ontanon,Joshua Ainslie,Vaclav Cvicek,Zachary Fisher
title: LogicInference: A New Dataset for Teaching Logical Inference to seq2seq Models
title_zh: LogicInference：用于教授 seq2seq 模型逻辑推理的新数据集
comment: Accepted at ICLR 2022 OSC workshop (v3 contains updated results after fixing a problem in dataset generation)
comments: Accepted at ICLR 2022 OSC workshop (v3 contains updated results after fixing a problem in dataset generation)
abstract: Machine learning models such as Transformers or LSTMs struggle with tasks that are compositional in nature such as those involving reasoning/inference. Although many datasets exist to evaluate compositional generalization, when it comes to evaluating inference abilities, options are more limited. This paper presents LogicInference, a new dataset to evaluate the ability of models to perform logical inference. The dataset focuses on inference using propositional logic and a small subset of first-order logic, represented both in semi-formal logical notation, as well as in natural language. We also report initial results using a collection of machine learning models to establish an initial baseline in this dataset.
summary: Machine learning models such as Transformers or LSTMs struggle with tasks that are compositional in nature such as those involving reasoning/inference. Although many datasets exist to evaluate compositional generalization, when it comes to evaluating inference abilities, options are more limited. This paper presents LogicInference, a new dataset to evaluate the ability of models to perform logical inference. The dataset focuses on inference using propositional logic and a small subset of first-order logic, represented both in semi-formal logical notation, as well as in natural language. We also report initial results using a collection of machine learning models to establish an initial baseline in this dataset.
abstract_zh: Transformer 或 LSTM 等机器学习模型难以处理本质上是组合性的任务，例如涉及推理/推理的任务。尽管存在许多用于评估组合泛化的数据集，但在评估推理能力时，选择更加有限。本文提出了 LogicInference，这是一个用于评估模型执行逻辑推理能力的新数据集。该数据集侧重于使用命题逻辑和一阶逻辑的一小部分进行推理，以半形式逻辑符号和自然语言表示。我们还使用一组机器学习模型来报告初步结果，以在此数据集中建立初始基线。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个名为LogicInference的新数据集，用于评估序列到序列模型的逻辑推理能力。
AI.motivation: 现有数据集难以有效评估模型的推理能力，尤其在命题逻辑和一阶逻辑领域缺乏专门的测试基准。
AI.method: 构建包含半形式逻辑符号和自然语言表述的逻辑推理任务数据集，并采用多种机器学习模型进行初步测试。
AI.result: 实验结果显示当前模型在逻辑推理任务上表现有限，为后续研究提供了基线参考。
AI.conclusion: LogicInference数据集为逻辑推理能力评估提供了新工具，但需进一步优化模型以提升推理性能。

search_text: LogicInference: A New Dataset for Teaching Logical Inference to seq2seq Models LogicInference：用于教授 seq2seq 模型逻辑推理的新数据集 Machine learning models such as Transformers or LSTMs struggle with tasks that are compositional in nature such as those involving reasoning/inference. Although many datasets exist to evaluate compositional generalization, when it comes to evaluating inference abilities, options are more limited. This paper presents LogicInference, a new dataset to evaluate the ability of models to perform logical inference. The dataset focuses on inference using propositional logic and a small subset of first-order logic, represented both in semi-formal logical notation, as well as in natural language. We also report initial results using a collection of machine learning models to establish an initial baseline in this dataset. Transformer 或 LSTM 等机器学习模型难以处理本质上是组合性的任务，例如涉及推理/推理的任务。尽管存在许多用于评估组合泛化的数据集，但在评估推理能力时，选择更加有限。本文提出了 LogicInference，这是一个用于评估模型执行逻辑推理能力的新数据集。该数据集侧重于使用命题逻辑和一阶逻辑的一小部分进行推理，以半形式逻辑符号和自然语言表示。我们还使用一组机器学习模型来报告初步结果，以在此数据集中建立初始基线。 本文提出一个名为LogicInference的新数据集，用于评估序列到序列模型的逻辑推理能力。 Santiago Ontanon,Joshua Ainslie,Vaclav Cvicek,Zachary Fisher cs.AI

authors_text: Sergey Novoselov,Galina Lavrentyeva,Anastasia Avdeeva,Vladimir Volokhov,Aleksei Gusev
title: Robust Speaker Recognition with Transformers Using wav2vec 2.0
title_zh: 使用 wav2vec 2.0 通过 Transformers 进行稳健的说话人识别
comment: Submitted to Interspeech2022. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2111.02298
comments: Submitted to Interspeech2022. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2111.02298
abstract: Recent advances in unsupervised speech representation learning discover new approaches and provide new state-of-the-art for diverse types of speech processing tasks. This paper presents an investigation of using wav2vec 2.0 deep speech representations for the speaker recognition task. The proposed fine-tuning procedure of wav2vec 2.0 with simple TDNN and statistic pooling back-end using additive angular margin loss allows to obtain deep speaker embedding extractor that is well-generalized across different domains. It is concluded that Contrastive Predictive Coding pretraining scheme efficiently utilizes the power of unlabeled data, and thus opens the door to powerful transformer-based speaker recognition systems. The experimental results obtained in this study demonstrate that fine-tuning can be done on relatively small sets and a clean version of data. Using data augmentation during fine-tuning provides additional performance gains in speaker verification. In this study speaker recognition systems were analyzed on a wide range of well-known verification protocols: VoxCeleb1 cleaned test set, NIST SRE 18 development set, NIST SRE 2016 and NIST SRE 2019 evaluation set, VOiCES evaluation set, NIST 2021 SRE, and CTS challenges sets.
summary: Recent advances in unsupervised speech representation learning discover new approaches and provide new state-of-the-art for diverse types of speech processing tasks. This paper presents an investigation of using wav2vec 2.0 deep speech representations for the speaker recognition task. The proposed fine-tuning procedure of wav2vec 2.0 with simple TDNN and statistic pooling back-end using additive angular margin loss allows to obtain deep speaker embedding extractor that is well-generalized across different domains. It is concluded that Contrastive Predictive Coding pretraining scheme efficiently utilizes the power of unlabeled data, and thus opens the door to powerful transformer-based speaker recognition systems. The experimental results obtained in this study demonstrate that fine-tuning can be done on relatively small sets and a clean version of data. Using data augmentation during fine-tuning provides additional performance gains in speaker verification. In this study speaker recognition systems were analyzed on a wide range of well-known verification protocols: VoxCeleb1 cleaned test set, NIST SRE 18 development set, NIST SRE 2016 and NIST SRE 2019 evaluation set, VOiCES evaluation set, NIST 2021 SRE, and CTS challenges sets.
abstract_zh: 无监督语音表示学习的最新进展发现了新方法，并为不同类型的语音处理任务提供了新的最先进技术。本文介绍了使用 wav2vec 2.0 深度语音表示进行说话人识别任务的研究。所提出的 wav2vec 2.0 微调程序具有简单的 TDNN 和使用加性角度裕度损失的统计池后端，允许获得跨不同领域良好泛化的深度说话人嵌入提取器。结论是，对比预测编码预训练方案有效地利用了未标记数据的力量，从而为强大的基于变压器的说话人识别系统打开了大门。本研究获得的实验结果表明，可以在相对较小的数据集和干净的数据上进行微调。在微调过程中使用数据增强可以在说话人验证中提供额外的性能提升。在这项研究中，我们使用各种众所周知的验证协议对说话人识别系统进行了分析：VoxCeleb1 清理测试集、NIST SRE 18 开发集、NIST SRE 2016 和 NIST SRE 2019 评估集、VOiCES 评估集、NIST 2021 SRE 和 CTS 挑战集。

AI.tldr: 本文研究使用wav2vec 2.0深度语音表征进行说话人识别任务，提出结合TDNN和统计池化后端的微调方法，实现跨领域的鲁棒说话人嵌入提取。
AI.motivation: 基于对比预测编码的无监督预训练方法能有效利用未标注数据，为构建强大的Transformer说话人识别系统提供新途径。
AI.method: 对wav2vec 2.0模型进行微调，结合TDNN和统计池化后端，采用加性角度裕度损失函数，并通过数据增强提升细调效果。
AI.result: 在VoxCeleb1、NIST SRE等多套验证协议上验证，表明在小规模干净数据集上微调即可获得优异性能，数据增强进一步提升说话人验证效果。
AI.conclusion: 对比预训练方案有效释放未标注数据潜力，结合微调与数据增强可构建跨领域鲁棒的Transformer说话人识别系统。

authors_text: Siyuan Yuan,Zhepei Wang,Umut Isik,Ritwik Giri,Jean-Marc Valin,Michael M. Goodwin,Arvindh Krishnaswamy
title: Improved singing voice separation with chromagram-based pitch-aware remixing
title_zh: 通过基于色谱的音调感知混音改进了歌声分离
comment: To appear at ICASSP 2022, 5 pages, 1 figure
comments: To appear at ICASSP 2022, 5 pages, 1 figure
abstract: Singing voice separation aims to separate music into vocals and accompaniment components. One of the major constraints for the task is the limited amount of training data with separated vocals. Data augmentation techniques such as random source mixing have been shown to make better use of existing data and mildly improve model performance. We propose a novel data augmentation technique, chromagram-based pitch-aware remixing, where music segments with high pitch alignment are mixed. By performing controlled experiments in both supervised and semi-supervised settings, we demonstrate that training models with pitch-aware remixing significantly improves the test signal-to-distortion ratio (SDR)
summary: Singing voice separation aims to separate music into vocals and accompaniment components. One of the major constraints for the task is the limited amount of training data with separated vocals. Data augmentation techniques such as random source mixing have been shown to make better use of existing data and mildly improve model performance. We propose a novel data augmentation technique, chromagram-based pitch-aware remixing, where music segments with high pitch alignment are mixed. By performing controlled experiments in both supervised and semi-supervised settings, we demonstrate that training models with pitch-aware remixing significantly improves the test signal-to-distortion ratio (SDR)
abstract_zh: 歌声分离的目的是将音乐分离为人声和伴奏成分。该任务的主要限制之一是分离声音的训练数据量有限。随机源混合等数据增强技术已被证明可以更好地利用现有数据并略微提高模型性能。我们提出了一种新颖的数据增强技术，即基于色谱图的音调感知混音，其中混合具有高音调对齐的音乐片段。通过在监督和半监督环境中进行受控实验，我们证明了具有音高感知混音的训练模型显着提高了测试信号失真比（SDR）

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于色度图的音高感知混音数据增强技术，用于改进歌唱语音分离任务。
AI.motivation: 歌唱语音分离面临训练数据不足的挑战，现有数据增强方法效果有限，需更有效利用现有数据提升模型性能。
AI.method: 通过色度图分析音乐片段的音高对齐程度，混合高对齐度片段生成新训练数据，增强模型对音高的感知能力。
AI.result: 在监督与半监督实验中，使用该方法训练的模型测试信号失真比（SDR）显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 音高感知混音技术有效提升分离效果，为数据增强提供了新思路。

authors_text: Mehmet Baygin,Turker Tuncer,Sengul Dogan
title: New pyramidal hybrid textural and deep features based automatic skin cancer classification model: Ensemble DarkNet and textural feature extractor
title_zh: 新的基于金字塔混合纹理和深度特征的自动皮肤癌分类模型：Ensemble DarkNet 和纹理特征提取器
abstract: Background: Skin cancer is one of the widely seen cancer worldwide and automatic classification of skin cancer can be benefited dermatology clinics for an accurate diagnosis. Hence, a machine learning-based automatic skin cancer detection model must be developed. Material and Method: This research interests to overcome automatic skin cancer detection problem. A colored skin cancer image dataset is used. This dataset contains 3297 images with two classes. An automatic multilevel textural and deep features-based model is presented. Multilevel fuse feature generation using discrete wavelet transform (DWT), local phase quantization (LPQ), local binary pattern (LBP), pre-trained DarkNet19, and DarkNet53 are utilized to generate features of the skin cancer images, top 1000 features are selected threshold value-based neighborhood component analysis (NCA). The chosen top 1000 features are classified using the 10-fold cross-validation technique. Results: To obtain results, ten-fold cross-validation is used and 91.54% classification accuracy results are obtained by using the recommended pyramidal hybrid feature generator and NCA selector-based model. Further, various training and testing separation ratios (90:10, 80:20, 70:30, 60:40, 50:50) are used and the maximum classification rate is calculated as 95.74% using the 90:10 separation ratio. Conclusions: The findings and accuracies calculated are denoted that this model can be used in dermatology and pathology clinics to simplify the skin cancer detection process and help physicians.
summary: Background: Skin cancer is one of the widely seen cancer worldwide and automatic classification of skin cancer can be benefited dermatology clinics for an accurate diagnosis. Hence, a machine learning-based automatic skin cancer detection model must be developed. Material and Method: This research interests to overcome automatic skin cancer detection problem. A colored skin cancer image dataset is used. This dataset contains 3297 images with two classes. An automatic multilevel textural and deep features-based model is presented. Multilevel fuse feature generation using discrete wavelet transform (DWT), local phase quantization (LPQ), local binary pattern (LBP), pre-trained DarkNet19, and DarkNet53 are utilized to generate features of the skin cancer images, top 1000 features are selected threshold value-based neighborhood component analysis (NCA). The chosen top 1000 features are classified using the 10-fold cross-validation technique. Results: To obtain results, ten-fold cross-validation is used and 91.54% classification accuracy results are obtained by using the recommended pyramidal hybrid feature generator and NCA selector-based model. Further, various training and testing separation ratios (90:10, 80:20, 70:30, 60:40, 50:50) are used and the maximum classification rate is calculated as 95.74% using the 90:10 separation ratio. Conclusions: The findings and accuracies calculated are denoted that this model can be used in dermatology and pathology clinics to simplify the skin cancer detection process and help physicians.
abstract_zh: 背景：皮肤癌是世界范围内常见的癌症之一，皮肤癌的自动分类可以有利于皮肤科诊所的准确诊断。因此，必须开发基于机器学习的自动皮肤癌检测模型。材料和方法：本研究的兴趣是克服自动皮肤癌检测问题。使用彩色皮肤癌图像数据集。该数据集包含 3297 张图像，分为两类。提出了一种基于自动多级纹理和深层特征的模型。利用离散小波变换（DWT）、局部相位量化（LPQ）、局部二值模式（LBP）、预训练的DarkNet19和DarkNet53的多级融合特征生成来生成皮肤癌图像的特征，基于阈值的邻域成分分析（NCA）选择前1000个特征。使用 10 倍交叉验证技术对所选的前 1000 个特征进行分类。结果：为了获得结果，使用十倍交叉验证，并使用推荐的金字塔混合特征生成器和基于NCA选择器的模型获得了91.54%的分类准确率结果。此外，使用各种训练和测试分离比（90:10、80:20、70:30、60:40、50:50），并且使用90:10分离比计算出最大分类率为95.74%。结论：计算结果和准确性表明该模型可用于皮肤科和病理学诊所，以简化皮肤癌检测过程并帮助医生。

AI.tldr: 开发一种结合金字塔混合纹理特征和深度学习的自动皮肤癌分类模型，集成DarkNet和纹理特征提取器以提高诊断准确性。
AI.motivation: 皮肤癌是全球常见癌症，自动分类可辅助皮肤科诊所实现精准诊断，需开发高效机器学习模型以提升检测效率。
AI.method: 采用多级融合特征生成技术，结合离散小波变换（DWT）、局部相位量化（LPQ）、局部二值模式（LBP）及预训练DarkNet19/53模型提取特征，通过阈值邻域成分分析（NCA）筛选前1000个特征，使用10折交叉验证分类。
AI.result: 10折交叉验证分类准确率达91.54%，采用90:10训练测试比例时最高准确率提升至95.74%。
AI.conclusion: 该模型可有效应用于皮肤科及病理学临床，简化皮肤癌检测流程并辅助医生决策。

authors_text: Vitor Guizilini,Kuan-Hui Lee,Rares Ambrus,Adrien Gaidon
title: Learning Optical Flow, Depth, and Scene Flow without Real-World Labels
title_zh: 在没有真实世界标签的情况下学习光流、深度和场景流
comment: Accepted to RA-L + ICRA 2022 (correct project page)
comments: Accepted to RA-L + ICRA 2022 (correct project page)
abstract: Self-supervised monocular depth estimation enables robots to learn 3D perception from raw video streams. This scalable approach leverages projective geometry and ego-motion to learn via view synthesis, assuming the world is mostly static. Dynamic scenes, which are common in autonomous driving and human-robot interaction, violate this assumption. Therefore, they require modeling dynamic objects explicitly, for instance via estimating pixel-wise 3D motion, i.e. scene flow. However, the simultaneous self-supervised learning of depth and scene flow is ill-posed, as there are infinitely many combinations that result in the same 3D point. In this paper we propose DRAFT, a new method capable of jointly learning depth, optical flow, and scene flow by combining synthetic data with geometric self-supervision. Building upon the RAFT architecture, we learn optical flow as an intermediate task to bootstrap depth and scene flow learning via triangulation. Our algorithm also leverages temporal and geometric consistency losses across tasks to improve multi-task learning. Our DRAFT architecture simultaneously establishes a new state of the art in all three tasks in the self-supervised monocular setting on the standard KITTI benchmark. Project page: https://sites.google.com/tri.global/draft.
summary: Self-supervised monocular depth estimation enables robots to learn 3D perception from raw video streams. This scalable approach leverages projective geometry and ego-motion to learn via view synthesis, assuming the world is mostly static. Dynamic scenes, which are common in autonomous driving and human-robot interaction, violate this assumption. Therefore, they require modeling dynamic objects explicitly, for instance via estimating pixel-wise 3D motion, i.e. scene flow. However, the simultaneous self-supervised learning of depth and scene flow is ill-posed, as there are infinitely many combinations that result in the same 3D point. In this paper we propose DRAFT, a new method capable of jointly learning depth, optical flow, and scene flow by combining synthetic data with geometric self-supervision. Building upon the RAFT architecture, we learn optical flow as an intermediate task to bootstrap depth and scene flow learning via triangulation. Our algorithm also leverages temporal and geometric consistency losses across tasks to improve multi-task learning. Our DRAFT architecture simultaneously establishes a new state of the art in all three tasks in the self-supervised monocular setting on the standard KITTI benchmark. Project page: https://sites.google.com/tri.global/draft.
abstract_zh: 自监督单目深度估计使机器人能够从原始视频流中学习 3D 感知。这种可扩展的方法利用投影几何和自我运动通过视图合成来学习，假设世界大部分是静态的。自动驾驶和人机交互中常见的动态场景违反了这一假设。因此，它们需要显式地对动态对象进行建模，例如通过估计像素级 3D 运动，即场景流。然而，深度和场景流的同时自监督学习是不合适的，因为有无限多种组合会产生相同的 3D 点。在本文中，我们提出了 DRAFT，这是一种通过将合成数据与几何自监督相结合来联合学习深度、光流和场景流的新方法。基于 RAFT 架构，我们学习光流作为中间任务，通过三角测量引导深度和场景流学习。我们的算法还利用跨任务的时间和几何一致性损失来改进多任务学习。我们的 DRAFT 架构同时在标准 KITTI 基准的自监督单目设置中的所有三项任务中建立了新的技术水平。项目页面：https://sites.google.com/tri.global/draft。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需真实世界标签即可联合学习光流、深度和场景流的新方法DRAFT。
AI.motivation: 现有单目深度估计方法假设场景静态，难以处理自动驾驶等动态场景中需要显式建模运动物体的场景流估计问题。
AI.method: 基于RAFT架构，通过合成数据与几何自监督结合，以光流作为中间任务引导深度和场景流学习，并引入时序与几何一致性损失提升多任务学习效果。
AI.result: 在KITTI基准测试中，DRAFT在自监督单目设置下所有三个任务均达到新状态-of-the-art性能。
AI.conclusion: DRAFT通过几何自监督和多任务一致性约束，有效解决了动态场景下深度与场景流联合学习的病态问题。

authors_text: Satya Krishna Gorti,Noel Vouitsis,Junwei Ma,Keyvan Golestan,Maksims Volkovs,Animesh Garg,Guangwei Yu
title: X-Pool: Cross-Modal Language-Video Attention for Text-Video Retrieval
title_zh: X-Pool：用于文本视频检索的跨模态语言视频注意力
abstract: In text-video retrieval, the objective is to learn a cross-modal similarity function between a text and a video that ranks relevant text-video pairs higher than irrelevant pairs. However, videos inherently express a much wider gamut of information than texts. Instead, texts often capture sub-regions of entire videos and are most semantically similar to certain frames within videos. Therefore, for a given text, a retrieval model should focus on the text's most semantically similar video sub-regions to make a more relevant comparison. Yet, most existing works aggregate entire videos without directly considering text. Common text-agnostic aggregations schemes include mean-pooling or self-attention over the frames, but these are likely to encode misleading visual information not described in the given text. To address this, we propose a cross-modal attention model called X-Pool that reasons between a text and the frames of a video. Our core mechanism is a scaled dot product attention for a text to attend to its most semantically similar frames. We then generate an aggregated video representation conditioned on the text's attention weights over the frames. We evaluate our method on three benchmark datasets of MSR-VTT, MSVD and LSMDC, achieving new state-of-the-art results by up to 12% in relative improvement in Recall@1. Our findings thereby highlight the importance of joint text-video reasoning to extract important visual cues according to text. Full code and demo can be found at: https://layer6ai-labs.github.io/xpool/

Our findings thereby highlight the importance of joint text-video reasoning to extract important visual cues according to text. Full code and demo can be found at: https://layer6ai-labs.github.io/xpool/
abstract_zh: 在文本视频检索中，目标是学习文本和视频之间的跨模态相似性函数，该函数将相关文本视频对的排名高于不相关文本对的排名。然而，视频本质上比文本表达更广泛的信息。相反，文本通常捕获整个视频的子区域，并且在语义上与视频中的某些帧最相似。因此，对于给定的文本，检索模型应该关注文本中语义最相似的视频子区域，以进行更相关的比较。然而，大多数现有作品聚合整个视频而不直接考虑文本。常见的与文本无关的聚合方案包括帧上的均值池或自注意力，但这些可能会编码给定文本中未描述的误导性视觉信息。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种称为 X-Pool 的跨模式注意力模型，它可以在文本和视频帧之间进行推理。我们的核心机制是文本的缩放点积注意力，以关注其语义上最相似的框架。然后，我们根据文本在帧上的注意力权重生成聚合视频表示。我们在 MSR-VTT、MSVD 和 LSMDC 三个基准数据集上评估我们的方法，在 Recall@1 中取得了高达 12% 的最先进结果。因此，我们的研究结果强调了联合文本-视频推理根据文本提取重要视觉线索的重要性。完整代码和演示可以在：https://layer6ai-labs.github.io/xpool/

AI.tldr: 本文提出X-Pool模型，通过跨模态注意力机制实现文本-视频检索，提升相关性排序效果。
AI.motivation: 现有视频检索方法未充分结合文本信息，直接聚合全视频易引入与文本无关的误导性视觉信息。
AI.method: 设计基于缩放点积注意力的跨模态机制，使文本聚焦语义相似的视频帧，并根据注意力权重生成条件化视频表示。
AI.result: 在MSR-VTT/MSVD/LSMDC三个数据集上取得新SOTA，Recall@1相对提升最高达12%。
AI.conclusion: 文本与视频的联合推理能有效提取关键视觉线索，跨模态注意力机制对检索性能提升具有重要意义。

search_text: X-Pool: Cross-Modal Language-Video Attention for Text-Video Retrieval X-Pool：用于文本视频检索的跨模态语言视频注意力 In text-video retrieval, the objective is to learn a cross-modal similarity function between a text and a video that ranks relevant text-video pairs higher than irrelevant pairs. However, videos inherently express a much wider gamut of information than texts. Instead, texts often capture sub-regions of entire videos and are most semantically similar to certain frames within videos. Therefore, for a given text, a retrieval model should focus on the text's most semantically similar video sub-regions to make a more relevant comparison. Yet, most existing works aggregate entire videos without directly considering text. Common text-agnostic aggregations schemes include mean-pooling or self-attention over the frames, but these are likely to encode misleading visual information not described in the given text. To address this, we propose a cross-modal attention model called X-Pool that reasons between a text and the frames of a video. Our core mechanism is a scaled dot product attention for a text to attend to its most semantically similar frames. We then generate an aggregated video representation conditioned on the text's attention weights over the frames. We evaluate our method on three benchmark datasets of MSR-VTT, MSVD and LSMDC, achieving new state-of-the-art results by up to 12% in relative improvement in Recall@1. Our findings thereby highlight the importance of joint text-video reasoning to extract important visual cues according to text. Full code and demo can be found at: https://layer6ai-labs.github.io/xpool/ 在文本视频检索中，目标是学习文本和视频之间的跨模态相似性函数，该函数将相关文本视频对的排名高于不相关文本对的排名。然而，视频本质上比文本表达更广泛的信息。相反，文本通常捕获整个视频的子区域，并且在语义上与视频中的某些帧最相似。因此，对于给定的文本，检索模型应该关注文本中语义最相似的视频子区域，以进行更相关的比较。然而，大多数现有作品聚合整个视频而不直接考虑文本。常见的与文本无关的聚合方案包括帧上的均值池或自注意力，但这些可能会编码给定文本中未描述的误导性视觉信息。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种称为 X-Pool 的跨模式注意力模型，它可以在文本和视频帧之间进行推理。我们的核心机制是文本的缩放点积注意力，以关注其语义上最相似的框架。然后，我们根据文本在帧上的注意力权重生成聚合视频表示。我们在 MSR-VTT、MSVD 和 LSMDC 三个基准数据集上评估我们的方法，在 Recall@1 中取得了高达 12% 的最先进结果。因此，我们的研究结果强调了联合文本-视频推理根据文本提取重要视觉线索的重要性。完整代码和演示可以在：https://layer6ai-labs.github.io/xpool/ 本文提出X-Pool模型，通过跨模态注意力机制实现文本-视频检索，提升相关性排序效果。 Satya Krishna Gorti,Noel Vouitsis,Junwei Ma,Keyvan Golestan,Maksims Volkovs,Animesh Garg,Guangwei Yu cs.CV

authors_text: Yung-Chen Sun,Isaac D. Gerg,Vishal Monga
title: Iterative, Deep Synthetic Aperture Sonar Image Segmentation
title_zh: 迭代深度合成孔径声纳图像分割
comment: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2107.14563
comments: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2107.14563
abstract: Synthetic aperture sonar (SAS) systems produce high-resolution images of the seabed environment. Moreover, deep learning has demonstrated superior ability in finding robust features for automating imagery analysis. However, the success of deep learning is conditioned on having lots of labeled training data, but obtaining generous pixel-level annotations of SAS imagery is often practically infeasible. This challenge has thus far limited the adoption of deep learning methods for SAS segmentation. Algorithms exist to segment SAS imagery in an unsupervised manner, but they lack the benefit of state-of-the-art learning methods and the results present significant room for improvement. In view of the above, we propose a new iterative algorithm for unsupervised SAS image segmentation combining superpixel formation, deep learning, and traditional clustering methods. We call our method Iterative Deep Unsupervised Segmentation (IDUS). IDUS is an unsupervised learning framework that can be divided into four main steps: 1) A deep network estimates class assignments. 2) Low-level image features from the deep network are clustered into superpixels. 3) Superpixels are clustered into class assignments (which we call pseudo-labels) using $k$-means. 4) Resulting pseudo-labels are used for loss backpropagation of the deep network prediction. These four steps are performed iteratively until convergence. A comparison of IDUS to current state-of-the-art methods on a realistic benchmark dataset for SAS image segmentation demonstrates the benefits of our proposal even as the IDUS incurs a much lower computational burden during inference (actual labeling of a test image). Finally, we also develop a semi-supervised (SS) extension of IDUS called IDSS and demonstrate experimentally that it can further enhance performance while outperforming supervised alternatives that exploit the same labeled training imagery.
summary: Synthetic aperture sonar (SAS) systems produce high-resolution images of the seabed environment. Moreover, deep learning has demonstrated superior ability in finding robust features for automating imagery analysis. However, the success of deep learning is conditioned on having lots of labeled training data, but obtaining generous pixel-level annotations of SAS imagery is often practically infeasible. This challenge has thus far limited the adoption of deep learning methods for SAS segmentation. Algorithms exist to segment SAS imagery in an unsupervised manner, but they lack the benefit of state-of-the-art learning methods and the results present significant room for improvement. In view of the above, we propose a new iterative algorithm for unsupervised SAS image segmentation combining superpixel formation, deep learning, and traditional clustering methods. We call our method Iterative Deep Unsupervised Segmentation (IDUS). IDUS is an unsupervised learning framework that can be divided into four main steps: 1) A deep network estimates class assignments. 2) Low-level image features from the deep network are clustered into superpixels. 3) Superpixels are clustered into class assignments (which we call pseudo-labels) using $k$-means. 4) Resulting pseudo-labels are used for loss backpropagation of the deep network prediction. These four steps are performed iteratively until convergence. A comparison of IDUS to current state-of-the-art methods on a realistic benchmark dataset for SAS image segmentation demonstrates the benefits of our proposal even as the IDUS incurs a much lower computational burden during inference (actual labeling of a test image). Finally, we also develop a semi-supervised (SS) extension of IDUS called IDSS and demonstrate experimentally that it can further enhance performance while outperforming supervised alternatives that exploit the same labeled training imagery.
abstract_zh: 合成孔径声纳 (SAS) 系统可生成海底环境的高分辨率图像。此外，深度学习在寻找自动化图像分析的强大特征方面表现出了卓越的能力。然而，深度学习的成功取决于拥有大量带标签的训练数据，但获得 SAS 图像的大量像素级注释实际上通常是不可行的。迄今为止，这一挑战限制了 SAS 分割深度学习方法的采用。存在以无监督方式分割 SAS 图像的算法，但它们缺乏最先进的学习方法的优势，并且结果存在很大的改进空间。鉴于上述情况，我们结合超像素形成、深度学习和传统聚类方法，提出了一种新的无监督 SAS 图像分割迭代算法。我们将我们的方法称为迭代深度无监督分割（IDUS）。 IDUS 是一个无监督学习框架，可分为四个主要步骤：1）深度网络估计班级分配。 2）来自深层网络的低级图像特征被聚类成超像素。 3) 使用 $k$-means 将超像素聚类为类分配（我们称之为伪标签）。 4）产生的伪标签用于深度网络预测的损失反向传播。这四个步骤迭代执行直至收敛。在 SAS 图像分割的真实基准数据集上将 IDUS 与当前最先进的方法进行比较，证明了我们的提议的优点，即使 IDUS 在推理（测试图像的实际标记）过程中产生的计算负担要低得多。最后，我们还开发了 IDUS 的半监督 (SS) 扩展，称为 IDSS，并通过实验证明它可以进一步提高性能，同时优于利用相同标记训练图像的监督替代方案。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种用于合成孔径声纳（SAS）图像分割的迭代深度无监督学习框架IDUS，结合超像素生成、深度学习和传统聚类方法，解决SAS图像缺乏像素级标注数据的问题。
AI.motivation: 深度学习在SAS图像分析中受限于标注数据不足，现有无监督方法效果不佳，需开发更高效且无需大量标注的分割算法。
AI.method: IDUS框架包含四步迭代流程：1）深度网络估计类别分配；2）提取低级特征生成超像素；3）通过k-means聚类生成伪标签；4）利用伪标签反向传播优化网络。并扩展为半监督版本IDSS。
AI.result: 在真实基准数据集上，IDUS相较现有方法计算负担更低且性能更优，IDSS在相同标注数据下超越监督方法。
AI.conclusion: IDUS为SAS图像分割提供了有效的无监督解决方案，其半监督扩展IDSS进一步提升了性能，为实际应用提供了可行的技术路径。

authors_text: Puyuan Peng,David Harwath
title: Word Discovery in Visually Grounded, Self-Supervised Speech Models
title_zh: 基于视觉的自我监督语音模型中的单词发现
abstract: We present a method for visually-grounded spoken term discovery. After training either a HuBERT or wav2vec2.0 model to associate spoken captions with natural images, we show that powerful word segmentation and clustering capability emerges within the model's self-attention heads. Our experiments reveal that this ability is not present to nearly the same extent in the base HuBERT and wav2vec2.0 models, suggesting that the visual grounding task is a crucial component of the word discovery capability we observe. We also evaluate our method on the Buckeye word segmentation and ZeroSpeech spoken term discovery tasks, where we perform on par with or better than currently published methods on several metrics. Code and model weights are available at https://github.com/jasonppy/word-discovery.
summary: We present a method for visually-grounded spoken term discovery. After training either a HuBERT or wav2vec2.0 model to associate spoken captions with natural images, we show that powerful word segmentation and clustering capability emerges within the model's self-attention heads. Our experiments reveal that this ability is not present to nearly the same extent in the base HuBERT and wav2vec2.0 models, suggesting that the visual grounding task is a crucial component of the word discovery capability we observe. We also evaluate our method on the Buckeye word segmentation and ZeroSpeech spoken term discovery tasks, where we perform on par with or better than currently published methods on several metrics. Code and model weights are available at https://github.com/jasonppy/word-discovery.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种基于视觉的口语术语发现方法。在训练 HuBERT 或 wav2vec2.0 模型将语音字幕与自然图像相关联后，我们展示了模型的自注意力头中出现了强大的分词和聚类能力。我们的实验表明，这种能力在基础 HuBERT 和 wav2vec2.0 模型中的表现程度并不相同，这表明视觉基础任务是我们观察到的单词发现能力的重要组成部分。我们还在 Buckeye 分词和 ZeroSpeech 口语术语发现任务上评估了我们的方法，我们在几个指标上的表现与当前发布的方法相当或更好。代码和模型权重可在 https://github.com/jasonppy/word-discovery 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于视觉信息的语音术语发现方法，通过训练HuBERT或wav2vec2.0模型关联语音字幕与自然图像，利用自注意力机制实现语音分词与聚类。
AI.motivation: 现有基础模型（如HuBERT和wav2vec2.0）缺乏显著的语音分词能力，而视觉 grounding 任务可能增强模型对语音单元的感知，从而提升术语发现效果。
AI.method: 在视觉 grounding 任务中预训练语音模型，通过分析自注意力头的激活模式，提取语音中的潜在词语单元，并在Buckeye和ZeroSpeech数据集上验证效果。
AI.result: 在语音分词和术语发现任务中，该方法性能优于或与现有方法相当，且实验表明视觉 grounding 是提升词语发现能力的关键因素。
AI.conclusion: 视觉信息与语音模型结合可有效增强词语发现能力，所提方法在多个基准任务中验证了其有效性。

search_text: Word Discovery in Visually Grounded, Self-Supervised Speech Models 基于视觉的自我监督语音模型中的单词发现 We present a method for visually-grounded spoken term discovery. After training either a HuBERT or wav2vec2.0 model to associate spoken captions with natural images, we show that powerful word segmentation and clustering capability emerges within the model's self-attention heads. Our experiments reveal that this ability is not present to nearly the same extent in the base HuBERT and wav2vec2.0 models, suggesting that the visual grounding task is a crucial component of the word discovery capability we observe. We also evaluate our method on the Buckeye word segmentation and ZeroSpeech spoken term discovery tasks, where we perform on par with or better than currently published methods on several metrics. Code and model weights are available at https://github.com/jasonppy/word-discovery. 我们提出了一种基于视觉的口语术语发现方法。在训练 HuBERT 或 wav2vec2.0 模型将语音字幕与自然图像相关联后，我们展示了模型的自注意力头中出现了强大的分词和聚类能力。我们的实验表明，这种能力在基础 HuBERT 和 wav2vec2.0 模型中的表现程度并不相同，这表明视觉基础任务是我们观察到的单词发现能力的重要组成部分。我们还在 Buckeye 分词和 ZeroSpeech 口语术语发现任务上评估了我们的方法，我们在几个指标上的表现与当前发布的方法相当或更好。代码和模型权重可在 https://github.com/jasonppy/word-discovery 获取。 本文提出一种基于视觉信息的语音术语发现方法，通过训练HuBERT或wav2vec2.0模型关联语音字幕与自然图像，利用自注意力机制实现语音分词与聚类。 Puyuan Peng,David Harwath eess.AS,cs.AI,cs.CL,cs.SD

authors_text: Saarthak Kapse,Srijan Das,Prateek Prasanna
title: CD-Net: Histopathology Representation Learning using Pyramidal Context-Detail Network
title_zh: CD-Net：使用金字塔上下文细节网络进行组织病理学表示学习
abstract: Extracting rich phenotype information, such as cell density and arrangement, from whole slide histology images (WSIs), requires analysis of large field of view, i.e more contexual information. This can be achieved through analyzing the digital slides at lower resolution. A potential drawback is missing out on details present at a higher resolution. To jointly leverage complementary information from multiple resolutions, we present a novel transformer based Pyramidal Context-Detail Network (CD-Net). CD-Net exploits the WSI pyramidal structure through co-training of proposed Context and Detail Modules, which operate on inputs from multiple resolutions. The residual connections between the modules enable the joint training paradigm while learning self-supervised representation for WSIs. The efficacy of CD-Net is demonstrated in classifying Lung Adenocarcinoma from Squamous cell carcinoma.
summary: Extracting rich phenotype information, such as cell density and arrangement, from whole slide histology images (WSIs), requires analysis of large field of view, i.e more contexual information. This can be achieved through analyzing the digital slides at lower resolution. A potential drawback is missing out on details present at a higher resolution. To jointly leverage complementary information from multiple resolutions, we present a novel transformer based Pyramidal Context-Detail Network (CD-Net). CD-Net exploits the WSI pyramidal structure through co-training of proposed Context and Detail Modules, which operate on inputs from multiple resolutions. The residual connections between the modules enable the joint training paradigm while learning self-supervised representation for WSIs. The efficacy of CD-Net is demonstrated in classifying Lung Adenocarcinoma from Squamous cell carcinoma.
abstract_zh: 从整个切片组织学图像 (WSI) 中提取丰富的表型信息，例如细胞密度和排列，需要分析大视野，即更多上下文信息。这可以通过分析较低分辨率的数字幻灯片来实现。一个潜在的缺点是错过了以更高分辨率呈现的细节。为了联合利用多种分辨率的互补信息，我们提出了一种基于金字塔上下文细节网络（CD-Net）的新型变压器。 CD-Net 通过协同训练所提出的上下文和细节模块来利用 WSI 金字塔结构，这些模块对来自多个分辨率的输入进行操作。模块之间的剩余连接支持联合训练范例，同时学习 WSI 的自监督表示。 CD-Net 在对肺腺癌和鳞状细胞癌进行分类方面的功效得到了证明。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于金字塔结构的上下文-细节网络（CD-Net），用于从全切片组织病理学图像中学习多分辨率互补信息，以提高肺癌分类的准确性。
AI.motivation: 传统方法在分析全切片图像时难以平衡上下文信息与细节特征，低分辨率丢失细节，高分辨率缺乏全局信息，需联合利用多尺度特征。
AI.method: 设计包含上下文模块和细节模块的金字塔网络，通过残差连接实现联合训练，利用自监督学习机制整合多分辨率输入特征。
AI.result: CD-Net在肺腺癌与鳞状细胞癌分类任务中表现出色，验证了多尺度特征融合的有效性。
AI.conclusion: CD-Net通过上下文-细节模块的协同训练，成功实现了病理图像的多分辨率表征学习，为肿瘤分类提供了新思路。

authors_text: Kyongsik Yun,Thomas Lu,Alexander Huyen,Patrick Hammer,Pei Wang
title: Neurosymbolic hybrid approach to driver collision warning
title_zh: 驾驶员碰撞警告的神经符号混合方法
abstract: There are two main algorithmic approaches to autonomous driving systems: (1) An end-to-end system in which a single deep neural network learns to map sensory input directly into appropriate warning and driving responses. (2) A mediated hybrid recognition system in which a system is created by combining independent modules that detect each semantic feature. While some researchers believe that deep learning can solve any problem, others believe that a more engineered and symbolic approach is needed to cope with complex environments with less data. Deep learning alone has achieved state-of-the-art results in many areas, from complex gameplay to predicting protein structures. In particular, in image classification and recognition, deep learning models have achieved accuracies as high as humans. But sometimes it can be very difficult to debug if the deep learning model doesn't work. Deep learning models can be vulnerable and are very sensitive to changes in data distribution. Generalization can be problematic. It's usually hard to prove why it works or doesn't. Deep learning models can also be vulnerable to adversarial attacks. Here, we combine deep learning-based object recognition and tracking with an adaptive neurosymbolic network agent, called the Non-Axiomatic Reasoning System (NARS), that can adapt to its environment by building concepts based on perceptual sequences. We achieved an improved intersection-over-union (IOU) object recognition performance of 0.65 in the adaptive retraining model compared to IOU 0.31 in the COCO data pre-trained model. We improved the object detection limits using RADAR sensors in a simulated environment, and demonstrated the weaving car detection capability by combining deep learning-based object detection and tracking with a neurosymbolic model.
summary: There are two main algorithmic approaches to autonomous driving systems: (1) An end-to-end system in which a single deep neural network learns to map sensory input directly into appropriate warning and driving responses. (2) A mediated hybrid recognition system in which a system is created by combining independent modules that detect each semantic feature. While some researchers believe that deep learning can solve any problem, others believe that a more engineered and symbolic approach is needed to cope with complex environments with less data. Deep learning alone has achieved state-of-the-art results in many areas, from complex gameplay to predicting protein structures. In particular, in image classification and recognition, deep learning models have achieved accuracies as high as humans. But sometimes it can be very difficult to debug if the deep learning model doesn't work. Deep learning models can be vulnerable and are very sensitive to changes in data distribution. Generalization can be problematic. It's usually hard to prove why it works or doesn't. Deep learning models can also be vulnerable to adversarial attacks. Here, we combine deep learning-based object recognition and tracking with an adaptive neurosymbolic network agent, called the Non-Axiomatic Reasoning System (NARS), that can adapt to its environment by building concepts based on perceptual sequences. We achieved an improved intersection-over-union (IOU) object recognition performance of 0.65 in the adaptive retraining model compared to IOU 0.31 in the COCO data pre-trained model. We improved the object detection limits using RADAR sensors in a simulated environment, and demonstrated the weaving car detection capability by combining deep learning-based object detection and tracking with a neurosymbolic model.
abstract_zh: 自动驾驶系统有两种主要算法方法：（1）端到端系统，其中单个深度神经网络学习将感官输入直接映射为适当的警告和驾驶响应。 （2）中介混合识别系统，其中通过组合检测每个语义特征的独立模块来创建系统。虽然一些研究人员认为深度学习可以解决任何问题，但另一些研究人员则认为需要一种更具工程性和象征性的方法来应对数据较少的复杂环境。仅深度学习就在许多领域取得了最先进的成果，从复杂的游戏玩法到预测蛋白质结构。特别是在图像分类和识别方面，深度学习模型已经达到了与人类一样高的准确率。但有时，如果深度学习模型不起作用，调试起来会非常困难。深度学习模型可能很脆弱，并且对数据分布的变化非常敏感。泛化可能会出现问题。通常很难证明它为什么有效或无效。深度学习模型也容易受到对抗性攻击。在这里，我们将基于深度学习的对象识别和跟踪与称为非公理推理系统（NARS）的自适应神经符号网络代理相结合，该代理可以通过基于感知序列构建概念来适应其环境。与 COCO 数据预训练模型中的 IOU 0.31 相比，我们在自适应再训练模型中实现了 0.65 的交并并集 (IOU) 对象识别性能改进。我们在模拟环境中使用雷达传感器改进了物体检测限制，并通过将基于深度学习的物体检测和跟踪与神经符号模型相结合，展示了编织车检测能力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合深度学习与神经符号系统的混合方法，用于提升驾驶员碰撞预警系统的性能。
AI.motivation: 纯深度学习模型在复杂环境下面临可解释性差、数据分布敏感及对抗攻击脆弱等问题，需融合符号推理增强系统鲁棒性。
AI.method: 将基于深度学习的物体识别与跟踪技术，与自适应神经符号系统NARS结合，通过感知序列构建概念实现环境适应。
AI.result: 在模拟环境中，自适应重训练模型的IOU达到0.65（COCO预训练模型为0.31），并成功检测到变道车辆。
AI.conclusion: 神经符号混合方法在碰撞预警任务中优于传统深度学习模型，验证了混合架构在复杂场景下的有效性。

ai_content_json.conclusion: 神经符号混合方法在碰撞预警任务中优于传统深度学习模型，验证了混合架构在复杂场景下的有效性。

tldr: 本文提出了一种结合深度学习与神经符号系统的混合方法，用于提升驾驶员碰撞预警系统的性能。
motivation: 纯深度学习模型在复杂环境下面临可解释性差、数据分布敏感及对抗攻击脆弱等问题，需融合符号推理增强系统鲁棒性。
method: 将基于深度学习的物体识别与跟踪技术，与自适应神经符号系统NARS结合，通过感知序列构建概念实现环境适应。
result: 在模拟环境中，自适应重训练模型的IOU达到0.65（COCO预训练模型为0.31），并成功检测到变道车辆。

search_text: Neurosymbolic hybrid approach to driver collision warning 驾驶员碰撞警告的神经符号混合方法 There are two main algorithmic approaches to autonomous driving systems: (1) An end-to-end system in which a single deep neural network learns to map sensory input directly into appropriate warning and driving responses. (2) A mediated hybrid recognition system in which a system is created by combining independent modules that detect each semantic feature. While some researchers believe that deep learning can solve any problem, others believe that a more engineered and symbolic approach is needed to cope with complex environments with less data. Deep learning alone has achieved state-of-the-art results in many areas, from complex gameplay to predicting protein structures. In particular, in image classification and recognition, deep learning models have achieved accuracies as high as humans. But sometimes it can be very difficult to debug if the deep learning model doesn't work. Deep learning models can be vulnerable and are very sensitive to changes in data distribution. Generalization can be problematic. It's usually hard to prove why it works or doesn't. Deep learning models can also be vulnerable to adversarial attacks. Here, we combine deep learning-based object recognition and tracking with an adaptive neurosymbolic network agent, called the Non-Axiomatic Reasoning System (NARS), that can adapt to its environment by building concepts based on perceptual sequences. We achieved an improved intersection-over-union (IOU) object recognition performance of 0.65 in the adaptive retraining model compared to IOU 0.31 in the COCO data pre-trained model. We improved the object detection limits using RADAR sensors in a simulated environment, and demonstrated the weaving car detection capability by combining deep learning-based object detection and tracking with a neurosymbolic model. 自动驾驶系统有两种主要算法方法：（1）端到端系统，其中单个深度神经网络学习将感官输入直接映射为适当的警告和驾驶响应。 （2）中介混合识别系统，其中通过组合检测每个语义特征的独立模块来创建系统。虽然一些研究人员认为深度学习可以解决任何问题，但另一些研究人员则认为需要一种更具工程性和象征性的方法来应对数据较少的复杂环境。仅深度学习就在许多领域取得了最先进的成果，从复杂的游戏玩法到预测蛋白质结构。特别是在图像分类和识别方面，深度学习模型已经达到了与人类一样高的准确率。但有时，如果深度学习模型不起作用，调试起来会非常困难。深度学习模型可能很脆弱，并且对数据分布的变化非常敏感。泛化可能会出现问题。通常很难证明它为什么有效或无效。深度学习模型也容易受到对抗性攻击。在这里，我们将基于深度学习的对象识别和跟踪与称为非公理推理系统（NARS）的自适应神经符号网络代理相结合，该代理可以通过基于感知序列构建概念来适应其环境。与 COCO 数据预训练模型中的 IOU 0.31 相比，我们在自适应再训练模型中实现了 0.65 的交并并集 (IOU) 对象识别性能改进。我们在模拟环境中使用雷达传感器改进了物体检测限制，并通过将基于深度学习的物体检测和跟踪与神经符号模型相结合，展示了编织车检测能力。 本文提出了一种结合深度学习与神经符号系统的混合方法，用于提升驾驶员碰撞预警系统的性能。 Kyongsik Yun,Thomas Lu,Alexander Huyen,Patrick Hammer,Pei Wang cs.CV

authors_text: Farnaz Jahanbakhsh,Elnaz Nouri,Robert Sim,Ryen W. White,Adam Fourney
title: Understanding Questions that Arise When Working with Business Documents
title_zh: 了解使用业务文档时出现的问题
abstract: While digital assistants are increasingly used to help with various productivity tasks, less attention has been paid to employing them in the domain of business documents. To build an agent that can handle users' information needs in this domain, we must first understand the types of assistance that users desire when working on their documents. In this work, we present results from two user studies that characterize the information needs and queries of authors, reviewers, and readers of business documents. In the first study, we used experience sampling to collect users' questions in-situ as they were working with their documents, and in the second, we built a human-in-the-loop document Q&A system which rendered assistance with a variety of users' questions. Our results have implications for the design of document assistants that complement AI with human intelligence including whether particular skillsets or roles within the document are needed from human respondents, as well as the challenges around such systems.
summary: While digital assistants are increasingly used to help with various productivity tasks, less attention has been paid to employing them in the domain of business documents. To build an agent that can handle users' information needs in this domain, we must first understand the types of assistance that users desire when working on their documents. In this work, we present results from two user studies that characterize the information needs and queries of authors, reviewers, and readers of business documents. In the first study, we used experience sampling to collect users' questions in-situ as they were working with their documents, and in the second, we built a human-in-the-loop document Q&A system which rendered assistance with a variety of users' questions. Our results have implications for the design of document assistants that complement AI with human intelligence including whether particular skillsets or roles within the document are needed from human respondents, as well as the challenges around such systems.
abstract_zh: 虽然数字助理越来越多地用于帮助完成各种生产力任务，但很少有人关注在商业文档领域使用它们。为了构建一个能够处理该领域用户信息需求的代理，我们必须首先了解用户在处理文档时期望的帮助类型。在这项工作中，我们展示了两项用户研究的结果，这些研究描述了商业文档的作者、审阅者和读者的信息需求和查询。在第一项研究中，我们使用经验采样来收集用户在处理文档时现场提出的问题，在第二项研究中，我们构建了一个人机交互的文档问答系统，为解决各种用户问题提供帮助。我们的结果对用人类智能补充人工智能的文档助理的设计具有影响，包括人类受访者是否需要文档中的特定技能或角色，以及围绕此类系统的挑战。

AI.tldr: 本文通过用户研究分析商务文档处理过程中产生的问题类型，以指导设计更有效的数字助手。
AI.motivation: 现有数字助手在商务文档场景的应用不足，需深入理解用户在处理文档时的信息需求与查询模式。
AI.method: 采用经验抽样法收集用户实时问题，并构建人机协同的文档问答系统进行辅助。
AI.result: 识别出作者、审阅者和读者的不同需求类型，发现系统需结合人类特定技能与AI技术以应对挑战。
AI.conclusion: 设计文档助手需融合AI与人类智能，需考虑角色分工与系统实现的复杂性。

authors_text: Sairamvinay Vijayaraghavan,Jinxiao Song,Wan-Jhen Lin,Michael J Livanos
title: Semantic Motion Correction Via Iterative Nonlinear Optimization and Animation
title_zh: 通过迭代非线性优化和动画进行语义运动校正
abstract: Here, we present an end-to-end method to create 2D animation for a goalkeeper attempting to block a penalty kick, and then correct that motion using an iterative nonlinear optimization scheme. The input is a raw video that is fed into pose and object detection networks to find the skeleton of the goalkeeper and the ball. The output is a set of key frames of the skeleton associated with the corrected motion so that if the goalkeeper missed the ball, the animation will show then successfully deflecting it. Our method is robust enough correct different kinds of mistakes the goalkeeper can make, such as not lunging far enough or jumping to the incorrect side. Our method is also meant to be semantically similar to the goalkeeper's original motion, which helps keep our animation grounded with respect to actual human behavior.
summary: Here, we present an end-to-end method to create 2D animation for a goalkeeper attempting to block a penalty kick, and then correct that motion using an iterative nonlinear optimization scheme. The input is a raw video that is fed into pose and object detection networks to find the skeleton of the goalkeeper and the ball. The output is a set of key frames of the skeleton associated with the corrected motion so that if the goalkeeper missed the ball, the animation will show then successfully deflecting it. Our method is robust enough correct different kinds of mistakes the goalkeeper can make, such as not lunging far enough or jumping to the incorrect side. Our method is also meant to be semantically similar to the goalkeeper's original motion, which helps keep our animation grounded with respect to actual human behavior.
abstract_zh: 在这里，我们提出了一种端到端方法，为试图阻挡点球的守门员创建 2D 动画，然后使用迭代非线性优化方案纠正该运动。输入是原始视频，被输入姿势和对象检测网络以找到守门员和球的骨架。输出是一组与修正后的运动相关的骨架关键帧，这样如果守门员错过了球，动画将显示然后成功地偏转它。我们的方法足够稳健，可以纠正守门员可能犯的各种错误，例如冲刺不够远或跳到错误的一侧。我们的方法在语义上也与守门员的原始动作相似，这有助于使我们的动画立足于实际的人类行为。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种端到端方法，通过迭代非线性优化校正守门员阻止点球动作的2D动画，生成符合实际人类行为的修正动画。
AI.motivation: 原始视频中守门员可能因动作失误（如扑救不足或方向错误）未能成功拦截球，需生成语义合理且符合人体行为的修正动画。
AI.method: 输入原始视频，利用姿态和物体检测网络提取守门员骨架与球的位置，通过迭代非线性优化方案修正动作轨迹，生成语义一致的关键帧动画。
AI.result: 输出校正后的守门员动作关键帧，可修正多种失误（如扑救距离不足或方向错误），且动画保持与原始动作的语义相似性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法能有效生成符合人类行为逻辑的修正动画，在保持动作语义合理性的同时实现运动轨迹的优化调整。

authors_text: Elizabeth M. Daly,Massimiliano Mattetti,Öznur Alkan,Rahul Nair
title: User Driven Model Adjustment via Boolean Rule Explanations
title_zh: 通过布尔规则解释进行用户驱动模型调整
abstract: AI solutions are heavily dependant on the quality and accuracy of the input training data, however the training data may not always fully reflect the most up-to-date policy landscape or may be missing business logic. The advances in explainability have opened the possibility of allowing users to interact with interpretable explanations of ML predictions in order to inject modifications or constraints that more accurately reflect current realities of the system. In this paper, we present a solution which leverages the predictive power of ML models while allowing the user to specify modifications to decision boundaries. Our interactive overlay approach achieves this goal without requiring model retraining, making it appropriate for systems that need to apply instant changes to their decision making. We demonstrate that user feedback rules can be layered with the ML predictions to provide immediate changes which in turn supports learning with less data.
summary: AI solutions are heavily dependant on the quality and accuracy of the input training data, however the training data may not always fully reflect the most up-to-date policy landscape or may be missing business logic. The advances in explainability have opened the possibility of allowing users to interact with interpretable explanations of ML predictions in order to inject modifications or constraints that more accurately reflect current realities of the system. In this paper, we present a solution which leverages the predictive power of ML models while allowing the user to specify modifications to decision boundaries. Our interactive overlay approach achieves this goal without requiring model retraining, making it appropriate for systems that need to apply instant changes to their decision making. We demonstrate that user feedback rules can be layered with the ML predictions to provide immediate changes which in turn supports learning with less data.
abstract_zh: 人工智能解决方案在很大程度上依赖于输入训练数据的质量和准确性，但是训练数据可能并不总是完全反映最新的政策环境，或者可能缺少业务逻辑。可解释性的进步开启了允许用户与机器学习预测的可解释解释进行交互的可能性，以便注入更准确地反映系统当前现实的修改或约束。在本文中，我们提出了一种解决方案，该解决方案利用机器学习模型的预测能力，同时允许用户指定对决策边界的修改。我们的交互式叠加方法无需模型重新训练即可实现此目标，使其适合需要对其决策进行即时更改的系统。我们证明，用户反馈规则可以与机器学习预测分层，以提供即时更改，从而支持使用更少的数据进行学习。

AI.tldr: 提出一种通过布尔规则解释实现用户驱动的模型调整方法，无需重新训练即可实时修改决策边界。

AI.method: 采用交互式叠加方法，将用户指定的布尔规则与ML预测结合，实时调整决策边界而无需模型再训练。
AI.result: 实验表明用户反馈规则可即时生效，提升模型适应性并减少数据需求。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效实现用户驱动的模型调整，适用于需实时更新决策的场景，提升模型灵活性和实用性。

search_text: User Driven Model Adjustment via Boolean Rule Explanations 通过布尔规则解释进行用户驱动模型调整 AI solutions are heavily dependant on the quality and accuracy of the input training data, however the training data may not always fully reflect the most up-to-date policy landscape or may be missing business logic. The advances in explainability have opened the possibility of allowing users to interact with interpretable explanations of ML predictions in order to inject modifications or constraints that more accurately reflect current realities of the system. In this paper, we present a solution which leverages the predictive power of ML models while allowing the user to specify modifications to decision boundaries. Our interactive overlay approach achieves this goal without requiring model retraining, making it appropriate for systems that need to apply instant changes to their decision making. We demonstrate that user feedback rules can be layered with the ML predictions to provide immediate changes which in turn supports learning with less data. 人工智能解决方案在很大程度上依赖于输入训练数据的质量和准确性，但是训练数据可能并不总是完全反映最新的政策环境，或者可能缺少业务逻辑。可解释性的进步开启了允许用户与机器学习预测的可解释解释进行交互的可能性，以便注入更准确地反映系统当前现实的修改或约束。在本文中，我们提出了一种解决方案，该解决方案利用机器学习模型的预测能力，同时允许用户指定对决策边界的修改。我们的交互式叠加方法无需模型重新训练即可实现此目标，使其适合需要对其决策进行即时更改的系统。我们证明，用户反馈规则可以与机器学习预测分层，以提供即时更改，从而支持使用更少的数据进行学习。 提出一种通过布尔规则解释实现用户驱动的模型调整方法，无需重新训练即可实时修改决策边界。 Elizabeth M. authors_text: Xiaying Wang,Fabian Geiger,Vlad Niculescu,Michele Magno,Luca Benini
title: Leveraging Tactile Sensors for Low Latency Embedded Smart Hands for Prosthetic and Robotic Applications
title_zh: 利用触觉传感器实现假肢和机器人应用的低延迟嵌入式智能手
comment: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2107.14598
comments: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2107.14598
abstract: Tactile sensing is a crucial perception mode for robots and human amputees in need of controlling a prosthetic device. Today robotic and prosthetic systems are still missing the important feature of accurate tactile sensing. This lack is mainly due to the fact that the existing tactile technologies have limited spatial and temporal resolution and are either expensive or not scalable. In this paper, we present the design and the implementation of a hardware-software embedded system called SmartHand. It is specifically designed to enable the acquisition and the real-time processing of high-resolution tactile information from a hand-shaped multi-sensor array for prosthetic and robotic applications. During data collection, our system can deliver a high throughput of 100 frames per second, which is 13.7x higher than previous related work. We collected a new tactile dataset while interacting with daily-life objects during five different sessions. We propose a compact yet accurate convolutional neural network that requires one order of magnitude less memory and 15.6x fewer computations compared to related work without degrading classification accuracy. The top-1 and top-3 cross-validation accuracies are respectively 98.86% and 99.83%. We further analyze the inter-session variability and obtain the best top-3 leave-one-out-validation accuracy of 77.84%. We deploy the trained model on a high-performance ARM Cortex-M7 microcontroller achieving an inference time of only 100 ms minimizing the response latency. The overall measured power consumption is 505 mW. Finally, we fabricate a new control sensor and perform additional experiments to provide analyses on sensor degradation and slip detection. This work is a step forward in giving robotic and prosthetic devices a sense of touch and demonstrates the practicality of a smart embedded system empowered by tiny machine learning.

Today robotic and prosthetic systems are still missing the important feature of accurate tactile sensing. It is specifically designed to enable the acquisition and the real-time processing of high-resolution tactile information from a hand-shaped multi-sensor array for prosthetic and robotic applications. We collected a new tactile dataset while interacting with daily-life objects during five different sessions. The top-1 and top-3 cross-validation accuracies are respectively 98.86% and 99.83%. We further analyze the inter-session variability and obtain the best top-3 leave-one-out-validation accuracy of 77.84%. abstract_zh: 触觉传感对于需要控制假肢装置的机器人和人类截肢者来说是一种至关重要的感知模式。如今，机器人和假肢系统仍然缺少精确触觉传感的重要功能。这种缺乏主要是由于现有的触觉技术的空间和时间分辨率有限，并且要么昂贵要么不可扩展。在本文中，我们介绍了一个名为 SmartHand 的软硬件嵌入式系统的设计和实现。它专门设计用于从用于假肢和机器人应用的手形多传感器阵列采集和实时处理高分辨率触觉信息。在数据收集过程中，我们的系统可以提供每秒 100 帧的高吞吐量，比之前的相关工作提高了 13.7 倍。我们在五个不同的会话中与日常生活中的物体互动时收集了一个新的触觉数据集。我们提出了一种紧凑而准确的卷积神经网络，与相关工作相比，它需要的内存减少了一个数量级，计算量减少了 15.6 倍，而不会降低分类精度。 top-1和top-3交叉验证准确率分别为98.86%和99.83%。我们进一步分析了会话间的变异性，并获得了 77.84% 的最佳 top-3 留一验证准确率。我们在高性能 ARM Cortex-M7 微控制器上部署经过训练的模型，推理时间仅为 100 毫秒，从而最大限度地减少了响应延迟。总测得功耗为505 mW。最后，我们制造了一种新的控制传感器并进行了额外的实验，以提供对传感器退化和滑动检测的分析。这项工作在赋予机器人和假肢设备触觉方面向前迈出了一步，并展示了由微型机器学习支持的智能嵌入式系统的实用性。

AI.tldr: 本文设计并实现了一个名为SmartHand的嵌入式系统，用于假肢和机器人应用中的高分辨率触觉感知，具备低延迟和高能效特点。
AI.motivation: 现有触觉技术存在空间时间分辨率低、成本高或不可扩展的问题，导致机器人和假肢缺乏精确触觉感知能力。
AI.method: 开发了包含硬件传感器阵列和软件卷积神经网络的SmartHand系统，采用高吞吐量数据采集（100帧/秒）和轻量化神经网络（内存减少10倍，计算量减少15.6倍）进行实时触觉处理。
AI.result: 系统实现98.86%的top-1和99.83%的top-3分类准确率，跨会话验证达77.84%，ARM Cortex-M7微控制器推理时间仅100ms，功耗505mW，并验证了传感器退化与滑动检测性能。
AI.conclusion: 该工作通过嵌入式智能系统与微型机器学习，为机器人和假肢提供了实用的触觉感知方案，推动了该领域的发展。

authors_text: Sanjana Sarda
title: Face Verification Bypass
title_zh: 人脸验证绕过
abstract: Face verification systems aim to validate the claimed identity using feature vectors and distance metrics. However, no attempt has been made to bypass such a system using generated images that are constrained by the same feature vectors. In this work, we train StarGAN v2 to generate diverse images based on a human user, that have similar feature vectors yet qualitatively look different. We then demonstrate a proof of concept on a custom face verification system and verify our claims by demonstrating the same proof of concept in a black box setting on dating applications that utilize similar face verification systems.
summary: Face verification systems aim to validate the claimed identity using feature vectors and distance metrics. However, no attempt has been made to bypass such a system using generated images that are constrained by the same feature vectors. In this work, we train StarGAN v2 to generate diverse images based on a human user, that have similar feature vectors yet qualitatively look different. We then demonstrate a proof of concept on a custom face verification system and verify our claims by demonstrating the same proof of concept in a black box setting on dating applications that utilize similar face verification systems.
abstract_zh: 人脸验证系统旨在使用特征向量和距离度量来验证所声称的身份。然而，尚未尝试使用受相同特征向量约束的生成图像来绕过此类系统。在这项工作中，我们训练 StarGAN v2 基于人类用户生成不同的图像，这些图像具有相似的特征向量，但在质量上看起来不同。然后，我们在自定义人脸验证系统上演示概念证明，并通过在利用类似人脸验证系统的约会应用程序的黑盒设置中演示相同的概念证明来验证我们的主张。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过生成具有相似特征向量但外观不同的图像来绕过人脸识别验证系统。
AI.motivation: 现有面部验证系统可能存在安全漏洞，未尝试通过生成约束特征向量的图像进行绕过攻击。
AI.method: 训练StarGAN v2模型生成基于同一用户的多样化图像，并在自定义验证系统和黑盒场景（如约会应用）中验证攻击效果。
AI.result: 成功在自定义系统和黑盒环境中实现验证绕过，证明了攻击方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法揭示了面部验证系统的潜在安全风险，强调需加强对抗样本的防御机制。
