search_text: Face Verification Bypass 人脸验证绕过 Face verification systems aim to validate the claimed identity using feature vectors and distance metrics. However, no attempt has been made to bypass such a system using generated images that are constrained by the same feature vectors. In this work, we train StarGAN v2 to generate diverse images based on a human user, that have similar feature vectors yet qualitatively look different. We then demonstrate a proof of concept on a custom face verification system and verify our claims by demonstrating the same proof of concept in a black box setting on dating applications that utilize similar face verification systems. 人脸验证系统旨在使用特征向量和距离度量来验证所声称的身份。然而，尚未尝试使用受相同特征向量约束的生成图像来绕过此类系统。在这项工作中，我们训练 StarGAN v2 基于人类用户生成不同的图像，这些图像具有相似的特征向量，但在质量上看起来不同。然后，我们在自定义人脸验证系统上演示概念证明，并通过在利用类似人脸验证系统的约会应用程序的黑盒设置中演示相同的概念证明来验证我们的主张。 本文提出通过生成具有相似特征向量但外观不同的图像来绕过人脸识别验证系统。 Sanjana Sarda cs.CV,cs.CR

authors_text: Asaf Karnieli,Ohad Fried,Yacov Hel-Or
title: DeepShadow: Neural Shape from Shadow
title_zh: DeepShadow：阴影的神经形状
comment: ECCV 2022. Project page available at https://asafkar.github.io/deepshadow/
comments: ECCV 2022. Project page available at https://asafkar.github.io/deepshadow/
abstract: This paper presents DeepShadow, a one-shot method for recovering the depth map and surface normals from photometric stereo shadow maps. Previous works that try to recover the surface normals from photometric stereo images treat cast shadows as a disturbance. We show that the self and cast shadows not only do not disturb 3D reconstruction, but can be used alone, as a strong learning signal, to recover the depth map and surface normals. We demonstrate that 3D reconstruction from shadows can even outperform shape-from-shading in certain cases. To the best of our knowledge, our method is the first to reconstruct 3D shape-from-shadows using neural networks. The method does not require any pre-training or expensive labeled data, and is optimized during inference time.
summary: This paper presents DeepShadow, a one-shot method for recovering the depth map and surface normals from photometric stereo shadow maps. Previous works that try to recover the surface normals from photometric stereo images treat cast shadows as a disturbance. We show that the self and cast shadows not only do not disturb 3D reconstruction, but can be used alone, as a strong learning signal, to recover the depth map and surface normals. We demonstrate that 3D reconstruction from shadows can even outperform shape-from-shading in certain cases. To the best of our knowledge, our method is the first to reconstruct 3D shape-from-shadows using neural networks. The method does not require any pre-training or expensive labeled data, and is optimized during inference time.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了 DeepShadow，这是一种从光度立体阴影图恢复深度图和表面法线的一次性方法。以前尝试从光度立体图像恢复表面法线的工作将投射阴影视为干扰。我们证明，自阴影和投射阴影不仅不会干扰 3D 重建，而且可以单独使用，作为强大的学习信号，以恢复深度图和表面法线。我们证明，在某些情况下，阴影的 3D 重建甚至可以优于阴影形状重建。据我们所知，我们的方法是第一个使用神经网络重建 3D 阴影形状的方法。该方法不需要任何预训练或昂贵的标记数据，并且在推理期间进行优化。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于神经网络的单次射击方法，从光度立体阴影图中恢复深度图和表面法线。
AI.motivation: 传统方法将阴影视为干扰，但本文发现阴影可作为强学习信号用于三维重建，从而提升性能。
AI.method: 使用神经网络，无需预训练或标注数据，在推理时优化，利用阴影作为学习信号。
AI.result: 在某些情况下优于传统形状从阴影方法，且无需标注数据。
AI.conclusion: 首次使用神经网络从阴影中重建三维形状，方法高效且无需标注数据。

authors_text: Saeed Khorram,Li Fuxin
title: Cycle-Consistent Counterfactuals by Latent Transformations
title_zh: 通过潜在转换实现循环一致的反事实
abstract: CounterFactual (CF) visual explanations try to find images similar to the query image that change the decision of a vision system to a specified outcome. Existing methods either require inference-time optimization or joint training with a generative adversarial model which makes them time-consuming and difficult to use in practice. We propose a novel approach, Cycle-Consistent Counterfactuals by Latent Transformations (C3LT), which learns a latent transformation that automatically generates visual CFs by steering in the latent space of generative models. Our method uses cycle consistency between the query and CF latent representations which helps our training to find better solutions. C3LT can be easily plugged into any state-of-the-art pretrained generative network. This enables our method to generate high-quality and interpretable CF images at high resolution such as those in ImageNet. In addition to several established metrics for evaluating CF explanations, we introduce a novel metric tailored to assess the quality of the generated CF examples and validate the effectiveness of our method on an extensive set of experiments.
summary: CounterFactual (CF) visual explanations try to find images similar to the query image that change the decision of a vision system to a specified outcome. Existing methods either require inference-time optimization or joint training with a generative adversarial model which makes them time-consuming and difficult to use in practice. We propose a novel approach, Cycle-Consistent Counterfactuals by Latent Transformations (C3LT), which learns a latent transformation that automatically generates visual CFs by steering in the latent space of generative models. Our method uses cycle consistency between the query and CF latent representations which helps our training to find better solutions. C3LT can be easily plugged into any state-of-the-art pretrained generative network. This enables our method to generate high-quality and interpretable CF images at high resolution such as those in ImageNet. In addition to several established metrics for evaluating CF explanations, we introduce a novel metric tailored to assess the quality of the generated CF examples and validate the effectiveness of our method on an extensive set of experiments.
abstract_zh: CounterFactual (CF) 视觉解释试图找到与查询图像相似的图像，从而将视觉系统的决策更改为指定的结果。现有方法要么需要推理时间优化，要么需要与生成对抗模型进行联合训练，这使得它们在实践中既耗时又难以使用。我们提出了一种新颖的方法，即通过潜在变换实现循环一致的反事实（C3LT），它学习一种潜在变换，通过引导生成模型的潜在空间来自动生成视觉 CF。我们的方法使用查询和 CF 潜在表示之间的循环一致性，这有助于我们的训练找到更好的解决方案。 C3LT 可以轻松插入任何最先进的预训练生成网络。这使得我们的方法能够生成高质量且可解释的高分辨率 CF 图像，例如 ImageNet 中的图像。除了用于评估 CF 解释的几个既定指标之外，我们还引入了一种新的指标，专门用于评估生成的 CF 示例的质量并在大量实验中验证我们的方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种通过潜在空间转换生成反事实视觉解释的新方法C3LT，用于高效生成高质量的反事实图像。
AI.motivation: 现有反事实生成方法依赖推理优化或GAN联合训练，导致计算成本高且实用性差，亟需更高效的解决方案。
AI.method: C3LT通过学习潜在空间的循环一致性转换，直接在预训练生成模型的潜在空间中生成反事实图像，无需额外优化或联合训练。
AI.result: 实验表明C3LT能生成高分辨率（如ImageNet级别）的高质量反事实图像，并通过新指标验证了其生成效果和可解释性。
AI.conclusion: C3LT方法有效解决了反事实生成的效率与质量矛盾，适用于各类预训练生成模型，具有实际应用价值。

Existing methods either require inference-time optimization or joint training with a generative adversarial model which makes them time-consuming and difficult to use in practice. authors_text: Sairamvinay Vijayaraghavan,David Haddad,Shikun Huang,Seongwoo Choi
title: A Deep Learning Technique using a Sequence of Follow Up X-Rays for Disease classification
title_zh: 使用一系列后续 X 射线进行疾病分类的深度学习技术
abstract: The ability to predict lung and heart based diseases using deep learning techniques is central to many researchers, particularly in the medical field around the world. In this paper, we present a unique outlook of a very familiar problem of disease classification using X-rays. We present a hypothesis that X-rays of patients included with the follow up history of their most recent three chest X-ray images would perform better in disease classification in comparison to one chest X-ray image input using an internal CNN to perform feature extraction. We have discovered that our generic deep learning architecture which we propose for solving this problem performs well with 3 input X ray images provided per sample for each patient. In this paper, we have also established that without additional layers before the output classification, the CNN models will improve the performance of predicting the disease labels for each patient. We have provided our results in ROC curves and AUROC scores. We define a fresh approach of collecting three X-ray images for training deep learning models, which we have concluded has clearly improved the performance of the models. We have shown that ResNet, in general, has a better result than any other CNN model used in the feature extraction phase. With our original approach to data pre-processing, image training, and pre-trained models, we believe that the current research will assist many medical institutions around the world, and this will improve the prediction of patients' symptoms and diagnose them with more accurate cure.
summary: The ability to predict lung and heart based diseases using deep learning techniques is central to many researchers, particularly in the medical field around the world. In this paper, we present a unique outlook of a very familiar problem of disease classification using X-rays. We present a hypothesis that X-rays of patients included with the follow up history of their most recent three chest X-ray images would perform better in disease classification in comparison to one chest X-ray image input using an internal CNN to perform feature extraction. We have discovered that our generic deep learning architecture which we propose for solving this problem performs well with 3 input X ray images provided per sample for each patient. In this paper, we have also established that without additional layers before the output classification, the CNN models will improve the performance of predicting the disease labels for each patient. We have provided our results in ROC curves and AUROC scores. We define a fresh approach of collecting three X-ray images for training deep learning models, which we have concluded has clearly improved the performance of the models. We have shown that ResNet, in general, has a better result than any other CNN model used in the feature extraction phase. With our original approach to data pre-processing, image training, and pre-trained models, we believe that the current research will assist many medical institutions around the world, and this will improve the prediction of patients' symptoms and diagnose them with more accurate cure.
abstract_zh: 使用深度学习技术预测肺部和心脏疾病的能力对于许多研究人员来说至关重要，特别是在世界各地的医学领域。在本文中，我们对使用 X 射线进行疾病分类的一个非常熟悉的问题提出了独特的看法。我们提出一个假设，即与使用内部 CNN 执行特征提取的一张胸部 X 射线图像输入相比，包含最近三张胸部 X 射线图像的随访历史的患者 X 射线在疾病分类中表现更好。我们发现，我们提出的用于解决此问题的通用深度学习架构在为每位患者的每个样本提供 3 个输入 X 射线图像的情况下表现良好。在本文中，我们还确定，在输出分类之前无需额外层，CNN 模型将提高预测每位患者疾病标签的性能。我们提供了 ROC 曲线和 AUROC 分数的结果。我们定义了一种收集三张 X 射线图像来训练深度学习模型的新方法，我们得出的结论是，该方法明显提高了模型的性能。我们已经证明，总的来说，ResNet 比特征提取阶段使用的任何其他 CNN 模型都有更好的结果。凭借我们独创的数据预处理、图像训练和预训练模型的方法，我们相信当前的研究将帮助世界各地的许多医疗机构，这将提高对患者症状的预测和诊断，从而提供更准确的治疗。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种利用患者连续三次胸部X光影像序列进行疾病分类的深度学习方法，通过对比单张X光影像的分类效果验证其有效性。
AI.motivation: 传统单张X光影像可能无法全面反映病情变化，利用连续影像序列可捕捉疾病动态特征，从而提升分类准确性。
AI.method: 构建包含三次随访X光影像的输入架构，采用内部CNN进行特征提取，对比不同CNN模型（如ResNet）性能，并通过ROC曲线和AUROC评分评估结果。
AI.result: 实验表明，使用三次X光影像的模型分类性能优于单张影像，ResNet在特征提取阶段表现最佳，数据预处理方法有效提升了模型表现。
AI.conclusion: 连续多时相X光影像结合深度学习可显著提高疾病预测准确性，该方法为医疗诊断提供了更可靠的辅助工具。

search_text: A Deep Learning Technique using a Sequence of Follow Up X-Rays for Disease classification 使用一系列后续 X 射线进行疾病分类的深度学习技术 The ability to predict lung and heart based diseases using deep learning techniques is central to many researchers, particularly in the medical field around the world. In this paper, we present a unique outlook of a very familiar problem of disease classification using X-rays. We present a hypothesis that X-rays of patients included with the follow up history of their most recent three chest X-ray images would perform better in disease classification in comparison to one chest X-ray image input using an internal CNN to perform feature extraction. We have discovered that our generic deep learning architecture which we propose for solving this problem performs well with 3 input X ray images provided per sample for each patient. In this paper, we have also established that without additional layers before the output classification, the CNN models will improve the performance of predicting the disease labels for each patient. We have provided our results in ROC curves and AUROC scores. We define a fresh approach of collecting three X-ray images for training deep learning models, which we have concluded has clearly improved the performance of the models. We have shown that ResNet, in general, has a better result than any other CNN model used in the feature extraction phase. With our original approach to data pre-processing, image training, and pre-trained models, we believe that the current research will assist many medical institutions around the world, and this will improve the prediction of patients' symptoms and diagnose them with more accurate cure. 使用深度学习技术预测肺部和心脏疾病的能力对于许多研究人员来说至关重要，特别是在世界各地的医学领域。在本文中，我们对使用 X 射线进行疾病分类的一个非常熟悉的问题提出了独特的看法。我们提出一个假设，即与使用内部 CNN 执行特征提取的一张胸部 X 射线图像输入相比，包含最近三张胸部 X 射线图像的随访历史的患者 X 射线在疾病分类中表现更好。我们发现，我们提出的用于解决此问题的通用深度学习架构在为每位患者的每个样本提供 3 个输入 X 射线图像的情况下表现良好。在本文中，我们还确定，在输出分类之前无需额外层，CNN 模型将提高预测每位患者疾病标签的性能。我们提供了 ROC 曲线和 AUROC 分数的结果。我们定义了一种收集三张 X 射线图像来训练深度学习模型的新方法，我们得出的结论是，该方法明显提高了模型的性能。我们已经证明，总的来说，ResNet 比特征提取阶段使用的任何其他 CNN 模型都有更好的结果。凭借我们独创的数据预处理、图像训练和预训练模型的方法，我们相信当前的研究将帮助世界各地的许多医疗机构，这将提高对患者症状的预测和诊断，从而提供更准确的治疗。 本文提出一种利用患者连续三次胸部X光影像序列进行疾病分类的深度学习方法，通过对比单张X光影像的分类效果验证其有效性。 Sairamvinay Vijayaraghavan,David Haddad,Shikun Huang,Seongwoo Choi cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Jan-Christopher Cohrs,Chandrajit Bajaj,Benjamin Berkels
title: A distribution-dependent Mumford-Shah model for unsupervised hyperspectral image segmentation
title_zh: 用于无监督高光谱图像分割的分布相关 Mumford-Shah 模型
comment: ef:IEEE Transactions on Geoscience and Remote Sensing, vol. 60, pp. 1-21, 2022, Art no. 5545121
comments: ef:IEEE Transactions on Geoscience and Remote Sensing, vol. 60, pp. 1-21, 2022, Art no. 5545121
abstract: Hyperspectral images provide a rich representation of the underlying spectrum for each pixel, allowing for a pixel-wise classification/segmentation into different classes. As the acquisition of labeled training data is very time-consuming, unsupervised methods become crucial in hyperspectral image analysis. The spectral variability and noise in hyperspectral data make this task very challenging and define special requirements for such methods. Here, we present a novel unsupervised hyperspectral segmentation framework. It starts with a denoising and dimensionality reduction step by the well-established Minimum Noise Fraction (MNF) transform. Then, the Mumford-Shah (MS) segmentation functional is applied to segment the data. We equipped the MS functional with a novel robust distribution-dependent indicator function designed to handle the characteristic challenges of hyperspectral data. To optimize our objective function with respect to the parameters for which no closed form solution is available, we propose an efficient fixed point iteration scheme. Numerical experiments on four public benchmark datasets show that our method produces competitive results, which outperform three state-of-the-art methods substantially on three of these datasets.
summary: Hyperspectral images provide a rich representation of the underlying spectrum for each pixel, allowing for a pixel-wise classification/segmentation into different classes. As the acquisition of labeled training data is very time-consuming, unsupervised methods become crucial in hyperspectral image analysis. The spectral variability and noise in hyperspectral data make this task very challenging and define special requirements for such methods. Here, we present a novel unsupervised hyperspectral segmentation framework. It starts with a denoising and dimensionality reduction step by the well-established Minimum Noise Fraction (MNF) transform. Then, the Mumford-Shah (MS) segmentation functional is applied to segment the data. We equipped the MS functional with a novel robust distribution-dependent indicator function designed to handle the characteristic challenges of hyperspectral data. To optimize our objective function with respect to the parameters for which no closed form solution is available, we propose an efficient fixed point iteration scheme. Numerical experiments on four public benchmark datasets show that our method produces competitive results, which outperform three state-of-the-art methods substantially on three of these datasets.
abstract_zh: 高光谱图像为每个像素提供了丰富的底层光谱表示，允许按像素分类/分割成不同的类别。由于标记训练数据的获取非常耗时，无监督方法在高光谱图像分析中变得至关重要。高光谱数据中的光谱变异性和噪声使这项任务非常具有挑战性，并对此类方法提出了特殊要求。在这里，我们提出了一种新颖的无监督高光谱分割框架。它首先通过完善的最小噪声分数 (MNF) 变换进行去噪和降维步骤。然后，应用 Mumford-Shah (MS) 分割函数对数据进行分割。我们为 MS 函数配备了一种新颖的稳健的分布相关指示函数，旨在应对高光谱数据的特征挑战。为了针对没有可用闭合形式解的参数优化我们的目标函数，我们提出了一种有效的定点迭代方案。对四个公共基准数据集的数值实验表明，我们的方法产生了有竞争力的结果，在其中三个数据集上远远优于三种最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于分布依赖的Mumford-Shah模型，用于无监督高光谱图像分割，结合去噪降维与改进分割算法。
AI.motivation: 高光谱图像分析中标注数据获取成本高，且光谱噪声与变化特性对分割方法提出特殊要求，需开发鲁棒的无监督算法。
AI.method: 采用MNF变换进行去噪与降维，设计分布依赖的鲁棒指示函数改进Mumford-Shah模型，并提出固定点迭代优化方案。
AI.result: 在四个公开数据集上验证，方法在三个数据集中显著优于三种现有先进算法，分割效果具有竞争力。
AI.conclusion: 该框架有效应对高光谱数据的噪声与光谱变异性挑战，为无监督分割提供了可行解决方案。

authors_text: Robert Penicka,Yunlong Song,Elia Kaufmann,Davide Scaramuzza
title: Learning Minimum-Time Flight in Cluttered Environments
title_zh: 学习在杂乱环境中的最短时间飞行
comment: ef:IEEE Robotics and Automation Letters, vol. 7, no. 3, pp. 7209-7216, July 2022
comments: ef:IEEE Robotics and Automation Letters, vol. 7, no. 3, pp. 7209-7216, July 2022
abstract: We tackle the problem of minimum-time flight for a quadrotor through a sequence of waypoints in the presence of obstacles while exploiting the full quadrotor dynamics. Early works relied on simplified dynamics or polynomial trajectory representations that did not exploit the full actuator potential of the quadrotor, and, thus, resulted in suboptimal solutions. Recent works can plan minimum-time trajectories; yet, the trajectories are executed with control methods that do not account for obstacles. Thus, a successful execution of such trajectories is prone to errors due to model mismatch and in-flight disturbances. To this end, we leverage deep reinforcement learning and classical topological path planning to train robust neural-network controllers for minimum-time quadrotor flight in cluttered environments. The resulting neural network controller demonstrates substantially better performance of up to 19\% over state-of-the-art methods. More importantly, the learned policy solves the planning and control problem simultaneously online to account for disturbances, thus achieving much higher robustness. As such, the presented method achieves 100% success rate of flying minimum-time policies without collision, while traditional planning and control approaches achieve only 40%. The proposed method is validated in both simulation and the real world, with quadrotor speeds of up to 42km/h and accelerations of 3.6g.
summary: We tackle the problem of minimum-time flight for a quadrotor through a sequence of waypoints in the presence of obstacles while exploiting the full quadrotor dynamics. Early works relied on simplified dynamics or polynomial trajectory representations that did not exploit the full actuator potential of the quadrotor, and, thus, resulted in suboptimal solutions. Recent works can plan minimum-time trajectories; yet, the trajectories are executed with control methods that do not account for obstacles. Thus, a successful execution of such trajectories is prone to errors due to model mismatch and in-flight disturbances. To this end, we leverage deep reinforcement learning and classical topological path planning to train robust neural-network controllers for minimum-time quadrotor flight in cluttered environments. The resulting neural network controller demonstrates substantially better performance of up to 19\% over state-of-the-art methods. More importantly, the learned policy solves the planning and control problem simultaneously online to account for disturbances, thus achieving much higher robustness. As such, the presented method achieves 100% success rate of flying minimum-time policies without collision, while traditional planning and control approaches achieve only 40%. The proposed method is validated in both simulation and the real world, with quadrotor speeds of up to 42km/h and accelerations of 3.6g.
abstract_zh: 我们解决了四旋翼飞行器在存在障碍物的情况下通过一系列航路点的最短时间飞行问题，同时利用了完整的四旋翼飞行器动力学。早期的工作依赖于简化的动力学或多项式轨迹表示，没有充分利用四旋翼飞行器的全部执行器潜力，因此导致了次优解决方案。最近的工作可以规划最短时间轨迹；然而，轨迹是用不考虑障碍物的控制方法执行的。因此，由于模型不匹配和飞行中的干扰，此类轨迹的成功执行很容易出现错误。为此，我们利用深度强化学习和经典拓扑路径规划来训练鲁棒的神经网络控制器，以在杂乱环境中实现最短时间的四旋翼飞行。由此产生的神经网络控制器的性能比最先进的方法高出 19%。更重要的是，学习到的策略同时在线解决规划和控制问题以解决干扰，从而实现更高的鲁棒性。因此，所提出的方法实现了无碰撞飞行最短时间策略的 100% 成功率，而传统的规划和控制方法仅达到 40%。所提出的方法在仿真和现实世界中均得到验证，四旋翼飞行器速度高达 42km/h，加速度为 3.6g。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在复杂环境中实现四旋翼无人机快速飞行的最小时间轨迹规划与控制问题。
AI.motivation: 传统方法因简化动力学模型或未充分利用执行器潜力导致轨迹规划次优，且现有方法在避障执行时易受模型误差和飞行扰动影响。
AI.method: 结合深度强化学习与经典拓扑路径规划，训练神经网络控制器实现规划与控制的在线联合优化。
AI.result: 相比现有方法性能提升19%，在仿真和真实环境中均实现100%无碰撞飞行成功率，最大飞行速度达42km/h。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法通过联合优化规划与控制，显著提升了复杂环境下四旋翼无人机的鲁棒性和飞行效率。

conclusion: 所提方法通过联合优化规划与控制，显著提升了复杂环境下四旋翼无人机的鲁棒性和飞行效率。
search_text: Learning Minimum-Time Flight in Cluttered Environments 学习在杂乱环境中的最短时间飞行 We tackle the problem of minimum-time flight for a quadrotor through a sequence of waypoints in the presence of obstacles while exploiting the full quadrotor dynamics. Early works relied on simplified dynamics or polynomial trajectory representations that did not exploit the full actuator potential of the quadrotor, and, thus, resulted in suboptimal solutions. Recent works can plan minimum-time trajectories; yet, the trajectories are executed with control methods that do not account for obstacles. Thus, a successful execution of such trajectories is prone to errors due to model mismatch and in-flight disturbances. To this end, we leverage deep reinforcement learning and classical topological path planning to train robust neural-network controllers for minimum-time quadrotor flight in cluttered environments. The resulting neural network controller demonstrates substantially better performance of up to 19\% over state-of-the-art methods. More importantly, the learned policy solves the planning and control problem simultaneously online to account for disturbances, thus achieving much higher robustness. As such, the presented method achieves 100% success rate of flying minimum-time policies without collision, while traditional planning and control approaches achieve only 40%. The proposed method is validated in both simulation and the real world, with quadrotor speeds of up to 42km/h and accelerations of 3.6g. 我们解决了四旋翼飞行器在存在障碍物的情况下通过一系列航路点的最短时间飞行问题，同时利用了完整的四旋翼飞行器动力学。早期的工作依赖于简化的动力学或多项式轨迹表示，没有充分利用四旋翼飞行器的全部执行器潜力，因此导致了次优解决方案。最近的工作可以规划最短时间轨迹；然而，轨迹是用不考虑障碍物的控制方法执行的。因此，由于模型不匹配和飞行中的干扰，此类轨迹的成功执行很容易出现错误。为此，我们利用深度强化学习和经典拓扑路径规划来训练鲁棒的神经网络控制器，以在杂乱环境中实现最短时间的四旋翼飞行。由此产生的神经网络控制器的性能比最先进的方法高出 19%。更重要的是，学习到的策略同时在线解决规划和控制问题以解决干扰，从而实现更高的鲁棒性。因此，所提出的方法实现了无碰撞飞行最短时间策略的 100% 成功率，而传统的规划和控制方法仅达到 40%。所提出的方法在仿真和现实世界中均得到验证，四旋翼飞行器速度高达 42km/h，加速度为 3.6g。 本文研究了在复杂环境中实现四旋翼无人机快速飞行的最小时间轨迹规划与控制问题。 Robert Penicka,Yunlong Song,Elia Kaufmann,Davide Scaramuzza cs.RO

authors_text: Tianbao Yang,Yiming Ying
title: AUC Maximization in the Era of Big Data and AI: A Survey
title_zh: 大数据和人工智能时代的 AUC 最大化：一项调查
comment: Accepted to the Journal of ACM Computing Surveys
comments: Accepted to the Journal of ACM Computing Surveys
abstract: Area under the ROC curve, a.k.a. AUC, is a measure of choice for assessing the performance of a classifier for imbalanced data. AUC maximization refers to a learning paradigm that learns a predictive model by directly maximizing its AUC score. It has been studied for more than two decades dating back to late 90s and a huge amount of work has been devoted to AUC maximization since then. Recently, stochastic AUC maximization for big data and deep AUC maximization for deep learning have received increasing attention and yielded dramatic impact for solving real-world problems. However, to the best our knowledge there is no comprehensive survey of related works for AUC maximization. This paper aims to address the gap by reviewing the literature in the past two decades. We not only give a holistic view of the literature but also present detailed explanations and comparisons of different papers from formulations to algorithms and theoretical guarantees. We also identify and discuss remaining and emerging issues for deep AUC maximization, and provide suggestions on topics for future work.
summary: Area under the ROC curve, a.k.a. AUC, is a measure of choice for assessing the performance of a classifier for imbalanced data. AUC maximization refers to a learning paradigm that learns a predictive model by directly maximizing its AUC score. It has been studied for more than two decades dating back to late 90s and a huge amount of work has been devoted to AUC maximization since then. Recently, stochastic AUC maximization for big data and deep AUC maximization for deep learning have received increasing attention and yielded dramatic impact for solving real-world problems. However, to the best our knowledge there is no comprehensive survey of related works for AUC maximization. This paper aims to address the gap by reviewing the literature in the past two decades. We not only give a holistic view of the literature but also present detailed explanations and comparisons of different papers from formulations to algorithms and theoretical guarantees. We also identify and discuss remaining and emerging issues for deep AUC maximization, and provide suggestions on topics for future work.
abstract_zh: ROC 曲线下面积（也称为 AUC）是评估不平衡数据分类器性能的首选度量。 AUC最大化是指通过直接最大化AUC分数来学习预测模型的学习范式。自 20 世纪 90 年代末以来，人们对其进行了二十多年的研究，并且从那时起，大量的工作致力于 AUC 最大化。最近，大数据的随机 AUC 最大化和深度学习的深度 AUC 最大化受到越来越多的关注，并对解决现实问题产生了巨大的影响。然而，据我们所知，还没有对 AUC 最大化相关工作进行全面的调查。本文旨在通过回顾过去二十年的文献来弥补这一差距。我们不仅给出了文献的整体视图，而且还对不同论文从公式到算法和理论保证进行了详细的解释和比较。我们还确定并讨论深度 AUC 最大化的剩余问题和新出现的问题，并就未来工作的主题提供建议。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在回顾过去二十年AUC最大化相关研究，提供全面综述并探讨未来研究方向。
AI.motivation: 尽管AUC最大化已研究二十余年且应用广泛，但缺乏系统性综述，尤其在大数据与深度学习背景下亟需总结现有成果与挑战。
AI.method: 通过文献回顾与比较分析，梳理不同方法的数学公式、算法实现及理论保证，并讨论深度AUC最大化的新问题。
AI.result: 全面总结了AUC最大化的发展脉络，对比了主流方法的差异，指出现有研究的不足并提出未来研究方向建议。
AI.conclusion: 本文填补了AUC最大化领域系统性综述的空白，为后续研究提供了理论框架与实践指导。

authors_text: Dilrukshi Gamage,Piyush Ghasiya,Vamshi Krishna Bonagiri,Mark E Whiting,Kazutoshi Sasahara
title: Are Deepfakes Concerning? Analyzing Conversations of Deepfakes on Reddit and Exploring Societal Implications
title_zh: Deepfakes 值得关注吗？分析 Reddit 上的 Deepfakes 对话并探索社会影响
comment: 19pgs, CHI22: CHI Conference on Human Factors in Computing Systems April 29-May 5, 2022 New Orleans, LA, USA
comments: 19pgs, CHI22: CHI Conference on Human Factors in Computing Systems April 29-May 5, 2022 New Orleans, LA, USA
abstract: Deepfakes are synthetic content generated using advanced deep learning and AI technologies. The advancement of technology has created opportunities for anyone to create and share deepfakes much easier. This may lead to societal concerns based on how communities engage with it. However, there is limited research available to understand how communities perceive deepfakes. We examined deepfake conversations on Reddit from 2018 to 2021 -- including major topics and their temporal changes as well as implications of these conversations. Using a mixed-method approach -- topic modeling and qualitative coding, we found 6,638 posts and 86,425 comments discussing concerns of the believable nature of deepfakes and how platforms moderate them. We also found Reddit conversations to be pro-deepfake and building a community that supports creating and sharing deepfake artifacts and building a marketplace regardless of the consequences. Possible implications derived from qualitative codes indicate that deepfake conversations raise societal concerns. We propose that there are implications for Human Computer Interaction (HCI) to mitigate the harm created from deepfakes.
summary: Deepfakes are synthetic content generated using advanced deep learning and AI technologies. The advancement of technology has created opportunities for anyone to create and share deepfakes much easier. This may lead to societal concerns based on how communities engage with it. However, there is limited research available to understand how communities perceive deepfakes. We examined deepfake conversations on Reddit from 2018 to 2021 -- including major topics and their temporal changes as well as implications of these conversations. Using a mixed-method approach -- topic modeling and qualitative coding, we found 6,638 posts and 86,425 comments discussing concerns of the believable nature of deepfakes and how platforms moderate them. We also found Reddit conversations to be pro-deepfake and building a community that supports creating and sharing deepfake artifacts and building a marketplace regardless of the consequences. Possible implications derived from qualitative codes indicate that deepfake conversations raise societal concerns. We propose that there are implications for Human Computer Interaction (HCI) to mitigate the harm created from deepfakes.
abstract_zh: Deepfakes 是使用先进的深度学习和人工智能技术生成的合成内容。技术的进步为任何人创造了更轻松地创建和分享深度伪造品的机会。根据社区的参与方式，这可能会引起社会担忧。然而，用于了解社区如何看待深度造假的研究有限。我们研究了 2018 年至 2021 年 Reddit 上的 Deepfake 对话，包括主要主题及其时间变化以及这些对话的影响。使用混合方法（主题建模和定性编码），我们发现了 6,638 个帖子和 86,425 条评论，讨论了对深度伪造的可信性质以及平台如何调节它们的担忧。我们还发现 Reddit 的对话是支持深度伪造的，并建立了一个支持创建和共享深度伪造制品的社区，并建立了一个不顾后果的市场。从定性代码中得出的可能含义表明，深度造假对话引起了社会担忧。我们建议人机交互（HCI）可以减轻深度伪造造成的危害。

AI.tldr: 分析Reddit上关于深度伪造的讨论，探讨其社会影响
AI.motivation: 现有研究缺乏对社区如何感知深度伪造的理解，需探讨其社会影响
AI.method: 采用混合方法，结合主题建模和定性编码，分析Reddit上2018至2021年的6,638篇帖子和86,425条评论
AI.result: 发现Reddit讨论支持深度伪造，关注其可信度及平台监管，且社区倾向于构建支持创作和分享的市场
AI.conclusion: 建议人机交互领域需提出措施以减轻深度伪造带来的负面影响

authors_text: Dariusz R. Kowalski,Dominik Pajak
title: Efficient Algorithm for Deterministic Search of Hot Elements
title_zh: 热点元素确定性搜索的高效算法
abstract: When facing a very large stream of data, it is often desirable to extract most important statistics online in a short time and using small memory. For example, one may want to quickly find the most influential users generating posts online or check if the stream contains many identical elements. In this paper, we study streams containing insertions and deletions of elements from a possibly large set $N$ of size $|N| = n$, that are being processed by online deterministic algorithms. At any point in the stream the algorithm may be queried to output elements of certain frequency in the already processed stream. More precisely, the most frequent elements in the stream so far. The output is considered correct if the returned elements it contains all elements with frequency greater than a given parameter $\varphi$ and no element with frequency smaller than $\varphi-ε$. We present an efficient online deterministic algorithm for solving this problem using $O(\min(n, \frac{polylog(n)}ε))$ memory and $O(polylog(n))$ time per processing and outputting an element. It is the first such algorithm as the previous algorithms were either randomized, or processed elements in substantially larger time $Ω(\min(n, \frac{\log n}ε))$, or handled only insertions and required two passes over the stream (i.e., were not truly online). Our solution is almost-optimally scalable (with only a polylogarithmic overhead) and does not require randomness or scanning twice through the stream. We complement the algorithm analysis with a lower bound $Ω(\min(n, \frac{1}ε))$ on required memory.

At any point in the stream the algorithm may be queried to output elements of certain frequency in the already processed stream. More precisely, the most frequent elements in the stream so far. The output is considered correct if the returned elements it contains all elements with frequency greater than a given parameter $\varphi$ and no element with frequency smaller than $\varphi-ε$. We present an efficient online deterministic algorithm for solving this problem using $O(\min(n, \frac{polylog(n)}ε))$ memory and $O(polylog(n))$ time per processing and outputting an element. It is the first such algorithm as the previous algorithms were either randomized, or processed elements in substantially larger time $Ω(\min(n, \frac{\log n}ε))$, or handled only insertions and required two passes over the stream (i.e., were not truly online). Our solution is almost-optimally scalable (with only a polylogarithmic overhead) and does not require randomness or scanning twice through the stream. We complement the algorithm analysis with a lower bound $Ω(\min(n, \frac{1}ε))$ on required memory.
abstract_zh: 当面对非常大的数据流时，通常希望在短​​时间内并使用较小的内存在线提取最重要的统计数据。例如，人们可能希望快速找到在线发布帖子的最有影响力的用户，或者检查流中是否包含许多相同的元素。在本文中，我们研究包含从大小为 $|N| 的可能大集合 $N$ 中插入和删除元素的流。 = n$，正在由在线确定性算法处理。在流中的任何点，可以查询算法以输出已处理流中特定频率的元素。更准确地说，是迄今为止流中最常见的元素。如果返回的元素包含频率大于给定参数 $\varphi$ 的所有元素并且没有频率小于 $\varphi-ε$ 的元素，则输出被认为是正确的。我们提出了一种高效的在线确定性算法来解决这个问题，每次处理和输出一个元素使用 $O(\min(n, \frac{polylog(n)}ε))$ 内存和 $O(polylog(n))$ 时间。这是第一个这样的算法，因为之前的算法要么是随机的，要么是在更长的时间内处理元素 $Ω(\min(n, \frac{\log n}ε))$，或者仅处理插入并且需要两次通过流（即，不是真正在线）。我们的解决方案几乎具有最佳的可扩展性（仅具有多对数开销），并且不需要随机性或通过流扫描两次。我们在所需内存上使用下限 $Ω(\min(n, \frac{1}ε))$ 来补充算法分析。

search_text: Efficient Algorithm for Deterministic Search of Hot Elements 热点元素确定性搜索的高效算法 When facing a very large stream of data, it is often desirable to extract most important statistics online in a short time and using small memory. For example, one may want to quickly find the most influential users generating posts online or check if the stream contains many identical elements. In this paper, we study streams containing insertions and deletions of elements from a possibly large set $N$ of size $|N| = n$, that are being processed by online deterministic algorithms. At any point in the stream the algorithm may be queried to output elements of certain frequency in the already processed stream. More precisely, the most frequent elements in the stream so far. The output is considered correct if the returned elements it contains all elements with frequency greater than a given parameter $\varphi$ and no element with frequency smaller than $\varphi-ε$. We present an efficient online deterministic algorithm for solving this problem using $O(\min(n, \frac{polylog(n)}ε))$ memory and $O(polylog(n))$ time per processing and outputting an element. It is the first such algorithm as the previous algorithms were either randomized, or processed elements in substantially larger time $Ω(\min(n, \frac{\log n}ε))$, or handled only insertions and required two passes over the stream (i.e., were not truly online). Our solution is almost-optimally scalable (with only a polylogarithmic overhead) and does not require randomness or scanning twice through the stream. We complement the algorithm analysis with a lower bound $Ω(\min(n, \frac{1}ε))$ on required memory. 当面对非常大的数据流时，通常希望在短​​时间内并使用较小的内存在线提取最重要的统计数据。例如，人们可能希望快速找到在线发布帖子的最有影响力的用户，或者检查流中是否包含许多相同的元素。在本文中，我们研究包含从大小为 $|N| 的可能大集合 $N$ 中插入和删除元素的流。 = n$，正在由在线确定性算法处理。在流中的任何点，可以查询算法以输出已处理流中特定频率的元素。更准确地说，是迄今为止流中最常见的元素。如果返回的元素包含频率大于给定参数 $\varphi$ 的所有元素并且没有频率小于 $\varphi-ε$ 的元素，则输出被认为是正确的。我们提出了一种高效的在线确定性算法来解决这个问题，每次处理和输出一个元素使用 $O(\min(n, \frac{polylog(n)}ε))$ 内存和 $O(polylog(n))$ 时间。这是第一个这样的算法，因为之前的算法要么是随机的，要么是在更长的时间内处理元素 $Ω(\min(n, \frac{\log n}ε))$，或者仅处理插入并且需要两次通过流（即，不是真正在线）。我们的解决方案几乎具有最佳的可扩展性（仅具有多对数开销），并且不需要随机性或通过流扫描两次。我们在所需内存上使用下限 $Ω(\min(n, \frac{1}ε))$ 来补充算法分析。 本文提出了一种高效的在线确定性算法，用于在大规模数据流中快速识别高频元素。 Dariusz R. Kowalski,Dominik Pajak cs.DS

authors_text: Haresh Karnan,Anirudh Nair,Xuesu Xiao,Garrett Warnell,Soeren Pirk,Alexander Toshev,Justin Hart,Joydeep Biswas,Peter Stone
title: Socially Compliant Navigation Dataset (SCAND): A Large-Scale Dataset of Demonstrations for Social Navigation
title_zh: 社交兼容导航数据集（SCAND）：社交导航演示的大规模数据集
abstract: Social navigation is the capability of an autonomous agent, such as a robot, to navigate in a 'socially compliant' manner in the presence of other intelligent agents such as humans. With the emergence of autonomously navigating mobile robots in human populated environments (e.g., domestic service robots in homes and restaurants and food delivery robots on public sidewalks), incorporating socially compliant navigation behaviors on these robots becomes critical to ensuring safe and comfortable human robot coexistence. To address this challenge, imitation learning is a promising framework, since it is easier for humans to demonstrate the task of social navigation rather than to formulate reward functions that accurately capture the complex multi objective setting of social navigation. The use of imitation learning and inverse reinforcement learning to social navigation for mobile robots, however, is currently hindered by a lack of large scale datasets that capture socially compliant robot navigation demonstrations in the wild. To fill this gap, we introduce Socially CompliAnt Navigation Dataset (SCAND) a large scale, first person view dataset of socially compliant navigation demonstrations. Our dataset contains 8.7 hours, 138 trajectories, 25 miles of socially compliant, human teleoperated driving demonstrations that comprises multi modal data streams including 3D lidar, joystick commands, odometry, visual and inertial information, collected on two morphologically different mobile robots a Boston Dynamics Spot and a Clearpath Jackal by four different human demonstrators in both indoor and outdoor environments. We additionally perform preliminary analysis and validation through real world robot experiments and show that navigation policies learned by imitation learning on SCAND generate socially compliant behaviors
summary: Social navigation is the capability of an autonomous agent, such as a robot, to navigate in a 'socially compliant' manner in the presence of other intelligent agents such as humans. With the emergence of autonomously navigating mobile robots in human populated environments (e.g., domestic service robots in homes and restaurants and food delivery robots on public sidewalks), incorporating socially compliant navigation behaviors on these robots becomes critical to ensuring safe and comfortable human robot coexistence. To address this challenge, imitation learning is a promising framework, since it is easier for humans to demonstrate the task of social navigation rather than to formulate reward functions that accurately capture the complex multi objective setting of social navigation. The use of imitation learning and inverse reinforcement learning to social navigation for mobile robots, however, is currently hindered by a lack of large scale datasets that capture socially compliant robot navigation demonstrations in the wild. To fill this gap, we introduce Socially CompliAnt Navigation Dataset (SCAND) a large scale, first person view dataset of socially compliant navigation demonstrations. Our dataset contains 8.7 hours, 138 trajectories, 25 miles of socially compliant, human teleoperated driving demonstrations that comprises multi modal data streams including 3D lidar, joystick commands, odometry, visual and inertial information, collected on two morphologically different mobile robots a Boston Dynamics Spot and a Clearpath Jackal by four different human demonstrators in both indoor and outdoor environments. We additionally perform preliminary analysis and validation through real world robot experiments and show that navigation policies learned by imitation learning on SCAND generate socially compliant behaviors
abstract_zh: 社交导航是自主代理（例如机器人）在其他智能代理（例如人类）存在的情况下以“社交兼容”方式进行导航的能力。随着人类居住环境中自主导航移动机器人（例如家庭和餐馆中的家政服务机器人以及公共人行道上的送餐机器人）的出现，在这些机器人上融入符合社会规范的导航行为对于确保安全舒适的人类机器人共存变得至关重要。为了应对这一挑战，模仿学习是一个有前途的框架，因为人类更容易演示社交导航的任务，而不是制定准确捕获社交导航的复杂多目标设置的奖励函数。然而，由于缺乏大规模数据集来捕获野外符合社交要求的机器人导航演示，因此目前将模仿学习和逆强化学习用于移动机器人的社交导航受到阻碍。为了填补这一空白，我们引入了社交兼容导航数据集（SCAND），这是一个大规模、第一人称视角的社交兼容导航演示数据集。我们的数据集包含 8.7 小时、138 条轨迹、25 英里的符合社会规范的人类遥控驾​​驶演示，其中包括多模式数据流，包括 3D 激光雷达、操纵杆命令、里程计、视觉和惯性信息，由四个不同的人类演示者在室内和室外环境中通过两个形态不同的移动机器人（Boston Dynamics Spot 和 Clearpath Jackal）收集。我们还通过现实世界的机器人实验进行初步分析和验证，并表明通过 SCAND 上的模仿学习学习的导航策略会产生符合社会规范的行为

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个名为SCAND的大规模数据集，用于社交导航的模仿学习，包含人类操作的机器人导航演示数据。
AI.motivation: 随着自主移动机器人在人类环境中的普及，确保机器人具备符合社会规范的导航行为对安全共存至关重要，但缺乏大规模真实场景数据阻碍了相关研究。
AI.method: 通过四名人类操作员在室内外环境中使用两种不同形态的机器人（Spot和Jackal）进行 teleoperation，采集包含3D激光雷达、操控指令、里程计、视觉和惯性信息的多模态数据。
AI.result: 实验表明基于SCAND数据集的模仿学习策略能生成符合社会规范的导航行为，验证了数据集的有效性。
AI.conclusion: SCAND填补了社交导航领域大规模真实演示数据的空白，为机器人社交导航研究提供了重要资源。

authors_text: Anthony Z. Liu,Sungryull Sohn,Mahdi Qazwini,Honglak Lee
title: Learning Parameterized Task Structure for Generalization to Unseen Entities
title_zh: 学习参数化任务结构以泛化到看不见的实体
abstract: Real world tasks are hierarchical and compositional. Tasks can be composed of multiple subtasks (or sub-goals) that are dependent on each other. These subtasks are defined in terms of entities (e.g., "apple", "pear") that can be recombined to form new subtasks (e.g., "pickup apple", and "pickup pear"). To solve these tasks efficiently, an agent must infer subtask dependencies (e.g. an agent must execute "pickup apple" before "place apple in pot"), and generalize the inferred dependencies to new subtasks (e.g. "place apple in pot" is similar to "place apple in pan"). Moreover, an agent may also need to solve unseen tasks, which can involve unseen entities. To this end, we formulate parameterized subtask graph inference (PSGI), a method for modeling subtask dependencies using first-order logic with subtask entities. To facilitate this, we learn entity attributes in a zero-shot manner, which are used as quantifiers (e.g. "is_pickable(X)") for the parameterized subtask graph. We show this approach accurately learns the latent structure on hierarchical and compositional tasks more efficiently than prior work, and show PSGI can generalize by modelling structure on subtasks unseen during adaptation.
summary: Real world tasks are hierarchical and compositional. Tasks can be composed of multiple subtasks (or sub-goals) that are dependent on each other. These subtasks are defined in terms of entities (e.g., "apple", "pear") that can be recombined to form new subtasks (e.g., "pickup apple", and "pickup pear"). To solve these tasks efficiently, an agent must infer subtask dependencies (e.g. an agent must execute "pickup apple" before "place apple in pot"), and generalize the inferred dependencies to new subtasks (e.g. "place apple in pot" is similar to "place apple in pan"). Moreover, an agent may also need to solve unseen tasks, which can involve unseen entities. To this end, we formulate parameterized subtask graph inference (PSGI), a method for modeling subtask dependencies using first-order logic with subtask entities. To facilitate this, we learn entity attributes in a zero-shot manner, which are used as quantifiers (e.g. "is_pickable(X)") for the parameterized subtask graph. We show this approach accurately learns the latent structure on hierarchical and compositional tasks more efficiently than prior work, and show PSGI can generalize by modelling structure on subtasks unseen during adaptation.
abstract_zh: 现实世界的任务是分层且组合的。任务可以由多个相互依赖的子任务（或子目标）组成。这些子任务是根据实体（例如“苹果”、“梨”）来定义的，这些实体可以重新组合以形成新的子任务（例如“捡苹果”和“捡梨”）。为了有效地解决这些任务，代理必须推断子任务依赖关系（例如代理必须在“将苹果放入锅中”之前执行“拾取苹果”），并将推断的依赖关系推广到新的子任务（例如“将苹果放入锅中”类似于“将苹果放入锅中”）。此外，代理可能还需要解决看不见的任务，这可能涉及看不见的实体。为此，我们制定了参数化子任务图推理（PSGI），这是一种使用子任务实体的一阶逻辑对子任务依赖关系进行建模的方法。为了促进这一点，我们以零样本的方式学习实体属性，这些属性用作参数化子任务图的量词（例如“is_pickable(X)”）。我们证明这种方法比以前的工作更有效地准确地学习分层和组合任务的潜在结构，并表明 PSGI 可以通过对适应过程中看不见的子任务的结构进行建模来进行泛化。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种参数化子任务图推理（PSGI）方法，用于学习分层组合任务中的子任务依赖关系，并实现对新实体和未见任务的泛化。
AI.motivation: 现实世界任务具有层次性和组合性，子任务依赖关系需基于实体定义，且需泛化到新实体和未见任务，传统方法难以高效处理这一问题。
AI.method: 通过一阶逻辑建模子任务依赖关系，结合零样本学习实体属性（如is_pickable(X)）作为量化参数，构建参数化子任务图。
AI.result: PSGI在分层组合任务结构学习效率上优于先前方法，并能有效泛化到适应阶段未见的子任务和新实体。
AI.conclusion: PSGI通过参数化子任务图和零样本实体属性学习，实现了对复杂任务结构的高效建模与泛化能力。

search_text: Learning Parameterized Task Structure for Generalization to Unseen Entities 学习参数化任务结构以泛化到看不见的实体 Real world tasks are hierarchical and compositional. Tasks can be composed of multiple subtasks (or sub-goals) that are dependent on each other. These subtasks are defined in terms of entities (e.g., "apple", "pear") that can be recombined to form new subtasks (e.g., "pickup apple", and "pickup pear"). To solve these tasks efficiently, an agent must infer subtask dependencies (e.g. an agent must execute "pickup apple" before "place apple in pot"), and generalize the inferred dependencies to new subtasks (e.g. "place apple in pot" is similar to "place apple in pan"). Moreover, an agent may also need to solve unseen tasks, which can involve unseen entities. To this end, we formulate parameterized subtask graph inference (PSGI), a method for modeling subtask dependencies using first-order logic with subtask entities. To facilitate this, we learn entity attributes in a zero-shot manner, which are used as quantifiers (e.g. "is_pickable(X)") for the parameterized subtask graph. We show this approach accurately learns the latent structure on hierarchical and compositional tasks more efficiently than prior work, and show PSGI can generalize by modelling structure on subtasks unseen during adaptation. 现实世界的任务是分层且组合的。任务可以由多个相互依赖的子任务（或子目标）组成。这些子任务是根据实体（例如“苹果”、“梨”）来定义的，这些实体可以重新组合以形成新的子任务（例如“捡苹果”和“捡梨”）。为了有效地解决这些任务，代理必须推断子任务依赖关系（例如代理必须在“将苹果放入锅中”之前执行“拾取苹果”），并将推断的依赖关系推广到新的子任务（例如“将苹果放入锅中”类似于“将苹果放入锅中”）。此外，代理可能还需要解决看不见的任务，这可能涉及看不见的实体。为此，我们制定了参数化子任务图推理（PSGI），这是一种使用子任务实体的一阶逻辑对子任务依赖关系进行建模的方法。为了促进这一点，我们以零样本的方式学习实体属性，这些属性用作参数化子任务图的量词（例如“is_pickable(X)”）。我们证明这种方法比以前的工作更有效地准确地学习分层和组合任务的潜在结构，并表明 PSGI 可以通过对适应过程中看不见的子任务的结构进行建模来进行泛化。 本文提出了一种参数化子任务图推理（PSGI）方法，用于学习分层组合任务中的子任务依赖关系，并实现对新实体和未见任务的泛化。 Anthony Z. authors_text: Kevin Osanlou,Jeremy Frank,Andrei Bursuc,Tristan Cazenave,Eric Jacopin,Christophe Guettier,J. Benton
title: Solving Disjunctive Temporal Networks with Uncertainty under Restricted Time-Based Controllability using Tree Search and Graph Neural Networks
title_zh: 使用树搜索和图神经网络解决基于受限时间可控性的不确定性析取时态网络
comment: Thirty-Sixth AAAI Conference on Artificial Intelligence. This version includes the technical appendix. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2108.01068
comments: Thirty-Sixth AAAI Conference on Artificial Intelligence. This version includes the technical appendix. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2108.01068
abstract: Planning under uncertainty is an area of interest in artificial intelligence. We present a novel approach based on tree search and graph machine learning for the scheduling problem known as Disjunctive Temporal Networks with Uncertainty (DTNU). Dynamic Controllability (DC) of DTNUs seeks a reactive scheduling strategy to satisfy temporal constraints in response to uncontrollable action durations. We introduce new semantics for reactive scheduling: Time-based Dynamic Controllability (TDC) and a restricted subset of TDC, R-TDC. We design a tree search algorithm to determine whether or not a DTNU is R-TDC. Moreover, we leverage a graph neural network as a heuristic for tree search guidance. Finally, we conduct experiments on a known benchmark on which we show R-TDC to retain significant completeness with regard to DC, while being faster to prove. This results in the tree search processing fifty percent more DTNU problems in R-TDC than the state-of-the-art DC solver does in DC with the same time budget. We also observe that graph neural network search guidance leads to substantial performance gains on benchmarks of more complex DTNUs, with up to eleven times more problems solved than the baseline tree search.
summary: Planning under uncertainty is an area of interest in artificial intelligence. We present a novel approach based on tree search and graph machine learning for the scheduling problem known as Disjunctive Temporal Networks with Uncertainty (DTNU). Dynamic Controllability (DC) of DTNUs seeks a reactive scheduling strategy to satisfy temporal constraints in response to uncontrollable action durations. We introduce new semantics for reactive scheduling: Time-based Dynamic Controllability (TDC) and a restricted subset of TDC, R-TDC. We design a tree search algorithm to determine whether or not a DTNU is R-TDC. Moreover, we leverage a graph neural network as a heuristic for tree search guidance. Finally, we conduct experiments on a known benchmark on which we show R-TDC to retain significant completeness with regard to DC, while being faster to prove. This results in the tree search processing fifty percent more DTNU problems in R-TDC than the state-of-the-art DC solver does in DC with the same time budget. We also observe that graph neural network search guidance leads to substantial performance gains on benchmarks of more complex DTNUs, with up to eleven times more problems solved than the baseline tree search.
abstract_zh: 不确定性下的规划是人工智能感兴趣的领域。我们提出了一种基于树搜索和图机器学习的新颖方法，用于解决调度问题，称为具有不确定性的析取时序网络（DTNU）。 DTNU 的动态可控性 (DC) 寻求一种反应性调度策略来满足响应不可控动作持续时间的时间约束。我们引入了反应式调度的新语义：基于时间的动态可控性（TDC）和 TDC 的受限子集 R-TDC。我们设计了一种树搜索算法来确定 DTNU 是否是 R-TDC。此外，我们利用图神经网络作为树搜索指导的启发式方法。最后，我们在一个已知的基准上进行了实验，在该基准上我们表明 R-TDC 保留了 DC 的显着完整性，同时证明速度更快。这导致在相同的时间预算下，树搜索在 R-TDC 中处理的 DTNU 问题比最先进的 DC 求解器在 DC 中多处理 50%。我们还观察到，图神经网络搜索指导在更复杂的 DTNU 基准上带来了显着的性能提升，解决的问题比基线树搜索多了 11 倍。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合树搜索与图神经网络的新方法，用于解决存在不确定性的析取时序网络（DTNU）的调度问题。
AI.motivation: 动态可控性（DC）在处理不可控动作持续时间的时序约束时效率较低，需更高效的解决方案。
AI.method: 引入时间基动态可控性（TDC）及其受限子集R-TDC，设计树搜索算法并结合图神经网络作为启发式引导。
AI.result: R-TDC在相同时间预算下解决的DTNU问题数量是现有DC求解器的两倍，图神经网络使复杂基准测试问题解决量提升11倍。
AI.conclusion: R-TDC在保持DC完备性的前提下显著提升求解效率，图神经网络有效增强了树搜索的性能。

authors_text: Chukwuma Okolie,Julian Smit
title: A systematic review and meta-analysis of Digital Elevation Model (DEM) fusion: pre-processing, methods and applications
title_zh: 数字高程模型（DEM）融合的系统回顾和荟萃分析：预处理、方法和应用
abstract: The remote sensing community has identified data fusion as one of the key challenging topics of the 21st century. The subject of image fusion in two-dimensional (2D) space has been covered in several published reviews. However, the special case of 2.5D/3D Digital Elevation Model (DEM) fusion has not been addressed till date. DEM fusion is a key application of data fusion in remote sensing. It takes advantage of the complementary characteristics of multi-source DEMs to deliver a more complete, accurate and reliable elevation dataset. Although several methods for fusing DEMs have been developed, the absence of a well-rounded review has limited their proliferation among researchers and end-users. It is often required to combine knowledge from multiple studies to inform a holistic perspective and guide further research. In response, this paper provides a systematic review of DEM fusion: the pre-processing workflow, methods and applications, enhanced with a meta-analysis. Through the discussion and comparative analysis, unresolved challenges and open issues were identified, and future directions for research were proposed. This review is a timely solution and an invaluable source of information for researchers within the fields of remote sensing and spatial information science, and the data fusion community at large.
summary: The remote sensing community has identified data fusion as one of the key challenging topics of the 21st century. The subject of image fusion in two-dimensional (2D) space has been covered in several published reviews. However, the special case of 2.5D/3D Digital Elevation Model (DEM) fusion has not been addressed till date. DEM fusion is a key application of data fusion in remote sensing. It takes advantage of the complementary characteristics of multi-source DEMs to deliver a more complete, accurate and reliable elevation dataset. Through the discussion and comparative analysis, unresolved challenges and open issues were identified, and future directions for research were proposed. This review is a timely solution and an invaluable source of information for researchers within the fields of remote sensing and spatial information science, and the data fusion community at large.
abstract_zh: 遥感界已将数据融合确定为 21 世纪的关键挑战主题之一。二维 (2D) 空间中的图像融合主题已在多篇已发表的评论中讨论。然而，2.5D/3D 数字高程模型 (DEM) 融合的特殊情况迄今为止尚未得到解决。 DEM融合是数据融合在遥感领域的一个关键应用。它利用多源 DEM 的互补特性来提供更完整、准确和可靠的高程数据集。尽管已经开发出了多种融合 DEM 的方法，但缺乏全面的审查限制了它们在研究人员和最终用户中的普及。通常需要结合多项研究的知识来提供整体视角并指导进一步的研究。为此，本文对 DEM 融合进行了系统回顾：预处理工作流程、方法和应用，并通过荟萃分析进行了增强。通过讨论和比较分析，确定了尚未解决的挑战和未解决的问题，并提出了未来的研究方向。对于遥感和空间信息科学领域以及整个数据融合界的研究人员来说，这篇综述是一个及时的解决方案和宝贵的信息来源。

AI.tldr: 本文对数字高程模型（DEM）融合的预处理流程、方法及应用进行系统综述，并结合元分析探讨其挑战与未来方向。
AI.motivation: 现有综述多聚焦于二维图像融合，而DEM融合作为关键应用领域尚无系统总结，限制了其发展与应用，亟需全面回顾以指导后续研究。
AI.method: 通过系统综述和元分析，整合多源DEM融合的预处理流程、方法及应用，进行对比分析，识别未解决的问题。
AI.result: 识别出DEM融合中的未解挑战与开放问题，提出未来研究方向，为相关领域提供重要参考。
AI.conclusion: 本文系统填补了DEM融合研究的空白，为遥感、空间信息科学及数据融合领域提供了宝贵的参考资源。

search_text: A systematic review and meta-analysis of Digital Elevation Model (DEM) fusion: pre-processing, methods and applications 数字高程模型（DEM）融合的系统回顾和荟萃分析：预处理、方法和应用 The remote sensing community has identified data fusion as one of the key challenging topics of the 21st century. The subject of image fusion in two-dimensional (2D) space has been covered in several published reviews. However, the special case of 2.5D/3D Digital Elevation Model (DEM) fusion has not been addressed till date. DEM fusion is a key application of data fusion in remote sensing. It takes advantage of the complementary characteristics of multi-source DEMs to deliver a more complete, accurate and reliable elevation dataset. Although several methods for fusing DEMs have been developed, the absence of a well-rounded review has limited their proliferation among researchers and end-users. It is often required to combine knowledge from multiple studies to inform a holistic perspective and guide further research. In response, this paper provides a systematic review of DEM fusion: the pre-processing workflow, methods and applications, enhanced with a meta-analysis. Through the discussion and comparative analysis, unresolved challenges and open issues were identified, and future directions for research were proposed. This review is a timely solution and an invaluable source of information for researchers within the fields of remote sensing and spatial information science, and the data fusion community at large. 遥感界已将数据融合确定为 21 世纪的关键挑战主题之一。二维 (2D) 空间中的图像融合主题已在多篇已发表的评论中讨论。然而，2.5D/3D 数字高程模型 (DEM) 融合的特殊情况迄今为止尚未得到解决。 DEM融合是数据融合在遥感领域的一个关键应用。它利用多源 DEM 的互补特性来提供更完整、准确和可靠的高程数据集。尽管已经开发出了多种融合 DEM 的方法，但缺乏全面的审查限制了它们在研究人员和最终用户中的普及。通常需要结合多项研究的知识来提供整体视角并指导进一步的研究。为此，本文对 DEM 融合进行了系统回顾：预处理工作流程、方法和应用，并通过荟萃分析进行了增强。通过讨论和比较分析，确定了尚未解决的挑战和未解决的问题，并提出了未来的研究方向。对于遥感和空间信息科学领域以及整个数据融合界的研究人员来说，这篇综述是一个及时的解决方案和宝贵的信息来源。 本文对数字高程模型（DEM）融合的预处理流程、方法及应用进行系统综述，并结合元分析探讨其挑战与未来方向。 Chukwuma Okolie,Julian Smit cs.CV,eess.IV

authors_text: Guangxing Han,Jiawei Ma,Shiyuan Huang,Long Chen,Shih-Fu Chang
title: Few-Shot Object Detection with Fully Cross-Transformer
title_zh: 使用完全交叉变换器进行少样本目标检测
comment: CVPR 2022 (Oral). Code is available at https://github.com/GuangxingHan/FCT
comments: CVPR 2022 (Oral). Code is available at https://github.com/GuangxingHan/FCT
abstract: Few-shot object detection (FSOD), with the aim to detect novel objects using very few training examples, has recently attracted great research interest in the community. Metric-learning based methods have been demonstrated to be effective for this task using a two-branch based siamese network, and calculate the similarity between image regions and few-shot examples for detection. However, in previous works, the interaction between the two branches is only restricted in the detection head, while leaving the remaining hundreds of layers for separate feature extraction. Inspired by the recent work on vision transformers and vision-language transformers, we propose a novel Fully Cross-Transformer based model (FCT) for FSOD by incorporating cross-transformer into both the feature backbone and detection head. The asymmetric-batched cross-attention is proposed to aggregate the key information from the two branches with different batch sizes. Our model can improve the few-shot similarity learning between the two branches by introducing the multi-level interactions. Comprehensive experiments on both PASCAL VOC and MSCOCO FSOD benchmarks demonstrate the effectiveness of our model.
summary: Few-shot object detection (FSOD), with the aim to detect novel objects using very few training examples, has recently attracted great research interest in the community. Metric-learning based methods have been demonstrated to be effective for this task using a two-branch based siamese network, and calculate the similarity between image regions and few-shot examples for detection. However, in previous works, the interaction between the two branches is only restricted in the detection head, while leaving the remaining hundreds of layers for separate feature extraction. Inspired by the recent work on vision transformers and vision-language transformers, we propose a novel Fully Cross-Transformer based model (FCT) for FSOD by incorporating cross-transformer into both the feature backbone and detection head. The asymmetric-batched cross-attention is proposed to aggregate the key information from the two branches with different batch sizes. Our model can improve the few-shot similarity learning between the two branches by introducing the multi-level interactions. Comprehensive experiments on both PASCAL VOC and MSCOCO FSOD benchmarks demonstrate the effectiveness of our model.
abstract_zh: 小样本目标检测（FSOD）旨在使用很少的训练样本来检测新目标，最近引起了社区的极大研究兴趣。基于度量学习的方法已被证明对于使用基于两分支的暹罗网络的这项任务是有效的，并计算图像区域和少量样本之间的相似性以进行检测。然而，在之前的工作中，两个分支之间的交互仅限制在检测头中，而将剩余的数百层用于单独的特征提取。受最近关于视觉变压器和视觉语言变压器的工作的启发，我们通过将交叉变压器合并到特征主干和检测头中，提出了一种新颖的基于完全交叉变压器的 FSOD 模型（FCT）。提出了非对称批量交叉注意来聚合来自具有不同批量大小的两个分支的关键信息。我们的模型可以通过引入多级交互来改进两个分支之间的小样本相似性学习。 PASCAL VOC 和 MSCOCO FSOD 基准的综合实验证明了我们模型的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于全交叉Transformer的少样本目标检测方法（FCT），旨在通过增强两个分支间的多级交互来提升检测性能。
AI.motivation: 现有少样本目标检测方法中，两个分支的交互仅限于检测头，而特征提取层缺乏有效交互，限制了模型性能。
AI.method: 设计全交叉Transformer结构，将交叉注意力机制引入特征主干和检测头，并提出异步批处理交叉注意力以聚合不同批次的特征信息。
AI.result: 在PASCAL VOC和MSCOCO少样本检测基准测试中，FCT模型均取得优于现有方法的检测效果。
AI.conclusion: 通过多级交叉交互机制，FCT有效提升了少样本场景下目标检测的特征对齐能力与泛化性能。

authors_text: Kevin Weinberger,Aydin Sezgin
title: Sacrificing CSI for a Greater Good: RIS-enabled Opportunistic Rate Splitting
title_zh: 为了更大的利益而牺牲 CSI：RIS 支持的机会性利率分割
comment: 5 pages, 2 figures, submitted to IEEE SAM2022 Special Session on Reconfigurable Intelligent Surfaces for signal processing and communications
comments: 5 pages, 2 figures, submitted to IEEE SAM2022 Special Session on Reconfigurable Intelligent Surfaces for signal processing and communications
abstract: In reconfigurable intelligent surface (RIS)-assisted systems, the optimization of the phase shifts requires separate acquisition of the channel state information (CSI) for the direct and RIS-assisted channels, posing significant design challenges. In this paper, a novel scheme is proposed, which considers practical limitations like pilot overhead and channel estimation (CE) errors to increase the net performance. More specifically, at the cost of unpredictable interference, a portion of the CSI for the RIS-assisted channels is sacrificed in order to reduce the CE time. By alternating the CSI between coherence blocks and employing rate splitting, it becomes possible to mitigate the interference, thereby compensating the adverse effect of the sacrificed CSI. Numerical simulations validate that the proposed scheme exhibits better performance in terms of achievable net rate, resulting in gains of up to 160% compared non-orthogonal multiple access (NOMA), when CE time and CE errors are considered.
summary: In reconfigurable intelligent surface (RIS)-assisted systems, the optimization of the phase shifts requires separate acquisition of the channel state information (CSI) for the direct and RIS-assisted channels, posing significant design challenges. In this paper, a novel scheme is proposed, which considers practical limitations like pilot overhead and channel estimation (CE) errors to increase the net performance. More specifically, at the cost of unpredictable interference, a portion of the CSI for the RIS-assisted channels is sacrificed in order to reduce the CE time. By alternating the CSI between coherence blocks and employing rate splitting, it becomes possible to mitigate the interference, thereby compensating the adverse effect of the sacrificed CSI. Numerical simulations validate that the proposed scheme exhibits better performance in terms of achievable net rate, resulting in gains of up to 160% compared non-orthogonal multiple access (NOMA), when CE time and CE errors are considered.
abstract_zh: 在可重构智能表面（RIS）辅助系统中，相移的优化需要单独采集直接通道和RIS辅助通道的通道状态信息（CSI），这带来了重大的设计挑战。本文提出了一种新颖的方案，该方案考虑了导频开销和信道估计（CE）误差等实际限制，以提高网络性能。更具体地，以不可预测的干扰为代价，牺牲用于RIS辅助信道的CSI的一部分以减少CE时间。通过在相干块之间交替CSI并采用速率分割，可以减轻干扰，从而补偿牺牲的CSI的不利影响。数值模拟验证了所提出的方案在可实现的净速率方面表现出更好的性能，当考虑 CE 时间和 CE 错误时，与非正交多址 (NOMA) 相比，增益高达 160%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种利用可重构智能表面（RIS）的机遇性速率分割方案，通过牺牲部分信道状态信息（CSI）来减少信道估计时间，从而提升系统净速率。
AI.motivation: 在RIS辅助系统中，直接信道和RIS辅助信道的CSI获取需要单独进行，导致设计复杂且受导频开销和信道估计误差的限制，亟需优化CSI获取策略以提升性能。
AI.method: 通过牺牲部分RIS辅助信道的CSI以缩短信道估计时间，并在时隙间交替切换CSI，结合速率分割技术抑制干扰，补偿CSI缺失带来的负面影响。
AI.result: 数值仿真表明，该方案在考虑信道估计时间和误差的情况下，净速率较非正交多址接入（NOMA）提升高达160%。
AI.conclusion: 牺牲部分CSI并结合速率分割的策略能有效平衡干扰抑制与估计开销，显著提升RIS系统的性能。

More specifically, at the cost of unpredictable interference, a portion of the CSI for the RIS-assisted channels is sacrificed in order to reduce the CE time. By alternating the CSI between coherence blocks and employing rate splitting, it becomes possible to mitigate the interference, thereby compensating the adverse effect of the sacrificed CSI. Numerical simulations validate that the proposed scheme exhibits better performance in terms of achievable net rate, resulting in gains of up to 160% compared non-orthogonal multiple access (NOMA), when CE time and CE errors are considered. 在可重构智能表面（RIS）辅助系统中，相移的优化需要单独采集直接通道和RIS辅助通道的通道状态信息（CSI），这带来了重大的设计挑战。本文提出了一种新颖的方案，该方案考虑了导频开销和信道估计（CE）误差等实际限制，以提高网络性能。更具体地，以不可预测的干扰为代价，牺牲用于RIS辅助信道的CSI的一部分以减少CE时间。通过在相干块之间交替CSI并采用速率分割，可以减轻干扰，从而补偿牺牲的CSI的不利影响。数值模拟验证了所提出的方案在可实现的净速率方面表现出更好的性能，当考虑 CE 时间和 CE 错误时，与非正交多址 (NOMA) 相比，增益高达 160%。 本文提出了一种利用可重构智能表面（RIS）的机遇性速率分割方案，通过牺牲部分信道状态信息（CSI）来减少信道估计时间，从而提升系统净速率。 Kevin Weinberger,Aydin Sezgin cs.IT,cs.ET,eess.SP

authors_text: David Joon Ho,M. Herman Chui,Chad M. Vanderbilt,Jiwon Jung,Mark E. Robson,Chan-Sik Park,Jin Roh,Thomas J. Fuchs
title: Deep Interactive Learning-based ovarian cancer segmentation of H&E-stained whole slide images to study morphological patterns of BRCA mutation
title_zh: 基于深度交互式学习的卵巢癌对 H&E 染色的整个切片图像进行分割，以研究 BRCA 突变的形态模式
abstract: Deep learning has been widely used to analyze digitized hematoxylin and eosin (H&E)-stained histopathology whole slide images. Automated cancer segmentation using deep learning can be used to diagnose malignancy and to find novel morphological patterns to predict molecular subtypes. To train pixel-wise cancer segmentation models, manual annotation from pathologists is generally a bottleneck due to its time-consuming nature. In this paper, we propose Deep Interactive Learning with a pretrained segmentation model from a different cancer type to reduce manual annotation time. Instead of annotating all pixels from cancer and non-cancer regions on giga-pixel whole slide images, an iterative process of annotating mislabeled regions from a segmentation model and training/finetuning the model with the additional annotation can reduce the time. Especially, employing a pretrained segmentation model can further reduce the time than starting annotation from scratch. We trained an accurate ovarian cancer segmentation model with a pretrained breast segmentation model by 3.5 hours of manual annotation which achieved intersection-over-union of 0.74, recall of 0.86, and precision of 0.84. With automatically extracted high-grade serous ovarian cancer patches, we attempted to train another deep learning model to predict BRCA mutation. The segmentation model and code have been released at https://github.com/MSKCC-Computational-Pathology/DMMN-ovary.
summary: Deep learning has been widely used to analyze digitized hematoxylin and eosin (H&E)-stained histopathology whole slide images. Especially, employing a pretrained segmentation model can further reduce the time than starting annotation from scratch. We trained an accurate ovarian cancer segmentation model with a pretrained breast segmentation model by 3.5 hours of manual annotation which achieved intersection-over-union of 0.74, recall of 0.86, and precision of 0.84. With automatically extracted high-grade serous ovarian cancer patches, we attempted to train another deep learning model to predict BRCA mutation. The segmentation model and code have been released at https://github.com/MSKCC-Computational-Pathology/DMMN-ovary.
abstract_zh: 深度学习已被广​​泛用于分析数字化苏木精和伊红 (H&E) 染色的组织病理学全玻片图像。使用深度学习的自动癌症分割可用于诊断恶性肿瘤并寻找新的形态模式来预测分子亚型。为了训练逐像素癌症分割模型，病理学家的手动注释由于其耗时的性质通常是一个瓶颈。在本文中，我们提出深度交互式学习，使用来自不同癌症类型的预训练分割模型来减少手动注释时间。无需对千兆像素整个幻灯片图像上的癌症和非癌症区域的所有像素进行注释，而是从分割模型中注释错误标记的区域并使用附加注释训练/微调模型的迭代过程可以减少时间。特别是，采用预训练的分割模型比从头开始注释可以进一步减少时间。我们通过 3.5 小时的手动注释，使用预训练的乳房分割模型训练了准确的卵巢癌分割模型，实现了 0.74 的交叉联合、0.86 的召回率和 0.84 的精度。通过自动提取的高级浆液性卵巢癌斑块，我们尝试训练另一个深度学习模型来预测 BRCA 突变。分割模型和代码已发布在https://github.com/MSKCC-Computational-Pathology/DMMN-ovary。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于深度交互学习的卵巢癌分割方法，用于研究BRCA突变相关的组织形态学模式。
AI.motivation: 全切片病理图像的像素级分割需要大量人工标注，耗时且成本高。利用预训练模型可减少标注时间，提高效率。
AI.method: 采用预训练的乳腺癌分割模型作为初始模型，通过交互式标注修正错误区域并迭代微调，结合自动提取的高级别浆液性卵巢癌图像块训练BRCA突变预测模型。
AI.result: 仅需3.5小时人工标注即可获得交并比0.74、召回率0.86、精确率0.84的分割效果，并成功构建BRCA突变预测模型。
AI.conclusion: 该方法显著降低人工标注需求，实现高效卵巢癌分割与BRCA突变模式分析，代码已开源供研究使用。

authors_text: Heming Zhu,Lingteng Qiu,Yuda Qiu,Xiaoguang Han
title: Registering Explicit to Implicit: Towards High-Fidelity Garment mesh Reconstruction from Single Images
title_zh: 显式配准到隐式：从单幅图像实现高保真服装网格重建
comment: CVPR 2022, For project page, please see: https://kv2000.github.io/2022/03/28/reef/
comments: CVPR 2022, For project page, please see: https://kv2000.github.io/2022/03/28/reef/
abstract: Fueled by the power of deep learning techniques and implicit shape learning, recent advances in single-image human digitalization have reached unprecedented accuracy and could recover fine-grained surface details such as garment wrinkles. However, a common problem for the implicit-based methods is that they cannot produce separated and topology-consistent mesh for each garment piece, which is crucial for the current 3D content creation pipeline. To address this issue, we proposed a novel geometry inference framework ReEF that reconstructs topology-consistent layered garment mesh by registering the explicit garment template to the whole-body implicit fields predicted from single images. Experiments demonstrate that our method notably outperforms its counterparts on single-image layered garment reconstruction and could bring high-quality digital assets for further content creation.
summary: Fueled by the power of deep learning techniques and implicit shape learning, recent advances in single-image human digitalization have reached unprecedented accuracy and could recover fine-grained surface details such as garment wrinkles. However, a common problem for the implicit-based methods is that they cannot produce separated and topology-consistent mesh for each garment piece, which is crucial for the current 3D content creation pipeline. To address this issue, we proposed a novel geometry inference framework ReEF that reconstructs topology-consistent layered garment mesh by registering the explicit garment template to the whole-body implicit fields predicted from single images. Experiments demonstrate that our method notably outperforms its counterparts on single-image layered garment reconstruction and could bring high-quality digital assets for further content creation.
abstract_zh: 在深度学习技术和隐式形状学习的推动下，单图像人体数字化的最新进展已经达到了前所未有的精度，并且可以恢复细粒度的表面细节，例如衣服皱纹。然而，基于隐式方法的一个常见问题是它们无法为每件服装生成分离且拓扑一致的网格，这对于当前的 3D 内容创建流程至关重要。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种新颖的几何推理框架 ReEF，通过将显式服装模板注册到从单个图像预测的全身隐式场来重建拓扑一致的分层服装网格。实验表明，我们的方法在单图像分层服装重建方面明显优于同类方法，并且可以为进一步的内容创建带来高质量的数字资产。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种从单张图像高保真重建服装网格的新方法，解决隐式方法无法生成拓扑一致网格的问题。
AI.motivation: 隐式形状学习虽能恢复服装细节，但无法生成分离且拓扑一致的分层服装网格，难以满足3D内容制作流程需求。
AI.method: 提出ReEF框架，通过将显式服装模板注册到单图像预测的全身隐式场中，实现拓扑一致的分层网格重建。
AI.result: 在单图像分层服装重建任务中显著优于现有方法，生成高质量可应用于内容创作的数字资产。
AI.conclusion: ReEF框架有效结合显式模板与隐式场优势，为3D服装重建提供了拓扑一致且高保真的解决方案。

authors_text: Danfeng Wang,Xin Ma,Xiaodong Yang
title: TL-GAN: Improving Traffic Light Recognition via Data Synthesis for Autonomous Driving
title_zh: TL-GAN：通过自动驾驶数据合成改进交通灯识别
abstract: Traffic light recognition, as a critical component of the perception module of self-driving vehicles, plays a vital role in the intelligent transportation systems. The prevalent deep learning based traffic light recognition methods heavily hinge on the large quantity and rich diversity of training data. However, it is quite challenging to collect data in various rare scenarios such as flashing, blackout or extreme weather, thus resulting in the imbalanced distribution of training data and consequently the degraded performance in recognizing rare classes. In this paper, we seek to improve traffic light recognition by leveraging data synthesis. Inspired by the generative adversarial networks (GANs), we propose a novel traffic light generation approach TL-GAN to synthesize the data of rare classes to improve traffic light recognition for autonomous driving. TL-GAN disentangles traffic light sequence generation into image synthesis and sequence assembling. In the image synthesis stage, our approach enables conditional generation to allow full control of the color of the generated traffic light images. In the sequence assembling stage, we design the style mixing and adaptive template to synthesize realistic and diverse traffic light sequences. Extensive experiments show that the proposed TL-GAN renders remarkable improvement over the baseline without using the generated data, leading to the state-of-the-art performance in comparison with the competing algorithms that are used for general image synthesis and data imbalance tackling.
summary: Traffic light recognition, as a critical component of the perception module of self-driving vehicles, plays a vital role in the intelligent transportation systems. The prevalent deep learning based traffic light recognition methods heavily hinge on the large quantity and rich diversity of training data. However, it is quite challenging to collect data in various rare scenarios such as flashing, blackout or extreme weather, thus resulting in the imbalanced distribution of training data and consequently the degraded performance in recognizing rare classes. In this paper, we seek to improve traffic light recognition by leveraging data synthesis. Inspired by the generative adversarial networks (GANs), we propose a novel traffic light generation approach TL-GAN to synthesize the data of rare classes to improve traffic light recognition for autonomous driving. TL-GAN disentangles traffic light sequence generation into image synthesis and sequence assembling. In the image synthesis stage, our approach enables conditional generation to allow full control of the color of the generated traffic light images. In the sequence assembling stage, we design the style mixing and adaptive template to synthesize realistic and diverse traffic light sequences. Extensive experiments show that the proposed TL-GAN renders remarkable improvement over the baseline without using the generated data, leading to the state-of-the-art performance in comparison with the competing algorithms that are used for general image synthesis and data imbalance tackling.
abstract_zh: 交通信号灯识别作为自动驾驶汽车感知模块的关键组成部分，在智能交通系统中发挥着至关重要的作用。流行的基于深度学习的交通灯识别方法在很大程度上取决于训练数据的大量和丰富的多样性。然而，在闪烁、停电或极端天气等各种罕见场景下收集数据非常具有挑战性，从而导致训练数据分布不平衡，从而导致识别稀有类别的性能下降。在本文中，我们寻求通过利用数据合成来改进交通灯识别。受生成对抗网络（GAN）的启发，我们提出了一种新颖的交通灯生成方法 TL-GAN 来合成稀有类别的数据，以改善自动驾驶的交通灯识别。 TL-GAN 将交通灯序列生成分解为图像合成和序列组装。在图像合成阶段，我们的方法可以进行条件生成，以完全控制生成的交通灯图像的颜色。在序列组装阶段，我们设计了风格混合和自适应模板来合成真实且多样化的交通灯序列。大量实验表明，所提出的 TL-GAN 在不使用生成数据的情况下比基线有了显着改进，与用于一般图像合成和数据不平衡处理的竞争算法相比，具有最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出TL-GAN方法，通过生成对抗网络合成罕见交通灯场景数据，提升自动驾驶中的交通灯识别性能。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习交通灯识别方法依赖大量多样化数据，但罕见场景（如闪烁、极端天气）数据难以采集，导致类别分布不均衡和识别性能下降。
AI.method: TL-GAN将交通灯序列生成分解为图像合成与序列组装两阶段，通过条件生成控制颜色，结合风格混合与自适应模板生成多样真实序列。
AI.result: 实验表明TL-GAN在不使用生成数据时优于基线方法，在交通灯识别任务中达到优于通用图像合成及数据不平衡处理算法的最先进水平。
AI.conclusion: TL-GAN通过合成罕见场景数据有效缓解类别不平衡问题，显著提升自动驾驶系统对罕见交通灯状态的识别能力。

search_text: TL-GAN: Improving Traffic Light Recognition via Data Synthesis for Autonomous Driving TL-GAN：通过自动驾驶数据合成改进交通灯识别 Traffic light recognition, as a critical component of the perception module of self-driving vehicles, plays a vital role in the intelligent transportation systems. The prevalent deep learning based traffic light recognition methods heavily hinge on the large quantity and rich diversity of training data. However, it is quite challenging to collect data in various rare scenarios such as flashing, blackout or extreme weather, thus resulting in the imbalanced distribution of training data and consequently the degraded performance in recognizing rare classes. In this paper, we seek to improve traffic light recognition by leveraging data synthesis. Inspired by the generative adversarial networks (GANs), we propose a novel traffic light generation approach TL-GAN to synthesize the data of rare classes to improve traffic light recognition for autonomous driving. TL-GAN disentangles traffic light sequence generation into image synthesis and sequence assembling. In the image synthesis stage, our approach enables conditional generation to allow full control of the color of the generated traffic light images. In the sequence assembling stage, we design the style mixing and adaptive template to synthesize realistic and diverse traffic light sequences. Extensive experiments show that the proposed TL-GAN renders remarkable improvement over the baseline without using the generated data, leading to the state-of-the-art performance in comparison with the competing algorithms that are used for general image synthesis and data imbalance tackling. 交通信号灯识别作为自动驾驶汽车感知模块的关键组成部分，在智能交通系统中发挥着至关重要的作用。流行的基于深度学习的交通灯识别方法在很大程度上取决于训练数据的大量和丰富的多样性。然而，在闪烁、停电或极端天气等各种罕见场景下收集数据非常具有挑战性，从而导致训练数据分布不平衡，从而导致识别稀有类别的性能下降。在本文中，我们寻求通过利用数据合成来改进交通灯识别。受生成对抗网络（GAN）的启发，我们提出了一种新颖的交通灯生成方法 TL-GAN 来合成稀有类别的数据，以改善自动驾驶的交通灯识别。 TL-GAN 将交通灯序列生成分解为图像合成和序列组装。在图像合成阶段，我们的方法可以进行条件生成，以完全控制生成的交通灯图像的颜色。在序列组装阶段，我们设计了风格混合和自适应模板来合成真实且多样化的交通灯序列。大量实验表明，所提出的 TL-GAN 在不使用生成数据的情况下比基线有了显着改进，与用于一般图像合成和数据不平衡处理的竞争算法相比，具有最先进的性能。 本文提出TL-GAN方法，通过生成对抗网络合成罕见交通灯场景数据，提升自动驾驶中的交通灯识别性能。 Danfeng Wang,Xin Ma,Xiaodong Yang cs.CV

authors_text: Changhao Wang,Yuyou Zhang,Xiang Zhang,Zheng Wu,Xinghao Zhu,Shiyu Jin,Te Tang,Masayoshi Tomizuka
title: Offline-Online Learning of Deformation Model for Cable Manipulation with Graph Neural Networks
title_zh: 图神经网络电缆操纵变形模型的离线在线学习
abstract: Manipulating deformable linear objects by robots has a wide range of applications, e.g., manufacturing and medical surgery. To complete such tasks, an accurate dynamics model for predicting the deformation is critical for robust control. In this work, we deal with this challenge by proposing a hybrid offline-online method to learn the dynamics of cables in a robust and data-efficient manner. In the offline phase, we adopt Graph Neural Network (GNN) to learn the deformation dynamics purely from the simulation data. Then a linear residual model is learned in real-time to bridge the sim-to-real gap. The learned model is then utilized as the dynamics constraint of a trust region based Model Predictive Controller (MPC) to calculate the optimal robot movements. The online learning and MPC run in a closed-loop manner to robustly accomplish the task. Finally, comparative results with existing methods are provided to quantitatively show the effectiveness and robustness.
summary: Manipulating deformable linear objects by robots has a wide range of applications, e.g., manufacturing and medical surgery. To complete such tasks, an accurate dynamics model for predicting the deformation is critical for robust control. In this work, we deal with this challenge by proposing a hybrid offline-online method to learn the dynamics of cables in a robust and data-efficient manner. In the offline phase, we adopt Graph Neural Network (GNN) to learn the deformation dynamics purely from the simulation data. Then a linear residual model is learned in real-time to bridge the sim-to-real gap. The learned model is then utilized as the dynamics constraint of a trust region based Model Predictive Controller (MPC) to calculate the optimal robot movements. The online learning and MPC run in a closed-loop manner to robustly accomplish the task. Finally, comparative results with existing methods are provided to quantitatively show the effectiveness and robustness.
abstract_zh: 通过机器人操纵可变形线性物体具有广泛的应用，例如制造和医疗手术。为了完成此类任务，用于预测变形的精确动力学模型对于鲁棒控制至关重要。在这项工作中，我们通过提出一种混合离线在线方法来应对这一挑战，以稳健且数据高效的方式学习电缆的动态。在离线阶段，我们采用图神经网络（GNN）纯粹从模拟数据中学习变形动力学。然后实时学习线性残差模型以弥补模拟与真实的差距。然后，将学习到的模型用作基于信任域的模型预测控制器（MPC）的动态约束，以计算最佳机器人运动。在线学习和MPC闭环运行，稳健地完成任务。最后，提供与现有方法的比较结果，以定量显示有效性和鲁棒性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合离线与在线学习的混合方法，利用图神经网络（GNN）学习电缆变形动力学模型，以提升机器人对可变形线性物体的操控能力。
AI.motivation: 机器人操控可变形物体（如电缆）在工业和医疗领域具有重要意义，但现有方法在数据效率和仿真到现实的迁移鲁棒性方面存在不足。
AI.method: 离线阶段通过GNN从仿真数据中学习电缆变形动力学；在线阶段实时学习线性残差模型以弥合仿真与现实差距，并将该模型作为基于信任区域的模型预测控制器（MPC）的动力学约束，实现闭环控制。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，与现有方法相比，该方法在任务完成效率和鲁棒性方面具有显著优势。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的混合学习框架有效解决了电缆操控中的动力学建模难题，为可变形物体的精确控制提供了新思路。

search_text: Offline-Online Learning of Deformation Model for Cable Manipulation with Graph Neural Networks 图神经网络电缆操纵变形模型的离线在线学习 Manipulating deformable linear objects by robots has a wide range of applications, e.g., manufacturing and medical surgery.
