The online learning and MPC run in a closed-loop manner to robustly accomplish the task. Finally, comparative results with existing methods are provided to quantitatively show the effectiveness and robustness. 通过机器人操纵可变形线性物体具有广泛的应用，例如制造和医疗手术。为了完成此类任务，用于预测变形的精确动力学模型对于鲁棒控制至关重要。在这项工作中，我们通过提出一种混合离线在线方法来应对这一挑战，以稳健且数据高效的方式学习电缆的动态。在离线阶段，我们采用图神经网络（GNN）纯粹从模拟数据中学习变形动力学。然后实时学习线性残差模型以弥补模拟与真实的差距。然后，将学习到的模型用作基于信任域的模型预测控制器（MPC）的动态约束，以计算最佳机器人运动。在线学习和MPC闭环运行，稳健地完成任务。最后，提供与现有方法的比较结果，以定量显示有效性和鲁棒性。 本文提出了一种结合离线与在线学习的混合方法，利用图神经网络（GNN）学习电缆变形动力学模型，以提升机器人对可变形线性物体的操控能力。 Changhao Wang,Yuyou Zhang,Xiang Zhang,Zheng Wu,Xinghao Zhu,Shiyu Jin,Te Tang,Masayoshi Tomizuka cs.RO

authors_text: Zijie Huang,Zheng Li,Haoming Jiang,Tianyu Cao,Hanqing Lu,Bing Yin,Karthik Subbian,Yizhou Sun,Wei Wang
title: Multilingual Knowledge Graph Completion with Self-Supervised Adaptive Graph Alignment
title_zh: 通过自监督自适应图对齐完成多语言知识图
abstract: Predicting missing facts in a knowledge graph (KG) is crucial as modern KGs are far from complete. Due to labor-intensive human labeling, this phenomenon deteriorates when handling knowledge represented in various languages. In this paper, we explore multilingual KG completion, which leverages limited seed alignment as a bridge, to embrace the collective knowledge from multiple languages. However, language alignment used in prior works is still not fully exploited: (1) alignment pairs are treated equally to maximally push parallel entities to be close, which ignores KG capacity inconsistency; (2) seed alignment is scarce and new alignment identification is usually in a noisily unsupervised manner. To tackle these issues, we propose a novel self-supervised adaptive graph alignment (SS-AGA) method. Specifically, SS-AGA fuses all KGs as a whole graph by regarding alignment as a new edge type. As such, information propagation and noise influence across KGs can be adaptively controlled via relation-aware attention weights. Meanwhile, SS-AGA features a new pair generator that dynamically captures potential alignment pairs in a self-supervised paradigm. Extensive experiments on both the public multilingual DBPedia KG and newly-created industrial multilingual E-commerce KG empirically demonstrate the effectiveness of SS-AG
summary: Predicting missing facts in a knowledge graph (KG) is crucial as modern KGs are far from complete. Due to labor-intensive human labeling, this phenomenon deteriorates when handling knowledge represented in various languages. In this paper, we explore multilingual KG completion, which leverages limited seed alignment as a bridge, to embrace the collective knowledge from multiple languages. However, language alignment used in prior works is still not fully exploited: (1) alignment pairs are treated equally to maximally push parallel entities to be close, which ignores KG capacity inconsistency; (2) seed alignment is scarce and new alignment identification is usually in a noisily unsupervised manner. To tackle these issues, we propose a novel self-supervised adaptive graph alignment (SS-AGA) method. Specifically, SS-AGA fuses all KGs as a whole graph by regarding alignment as a new edge type. As such, information propagation and noise influence across KGs can be adaptively controlled via relation-aware attention weights. Meanwhile, SS-AGA features a new pair generator that dynamically captures potential alignment pairs in a self-supervised paradigm. Extensive experiments on both the public multilingual DBPedia KG and newly-created industrial multilingual E-commerce KG empirically demonstrate the effectiveness of SS-AG
abstract_zh: 预测知识图谱 (KG) 中缺失的事实至关重要，因为现代知识图谱远未完成。由于劳动密集型的人工标记，这种现象在处理以各种语言表示的知识时会恶化。在本文中，我们探索多语言知识图谱补全，它利用有限的种子对齐作为桥梁，以拥抱来自多种语言的集体知识。然而，先前工作中使用的语言对齐仍然没有得到充分利用：（1）对齐对被平等对待，最大限度地推动并行实体接近，这忽略了KG容量不一致； (2)种子比对稀缺，并且新的比对识别通常以无监督的方式进行。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一种新颖的自监督自适应图对齐（SS-AGA）方法。具体来说，SS-AGA通过将对齐视为一种新的边类型，将所有KG融合为一个整体图。因此，知识图谱之间的信息传播和噪声影响可以通过关系感知注意力权重进行自适应控制。同时，SS-AGA 具有一个新的对生成器，可以在自我监督的范例中动态捕获潜在的对齐对。在公共多语言 DBPedia KG 和新创建的工业多语言电子商务 KG 上进行的大量实验实证证明了 SS-AG 的有效性

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种自监督自适应图对齐方法（SS-AGA），用于解决多语言知识图谱补全中的对齐不一致和种子对齐稀缺问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理多语言知识图谱时，未充分考虑语言间知识容量差异，且依赖稀疏的种子对齐，导致新对齐识别存在噪声。
AI.method: 将所有知识图谱融合为整体图，通过关系感知注意力机制控制信息传播与噪声影响，并设计自监督的潜在对齐对生成器。
AI.result: 在多语言DBPedia和工业电商知识图谱上的实验验证了SS-AGA在补全任务中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: SS-AGA通过自适应对齐机制和自监督学习，有效解决了多语言知识图谱补全中的关键挑战。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种自监督自适应图对齐方法（SS-AGA），用于解决多语言知识图谱补全中的对齐不一致和种子对齐稀缺问题。
ai_content.motivation: 现有方法在处理多语言知识图谱时，未充分考虑语言间知识容量差异，且依赖稀疏的种子对齐，导致新对齐识别存在噪声。
ai_content.method: 将所有知识图谱融合为整体图，通过关系感知注意力机制控制信息传播与噪声影响，并设计自监督的潜在对齐对生成器。
ai_content.result: 在多语言DBPedia和工业电商知识图谱上的实验验证了SS-AGA在补全任务中的有效性。
ai_content.conclusion: SS-AGA通过自适应对齐机制和自监督学习，有效解决了多语言知识图谱补全中的关键挑战。

search_text: Multilingual Knowledge Graph Completion with Self-Supervised Adaptive Graph Alignment 通过自监督自适应图对齐完成多语言知识图 Predicting missing facts in a knowledge graph (KG) is crucial as modern KGs are far from complete. Due to labor-intensive human labeling, this phenomenon deteriorates when handling knowledge represented in various languages. In this paper, we explore multilingual KG completion, which leverages limited seed alignment as a bridge, to embrace the collective knowledge from multiple languages. However, language alignment used in prior works is still not fully exploited: (1) alignment pairs are treated equally to maximally push parallel entities to be close, which ignores KG capacity inconsistency; (2) seed alignment is scarce and new alignment identification is usually in a noisily unsupervised manner. To tackle these issues, we propose a novel self-supervised adaptive graph alignment (SS-AGA) method. Specifically, SS-AGA fuses all KGs as a whole graph by regarding alignment as a new edge type. As such, information propagation and noise influence across KGs can be adaptively controlled via relation-aware attention weights. Meanwhile, SS-AGA features a new pair generator that dynamically captures potential alignment pairs in a self-supervised paradigm. Extensive experiments on both the public multilingual DBPedia KG and newly-created industrial multilingual E-commerce KG empirically demonstrate the effectiveness of SS-AG 预测知识图谱 (KG) 中缺失的事实至关重要，因为现代知识图谱远未完成。由于劳动密集型的人工标记，这种现象在处理以各种语言表示的知识时会恶化。在本文中，我们探索多语言知识图谱补全，它利用有限的种子对齐作为桥梁，以拥抱来自多种语言的集体知识。然而，先前工作中使用的语言对齐仍然没有得到充分利用：（1）对齐对被平等对待，最大限度地推动并行实体接近，这忽略了KG容量不一致； (2)种子比对稀缺，并且新的比对识别通常以无监督的方式进行。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一种新颖的自监督自适应图对齐（SS-AGA）方法。具体来说，SS-AGA通过将对齐视为一种新的边类型，将所有KG融合为一个整体图。因此，知识图谱之间的信息传播和噪声影响可以通过关系感知注意力权重进行自适应控制。同时，SS-AGA 具有一个新的对生成器，可以在自我监督的范例中动态捕获潜在的对齐对。在公共多语言 DBPedia KG 和新创建的工业多语言电子商务 KG 上进行的大量实验实证证明了 SS-AG 的有效性 本文提出一种自监督自适应图对齐方法（SS-AGA），用于解决多语言知识图谱补全中的对齐不一致和种子对齐稀缺问题。 Zijie Huang,Zheng Li,Haoming Jiang,Tianyu Cao,Hanqing Lu,Bing Yin,Karthik Subbian,Yizhou Sun,Wei Wang cs.AI,cs.CL

authors_text: Yoni Choukroun,Lior Wolf
title: Error Correction Code Transformer
title_zh: 纠错码变压器
abstract: Error correction code is a major part of the communication physical layer, ensuring the reliable transfer of data over noisy channels. Recently, neural decoders were shown to outperform classical decoding techniques. However, the existing neural approaches present strong overfitting due to the exponential training complexity, or a restrictive inductive bias due to reliance on Belief Propagation. Recently, Transformers have become methods of choice in many applications thanks to their ability to represent complex interactions between elements. In this work, we propose to extend for the first time the Transformer architecture to the soft decoding of linear codes at arbitrary block lengths. We encode each channel's output dimension to high dimension for better representation of the bits information to be processed separately. The element-wise processing allows the analysis of the channel output reliability, while the algebraic code and the interaction between the bits are inserted into the model via an adapted masked self-attention module. The proposed approach demonstrates the extreme power and flexibility of Transformers and outperforms existing state-of-the-art neural decoders by large margins at a fraction of their time complexity.
summary: Error correction code is a major part of the communication physical layer, ensuring the reliable transfer of data over noisy channels. Recently, neural decoders were shown to outperform classical decoding techniques. However, the existing neural approaches present strong overfitting due to the exponential training complexity, or a restrictive inductive bias due to reliance on Belief Propagation. Recently, Transformers have become methods of choice in many applications thanks to their ability to represent complex interactions between elements. In this work, we propose to extend for the first time the Transformer architecture to the soft decoding of linear codes at arbitrary block lengths. We encode each channel's output dimension to high dimension for better representation of the bits information to be processed separately. The element-wise processing allows the analysis of the channel output reliability, while the algebraic code and the interaction between the bits are inserted into the model via an adapted masked self-attention module. The proposed approach demonstrates the extreme power and flexibility of Transformers and outperforms existing state-of-the-art neural decoders by large margins at a fraction of their time complexity.
abstract_zh: 纠错码是通信物理层的主要部分，确保数据在噪声信道上的可靠传输。最近，神经解码器被证明优于经典解码技术。然而，由于指数训练复杂性，现有的神经方法存在严重的过度拟合，或者由于依赖信念传播而出现限制性归纳偏差。最近，由于 Transformer 能够表示元素之间复杂的交互，因此已成为许多应用程序的首选方法。在这项工作中，我们建议首次将 Transformer 架构扩展到任意块长度的线性码的软解码。我们将每个通道的输出维度编码为高维度，以便更好地表示要单独处理的位信息。逐元素处理允许分析通道输出可靠性，而代数代码和位之间的交互通过自适应屏蔽自注意力模块插入到模型中。所提出的方法展示了 Transformer 的强大功能和灵活性，并且在时间复杂度的一小部分的情况下大幅优于现有最先进的神经解码器。

AI.tldr: 本文提出将Transformer架构应用于线性码的软解码，解决传统神经解码器的过拟合和归纳偏差问题。
AI.motivation: 现有神经解码器因指数级训练复杂度导致过拟合，或依赖信念传播造成归纳偏差，难以高效处理任意长度码元。
AI.method: 通过高维编码增强信道输出表示，结合改进的掩码自注意力模块建模代数码约束与比特间交互关系。
AI.result: 新方法在保持极低时间复杂度的同时，显著优于现有最先进神经解码器的性能。
AI.conclusion: Transformer架构展现出处理纠错解码任务的强大灵活性与表达能力，为通信物理层设计提供新方向。

authors_text: Maciej Świechowski
title: Deep Learning and Artificial General Intelligence: Still a Long Way to Go
title_zh: 深度学习和通用人工智能：还有很长的路要走
comment: Accepted as a poster at 3rd Polish Conference on Artificial Intelligence (PP-RAI'2022)
comments: Accepted as a poster at 3rd Polish Conference on Artificial Intelligence (PP-RAI'2022)
abstract: In recent years, deep learning using neural network architecture, i.e. deep neural networks, has been on the frontier of computer science research. It has even lead to superhuman performance in some problems, e.g., in computer vision, games and biology, and as a result the term deep learning revolution was coined. The undisputed success and rapid growth of deep learning suggests that, in future, it might become an enabler for Artificial General Intelligence (AGI). In this article, we approach this statement critically showing five major reasons of why deep neural networks, as of the current state, are not ready to be the technique of choice for reaching AGI.
summary: In recent years, deep learning using neural network architecture, i.e. deep neural networks, has been on the frontier of computer science research. It has even lead to superhuman performance in some problems, e.g., in computer vision, games and biology, and as a result the term deep learning revolution was coined. The undisputed success and rapid growth of deep learning suggests that, in future, it might become an enabler for Artificial General Intelligence (AGI). In this article, we approach this statement critically showing five major reasons of why deep neural networks, as of the current state, are not ready to be the technique of choice for reaching AGI.
abstract_zh: 近年来，利用神经网络架构的深度学习，即深度神经网络，一直处于计算机科学研究的前沿。它甚至在计算机视觉、游戏和生物学等一些问题上带来了超人的表现，因此创造了“深度学习革命”这个术语。深度学习无可争议的成功和快速发展表明，未来它可能成为通用人工智能（AGI）的推动者。在本文中，我们批判性地阐述了深度神经网络在当前状态下尚未准备好成为实现 AGI 的首选技术的五个主要原因。

AI.tldr: 本文批判性地分析深度学习是否能成为实现人工通用智能（AGI）的关键技术，并指出当前深度神经网络的不足
AI.motivation: 尽管深度学习在多个领域取得成功，但作者认为其当前状态不足以支持AGI，因此需要探讨其局限性
AI.method: 通过批判性分析和列举五个关键限制因素，评估深度神经网络在实现AGI中的可行性
AI.result: 论文指出当前深度神经网络存在五个主要限制，无法作为实现AGI的首选技术
AI.conclusion: 结论认为深度学习在达到AGI方面仍有重大挑战，需进一步研究与改进

authors_text: Davood Karimi,Caitlin K. Rollins,Clemente Velasco-Annis,Abdelhakim Ouaalam,Ali Gholipour
title: Learning to segment fetal brain tissue from noisy annotations
title_zh: 学习从嘈杂的注释中分割胎儿脑组织
abstract: Automatic fetal brain tissue segmentation can enhance the quantitative assessment of brain development at this critical stage. Deep learning methods represent the state of the art in medical image segmentation and have also achieved impressive results in brain segmentation. However, effective training of a deep learning model to perform this task requires a large number of training images to represent the rapid development of the transient fetal brain structures. On the other hand, manual multi-label segmentation of a large number of 3D images is prohibitive. To address this challenge, we segmented 272 training images, covering 19-39 gestational weeks, using an automatic multi-atlas segmentation strategy based on deformable registration and probabilistic atlas fusion, and manually corrected large errors in those segmentations. Since this process generated a large training dataset with noisy segmentations, we developed a novel label smoothing procedure and a loss function to train a deep learning model with smoothed noisy segmentations. Our proposed methods properly account for the uncertainty in tissue boundaries. We evaluated our method on 23 manually-segmented test images of a separate set of fetuses. Results show that our method achieves an average Dice similarity coefficient of 0.893 and 0.916 for the transient structures of younger and older fetuses, respectively. Our method generated results that were significantly more accurate than several state-of-the-art methods including nnU-Net that achieved the closest results to our method. Our trained model can serve as a valuable tool to enhance the accuracy and reproducibility of fetal brain analysis in MRI.
summary: Automatic fetal brain tissue segmentation can enhance the quantitative assessment of brain development at this critical stage. Deep learning methods represent the state of the art in medical image segmentation and have also achieved impressive results in brain segmentation. However, effective training of a deep learning model to perform this task requires a large number of training images to represent the rapid development of the transient fetal brain structures. On the other hand, manual multi-label segmentation of a large number of 3D images is prohibitive. To address this challenge, we segmented 272 training images, covering 19-39 gestational weeks, using an automatic multi-atlas segmentation strategy based on deformable registration and probabilistic atlas fusion, and manually corrected large errors in those segmentations. Since this process generated a large training dataset with noisy segmentations, we developed a novel label smoothing procedure and a loss function to train a deep learning model with smoothed noisy segmentations. Our proposed methods properly account for the uncertainty in tissue boundaries. We evaluated our method on 23 manually-segmented test images of a separate set of fetuses. Results show that our method achieves an average Dice similarity coefficient of 0.893 and 0.916 for the transient structures of younger and older fetuses, respectively. Our method generated results that were significantly more accurate than several state-of-the-art methods including nnU-Net that achieved the closest results to our method. Our trained model can serve as a valuable tool to enhance the accuracy and reproducibility of fetal brain analysis in MRI.
abstract_zh: 自动胎儿脑组织分割可以增强对这一关键阶段大脑发育的定量评估。深度学习方法代表了医学图像分割的最先进水平，并且在大脑分割方面也取得了令人印象深刻的成果。然而，有效训练深度学习模型来执行此任务需要大量训练图像来表示瞬态胎儿大脑结构的快速发育。另一方面，大量 3D 图像的手动多标签分割是令人望而却步的。为了应对这一挑战，我们使用基于可变形配准和概率图谱融合的自动多图谱分割策略，对涵盖 19-39 孕周的 272 个训练图像进行了分割，并手动纠正了这些分割中的大错误。由于此过程生成了具有噪声分割的大型训练数据集，因此我们开发了一种新颖的标签平滑程序和损失函数来训练具有平滑噪声分割的深度学习模型。我们提出的方法正确地考虑了组织边界的不确定性。我们在一组单独胎儿的 23 张手动分割的测试图像上评估了我们的方法。结果表明，我们的方法对于年轻和年长胎儿的瞬时结构的平均 Dice 相似系数分别为 0.893 和 0.916。我们的方法生成的结果比几种最先进的方法（包括 nnU-Net）更准确，它获得了与我们的方法最接近的结果。我们训练有素的模型可以作为一个有价值的工具来提高 MRI 中胎儿大脑分析的准确性和可重复性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种从噪声标注中学习分割胎儿脑组织的深度学习方法，以解决胎儿大脑发育定量评估中的挑战。
AI.motivation: 胎儿脑组织分割需要大量标注数据，但手动分割成本高且难以覆盖快速发育的脑结构，现有方法在处理噪声标注时效果有限。
AI.method: 采用自动多图集分割生成272张训练图像并手动修正错误，设计标签平滑技术和定制损失函数以处理噪声标注，训练深度学习模型。
AI.result: 在23张独立测试图像上，方法对年轻和年长胎儿的瞬时结构分别达到0.893和0.916的Dice相似系数，显著优于包括nnU-Net在内的现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效提升了胎儿脑MRI分析的准确性与可重复性，为脑发育研究提供了可靠工具。

search_text: Learning to segment fetal brain tissue from noisy annotations 学习从嘈杂的注释中分割胎儿脑组织 Automatic fetal brain tissue segmentation can enhance the quantitative assessment of brain development at this critical stage. Deep learning methods represent the state of the art in medical image segmentation and have also achieved impressive results in brain segmentation. However, effective training of a deep learning model to perform this task requires a large number of training images to represent the rapid development of the transient fetal brain structures. On the other hand, manual multi-label segmentation of a large number of 3D images is prohibitive. To address this challenge, we segmented 272 training images, covering 19-39 gestational weeks, using an automatic multi-atlas segmentation strategy based on deformable registration and probabilistic atlas fusion, and manually corrected large errors in those segmentations. Since this process generated a large training dataset with noisy segmentations, we developed a novel label smoothing procedure and a loss function to train a deep learning model with smoothed noisy segmentations. Our proposed methods properly account for the uncertainty in tissue boundaries. We evaluated our method on 23 manually-segmented test images of a separate set of fetuses. Results show that our method achieves an average Dice similarity coefficient of 0.893 and 0.916 for the transient structures of younger and older fetuses, respectively. Our method generated results that were significantly more accurate than several state-of-the-art methods including nnU-Net that achieved the closest results to our method. Our trained model can serve as a valuable tool to enhance the accuracy and reproducibility of fetal brain analysis in MRI. 自动胎儿脑组织分割可以增强对这一关键阶段大脑发育的定量评估。深度学习方法代表了医学图像分割的最先进水平，并且在大脑分割方面也取得了令人印象深刻的成果。然而，有效训练深度学习模型来执行此任务需要大量训练图像来表示瞬态胎儿大脑结构的快速发育。另一方面，大量 3D 图像的手动多标签分割是令人望而却步的。为了应对这一挑战，我们使用基于可变形配准和概率图谱融合的自动多图谱分割策略，对涵盖 19-39 孕周的 272 个训练图像进行了分割，并手动纠正了这些分割中的大错误。由于此过程生成了具有噪声分割的大型训练数据集，因此我们开发了一种新颖的标签平滑程序和损失函数来训练具有平滑噪声分割的深度学习模型。我们提出的方法正确地考虑了组织边界的不确定性。我们在一组单独胎儿的 23 张手动分割的测试图像上评估了我们的方法。结果表明，我们的方法对于年轻和年长胎儿的瞬时结构的平均 Dice 相似系数分别为 0.893 和 0.916。我们的方法生成的结果比几种最先进的方法（包括 nnU-Net）更准确，它获得了与我们的方法最接近的结果。我们训练有素的模型可以作为一个有价值的工具来提高 MRI 中胎儿大脑分析的准确性和可重复性。 本文提出了一种从噪声标注中学习分割胎儿脑组织的深度学习方法，以解决胎儿大脑发育定量评估中的挑战。 Davood Karimi,Caitlin K. authors_text: Sabri Eyuboglu,Maya Varma,Khaled Saab,Jean-Benoit Delbrouck,Christopher Lee-Messer,Jared Dunnmon,James Zou,Christopher Ré
title: Domino: Discovering Systematic Errors with Cross-Modal Embeddings
title_zh: Domino：通过跨模态嵌入发现系统错误
abstract: Machine learning models that achieve high overall accuracy often make systematic errors on important subsets (or slices) of data. Identifying underperforming slices is particularly challenging when working with high-dimensional inputs (e.g. images, audio), where important slices are often unlabeled. In order to address this issue, recent studies have proposed automated slice discovery methods (SDMs), which leverage learned model representations to mine input data for slices on which a model performs poorly. To be useful to a practitioner, these methods must identify slices that are both underperforming and coherent (i.e. united by a human-understandable concept). However, no quantitative evaluation framework currently exists for rigorously assessing SDMs with respect to these criteria. Additionally, prior qualitative evaluations have shown that SDMs often identify slices that are incoherent. In this work, we address these challenges by first designing a principled evaluation framework that enables a quantitative comparison of SDMs across 1,235 slice discovery settings in three input domains (natural images, medical images, and time-series data). Then, motivated by the recent development of powerful cross-modal representation learning approaches, we present Domino, an SDM that leverages cross-modal embeddings and a novel error-aware mixture model to discover and describe coherent slices. We find that Domino accurately identifies 36% of the 1,235 slices in our framework - a 12 percentage point improvement over prior methods. Further, Domino is the first SDM that can provide natural language descriptions of identified slices, correctly generating the exact name of the slice in 35% of settings.
summary: Machine learning models that achieve high overall accuracy often make systematic errors on important subsets (or slices) of data. Identifying underperforming slices is particularly challenging when working with high-dimensional inputs (e.g. images, audio), where important slices are often unlabeled. In order to address this issue, recent studies have proposed automated slice discovery methods (SDMs), which leverage learned model representations to mine input data for slices on which a model performs poorly. To be useful to a practitioner, these methods must identify slices that are both underperforming and coherent (i.e. united by a human-understandable concept). However, no quantitative evaluation framework currently exists for rigorously assessing SDMs with respect to these criteria. Additionally, prior qualitative evaluations have shown that SDMs often identify slices that are incoherent. In this work, we address these challenges by first designing a principled evaluation framework that enables a quantitative comparison of SDMs across 1,235 slice discovery settings in three input domains (natural images, medical images, and time-series data). Then, motivated by the recent development of powerful cross-modal representation learning approaches, we present Domino, an SDM that leverages cross-modal embeddings and a novel error-aware mixture model to discover and describe coherent slices. We find that Domino accurately identifies 36% of the 1,235 slices in our framework - a 12 percentage point improvement over prior methods. Further, Domino is the first SDM that can provide natural language descriptions of identified slices, correctly generating the exact name of the slice in 35% of settings.
abstract_zh: 总体精度较高的机器学习模型通常会在重要的数据子集（或切片）上产生系统错误。在处理高维输入（例如图像、音频）时，识别表现不佳的切片尤其具有挑战性，其中重要的切片通常未标记。为了解决这个问题，最近的研究提出了自动切片发现方法（SDM），该方法利用学习的模型表示来挖掘输入数据，以找出模型表现不佳的切片。为了对实践者有用，这些方法必须识别性能不佳且连贯的切片（即由人类可理解的概念统一起来）。然而，目前尚不存在根据这些标准严格评估 SDM 的定量评估框架。此外，之前的定性评估表明，SDM 经常识别出不连贯的切片。在这项工作中，我们首先设计一个原则性的评估框架来应对这些挑战，该框架能够对三个输入域（自然图像、医学图像和时间序列数据）中 1,235 个切片发现设置的 SDM 进行定量比较。然后，在强大的跨模态表示学习方法的最新发展的推动下，我们提出了 Domino，这是一种利用跨模态嵌入和新颖的错误感知混合模型来发现和描述相干切片的 SDM。我们发现，Domino 准确识别了我们框架中 1,235 个切片中的 36%，比之前的方法提高了 12 个百分点。此外，Domino 是第一个能够为已识别切片提供自然语言描述的 SDM，能够在 35% 的设置中正确生成切片的确切名称。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Domino方法，利用跨模态嵌入和错误感知混合模型，发现机器学习模型在高维数据中系统性错误的连贯数据切片。
AI.motivation: 现有自动切片发现方法（SDMs）难以在高维数据（如图像、音频）中识别同时具有低性能和人类可理解概念的连贯切片，且缺乏量化评估框架。
AI.method: 设计包含1,235个切片设置的评估框架，提出Domino方法，结合跨模态表示学习与错误感知混合模型，实现切片发现与自然语言描述。
AI.result: Domino在三个领域中准确识别36%的切片（较先前方法提升12%），并在35%的场景中生成精确的切片名称描述。
AI.conclusion: Domino通过跨模态嵌入有效发现连贯切片，且首次实现自然语言描述，显著优于现有方法。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出Domino方法，利用跨模态嵌入和错误感知混合模型，发现机器学习模型在高维数据中系统性错误的连贯数据切片。

authors_text: Bolin Zhang,Zhiying Tu,Yunzhe Xu,Dianhui Chu,Xiaofei Xu
title: Requirements Elicitation in Cognitive Service for Recommendation
title_zh: 推荐认知服务中的需求获取
abstract: Nowadays, cognitive service provides more interactive way to understand users' requirements via human-machine conversation. In other words, it has to capture users' requirements from their utterance and respond them with the relevant and suitable service resources. To this end, two phases must be applied: I.Sequence planning and Real-time detection of user requirement, II.Service resource selection and Response generation. The existing works ignore the potential connection between these two phases. To model their connection, Two-Phase Requirement Elicitation Method is proposed. For the phase I, this paper proposes a user requirement elicitation framework (URef) to plan a potential requirement sequence grounded on user profile and personal knowledge base before the conversation. In addition, it can also predict user's true requirement and judge whether the requirement is completed based on the user's utterance during the conversation. For the phase II, this paper proposes a response generation model based on attention, SaRSNet. It can select the appropriate resource (i.e. knowledge triple) in line with the requirement predicted by URef, and then generates a suitable response for recommendation. The experimental results on the open dataset \emph{DuRecDial} have been significantly improved compared to the baseline, which proves the effectiveness of the proposed methods.
summary: Nowadays, cognitive service provides more interactive way to understand users' requirements via human-machine conversation. In other words, it has to capture users' requirements from their utterance and respond them with the relevant and suitable service resources. To this end, two phases must be applied: I.Sequence planning and Real-time detection of user requirement, II.Service resource selection and Response generation. The existing works ignore the potential connection between these two phases. To model their connection, Two-Phase Requirement Elicitation Method is proposed. For the phase I, this paper proposes a user requirement elicitation framework (URef) to plan a potential requirement sequence grounded on user profile and personal knowledge base before the conversation. In addition, it can also predict user's true requirement and judge whether the requirement is completed based on the user's utterance during the conversation. For the phase II, this paper proposes a response generation model based on attention, SaRSNet. It can select the appropriate resource (i.e. knowledge triple) in line with the requirement predicted by URef, and then generates a suitable response for recommendation. The experimental results on the open dataset \emph{DuRecDial} have been significantly improved compared to the baseline, which proves the effectiveness of the proposed methods.
abstract_zh: 如今，认知服务提供了更多交互方式，通过人机对话来了解用户的需求。换句话说，它必须从用户的话语中捕捉用户​​的需求，并用相关且合适的服务资源来响应他们。为此，必须应用两个阶段：I.序列规划和用户需求的实时检测，II.服务资源选择和响应生成。现有的工作忽略了这两个阶段之间的潜在联系。为了对它们的连接进行建模，提出了两阶段需求导出方法。对于第一阶段，本文提出了一个用户需求启发框架（URef），以在对话之前根据用户概况和个人知识库规划潜在需求序列。此外，它还可以根据用户在对话过程中的言语来预测用户的真实需求并判断需求是否完成。对于第二阶段，本文提出了一种基于注意力的响应生成模型SaRSNet。它可以根据URf预测的需求选择合适的资源（即知识三元组），然后生成合适的响应进行推荐。开放数据集\emph{DuRecDial}上的实验结果与基线相比有了显着改善，证明了所提方法的有效性。

AI.method: 提出URef框架进行需求序列规划与预测，以及基于注意力机制的SaRSNet模型实现知识三元组资源选择与响应生成。
AI.result: 在DuRecDial数据集上实验结果显著优于基线模型，验证了方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过建模两阶段关联，所提方法能更精准理解用户需求并生成个性化推荐响应。

search_text: Requirements Elicitation in Cognitive Service for Recommendation 推荐认知服务中的需求获取 Nowadays, cognitive service provides more interactive way to understand users' requirements via human-machine conversation. In other words, it has to capture users' requirements from their utterance and respond them with the relevant and suitable service resources. To this end, two phases must be applied: I.Sequence planning and Real-time detection of user requirement, II.Service resource selection and Response generation. The existing works ignore the potential connection between these two phases. To model their connection, Two-Phase Requirement Elicitation Method is proposed. For the phase I, this paper proposes a user requirement elicitation framework (URef) to plan a potential requirement sequence grounded on user profile and personal knowledge base before the conversation. In addition, it can also predict user's true requirement and judge whether the requirement is completed based on the user's utterance during the conversation. For the phase II, this paper proposes a response generation model based on attention, SaRSNet. It can select the appropriate resource (i.e. knowledge triple) in line with the requirement predicted by URef, and then generates a suitable response for recommendation. The experimental results on the open dataset \emph{DuRecDial} have been significantly improved compared to the baseline, which proves the effectiveness of the proposed methods. 如今，认知服务提供了更多交互方式，通过人机对话来了解用户的需求。换句话说，它必须从用户的话语中捕捉用户​​的需求，并用相关且合适的服务资源来响应他们。为此，必须应用两个阶段：I.序列规划和用户需求的实时检测，II.服务资源选择和响应生成。现有的工作忽略了这两个阶段之间的潜在联系。为了对它们的连接进行建模，提出了两阶段需求导出方法。对于第一阶段，本文提出了一个用户需求启发框架（URef），以在对话之前根据用户概况和个人知识库规划潜在需求序列。此外，它还可以根据用户在对话过程中的言语来预测用户的真实需求并判断需求是否完成。对于第二阶段，本文提出了一种基于注意力的响应生成模型SaRSNet。它可以根据URf预测的需求选择合适的资源（即知识三元组），然后生成合适的响应进行推荐。开放数据集\emph{DuRecDial}上的实验结果与基线相比有了显着改善，证明了所提方法的有效性。 本文提出一种两阶段需求挖掘方法，通过用户画像和知识库规划潜在需求序列，并基于对话内容预测需求完成状态，结合注意力机制生成推荐响应。 Bolin Zhang,Zhiying Tu,Yunzhe Xu,Dianhui Chu,Xiaofei Xu cs.AI,cs.SE
